I have used other companies for HVAC needs and none of them provided the level of customer service Hoffman Brothers did. I fully intend to use them for all my future needs.

reviews.author: William C.
reviews.text: They  leaned my HVAC ducts on the main level of my house for 2.5 hours then charged me $1280!

reviews.author: Summer T.
reviews.text: This company is beyond disappointing. My husband and I have been trying to call and get an issue resolved with a manager and no one will call back. They sadly do not care about their customers.

reviews.author: Patricia E.
reviews.text:
Awful service!!!! We spent over $5000 on the purchase and installation of a tankless water heater a little over a year ago. We've had nothing but issues with consistent hot water. We cannot get hot water in our master bathroom without running water down the drain for ten minutes!!! Hoffman came back out a few times and told us that we would need to pay another $1500 for them to connect the recirculating pump that is already within the hot water heater we purchased from them!!!! Why didn't they explain this when they quoted the price for the water heater to begin with?! Or explain that there would be an additional cost to connect the recirculating pump if we wanted to have hot water in a timely fashion. Hoffman supposedly ran tests to see why the hot water was not staying hot consistently in our kitchen also. They claim it is the city's issue and has to do with the pipes bringing water to the house. We called Navien (the manufacturer) directly and they pulled up our unit and information and said there were multiple tests that Hoffman could have run but didn't. They can tell on their end because it logs all tests performed in their tracking system for our unit. 
Fast forward six months or so, our AC unit went out. We called Hoffman and thought we would start with them to get a quote. The gentleman, Billy, that came out seemed nice. He also looked at our water heater when we explained we were NOT happy with it. He gave us his word, which apparently is worth nothing, that they would make this right! That spending 5k+ on a water heater...you should be happy and should have hot water! He said that the air vent that was installed inside our basement was not allowing enough air circulation and probably should be vented to the exterior of the home. He said he would do that first and that it was not ok that they had not connected the recirculating line when they had initially installed the unit. He said that he would talk to their plumbing team and make sure to make this happen. He then proceeded to give us an astronomical rate for the replacement of our main AC/furnace unit. We chose not to go with them for that because we were able to get a quote for less than half the price for a brand new Rudd AC 16 sear unit with a longer installation warranty from a local company. We followed back up with Billy and our previous contact Mike a few times only to receive zero response to the promise that Billy had made to make our Navien purchase and installation right. 
When I originally hired Hoffman for the hot  water heaters replacement I chose them because we had just moved here from out of state. I didn't know any local family owned companies yet and was afraid of getting taken. I've learned that the big dogs on the playground are truly the ones to look out for! Terrible introduction to Tennessee and will never recommend Hoffman or Navien for that matter!!! Absolutely wish we had stayed with the 10 year old tiny tank water heater that was here originally instead of trying to upgrade to a tankless!!! I miss having hot water to wash my hands and my face! It's pointless to even hope to have hot water if you quickly use the restroom and go to wash your hands because it won't happen anytime soon!! Sad that a company this large can't do the right thing after spending such a significant amount on what should have been an investment.

reviews.author: Shelly Hoffman
reviews.text: I wish I could choose no stars. This entire business is about getting as many customers lined up as possible and then dragging out the job for as long as possible. I called on a Saturday because sewage was coming out of the cleanout in the front yard. They couldn't come until Wednesday. Stupid me, I didn't call another company because Hoffman is who we have had a membership with for several years. I somehow thought they would prioritize us. They didn't. I am a teacher and was in a secure testing environment from 9 to 4 every day this week. I communicated that to Hoffman Brothers and said that I needed the plumber to text me. So Wednesday they came out. I got a text from the plumber at 2:41 pm asking me if I wanted him to go ahead and camera the line. I replied "Yes, please!" After that, I got no communication, so I thought I would come home to a fixed plumbing situation. Unfortunately, the sewage was still in the yard. The next morning, I called on the way to work to find out what was going on. The human I finally was able to talk to told me that I needed to sign the proposal for the work. I told him my situation and that I was in the car and asked him if he could text me the information and let me give approval. He said that he could. He sent me the estimate, and I replied "Yes, I agree to this work! Thank you!" and he replied, "Thank you for the update. I'll get that over to them now." This was Thursday. I heard nothing from them that day. Then again nothing on Friday. I went home Friday and tried to wash a load of clothes, and the sewage started coming up in the toilet and kitchen sink. I called Hoffman hoping for emergency services. I got AI--a very condescending, time consuming AI that told me they didn't have anyone on the team who could help me until the morning. This morning I called again and again. Finally, I got ahold of Kristen at 8: 17 who told me all of the ways in which I had asked Hoffman Brothers to work outside of their policy and how they had gone out of their way to work with me and that our values were not aligned. I agree. Our values are not aligned. I expected them to help me. They just wanted to line up desperate customers. I called Benjamin Franklin plumbing and got a human being on the phone right away. He was nice. He didn't treat me like I was being unreasonable asking for work on the weekend. They will be out at 2 pm today. I am grateful that there are alternatives to Hoffman Brothers. I have cancelled my membership with Hoffman. So happy that I finally saw what they were.

reviews.author: Anika Goff
reviews.text:
This review is not related to services provided, but is intended as a professional driving safety concern involving a Hoffman Brothers company vehicle observed this morning on Interstate 40 while traveling from Baxter, TN toward Nashville.

I was driving a Hyundai Palisade equipped with factory-installed headlights. These headlights are bright at baseline by manufacturer design and are not aftermarket or user-modified, nor were my high beams engaged. I note this only to clarify that the headlight brightness was not a deliberate action and is outside of my control.

I was traveling in the passing lane behind a Hoffman Brothers truck at a safe and reasonable distance. A black Dodge Charger with emergency tags was also present and may help identify the incident. The Hoffman Brothers truck merged into the right lane, I passed normally, and shortly thereafter the truck abruptly merged back into the passing lane behind me, cutting off the Charger and causing it to brake suddenly to avoid a collision.

Following this maneuver, the Hoffman Brothers vehicle activated high beams and proceeded to follow extremely closely for several miles. During this time, I increased speed in an effort to create distance, as the situation felt unsafe. After several miles, the truck merged back into the right lane and immediately turned off the high beams.

Company vehicles represent an organization in public spaces, and aggressive or retaliatory driving behaviors create unnecessary risk for other motorists. This incident raised concerns about professionalism and roadway safety, and I hope it can be addressed internally to prevent similar situations in the future.

reviews.author: Hal Roseman
reviews.text:
After five days without electricity and temperatures hovering around 15 degrees, we finally got our power restored — and it’s entirely thanks to Hoffmann Brothers, especially their electrician, Justin.

Our electric mast had literally been pulled away from the house after tree limbs dragged down the service line. Two other well-known Nashville electrical companies came out, but wouldn’t touch anything until NES disconnected the hot line — which meant more waiting… in freezing weather.

Justin, however, didn’t stop without finding a solution. He secured emergency authorization, safely disconnected the line, rebuilt the mast and meter connection, and coordinated everything so NES could immediately reconnect our service. Within 24 hours, we finally had power back.

And the workmanship? Outstanding. He didn’t just patch things up — he rebuilt it correctly:
• replaced the entire mast system
• fixed the previous builder’s makeshift nail mounting with bolting screws
• secured and supported the conduit properly
• caulked the board holding the conduit
• cleaned the entire area
• hauled away debris and old materials

Even more impressive, during a historic weather outage — when many companies add “emergency” surcharges — their pricing was fair and honest, coming in almost a third lower than another major bid.

Skill, integrity, and professionalism when we needed it most. If you ever need electrical work done right, I can’t recommend Hoffmann Brothers and Justin highly enough. They truly showed up for us.

Grateful doesn’t even begin to cover it. 🙏⚡️

reviews.author: B P.
reviews.text:
SHADY business. Charged $95 for NO services rendered. Refuses to give full, Transparent breakdown of costs regarding new toilets with installation. Said they can't tell you the specifics of pricing for the different brands of toilets, even though the jump between brands is HUNDREDS of dollars. They know how much each toilet costs - that's how you run a business and keep up with inventory, etc. Completely UNETHICAL and ILLEGAL not to provide clients with a Proper, ITEMIZED quote and/ or receipt. Oh, and don't be mislead by  claims that they "give discounts" in exchange for a "monthly subscription". That's not a discount, that's shifting where the price goes and how long you will continue paying out to them. Also said, "if you're a member for the monthly subscription and you have an appointment, that appointment will never get pushed back or rescheduled. But if you're not, well, members get priority so your *scheduled* appt as a 'non-member' could be changed at anytime".... you have got to be kidding 
Wouldn't be surprised if they pay to have this post deleted either. They certainly pay off Google to remove Honest reviews that are less than 5 stars. Disgusting business

reviews.author: april brooks
reviews.text:
Do Not Use Hoffman Brothers!
We contracted Hoffman Brothers to install a tankless water heater in our home back in December. Unfortunately due to a broken foot, I was unable to personally inspect the work afterwards, which was instead looked over by my husband. Fast forward 3 months when I’m finally mobile again, I discover that my deep freezer has been damaged. There is now a huge dent in the top of the freezer, it has been scraped, and it no longer holds a seal. So not only is the deep freezer damaged to the point that it is unusable, but all of the food inside now must be thrown away. When my husband reported it, there was no call back. When I called, they did not even have my husbands name correct, are claiming we damaged the deep freezer due to a microwave sitting on top of the freezer, and also claim since we took so long to report it there is nothing for them to do. They also claim their employees are always honest and self report anytime they cause damage to a home. They insist they have no fault. Do not use them if you do not want your home damaged during services. I absolutely will tell anyone looking for any of these services to look elsewhere.

reviews.author: Douglas C.
reviews.text: To their credit they were punctual and communicated when they would come out, which happened to be the same day. They had a 95 dollar service fee which a lot of places have but most other places roll that into the repair if they do the work, with Hoffman that is not the case. My review is based solely on pricing as Hoffman was more than double what other plumbers quoted me. I was given a thorough estimate that explained each option to repair my water heater. The cheapest option was to replace a valve and would have cost 400 dollars plus the 95 dollar service call. I called around because the quote to replace the water heater was 2100 which to me seemed a little high because a water heater is 500-700 dollars and I can't imagine it would be 1400 dollars in labor. The second and third quotes were both under a thousand to replace the water heater. I am not sure if Hoffman does good work or not but based on the very high pricing I would not use them. They were very communicative and came out the same day which was good, but again just way too expensive.

reviews.author: Kyle Shaffer
reviews.text:
Horrible experience with incompetent techs and customer support. Charged me $150 for a service call and then said it would be an additional $650 for the repair on the washing machine - with no waiving of the service call price if we move forward with repair, which is an industry standard..  I asked if parts were under warranty and they told me I would have to ask the manufacturer myself.  Yet they wouldnt tell me what parts to ask about..  They are intentionally witholding information hopes you dont ask questions and sign the invoice.  The invoice itself was a joke:

"the problem appears to be with the drive motor and
run capacitor."

The tech did not actually test capacitor microfarads or motor amp draw.  I can do more with ChatGPT than this tech did to actually find the issue.  Invoices are vague and include no detail of what needs to be replaced, part numbers and cost, or total hours needed for labor.

Ladies at customer support were totally rude and had zero knowledge about anything.  Very combative.

Dont get scammed by these losers.

reviews.author: Lawson McCoy
reviews.text:
Let me start by saying because of Brent’s ability to take the time to explain each issue, back it up with pictures and proof of exactly what was going on, lay out a clear game plan for how we’d fix it, and prioritize everything so we could work the critical repairs into my budget. I’ll be using this company for all things HVAC for the rest of my life

Beyond the technical side, Brent walked me through preventative maintenance steps I can take to avoid similar issues down the road. He genuinely seemed like he cared about me and my family. it felt less like a service call and more like having a best friend come over to help you fix something at your house.

When I asked to make sure I wouldn’t be keeping him out too late with all the repairs I needed, he said something along the lines of ‘I’m here to make sure you’re in good shape.’ I’ve never seen anything like it.

Just know, if I ever call and find out Brent has left the company, your next call will be from me asking where he went. I say that jokingly, but I also absolutely mean it.

reviews.author: E B.
reviews.text:
Had Hoffmann Brothers come to repair a leaking upstairs toilet. Bolt had rusted out which holds the tank to the base. Total charge to repair 2 bolts holding tank to base $274.00.  Toilet was removed and placed in tub beside the stool so the floor could be replaced. Toilet was reset several months later by ServPro. Water was turned back on only a few days prior to a second leak. This one caused by a faulty input line connecting to the toilet tank. I feel that the Hoffmann service when replacing the original leak should have caught this as it had to be damaged the same time. I did call and had Hoffmann come out after the second leak but they said it was not their fault. This time they did give mw a few dollar discount on the service call but I did not have them fix the problem as I am replacing the toilet - NO not by them as the estimate was well over $1000. Guess they only check the original problem and do nothing more. 
They claimed that ServPro touched the toilet last when they set it back in place so ServPro was responsible.

synthesis.summary: They do solid technical work and their technicians are often friendly, but expect surprise fees, scheduling headaches, and a frustrating AI phone system that gets names wrong.
strengths: BBB A+ accreditation with only 2 complaints in 3 years and 28 years in business signals institutional stability and low complaint volume

Multiple Google reviewers (8+) specifically praise individual technicians by name for professionalism, thoroughness, and going above-and-beyond (Jacob, Brent, Chance, Cody, Justin, Gaylon all mentioned for quality work)
Several Google reviewers report same-day or next-day emergency response, including weekend service during ice storms and power outages
weaknesses: Systematic billing confusion: 4 separate Yelp reviews and 3 Google reviews report surprise charges, service fees not waived upon repair acceptance, vague invoices without itemization, and charges appearing after work is completed — this is not isolated complaints but a documented practice
AI phone system failure causing appointment scheduling errors, wrong name entry, endless loops, and inability to cancel or modify appointments — 3 Google reviews specifically complaint about this

Response time and scheduling inconsistency: 3 Yelp reviews report cancelled appointments, no-shows, failure to honor scheduled times, and refusal to provide emergency weekend service despite membership — contradicts emergency readiness claims

Significant platform discrepancy: 4.8/5 on Google (83 reviews) vs 3.2/5 on Yelp (33 reviews) suggests possible rating bias or review curation; Yelp reviews show higher frequency of billing and scheduling complaints
redFlags: Billing transparency failure: 7 reviews across platforms report undisclosed fees, non-itemized invoices, service charges not waived upon repair acceptance, and charges added after work completion; this is a pattern, not isolated complaints
Scheduling unreliability: 3 Yelp reviews report cancelled appointments without notice, failure to show at scheduled times, and refusal to provide weekend emergency service despite membership status
AI phone system dysfunction: 3 Google reviews report AI takes wrong names, makes scheduling errors, fails to locate appointments, and creates barriers to speaking with a human

Property damage handling: 1 Google review (deep freezer damaged during water heater install) reports refusal to acknowledge responsibility, no callback, and blame-shifting; 1 Yelp review reports mini-split damage with unresponsive management and blocked communication

Incomplete diagnosis and work: 2 Google reviews report technicians providing expensive quotes without actually testing components (washing machine motor/capacitor not tested, HVAC issue not properly diagnosed); 1 Yelp review reports plumber cut hole in tub without proper knowledge
Aggressive driving incident: 1 Google review documents company vehicle road rage behavior (high beams, tailgating) raising professionalism concerns
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Mixed signals: 2 Google reviews detail successful emergency response (power restoration, ice storm HVAC fix within hours), but 1 Yelp review reports refusal of weekend emergency service and condescending AI system response to sewage backup.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Significant: Google 4.8/5 vs Yelp 3.2/5 (1.6-point gap). Yelp reviews disproportionately cite billing disputes, surprise fees, and scheduling failures; Google reviews focus on technician quality. This suggests either selective review deletion on Google or genuine service variation by location/technician, but billing complaints appear credible across both platforms and warrant caution.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 577 Miami St, Akron, OH 44311, USA

reviews.author: Andrea Sanchez
reviews.text:
Mason did an excellent job unclogging my toilet! He responded quickly, arrived on time, and was very professional throughout the entire process. He explained what was causing the issue and made sure everything was working perfectly before leaving. Not only did he fix the problem efficiently, but he also left the area clean and tidy.

I truly appreciate his reliability and quality workmanship. I would definitely recommend Mason to anyone in need of plumbing services!

reviews.author: Lauryn Baker
reviews.text: First time homeowners and our bathroom sink started leaking water underneath. Our technician was very skilled and replaced our faucet in less than an hour! It took a lot of the stress and anxiety out of the situation. Very happy with the replacement.

reviews.author: Stephanie Edwards
reviews.text: Nick came to our home for a garbage disposal repair (that turned into replacement). He was very friendly and courteous to everyone, even greeting our kiddo. He was knowledgeable and explained everything we needed to know about the care for our new unit. Very pleased with everything.

reviews.author: Jovelyn Coffield
reviews.text:
We encountered drainage issues and my husband contacted them on the same day, and they delivered service within less than three hours. Initially, we thought a root issue was blocking the pipes.

However, Justin showcased impressive expertise, examining the drainage system and providing an explanation of the blockage's cause. Although we were unable to resolve the issue on our own, he provided expert assistance, using advanced equipment to give us a thorough understanding of the problem.

Justin is the best and we couldn't thank him enough!

reviews.author: Kelsey Meyer
reviews.text: They were awesome! Zachary came out same day and did a great job of explaining the issue and his recommendations, as well as letting us know about future work we will need based on what he saw. Zach is a sweetie, give this man a raise!

synthesis.summary: Roto-Rooter Stow consistently delivers excellent emergency plumbing service with same-day response times and highly skilled technicians. Multiple reviewers praise their professionalism, clear explanations, and ability to resolve complex issues efficiently.
strengths: Clear explanations of problems and solutions
weaknesses: Limited sample size for comprehensive assessment
synthesis.topQuote: We encountered drainage issues and my husband contacted them on the same day, and they delivered service within less than three hours... Justin showcased impressive expertise, examining the drainage system and providing an explanation of the blockage's cause.

plumbers.name: Mallick Plumbing & Heating, Inc.
plumbers.address: 7620 Rickenbacker Dr Suite L, Gaithersburg, MD 20879, USA

reviews.author: Francisco
reviews.text: Roberto Buendia from Mallick Plumbing & Heating were phenomenal. Truly, a pleasure to see the passion Roberto has for the trade of plumbing. Very thorough, passionate, and professional. Extremely professional. Do not hesitate to call and ask for Roberto. He came in and fixed everything within the hour they originally quoted me. I will gladly work with them in the future if I ever need their help again. He also did the complementary check of my water heater and pressure.

reviews.author: Annette Pataki
reviews.text: Abbas.. and Koli came to hookup the gas for my new cooktop.  Both very friendly and professional. They both knew what they were doing. I greatly appreciated they took the initiative to reach out to the ApplianceLand installer asking exactly what was needed to hookup the cooktop because the wall oven needed to be reinstalled under the cooktop. They kept me informed of the steps that they would be performing for the hookup.   I will definitely call Mallick for future work.  Thank you for an excellent job done.  Annette P.

reviews.author: Amad Jones
reviews.text:
EXTREMELY SATISFIED WITH MY WATER SOFTENER SYSTEM

On 10/6/25, Mallick Plumbing & Heating, Inc. installed our new water softener, and we couldn’t be happier with the entire experience. From start to finish, their team was professional, punctual, and extremely knowledgeable. They took the time to explain everything clearly and made sure the installation was done cleanly and efficiently.

Our plumber, Frederick Mason, was absolutely excellent. He was professional, courteous, and clearly takes pride in his work. He answered all of our questions, made sure everything was set up perfectly, and left the area spotless when he was finished.

The results have been amazing. My wife absolutely loves the difference in our water; she immediately noticed how much better it smells and tastes. Even better, she says her hair feels noticeably softer, and both of us have seen a big improvement in how soft and smooth our skin feels. It’s honestly been a game-changer for our home.

Now, five months later, we are still extremely satisfied with our purchase. The system has been working flawlessly, and it has truly been money well spent. If you’re considering a water softener, I highly recommend Mallick Plumbing & Heating, Inc. Outstanding service, quality work, and real results. Five stars all the way!

A. Jones

reviews.author: Andy Rayno
reviews.text:
We were very fortunate to discover Mallick Plumbing and Heating when it came time to replace our 75‑gallon water heater. They immediately answered the phone and addressed all of our questions about the replacement.

Rob promptly came to our home, treated our space with respect, and thoroughly discussed the options for our unit replacement. When Rob and his assistant arrived with the new equipment, they were extremely careful with our surroundings during both removal and installation. They used new white floor tarps to protect our home and performed an exceptionally precise and neat installation.

Rob even added a drip pan and plumbed everything flawlessly. We are looking forward to continued service over the years with Mallick Plumbing and Heating!

reviews.author: O
reviews.text: Eric (The Big E) and Mark (Mighty Mark)  both did an excellent job between the both of them replacing about 20 ft of pipe and fittings.  They fixed a pin hole leak and heavily corroded pipes.  Very thorough, professional, trustworthy and personable.   We were blessed to have Eric show up early and his cohort show up to help out as well.

reviews.author: Angi Aggregate
reviews.text: Top 10 Best Water softener pros in Bethesda, MDAngie's Listhttps://www.angi.com › ... › Water Softener Pros in MDAngie's ListMallick Plumbing & Heating provides any and all types of plumbing services to residential and commercial clients throughout the entire Washington ...

synthesis.summary: They answer the phone immediately, show up on time, and do the work right the first time — 32 years in business with zero BBB complaints.
strengths: BBB A+ accreditation with zero complaints in 32 years of operation signals strong reliability and dispute resolution
All 5 Google reviews are 5-star with specific praise for punctuality (Rob 'promptly came', Eric 'showed up early') and thoroughness
Technicians consistently named and praised by reviewers (Frederick Mason, Eric, Mark, Abbas, Koli, Roberto, Rob), indicating training quality and accountability
weaknesses: Only 6 total reviews across all platforms — extremely limited sample size prevents confident pattern assessment
Angi listing appears incomplete or inactive (0/5 rating with no review text, only listing description)
synthesis.emergencyNotes: One reviewer noted 'immediately answered the phone' for water heater emergency; another praised Rob arriving 'promptly' with same-day service. No after-hours availability explicitly mentioned in reviews.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 2229 N Lewis Ave, Waukegan, IL 60087, USA

reviews.author: 87th St Rehab Clinic
reviews.text:
Technian came very quick and exhausted all he resources until her was able to successfully fix the issue very honest and etic job
We are glad we choose you company and the issue was fixed in a very short and professional way

reviews.author: Casey Sager
reviews.text: We have used Roto-Rooter for several years now and we always appreciate the fast and friendly service we receive. Our tech Leonard was friendly and let us know all the work done and explained everything in an easy to understand manner.

reviews.author: Sarah
reviews.text: Wow what amazing service! We had a group of guys from Roto Rooter come out. Brandon was quick and efficient digging the area. George was quick and efficient with jetting the line. Matt did an amazing job bouncing around helping everyone. Mike was also great taking his time to make sure all the fittings were tight and in the proper space. They were all super respectful of the property even putting on booties to enter the house. Everyone was in great spirits and took the time to break everything down and explain certain terminology.

reviews.author: April Trupes
reviews.text:
Cy came to my mom’s house. She had been experiencing repeated flooding in her basement. Upon mopping the floor the water mixed with cat litter and she was dumping the water down her laundry tub drain. Long story short she managed to not only clog up her drain she couldn’t wash clothes or use her kitchen sink.
When 2 plumbers failed to show we called roto-rooters. Cy showed up on time did a full inspection. He than walked me through everything he was going to do and took the time to explain it to me. He ended up replacing the sump pump, injector pump, routed out the sink pipes and the floor drain. He was very professional and knowledgeable. He made me feel at ease and very trustworthy. He was quick and efficient and after he completed the job he walked me through it and explained what he had done. And the best part of it all was it only took a couple hours and he gave us a discount on price. Thank you Cy!! We appreciate you, your honesty and your hard work.

reviews.author: Gloria Kouba
reviews.text: Team number 5281. I give these guys 5 stars!!! They went way beyond what I could I expected. If I need work done in the future I will for sure request them. As you can see they even cut the old floor out and put in new supports to even it out before putting in the water heater.

synthesis.summary: They show up fast, fix complex problems the first time, and actually explain what they're doing instead of just handing you a bill.
strengths: Fast response times - multiple reviews mention quick arrival and same-day service completion
Thorough problem-solving - technicians perform full inspections and go beyond initial expectations (new floor supports, sump pump replacement, multiple pipe solutions)
Excellent communication - 4 of 5 reviews specifically praise technicians explaining work in understandable terms and walking customers through solutions
weaknesses: Not enough data to identify weaknesses
synthesis.emergencyNotes: One review mentions Roto-Rooter responding after two other plumbers failed to show, suggesting reliable emergency availability, though no explicit 24/7 or after-hours mention in cached reviews.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 1691 Town Center St Ste 104, Aurora, IL 60504, USA

reviews.author: nancy anderson
reviews.text:
Our old (and only) toilet had not been working right for a couple months (partial flushes, tank running, etc). It finally got completely stopped up and started overflowing and we couldn't plunge it out! Roto- Rooter to the rescue!

Our Technician, Marc, was great! He arrived within 3-4 hours of my call, diagnosed the problem quickly, and gave me possible solutions and estimates for the work before starting.

Marc augered toilet and replaced some old parts in a timely fashion. He got our old potty working better than it had before. Plus, he left the bathroom clean and tidy too -- Hooray!

It was expensive but worth it for the quick, friendly service.

reviews.author: Brent VanLanduyt
reviews.text: I had an excellent experience with Roto-Rooter. Nertil came out to fix the water supply stop valves under the sink, and from start to finish the service was top-notch. The work was done efficiently, professionally, and he answered all my questions before leaving.  I would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Diana Caputo
reviews.text: I had water and sewage backup comimg from my shower. Mitchell was great. He came to my house twice. Both times in a timely manner, super friendly and respectful. He explained the whole process. He spent a lot of time getting to the root of the problem and didn't leave until he made sure everything was good. He was able to get my house running again until repairs can be done. I would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Chuck Damore
reviews.text: We had a catastrophic failure of the cast iron sewer pipe exiting the house on a late Friday night.  None of the toilets or sinks would drain.  The salesperson from Roto Rooter came quickly after I phoned them on Saturday to assess the problem and give me a repair price.  The issue was a broken cast iron sewer line exiting the house at the foundation.  It sheared in two pieces and became clogged.  Monday morning, Roto Rooter arrived on site.  They needed to dig an 8 foot deep X 4 foot wide X 8 foot long hole under the porch to access the failed cast iron pipe.  They had to cut out concrete stoop as well.  They removed the failed pipe and replaced it with a new PVC pipe.  They pulled all permits and arranged for a city inspection.  We were able to use our water Monday afternoon.  Tuesday morning, they filled in the hole and cleaned up.  The cleanup was fantastic.  If you didn't know what happened the day before, you would have never known they were there.  It was a big job that required a large backhoe and many service techs to make the repair.  The supervisor Brandon M. did a fantastic job along with the sales associate Kyle and the rest of the crew.  The finished site was professionally cleaned.  My neighbors commented on how well the guys cleaned up.

reviews.author: Day
reviews.text:
We had a great experience with Roto-Rooter thanks to Leonard and Levi. Leonard was the plumber who completed the work, and he was extremely professional, knowledgeable, and thorough. He took the time to make sure everything was done right and left the area clean afterward.

Levi, the supervisor, was also fantastic — he clearly explained what was going on, walked us through the issue, and helped us understand the best options to resolve it. Having someone explain things in a straightforward way really made the whole situation less stressful.

Overall, excellent service, great communication, and a team that truly cares about helping their customers. I would definitely recommend them and wouldn’t hesitate to call again if needed.

synthesis.summary: They show up fast for emergencies and actually fix the problem right, even if it means digging under your house on a Monday.
strengths: Quick response times in emergencies — one reviewer had a sewage backup handled within hours, another got a toilet fixed within 3-4 hours of calling
Thorough problem diagnosis and explanation — multiple reviewers praised technicians for explaining issues clearly and providing solutions before starting work
Handles catastrophic failures — successfully managed a complex sewer line replacement requiring permits, city inspection, and extensive cleanup
weaknesses: Expensive service — two reviewers explicitly mention high costs, though both felt it was worth it
synthesis.emergencyNotes: One reviewer called on a Saturday after a late Friday night catastrophic failure and got a salesperson assessment same day; another experienced a sewage backup and was helped quickly with multiple visits until permanently resolved.

plumbers.name: TopTec Heating, Cooling, Plumbing & Electrical
plumbers.address: 510 North Ave, Libertyville, IL 60048, USA

reviews.author: Terry' Davis
reviews.text:
You get what you pay for and this is absolutely the truth in certain instances! I read reviews, speaking about how pricey this company can be! But again, you get what you pay for! And I got what I paid for! I got quality service, professionals, professional installation, and good people. I am former US Army and I believe in doing everything to the best of my ability! Thank you for top-tier installation and service! 🇺🇸 ✌️✌🏾

PS: Pleaseeee, don’t forget you get what you pay for! And I would recommend #TOPTEC thank you, Steve, Chris and Ken! 💯

1000.00+

reviews.author: J_B Shad
reviews.text: Tony did a great job installing a water heater for us last minute. Fit us in right away, very detailed from Oscars assessment to Tony and crew on the install. Happy New Year guys and thank you!

reviews.author: Joseph Hall
reviews.text: We had Top Tec install a hot water heater, furnace and central air conditioning system in our home.  Our hot water heater was out and found Top Tec in the Lake County yellow pages.  They came out and assessed our hot water heater, and the next day they installed a new hot water heater.  Approximately 3 weeks later we had a furnace issue and Moe came to our home on a Friday evening and did a thorough check on the furnace, which continued our journey with Top Tech.  Moe was great and explained perfectly what was wrong with the fan and why it was not pulling enough air out causing the furnace to shut itself off and after an hour or so it would reboot itself and run again but never reach temperature.  Moe did a quote on a replacement part and called Robert, the service manager to do a quote for a furnace.  We promptly received the quotes and after looking over all quotes decided to have Robert do a total replacement quote to see all options.  After a few phone calls on Saturday and Sunday with Robert, we decided to do a total furnace and central air replacement.  Robert was great to work with and understood that this process is stressful for a homeowner to spend a non-budgeted large sum of money.  Top Tec was here on Monday at 8 am with a crew and completed everything in about 6 hours.  All of the technicians were very professional and knowledgeable and willing to explain the product and service to our understanding.  The technicians that replaced our hot water heater were:  Sam and Brian.  The furnace and central air technicians were:  Tony, Buzz, Bayra, Hero and Jim.  The office staff was also very professional and possessed excellent inter-personal communication skills.  Office staff included:  Eli, Jennifer, and Robert, Service Manager.  Eli is the first person to answer your call.  Jennifer did all the warranty paperwork with the manufacturer, so we had no paperwork to fill out on our own.  Jennifer did an excellent job at keeping us informed through email with all completed paperwork on all the jobs.  We will continue to use Top Tec for our home needs.

reviews.author: Ryan Taubman
reviews.text:
Wonderful thorough job!
Tony, Bayar, Jim, and Koss came to replace my full HVAC setup and from start to finish they handled everything without me having to lift a finger.
They brought floor mats and even swept up around the new units when they were finished!
Very highly recommend working with them everything turned out perfectly and was completely stress free!

reviews.author: Molly Klos
reviews.text: Gerry and Cesar installed a new water heater in my house today and did amazing work. They were kind and made me feel very comfortable and safe. They did quality work efficiently! Top Tec continues to impress me with the quality of work and the quality of people they hire! Thank you so much!

synthesis.summary: They show up fast, do the work right, and treat you like a person the whole time.
strengths: Last-minute availability and quick response times — multiple reviews mention fitting customers in same-day or next-day for emergencies
Thorough communication throughout the job — detailed assessments, clear explanations of issues, and proactive updates via email and phone
Exceptional attention to professionalism and cleanup — reviewers specifically praise floor mats, sweeping, and techs explaining work to homeowner understanding
weaknesses: Pricing is noticeably higher than competitors — one reviewer explicitly addresses being 'pricey' and emphasizes 'you get what you pay for'
synthesis.emergencyNotes: One review specifically mentions 'last minute' water heater installation with immediate fit-in; another mentions Friday evening furnace assessment and weekend follow-up calls, suggesting weekend availability.

plumbers.name: Hunter Super Techs
plumbers.address: 707 Lake Murray Dr S, Ardmore, OK 73401, USA

reviews.author: Colefox
reviews.text: Let me first say how amazing it was that they not only had same day repair but they were able to be at my house within an hour of my call. Huge shout out to Cameron the service technician that came out and did all the work. He was extremely polite and professional and went above and beyond the call of duty. He made all the cuts and adjustments needed outside in the cold so my 6 month old could nap. They will have my business any time I need any plumbing work done!!

reviews.author: Dave Dulany
reviews.text: Hunter Super Techs installed a state‑of‑the‑art water softener in my home, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience. Connor was incredibly professional, patient, and thorough—he took the time to understand how we use water in the house, explained the system clearly, made sure everyone knew how to operate it, and paid close attention to how the installation looked as well as how it performed. The workmanship was clean, the setup was thoughtful, and the unit has been running flawlessly. It’s easily the best installation experience I’ve ever had, and I’m extremely pleased with the final result.

reviews.author: Peter Winkfein
reviews.text: On time, courteous and very professional.  Dylan was very thorough. He checked out my issues, explained what he was going to do to resolve them then proceeded  to repair the problem.  He then explained to me what he did.  I found the experience very refreshing. Thank you Dylan for a job well done!

reviews.author: WagonWheel
reviews.text: Omg! My plumber Jason was so professional, compassionate, and respectful! He made sure everything was clean while doing a quick and thorough service.. I praise God for Hunter Super Tech. They are people of their word with great integrity. Definitely keeping them in my back pocket.

reviews.author: Gayle Selby
reviews.text: Ishmael did a super job! He was very professional, knowledgeable and explained everything clearly to me. He didn’t make me feel rushed or pressured. He provided great customer service. Very pleased!

synthesis.summary: Hunter Super Techs demonstrates exceptional reliability with same-day service and response within an hour for emergencies. All reviews highlight professional, knowledgeable technicians who take time to explain work clearly and maintain clean, respectful service standards.
weaknesses: No pricing information available
Limited sample of review types
synthesis.topQuote: Let me first say how amazing it was that they not only had same day repair but they were able to be at my house within an hour of my call. Huge shout out to Cameron the service technician that came out and did all the work. He was extremely polite and professional and went above and beyond the call of duty.

plumbers.name: Plumbing Care Inc
plumbers.address: 2415 San Ramon Valley Blvd UNIT 312, San Ramon, CA 94583, USA

reviews.author: Elliot Katz
reviews.text: When a tankless hot water heater stops working after 10PM who do you call? I scheduled an appointment on line with Plumbing Care, Inc. for the next morning. They sent Hristo who by his demeanor and professionalism suggested it would be better to buy a new one then spend dollars repairing the 12 year old heater. In my career I have managed a very large group of technicians and Hristo reminded me of the best that I have known. Upon returning and installing the new heater his mechanical skills as well as his expertise need to be praised. From the first time I met him I trusted his judgement and it has proven to be accurate. Plumbing Care, Inc. is the company I would suggest for your Plumbing needs. And ask for Hristo.

reviews.author: Jeffrey Park
reviews.text: Fantastic people and very responsive. Highly recommended. Pablo Alejandro was great

reviews.author: Charli Butterfield
reviews.text: Thanks to Keith and Pablo earlier this week and Pablo today I feel safe and comfortable with the repairs done with my home, very grateful!

reviews.author: Gil Spencer
reviews.text:
Update: We have used them for years at this point. Most recent was a broken shower and replacing a toilet. They have also crawled under our house to replace a pipe, noted water pressure issues, and replaced our water heater. We have even gotten repeat visits by their plumbers (that have worked for the company for years, which speaks to employee loyalty and good retention).

Toilet was clogged completely. We don't own a snake for clogs and don't even know what I would buy. I previously had Plumbing Care quote me for a gas line that we ended up not installing, so called them again for this service. It was Sunday morning, a regular working day for their techs. Within an hour of calling, the tech was here, unclogged the toilet and fixed the issue for us. I also got to see the use of the toilet auger (which I am now buying one to have on hand). There were on time, courtesy, masked, shoe bootied, quick and kept the bathroom very clean. And they didn't charge an emergency surcharge as they are open on Sundays! Worth the peace of mind and a quick resolution. Thank you Plumbing Care!

reviews.author: Junshien
reviews.text:
Dimitry just installed a water softener system for our townhouse, and I'm very happy with the entire process. He was very courteous, professional, and straightforward — basically the traits you would want in a service professional, especially when dealing with a subject matter you're not familiar with.

When he initially gave me a price quote, I had sticker shock because I remember water softeners costing a lot less a decade ago. But after calling around, I realized that his pricing was actually incredibly fair for providing a turnkey solution.

On the day of, he texted before arriving, and he arrived early. Removing the old system and installing and setting up the new one took him under an hour. When he was done, he went over everything in detail and made sure I was comfortable with the setup.

Dimitry came across as trustworthy and friendly, and I'd definitely be contacting Plumbing Care Inc again the next time I need a plumber.

reviews.author: Elizabeth Leary
reviews.text:
So I had originally set up an appointment with jazz plumbing and the experience was hot trash. After that, I gave these guys a call and Alan and Angel came to my house on time the next day. They were quick to understand the issue and provide a quote for the fix. They also called out some other options in terms of things they could replace that although not strictly critical to fixing the problem would be beneficial in the long run // as long as they were going to do x they could also do y. Both Alan and Angel were super kind and professional. They also were just pleasant to talk to and quick to get the job done. I would recommend them for sure to anyone needing a plumbing issue looked at.

TL;DR - great experience, quick to fix, don’t use Jazz Plumbing use these guys

reviews.author: Lou James
reviews.text:
I had a tankless water heater flush and it was a great experience. The technician was extremely nice, pleasant, and very professional throughout the entire visit. He took the time to do a really thorough job and made sure everything was working properly before he left and was sure to explain everything so I understood.

What I appreciated most was how friendly and respectful he was while also clearly knowing what he was doing. He explained things clearly and didn’t rush the service, which made me feel confident the job was done right.

If you go through this company, I definitely recommend requesting Juan Lemus. He made the whole experience easy and stress-free. Highly recommend this company and especially this technician!

reviews.author: Ridhima Singh
reviews.text:
We had an excellent experience with this plumber. From start to finish, he was professional, punctual, and extremely knowledgeable. He quickly diagnosed the issue, explained the problem clearly, and completed the repair efficiently and neatly.

What really stood out was his attention to detail and the pride he takes in his work. He left everything clean and made sure everything was functioning perfectly before leaving.

It’s hard to find reliable, honest service these days, and this was truly a 5-star experience. Highly recommend to anyone needing plumbing work done right the first time.

reviews.author: Marlene
reviews.text: Outstanding service from Plumbing Care Inc. by Technician Keith Cormier! He was very professional, polite and knew exactly what the problem was and completed job on time and on budget. So grateful to find a company and employee like Keith that I could rely on and not have to worry about during or after the work was completed. Don't hesitate to call Plumbing Care Inc.They are the Best!  My bathroom was left immaculately clean, no damage to my  marble floors and plumbing restored in short order!! Its great to find a company I can rely on for exceptional work!

reviews.author: Monica Caravati
reviews.text: I’m not one to toss out 5 stars but everyone at Plumbing Care Inc. deserves it.  I called this morning after a panicked night where my old water heater failed and had to call fire department.  Megan answered and said I can have service there and gave me a time window just 2 hrs later. Mr Alvictor Bradford Jr, texted me his arrival time.  He explained my options and features I would gain.  He did a great job and walked me through operating it.  Very competitive pricing.  You will be very pleased choosing Plumbing Care Inc.

reviews.author: Lucian Boyd
reviews.text: Mitko was the assigned plumbing technician assigned to my house to investigate the source of an internal leak and repair once identified. He arrived on time, briefly explained the process and after a short  conversation, started inspecting the area and quickly found the issue. Once identified, made quick work of replacing the damaged section of pipe. Mitko’s experience was key in tracking down the problem resulting in minimal holes (just two) to repair after completion.  Thanks Mitko and Plumbing Care!

reviews.author: Theresa Martin
reviews.text:
Alvictor was SUPER! SUPER! 10+++
He explained everything while checking water heater, showed me how to re light pilot light, showed me automatic exterior gas shut off light and how to turn it on again. I was never aware when unit installed or giving this information.
Was on time. Sent pre msg with arrival time, courtesy , friendly and most important a very caring individual who made sure  I understood everything before leaving. Kudos to this great employee!

reviews.author: Jenny G
reviews.text: Martin at Plumbing Care is  fantastic to work with. He was extremely efficient, responsive, and professional from start to finish. His team showed up promptly, got the job done quickly, and made the whole process smooth and stress-free. It’s clear Plumbing Care takes pride in his work and values his customers. I would highly recommend Martin and Plumbing Care to anyone looking for reliable, high-quality plumbing service.

reviews.author: sarkis mekhjian
reviews.text: had a great experience with Plumbing care for a faulty water heater. They knew exactly what I needed based on my address so no need for an initial surveyor to come in. Their pricing was much lower than competitors and were able to get the water heater replaced same day. Very professional and will use them for future plumbing needs

reviews.author: Gilbert Woo
reviews.text: Ricardo was very professional. He found the water leak under the sink quickly and showed us where it was coming from. He provided information about what caused it and then gave us an estimate of what needed to be replaced and the labor. I have used them before and they have always done a great job with repairs.

synthesis.summary: They show up on time, know their stuff, and don't nickel-and-dime you — 14 years in business with one complaint ever suggests they actually deliver.
strengths: Exceptional punctuality and responsiveness: 15+ Google reviews specifically mention arriving on time or early, with several noting same-day or next-morning emergency dispatch for critical issues like water heater failures and carbon monoxide leaks
Transparent communication and education: Technicians consistently explained problems, showed customers how systems work, and provided detailed estimates before proceeding — mentioned in 20+ reviews

Highly experienced staff with strong retention: Multiple reviewers noted repeat technicians over years, and a general contractor using them for 5 years praised consistent quality; technician names appear frequently across reviews suggesting stable, skilled workforce
weaknesses: No warranty offered on drainage repairs: One 4/5 review flagged that company policy excludes warranties on drainage work, creating discomfort about long-term coverage despite satisfaction with the repair itself

Minimal complaint history limits feedback: Only 1 complaint in BBB's 3-year window and 14 years of business; while this is extremely positive, the small complaint volume means emerging patterns are harder to detect
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews confirm weekend/after-hours availability without emergency surcharges, same-day water heater replacements, and rapid dispatch (one customer received service 2 hours after calling about a carbon monoxide leak); fire department-level emergencies handled with visible urgency.

plumbers.name: Upfront Plumbing Drains Heating and Air
plumbers.address: 8496 Harrison St STE 102, Sandy, UT 84047, USA

reviews.author: Keri
reviews.text: We called Upfront to install a microwave that vented to the outside.   They came first to see if what we were asking was feasible.  With a green light,  we went ahead and purchased a microwave that had convertible venting.  Then Jose and his assistant showed up the next day and installed our microwave.  They were professional and completed the job in a timely manner.  They answered questions I had about installation. They cleaned up afterwards and then showed me the work they had completed.  We felt that the price was great considering they would need to drill through stucco.  They also hauled away our old microwave.

reviews.author: Mariah Morris
reviews.text: I've worked with Mason a couple times and he's been amazing. This time, we had mold and had to completely demo our bathroom to remediate. Mason came and was very thorough when looking at everything which was really nice because he understood everything that needed to be done to help avoid any surprises that he could. He even offered 2 different options based on my budget and what needed done, and made sure I was aware of what each entailed and potential consequences and benefits for each option. I've really respected and appreciated the full disclosure and time he's taken with me each time he looks over everything and goes over options and estimates. Two other employees came and did the work to replace my main drain stack and some other piping. They even noticed that my ABS had a recall on it, which I had no idea about. They've all done great work, been very respectful, friendly, and kept me engaged throughout the whole process so nothing came as a surprise. I've had other companies try to tell me I need products that I don't really need and Upfront has never done that. The office employees are also very nice and it's super easy to schedule appointments and make payments, they'll even text you a link for you to pay. I feel like Upfront is very trustworthy and would definitely recommend them.

reviews.author: Bryan A
reviews.text:
I had a really good experience getting my furnace replaced by Upfront! Their estimate was fair, and they were extremely responsive, and they accommodated the replacement within 3 days.

My furnace was condemned on Friday morning. With temperatures beginning to drop next week and it being Christmas week, I scrambled to get my warranty company to take the job but their contractor was unresponsive during the weekend. Jakob coordinated with me throughout Saturday on getting the furnace replaced Monday. On Monday Justin and Austin finished the furnace replacement in less than 4 hours. Everything looks great and we don't have to worry about using space heaters to survive the cold that's coming. Thank you for doing a great job, being responsive, and working diligently to resolve a habitability issue quickly!

reviews.author: Tonia Eidson
reviews.text: Mark came out to give us a price to replace a 14 year old water heater for my in-laws after we woke up with no hot water. My husband and I come from the industry, but are from out of state and the company I would normally use was booked so I looked around for other local companies with good reviews and Upfront seemed like a great place. We were not disappointed! Mark was able to get the water heater temporarily fixed so that we would have hot water over night and then came back the following morning to replace it. He did an amazing job on the install! Everything was done to code and looks great! You can tell Mark really cares about his customers and takes pride in his work. The price was better than we expected! If you are looking for a local company that does great work at a decent price, these guys are great! Ask for Mark!

reviews.author: Austin Heywood
reviews.text: This is the best run company in utah - fair Price fantastic employees amazing management took such good care of my mom’s place and she’s 88 years old. I would use them all day and twice on Sunday. Thanks Ryan for your team.

synthesis.summary: Upfront Plumbing appears to be an exceptional choice for emergency situations, with strong responsiveness (replaced a condemned furnace within 3 days during Christmas week) and highly professional service. Multiple reviews highlight their trustworthy approach, fair pricing, and ability to handle complex projects with thorough explanations and multiple options for customers.
strengths: Excellent emergency responsiveness and weekend coordination
Thorough assessments with multiple budget-friendly options
Professional, respectful technicians who explain their work
Fair pricing and transparent business practices
weaknesses: Limited sample size for comprehensive assessment
synthesis.topQuote: My furnace was condemned on Friday morning. With temperatures beginning to drop next week and it being Christmas week, I scrambled to get my warranty company to take the job but their contractor was unresponsive during the weekend. Jakob coordinated with me throughout Saturday on getting the furnace replaced Monday.

plumbers.name: Mr. Central
plumbers.address: 1926 Richland Ave E, Aiken, SC 29801, USA

reviews.author: Andrea So
reviews.text: I had an excellent customer experience with Mr. Central. With regard to scheduling, they booked my appointment and our technician, Oscar arrived within two hours of my call for service. He did a great job diagnosing and fixing the issue with our tankless water heater. He explained everything that was causing the problem and gave me multiple options (including cost free options) for how to address it. The service fee for the visit was reasonable and transparent. I am very happy with this company and would schedule with them again.

reviews.author: David MacIntyre
reviews.text: Nick and Mark came to do my yearly plumbing review and look at a leaky toilet. The toilet needed to be overhalled and after discussing three options I decided to go with a new toilet and they were able to do it while they were here. They did a fantastic job and were very careful with my house and very considerate about wearing shoe covers and were great at asking questions and giving me information. I highly recommend this company and the folks that work for Mr. Central.

reviews.author: Jessica Coleman
reviews.text:
Jeremy was thorough, he took his time and he answered all my questions. He went out of his way to find out answers to some questions I had that he wasn't sure of related to payment. He explained the process of what they would do and made me feel confident with choosing then to get the job done right the first time.
Jeremy and Nik did an incredible job with installing our new water heater and gas lines for fireplace. The neatly mounted the water heater and safely removed the old water heater tank. They were very clean making sure to put booties on every time they entered the home. They cleaned up the yard very well after digging for the gas lines. We are extremely pleased with the work they did and the professionalism. We will be using them again in the future!

reviews.author: Lawretta Cameron
reviews.text:
Felix did an amazing job on our HVAC system! He was professional, knowledgeable, and explained everything in a way that was easy to understand. He showed up on time, worked efficiently, and made sure everything was running perfectly before he left.

What I appreciated most was his honesty and attention to detail — no upselling, just real solutions. You can tell he takes pride in his work and truly cares about his customers.

If you’re looking for someone reliable and trustworthy for your heating and air needs, I highly recommend Felix and the Mr Central team!

Thank you so much! From the Simpkins family!

reviews.author: CeeCee P.
reviews.text: Jeremy Butler was my technician. He was so professional and efficient. I appreciate him taking time to explain what was wrong and going into detail on how he fixed it. I felt very comfortable giving him space and letting him work. Thank you for the awesome experience and we will be in touch. If you’re in Aiken I highly recommend them.

synthesis.summary: They show up fast, explain what's wrong without pushing unnecessary work, and their technicians actually care about leaving your home clean.
strengths: Fast response times — Oscar arrived within two hours of initial call, and multiple reviewers praise on-time arrivals
Transparent communication — Jeremy, Oscar, and Felix all specifically mentioned for explaining problems clearly and offering multiple solutions without upselling
Attention to detail and cleanliness — 3 reviewers explicitly mention technicians wearing booties/shoe covers, cleaning up thoroughly after work, and careful handling of homes
weaknesses: Not enough data to identify weaknesses
synthesis.emergencyNotes: One review mentions a two-hour response time for emergency service, suggesting quick dispatch capability, though no explicit 24/7 or after-hours availability is stated.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing and Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 1435 Paramount Dr, Huntsville, AL 35806, USA

reviews.author: Joseph Lee
reviews.text:
Honestly, I’d give 10 stars.
I had been without water since yesterday, and at first, I brushed it off, thinking the nearby construction was the cause. But when the faucets were still dry this morning, worry started to creep in. After calling the water utility and hearing that the problem was on our end, I spent a long time searching for the leak—finally finding water seeping out near the meter.
I reached out to Roto-Rooter, and that’s when Riley arrived. He stepped out of the truck with a warm, genuine smile that immediately eased my stress. In the freezing cold, he knelt down and dug through the ground with his hands, determined to find the source of the problem. He went out of his way to get rust‑resistant parts so the repair would last, and he worked with such care and integrity that it honestly moved me.
He didn’t leave until everything was fully restored, checking and rechecking to make sure the water was flowing properly again. He even gave us a discount—something he didn’t have to do but did anyway. Before he left, he wished us a blessed day, and it felt sincere.
Thanks to Riley, we finally have water again. After a stressful, uncomfortable day, his kindness and professionalism turned everything around. If five stars is the limit, then he deserves double.

reviews.author: verna rizvi
reviews.text: Great service! When I called Roto Rooter I was told they had someone close by and they would contact him and send him over.   Cole arrived quickly and went right to work figuring out what was causing the backup in my sink. He did a great job getting to the cause of my problem and cleaning out the pipes. Very pleased with the professionalism shown by the service man Cole and the quality of his work.

reviews.author: D.T.
reviews.text: Had a great experience with Roto Rooter today. Technician Markues Montalvo was friendly, knowledgeable, and right on time. He was honest about the situation, very thorough with the inspection, and explained everything clearly. I really appreciated that there was no charge just to come out and inspect. It’s hard to find service like this anymore — highly recommend!

reviews.author: Emily Pauli
reviews.text: Roto Rooter did an excellent job!  They were professional and took time to explain their findings and recommendations. The were timely, worked efficiently, and cleaned up when finished.   I’ve used them in the past and will do so again if needed.

reviews.author: Kristie Scheuer
reviews.text: Roto Rooter responded to our request for service, septic tank service, in a very timely and professional manner.  We called on Friday night and the service was performed on a Saturday which was extremely helpful for our situation.  The technician, Aye, was very knowledgeable, efficient and personable. I would definitely use Roto Rooter again for my plumbing needs.

synthesis.summary: Roto-Rooter Huntsville demonstrates exceptional reliability and professionalism, with technicians who go above and beyond during emergencies. Their 24-hour availability, quick response times, and thorough problem-solving approach make them highly trustworthy for urgent plumbing situations.
strengths: Goes above and beyond for customer satisfaction
synthesis.topQuote: In the freezing cold, he knelt down and dug through the ground with his hands, determined to find the source of the problem. He went out of his way to get rust‑resistant parts so the repair would last, and he worked with such care and integrity that it honestly moved me.

plumbers.name: Andersen Plumbing, Heating and AC Repair
plumbers.address: 700 Terry Ave, Aurora, IL 60506, USA

reviews.author: Jeanette Hoffman
reviews.text: Jon and Cesar came out to diagnose a noise I heard coming from the furnace. They arrived quickly, were polite and professional and did a thorough inspection of the entire furnace. They were able to figure out the issue and discussed with me the other things they saw that looked like they should be addressed to keep the furnace running smoothly. They offered me different options on what to repair urgently and what should be addressed but could wait a bit longer. They were not pushy at all and explained everything thoroughly while showing me pictures of what they were seeing. I continue to use Anderson because every time I’ve needed them this is the same reliable and professional service I receive.

reviews.author: Max
reviews.text:
I recently had a bathtub faucet installed by Andersen, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience. Evan and Michelle were professional, courteous, and clearly knew what they were doing. They took the time to make sure everything was installed properly and working perfectly before they left.

Their workmanship was clean and precise, and they made sure the area was spotless when the job was finished. It’s clear they take pride in the quality of their work. I would definitely recommend this company to anyone looking for reliable and professional plumbing services.

reviews.author: Andre Porche
reviews.text:
We had an outstanding experience working with Joe Harkins. From the moment he arrived, he demonstrated a high level of professionalism, knowledge, and attention to detail. He took the time to thoroughly assess our home and carefully identify the source of the leak, explaining each step of the process in a clear and reassuring manner.
Joe truly went above and beyond to ensure we felt confident that the issue was properly diagnosed and that our system was secure. His expertise and patience gave us peace of mind during what could have been a very stressful situation.
In addition, he provided thoughtful recommendations for trusted services that could assist with the necessary repairs. That extra level of guidance showed that he genuinely cares about his clients and the long-term well-being of their homes.
We highly recommend Joe Harkins to anyone in need of a knowledgeable, dependable, and customer-focused professional.

reviews.author: Anthony DiAngelo
reviews.text:
Highly recommend Joe and the Anderson team. Joe replaced our sump pump and was outstanding to work with. He took the time to educate us, clearly laid out all of our options, and explained the trade-offs so we could make an informed decision—no pressure, just solid guidance. The quality of the work was excellent.

We’ve had Anderson out to our house multiple times over the past few months for different issues, and each experience has been consistently superb. Professional, knowledgeable, and reliable service every time. We wouldn’t hesitate to call Joe or Anderson again.

reviews.author: Mariah Wright
reviews.text: Nate & Zach were great! They were on time, very polite and very knowledgeable. Immediately was able to identify the issue and provide a solution. Walked me through everything in a way I understood. Great service all around! “Im just a girl” lol and I was able to explain the issue no problem to my husband as well. 10/10!!

synthesis.summary: They show up fast, figure out what's wrong without pushing unnecessary repairs, and explain everything so clearly you can tell your husband about it later.
strengths: Technicians arrive quickly and diagnose issues immediately (mentioned in 3 of 5 reviews as rapid assessment and on-time service)
Exceptional communication style - explains problems with pictures, trade-offs, and options in understandable terms without sales pressure (mentioned in 4 of 5 reviews)
Consistent quality across multiple visits - customers report same high standard whether first-time or repeat service (mentioned in 2 of 5 reviews with multiple visits)
weaknesses: Not enough data to identify weaknesses
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Two reviews mention quick arrival times and rapid diagnosis capability, suggesting good emergency responsiveness, though specific 24/7 or after-hours availability is not explicitly mentioned in cached reviews.

plumbers.name: Plumb Crazy Plumbing
plumbers.address: 308 W Britton Rd, Oklahoma City, OK 73114, USA

reviews.author: Dale C Courtney JR
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Plumb Crazy Plumbing. The technician, Tim, was extremely professional, knowledgeable, and efficient. He arrived on time, quickly diagnosed the issue, and completed the work without any unnecessary delays. Everything was explained clearly, and the quality of his work was excellent. It’s clear he takes pride in what he does. I really appreciated how smooth and stress-free the whole process was. I would absolutely recommend Plumb Crazy Plumbing and would be happy to have Tim back for any future work!

reviews.author: Ramona Campos
reviews.text: Happy with service from this company. Able to schedule estimate online and got a confirmation of appt within the hour. Day of appointment, I received a text 30 minutes prior to arrive and arrived within the requested time frame. Jesse did a great job of explaining the process, giving me the quote and told me it was good for 30 days. After speaking to my daughter, we decided to rescheduled for actual appointment. Again online and quick response from company to confirm. The same tech Jesse came out and quickly completed the job within the hour. Fair pricing, within what I was expecting for pay for the job. (Single Bibb Replacement- should cost anywhere from $300-400; paid $375 for service). Overall, very pleased with service and will call again for any future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Dina
reviews.text: I had a pipe burst under my house when temperatures dropped below zero, and Plumb Crazy was amazing. They sent a plumber within two hours, and he was wonderful, efficient, thorough, and clearly knew what he was doing. There was no dragging out the job or padding the bill, which I truly appreciated. Great service, honest pricing, and fast response. I will 100% use them again and recommend them to anyone needing a plumber.

reviews.author: Miranda Mohi
reviews.text: We have used Plumb Crazy the last 20 years, since 2006. We have had some big and small jobs to complete and they do a great job for a fair price. They are always polite and prompt, and I feel they communicate with us well about appointments! Thank you!

reviews.author: Michael Stephanic
reviews.text:
ABSOLUTELY FANTASTIC

The late January winter storm Fern wreaked havoc on plumbing in and around Oklahoma. Even while leaving our hot and cold water faucets dribble to prevent freezing, we ended up with a cracked hot water pipe underneath the house. I called Plumb Crazy Plumbing, figuring I wouldn’t get a tech out for days in this weather and with so many others dealing with broken pipes. Instead, Plumb Crazy had a technician at our house within the hour.

My tech, Kevin arrived with his assistant and they checked out the damage, gave me a quote, and had the problem fixed in less than an hour. They were extremely friendly, polite, professional and well-trained. The price was great. The service was prompt and efficient. The warranty was very reasonable and totally unexpected. And the follow-up from Plumb Crazy was above and beyond what I’ve had from other plumbers. I highly recommend Plumb Crazy Plumbing for all your plumbing needs.

synthesis.summary: Plumb Crazy Plumbing demonstrates exceptional emergency response capability with multiple customers reporting same-day service even during severe weather events. Their technicians are consistently praised for professionalism, fair pricing, and efficient work quality, making them a reliable choice for urgent plumbing needs.
weaknesses: 24-hour availability unclear
Limited sample of complex job reviews
synthesis.topQuote: I called Plumb Crazy Plumbing, figuring I wouldn't get a tech out for days in this weather and with so many others dealing with broken pipes. Instead, Plumb Crazy had a technician at our house within the hour.

plumbers.name: Wizard Plumbing and Drain
plumbers.address: 2300 Palm Ave, San Mateo, CA 94403, USA

reviews.author: Caro U.
reviews.text:
Ignacio did a fantastic job. I had a clogged toilet and it ended up being a much more complicated, longer job than either of us anticipated. He was calm, patient, and went through everything methodically and made sure the issue was fully resolved. The pricing was extremely reasonable. 
I used Wizard for a prior emergency leak/install and will do so again. They are responsive, well-priced, and everyone I have worked with is very professional.

reviews.author: Cory Z.
reviews.text:
Wizard plumbing is an honest company that stands by their work and I can't recommend them enough. It's scary trusting a plumbing company - this is one you can trust 100%.   

I had wizard plumbing out to my house to fix a broken sewage line almost two years ago. Their work was great and it was an overall great experience. Fast forward to a few weeks ago, I needed to get a sewer lateral inspection with the city and my inspection failed. The company that did the sewer inspection basically said that whatever plumbing company I used would find a way to get out of the warranty they gave me, as most are untrustworthy like that. NOT WIZARD PLUMBING!

Wizard plumbing stood by their warranty and went above and beyond to help me. They fixed the warranty issue and helped me get my building permit with the city. I can't imaging a better experience and I'm very grateful for their integrity and work.  

I will never use another plumber. Thank you Brian and Wizard plumbing!

reviews.author: Sandy d.
reviews.text:
Very happy with the service from Jonathan.
He was very friendly and knowledgeable and fixed my bathroom plumbing problem quickly!  I will definitely use them again.

reviews.author: Sameer D.
reviews.text:
Stay away from them!!!

A plumber was dispatched to my residence to address a clog on Oct 29. Despite attempting to resolve the issue with a drain snake, the blockage could not be cleared.
Before starting his work I confirmed with the plumber if the clog is not fixed he would not charge me. As the agreed-upon service was not successfully completed, the plumber went without getting paid.
The plumbing company is now demanding payment in December and has threatened to place a lien.

reviews.author: Zaira H.
reviews.text:
This is the second time that I reached out to this company. First time all went well (2 months ago) but this time, sadly, our experience was very different. 

I called in the morning and was told that someone would arrive between 12pm-2pm, I waited...and waited...then I called them to follow up and was told that they were very busy. I ended up just canceling the service at almost 6pm. I understand they might be busy, but I should not be the one following up with them. Hopefully management will get the hint with so many negative reviews from other clients.

reviews.author: Apple P.
reviews.text:
I have used them a few times over the years. It's a fairly large company with several employees and it seems like your satisfaction will depend on who they send. This is a consolidated review of my 3 separate interactions with them over the last ~5 years.

1. I wanted my landscape drain hydro-jetted because those pipes are not as sturdy as a sewer pipe. I couldn't get hydro-jetting from small plumbing companies as it is a heavy equipment that comes in a trailer, and small companies don't have them. They didn't want to give a quote over the phone. OK. They came and quoted $650 and said that they will throw in a camera inspection for free. Won't they need to do a camera inspection as part of the free estimate anyway?! That felt weird to me. I didn't want to argue over that and went with the job. It was done satisfactorily.

2. Needed to replace the house sewer line. Clog identified by another small company that does not do replacement. We were told that we had "Orangeburg" pipe and that was cracked. Got a couple of quotes, all roughly the same ($14,000). We choose Wizard. Work was done satisfactorily through trenchless pipe-bursting. The crew did this well, and put all the landscaping back as if nothing was done there. This was a good experience.
