He also mentioned that the toilet was disconnected from the pipes under the house and that it probably happened when the plumber (roto rooter) snaked it and that they should fix it. He also showed me pictures of what the problem was. It was obvious that the toilet was not connected and toilet paper was falling out. The same guy (from roto rooter) came back out, said that who ever told me that was a liar. And he showed me pictures of completely unrelated things and told me that it was probably the toilet upstairs that was leaking. That was obviously a lie because the pictures he showed me would have just been small leaks but wouldn't have even been big enough for toilet paper to go through.

Overall, I will never use this company again. The guy was very pushy. He didn't explain things well. When he was telling me what needed to be fix I felt cornered in my own house. Especially when I told I was going to look something up before I decided whether or not I wanted to get it fixed, he just stood over my while I looked at stuff on my phone. I felt like he was putting his gloved hands that he had just used to work in the sewage all over my house.

I know having something as crucial as plumbing sucks, but don't be afraid to get multiple quotes even if the plumber is staring you down making you uncomfortable.

reviews.author: Brian A.
reviews.text:
I was up septic tank creek without a paddle.  On a Sat. morning.  I know the discharge pump is out (overflowing above the tank).  Go to check the circuit breakers, still on.  Try the outlet, and the pump wires dis-generate at the outlet.  Not a good start to the weekend.  

I could guess, with luck, just a plug replacement on a pump over 15 years old (and I had a Lotto ticket with 1 set of numbers too....).  Start to call, as I have to have this fixed this weekend.  I work 60 miles away (weekday is missing work with no PTO), I have 4 others in the house, school starting after the weekend.

So after getting the call us on the weekend alphabet search via yellow pages, RR takes my information.  I was very surprised as I was thinking this is a septic sump pump.  Not a clog.  

I get a call from Roger (385), the tech on call.  He is concerned he cannot be there until noon.    I was not expecting too much help, but someone to verify my pump died on Sat was much better than me missing work on Monday.

From our conversation he brought a small pump.  Now, I'm going to watch repairs, DYI or call someone.  He arrived and we went to it.  Ruled out the frayed cord (which I suspected, much like willing powerball).  Eventually get to the septic pump.  I had tools to get it disconnected, RR had the contacts to open a location to get a pump.  And there is a lot of interaction with Roger I left out, I think something to share is the pump costs about $900, I knew it.  

Of course as we are doing the work, we are talking. My goal was to finish the job over the weekend.  I never stated it, We had time time to talk while things were pumping.  

End result I gave him 2 water melons from my garden.  And called his boss (he was on the phone).  He said he would give the message to Danny (and would ask Roger where is his part of the melon).

Over all, a very good experience.

reviews.author: Bob A.
reviews.text:
Our favorite plumber (Ryan @ R.E. 615-878-6265) who is extremely ethical, economical, and great was not available, so our backs were against the wall since our demo guys were coming the following day to prep for a bathroom remodel.  So, we called a half dozen plumbers with great Yelp ratings but nobody was available.  

We finally called Roto-Rooter to do the job which was simply to cap off water lines to two bathroom sinks and a shower.   I repeatedly asked them for their hourly rate and they refused to tell me.  I just wanted a ballpark, but 'no' was the answer.  

They said I would have to pay $90 for them to come out and give a bid.  If I proceeded with the work, the $90 would go towards the bid; if I passed on their work, I'd owe them $90.  Okay, no big deal, but I don't remember any service provider unwilling to give their hourly rate over the phone so this really bothered me.  But I had them come out anyway because otherwise we'd lose a week on our project.

The Rooter guy looked under our sinks and at the shower, then gave me the price of $485.   What?!   Wow!  Extremely high for the simple tasks!!!   But we had to go with it, otherwise we'd forfeit the $90 service call and lose a week on our schedule.

He did a good job, but it took just 90 minutes which included a round trip to Home Depot for about $5 in parts.

That means he worked for $320 per hour ($480 / 1.5)!!   My main plumber, Ryan works for a SMALL FRACTION of that!!!

So, we were left feeling totally Roto-Rootered.    NEVER AGAIN!!

(And, come to think of it, anyone out there going to medical school really ought to drop out -- just work for Roto Rooter at $320 an hour which is nearly the salary of a brain surgeon!)

synthesis.summary: Roto-Rooter Nashville shows strong emergency response capabilities with quick arrival times and skilled technicians who handle water damage and plumbing repairs effectively. Most customers praise their professionalism and reliability, though there's some inconsistency in technician behavior and preparation.
strengths: Fast emergency response - often within hours
Knowledgeable technicians with good diagnostic skills
Effective handling of water damage and burst pipes
weaknesses: Inconsistent technician professionalism
Some technicians may arrive unprepared with proper tools
Potential for unprofessional behavior under pressure
redFlags: One technician displayed unprofessional behavior including scolding customer and using profanity
synthesis.topQuote: I called at 10 am and Garret listened to our issue and promptly had a technician scheduled to come to the house by noon. Our tech Axel arrived on time and was understanding, professional, and friendly. He diagnosed and fixed our water problem in no time.
synthesis.worstQuote: He noticeable got mad when he discovered the water wasnt turned off and spent the next 10 minutes scolding me... Since when did I become to the plumber having to supply equipment? I told him no and then the curse words starting flying out his mouth in the middle of the night.

plumbers.name: DeWolfe Plumbing, Heating & Cooling
plumbers.address: 211 Shrewsbury St, West Boylston, MA 01583, USA

reviews.author: Tommy Blair
reviews.text: The technician was great, professional and thorough.

reviews.author: Tami Parodeau
reviews.text: I’ve been using Dewolfe plumbing for many years. They are always very professional, knowledgeable, and a pleasure to work with.  Adrian did a beautiful job with my furnace. Thank you Adrian.

reviews.author: Camilla Douglas
reviews.text: Brian was great!  He was fast getting here, and super friendly.  He was aware that there was a baby here, and asked for alternate ways into the basement so as not to get water/mud in the main areas of the house and not to bother the baby, which was really considerate of him.  He ID’d the problem pretty quickly and got it solved as smoothly and quickly as possible.  I am so grateful he was able to come out and help, especially on such short notice for such a weird issue.  Absolutely will be reaching out again in the future!

reviews.author: Rajesh Mohan
reviews.text: I got this contact as a referral from my friend who owns a school. The technician was good and professional. He fixed the issue in 10 min. Was a minor block in a tube which he blew away with his mouth. However I was shocked with the price of $250 he charged for that. Really disappointed.

reviews.author: Frank Lashua
reviews.text: Called DeWolf to talk about changing a water mixer at the boiler. I sent them PHOTOS TO AVOID A PERSON COMING AND NOT DOING ANY WORK. With the photos, they could see this was a "PLUMBING 101 EASY REPAIR." Just bring the same mixer and change it. It's called Plumbing 101 that any plumber trainee could do. KILL THE WATER MAIN, DRAIN THE SYSTEM, CHANGE THE VALVE, AND REFILL THE SYSTEM, TEST WATER TEMP.. They arrived on Friday, looked, and said yes, it can be changed. I asked him if he brought the part, and if the office gave him the photos? He said no, so therefore he didn't have the VERY COMMON mixer in his van. He quoted the job at $757.10 to do the job and said he would be back on Monday. He needed to order the mixing valve from a warehouse. Keep in mind that my local three suppliers in my same town stocked the valve. Plus, Home Depot stocked the valve. He told me that the same valve at Home Depot was made differently and of lower quality. I called the valve mixing company, and they said they were all the same that they sell to all suppliers. I did approve the estimate, and Monday came. I called DeWolf and asked when the plumber would be arriving today. They told me they were working out of the Cape Cod office and didn't know if the valve came in at the warehouse, and they would call me back. I waited and then called the secretary to call me. She stated that she was still waiting for information on the valve. I canceled my agenda on Monday because I was told the plumber would be arriving. I also called three suppliers near me, and they all had the valve in stock. After not getting clarity on the job, valve location, I asked DeWolve who bought out the company because Gary DeWolf, the original owner, would not have operated this way. She said the tw sons took over the business. WELL, THAT TOLD ME ALL I NEEDED TO KNOW. I CANCELD THE JOB. Jump forward two hours, and I get a text that says the plumber was on his way. ARE YOU KIDDING ME???  THE RIGHT HAND HAS NO IDEA WHAT THE LEFT ONE IS DOING!!     NOTE: The worker was very courteous.

reviews.author: Emily Defilippo
reviews.text:
VERY DISAPPOINTED! had an emergency, sent a tech out that had no knowledge of diagnosis of a well pump issue, was unable to make any diagnosis at all, was only at my home for 15mins and I am in they exact same place I was before they came... correction, minus $225... originally the tech thought it would only be a $99 charge (which i was ok with) because he was here for less than 45min (their policy), after speaking with Luke he was told to charge the full amount... I don't fault the tech, he was nice enough, but the company was told ahead of time we had a well and sent someone unable to deal with it... as far as I'm concerned, all factors should have been taken into consideration since literally nothing was done... bad business decision on the part of the company and as a homeowner that works for a large local business I will discourage anyone from using this company... should have done the right thing

UPDATE: spoke to Victoria and after speaking with Luke, the decision was made to refund the money... I appreciate them doing the right thing in the end

reviews.author: Dennis Coache
reviews.text:
We contacted DeWolfe to check out a problem with out hot water. The tech, AJ, who came to our home was very knowledgeable. Discussed options and came up with a plan which included testing our water to determine if we need a filter system along with replacement of our tankless waterheating coil in our oil fired boiler.
Waiting on results and estimate.
5 stars so far. We'll see going forward.
Sooo... showed up as scheduled, replaced tankless coil...plenty of hot water now!! Tomorrow will be installing our filter system....
Filter system installed. All went well. Very professional. These guys are first rate.

Another service call to troubleshoot our baseboard heaters. Chris (technician) showed up right away. Checked out system. No clear cause of our intermitant short cycling problem found.
We may try replacing zone valve heads...
$100. For service call. Good info.
Still happy with this company.

reviews.author: Patrick McAuliffe
reviews.text: I had an emergency early in the morning where smoke was coming into my house from my furnace. Very frightening situation. But I called DeWolfe and they sent out an HVAC technician the same day (which was a God send since it was only 15 degrees outside that day). Sean was extremely knowledgeable and went through everything in my furnace to try and find the problem. He even explained everything to me that he was looking for and I was able to learn a lot. As a relatively new homeowner, I am happy Sean went above and beyond to help me understand the heating system, which certainly gave me extra peace of mind, considering I now know what to do if there is another emergency like that. I became a member of the Wolf Pack that day and will be doing business with them again. Thanks again Sean!! 😁

reviews.author: Carrie McFarland
reviews.text: Our water heater sprung a leak and we needed a new water heater fast. Working with DeWolfe was a great experience.  From the beginning when I was talking with the customer service rep to the very end.  The tech, Gokhan Yilmaz was on time, friendly, knowledgeable, and extremely helpful.  He was able to reduce the price of the water heater by making phone calls and finding an existing warranty on our tank that we didn't even know we had! He worked with the manufacturer, found the water heater we needed and went to pick it up by himself so we could have same day install.  We had a fully functioning water heater that afternoon! I will definitely use DeWolfe again. They are the best plumbing company we have ever used in the 20+ years we have owned our house.  A+++

reviews.author: Jim Kee
reviews.text: As relatively new owner of my residence, I wanted to have my boiler evaluated before entering the winter season. An online search directed me to DeWolfe Contracting and its Wolfpack membership program. It is designed to include an annual tune-up and emergency service plan. I joined. A technician came out, tuned up the boiler, evaluated the system, and recommended some reasonable replacements. A week or so later another technician came out and installed the replacement parts. Both technicians were very competent. They also clearly explained to me what they were doing and reviewed the features of my heating system with me. I was fully satisfied with the services rendered, and I look forward to a long relationship with DeWolfe Contracting.

reviews.author: Veronika Bentekovics
reviews.text:
Excellent service with DeWolfe plumbing & heating co!! 👌 All the guys were very knowledgeable and efficient with their work. I had a new gas furnace and hot water combo installed. Omar and his team were outstanding with installation. After installation they cleaned everything up and made sure all radiators were in working order. They explained all the parts and safety and operation of the unit. The unit had to be put on the wall, Ron installed all the framework and did an excellent job! I am VERY happy with the whole process.
Thank you also to the plumber Jamie for the complete initial rundown of different units and helped us purchase the right one for our needs. Awesome job guys!
Veronika & Rob

reviews.author: Maribeth Kusz
reviews.text:
Josh came this morning for an emergent call. Gas company came last night for what turned out to be 2 gas leaks and shut off service to our boiler.
Josh checked out the boiler and did all necessary testing to determine what was going on. Fixed the issue and our boiler is functioning properly now. Never had any gas leak problems in the past so this was very scary to have to deal with. Josh reassured us that our boiler is all set so we can rest easy.
We plan on getting a monthly contract with DeWolfe because we were so impressed with the genuine concern they had for our safety and well being.
Would recommend this company for the great and timely service they provide!

reviews.author: Kell Bell
reviews.text:
Highly recommend DeWolfe. They did a rip and replace oil furnace and duct project for us. They were very efficient and clean. The temperature dropped during the project, but they ensured the pipes were fine. All of the employees are so pleasant and helpful.
Out of all the companies we reached out to on this project, they came back with the best offer price wise as well as project scope. They do not try to upsell things you don’t need like other HVAC companies. The scope of the project made rational sense and they worked with us on the budget.
Definitely recommend reaching out for small or large projects.

reviews.author: glass half full
reviews.text: Wow! Sully and Nigel just left. They brushed and vacuumed out my duct vents and what a good job they did without wasting any time! My furnace had a puff back during servicing by another company and blew soot everywhere in my house. They gave me good advice on how to clean my carpets also. Very personable, clear explanations and they didn't tack on any additional costs or try to upsell me. I am very happy with them and highly recommend, will gladly call them back with any future needs. Thanks guys!!

reviews.author: Nicholas French
reviews.text: Fast and friendly service! The guys were very helpful and went above and beyond at every chance they could! Strongly recommend using DeWolf for any plumbing/HVAC needs you have. I have used DeWolf for so many different projects. Updated plumbing system, water heater replacement, ERV install, exhaust fan ducting, and an oil tank removal to come. These guys do everything! Lots of skilled, accommodating, and friendly professionals in every department. Can't say enough good things about DeWolf!

synthesis.summary: They show up fast when your heat dies and actually know what they're doing, but watch out for surprise invoicing and internal communication gaps.
strengths: Same-day or next-day emergency response: 12+ reviews specifically mention arriving within hours of emergency calls (furnace failures, no heat in winter, leaks), with multiple mentions of weekend/holiday availability

Knowledgeable technicians who explain systems clearly: 18+ reviews praise specific techs (Sully, Nigel, Sean, Omar, G, Brendan, Rich) for thoroughness, teaching homeowners about their systems, and diagnostic accuracy
Clean, professional job completion: 15+ reviews mention technicians cleaning up after themselves, respecting the home, and completing work the same day
weaknesses: Significant pricing disputes and billing inconsistency: 2 reviews (1/5 and 1/5 ratings) report major invoice surprises ($250 for 10-min fix, $757.10 quote for 'plumbing 101' repair when parts available locally for less), and 1 review mentions poor communication leading to Monday no-show after estimate approval — suggests internal handoff failures between office and field teams

Internal communication breakdown: 1 detailed 1/5 review documents lack of photo communication from office to tech, tech not informed of job cancellation, plumber arriving hours after cancellation was confirmed, indicating dispatch/coordination problems
redFlags: Billing disputes and quote inconsistencies: 2 of 79 reviews report major invoice surprises or questionable pricing (1 complaint about $250 charge for 10-minute fix with no parts; 1 complaint about $757.10 quote for simple valve replacement available locally for less); 1 review credits refund after escalation, indicating company eventually corrected error but initial charge was improper

Internal communication and dispatch failures: 1 detailed complaint documents tech arriving without photos sent by office, job approval without parts on-hand, no follow-up confirmation after job cancellation, and plumber appearing hours after cancellation — suggests coordination problems between scheduling and field teams

Occasional mismatched technician expertise: 1 review reports dispatch of unqualified tech for specialized well-pump issue (15-minute visit, no diagnosis), though company later refunded after customer complaint
One traffic safety complaint (1/5 review): Driver reported running stop sign while on phone in residential area; while isolated, reflects potential training/oversight gap
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews confirm same-day emergency response even on holidays and weekends; Sean, Brendan, and Chris called out specifically for cold-weather emergencies. However, one well-pump emergency call resulted in an unqualified tech being dispatched (15 min, no diagnosis), showing occasional vetting gaps for specialized systems.

plumbers.name: Jastal Plumbing
plumbers.address: 8936 OH-14 unit a, Streetsboro, OH 44241, USA

reviews.author: Michael Janesch
reviews.text: I highly recommend Jastal Plumbing. They were very prompt in getting an estimator out and they started the job a few days later. The crew was very professional and got the job done promptly. We had an issue with a small leak and the urinal needed to be anchored better. They were out the next day to fix the small issues. I will definitely use them again in the future.

reviews.author: P M
reviews.text: I had a new whole house filter installed and a new valve installed to fix a leaky bathtub. Paul and Kyle came out and did a great job. Both men were very courteous and professional throughout the day. The day after they left I found a small issue with the filter. I called Jastal in the morning and Paul and Kyle came back out the same day and rectified the issue. They were truly great and I will definitely use them again. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Heather Bridgeman
reviews.text: David came to my house today to help determine the source of the water that was in my basement.  He did a great job.  He was on time, professional and extremely knowledgeable.  He took his time to thoroughly explain the current issue and the solution.  He also helped bring in another Jastal employee to test my water and offer a solution to my filtration issue with my well water.  I plan on moving forward with Jastal and absolutely want David doing the work on this repair.

reviews.author: James Martin
reviews.text:
The work order concerned repairing two leaking stack pipes, enclosed with walls, replacing ABS pipes with PVC, reseating a toilet, repairing a leaking shower cartridge control.
Everyone associated with Jastal Plumbing, Allison, Jacob, Justin and David were all very professional, courteous and knowledgeable. The work was completed on time, as promised and expertly done. Jacob answered all of my questions and explained everything. The jobsite was left clean. I had spoken with three other plumbing companies previously, who either didn't know how to proceed, didn't want to tackle the job or were unreliable. I am well pleased with Jastal Plumbing.

reviews.author: Lily Bentley
reviews.text: I will never use these plumbers. Why? Because they hire people who obviously would prefer to be race car drivers. Specifically whoever was driving truck PL47594 - T20 going up route 8 North on 12/20/24 at 8:20am. They found it necessary to weave in and out of traffic and if this vehicle was any closer to the back of my car he would be kissing it. Real great marketing.

synthesis.summary: Jastal Plumbing shows strong reliability with excellent follow-up service, consistently returning the next day to address any issues. Their technicians are professional and knowledgeable, though one customer complained about reckless driving by a company vehicle.
weaknesses: Employee driving complaints
24-hour availability unclear
redFlags: Reckless driving complaint about company vehicle
synthesis.topQuote: I called Jastal in the morning and Paul and Kyle came back out the same day and rectified the issue. They were truly great and I will definitely use them again.
synthesis.worstQuote: They found it necessary to weave in and out of traffic and if this vehicle was any closer to the back of my car he would be kissing it.

plumbers.name: Andersen Plumbing, Heating and AC Repair
plumbers.address: 1554 Crescent Lake Dr, Montgomery, IL 60538, USA

reviews.author: Dave Lach
reviews.text: Jon was extremely personable and very friendly. This guy loves his job! The quote we got from him was reasonable considering we needed two furnaces replaced. We’ve used Anderson’s for plumbing in the past and never had any issues, so we decided to try them for 2 complete furnace replacements after the heat exchangers were defective. They always have been honest and upfront with no gimmicks. No upselling, just give you exactly what you need for your house. Kyle came by to inspect the old units initially, and then again a day after the installers left to make some minor adjustments to the new units. He is simply fantastic at what he does and just a wonderful person to talk with. The installers, Sam, Richard, & Kris were fast and efficient and got the job done in less than 8 hrs for 2 units. These guys made sure everything was left cleaner than when they found it and left to our satisfaction. The Anderson H&P experience has always been top notch!

reviews.author: Frank Rivera
reviews.text:
We have nothing but great things to say about Anderson. We have had them do yearly maintenance on our HVAC and its always been a great experience. Their techs are professional, super knowledgeable and recommend other optional services that help ensure your system is at optimal level.

For example, we had them install a UV light in our HVAC system & boy what a difference!! The house smells alot more fresh & its a peace of mind to know that there are no viruses or bacteria growth in your unit!! Thank you Anderson for your superior service.

reviews.author: Charm
reviews.text: We called Andersen Heating because we needed to replace our old furnace. From the 1st call to the completed installation of a new Lennox furnace, the Andersen team did a great job! I was kept informed, the installers worked hard, and everyone involved was great! Thank you to Cory, Jon, Sam, Ron, Erin. Thank you to Chad Andersen for offering a quality product. I didn't realize how loud my old furnace was or the different temperatures from room to room until this morning! I woke up to a comfortable home! The new furnace is quiet and every room is comfortable with a consistent temperature. Thank you to the Andersen Team!

reviews.author: Anabelita G Merck
reviews.text: He did a excellent job. He was very polite and answered all our questions. This is the kind of company you want to come to fix and maintenance your equipment. But will not be possible if you don't have people like Austin Ramirez he deserves a big compensation or bonus. We really like him and thanks again for the service he did an our home. Definitely we will continue working with Andersen Plumbing and Heating an the future.  The Merck's.

reviews.author: David Podjasek
reviews.text: David and his team were incredibly efficient and friendly. They installed a brand new furnace and air conditioning system. The process throughout the day was easy and the result is EXCELLENT! Would definitely recommend... I had two toilets replaced with them a week ago and that experience was just as good!

synthesis.summary: They show up with friendly, knowledgeable techs who finish jobs cleanly and won't nickel-and-dime you.
strengths: Transparent pricing with no upselling—multiple reviews praise honest quotes and straightforward service without gimmicks
Highly skilled, personable technicians who communicate throughout the job and follow up on details (Kyle's post-installation adjustments mentioned specifically)
weaknesses: Small review sample (5 total) limits confidence in consistency; all reviews are 5-star with no negative feedback to validate claims
No emergency-specific language in reviews despite 24/7 hours; cannot confirm actual after-hours response speed or emergency protocol
bestFor: HVAC installation and furnace replacement (4 of 5 reviews focus on heating/AC)
Routine plumbing maintenance and toilet replacement (mentioned as reliable from past experience)
redFlags: Only 5 reviews across all platforms despite 753 Google rating claim (data inconsistency suggests imported or aggregated ratings; verify actual review count)
All 5 reviews are perfect 5-star ratings with no variance—unusual for small sample and raises authenticity questions
No reviews mention plumbing-specific emergencies (burst pipes, flooding, sewer backup) despite company name emphasizing 'Plumbing'
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Business hours explicitly state 'Open 24 hours,' which is a primary emergency signal. However, reviews do not mention after-hours calls, midnight response, or emergency scenarios—only routine installations and maintenance. The 24/7 availability is a structural strength, but actual emergency responsiveness is unverified by customer reports.

toilet.topQuote: I had two toilets replaced with them a week ago and that experience was just as good!

plumbers.name: River City Plumbing, LLC
plumbers.address: 1125 Paramount Pkwy E, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: Michelle
reviews.text:
I am so grateful to Dustin Bradley & River City Plumbing. 5 stars for high quality work, professionalism, very fair about fees, super fast at responding and resolving the problem, and excellent clean up,!

Specifically, I contacted them to diagnosis and repair a problem with my shower & tub and toilet not properly draining.  Dustin was really fast to respond and come on site, and he knew immediately what the problem was and how to fix it.  Plus he and my technician Joseph were professional, polite and friendly when interacting with me, patient with my questions, and clearly communicated throughout the process.

Dustin went above and beyond making sure the drain line was cleared all the way out to the public lines, he was also wonderful at testing the work to be sure the problem was solved and that all was clear and clean underneath and around the house.

They also guarantee their work to be sure that you don’t have the same problem in the near future.

Thank you Dustin & River City Plumbing!

reviews.author: Susan Teska
reviews.text: This is the second time we’ve used River City Plumbing. They’re very reasonably priced, friendly, and prompt. I like that they keep you updated with texts and send a photo of the tech so you know who’s coming to your house.  No complaints here!

reviews.author: Chris Wegner
reviews.text: Danny Ramirez and his co-worker came out to clean out my shower drain and it was done quick and easy!! They also installed a new shower head i had purchased at the last minute. These guys were very nice and courteous, answered all my questions with no problem!! I will definitely hire them again!

reviews.author: Brian Karel
reviews.text:
Our old injector pump was working but needed replacing along all the piping. Jake did an amazing job. He explained everything thoroughly along with showing what needs to be done.  Only took 1 hour. Very professional!!!!  Arrived on time.
Getting this preventive maintenance done before parts break is well worth it.
Highly recommend River City Plumbing.

Brian K

reviews.author: Thomas Paul
reviews.text: My PTSD with plumbing companies is finally over. River City Plumbing was professional, easy to schedule an appointment with and they sent a thoughtful and focused plumber team (Conall &  Chris).  Pricing was very good and the time of service was efficient. I can now move forward with non-priority plumbing needs, because I found my plumbing team!

synthesis.summary: They actually show up on time, explain what they're doing, and don't overcharge you.
strengths: Multiple reviewers (at least 3) specifically praise fair and reasonable pricing without hidden fees
Consistent mentions of fast response times and quick problem resolution (one job completed in 1 hour, same-day service mentioned)
Named technicians (Jake, Danny, Dustin, Conall, Chris, Joseph) receive individual praise for professionalism, patience with questions, and thorough explanations of work
weaknesses: Not enough data to identify weaknesses
synthesis.emergencyNotes: One review timestamp at 04:08 AM suggests after-hours emergency responsiveness; repeated mention of 'fast to respond' and same-day service indicates strong emergency availability.

plumbers.name: Kwik Serv Plumbing, Heating & Cooling
plumbers.address: 1047 E High St, Mundelein, IL 60060, USA

reviews.author: Char Oslund
reviews.text:
I used this company on recommendation of my home owners ins. However, I am very pleased on so many levels... with the quick schedualing, the service was beyond  professional as well as accurate!  The service man was so sweet and courteous, on time. My toilet wasn't really even broken, he showed me how to fix it if it happens again. Over all... a really great experience!  And to think if I wasn't for my ins company, I may not have known to call them.  I am 65 and have had my fair share of service calls. Firstly, you worry as you don't want to get "taken", and then there is the lateness along with the attitude and rudeness... none of that!  I am telling you... so refreshing! I will us them even when its not a insurance issue. I feel  confident that I will have no issues.
Gina at the office is also great.

reviews.author: Hope Engels
reviews.text: Kwik Serv Plumbing is an amazing company. First, I would like thank Gina who works in the office. She was amazing. Very courteous and sweet. She assisted me with scheduling the installation and answered all of my questions. Gina also assisted me with scheduling the Village of Buffalo Grove for the final inspection. Alex A and Adrien were the technicians who installed the new hot water heater and they were amazing. They were courteous and professional. They were prompt and cleaned up completely after the installation was completed. They also gave me an explanation on what they did and how the new hot water heater works. I highly recommend this company. You will not be sorry.

reviews.author: Ben Stylez
reviews.text: Andy is hands-down the best HVAC technician I’ve worked with. He showed up on time, knew exactly what he was doing, and broke everything down in a way that actually made sense. No rushing, no guesswork—just pure professionalism and skill. He treated my home like it was his own and made sure everything was 100% before leaving. If Andy is on the job, you’re in great hands. I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend him to anyone.

reviews.author: Tammie Clarke
reviews.text:
Josh P. was absolutely outstanding! He was professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly polite throughout the entire service. His customer service skills were top-notch—he brought back that old-school feeling of being truly valued as a customer. It’s rare to find someone who takes such pride in their work and treats clients with genuine respect. If I ever need plumbing help again, Josh will be my first request. Highly recommended!

Thanks,
Tammie

reviews.author: Nyronia Clark
reviews.text: Ulises was great! He explained the issues and why replacement parts were needed.  He took his time and properly installed faucets & pop up extension. He made sure to thoroughly test after installation.  He also found the source of the leak.  He was great with communicating as well as the work performed.  The job was just completed yesterday, so hopefully there will be no future issues related to this job.  I’d so I will leave another review.  However with the service he provided I belief that will be unlikely.  I will be sure to request Kwik Serv and Ulises for my plumbing needs.

synthesis.summary: Kwik Serv Plumbing shows exceptional professionalism with highly skilled technicians who take time to explain issues and educate customers. Their office staff (particularly Gina) provides excellent customer service, and multiple reviewers praise their punctuality, cleanliness, and honest approach to repairs.
strengths: Honest pricing - won't take advantage of customers
weaknesses: Limited sample size of recent reviews
No pricing information mentioned
synthesis.topQuote: I am 65 and have had my fair share of service calls. Firstly, you worry as you don't want to get 'taken', and then there is the lateness along with the attitude and rudeness... none of that! I am telling you... so refreshing!

plumbers.name: Pro-Rooter Plumbing & Drain Services
plumbers.address: 9501 Timberwind Ln, Yukon, OK 73099, USA

reviews.author: Lord Khang
reviews.text: Shelby and Trent came out and solved a challenge with my septic system that other veteran companies could not without wanting to charge ten or more thousand dollars.  Total professionals whose thoroughness is unmatched in the industry.  The results were exceptional. Their recommendation sound.  I spent far, far less to obtain the best possible result.  Thank you, so very much.  And that Angus guy on the phone, truly a pleasure to deal with sir, I salute all of you.

reviews.author: Kedrin Coleman
reviews.text: I can’t say enough good things about Shelby. I’m very happy with the service he provided. He was timely, professional, & quick to diagnose/fix the issue I was having. I would highly recommend him and Pro-Rooter Plumbing and Drain Services to anyone in need of plumbing services.

reviews.author: Jason Thaxton
reviews.text: Angus and his team were the best plumbers I have dealt with. Quick, transparent, quote. Arrived right on time to replace our water heater. Communicated with me regarding every step of the way. The work was completed much faster than I could have imagined. The work was impeccable, and our garage was cleaner when they left than when they started. No doubt they will be my first and only call going forward. Can't recommend them strongly enough. It's great when you find a trustworthy and talented company.

reviews.author: Austin Johnston
reviews.text: Trent and Shelby came out to my house this afternoon. They explained to me through step by step of what our situation was looking like in a very professional manner. I would definitely recommend to anyone and definitely going to contact them for any future repairs I have going forward.

reviews.author: Julia Towe
reviews.text: Shelby was so kind and very helpful. He as Professional, quick , high quality work. Will definitely be using him again. Thank you Shelby!

synthesis.summary: Pro-Rooter appears to be an exceptional plumbing company with highly skilled technicians who provide transparent pricing and professional service. Multiple reviews highlight their ability to solve complex problems that other companies couldn't fix, often at significantly lower costs.
strengths: Solves complex problems other companies can't
weaknesses: Limited sample size of reviews provided
synthesis.topQuote: Shelby and Trent came out and solved a challenge with my septic system that other veteran companies could not without wanting to charge ten or more thousand dollars. Total professionals whose thoroughness is unmatched in the industry. I spent far, far less to obtain the best possible result.

plumbers.name: The Fair Plumber LLC
plumbers.address: 846 N York St, Elmhurst, IL 60126, USA

reviews.author: Orlando Santiago Jr
reviews.text:
Jose and Eric were INCREDIBLE!
Honest, upfront and super helpful with every option they had. They truly saved the day!  The laundry sink broke in the back and when I was unable to reach or see what the issue was i shut the main water valve off and began calling. No one was available, or they were too far away to be bothered until I reached out to The Fair Plumber. They came within an hour and handled it. Will use them again and highly recommend their services

reviews.author: Peggy Woloszyk
reviews.text:
Our house is 100 years old. Water was backing up into our basement shower. We called 3 companies and only Fair Plumbing sent someone out that same day.

Manny used the camera and found that some clay pipes had shifted and rodding out the pipes did not clear the build up.

The next day, Manny, Anthony and Gabriel arrived. A section of the basement concrete floor needed to be jackhammered to expose the pipe. Once exposed, they also found a hole in the sewer pipe and in the drain pipe.
The clay pipes were replaced with a 10 foot PVC pipe, a new drain and two clean out traps were also installed.
Anthony and Gabriel did a great job laying the new concrete and Manny made sure to keep us informed throughout the entire project.
The team came on time, plastic was hung around the work area, they mopped the floor and did a great job cleaning up. They told us what they needed to do and they got it done. Thank you so much!

reviews.author: JH
reviews.text: I had to get the line routed out between the house and the street, once that was fixed he had to repair the wax ring.   Jose was my plumber,  he was awesome!  Polite and knowledgeable.   A great smile too!  I will definitely use him again. Thank you Jose!! 😊

reviews.author: Ron & Yasha Talaga
reviews.text: Our toliet had been sprouting water from the tank, as well as leaking from around the bottom. Thomas and Rolando from The Fair Plumbers came out, and replaced the wax seal which was pretty much nonexistent, replaced the supply line and reconnected the valve. They were quick, thorough, and informative. The office also did a good job communicating when the plumbers were scheduled and on their way. Overall a great experience!

reviews.author: Cruse Family
reviews.text: I called due to a malfunction with our pump. We had warranty with them. I called and they came out to replace it the same day at no charge. Jesus was super helpful at explaining what happened and over all we are very satisfied with the work.

synthesis.summary: They showed up the same day when nobody else would, and actually fixed the problem right instead of cutting corners.
strengths: Same-day or next-day service: 3 of 5 reviews explicitly mention arriving within hours or the same day during emergencies
Transparent communication: Multiple reviewers praised upfront explanations, keeping customers informed throughout complex jobs, and honest about options
Thorough problem-solving: Reviewers highlight diagnostic care (camera inspection, finding multiple issues) rather than quick fixes
weaknesses: Not enough data to identify weaknesses
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Two reviews confirm same-day emergency response when other companies refused; one mentions arrival within an hour; no after-hours or weekend availability explicitly stated.

plumbers.name: Restore Plumbing and Drain
plumbers.address: 1401 Timber Dr, Elgin, IL 60123, USA

reviews.author: Barbara Diepenbrock
reviews.text: Quick in and out.  Half as much as a plumbing company I've been using for years with the same product and quality.  Friendly and fast.  I believe in paying fair wages and paying what for what you get but the other guys were ridiculous for what the job is.  If I wasn't old and fat now....I could do it myself but it would take me a whole day lol!  Thank you Restore Plumbing for being accessible and affordable without losing the fantastic service and quality.

reviews.author: Mike Dudek
reviews.text:
Absolute incredible experience from start to finish with the Restore team. From my very first phone call, everything was handled professionally, clearly, and with real care. The consultation with Dave was thorough and straightforward. He took the time to explain the system, answer questions, and make sure I was comfortable with every step before moving forward.

The installation work completed by John and CJ was equally impressive. They were punctual, respectful of my home, and clearly took pride in their work. The install was clean, efficient, and well explained, and they made sure everything was working properly before they left. It is obvious this team knows what they are doing and genuinely cares about delivering a great experience, not just finishing a job.

It is rare to work with a company where every touchpoint feels this well run and thoughtful. I would give this group 1000 stars if I could. Restore has absolutely earned my long term business, and I will confidently refer them to anyone I know who needs reverse osmosis or plumbing solutions. I truly appreciated the experience and could not recommend them more highly.

reviews.author: Ula Borodzinska
reviews.text: We had Kohler Veil "smart" toilet repair (still under warranty luckily).   Jonathan was on time, super polite and professional. He quickly determined issue and fixed it perfectly. Thank you Jonathan! If needed in a future I will be calling them and requesting Jonathan's services.

reviews.author: Pat Pornsakwiwat
reviews.text: The shower had no hot water. We called Restore plumbing and drain. The woman who answered the phone was very nice. John came the next day to inspect and explain the possibilities in detail. He was extremely patient and tried to fix the problem. Finally, we had hot water running. Very happy with the service we received from John.👍👍

reviews.author: Larry Wetzel
reviews.text: This is the second big job I have had in my house plumbing-wise.  Restore has done an outstanding job from start to finish. My technician, Virginio, was absolutely fantastic on explaining everything and performing the work.  Thanks again.  Will talk to you in the future.

synthesis.summary: Restore Plumbing and Drain appears to be an excellent choice for emergency plumbing needs, with consistent praise for professional technicians, fair pricing, and quality work. All reviews highlight punctual, respectful service with thorough explanations and problem-solving.
weaknesses: Limited sample of emergency-specific scenarios
synthesis.topQuote: Absolute incredible experience from start to finish with the Restore team. From my very first phone call, everything was handled professionally, clearly, and with real care.

plumbers.name: Champion Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2524 N Broadway Suite #421, Edmond, OK 73034, USA

reviews.author: Angi Aggregate
reviews.text: Top 10 Best Home automation specialists in Yukon, OKAngie's Listhttps://www.angi.com › companylist › home-automationAngie's ListRead real reviews and see ratings for Yukon, OK home automation specialists for free! This list will help you pick the right home automation specialists in ...

synthesis.summary: They answer the phone at 3 AM, but you're flying blind on what they actually cost or how they perform on the jobs that matter most.
strengths: Open 24 hours with 4.7/5 Google rating from 689 reviews signals established reputation and availability during emergencies.
BBB A+ accreditation and 10 years in business with only 1 complaint in 3 years shows minimal dispute history.
weaknesses: Critical data gap: Only 1 total review across BBB and Angi platforms contradicts the 689 Google reviews — suggests possible review concentration or platform inconsistency that cannot be verified.

Angi data entry is corrupted (home automation specialist list, unrelated to plumbing), creating inability to validate emergency service capability or pricing on the platform meant for detailed contractor vetting.
bestFor: After-hours and overnight emergencies (24-hour availability confirmed)
Homeowners who can verify service quality directly due to limited third-party review data
redFlags: Extreme review platform discrepancy: 689 Google reviews vs. 1 review across BBB/Angi raises questions about review authenticity, data synchronization, or selective platform presence.
Angi listing is malformed (home automation instead of plumbing), making that platform unusable for verification.
Sample size of 1 review outside Google is too small to validate emergency responsiveness, pricing fairness, or service quality on independent platforms.

However, the severely limited review data across verification platforms (1 review total outside Google) prevents confirmation of actual after-hours response times, same-day turnaround, or emergency-specific performance. Homeowners should verify current 24/7 staffing directly by phone before relying on availability during true emergencies.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: 689 Google reviews vs. 1 total review on BBB/Angi — severe concentration on single platform prevents cross-validation of ratings or pricing.

plumbers.name: Bulldog Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.address: 580 S River St, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: Justin Clapper
reviews.text: Chris did phenomenal job. Knowledgeable and competent and worked efficiently. installed multiple redundancies to prevent the pipe from freezing, including a local water cut-off valve, a drain, and added necessary pitch to enable the pipe to drain properly. I was very impressed with his work. pro tip: have cash available if you plan to tip; i was not able to add a tip with my CC bc its not enabled with B'dogs transaction service.

reviews.author: N. Cavallaro
reviews.text: Had an excellent experience with Bulldog. Will recommend to all friends and neighbors. Quick to come out, very reasonable pricing! Plumber Chris was so great to work with. Fast and knowledgeable.

reviews.author: Marina Hinton
reviews.text: I am so glad I came across Bulldog Plumbing! We own a house in Aurora and have been looking for a go-to plumbing company. They were very no frills about the estimate via phone, and were able to send someone out to do our repair same day! The pricing was right on-par to what they provided via phone and my plumber was friendly and knowledgeable. Will certainly be calling Bulldog for future repairs!

reviews.author: julie tokars
reviews.text: I was very happy with my experience with Bulldog Plumbing.  They were very responsive with my request and had a quote and appt set within an hour.  The plumber was prompt, courteous and showed me exactly what he was going to do.  Price seemed reasonable.  I would recommend them for any project.

reviews.author: Jessica Grace
reviews.text: I could not recommend Bulldog plumbing more! They were fast and efficient, clean and respectful. They explained the scope of work to me and had incredibly fair pricing. He was even kind to my cat who wanted to get under the sink with him. They will be my go to company for all my plumbing needs. As a single woman, it is great to know I have such a reliable and respectful option for help when I need it!

synthesis.summary: Bulldog Plumbing shows excellent reliability with consistently praised technicians, same-day service availability, and fair pricing. All reviews highlight professional, knowledgeable work with good communication and respect for customers and their homes.
weaknesses: Credit card tipping not enabled
Unknown 24-hour emergency availability
synthesis.topQuote: They were very no frills about the estimate via phone, and were able to send someone out to do our repair same day! The pricing was right on-par to what they provided via phone and my plumber was friendly and knowledgeable.

plumbers.name: Flow Right Plumbing
plumbers.address: 13947 Kildare Ave, Crestwood, IL 60418, USA

reviews.author: Janet Cobb
reviews.text: Emilio was prompt, courteous and knowledgeable about what I needed done. The price was on target as well. I appreciate you guys so much.

reviews.author: Ivan Bolivar
reviews.text:
*Update*
I am adding a video and a couple photos. This is work they did. Spigot not anchored? Im pretty sure the pipes are not supposed to look like that after 1 year of barely being used.

I am writing this review because so far the owner has ghosted me. He set an appointment with me, and never showed up or had the decency to call me to let me know he wont be showing up. When I spoke to the office, i was informed that he had an emergency customer. So you guys ditch appointments for an emergency customer? Ive been calling the office and the receptionist (Michelle) can only pass on my message, which i understand. It is beyond her hands. I will change my review if anything changes but so far im very dissatisfied with their service.

I bought a house that has had complete new plumbing done by FlowRight, the 1st couple of months, the water pressure wasn't right. I couldn't have 2 showers on at the same time. Plumber came in, found the issue and told me they need to replace and  order the part off Amazon because they dont Install these parts and then gave me a quote for fixing it. When I informed him the work was done by FlowRight, he stated that it couldn't be true because they dont use these parts. He got on the phone and 10 minutes later said yes they did do the work for my house and that he can fix it. The issue was "fixed" free of charge but im confused as to why he said they had to order a new part. I left it alone. Its been a year later and Im having water pressure issues still. I called to have them check the water pressure issue and to check my water spigot because the water is shooting out of crawlspace area Instead of my spigot. I have not been able to use my spigot at all this summer and its supposed to be new plumbing. Plumber came in, and gave me a quote. 300$ for labor to take out a filter so they can identify what kind of filter, order it, and replace it. 600$ to fix the spigot because it apparantly ruptured in the winter. Im confused as to why they need to charge me 300$ in labor to figure out a filter THEY Installed. They should know what kind of filter they Installed. And 600$ to fix a spigot ive only used a couple times the summer prior.
I am writing this review because as of now I've missed a day of work to accommodate the owner Mark and for him to do a no call/no show while I missed work to meet him. He has not returned my calls. I've been calling the office and speaking with Michelle since I've gotten the quote on the 26th of June. It is now the 9th of August and Mark has yet to return a phone call.
I spoke with the manager Stephanie, nice lady. But upon speaking to her, she informed me that they had no record of their plumber going to my house last year. Very odd in my opinion especially when I explained how I needed " a new part", then the story changed to they can fix it the prior year.
I asked why would they need to charge me labor to figure out what kind of filter THEY Installed, order the filter and then install it back. She informed me that they dont always take notes in regards to the work that they do. Again, very odd. If I go do a job, and later on the customer calls me to replace something, I will know what needs to be replaced if I did the job myself but okay, fine lets move forward. I was informed that the warranty for FlowRight Plumbing is 90 days upon completion of job. As far as I know, in Illinois minimum is 2 years for plumbing warranties. I have not received a call back from FlowRight nor the owner.

I will update my review if the problem gets resolved.

reviews.author: Christina Lazauskas
reviews.text: Technician Frank was on time, friendly, and professional. We chatted briefly about the situation and he immediately went to work and quickly resolved the issue. He was respectful of my property and cleaned up everything to look like he was never even here. After the service he offered tips for sewer line maintenance, again in a friendly and professional manner. Overall I am very satisfied with the experience and the work provided and would absolutely recommend Flow Right Plumbing to anyone needing plumbing service.

reviews.author: jim zouras
reviews.text:
Matt and his partner were excellent! The job became a little bit of a challenge but they stayed calm and professional and patiently completed the repair. It was great to see the great and caring attitude they both portrayed.
I will definitely use Flow Right Plumbing as well as recommend them to anyone who is in need of Plumbing services.
Thank You.

reviews.author: Dawn Stevenson
reviews.text: I had a toilet that kept running after flushing.  I chose the best company I could imagine.  From beginning to end they showed kindness, care and professionalism.  I would recommend them to anyone who needs a great plumber.  Polite and caring they did the job quickly and efficiently.  Thank you so much!  I would use your revives again and again!!

synthesis.summary: Flow Right Plumbing shows strong technical skills and professionalism in most cases, but has concerning issues with warranty service, record-keeping, and follow-through on appointments. While they appear capable for standard plumbing jobs, their reliability for ongoing support is questionable.
weaknesses: Poor record-keeping of previous work
No-show appointments without communication
Short 90-day warranty period
redFlags: Owner no-shows appointments and doesn't return calls
Claims no record of their own previous work
Charges customers to identify parts they previously installed
synthesis.topQuote: Technician Frank was on time, friendly, and professional. We chatted briefly about the situation and he immediately went to work and quickly resolved the issue. He was respectful of my property and cleaned up everything to look like he was never even here.
synthesis.worstQuote: I am writing this review because as of now I've missed a day of work to accommodate the owner Mark and for him to do a no call/no show while I missed work to meet him. He has not returned my calls.

plumbers.name: PlumbCrazy
plumbers.address: 1302 Continental Dr, Abingdon, MD 21009, USA

reviews.author: Jess Bousa
reviews.text: Rodney is a life saver. Great company. Great price. We will use again.

reviews.author: Matt Kelly
reviews.text: Richard showed up on time and was professional.

reviews.author: Anita Guanti
reviews.text: Our techs were wonderful. 2 high end installed in just a little over an hour. No mess, wonderful job.

reviews.author: Blair A.
reviews.text: I had a continuous leak in a pipe attached to a newly replaced pressure tank.  I called the 1-800 number, since I am in Harford County.  The young lady took the information from me, and advised that someone would get back with me.  I did receive a call back, not too long after my initial call.  The gentleman asked what the issues was, then told me by the time he would arrive to my home, the rate changes over to double time after 9:00pm.  Keep in mind, he called after 7:00pm, and if he was in Abingdon, he would only be 20 minutes away.  He was very focused on the rates, asking if I was willing to pay that out.  I had a bad feeling about it, and decided to cancel the request.  I had another plumber come out the next day, and was able to repair the issue and replace a control box, well under $360, and yes parts included.   My advice, call another company, because this one that advertises they have great rates, was the most expensive I have ever encountered.  The gentleman did not sound very friendly either.

reviews.author: Sandy Cormack
reviews.text: Called in an emergency replacement of our water heater on a Saturday. Heard from them 4 hours later, told us it couldn't be replaced until Sunday but he would pass on our info. Called on Sunday to find status, was told the info didn't get passed on and the water heater couldn't be replaced anyway until normal business hours. Poor communication with us. Poor internal communication. We had to reach out several times just to keep informed.

reviews.author: Robyn Kalwa
reviews.text:
About 4 months ago I left an excellent review about Plumb Crazy. I have used them for several years and have spent a few thousand dollars but in late October I had an issue with a toilet.
I had a water bill of over $600 and I discovered one toilet was leaking but you couldn't hear it. Someone came out and said it was the float valve and flapper causing the problem. So he replaced them and charged me $235. I am on a fixed income so any repair is costly to me.
About a week or two later I thought I heard water running in the toilet and I literally put my head against the tank to hear it. I called and someone came out and said oh it was something left from old the flapper that he didn't see preventing it from sealing properly so he cleaned it out at no charge.
Again within a week or two I had to lean against the toilet to hear water. This time the guy said oh its a bad flapper and replaced it again. He called his boss who then said if this doesn't work I would need to either replace the flush valve assembly which would cost $130 more or replace the entire toilet for $469. If I had done both these fixes now my total cost would have been $834.
I am extremely disappointed with this company. I did call to complain but I was told the boss will call me back. Two days later no call back so I had to call Plumb Crazy  and asked to speak to the owner or the lady who handled complaints. I was told neither one are in and wouldn't be there for several days. I was then connected to the first boss I had talked to the day before and all he said was they have to make money too.   I reminded him I had just had over a $600 water bill which was more than 3 times the normal. I was then told they never know what the problem is with toilets so they just start replacing parts then if need be offer replacement.
I looked online at toilets and they run about $200 to about $300 and some can run higher. When I said this to the boss all he could really say was they have to lift the toilet numerous times as well as the old one and everything cost money. So I spent $235 for absolutely nothing!
Great way to treat your customers!
A very disgruntled customer,
Robyn Kalwa

The response below from Plumb Crazy is not the true facts. There are only three working parts inside a toilet tank. After replacing two parts that didn't fix the problem they then wanted another $139 to replace the third part and/or another $400 to replace the entire toilet. It was a guessing game? What a joke!

reviews.author: Shaun Haberkam
reviews.text: Quick shout out to #PlumbCrazy for fixing me up over the long weekend. Working in real estate I come across a lot of service companies. PlumbCrazy is the only plumbing company I call. My home was built in the 80s and constantly needs plumbing updates. They have installed for me a new well pump, multiple hose bibs, faucets…you name it they have fixed it in my house. I called at 8 am Monday and they promised to get to me buy 2 pm as I had no water. They prioritized me and were there by 10:30 am the same day. Diagnosed the problem quickly and figured we had to dig out well cap down about 5 feet to access the part. They fixed me up the same day and had machinery there within the hour. It was also the first time in a long while where is saw the work that went in and was shocked by how affordable the repair was. When I saw that machinery digging I thought I was in big trouble with a huge bill coming my way. I can’t say enough great things about them over the 10 years I have been calling on them for service. Thanks to the PlumbCrazy team!

reviews.author: Missing Linc
reviews.text:
PlumbCrazy Plumbing delivered remarkable service from start to finish. From the moment Katie called to let me know they had an earlier opening, the experience was smooth, thoughtful, and customer-focused. When Jason arrived to complete the work, his professionalism, knowledge, and personable demeanor truly stood out.

For the price I paid, the level of service far surpassed the cost. It’s clear this company still values its customers, takes pride in the work they do, and makes sure the job is done right the first time. As a military retiree, it’s rare to come across a company that makes me think, “I wouldn’t mind joining their team.” That’s how impressive their service was.

Thank you, PlumbCrazy, for an exceptional experience and a job well done. I’d say “until next time,” but I’m hoping not to have any more plumbing issues anytime soon..... LOL. Still, if anything comes up, you’ll be the first I call, and the first I refer to others.

reviews.author: Sharon Estes
reviews.text: Although I rent a house in Bel Air and the owner pays some of the maintenance bills, I was fortunate the Property Manager contacted PlumbCrazy, who sent Benny to fix some ongoing problems with a running toilet and drainage problems in a bathtub. He went above and beyond what I had requested by replacing the toilet handle, inner lever and flapper. He also snaked both the shower and bathtub drains since Draino hadn't worked, then replaced the tub spout because I had trouble pulling the shower head lever on. When I mentioned I had no clue if the sump pump worked (I moved here after 50 years in Florida, and we don't have basements), he went down to check it out and said it's working. He was even nice enough to bring an Amazon package on the front porch inside. He was very thorough, knowledgeable, and polite.  I hope I won't need a plumber any time soon, but I would be happy to have him back if so!

reviews.author: Niccele Anderson
reviews.text: Perry is the best! I called PlumbCrazy after a pipe burst in my laundry room during the really cold days. Perry was able to repair the pipe completely. The next day, our pipes froze, again. It frozen in a different part of the house that was poorly constructed by someone before us. It’s a weird closet that’s only about a foot and a half wide, only accessible from the outside of our house. He and his apprentice cleared our main out from under the thick ice and snow in 5 mins, turned the water off, and got to thawing. He insulated the pipes, added heat tape, and sealed off the spots where the cold wind was getting in that area. Perry tended to our home like it was his own and we really appreciated that. It was breath of fresh air compared to so many other experiences we’ve had with service people recently. Our pipes have not frozen again and we are so thankful!!

reviews.author: M G.
reviews.text:
Plumb Crazy has on at least two occasions done work in my condominium community and never clearly communicated with the management company that they were going to shut off water for the entire building.  That communication would have allowed the management company to give other owners in the building proper notification that the water would be shut off.  Additionally, the plumber on site made several off handed comments when I asked him about what he was doing and how long the water would be turned off.  At that time he claimed the work would be completed in 1 hour, however it was over 5 hours later that the water was turned back on.  When I called Plumb Crazy's office the owner refused to address my concerns.  
Based on my experience I would not recommend using Plumb Crazy.

reviews.author: Chelsea M.
reviews.text: My husband and I had some water line issues with our house in Harford County that ultimately turned into the line leaking into the basement. A neighbor referred us to PlumbCrazy and we could not be happier with their work. They showed up on time or early to every appointment we made with them, they managed to work us into their schedule quickly, and all the workers we encountered were very friendly and knowledgeable. You also can't beat the work they do for the price they offer--very reasonable! And they're very careful to take care of your property like wearing booties inside, cleaning up after themselves, etc. My only complaint is that they don't do work in Baltimore City because I would love to use them for our house there as well! Highly recommend these guys!

reviews.author: Steve Sweeney
reviews.text:
If I could give less than 1 star, I would.  PlumbCrazy came out to fix a leaking garbage disposal for us - at their recommendation, we also paid for them to reconfigure the pipes under the sink as they said the current configuration was not ideal and could cause issues.

Since that visit, our sink has clogged no less than a dozen times but luckily we were able to unclog ourselves - until today.   We just had another plumber come fix and he explained why we've been having our issues.  There was no vent pipe installed and therefore our sink is consistently being air starved and the drainage backing up.  We had no issues prior to PlumbCrazy 'fixing' our pipe configuration and now multiple issues and multiple plumbers tell us that the job PlumbCrazy did was terrible.

reviews.author: Stephen Dennis
reviews.text:
Adding another review.

Came home to basement bathroom backing up at 1130 last night 11/8/2025. Called around 1145 and received a call back in less than 5 minutes. Spoke with Rodney on the phone said he would be about 45 mins and was at the door in 30. He checked things out told what was going on showed me what pricing would be up front and got to work. He had everything done in about 1.5 hours. Rodney was very thorough with the work, very clean with it all and very professional. Will continue to use PlumbCrazy for all of our plumbing needs.

Was a pleasure to have Perry come out. He was very informative of what was going on and what the issues were. I will be using Plumb Crazy for all plumbing working going forward. 5/12/22

reviews.author: Kyle S.
reviews.text: We had these guys out to fix a small drip in an outdoor faucet; they not only couldn't fix it but torqued in both the hose and the pipe which broke my hose (purchased 3 days prior for $64) and broke the pipe inside the house. He proceeded to leave saying he could fix it but changed a diagnostic fee of $113. They sent a different crew a few days later; who asked for significantly more money to fix it and refused to deduct the $113 from the price. I would recommend calling a different plumber. This was the worst company I have dealt with and seems to be causing additional damage on purpose in hopes of driving up the amount they can charge. Photos of hose they broke as well as the inside which they caused the additional damage.

synthesis.summary: They've been around 40 years with zero BBB complaints, but Google loves them (4.8/5) while Yelp is skeptical (3.7/5)—that gap is worth investigating before calling.
strengths: Exceptional emergency response: 15+ Google reviews mention arrival within 30–60 minutes, including early morning and holiday calls; one reviewer reports arrival in 5 minutes.
Transparent pricing and honest diagnostics: Multiple reviewers across platforms praise upfront estimates and technicians who identify root causes rather than upsell unnecessary parts.
Experienced and consistent team: 40 years in business with zero BBB complaints over 3 years; named technicians (Rodney, Gary, Perry, Will) appear repeatedly in praise across independent reviews.
weaknesses: Significant platform rating discrepancy: 4.8/5 (Google, 93 reviews) vs. 3.7/5 (Yelp, 23 reviews) suggests possible review manipulation or platform-dependent service inconsistency—Yelp complaints cite no-shows, missed callbacks, and billing disputes not mentioned on Google.

Documented communication and follow-up failures: 3 Yelp reviews and 1 Google review report no-shows, missed appointments, or failure to return calls; 1 customer waited 5+ hours beyond promised timeframe and received no callback about delay.
redFlags: 2 of 93 Google reviews report no-shows or missed appointments; 3 of 23 Yelp reviews cite no-shows, missed callbacks, or communication failures—pattern emerging.

Billing disputes on Yelp: 1 customer charged $200 for 15 minutes of work with 60-day warranty only; 1 customer charged $235 for failed toilet repair that required multiple visits and upselling additional parts (total $834); 1 customer disputed weekend rate after job already scheduled—suggests inconsistent quoting or rate communication.
1 Google review documents incomplete work: sink reconfiguration created persistent clogs and missing vent pipe; customer had to hire different plumber to diagnose and correct PlumbCrazy's prior job.
1 Yelp review alleges property damage: plumber broke customer's new hose and pipe, then charged $113 diagnostic fee and requested higher repair cost without crediting the diagnostic fee.
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Strong after-hours and weekend responsiveness documented (early morning calls, holiday weekend service, same-day repairs). However, 2 reviews cite delayed callback on Saturday emergency and weekend rate miscommunication—verify availability and rates clearly before emergency call.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Google (4.8/5, 93 reviews) significantly higher than Yelp (3.7/5, 23 reviews). Yelp complaints focus on no-shows, communication failures, and surprise billing; Google reviews rarely mention these issues. This 1.1-point gap suggests either filtering/curation on Google or that negative experiences are underrepresented on Google. Recommend reading Yelp complaints carefully before booking.

plumbers.name: Jim Wagner Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.address: 51 Eisenhower Ln S, Lombard, IL 60148, USA

reviews.author: Julie Adams
reviews.text: We were really happy with the customer service at Jim Wagner. Someone came within the hour to look at our water heater. Our plumber Kevin was awesome!! He was honest, thorough, and friendly. He was able to get our new water heater installed that day and within 3 hours. The price seemed average too. We will definitely work with them again!

reviews.author: Mike Rodak
reviews.text: They came out the day I called to evaluate the situation and provide a quote immediately.  We wound up replacing my old concrete laundry tub and galvanized pipes with a new fiberglass tub and PVC pipes, new copper, new faucet and shut off valves.  They were fast, friendly, clean, and efficient!  Highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Tim Abell
reviews.text: Had our kitchen faucet replaced.  We supplied the faucet and had Jim Wagner replace it.  Kevin was great.  Did a great job and was on his way in less than an hour.  Not knowing the cost of other plumbing services, I would say the price to replace the faucet was on the high end.

reviews.author: Rich Chiesa
reviews.text:
Kevin came out to repair a leak off our sump pump.  Not only did he fix the leak, he fixed the problem with the piping hammering when the sump pump stopped.  Kevin did a FANTASTIC job!

Kevin was transparent about pricing, he cleaned up after the job was done, and he was very courteous.  I HIGHLY recommend Jim Wagner Plumbing!

reviews.author: Kelly Toboja
reviews.text: I did a thorough review of 5 local plumbers, including taking time to read reviews/ratings, preferred local and family-owned business, quality and certifications. I plugged each into AI and selected 3 and reached out/put in a request for a call back on their website. First, Jim Wagner reached out same day (and it was a Saturday!), another one reached out 3 business days later, and the other one never reached out. I went with Jim Wagner, and I am so happy I did. They had a call off, and called to ask if I could move my appointment to a later time in the day - no problem. Christopher showed up promptly at the time promised, and he was friendly, explained everything in detail, was very transparent with cost, provided a coupon online I was not aware of, and spent a lot of time here ensuring the problem with our drain was fixed. For the record, the cost for them to come out was a little less than the others I researched, and second - I am a firm believer in you get what you pay for, but of course value has to accompany the cost, and I firmly believe it did. I would and will use them again, and will recommend them to friends and family. They have created a loyal customer in me.

synthesis.summary: Jim Wagner Plumbing stands out for exceptional customer service and rapid response times, with customers consistently praising their same-day service and transparent pricing. The company appears highly reliable for emergencies, with multiple reviewers noting prompt callbacks and quick resolution of urgent issues like water heater failures and leaks.
weaknesses: Pricing may be on the higher end
Limited review sample for comprehensive assessment
synthesis.topQuote: First, Jim Wagner reached out same day (and it was a Saturday!), another one reached out 3 business days later, and the other one never reached out. I went with Jim Wagner, and I am so happy I did.
synthesis.worstQuote: Not knowing the cost of other plumbing services, I would say the price to replace the faucet was on the high end.

plumbers.name: Residential Plumbing
plumbers.address: 155 Kirkland Cir #600, Oswego, IL 60543, USA

reviews.author: Stephanie Van Tieghem
reviews.text: If you need a plumber, call Residential Plumbing first. I had multiple plumbers out for a quote and Residential was by far the best price and did an amazing job. I had just moved into the house and the previous owner had done his own plumbing. Everything was out of code or not working. I have had Residential out 4 times in the past 2 weeks for new issues that pop up and every time they are great. I am a loyal client from now on.

reviews.author: Denise Murray
reviews.text: Residential Plumbing was recommended by a friend of mine. I called another plumber first and was very unhappy with the receptionist, who could not answer my questions and would not let me speak with a plumber. I was very pleased with Residential Plumbing. I spoke with Stacia. She answered my questions and relayed my information to the plumber. She was supposed to call me back after speaking with the plumber but perhaps forgot. I called her back the next morning. I received email confirmations and texts with a picture of the plumber prior to his arrival. When he arrived, he listened attentively and was very nice. So far, so good. Everything seems to be fixed and working great. I will definitely recommend Residential Plumbing to anyone I know.

reviews.author: Mary Anne Sorensen
reviews.text:
Residential Plumbing once again delivered outstanding service! We had a water leak in our living room ceiling, and Rob and Cade came out promptly today.  They were extremely professional, kind, and knowledgeable from start to finish.

They took the time to walk us through every step of the repair, explained what they were doing, and reassured us throughout the process. They even remembered being at our home last year when we had a leak in our laundry room ceiling—such a thoughtful touch that shows how much they care about their customers.

Rob and Cade were friendly, respectful, and truly went above and beyond. They also recommended a great company to help with the drywall repair and to work with our insurance, which was incredibly helpful.

We are very grateful for their excellent service and highly recommend Residential Plumbing to anyone needing trustworthy, professional, and dependable plumbing work!

reviews.author: Natasha Marriner
reviews.text: I discovered a back up (coming up laundry floor drain) to the house on a Sunday and left a message for Residential Plumbing.  They called me first thing Monday morning and had a team at my house within an hour.  The office texted me updates of their arrival.   The team was professional, friendly and helpful at explaining the issue and solution.  Overall fantastic experience.

reviews.author: Mark Taghap
reviews.text: Great experience from start to finish. Ken arrived on time, explained the issue clearly, and completed the work efficiently with high-quality results. Pricing was fair and transparent, with no surprises. I would definitely recommend this service to anyone needing reliable and professional plumbing work.

synthesis.summary: Residential Plumbing demonstrates excellent reliability and customer service with fast response times, professional technicians, and competitive pricing. Multiple customers highlight their prompt emergency response and thorough communication throughout the repair process.
weaknesses: Occasional follow-up communication lapses
May require multiple visits for complex issues
synthesis.topQuote: I discovered a back up (coming up laundry floor drain) to the house on a Sunday and left a message for Residential Plumbing. They called me first thing Monday morning and had a team at my house within an hour.
synthesis.worstQuote: She was supposed to call me back after speaking with the plumber but perhaps forgot.

plumbers.name: 1-Tom-Plumber
plumbers.address: 1920 Jordan Ln NW, Huntsville, AL 35816, USA
