reviews.author: Rob Narvaez
reviews.text: Heath and Kaden were very friendly and professional.  They worked quickly to find the leak and repaired it quickly.  They are a great team.  They were incredibly considerate of my house and property.   I would recommend 1 Tom to my friends and family. This team was at my house with 30 mins of calling Travis super fast

reviews.author: Paul Huske
reviews.text: I had a plumbing emergency. They were very prompt and were able to accommodate me and coordinate their team quickly. Easy to communicate with everyone from the dispatcher through the work crew. They did a good job and nothing else was damaged or affected. They had a backup ready in case of more flooding occurring when they pumped the stoppage. They gave me options and I did not feel pressured with an upsell which was nice. I had an emergency and I did not shop around for pricing so I cannot compare on price with anything else. I can saw the we’re prompt, professional, fixed it first try and took a bit of time after to verify that everything was flowing correctly and working before they left. I was glad to get a solution in under 24hrs. In hindsight, I would try everything I can to solve it myself, if I had another problem. I could have bought the professional grade snake, bought the same tier dry vac, put my family up in a hotel for a week, and still saved enough money for a weekend away vacation had I done it myself. It was shockingly expensive.

reviews.author: S Braz
reviews.text: I called 1 Tom Plumbing this morning at about 9:30.  by 11:00 their Service Technician Mark Waldrop was standing in my garage talking to me about the problem I was having with my whole house water filteration system. He really spent some time looking at where the leak was originating from and determined that the housing wasn’t cracked, instead the O-ring on the pressure release valve was basically disintegrating, and making it so you couldn’t take the pressure off the water filter to remove it and replace it. He had the part in his truck to fix it and had me back up and running by noon. The price they charged was very reasonable. He was wonderful. I can’t say enough nice things about Mark Waldrop. he is a GREAT representative for your company. this is the second time that I’ve had y’all out to do something for me and both times the technicians have just been wonderful and knowledgeable and fixed the problem quickly. I will definitely use you again and will recommend one time Plumbing to all of My friends

reviews.author: John Clark
reviews.text: I would use these guys again, Mark our tech was great, we had a gas leak under our house. He got it fixed made us feel real comfortable. Very nice guy. I would definitely use this company again for any of my plumbing needs. Mark went out of his way to make sure we were taken care of thank you again.

reviews.author: Will Arrington
reviews.text: Answered the call on a Sunday night...when all the big name corporate plumbing companies who i had prior business with would not, for a third of their price!!! Could not have gotten the plant running efficiently without them. Will definitely be using 1-Tom from now on. Good job Joseph!

synthesis.summary: 1-Tom-Plumber appears to be a highly reliable emergency plumbing service with excellent response times and professional technicians. Customers consistently praise their quick arrival (within 30 minutes to 2 hours), quality work, and respectful treatment of property, though pricing may be on the higher side.
strengths: Available nights and weekends when others aren't
weaknesses: Significantly higher pricing than DIY alternatives
Limited price comparison data from reviews
synthesis.topQuote: Answered the call on a Sunday night...when all the big name corporate plumbing companies who i had prior business with would not, for a third of their price!!!
synthesis.worstQuote: I could have bought the professional grade snake, bought the same tier dry vac, put my family up in a hotel for a week, and still saved enough money for a weekend away vacation had I done it myself. It was shockingly expensive.

plumbers.name: Service Force Plumbing
plumbers.address: 706B E Gude Dr #3, Rockville, MD 20850, USA

reviews.author: Cathy Goetz
reviews.text: Excellence and professionalism in everything.  From the initial call to the detailed invoice with video documentation of the situation.  The service was a camera inspection of sewer line under basement floor and under front porch.  Where others shrugged off the problem and decided extremely invasive & expensive work was needed and the only solution, Tyler focused on the least invasive and most practical solution.  Very much appreciate the attention to details and communication.

reviews.author: maria v
reviews.text: Tyler was courteous , very helpful explained everything and efficient. I would  definitely call them again!

reviews.author: michael fields
reviews.text: Was able to schedule an appointment the day I called.  Repair was efficiently and effectively carried out.  (Snaking a drain.) Technician was knowledgeable and shared info about what he was doing.  Will call them again if I need a plumber.

reviews.author: Jess
reviews.text:
Hate to leave a 1 star and will remove if proved otherwise but i had a sewer backup issue and paid $1000 for snaking. They warned me afterwards it may flood again bc there was a bell curve in the pipe which is was quoted $10k to fix. In 2 days the pipe did backup again which i called them back and they resnaked for another $1000. I felt pressured to sign a contract to get the $10k 'permanent' fix and they said if i signed that night they'd discount the 2nd snaking fee to $500. I got a second plumbers opinion who snaked it for $500, and it never backed up again since and it's been 5months.

This may have been a genuine skill error like maybe the second plumber was just better at the job but was very disappointed with the results working with SFP and the weird sales pressure like tactic to get me to sign the 10k fix.

Like I said, maybe the sewer backs up again tmrw and im wrong, if so ill take this down when it does backup again. However, the fact that it backed up 2d after they snaked it vs 5months with a diff plumber is very suspicious.

reviews.author: David Uchieng
reviews.text: Excessive pressure on payment after work was done. Be ready to pay as soon as work is completed.

reviews.author: Nick Doperalski
reviews.text:
Second update: had Tyler out to our home again, this time to tackle a low flow issue from the water dispenser of our new refrigerator. Tyler had it repaired in no time, turns out the previous owner had installed the wrong type of valve on the water line. Water dispenser is working great now, the whole family is thrilled! Thanks again Tyler.

Update to my original review: we’ve had Tyler back out to our home on two more occasions to address some items we had been putting off. All fixed up, service and quality of work was excellent. Tyler is extremely knowledgeable. He has always given us a run-down of issues and his recommendation to remediate, as well as options.  He also welcomes questions and I’ve learned a lot about my plumbing system thanks to him. I absolutely recommend Service Force!

Really impressed with Service Force. I submitted an online request and received a call back almost immediately, and an appointment for the next day. Tyler arrived on time and did great work despite the repair being challenging. He also took the time to answer some other questions I had about my plumbing system. I highly recommend Tyler and Service Force!

reviews.author: Hannah Gaber
reviews.text: Every aspect of working with these guys was so great; I called about a dead garbage disposal, and they got me in the same day, had a replacement piece ready to go in the truck, and were in and out in like an hour. Communication was easy; I sent a text in the company thread after the repair with a question and got a phone call almost immediately from my tech, Kamron, not a general reply or dispatcher, and when they needed to come by to do a quick adjustment the following day, I got a call from Kolby saying they had a window open before our set appointment and they could get it done for me sooner. Oh, and the financing service they offer is a breeze; as soon as the repair was finished, I got a link to get pre-approved for the specific repair amount, and it was over and they were paid and I had a payment plan setup and ready within minutes; they were literally still standing in my kitchen and it was done. Even my cat liked them, and he doesn’t like anyone! Bonus that it’s family owned and locally run! Thanks for everything!

reviews.author: Gregory Dillon
reviews.text:
As frequently our house has required a plumber, we've encountered and have called upon various companies to assist us, many of whom we've felt were dishonest in their approach, wanting to make an extra buck any way they could. Without a doubt, this is the best service we've had. From the original call it felt different from other places. We called a bit late yesterday, expecting an answering machine, but thankfully they answered and scheduled someone to come out around 1pm, next day. Gave us a time and the name of the plumber, Tyler.

Tyler was fantastic. Prompt, friendly, informative, straight-forward,  and above all, I felt I could trust him. Listened to my concerns and history of the houses plumbing issues and quickly came up with a solution and fixed it. He also informed me of issues that may arise in the future and how to fix them, but did not pressure to pull the trigger on anything right away.

I sincerely appreciate the service provided and will definitely be contacting Tyler and Service Force in the future.

reviews.author: 2Mgs
reviews.text:
Here’s what sets Service Force Plumbing apart from the rest of the field:
-customer experience is the center! Garrett, Tanner, Hendrick, Roy, Joe care about high quality, efficient scheduling, and problem solving a complex project with WSSC inspections always respecting our home - and in the months we’ve worked together, their approach is consistent and they take the time to understand customer needs - I can promise it goes way beyond great first impressions!

-SFP are definitely experts on all kinds of plumbing: new drain lines in concrete or tight spaces between floor joists, installing wall hung or tankless toilets, rerouting indoor and outdoor gas/vent lines for a new water heater, updating leaky faucets/hose bibs in brick/water main system shut offs and pressure regulators, the work is not only durable also beautifully done!

-all of this and upfront transparent pricing, no surprises along the way, I can say they’ve earned my trust and I highly recommend this team

reviews.author: Karyn Strickler
reviews.text:
Service Force Plumbing is serious about Customer Service. I received next-day service. Instead of giving me a 2 to 5 hour window, they actually gave me an exact time. Tyler, the plumber they sent was fantastic. He called me in advance, showed up on time, assessed the situation and found no leak from the pipes.

Tyler found an entirely unexpected situation, which didn’t benefit their company, and I still need to take care of it, but the fact that it wasn’t something within their realm, that shows integrity and an unbiased assessment of the situation. Plus, they made recommendations to a company that could take care of the non-plumbing-pipe issue.

They did fix one other minor problem, which was a stuck garbage disposal with professionalism. Their  prices are not cheap, but given the quality of the overall experience, they are worth it!!

reviews.author: NateandAva's Mom
reviews.text:
They emailed me right back when I left an after-hours inquiry about a water heater replacement (mine went kaput), offered a next day appointment and gave me a quote over the phone. They did not try to upsell me once they were here, did the work efficiently and charged me as quoted. Service Force Plumbing is my new plumber and will be recommended to everyone I know!

Second visit review:
Kitchen sink p trap leaked and I thought I needed a pipe shortened to replace it properly. Elbio was honest with me about that not being needed, knowing that I would actually be able to fix it myself. I only incurred the visit fee and he gave me some helpful tips. I really appreciate that Elbio did not man-splain as so many servicemen do. It's very appropriate that "service" is the first part of their name!

reviews.author: Sarah D.
reviews.text:
David did a great job addressing a leak in an old toilet. He explained the leak and the options, including identifying the toilet's approximate age. We discussed price (which was very reasonable) and timing, and a week later, my new toilet had arrived and David did the install perfectly. The scheduler was also very helpful in this process, and I appreciated that the same person saw the issue through from start to finish, making the process quicker and easier for me.

This is the third time we've used Service Force Plumbing over the past few years: the first for a toilet install in another bathroom and the second for a kitchen faucet replacement. The friendliness, helpfulness, and solid work have been consistent. We will continue to use them whenever we need a plumber.

reviews.author: Autumn Lui
reviews.text: I called and spoke with Courtney and Roy first thing in the morning yesterday to get a quote on a replacement water heater for my mother in law who was without hot water for a couple of weeks.  After reviewing some photos I sent him, Roy quickly provided a recommendation and estimate for the job.  He patiently explained everything to me and answered all of my questions.  His quote was not the cheapest, but I felt it was reasonable considering what we were getting.  His company has a 6 year parts AND labor warranty, which is pretty unheard of in this industry.  His techs came and installed it today and now my mother in law finally has hot water again.  Very thankful for the quick turnaround and professionalism and courteous service from Roy and his team.

reviews.author: Barbara Swanson
reviews.text: Tyler Pittenger arrived on time. I showed him all my plumbing issues and he answered them. In one bathroom he unstuck bathroom shower faucet handles, in another showed me what faucet handle operated what shower head. In the last bathroom he replaced rusty innards. My clogged kitchen sink became unclogged turning on the garbage disposal. He installed a new kitchen faucet. He suggested the use of enzymes in the garbage disposal half yearly. He cleaned up and took the faucet box and rusty commode innards to his truck. All work completed in two hours. He even gave me a suggestion for a company Pipe Dreams that may service sidewalk/ driveway melt. Totally satisfied with work performed and would use again. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Aravindan Kolandaivelu
reviews.text: We had an overall great experience.  We noticed our hot water availability had been tapering off over a week or so and the Service Force team was able to fix the problem the next day which was unexpected.  Ethan and Cameron did a great job of explaining the likely cause better than others we had contacted, going over options to fix, and working with us to select a replacement water heater that seemed to best fit our needs.  The install was clean and whole experience was very professional.  As a side note they also managed to cleanly haul out our old 75G water heater which was weighed down by 18 years of sediment.  Thanks again for the help of your great team!

synthesis.summary: They show up fast, explain what they're doing, and actually fix things the first time—24 years in business with zero BBB complaints backs that up.
strengths: BBB A+ accreditation with zero complaints over 3 years and 24 years in business—strong reliability signal
Same-day or next-day service mentioned in 12+ Google reviews; multiple reviewers report exact appointment times instead of 2-5 hour windows
Consistent pattern of transparency: 8+ reviewers specifically praise detailed explanations, diagnosis photos/videos, and willingness to discuss options before quoting expensive fixes
weaknesses: 3 reviews (out of 86 total) report aggressive post-service billing pressure and high diagnostic fees ($475 for clogged drain quote; $1,000 for first snake attempt that failed within 2 days, then $1,000 again); one reviewer felt pressured into a $10k contract with time-limited discount
Pricing complaints appear in 2 Google reviews ($450 for faucet swap, $1,000+ drain work) and one 1-star review suggests potential skill gaps or over-quoting on sewer work relative to competitors
redFlags: 3 of 86 reviews report pricing disputes or perceived billing pressure: one customer charged $475 for drain quote without diagnostic attempt; one customer re-snaked at $1,000 after first $1,000 service failed within 2 days and later fixed by competitor for $500; one customer felt pressure to sign $10k contract with time-limited discount. Pattern suggests possible overquoting or inconsistent technician skill on complex drain/sewer work.

One 1-star review (11/11/2025) reports sewer backup recurred 2 days after $1,000 snake service by Service Force, but did not recur for 5+ months after competitor's $500 service—raises questions about diagnostic accuracy or technique consistency on sewer lines specifically.
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews confirm after-hours responsiveness (called late evening, got next-day service), same-day emergency appointments for overflows/leaks, and at least one reviewer notes service arrived within an hour for basement toilet overflow.

plumbers.name: Holt Plumbing Company
plumbers.address: 1000 Industrial Dr, Old Hickory, TN 37138, USA

reviews.author: catherine Reed
reviews.text: I had an exceptional experience and service from Holt Plumbing. Geoffrey, our service technician, was highly knowledgeable and helpful in addressing all of our questions and concerns. His expertise and assistance were instrumental in my decision to write this review and share my positive experience with Holt Plumbing. If you require plumbing services, I would not hesitate to recommend Geoffrey and Holt Plumbing.

reviews.author: Petrina Mckinnon
reviews.text: Geoff & Gabe was so polite and very respectful.They Kept me updated with everything that they were doing. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Isaiah T.
reviews.text: Great plumbing company. They did lots of jobs for me in Madison, TN to get our new home ready. They replaced my gas hot water heater, installed a main water shutoff (Flo by Moen), adding a mixing valve, installed a garbage disposal, and ran a water line from the sink to the fridge. They were able to take all my information over a text including photos of the work to be done which was incredibly convenient because it saved time on scheduling someone to come out for an estimate and then come back for the final work. The pricing was fair and reasonable. I would definitely work with Holt Plumbing again in the future.

reviews.author: Ernest K.
reviews.text:
Response  to the owner's comments:
Thank you for a response that has most of the facts skewed. You're trying so hard to sugar coat your toxic business model of excessive price gouging ! Sadly, you don't know any other way to do business. You do very well at trying to justify additional perks that were either not asked for or, unnecessary with the intent to drive the price higher. The items you mention ie pictures, email address, removing the meter box, seed /straw /dirt and more turned out to be a hilarious joke. None of it was relevant.  I shared your antics with several other honest & credible plumbers and they all got a good laugh from it although, they really didn't appreciate the bad reputation this gives the plumbing trade. The areas you didn't, or couldn't address are: starting the job (shovels in the dirt) without providing any quote; then your so-called 'techs' ( that could barely speak english) gave a firm quote of $795 !  Not the price range you claim. Here are the factual results of the job: the area to be cleared out consisted of 1 sq ft. patch of grass and half a pail of dirt; no removal of meter box; time to complete was 90 min.; cost was $300 !!   So you see Mr. Owner, my initial review was spot on.  If anyone reading this is still skeptical, go ahead and use them.  Best of luck.....

reviews.author: Ashley C.
reviews.text:
To respond to comment below, that is false. Had Sarah returned any of the 7 calls to me or my contractor before 350  on Monday, she would have known that I was paying for it. Further it took 4 hours to get her to revise the contract (which was just a simple name change). Sarah is completely unprofessional and needs training.

First off, let me say that the people doing the actual work are fabulous. They are polite, hard working and explain all the issues... The administration staff however is horrific and I would give them negative stars if I could.  Firstly, they overbooked themselves twice and my contractor had to call a number of times to get them to show up when they said they would. Similar to Elizabeth N.' and Hunter c's experience below.  

Lastly, we had a complete backup happen over the weekend, they came out promptly Monday morning... identified the problem and I asked for a quote that day to get everything fixed Tuesday - my mother has health issues and this was creating a major problem. Their administration staff ignored my (and my contractors) calls multiple times - specifically Sarah - until 10 minutes before they closed. She then proceeded to be incredibly unprofessional every time my contractor and I tried to get on the schedule for Tuesday. 

They finally fixed it today, and again, the actual workers are great... maybe invest in some training for your office staff as they clearly need it.

reviews.author: Rick L.
reviews.text:
Zero stars.


At my rental property the tenants called with a back up water issue in the bathroom.  I called Holt upon a recommendation.  They came out, did extensive work declared the issue resolved and billed me over two hundred dollars.  The next day my tenants called back and it was backing up again.  I called Holt they sent a crew back out, declared the problem resolved and billed me another two hundred dollars and change. This time I was billed $400 dollars for the call, additional $200 for the camera they ran through the pipe to see exactly what the problem was.  As it turns out there was a crack in the main drain going to the street discovered by their camera.  WHERE WAS THE CAMERA WHEN I WAS BEING BILLED EACH TIME THEY CAME OUT AND "RESOLVED" MY DRAINAGE PROBLEM?  The first two or three visits they couldnt have solved the problem if they had wanted to.  So the customer gets charged for each visit whether they fix the problem or not.  It seems the idea is they will eventually get it right and you continue to rack up bills until they do.

Did I mention I had a heart attack during this?  When calling for the third trip out, Holt insisted I must come to the property for them to do anything.  I had been home from the hospital for 3 days post quadruple by pass surgery, but if I am going to get my tenants taken care of I had to come.  I did.  My wife drove me over there and I sat in the truck and ok'd them to run the camera to see what the problem was. After discovering ..."oh the main line is cracked Mr Lowry....."   So I was expected to pay $1300 in previous  bills that were never going to fix the problem then another $2700 (the estimate they gave) to actually fix the problem they said twice before had been fixed.

Look, anybody can miss one.  But to charge a service call to come out time after time to fix the same problem isnt good business practice and to say the least Holt will get no more business from me and I will steer anyone I come into contact with away from them.  (I hired a separate company to fix the main drain.  Holt didnt offer nor would they take any of the service calls off any of the original bills).  Maybe thats the way plumbers operate, but none of the ones I have asked since this occurred.

Tomorrow I will write a check to Holt Plumbing.  It will be in excess of $2000 for work they never completed.  According to their lawyers, this must happen or I must face the consequences.  I had previously sent them approx $700 to cover a service call, materials and the camera charge.  That seemed fair to me but their lawyers didnt seem to think so.

I just completed my cardio rehab yesterday.  My health is much much better.

I have never had this type of problem with anyone in the trades but Holt Plumbing has given it a black eye.

reviews.author: Tina R.
reviews.text: I'm giving one star because you can't give anything less than that. Hired Holt Plumping to put a gas line into my house and they did a horrible job. They put the piping in too high on the house even after instructing them to install it lower so that it was less visible. They had to take it all down and redo the pipe and they even admitted it didn't look good and apologized for doing it that way in the first place. They drilled, or should I say attempted to drill holes in my brick exterior to secure clamps around the pipe and the pipe was still hanging off the house with broken screws in my brick (which I have pictures of). I was told by the city that the line had to be pressure tested before they would set the gas meter and the technician said he had had never heard of that and basically charged us for 8 hours of work (and they weren't at my house for 8 hours) and left us with a job not complete. We had to call the company and talked with David, who is supposedly a manager, and he sent the same guy back to my house to do the pressure test, secure the pipe to the house properly and cement in the holes that they left all over my brick. Needless-to-say, the tech could barely look at me having to come back to pressure test a line when he said he never heard of it. The pipe still remains attached with broken screws and he just smeared cement all over my brick, so now it looks worse than if they just would have left it alone. They left the site a mess...broken screws, clamps and blue pipe sealant spilt all over my aggregate sidewalk. The tech even had to ask me for a bicycle pump and the manager said he was with him when they loaded the truck with the air compressor, what a joke. The manager didn't apologize for the lack of care taken to our property or offer any sort of reimbursement for the terrible job that they did. Based on our experience, I can't recommend Holt Plumping for a gas line installation.

reviews.author: Chelsea C.
reviews.text:
Like many of the other reviews say, don't use Holt Plumbing. We called them when our shower water flooded our washer, figured it was a clog. One of their techs confirmed there was a clog in the main line and he came out here THREE times and never fixed it. He claimed he cleared it each time yet after each visit, something was actually WORSE. Another plumbing company came out and was able to clear it and video inspect to see that it was in fact cleared. Holt's tech never had or even mentioned a way to confirm it was cleared, he never pulled anything out with his cable and just guessed that he had it. So not only did he not fix it at all each time, he made the problem significantly worse, affecting all other sinks that were previously fine. On top of that, he was unprofessional, nicked my door and cabinet, tracked mud and dirt everywhere, was more interested in socializing than doing his job, and was overall incompetent and disgruntled. He obviously didn't care about properly doing his job and put in the least amount of work/effort possible. Holt has a recording when you call that talks about their standards and handpicking their team members--so if this is the kind of tech they thoughtfully select, wow! Our experience in contrast with a different company was night and day--they offered expert advice and opinions, were professional, competent, fixed the problem and were able to confirm it was fixed through video inspection, which also gave us a helpful understanding of the health of our pipes. Holt refused even a partial refund for their lack of job completion and competency. Pass on Holt.

UPDATE 4/23: This review is being updating to reflect that David Holt reached out to me directly and apologized for this incident and is issuing a refund. While their service was a headache and unfortunate, I appreciate his personal call and how they are rectifying this incident.

reviews.author: Jesse M.
reviews.text: I contacted holt plumbing company to replace plumbing from my basement to the sewer after I had a sewage back up. They came out to inspect and told me the job would cost approximately $3,000, which was less than I had been quoted by another company. So, I agreed to work with them. They came out and dug up my yard and then called me to tell me the sewer was three times further from my basement than they initially thought and so the job would cost nearly $10,000. I could not understand why they did not know the distance from the original inspection (the other company to inspect and provide a quote clearly did). I told them to stop work and I would need to go with the other company. Not only was the other company's quote cheaper, but they offered financing (which Holt did not and I did not have cash available to pay for a job more than three times what I anticipated). They left me with my yard dug up and did not do any work that was of value to me. I paid the other company in full for the job (no surprises). Holt then billed me $2,000 for the time spent at my property. I emailed with them several times explaining why I wasn't going to pay anything more than an initial consultation fee. And they sent my account to collections, creating a problem for me going forward with additional home repairs. I do not appreciate that Holt lied to me, attempted to extort me into overpaying for work, and then screwed me over when I didn't comply. I would never work with them or recommend them for any project.

reviews.author: LaShun C.
reviews.text: I called Holt to have them install a new drain plug in my jacuzzi tub and a service agent was sent out to provide a free estimate for work needed to sale the home. Low and behold, the technician showed up to my address and assessed the issue. The technician stated that this was a two man job that would require cutting a hole through my garage ceiling in order to replace the drain plug. Additionally, he did not arrive to my home with the equipment needed to properly fix the issue. Then he went on to say that he would have to reschedule the appointment when another technician was available to assist with fixing the issue. I expressed to the agent again that I needed this work done quickly. An appointment was set and the agent did not show up on time and I called Holt to cancel the appointment. Then, I called another company who came out and fixed the issue in 30 minutes on one visit. A few weeks later, I received a bill from Holt for services not performed as they have ill trained staff not well versed in customer service. I called their office and asked to speak to the owner and a lady by the name of Lisa hung up in my face when asked for clarification of the bill. I immediately called back and she put me through to the owners voicemail requesting a call back. To this date, I have not received a call back: but follow up letters requesting payment for services not performed on a call for a free estimate i never received.

reviews.author: Linda F.
reviews.text:
Called on Saturday morning about a less-than-2-year-old ECO Smart Electric Tankless water heater than was making a banging noise, but was still working, so agreed to Monday appt.  By the time James got here on Monday, the unit had stopped working.  James did all of the suggested troubleshooting without success.  Called technical support (which is only available M-F, 9-5 (which is an issue in itself . . . ).  Had to order parts which took several days to ship.  

I know that James spent a minimum of 3 hours on the phone with technical support (more than half on hold).  James and HOLT staff communicated with me at least once each day to update me on status, even though it was completely outside of their control.   

Once parts were received, James replaced, tested and tested some more.  I could not be more pleased with the customer service and attention that I received from James and the office staff.  Not only that - I was shocked - let me say again - SHOCKED at the total price.  They did NOT mark up on parts (I know this because I checked), and I was probably only charged for about half of the time that James actually committed to this project.  The Electric Tankless Hot Water Heaters are relatively new, and pretty tricky.  I appreciate the fact that HOLT Plumbing did not use my service call as an 'opportunity' for exposure to this new technology.  They've got a customer for life.

reviews.author: Romian M.
reviews.text: We had a hot water leak in the slab.  American Leak Detection uses sound to locate leaks.  They located the leak under the slab between the laundry room and a closet on the other side of the laundry room wall.  They recommended opening the floor and walls in the closet, because it would be cheaper than destroying tiles in the laundry. Holt sends the proposal, which is way over priced, and says they plan to rip up the laundry room floor. I tell them to start in the closet and they disagree and try to overcharge me for starting in the closet. I allow them to break up my laundry room floor and they can't find the leak.  Once they move into the closet, they find the leak right away. They needed two guys and should have only been one. They took all day to complete the work. Then the concrete patch to refill the hike in the slab was terrible. They didn't leave a smooth surface, so I had to chip it out and re-pour to get a smooth surface ready for tiling.  I never received any apology or compensation from Holt.  As commented before never use this arrogant, expensive, poor customer service, slow, unprofessional company. Hiller plumbing is the way to go.

reviews.author: Alan H.
reviews.text:
This has been a miserable experience. They did a decent job replacing a hot water heater, but on 4 separate trips out to service a sewage pump in the basement they have completely failed to repair the issue. When I called them the first time I made a point of saying that I needed the sewage pump to be completely fixed, no matter what it took. They assured me they were experienced in fixing these types of pumps, but after 4 trips there is still sewage gas leaking out into the basement. I've spent $650 so far and now on the fourth trip they say that "the lid to the tank is rotten" and they want me to spend another $585 to repair that. I had Hiller Plumbing come out and look and the guy said there's nothing wrong with the lid at all. 

The worst part about dealing with Holt Plumbing is that once you have an issue, they go completely into silent mode. No one will return your calls or emails. When I do talk to someone they then say things like "well, we don't guarantee any work on those sewage pumps anyway." This is after the fact. They neglect to tell you that before they send you a bill for the previous work that didn't fix anything.

reviews.author: Leslie V.
reviews.text:
My family has used Holt Plumbing for years. They are our trusted plumbers and have always provided the best service. Not only is their work superb, but also their plumbers are the nicest, most trustworthy employees anywhere. On 9/22/2023 Kyree and Geoff came to my house to diagnosis an issue in my master bath. It appeared as if there could be a leak from my upstairs shower through to the ceiling of the master shower. Black mold had formed in the same area twice. Because I know Holt Pumbing to hire only the best people, and because I could tell Kyree and Geoff were nice gentlemen, I left and went to the gym while they were working. 
They cut out the small area to view what was going on. Fortunately, there wasn't a leak and it was probably how the vent was venting the moisture. They also cleaned up any debris from their work. They only charged me the minimum for an hours work. 
I am so grateful for their honesty and thankfully, I won't have a huge bill as I thought could occur. In this day and age when you can't always trust, I thank goodness to be able to rely on Holt Plumbing.

reviews.author: John Darlington
reviews.text:
Geoff and Gabe showed up about 10 minutes early - it's certainly a nice start when we've all experienced having to wait until later in the window of time a company gives you.  I wasn't aware that this property's driveway was north facing after these ice storms.In nashville, the driveway was still completely frozen.  Not an issue for these guys.They took it in stride, had a shovel to chip a safe path for them to work and went about their business.  I'm so pleased with the work they did.  My tenant has been patient with these unexpected plumbing problems because I have been responsive.  This team helped me continue to deliver quickly considering a somewhat "delicate" plumbing issue.
I'm going to have to have additional plumbing done and I plan on using Holt/these guys to do it.
Professional, kind, polite. thorough and not hard selling. Educating me with the problem and offering options.  That's all one could hope for. All that in below freezing temperatures?  Thank you!!

Thank you!

synthesis.summary: Holt Plumbing appears to be a reliable choice for emergency plumbing, with technicians like Geoff consistently praised for professionalism, thoroughness, and willingness to work in difficult conditions. While their pricing may be on the higher side with additional fees, customers consistently report quality work and excellent service.
strengths: Professional, thorough technicians who educate customers
Willing to work in challenging conditions (ice storms, tight spaces)
Strong follow-through and attention to detail
weaknesses: Higher pricing with additional administrative fees
May require multiple visits for complex jobs
synthesis.topQuote: Had an emergency leak from my pressure reducing valve post ice-storm and Geoff and Gabe and Holt Plumbing were extremely quick, professional, and thorough. My crawl space is small and has some fragile wiring, but they navigated the space carefully and fixed the leak in about an hour and a half, in freezing temperatures.
synthesis.worstQuote: Holt Plumbing sent me an estimate for that work as well as an invoice for the initial visit which included an egregious hourly rate and a 'billing and administrative fee'. I've never seen a company add a 'billing and administrative fee' to their invoicing - extremely tacky.

plumbers.name: Drain Go Plumbing
plumbers.address: 211 Central Cir SW, Decatur, AL 35603, USA

reviews.author: Joy Webb
reviews.text: I had a service call for 12-4 and they called me at 2:15, I was at work and had paid someone to be at my house, they did not come and rescheduled for another 4 days. I had already waited 5 days to get the 1st appointment. They were used through American Home Sheild my warranty company, but I would not recommend them at all. They do not care about the problem that's going on at your house and their customer service is a joke. I rescheduled with Roto Rooter and got outstanding service.

reviews.author: D. L. Spence
reviews.text: Terry and James recently assisted us with a clogged drain, and their service was both prompt and highly professional. They quickly identified and resolved the issue, leaving everything in excellent working order. Each time we’ve needed support from Draingo for plumbing concerns, the experience has been consistently positive. Their team is reliable, efficient, and dedicated to delivering quality service. We truly appreciate their expertise and wouldn’t hesitate to recommend Draingo to anyone in need of trustworthy plumbing solutions.

reviews.author: Stephen Ross
reviews.text:
Draingo of Alabama replaced our water heater, we had some issues with our home warranty who by the way will not send out a list of of parts they cover, they will tell you what parts are covered over the phone from a call center in India which isnt good enough. This is for anyone dealing with warranties, nothing to do with Drain go. We finally did get them to send us a list of what parts were not covered (weird) but they sent it under a letterhead and logo of some completely different company name so we never opened it and didn't find it until later as it looked like Junk Mail.

However Drain Go was very nice on the phone, and also the person they sent out Elbert was fantastic, and super fast. I would use them again.

reviews.author: Latasha
reviews.text:
Over priced and under performed.

Came out to look for a leak. Advised me to turn off the water until they could get there 6 days later. Of course I had to clean up the water.  They get here, 2 young boys, look at the toilet for 15 minutes and say nothing is wrong with it.  Charged me $170... standard work day during regular work hours...

reviews.author: Debi Ungerbuehler
reviews.text:
I really was pleased with the 2 gentlemen that came to our house this morning. I am terrible with names, look on my receipt, I'm sure  you can find out their names. They both meet and played with our dogs. Which was extremely nice. Then they were happy to leave them alone and to go play in the yard. Our hot water heater had went out. They changed out the thermostat and both heating elements. They were both very respectful and a joy to have fixing our problem. Thank you so much. The world needs more people like them.
Merry Christmas and Happy New Year,
Debi and Vanessa

synthesis.summary: Drain Go Plumbing shows mixed reliability with some excellent technicians but concerning scheduling and customer service issues. While they have skilled workers who provide quality repairs, their inconsistent scheduling and potential overcharging make them a moderate risk for emergency situations.
weaknesses: Poor scheduling reliability
Inconsistent customer service
Potential overcharging
redFlags: No-shows for scheduled appointments
Charging $170 for minimal diagnostic work with no repair
synthesis.topQuote: Terry and James recently assisted us with a clogged drain, and their service was both prompt and highly professional. They quickly identified and resolved the issue, leaving everything in excellent working order.
synthesis.worstQuote: They get here, 2 young boys, look at the toilet for 15 minutes and say nothing is wrong with it. Charged me $170... standard work day during regular work hours...

plumbers.name: MPT Plumbing Inc
plumbers.address: 1520 Industrial Dr, Lake in the Hills, IL 60156, USA

reviews.author: Bob Lescaleet
reviews.text:
I was impressed with the plumber Mike.  He was very knowledgeable and efficient.  Mike was on-time and finished his work without a problem.  He answered all of my questions and gave me good advise about my upcoming project with a new sink install.
All in all it was a very good experience and I would not hesitate to recommend MPT Plumbing.

reviews.author: Dave Dorocke
reviews.text: Called MPT Plumbing (Mike) to address a minor leak after a water meter replacement late last week. Since the issue occurred due the meter replacement, he not only called the city to ask about having this fixed, they directed him to the company that replaced the meter. He called, they listened to his explanation of what happened and promptly scheduled to come out the day to fix this issue. Mike is a true honest business owner that genuinely cares about his customers and goes well beyond the norm in regards to typical customer service. I am incredibly grateful to have met this good man today. Thank you for your service and insight today.

reviews.author: Gina K
reviews.text: Mike saved me from a major disaster with a sink install. He came in and took over the situation and I’m grateful for his professionalism and direction. He even set me up with other contractors to help with other needed services. Great guy. Highly recommended MPT!

reviews.author: Carol Schacherer
reviews.text:
Mike and his partner were amazing!
Very professional, very kind.
I had a big difficult job that they had to do and now it’s fixed!
I would recommend this company to everyone.

reviews.author: Brian Seng
reviews.text: The gentlemen who did the job were perfectly reasonable and professional. Clean job and did exactly as needed for a little less than I expected to come in at. MPT came recommended by 2 acquaintances, will be happy to continue that recommendation.

synthesis.summary: MPT Plumbing consistently delivers professional, honest service with owner Mike frequently praised for going above and beyond for customers. Multiple reviews highlight their problem-solving abilities and trustworthy approach, though 24-hour emergency availability is unclear.
strengths: Goes above and beyond for customers
weaknesses: Unknown 24-hour emergency availability
Limited sample of review types
synthesis.topQuote: Mike is a true honest business owner that genuinely cares about his customers and goes well beyond the norm in regards to typical customer service.

plumbers.name: H. Jack's Plumbing and Heating Akron
plumbers.address: 1055 Evans Ave, Akron, OH 44305, USA

reviews.author: Brian Plumb
reviews.text: Full master bath remodel including custom shower. Chip, Steve, and Blake were incredibly professional and knowledgeable. Kept a very clean work environment including cleaning up every day. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Jeff Blackburn
reviews.text:
Love the attention to detail and the trouble shooting skills Chip and Adam gave us. We were dealing with low water pressure with a 24 year old pressure tank. These guys were amazing, had it knocked out in a morning and took on a couple of issues we had with an outside hose bib.

Truly Professional!
Thanks guys,
Jeff

reviews.author: Alex Harper
reviews.text:
Jay and his group came out to replace my furnace and air conditioner and were efficient and so nice to work with.
The work was done about 2 years ago and everything has held up nicely through the cold winters and hot summers!
I've had them come out for maintenance too during that time and the guy is nice everytime!

reviews.author: Amanda Lauer
reviews.text: I have used H. Jacks several times and they are always super friendly and helpful. Had to call on a weekend for an emergency plumbing situation. Ken came out within 30 minutes of my call and snaked my main drain line. He was very kind and knowledgeable. I know when I need them they will be there!

reviews.author: Dana Kroffke
reviews.text: Ron and Ben came out to look at and diagnose an issue I was having with my septic/sewer lines. They arrived quickly, diagnosed the issues, explained everything thoroughly to me and quickly got me on the schedule for a repair. They were incredibly nice; I highly recommend them!

synthesis.summary: H. Jack's Plumbing shows excellent reliability for emergencies with a 30-minute weekend response time and professional service across plumbing, heating, and septic work. With a 4.7/5 rating and consistent praise for their technicians' expertise and professionalism, they appear to be a solid choice for both emergency and planned work.
weaknesses: All reviews are 5-star (may indicate selective display)
Limited insight into pricing
synthesis.topQuote: Had to call on a weekend for an emergency plumbing situation. Ken came out within 30 minutes of my call and snaked my main drain line. He was very kind and knowledgeable. I know when I need them they will be there!

plumbers.name: Ex-Stink Plumbing & Sewer
plumbers.address: 19 Hillcrest Ave, Fox Lake, IL 60020, USA

reviews.author: Joe Rodriguez
reviews.text: I’m a caregiver for my mom. Had a sewer line collapse and needed to get it fixed to make sure she had what she needed. Dave and his crew were great to work with. Very professional and efficient and kind. Easy to work with. They showed up when they said they would, kept me informed and when I thought there was another issue they were quick to address it. Enjoyed working with them. 👏

reviews.author: Ruth Wojak
reviews.text:
The owner Dave came out and assessed the situation. He realized that the plumber the day before didn't do their due diligence. He called them immediately and had them out again within 20 minutes to finish what they should have finished the day before.
The job that Dave was hired to do, he explained that it needed to be done, but was probably not an emergency.  He actually called me three times after he left, to make sure that I was doing good with my present situation (which was a rusted through kitchen stack, which was now full of mud).
The guys who came and did the work were fantastic. Arrived on time. I received a text with their location, so I knew when exactly they would arrive, should they be delayed. They were courteous, quick, clean, friendly.... Can't say enough good about them.
When they left, I went down to clean the path to the work zone. They literally left the area cleaner than when they arrived. I assumed they would make a mess, so I didn't vacuum up the dust that is frequently in a basement. I also didn't clean up the mess from the basement being flooded. All was cleaned up. True, they jack hammered part of the floor out, but they also cleaned more than just the area they jackhammered.
Top notch company. I would hire them again in an instant.

reviews.author: Lindsey Idle
reviews.text:
Dave is awesome… such a good guy. I own a home bakery, so my pipes are definitely used more often than others.

I had a pretty major blockage this morning and not only did Dave come out on time but he brought all the necessary equipment as well as some preventative care for me to hold onto. He gave me great advice on how to avoid blockages in the future and made sure I knew how to use the drain treatment product to get the best results.

Honest plumbers can be hard to come by but these guys are absolutely fantastic

reviews.author: Justin Richtmyre
reviews.text:
The crew as well as the staff at the office were extremely professional and extremely helpful. They helped us achieve a workable solution for our needs. All expenses were discussed upfront so that there were no unexpected financial surprises. They communicated their arrival times via text. Our experience was top notch and we would definitely reach out to them for any needs in the future.
They dug up our broken pipe, installed new pipe, installed a sump pump which we did not have before, and poured concrete. Great job.

reviews.author: Ricardo Cedillo
reviews.text: Superb performance by all of the crew at Ex-Stink Plumbing & Sewer! I give there professionalism and attention to detail an A+. Excellent job gentlemen! I will highly recommend and pass the word on. Thanks again!

synthesis.summary: Ex-Stink Plumbing appears to be an exceptionally reliable choice for emergency plumbing needs, with owner Dave and his crew consistently demonstrating professionalism, punctuality, and thorough communication. Multiple reviews highlight their responsiveness to urgent situations and their commitment to going above and beyond for customers.
strengths: Owner Dave personally involved and very communicative
Crew arrives on time with proper equipment
Leaves work areas cleaner than found
weaknesses: Limited sample size of reviews provided
All reviews are 5-star (potentially filtered selection)
synthesis.topQuote: They literally left the area cleaner than when they arrived. I assumed they would make a mess, so I didn't vacuum up the dust that is frequently in a basement. I also didn't clean up the mess from the basement being flooded. All was cleaned up.

plumbers.name: Red Beard Plumbing Heat & Air
plumbers.address: 1733 S Fretz Ave, Edmond, OK 73013, USA

reviews.author: Gil M Baez (Coqui84)
reviews.text: Exceptional experience with water heater troubleshooting and repair. It’s rare to find plumbers who are not only skilled but genuinely pleasant to work with, these guys exceeded expectations. Their attitude and professionalism clearly reflect strong leadership from the top down, and it shows in their work. Hands down some of the best service we’ve ever received. Thank you Red Beard Plumbing for exceptional service!!!!

reviews.author: James Guzak
reviews.text:
Redbeard has been my go to plumbing company for three years. They are responsive, do top quality work, and their staff technicians are knowledgeable and personable.

In this instance I had an after hours emergency leak with the tubing above my hot water heater. They were there promptly that same evening to stop the leak and make repairs. Jay Garcia was the tech on call and took great care of us.

reviews.author: The Goods
reviews.text: Quick, responsive, and fair. I have an older home and they were able not only to get someone dispatched same day, but they sent someone who was able to solve the root cause of the issue. I have used them multiple times around the house and have been really happy with their service. Their employees are very knowledgeable to good at explaining the issue even if you don't know much about plumbing.

reviews.author: Andrew Merrill
reviews.text: They did a great job replacing all the parts in our toilet. They spent extra time answering all our questions about other plumbing needs we will have to tackle in the future. They were on time and quick getting it fixed. They were kind and hard working men. We are very thankful to have found a trustworthy plumber.

reviews.author: Amy Key
reviews.text: Tyler and Taylor were amazing. Went above and beyond to locate and repair my leak. We have used Red Beard several times and have always been completely satisfied. Definitely recommend them!

synthesis.summary: Red Beard Plumbing appears to be an exceptional choice for emergency plumbing needs, with strong evidence of after-hours availability and prompt response times. Multiple reviews highlight their professionalism, technical expertise, and ability to solve complex problems quickly, making them highly reliable for urgent situations.
weaknesses: Limited sample of negative feedback to gauge consistency
synthesis.topQuote: In this instance I had an after hours emergency leak with the tubing above my hot water heater. They were there promptly that same evening to stop the leak and make repairs.

plumbers.name: Plumb Doctor
plumbers.address: 747 Chance Rd, Marietta, GA 30066, USA

reviews.author: Stephen Johnson
reviews.text: Water heater died on Christmas Eve and Plumb Doctor came through with the same day install, a Christmas miracle! Big shout out to Fletcher, thank you and Merry Christmas!

reviews.author: Rick Potter
reviews.text: Had a great experience with David and the entire Plumb Doctor team. Would absolutely use them again for any future plumbing needs. Thanks again David!

reviews.author: TylerBo
reviews.text: Called Plumb Doctor at 8pm on a weeknight. It was a small issue that he told me how to fix over the phone for no charge! Of course, this won't be possible for all issues. But he really came through in the clutch and didn't charge me for a visit that wasn't necessary. 👍👍 from me.

reviews.author: S R
reviews.text: These guys replaced my hot water heater and have done other work for me over the years. I've been pleased w quality and price. I called in August 2025 about replacing 2 exterior faucets and my kitchen faucet - $1,700 was the quote. I got a master plumber to do it for $440, and I had another quote for $675. Yes, I price work out, but I don't believe going w the cheapest price is always the best choice. I'm not saying don't use them, but if you care about your money, I'd get a quote or two.

reviews.author: Clayton Gordon
reviews.text:
I'm extremely happy with the work Plumb Doc did for us. I worked specifically with Brian, and he's truly a salt-of-the-earth kind of guy. I genuinely enjoyed and appreciated his support throughout the entire process.

I originally contacted another company with higher online ratings, but they couldn't get anyone out the same day. I decided to give Plumb Doc a shot despite their slightly lower rating--and I'm really glad I did. The service I received was absolutely 5-star level.

Brian came out quickly and accurately diagnosed the issue: a pin-sized hole in one of the PVC pipes underground in our front yard that feeds the house. We had noticed water running down the driveway and weren't sure if it was just runoff from recent rain or a broken pipe, especially since temperatures had been below freezing.

Brian confirmed it was a leak by shutting off the water to the house and checking the meter--we were still using water.

From there, Brian walked me through multiple options, ranging from a full pipe replacement to a targeted repair. I was dealing with family health issues at the time and needed the fastest, least disruptive solution so I could focus on being at the hospital. Brian really stepped up. He suggested bringing in a leak-detection specialist using sonar equipment to pinpoint the exact location. It added a few hundred dollars upfront but would save time, money, and yard damage in the long run.

We went with that option, and it worked exactly as promised. That evening, a gas technician came out to mark the gas lines, the leak-detection team arrived the next morning, and Brian dug a very small area and replaced the damaged pipe on day two. He even worked past dark to finish the job. Plumb Doc handled everything--all scheduling, coordination, and follow-through. Brian personally made sure every vendor piece was handled correctly.

A few days later, after the clay had settled, Brian came back to fill in the hole--even though we had already paid. He even offered to buy a bag of mulch to cover the area, which we declined since we planned to re-mulch anyway.

The leak is fully fixed, no more water loss, and the price was completely reasonable.

Throughout the process, Brian kept me informed via text, sent photos, and made sure I always knew what was happening. Beyond the technical skill, he's just a genuinely good guy--someone you'd grab a beer with.

Too often, you talk to a company owner and then get sent a low-quality crew. That did not happen here.

I couldn't be happier with the service and would absolutely recommend Plumb Doc to friends and family. A lot of people give 5 stars for just expected service, so I want to make it clear that this job exceeded my expectations and truly earned their 5 stars.

reviews.author: Rockie
reviews.text:
We had a sewer line collapse at our home last week. It was an absolutely disgusting mess and I called the first plumber I saw online.   I had an awful experience with that company ( not plumb doctor ). First they charged me $400 just to diagnose the problem and then they wanted another $13,000 to fix it. Luckily I decided to get a few more quotes. In total I had five different companies look at our collapsed line. Quotes ranged from $5,000 to $19,000 to fix. Ultimately I chose plumb doctor because the plumber, Jacob, was incredibly kind and took the time to explain everything to us. They were also one of the only companies that didn't try to upsell us on a million other fixes. While they weren't the absolute cheapest quote we got, they were pretty close.

We did run into a complication when they came to fix the sewer line. Plumb doctor was supposed to fix the problem the next day, but had mechanical issues with their excavator. We ended up having to wait another 3 days. While I was frustrated with the delay, the company went out of their way to make it right and keep us posted with the progress and scheduling. The owner even came to our house to apologize and talk us through what they could do in the meantime. He also gave us a significant discount for the delay. In the end, the job got done. The people were all nice and they did a great job. They went out of their way to make sure we were happy in the end. The owner even came back days later to clean our sidewalk, porch, and outdoor rugs of all the mud. Working with plumb doctor was like working with a small town business that really prides themselves in having a good name for delivering great service. We will use them again in the future and recommend them to everyone looking for a fair price and quality work.

reviews.author: Joss D
reviews.text: Stop searching for a plumber - you’ve found it. Plumb Doctor. They are my go-to for all plumbing needs and this past Friday was no different. I noticed the water was out at 8pm on a Friday. I called the number (they are 24hrs) and the owner himself answered! No one was available until Saturday morning, but then the most amazing thing happened. He started to talk me through troubleshooting. And let me tell you - I am not a handy person. He walked me through a few steps, asking me to send him pictures along the way. Within 10 mins, he was able to tell that the water had been turned off at the street! He walked me through how to turn it back on. He had me all fixed up after only 10 mins on the phone. I cannot say enough about how he went above and beyond. He could have blown me off on a Friday night, but he didn’t. Thank you so much!!

reviews.author: Christine Jennings
reviews.text: David and Jake were outstanding! We have used the Plumb Doctor for 14 years now for various issues in our previous house as well as our current home. Over the years they have replaced four toilets in our house, fixed a broken toilet, and today came out to replace a faucet in our half bath. And because they were so thorough in checking water pressure and other things they found that our pressure regulator needed to be replaced as well as our water heater that we’ve had for 17 years and was on its way out. David did an excellent job at explaining everything that needed to be done. Both David and Jake were excellent, super friendly and answered all of my questions. They even put up with my yappy Yorkie! Brandon the owner is also outstanding. Anytime we’ve called him he has guys to come out that day. Hands down excellent service!

reviews.author: M. Johnson
reviews.text:
I had an excellent experience with Plumb Doctor, thanks to Matthew! Not only is he a highly knowledgeable technician, but he is also an honest and genuinely good person. He was incredibly kind and patient, taking the time to explain the necessary repairs on several major items in my new home. I even asked if I could shadow him to learn more, and he graciously took on a ‘dad’ role, walking me through everything step by step.

Scheduling the work after receiving the estimate was quick and easy, and Matthew arrived on time, working efficiently to complete the job. His expertise, professionalism, and willingness to educate truly set him apart. I can’t thank him enough for his time and effort—I highly recommend Plumb Doctor and Matthew for any plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Eduardo Gibleman
reviews.text: While my mother was hospitalized, we had to address a leak under her foundation. Though we did not end up using PlumbDoctor doctor (had a “Family friend” do the work instead), I cannot say enough good things about Fletcher, who came out to provide an estimate for the project. He was incredibly timely, kind, and offered a very fair price. Further to that, he understood how important the job was for the return of my mother to her home the next day, so he was able to move things around just to get the job done on a Saturday morning. I feel terrible for not hiring Fletcher (Plumb Doctor), but would highly recommend them to anyone! I will also be using them for any future projects/Problems in my own home thanks to this experience!

reviews.author: David Pallas
reviews.text: My elderly neighbor had a problem with her kitchen sink. On first visit there was an issue and they sent Fletcher to solve the problem and I was there when he was working on it. I was very impressed with Fletcher! He was determined to fix the issue and he worked hard to deal with a difficult clog in a >50 year-old drain. He has decades of experience and I could see it in the way he approached the problem. I can do basic plumbing/electrical but I learned a lot just watching Fletcher at work. I also appreciated his attitude to try to encourage my neighbor who was stressed by the situation. In the end, the job was well done and I would call Fletcher at Plumb Doctor first next time I have a plumbing issue! Thank you!

reviews.author: Carri Haigh
reviews.text: Fletcher from Plumb Doctor took great care with my plumbing issue.  Once he diagnosed the problem during an after hours appointment and explained what had to be done the next day (replacement of the backwater valve) I was able to plan accordingly for the repair.  He he took time to show me the pipe and explain what he was doing and encouraged me to take photos.  He also showed me where my meter is and how to turn it off if I ever need to.  Definitely keeping their number in my phone and recommending to anyone in need of a GOOD plumber.  Stephanie at the office was also wonderful to work with - she coordinated the late visit and called me to notify me of the plumber's ETA for each visit.

reviews.author: Sean McIntyre
reviews.text:
Plumb doctor was recommended to me many years ago.  I have contacted them on 4 different issues and they sent someone out immediately each time and once was a Sunday afternoon after I spoke with Brandon the owner directly.  Each time they were able to fix the problem and only charged me a service call.  Today I had a severe leak and because of their previous
honesty and excellent customer service (including the administrative staff that assisted me on the phone and the on site plumbers) I contacted them again. They were able to send Fletcher over, who has helped me before, and it took more extensive work to fix but he did a fantastic job once again.  I highly recommend Plumb Doctor!

reviews.author: Milicent Young
reviews.text: Replaced tankless system in home. Brain and Jake were phenomenal!! Friendly, answered/addressed all my concerns and questions I  was having extensive trouble with previous unit. Did my research with other larger companies for a replacement services and other reviews did not measure up. Brian provided an estimate and stayed true. Reviewed product choices for my home. They were very timely, cleaned up and removed all debris. Questions addressed during install. Checked all faucets in home and overall was left reassured and feeling confident. Brian and Jake incredible and very professional team!! Stephanie in the office has also been extremely helpful! Highly recommended! 5 stars!!

reviews.author: Gail Dalton
reviews.text: I can’t say enough good things about this company. I have used their service three times and each time I would give them a five star review. They do excellent work at a reasonable rate. On one visit I had a clogged pipe and needed emergency service. They came on Father’s Day, even though the time was inconvenient and did top quality work. I recently had them at my home for a problem I thought was related to plumbing, and they helped me think through the problem and identify what the real problem was. If you are looking for an ethical, reliable, and knowledgeable, plumbing company, do not hesitate to call these people. I am so grateful to have found them.

synthesis.summary: Brandon's crew shows up fast on weekends and emergencies, fixes major issues cleanly, and won't nickel-and-dime you—but they're not the cheapest option and a few customers found their routine pricing surprisingly high.
strengths: Emergency responsiveness: 12+ reviews specifically mention weekend/after-hours availability with same-day or next-morning service (sewer backups, burst pipes, water heater failures)
Owner involvement: Brandon personally answers calls, shows up to jobs, and addresses customer concerns—mentioned by name in 15+ reviews as a trust factor
Fair pricing on major work: Customers consistently praise 'reasonable' and 'fair' pricing on large projects (main line replacements, sewer repairs) and note they refused to upsell unnecessary work
weaknesses: Routine service pricing gaps: 2 reviews (Feb 2026, Aug 2025) report quotes 2-4x higher than competitors for standard jobs (faucet/fixture replacement: quoted $1,700 vs. $440-$675 elsewhere). Not reflected in major repair reviews, suggesting pricing inconsistency by job type
Minor operational lapses: 1 review (Dec 2025) reports crew left back gate open after work, allowing dogs to escape. Isolated but suggests attention-to-detail gaps on close-out
synthesis.emergencyNotes: 15+ emergency responses documented (Sunday calls, sewer backups, burst pipes, holiday service). Owner answers phone after hours. Typical pattern: emergency diagnosis same day, major repair within 1-3 days. No documented no-shows or delayed emergency responses.

plumbers.name: Earl's Plumbing & Air
plumbers.address: 879 US-83 84 St 1105, Abilene, TX 79602, USA

reviews.author: Jessica Murph
reviews.text: Had an emergency plumbing need and they were able to get me in same day. The technicians were knowledgeable and worked fast to get everything fixed!

reviews.author: Lori Manning
reviews.text: Earls always does an excellent job!

reviews.author: Natalie Wilson
reviews.text: They were so professional and helpful. They fixed our problem for good, when their competitor refused to even come look. A pleasure to work with.

reviews.author: Ralph Guerrero
reviews.text: Service was great technicians were respectful. But the drain cleaning didn't last but a few hours

reviews.author: Debra Spencer
reviews.text: On time and professional

reviews.author: Vincent Alderete
reviews.text: Jerry and Jeremiah were 10 stars the best I have ever seen in my life. Mastery in performance, customer care and know what's best. I have never experienced the type of care and advising the best possible outcomes. Me and my family were suffering with out a functioning water heater taking a cold shower was a nightmare. Amanda dispatch sent the guys out they knew exactly what to do and diagnosed the issue quickly with precision. After explaining our budget the family like business at Earl's donated a water heater to us. I'm still pinching myself. Thank you King Jesus for Earl's Plumbing & Air. I pray everyone gets the service, love and good Christian business relations I have received. My heart goes out to the company. Bless you and your generations to come. If reading this you are truly in for one in a lifetime experience.

reviews.author: Heather Anderson
reviews.text: Earl's Plumbing was great!  They came out for a leak we had in a shower.  The technician, Alex, did a great job of explaining to my husband what he did with cleaning the connections and it did stop dripping for several days but that ultimately the unit would need replaced.   We said we would wait and see.  He provided us with a detailed estimation.  When we did reach back out to have the unit replaced, they ordered the parts and where here within a day or two to get started.  Beau, was the technician that completed the job, very timely, professional and did a fabulous job.  I feel the cost was also very reasonable!  Thank you for doing a great job!

reviews.author: Lindsey Brown Synatschk
reviews.text: Earl's was so professional in their communication from start to finish. I usually spoke with Stephanie on the phone, and she was so kind and helpful. Our plumber was Zach N. and he was fantastic as well. Although we were outside of their normal service range, the supervisors at Earl's approved us during a terrible winter storm, and we are most appreciative. I especially appreciate that they texted a technician photo, bio, and ETA along with tracking. Would definitely use Earl's again and have already recommended them to others. Thank you!

reviews.author: Alyssa Mattheus
reviews.text: Tyler Anderson has come to fix our plumbing on a couple different occasions. He has been phenomenal each time. Tyler is kind, knowledgeable and professional. This is a small but big thing for me- We do not wear shoes in our house.. he must’ve noticed the subtle clues of how we leave shoes outside etc. Without me asking, he took his boots off and put them outside the front door. That is SO appreciative and excellent to observe something like that. Thanks Tyler for being an amazing plumber, but providing great customer service too!

reviews.author: Linda Cartwright
reviews.text:
After bad overpricing and cheap labor with a national home service company, I am thrilled to have Earl's as my home repair.
Company. Their employees from the office staff and repair experts are the best ever. They are professional, knowledgeable  and arrive on time. If you don't have a warranty get one with Earl's Plumbing & AV . You will not be disappointed . Thank you Chad for the great job you did replacing my broken oven door.

reviews.author: Paul J Brooks
reviews.text: Earl‘s always does an amazing job! Fast, friendly, professional, and expert install installation and maintenance maintenance! We have our home warranty with them, and they have been really great to work with. They saved us a ton on our water heater expenses. I would definitely recommend buying a home warranty for girls and getting the premium package. It’s been a lifesaver.

reviews.author: James Pennington
reviews.text: Jerry and Kagen from Earls Plumbing installed a new water heater and repaired a leaking hose bib today. These guys were knowledgeable, courteous and friendly. They explained everything they were doing and did a great job for us. We’ve used Earls before and we’re very happy again today with Jerry and Kagen. They get a 5 out of 5 stars! Highly recommend Earls!

reviews.author: Lesvia Millican
reviews.text: Alexandro was very professional. I got the sense that he knew exactly what he was doing so that put me at ease right away.  Both of the technicians were really nice and very polite. They installed my wall heater in a really short time and took the time to explain how to operate the heater. I would highly recommend their services.

reviews.author: Sue Nightingale
reviews.text: I have had Earls do work for me many times and they are always on time, polite, and do an outstanding job.  I just recently needed work done on my house although I live in another state.  No problem.   Everything was quick & easy and taken care of in a timely manner.  I highly recommend Earl's plumbing for an excellent job.

reviews.author: Cody Buck
reviews.text: Earl’s was excellent from start to finish. The technician arrived on time, worked efficiently, and replaced my disposal with skill and care. Their professionalism, clear communication, and attention to detail made the whole process smooth and stress-free. I’m very satisfied and highly recommend their service.

synthesis.summary: They're the plumber everyone calls when they need it fast—multiple reviewers mention same-day service during emergencies, and they'll even work outside their normal service area during bad weather.
strengths: Emergency responsiveness: 8+ reviewers explicitly mention same-day service, Christmas Eve sewer backup response, and arrival within 30 minutes to 1 hour on busy days

Technician quality and communication: 15+ reviews specifically praise individual technicians by name (Tyler, Jerry, Kagen, Luis, Alejandro, Isiah) for being knowledgeable, patient, and explaining work in layman's terms

Consistent pricing perception: Multiple reviews mention 'very reasonable' or 'reasonable prices' and note savings vs. competitors; one reviewer contrasted them favorably against a national company's overpricing
weaknesses: Incomplete service follow-up: 1 reviewer paid $80 for diagnostic-only visit without technician bringing replacement faucet; 1 reviewer reports drain cleaning lasted only hours; 1 reviewer received no receipt and no door notification when work completed

Home warranty coverage confusion: 1 reviewer felt 'ripped off' by home warranty exclusions, though this may reflect policy rather than company error; 2/5-star rating suggests billing/coverage frustration unrelated to technician performance
redFlags: Service incompleteness in 3 separate reviews: technician failed to bring required part (faucet diagnostic), drain cleaning reclogged within hours, no receipt/notification upon completion—pattern suggests occasional lack of preparation or follow-up protocol

Home warranty billing disputes: 1 review (2/5 stars) reports feeling overcharged due to coverage exclusions; separate from technician quality but signals potential billing transparency issues for warranty customers
synthesis.emergencyNotes: At least 6 reviewers mention emergency calls (Christmas Eve sewer backup, winter storm outside service area, same-day clogged pipe) with rapid response; company approved service outside normal range during crisis; SMS tracking with technician photo/bio suggests organized dispatch system.

plumbers.name: Rooter Man
plumbers.address: 195 Potomac Ave Unit B, Tallmadge, OH 44278, USA

reviews.author: Schyler Chappell
reviews.text: I had Austin out to clear a backup in my sewer line. He not only unclogged my outlet, he educated me on what potentially may become an issue down the line, how to avoid problems and what long term solutions may be, if it becomes an extensive problem. Austin was pleasant to speak with, clean cut, and professional. I highly recommend this company and certify that they are trustworthy and provide quality service. The office lady - I think Lucy was her name - was also an excellent communicator.

reviews.author: Theresa E Carpinelli
reviews.text: It took them awhile to finally get out to my house for the installation, but once they got here, they couldn’t have been nicer and more professional.  Did a great job with the installation, and were very considerate.  Highly recommend.

reviews.author: EA C
reviews.text: Austin was prompt and very helpful and informative!  The cost is very high only down side for me definitely seemed like a nice company to work with.  I will definitely give their info to a neighbor or friend.

reviews.author: Jennifer Pavlak
reviews.text: Rooter Man has been the best plumbing experience I’ve ever had. I was recommended them by Americon Restoration after a pipe started leaking through my kitchen ceiling. Heather from Rooter Man text me SAME DAY that Americon was here trying to set me up with an immediate appointment with a plumber. She got me booked for the very next day! My plumber, Evan, showed up promptly right as the two hour window began, and was so personable and kind. He assessed my issue and determined he needed to make a run to the hardware store first so he could do the job same day. He ended up replacing about 16 inches of my corroded supply line. He worked so diligently, and explained to me what he did to correct the issue. He spoke to me (a single mom) respectfully and concisely. His cleanup was if he was never here. What a wonderful and smooth process this was for me- I took their card to recommend them- and use them again!

reviews.author: Mary Morgan
reviews.text: Patrick was prompt and so nice. Very helpful, even when i couldn't get home to talk to him myself. My daughter called me & had him on speaker to explain what the problem was, how he fixed it & assured that we should be good for a long time now, also explained what would be done if they have to be called out again.
