The lower element had failed and the top was badly corroded, which fully explained the problem. After replacing the elements, everything is working well again and my hot water is stable.

I really appreciated the transparency, communication, and professionalism throughout the visit. No pressure, just clear information and solid work. Would definitely use them again.

reviews.author: Alicia Reid
reviews.text:
I had a great experience with All

Clear Plumbing. Alan came out for a consultation regarding a gas water heater, and he was extremely professional, knowledgeable, and polite. He took the time to explain everything clearly, answered all of my questions, and gave me honest recommendations without trying to upsell unnecessary services. His expertise and friendly approach gave me confidence in the next steps for my water heater. I really appreciate the excellent service and would definitely recommend Alan and Clear Water Plumbing to anyone in need of reliable plumbing help!

reviews.author: T A
reviews.text:
I proactively replaced my 28‑year‑old water heater, and All Clear made the whole process outstanding. Alan and Cody were my estimator/installer team, and they were professional, personable, and incredibly thorough. They walked me through the estimate, the installation steps, and how everything would meet current code — and Alan patiently answered every question so I could make a confident, informed choice.
I ended up with a highly rated unit with excellent warranties, and the purchase, installation, and payment were all seamless. Truly exceptional service!

reviews.author: James Allen
reviews.text: I was very pleased how efficient my plumbing work was done with our gas furnace pipe replacement. I highly recommend Mr. Juan & Mr. Amilcar for there fantastic work done at my house today with replacing our main 12 inch pipe and other pipes from our gas line. I got there company name from my neighbor who they had done work for. I am very pleased with there service and work, I highly recommend these two guys from All Clear Plumbing & Drain Service.

synthesis.summary: They show up fast for emergencies and handle water heaters smoothly, but watch out—a few customers got hit with surprise bills two to three times the market rate.
strengths: Emergency response: Multiple reviewers report same-day or next-day service for urgent issues like no hot water; one customer called at 9 am and had inspection, consultation, and installation completed in under 4 hours
Water heater expertise: 40+ reviews specifically praise water heater replacement work; Alan, Cody, Juan, and Jamie consistently mentioned as knowledgeable and efficient with installations
Exceptional front-desk customer service: At least 10 reviewers name Adela by name for being helpful, patient, responsive, and stress-reducing during phone intake
weaknesses: Pricing disputes: 2 of 93 Google reviewers report charges $400–500+ above market rate for the same service (sewer scope $800 vs. $300 competitor rate; toilet snake $800 vs. $300–400 normal range). Company did not adjust pricing in response to complaints
Callback responsiveness: 1 reviewer reported multiple unanswered voicemails and failed website form submission when seeking service
redFlags: Price gouging pattern: 2 of 93 reviewers (2.2%) report charges substantially above market rate ($500+ overages on sewer scope and toilet service). One customer explicitly stated 'All clear tried to hide my post with a positive response,' suggesting possible review management
Inconsistent callback protocol: 1 reviewer unable to reach company via phone or website form during service inquiry
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviewers report same-day or next-day emergency response for water heater failures and urgent leaks; no after-hours availability explicitly mentioned but rapid daytime dispatch evident.

plumbers.name: Rocket City Plumbing & HVAC LLC
plumbers.address: 2604 Newby Rd SW, Huntsville, AL 35805, USA

reviews.author: stephen guy
reviews.text:
I have worked with a lot of different plumbing companies dealing with larger repairs for a 126 unit complex.  After 8 years of searching I finally found the dream team.  They schedule to fix it and get it done.

I have had scheduling issues but notice they still get 5 stars.

They aren't in a rush to just get every job they can, they make sure to get every job done right.  I prefer quality that takes time than a quickie that needs another repair later.

reviews.author: SH hardiman
reviews.text: RCP did a fantastic job, the entire experience was great. They did what they said, plus a little extra; All of their employees take a lot of pride in their work & I highly recommend for any size job. This recent experience was by far the largest in scope & I couldn’t be happier with the outcome.

reviews.author: Ray Toth
reviews.text: Dylan and the rest of the Rocket City Pluming team are fantastic! Every time I've needed them, they came out quickly, diagnosed the issue without fail, and conducted repairs for a very reasonable fee. Would not hesitate to use them again and definitely recommend them to anyone needing plumbing help.

reviews.author: Christy Bechtel
reviews.text: I'm very happy with the service from Rocket City Plumbing. I called in the afternoon because my water heater died and Dylan and his team responded quickly and had me up and running with a new tankless water heater that evening. I would definitely recommend!

reviews.author: David Beard
reviews.text:
1) Great communication regarding my appointment, including updates on the day of the appointment.
2) Fair prices for the services I needed with no unexpected or hidden costs.
3) Knowledgeable technician who explained problems and solutions without trying to "upsell" me to more costly options.

Very satisfied with the service and will definitely use again!

synthesis.summary: Rocket City Plumbing appears to be an exceptional choice for emergency plumbing needs, with consistent praise for quick response times and quality work. They successfully handled urgent situations like water heater failures same-day, and customers consistently highlight their reliability and fair pricing.
strengths: Quick emergency response and same-day service
High-quality work that's done right the first time
Fair and transparent pricing with no hidden costs
weaknesses: Occasional scheduling issues mentioned
May prioritize quality over speed
synthesis.topQuote: I called in the afternoon because my water heater died and Dylan and his team responded quickly and had me up and running with a new tankless water heater that evening.
synthesis.worstQuote: I have had scheduling issues but notice they still get 5 stars.

plumbers.name: Anderson Plumbing Heat and Air
plumbers.address: 3510 N Rockwell Ave, Bethany, OK 73008, USA

reviews.author: Angi Aggregate
reviews.text: Top 10 Best Plumbers in Piedmont, OKAngie's Listhttps://www.angi.com › ... › Plumbers in OKAngie's ListOver the last couple of years I have used Anderson Plumbing several times and have received prompt and excellent service. I recommend highly! , Anderson ...4.5(1,262)

synthesis.summary: They show up fast and do the job right, but we're flying blind with only one review across all platforms.
strengths: 24-hour availability explicitly stated in Google hours — critical for emergencies.
Angi review praises 'prompt and excellent service' with repeat business over multiple years.
weaknesses: Critically small sample size: only 1 review total across all platforms creates severe reliability uncertainty for emergency vetting.
No specific emergency response times, after-hours anecdotes, or same-day service mentions in available review data.
bestFor: 24-hour emergency calls — business commits to round-the-clock availability.
Repeat service needs — Angi reviewer returned multiple times, indicating consistency.
redFlags: CRITICAL: Only 1 review total across all platforms. Insufficient data to validate emergency reliability or service quality at scale. High rating (4.9/5 on Google) is based on 525 reviews, but Angi data shows only 1 review — major platform discrepancy suggests Google reviews may not be current or verified for this specific business.
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Business name does not contain emergency keywords, but Google hours explicitly show 'Open 24 hours,' which is the strongest emergency signal available. Single Angi review mentions 'prompt service,' supporting responsiveness. However, the absence of explicit emergency, after-hours, or same-day language in reviews limits confidence — rank high due to 24/7 hours alone, but flag the tiny review base.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Google: 4.9/5 (525 reviews) vs. Angi: 4.5/5 (1,262 reviews listed in snippet, but only 1 review in data provided). Large disconnect suggests outdated or inconsistent data sync.

plumbers.name: Excellent Plumbing
plumbers.address: 785 Oakwood Rd STE E101, Lake Zurich, IL 60047, USA

reviews.author: Aaron
reviews.text: Gino and Saul were great!  They fixed a leaky/dripping shower faucet with a quick response on a Saturday and explained everything in detail.  They were able to save the fixture and in turn saved me a lot of money.  Very professional and courteous.  I would highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Antonio Castillo
reviews.text: I highly recommend Excellent Plumbing for your plumbing needs. Saul was extremely professional in his work and understood our needs perfectly. All work was done to perfection. What really impressed was their way of communication with us leading up to the day of work. Five Stars…

reviews.author: Alina P.
reviews.text: Gino and Saul did an excellent job cleaning out the main line. Before they did the hydro jetting, we had concerns that the pipes were damaged, but after Gino and Saul cleaned them, they could see that they were not damaged. We highly recommend their business!

reviews.author: Robert Fitch
reviews.text: Woke up with no hot water and the water tank leaking. Called two places. The first was a machine left message. Gino picked up on the second ring gave me a rough estimate. He did say that any variable issues would be identified on site. His team showed up 1 hours later. They did a great job, cleaned up after, and since there were no issues with the replacement, the estimate was accurate.

reviews.author: Frank Barnard
reviews.text: Called for clogged floor drain in laundry room.  Response quick.  Results successful.  Around an hour to completion.  Price not transparent and seemingly high.  Senior discount not in invoice detail.  Appealing to 'customer service' resulted in the contractor calling me up and was explained away as implied in the final amount. Clumsy and unsatisfying.  Would have potentially turned more business over to them if their pricing had been more transparent.

synthesis.summary: Excellent Plumbing shows strong reliability for emergency calls with quick response times and quality work. While pricing transparency could be better, their technical expertise and professional service make them a solid choice for urgent plumbing needs.
weaknesses: Pricing not transparent
Limited pricing options
synthesis.topQuote: Woke up with no hot water and the water tank leaking. Called two places. The first was a machine left message. Gino picked up on the second ring gave me a rough estimate... His team showed up 1 hours later. They did a great job, cleaned up after, and since there were no issues with the replacement, the estimate was accurate.
synthesis.worstQuote: Price not transparent and seemingly high. Senior discount not in invoice detail. Appealing to 'customer service' resulted in the contractor calling me up and was explained away as implied in the final amount. Clumsy and unsatisfying.

plumbers.name: LaCassa Plumbing | Plumber, Drain Cleaning, Sewer Repair and Tankless Water Heater Installation Naperville, IL
plumbers.address: 50 S Main St Suit 200, Naperville, IL 60540, USA

reviews.author: Susan Angus
reviews.text: Carmen and his entire staff were awesome. We had an emergency and they came out right away. We have never used LaCassa before and we are extremely happy with the work. Carmen was very detailed in explaining the work he was going to do. He was very patient with all of our questions. They finished the job in one day and cleaned up everything. Nicole was super helpful with the process with permits and a payment plan. I would recommend LaCassa 100%.

reviews.author: Tim K
reviews.text: Mike and Carmen did an amazing job! They were reasonably priced and very thorough. My basement drain was backing up from the sewer and they got everything cleared out of the main sewer line. They ran into some issues that they thought may cause problems in the future and they spent hours more than they needed to making sure everything was able to flow properly. 10 stars!

reviews.author: Jonathan La Berg
reviews.text: Mike and Carmen were both incredibly helpful in solving my issues with two toilets that needed repair. They walked me through my options after assessment and provided recommended solutions. Additionally, they completed the repairs quickly and effectively. I will definitely continue to use them going forward.

reviews.author: Carlie Martin
reviews.text: Carmen and Nick were very helpful in repairing our toilets. We had a leak in the toilets due to a faulty flap. They were detailed oriented and informative in their recommendations. They gave us recommendations on how to proceed and what next steps would be in terms of our faucet and water pressure issues. This was our second time using LaCassa (previously for a water disposal replacement) and we have been very happy with their service both times. I highly recommend LaCassa Plumbing to anyone in the area!

reviews.author: Lou Cassara
reviews.text:
Carmen always does a very complete, thorough, and professional job. We’ve worked together for years, and I wouldn’t use anyone else for my plumbing needs. You get what you
Pay for.

synthesis.summary: LaCassa Plumbing demonstrates exceptional reliability for emergencies with same-day response, thorough work, and detailed customer communication. Multiple reviews highlight their willingness to go above and beyond, spending extra time to prevent future issues.
weaknesses: Limited sample size of reviews
No mention of pricing transparency
synthesis.topQuote: We had an emergency and they came out right away... Carmen was very detailed in explaining the work he was going to do. He was very patient with all of our questions. They finished the job in one day and cleaned up everything.

plumbers.name: Mr. Rooter Plumbing of South Nashville
plumbers.address: 4235 Hillsboro Pike, Nashville, TN 37215, USA

reviews.author: Noah
reviews.text: Great experience. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Emma Moreno
reviews.text: Outstanding explained the problem talked with us every step of the way. Explained pricing and solutions. Excellent, Excellent customer service from our technician. He was kind, patient, and overall was a pleasure to work with! He deserves a Christmas bonus!

reviews.author: John Girges
reviews.text: Amir very good guy he is very nice and professional I like really this company and recommend for home or businesses and coming on time and very helpful

reviews.author: Leslie Velasquez
reviews.text:
I had a leak in my shower and a technician came out to diagnose it. He did not open the shower handle or inspect the cartridge, and instead immediately recommended a full valve replacement requiring drywall removal, quoting over $1,000. I later got a second opinion and the issue was resolved simply by tightening the existing cartridge.
I did call the company to share this, but I wanted to leave a review so others know to ask for thorough troubleshooting. I am thankful I didn’t have Mr Rooter do the repair. It would have been thousands to repair for something so small and new drywall on top of that.

reviews.author: Paul K.
reviews.text:
Update #1 - within 20 minutes I was told they'd pay for what my AC guy has claimed damage wise thus far. My stress level, already pretty low with them, still low - moving up a star - pipe drops happen.

Original (with some added detail):

We're going to see how this plays out - to set the stage, I'm at about $6500 in with them for a large scale cast iron pipe replacement that finished Thursday. This was for replacing a main to within 10 feet of the sewer, roughly 58 feet to the house, under the house, hundreds of pounds of old cast iron pipe.

Friday I was informed the AC was out and called my AC guy not thinking anything of anything related. It'd also been a day, but I didn't know that the tenant's had not been there that night.

Monday my AC guy got here and said they'd dropped the old cast iron pipe on the air intake which crushed it, broke straps, blew out a capacitor due to no air being able to circulate, and resulted in $300+ worth of AC repair (at the moment, he's got to come back)

Contacted Mr Rooter both via voice mail and email, we'll see how they want to play it. (so far very classy, they've said they'll have a check in my hand tomorrow)

reviews.author: Hallie J.
reviews.text:
I was having flooding in a flower bed. I called Friday morning and was told someone could be to my house the next day between 11&12. 

Sandro came out to the house.
He called 30 minutes before arriving & was prompt in the time window that was given to me the day prior--arrived right at 11:15! 

Sandro was extremely nice, very professional, identified the problem and got the job done well! It might've been the hottest day in Tennessee in the last two years. Feels like degrees of 99! It was about a 3 to 4 hour job of digging, cutting a leaking pipe and repairing. He worked very hard on it, worked through the intense heat & had such a positive attitude the entire duration of the job! 
Price was fair for the time, labor & skill needed. 
After speaking to him about the company I learned this is a family run business and let me tell you, IT SHOWS!! They truly care about their customers and do what it takes to get the job done!

Offered him water and granola bars as he worked through lunch and he was SO appreciative! 
I HIGHLY recommend Mr. Rooter!

reviews.author: Anthony Coon
reviews.text: I've used Mr. Rooter a few times now, the last one being a water heater replacement when my old one crapped out late last night and started leaking everywhere. Had an appointment scheduled for 12-2pm time frame; however, one tech (Drazan) had just completed a job and was able to come early. Didn't take long to run down to the shop and grab a new unit and go to town; had it all done in about an hour. They are thorough and explain what everything does as they're working on it, which is always helpful. It's been great service every time. Hopefully I won't have to need them again; but if I ever do, I know I will be well taken care of. Thanks all!

reviews.author: Lekethia Sanford
reviews.text:
I am so pleased with Mr. Rooter Plumbing.
Austin came out to my home today and fixed a pesky pipe leak. He was amazing. My appointment window was between 9 and 11. He was here at 9:00. He checked everything and discussed possible issues that could be causing constant pipe leaks in that area. He did not rush me when I asked multiple questions and showed sincere interest in my concerns.   He was so easy to talk to. I'm so pleased that I'm planning to join their VIP membership program. Please use Mr. Rooter & ask for Austin if he's available.
I will definitely continue to use this
company! 10 STARS. THANK YOU, AUSTIN!

reviews.author: Lifted Skin
reviews.text:
We’re so happy to have found Mr Rooter!
We just had a major issue with old pipes at our business and had 3 different plumbing companies come diagnose and give us estimates.
Without going into details, Mr Rooters estimate was $17,700 less than one company and $4200 less than another AND they didn’t have to jackhammer my floors.
Needless to say we chose them because they were honest, didn’t try and upsell us, had the best price, fixed it the correct way and fixed it quickly.
I will never use another plumber in Nashville for my home or any of our businesses other than Mr. Rooter from now on.

reviews.author: Laura McCluney
reviews.text: We have used Mr Rooter several times, and we have designated Amir as our go-to plumber.  He always is prompt, thorough and professional, and the price is always fair and reasonable.  He explains what the issue is so that we can understand, and he gives us all solution options using his knowledge and experience.  He answers all questions we may have, and he always treats us with respect.   We respect him and trust him, and we will continue to call Amir and Mr Rooter for all of our plumbing needs.  We highly recommend Mr Rooter Plumbing!

reviews.author: Mark Butler
reviews.text: If there was a 6 star rating, this company would get it.  From initial contact with a county/state dictated issue, Mr. Rooter was amazing.  They firstly came in under on their bid, for the same work.  Then when things didn't go correctly, they said don't worry about anything we will take care of it and make it right, no extra costs etc....  Honestly couldn't recommend this family run company more, oh yes forgot to mention you always get a family member when you call.  Seriously, call them you won't regret it.

reviews.author: Martha C.
reviews.text:
I had a blockage in the system - probably caused by kids putting paper towels down the toilet. The folks at Mr. Rooter offered to show up earlier than our scheduled appointment - but couldn't accommodate that. But seriously - when has a plumber come early? 
When Sandro got here, the problem had mostly resolved itself, but he was very thorough in checking everything. At the end, no charge. He said he didn't do anything! 
These guys are honest, and respectful, and I would totally use them again.

reviews.author: Shannon Garner
reviews.text: Mr. Rooter was very compassionate, and quick! I called they had someone out that same day. Not only that I didn’t think they would be able to repair my issue until the following week but they sent someone the very next day. My technician was Robert super cool, super informative, super professional. Would definitely recommend to anyone needing any type of plumbing services. Thank you Robert for all you did, you definitely went above and beyond.

reviews.author: Jackson Markham
reviews.text:
Robert was exceptionally patient and knowledgable! I needed him for a simple project but he was smart enough to see my contractor made a serious mistake and he was able to jump on it and spend the extra time to get me situated.

I had one plumber earlier this week mess up my appt time, then another completely no-show, but with 2 hrs notice Mr Rooter was gracioua enough to fit me in. 100% my plumber of choice!

reviews.author: Mirko Pintar
reviews.text: You never like to wake up and see a water leak on your ceiling right before the weekend. Thankfully, Mr. Rutter’s efficient and professional company showed up first thing Monday morning and fixed everything quickly and cleanly. I’m very satisfied with their friendly, professional service and the great value for the job done. Highly recommended for any future needs!

synthesis.summary: They show up fast, fix it right the first time, and don't oversell you—exactly what you want when a pipe bursts at midnight.
strengths: Same-day and emergency response: 15+ Google reviews explicitly mention arriving same-day or within hours of calls, including late-night burst pipe and weekend ice storm repairs

Honest diagnostics and fair pricing: 8+ reviews specifically praise avoiding unnecessary upsells; one customer saved $17,700 vs. competitor estimates and another avoided a $1,000+ unnecessary valve replacement after seeking second opinion

Consistent quality across named technicians: Amir, Robert, Austin, Valentine, and Drazan are individually called out 15+ times for professionalism, thoroughness, and knowledge; multiple customers specifically request them by name on repeat calls
weaknesses: Diagnostic overreach risk: 1 Google review (1/84) documents a technician recommending a $1,000+ full valve replacement requiring drywall removal without inspecting the cartridge first; issue was resolved by tightening only

AC damage accountability gap on Yelp: 1 Yelp review documents a $300+ AC unit damage claim from dropped cast iron pipe during a major replacement job; company responded quickly with payment offer, but incident suggests heavy equipment handling risks
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews document same-day service, 2-hour emergency windows, weekend availability during ice storms, and proactive early arrivals when customers faced critical failures; one technician arrived before scheduled window for emergency burst pipe.

plumbers.name: J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
plumbers.address: 3406 W Elm St, McHenry, IL 60050, USA

reviews.author: Lemiell Kareem
reviews.text: Excellent service! Well priced.  My husband and I just purchased a home in the area. We had some plumbing issues that arose literally after closing. J. Blanton Plumbing was able put me on the schedule quickly. They came out early the next morning.  John,  the technician, was able to completely solve all of our issues that same day! He is knowledgeable about the job, very professional, and communicated well.  He showed me areas concern, and told me what to do to make sure the problem we had would not be back, but if it does come back, we know who to call!

reviews.author: Jon Rappoport
reviews.text: Scott was fantastic. He walked us through every step with great information and perspective. His passion for the work and helping people is so apparent, matched only by his passion for dogs! Obi enjoyed meeting Scott as much as we did. Thank you!

reviews.author: Christopher Dingman
reviews.text:
We had an issue with our sump pump in a home we moved into less than a year ago, and we contacted J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain. Scheduling an appointment was easy, and the service charge was very reasonable—especially since it’s applied toward any work performed.
Robert Camargo came out the very next day (today) and just wrapped up his visit. He was extremely personable and genuinely a pleasure to talk with. Robert is honest, straightforward, and clearly very knowledgeable in his field. The way he explained the issue—with clear options for how to proceed and what each option would mean both now and in the future—made everything easy to understand.
His communication style, paired with his expertise, gave us a lot of confidence moving forward. We truly appreciated having someone like Robert take the time to walk us through everything so thoroughly.

reviews.author: jalen herring
reviews.text: Great service honest worker. Anthony The service technician rodded out our pipeline heading into the sewer. He was very efficient and honest about his work. I highly recommend you guys contact him specifically.

reviews.author: Lucy Pristovnik
reviews.text:
In the morning, Ronnie came to review the work we needed done. Ome of what we wanted ended up being more extensive in nature and was not needed or necessary. We agreed to just replace our toilet and faucet that we supplied. The other work required cutting into our wall which we did not want to do.
Then later in the afternoon the actual plumber came out to do the work. Brendon was very pleasant and I went over what I needed done. Took about 2 hours to complete the job and he removed the garbage so I didn’t have to put it out to the trash. He also put the sticker with the faucet model # inside my cabinet for future reference which was great.

synthesis.summary: J. Blanton Plumbing consistently delivers professional, knowledgeable service with excellent communication and quick scheduling. Multiple reviews highlight their honest, straightforward approach and ability to solve complex plumbing issues efficiently, making them a reliable choice for emergency situations.
weaknesses: Limited sample size for comprehensive assessment
synthesis.topQuote: He is knowledgeable about the job, very professional, and communicated well. He showed me areas concern, and told me what to do to make sure the problem we had would not be back, but if it does come back, we know who to call!

reviews.text: Top 10 Best Plumbers in Fort Myer, VAAngihttps://www.angi.com › ... › Plumbers in VAAngiI had a major water leak under my kitchen sink. Cherry Blossom Plumbing was very prompt in coming to the house, the matter was addressed expertly and ...

strengths: BBB A+ accreditation with zero complaints over 3 years signals established trust and accountability

Available review mentions prompt arrival and expert handling of water leak repair
weaknesses: Severely limited review visibility outside Google—only 1 Angi review captured, making it impossible to verify consistency across platforms
