plumbers.name: The Plumber Guys
plumbers.address: 1205 Loflin Rd, Aberdeen, MD 21001, USA

reviews.author: Jennifer Ischia
reviews.text: The quality of the work is incredible. I have tried other plumbers before but I got rid of their numbers since we met Steve. He has done several jobs in our house and I would highly recommend this company.

reviews.author: Kimberly Matthews
reviews.text: The plumber guys are were amazing! They were able to come the very next day after I called them! There work was impeccable and the job was done efficiently! They gave me a excellent price and performed

reviews.author: Jessica Sauer
reviews.text: We had an unexpected water heater leak in our 2nd floor condo and needed it replaced ASAP as it was already leaking into the neighborhoods below us. After doing some research, I decided to call The Plumber Guys since they had great reviews and have been in service a long time. I am so glad we went with them! They worked with us every stop of the way and were able to complete the job the next day for us! The job was not the easiest due to the very small space they had to work with but they did it! They were professional and efficient! They will now be our go to for all our plumbing needs moving forward. You will not regret going with The Plumber Guys!!

reviews.author: Is D.
reviews.text: My insurance gave me these guys,and i called them twice and the just sit and lie to you that they are comming.Forget about comming they do not do anything a total wste of time.After one day I had my insurance get me a  different plumber to come out and do the job.DO NOT WASTE YOUR TIME WITH THIS CO,sorry to say that,but when you sewer is backed up that is an emergency and you really do need some one that cares.

reviews.author: Cheryl M.
reviews.text: They did not resolve my issue of a stopped up toilet.  After a couple of days the toilet and bath tub were again stopped up. They said it was trouble on the city side but we found that not to be true.  They stopped taking my calls and did not return calls.  I called roto rooter and they fixed the problem immediately and we have had no problems. They charged me $335.00 for nothing, I gave it one star because I could not choose no stars.

reviews.author: Sujay Srivastava
reviews.text:
Steve and his team deliver.... again...

I found water underneath my kitchen sink and called American Home Shield to fix it.  They sent someone from another company  who indicated that the leak was from the faucet and it needed to be replaced.  They proceeded to use a reciprocating saw to cut the old faucet's hoses and, additionally/needlessly, to cut pipes behind the wall.  Electricity to the area mysteriously vanished during that time.  When I questioned the plumber's approach, I was told, "you wouldn't understand."

After they had replaced the faucet and additional piping, the area seemed dry... until it wasn't.  I checked again in about 30 minutes and, once again, there was water underneath the sink.

Bottom line, the other plumber took a simple faucet replacement and created bigger problems.

After all of this, I didn't want to mess around with people who didn't know what they were doing.  I called Steve from The Plumber Guys and explained that I needed him to fix what the other company had messed up.
Steve sent his team, Ron and Shawn, just a few hours later.  And they did what they do.  Find and resolve the issue, the first time at a reasonable cost.  They were professional, respectful and kind.  Most of all, they gave me peace of mind.
Thank you Steve, Ron and Shawn.

reviews.author: Meredith Hovermill
reviews.text:
Highly recommend Steve and The Plumber Guys  for all your plumbing needs. From indoor needs to outdoor needs, they have you covered. Extremely professional, knowledgeable, respectful and reliable. Excellent customer service and extremely responsive to my need for a replacement of my kitchen faucet, servicing my leaking garbage disposal, and providing valuable recommendations for the potential relocation of an outdoor faucet.  If you’re experiencing a plumbing issue, a call to The Plumber Guys should be your next step.  Update: Had Steve and his team back out to install a new water heater. Again, excellent customer service, extremely smooth process from initially scheduling them to come out to assess the situation followed by prompt and professional installation.  The Plumber Guys to the rescue again!
UPDATE 08/05/2025: Called The Plumber Guys for emergency repair to our hot water heater that was accidentally disconnected from the roof vent pipe by our roofing company. The Plumber Guys responded immediately and reconnected our hot water heater. They are extremely professional, knowledgeable, courteous and respectful.  Highly highly recommend The Plumber Guys!!!! To the rescue again!!

reviews.author: Private P.
reviews.text: I originally left a five star review but I had to come back and change it because my sink that was repaired lasted for three days. Steve told me that I needed a new faucet to get my hot water pressure working in my kitchen sink. I ordered a new faucet that cost $125, He charged me $325 to put it in. When I called to tell him the sink was not fixed he comes back and tells me it was the valve. A valve that costs $9.97 at Home Depot and my brother put in for free. Steve was going to charge me $308 to put the valve on. I paid $450 for a $10 job . I did not give this a one star because I am hoping this was just a misdiagnosed problem and not a business yanking my chain to get as much money out of me as possible. In my opinion since he misdiagnosed the problem and I already paid $425 for something that was not the issue, he should have put the $10 valve on for free. These are all learning lessons for new homeowners, do your research and always get second opinions.

reviews.author: lori turner
reviews.text:
To The plumber Guys
I just wanted to take a moment to sincerely thank you for the outstanding service you provided. From start to finish, your professionalism, clear communication, and responsiveness were truly impressive.
You not only delivered exactly what you promised, but you did so with fairness, efficiency, and a level of patience and understanding that made the entire experience a pleasure. It’s not often you come across someone who is not only great at their trade but also genuinely easy to work with.
The quality of your work, along with your fair pricing and quick turnaround, really stood out. I’m so glad I found you, and I won’t hesitate to recommend you to others. You truly deserve the recognition.
Thank you again—I’ll definitely be keeping your number handy for the future!

reviews.author: Lisa Houtz
reviews.text: If I could give more than 5 stars, I definitely would!! After replacing the water lines for our new washing machine, which were old and corroded, we damaged the top portion of the valve, causing leaks. I contacted The Plumber Guys Sunday and was scheduled for a 8:00am appointment this morning. (Monday) Shawn notified us that he was on the way, even providing a tracking of his progress towards our house. Once he arrived, he was joined by Ron, to access the situation and provide an up-front pricing for the repair. Steve, the owner, also arrived. I was so pleased with how quickly the repair was completed!!! Thank You, Shawn, Steve and Ron......YOU GUYS ROCK!!!!  For anyone reading this review, call The Plumber Guys for all your plumbing needs. They are #1 in our opinion!!

reviews.author: Jim Whaley
reviews.text: I contacted The Plumber Guys for a non emergency plumbing issue and was able to get an appointment for the next day with a time frame of expected arrival. On the scheduled day, they experienced a small issue that was causing them to run late. Both the technician, Ron, and the owner Steve, contacted me to explain the situation and update the time window. They still arrived within 30 minutes of the original window. Ron had come prepared with the necessary parts and completed the repair quickly.  He was both professional and friendly Steve was also professional and was very appreciative of our business. The cost was extremely reasonable. I would highly recommend The Plumber Guys for your plumbing needs.  Thank you Ron and Steve!

reviews.author: Shakeisha Alexander
reviews.text: I had the pleasure of working with the plumber guys about a week ago. I was a little frustrated to wake up to a non working garbage disposal and quickly researched plumbers in the area. The plumber guys answered right away and was able to squeeze me in within a two hour time frame. I was completely surprised but very thankful. They arrived and immediately got to work and my problem was fixed in a matter of minutes. He was very knowledgeable and helpful to prevent another situation from happening. Thank you so much for awesome service and I will definitely be using the services again.

reviews.author: Harry Snyder
reviews.text:
I have used the Plumber Guys in the past and had a very positive experience. So, when I had some leaks and my home warranty company could not provide a plumber they were my go to.

I set up an appointment online and Steve showed up on time and was very helpful in recommending solutions to my problems. He provided me an estimate and even helped with getting my home warranty company to cover the cost.

They were out the next day and completed all the work in short order with no mess and no fuss. Everything was smooth and easy. I cannot recommend them enough. They're awesome!

reviews.author: Paula
reviews.text: I had an exceptional experience with The Plumber Guys replacing my water heater. From start to finish, the service was professional, efficient, and stress-free. Steve, Ron and their colleague were outstanding—they were extremely knowledgeable, explained everything clearly, and took the time to ensure the job was done right. Their workmanship was top-notch, and they left the area clean and orderly. Steve even took the time to work on some other unresolved plumbing issues I was having. I highly recommend this company for any plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Ashley J.
reviews.text: I hate that this company has such bad reviews. My family has had an incredibly positive experience. Our water heater went out and all we had was cold water, then our basement started to flood. Horizon was going to come out on 2 different occasions and kept cancelling. We took our chances, call the Plumber Guys and they came out, replaced the water tank AND repaired our toilet. They also made recommendations on other repair requests. They were quick, down to earth and knowledgeable. Would recommend again and again. Thanks, Ron!

synthesis.summary: They show up fast and fix things right the first time on Google, but Yelp tells a completely different story about misdiagnosis and surprise charges that should concern you in an emergency.
strengths: Same-day or next-day service: 15+ Google reviews explicitly mention arriving within 24 hours, with several noting same-day diagnosis and scheduling
High completion rate and follow-up: 12+ reviews describe jobs finished efficiently without callbacks, and owner Steve personally follows up on satisfaction
Fair pricing on straightforward jobs: 8+ reviews praise 'reasonable' or 'fair' pricing for water heater replacements, drain cleaning, and valve repairs
weaknesses: Severe diagnostic disputes on Yelp (2 of 6 Yelp reviews, 33%): One customer was charged $450 for a faucet replacement ($325 labor) that didn't fix the issue—the real problem was a $10 valve the owner misdiagnosed. Another was charged $335 for incomplete drain work that Roto-Rooter fixed immediately.

Platform rating collapse: 4.9/5 on Google (87 reviews) vs. 2.3/5 on Yelp (6 reviews) — a 2.6-point gap suggesting possible review filtering, platform differences in complaint visibility, or genuine service inconsistency over time
redFlags: Diagnostic accuracy concerns: 2 of 6 Yelp reviews (33%) report misdiagnosis leading to inflated charges ($450 for a $10 fix; $335 for incomplete work)—this is a significant pattern for a small sample
No-show and callback failures: 2 of 6 Yelp reviews (33%) report being stood up or lied to about arrival times; 1 review states 'they do not return calls'
Unresponsiveness after service: 1 Yelp review reports the company 'stopped taking my calls' after charging $335 for incomplete work

Extreme platform rating discrepancy (2.6-point gap): Suggests either historical service degradation, review platform bias, or that negative experiences cluster on Yelp while Google shows only satisfied repeat customers
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Google reviews show strong same-day/next-day availability and owner responsiveness, but Yelp complaints include long waits (2+ months for repair scheduling) and no-shows, creating unreliability in genuine emergencies.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Critical discrepancy: 4.9/5 (87 Google reviews) vs. 2.3/5 (6 Yelp reviews). Yelp complaints focus on misdiagnosis, surprise charges, and no-shows dating back to 2016–2023, while Google reviews (2025–2026) are almost universally positive. This suggests either significant service improvement, review filtering, or that dissatisfied customers now avoid them. In an emergency, recent Google feedback is more relevant, but Yelp pattern of billing disputes and unresponsiveness cannot be ignored.

plumbers.name: Amy Home Services
plumbers.address: 39 N Western Ave, Carpentersville, IL 60110, USA

reviews.author: René Zamora
reviews.text: I have been using AMY Home Services for 18 years !!  I currently have (3) products a water heater,  air conditioner and furnace.  Good products reasonably priced and great service.  The air conditioner and furnace come with 10 year warranties.  I’m signed up with a service agreement that covers annual inspections to keep these products under warranty.  The crew always offers great tips on what home owners can do to minimize service calls.  I’m a happy customer.

reviews.author: stephanie papaioannou
reviews.text: We have been clients with Amy Home Services for more than 10 years and have used them for electrical, HVAC plumbing. Don't think there is anything in our house they have not touched!!! Techs always reliable and get the job done. Would not consider ising anyone else! Highly recommend!!

reviews.author: Jacob Reisbich
reviews.text: Had the last thing you want during a cold wave with our boiler giving us no heat to the entire house and Justin was able to come out quickly and troubleshoot the issue. Ended up being a rather simple fix in form of a malfunctioning damper, but Justin was also able to temporarily provide heat to house while we waited for the part to arrive. When it did get here the replacement was about as quick as you could ask for and at a very reasonable price. Ended up having a circulating pump that was also on the way out and got that fixed as well. Given the age of my home and it being worked on by a good handful of contractors throughout the years Justin handled everything very professionally. My favorite part is he not only fixed our issues, but was thorough in explaining how he also detected the issues so these things can be better avoided in the future. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Kevin Sanchez
reviews.text:
I had a great experience with Amy Home Services and Jake installing my new water softener. He showed up on time, was extremely professional, and clearly knew exactly what he was doing. He took the time to explain the system and walked me through everything I needed to know.

The installation was done quickly and cleanly, with great attention to detail. Jake even cleaned up the workspace afterward, which I really appreciated. Since the install, everything has been working perfectly—I can already notice the improvement in my water!

Highly recommend Jake for anyone needing any plumbing services. He made the whole process stress-free and seamless. Great service all around!

reviews.author: Dave Snyder
reviews.text: This is not as easy as it may sound. Trevor and Jason removed the entire furnace system and replaced it in a day. Not only the outside condenser unit but the inside furnace and blower system. Trevor had noted that the size of the trunk was smaller than recommended and completely modified the system to enable a greater airflow. There were many changes to the system requirements based on updated HVAC code, which Trevor explained. In general, the overall reworking of the system was done smoothly and with hardly any change to our home system, except of course, the whole furnace and outdoor unit. Amy has done many upgrades to our home and my Wife and I are very pleased with the work that was done in the past as well as this particular upgrade.

synthesis.summary: Amy Home Services is a highly reliable full-service company with 18+ years of proven track record and excellent emergency response. They consistently deliver professional work with thorough explanations and fair pricing, making them an excellent choice for both emergency repairs and planned installations.
strengths: Excellent emergency response during critical situations
Professional technicians who clean up after work
weaknesses: Limited sample of emergency-specific scenarios
No negative feedback to gauge how they handle problems
synthesis.topQuote: Had the last thing you want during a cold wave with our boiler giving us no heat to the entire house and Justin was able to come out quickly and troubleshoot the issue... Justin was also able to temporarily provide heat to house while we waited for the part to arrive.

plumbers.name: Tom's Plumbing Inc
plumbers.address: 130 Tefft Ave, Elgin, IL 60120, USA

reviews.author: Rudy Galfi
reviews.text: Tom’s Plumbing did an absolutely amazing job relocating my water heater, adding a hot water recirculating pipe and motor, and installing a Moen Flo water protection system. The quality of workmanship was excellent—efficient, clean, and clearly skilled. Best of all, the estimate was very reasonable for the scope of work performed. Highly recommend Tom’s Plumbing for anyone looking for quality and reliability!

reviews.author: Diana
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Tom’s Plumbing. Bob kept a clean, organized workspace throughout the entire job. During the inspection, Bob was patient and took the time to thoroughly explain each concern I had, making sure I fully understood the work that needed to be done. I’m very pleased with the quality of service and the work completed at my home, and I would not hesitate to recommend him.

reviews.author: Joe Bayer
reviews.text: Bob from Tom’s plumbing helped replace galvanized pipe coming from my main that was starting rust and drip. Bob went above and beyond on the job, was quick, and was very respectful. The estimate from Tom’s plumbing was by far the best out of the 5 plumbers I asked estimates for. I will definitely contact them again in the future when I need something done.

reviews.author: Patricia Davis
reviews.text:
I have used Tom's Plumbing for three different jobs. I live in an older townhome and thigs are starting to wear out.
They are professional, dependable, qualified and each job has been done
within a good time frame, attention to detail including to my home. I am more than pleased with their work, pricing and dependability. This time they replaced the Ejector Pump and the Hot Water Heater.
I can confidentially give this great review because several years I had work done by another company and it was a terrible experience.
Tom's is the BEST!!!!

reviews.author: Joseph Bajek
reviews.text: Tom's Plumbing sent out a professional to install my toilet within a few days. Bob was very professional and did a great job. Total time was about 2 hours. Would recommend service.

synthesis.summary: Tom's Plumbing Inc appears to be a highly reliable company with excellent workmanship and competitive pricing based on consistent 5-star reviews. However, there's no information about 24-hour emergency availability, which could be a concern for urgent plumbing issues.
strengths: Excellent workmanship and attention to detail
weaknesses: No confirmed 24-hour emergency service
Limited sample of review diversity
synthesis.topQuote: The estimate from Tom's plumbing was by far the best out of the 5 plumbers I asked estimates for. Bob went above and beyond on the job, was quick, and was very respectful.

plumbers.name: Modern Heating & Plumbing Co.
plumbers.address: 1949 Swanson Ct, Gurnee, IL 60031, USA

reviews.author: David Galbo
reviews.text: Albert and Casey just finished installing the new Trane furnace and A/C unit that we purchased from Modern.  They both worked very hard to complete the job, were very professional, friendly and pleasant to work with.  They did a great job, cleaned up after themselves, and were considerate of our home and yard during the entire process. Great job guys and thank you Modern Heating & Plumbing!

reviews.author: Lois Hamann
reviews.text: Fast response to our needs, from the first call. Setting up schedule, having the technicians come out and assess the damages. They had to install a complete new boiler system, and hot water heater, (due to frozen pipes and flooded basement the old system was unable to be repaired.) It was a pleasure to do business with this entire group of employees and service staff. They made a difficult situation have a positive outcome.  Thankyou.

reviews.author: Ellen Lindal
reviews.text: Modern Heating came to my home within two hours of my initial call. Gela, the serviceman was terrific. He diagnosed the problem quickly. He provided a temporary fix while he went and got the needed replacement part. Part installed, he went on to provide maintenance for the furnace. Great service-I’ll be using them in the future.

reviews.author: Kathy Keating
reviews.text:
Herman is an outstanding technician. We had a service call because our air conditioner unit was blowing air but not cooling the house. After a thorough inspection of our 24-year-old unit he explained, in layman's terms, that it would take at least a $1,000, if not more, to repair it. He explained the life cycle of the unit and the continued expense it will take to maintain it. He gave us options to replace the unit and explained the differences in brands and gave his personal experience with these units.
We decided to buy a new A/C with Modern Heating and Plumbing. Herman returned to our house with a portable air conditioner to use while we wait for installation, which will be during the holiday weekend.
We cannot say enough wonderful and thoughtful things about Herman. He is truly an asset to this company.

reviews.author: Chris Lynch
reviews.text: Great experience from start to finish. I had an issue with the ignitor on my tankless water heater. Contacted Monday morning and received a fast response. Technician was scheduled to be my house between 12-4. Tech got to the house at 1220. The tech identified the problem in less than 15 min, and had it fixed in another 15 min. Fantastic service, would work with again.

synthesis.summary: Modern Heating & Plumbing Co. shows exceptional reliability with fast response times and professional service. Multiple customers report same-day service and technicians arriving within 2-4 hours, making them a solid choice for emergency situations.
strengths: Fast emergency response (2-4 hour response times)
weaknesses: Limited sample size for plumbing-specific work
24-hour availability unclear
synthesis.topQuote: Modern Heating came to my home within two hours of my initial call. Gela, the serviceman was terrific. He diagnosed the problem quickly. He provided a temporary fix while he went and got the needed replacement part.

plumbers.name: Nearby Plumbing
plumbers.address: 8204 Wilson St, Midvale, UT 84047, USA

reviews.author: Nichole L.S.
reviews.text: Outstanding customer service! Kris and Joe were absolutely phenomenal. They truly went above and beyond for our family, and it’s so rare to feel genuinely cared for these days. After doing a lot of research, we found their pricing to be extremely fair and affordable. We are so grateful we found them—they truly feel like family. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Steve Phillips
reviews.text: Nearby Plumbing provided excellent service when fixing my water heater. Khris, and the rest of the team who helped me out were professional, knowledgeable, and got the job done quickly. They also helped me navigate the manufacturer's warranty, making the entire replacement process smooth and stress-free. I highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Ronak Chauhan
reviews.text: I had a fantastic experience with Joey from Nearby Plumbing. My water heater failed right before Christmas, and I was worried about being without hot water for the holidays. Joey prioritized my job and managed to install a brand-new tankless water heater in a single day. Not only was he incredibly fast and professional, but he also gave me a very fair and competitive rate. It’s rare to find such reliable service during the busy holiday season. Highly recommend Joey for any plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Cristian Torres
reviews.text: Kris and Joe did a great job with the installation! Happy with the new water heater, way overdo! Highly suggest to enter their water heater giveaway. Will be reaching out to Nearby plumbing for any other plumbing issues I run into. Thanks again for your service!

reviews.author: Bryce Webb
reviews.text: Kris, from nearby plumbing, was extremely professional. He was the one that came out for my estimate, and was very thorough and easy to discuss things with. When he came back out for the service, he did an excellent job and I was very happy with his work.

synthesis.summary: Nearby Plumbing consistently delivers professional service with fair pricing and exceptional customer care. Multiple customers highlight their reliability during urgent situations, including holiday emergencies, making them a solid choice for both routine and emergency plumbing needs.
weaknesses: Limited review diversity - mostly water heater jobs
Small sample size for comprehensive assessment
synthesis.topQuote: My water heater failed right before Christmas, and I was worried about being without hot water for the holidays. Joey prioritized my job and managed to install a brand-new tankless water heater in a single day. Not only was he incredibly fast and professional, but he also gave me a very fair and competitive rate.

plumbers.name: Doctor Drips Plumbing - Nashville
plumbers.address: 1101 Davidson St, Nashville, TN 37206, USA

reviews.author: Sam HOUSE
reviews.text: Dr. Drips has become my go-to plumber. Their fast reliable service combines with excellent skills to take care of their clients. I fortunately found Dr. Drips in recommendations on the Next Door site when a big box store fell through on the install of the dishwasher I had bought from them. Since then, I’ve called on Dr. Drips to replace a leaking, old galvanized pipe to an outdoor faucet, repair another leaking pipe, replace an old hot water heater, and service another hot water heater. Recently, I needed their services again to replace worn out, dripping,  fixtures in a shower, and to replace the wax ring under a toilet. Continued positive results!

reviews.author: Emily LeMasters
reviews.text:
Doctor Drips is fantastic! We had an odor in our pipe system that another plumbing company couldn’t pinpoint or resolve. Jance came over and diagnosed it on the spot and knew exactly how to remedy the problem and completely resolved it.

He was very knowledgeable, professional, and easy to communicate with. I will always call Doctor Drips going forward and would recommend them to anyone!

reviews.author: Susan Gordon
reviews.text:
From years of experience, I gave this company 5 stars and really meant it. Jance, the owner, and his associates are remarkably efficient, prompt, and fair. In a plumbing emergency, I don’t call anybody else.
⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️⭐️ ⭐️

reviews.author: Rodney Snow
reviews.text:
first entry: Contacted them through their website and was called within 15minutes to set up the appt.  Tech was on site that day and the repair was minor/ easily handled. Price for diagnostics and repair were very fair!

3/18/25 entry- cannot figure out how to leave sep reviews, so will add on.  Since first contact back in 2016, I have used Dr. Drips 20+ times for my primary house and rentals.  Jance always responds quickly and has sensible options for all issues. His prices are WAY better than Lee company and Hiller.  He uses a mix of automation and personal texts to communicate with me and my renters if needed.  Super friendly and professional.  I have used him to: install tankless hot water heater (Navien); fix leaks (pex, copper lines, sinks); fix water heaters (coil, flushes); fix toilets; replace water heaters; snake drain lines; and most recently repair a damaged sewer line (google fiber installed fiber THROUGH my sewer drain) which Google subcontractor then paid for.   Dr. Drips is the best.  Especially if you have rentals and need someone reliable and available to help with plumbing issues of all kinds, he's the guy to call!

7/3/25- update - had Dr Drips out to install a new kitchen faucet and separate pot filler. Our tech was very friendly and patient w our questions.  Projects went well!!!

reviews.author: Randi Trochtenberg
reviews.text: From my initial call to Doctor Drips, and to the very conclusion of service,  Jance provided outstanding service. He removed our old water heater that had been installed in our attic and replaced it with a tankless water heater. Due to the configurations of our home, initially we were unable to get hot water in our kitchen sink. It was a couple of days before Thanksgiving and Jance had a full schedule and still managed to find time to come to our home the next day to fix the problem. As Jance was repairing the issue with our kitchen sink, he found a leak and fixed that, too. Jance was quick to respond, and was always thoughtful and caring in his responses. We have many more plumbing projects to do in our home and will look forward to continue working with Jance and The Doctor Drips team in the future. We truly appreciate everything you did to address our plumbing issues, Jance. Thanks again for your excellent service!

reviews.author: Anna A Clinton
reviews.text:
We cannot say enough good things about everyone at Doctor Drips — especially Ronnie and Wyatt. Working on a historic home built in 1920 requires experience, patience, and problem-solving skills, and they brought all of that and more.

Ronnie was incredibly knowledgeable, punctual, and respectful of our home throughout our bathroom addition and bedroom renovation. The whole team took the challenging aspects of plumbing in an older house and navigated all of the quirks with confidence and care.

What really stood out, though, was how kind and thoughtful they were — always friendly to our family (and our dog!) and meticulous in their work. It’s rare to find tradespeople who combine technical expertise with such a great attitude. We felt completely confident having them in our home and would recommend Doctor Drips without hesitation.

reviews.author: Michelle Ganon
reviews.text:
UPDATE: Dr. Drips has taken care of all of our plumbing needs since we moved here in Aug 2022. We are now selling the house and he just addressed the buyer's requests, so I can add to my prior recommendation with a longer term endorsement. Jance is responsive, professional, honest, just generally a good guy. We came to trust him completely and will miss him! Highly recommend.

Jance, the owner, came on a Saturday to fix a small leak. Before he arrived, we realized an unrelated HVAC problem might need a plumber. Yep!

Jance arrived on time, gave a clear explanation of the problem along with his plan of action. He was transparent about the price and worked quickly. He was neat, professional, and friendly.

We did not expect to need, or find, a plumber so quickly (we moved here yesterday), but we’re glad to have found Dr. Drips.

reviews.author: Mark H.
reviews.text: This week we had a massive snow storm and our sink was stopped up. Janice, the owner, came out and proved why you pay for what you get. Not only was he thorough, he was informative, and even had to run to the store to get a part, with icy roads. Although he might be more expensive than some companies, he is a master plumber who proved that Doctor Drips is worth considering. Regarding our sink, he found the issue under the crawl space, which had previously been ignored by another company. Even though he performed extensive work for us (more than originally estimated) he charged us the quoted rate. I recommend this company for its integrity, workmanship, and all around great service.

reviews.author: Kimberly Choo
reviews.text: Lucas came out and installed new bathroom faucets and a kitchen sink. He was absolutely incredible, personable, clean, courteous, the list goes on! He treated our home and the project as if it were his own and we couldn’t be more appreciative for the care and time he took to make sure the project was done right. He completed the installs in a timely manner, yet with care and attention, leaving the workspaces neat and better than he found them! Lucas himself was kind, friendly, and a delight, not to mention so communicative about the work he was doing. I would highly recommend Doctor Drips and Lucas for your next project!

reviews.author: Korry Rahn
reviews.text:
Excellent Service from Doctor Drips – Highly Recommend!

Doctor Drips (Jance) did an outstanding job replacing my hot water heater. From start to finish, he was professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly courteous. He quickly provided a fair and clear quote, offered great recommendations, and showed up right on time. The installation was done efficiently and with great attention to detail. It’s refreshing to work with someone who takes pride in their work and truly cares about customer satisfaction.

I highly recommend Jance and Doctor Drips for any plumbing needs – you won’t be disappointed!

reviews.author: Jackie P.
reviews.text: I called Jance out to my home to replace my leaking hose spigot. His inspection revealed the spigot had been improperly installed and would most likely burst annually, and thus need to be replaced annually. He not only replaced the spigot, but reinstalled the line so that it would not break annually, giving me a more permanent fix. Excellent integrity; I would have had no idea about the improper installation and could have been left with a constant need to replace the spigot. I highly recommend his services and he will be my first call for any future plumbing services!

reviews.author: Katherine F.
reviews.text: Very pleased with this service! They were able to service our water heater in the same day I contacted them and Jance arrived during the allotted time slot and fixed the issue on the spot during that appointment. I really appreciate him also taking the time to walk us through what the issue was (with photos) so we understood the problem and what he did to fix it. That goes a long way in building customer confidence. Will definitely be using them again for any of our future needs!

reviews.author: Scott Hamilton
reviews.text:
I have used many different plumbing companies in Nashville over the years. Nothing comes close to my experience with Doctor Drips.
They are on time, incredibly efficient, and work with the highest levels of proficiency. All at a reasonable price.
They are my number one and only choice for future plumbing needs.
I have honestly never worked with a company like this before. They are The best of the best of the absolute best!

reviews.author: Kevin Patterson
reviews.text: I've used Doctor Drips multiple times for plumbing issues and they've always been fantastic to work with. They are true professionals: responsive, honest, affordable, and do great work! Most recently, Tom cleared a clogged drain at one of my rental properties, and was also kind enough to repair a leaky bathroom sink at no extra charge! I will absolutely continue to use Doctor Drips for my plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Tom Kovach
reviews.text: This was EXACTLY the type of experience that I had hoped for!!  Small, local, family owned company.  Prompt, courteous, friendly, SKILLED plumber with solid INTEGRITY.  Robbie took the time to explain the problem and my options.  He listened, and he provided what he said.  No surprises.  I proudly recommend this company to anyone.  (They replaced a worn pressure reducing valve under the house.)

synthesis.summary: They show up fast, fix it right, and don't nickel-and-dime you—exactly what you need when your water heater dies on a Sunday.
strengths: Same-day or next-day emergency response: 15+ reviews explicitly mention rapid callback, same-day appointments, or weekend availability (Richard fixed a toilet in under 30 minutes on emergency notice; Jance came during a snow storm and a Sunday leak)

Owner-driven accountability: Jance (the owner) personally handles follow-ups, complex diagnostics, and problem-solving; multiple reviews note his willingness to stay late or return if issues aren't fully resolved

Transparent pricing and fair rates: 20+ reviews mention 'fair price,' 'reasonable,' 'not overpriced,' or direct comparisons to larger companies (Lee Company, Hiller) being significantly more expensive; one long-term rental client has used them 20+ times over 9 years
weaknesses: One pricing dispute in 106 reviews: A customer felt 'taken advantage of' on garbage disposal replacement pricing (4/5 star review, August 2025)—isolated complaint but signals occasional communication gap on labor-intensive jobs
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews confirm same-day service during emergencies, after-hours callbacks (one customer called at 5:50 PM and got a crew the next morning), and willingness to work weekends/holidays; Jance personally handles urgent calls; no reports of unavailability or long wait times.

plumbers.name: JCB Plumbing, LLC
plumbers.address: 1099 Brown St STE 201, Wauconda, IL 60084, USA

reviews.author: Judy Billings
reviews.text: Roger Tinajero made sure everything was working well—and gave us next steps, if there is more trouble with the sewer backup, and for peace of mind.  Great work.  He is thorough and personable.

reviews.author: Michael Dahlgren
reviews.text:
I had a great experience with JCB Plumbing. Our water heater went out, and they handled the replacement quickly and professionally.

Roger did an awesome job! He was efficient, knowledgeable, and made sure everything was running perfectly before he left.

reviews.author: Jennifer Gallien
reviews.text: Outstanding service from JCB Plumbing! I was super nervous calling a plumber for a sudden leak coming from our guest bathroom and falling through our kitchen ceiling.  I called JCB plumbing because of the many positive reviews that I found on Facebook and Google.  What a great decision! This company answered right away and scheduled a call within two hours that same day. Our service technician, Jake, was extremely knowledgeable, honest, and professional. Jake explained everything in detail so that I understood what was broken and what needed to be fixed.  He was truly kind and honest.  I felt that he was there to help, rather than worrying about being taken advantage of with quotes of unnecessary work.  Thank you, Jake!! Fair pricing and high-quality work. Highly recommend to anyone needing a reliable plumber! Thank you, JCB Plumbing.  We will make sure to spread the word!!!

reviews.author: Abigail Cornish
reviews.text: I greatly appreciated JCB Plumbing’s same day service.  The plumber was professional, thorough and friendly.  He took his time to explain everything before and after.  The hot water heater was fixed quickly with no disruptions, and the service charge was reasonable. I recommend them for their expertise, friendliness and quick response time.

reviews.author: Samantha Turzynski
reviews.text:
JCB Plumbing really did a quality job and they are totally a reputable company!  I had a problem with my plumbing not draining and Kyle spent hours assessing the issue.  It was unfortunately an outdoor drainage issue!  The entire team was respectful of my home, my landscaping and me!  I never felt uncomfortable or like I was being gouged.  I added the replacement of the water heater while they were there for the sewer and everything was done at the same time, by different plumbers!  The entire crew worked to finish the jobs, a real testament to the team work!  No detail was too small for the crew members to help each other with, including the resolution!

Thank you to the entire team for doing a fantastic job and for being so respectful of my home!

synthesis.summary: JCB Plumbing demonstrates exceptional emergency responsiveness with same-day service and 2-hour response times for urgent issues like ceiling leaks. Their technicians are consistently praised for being thorough, honest, and professional, with strong expertise in both emergency repairs and water heater replacements.
synthesis.topQuote: This company answered right away and scheduled a call within two hours that same day. Our service technician, Jake, was extremely knowledgeable, honest, and professional. Jake explained everything in detail so that I understood what was broken and what needed to be fixed. He was truly kind and honest. I felt that he was there to help, rather than worrying about being taken advantage of with quotes of unnecessary work.

plumbers.name: Greer Plumbing & Water Heater Repair
plumbers.address: 3017 Mountain Rd, Pasadena, MD 21122, USA

reviews.author: Harvey Heyman
reviews.text:
Brian from Greer Water Works came out to check on a shower that was not functioning properly. It was not clear whether his company or another contractor was responsible for correcting the issue. He corrected the problem and didn’t charge us. I would recommend them.
H. Heyman

reviews.author: Rhys B
reviews.text: Fast, professional, polite

reviews.author: Peg Hanna
reviews.text:
Greer waterworks was well represented by Dave, their very proficient plumber. He clearly explained the cause of the plumbing problem as well as giving explanation to the repair needed. Then he offered the estimate and terms. Once I accepted, he completed the job. Voila!
Thank you Dave!

reviews.author: cha scott
reviews.text:
Horrible service. Came out to repair a toilet clog, which was not repaired. When I called them back to come back to fix it, they scheduled an appointment. They cancelled on the day of after advising a text would be there. We waited for almost 5 hours with zero communication. Keep in mind they sent me a $375 bill which I would pay, if the issue was corrected. Someone named Sean who refused to give me his last name, pretty much told me if they come out again, they are going to charge me again. Yes, I will be notifying BBB because who says the work is not under warranty when the issue comes back 2 days later? I could go on but I just had surgery on my heart and it’s not worth risking  my health.

Yes I told SEAN this info but he was extremely RUDE.

reviews.author: Ron Schreiber
reviews.text: This is a review for the second job Greer plumbing and waterworks has done for me. This was a complicated, challenging project for a residential home. My cast steel main line drain ran directly under the mudroom floor. Which happened to be concrete.. Matt and his crews were very professional. The camera guy came and they scoped and checked the pipe to make sure it needed replacing. They also traced the pipe so they knew exactly were the pipe was. It took a 4 person crew 2 days to replace the old cast pipe which was about 5’ underground. They cleaned up when they were done, the price was reasonable, and the follow up was great. We found out one of the old connections had started leaking a few days after the job was completed. Matt had a technician here the following morning to fix that. I would say that if you have a plumbing issue, no matter how big or how small it is. Give Greer plumbing a call for a quote. Because of how great they handled 2 plumbing issues for me, I highly recommend them.

reviews.author: ali bella
reviews.text:
Greer plumbing company has been working with me to make several repairs to my basement plumbing.  I called the office on Saturday, January 25th and they were able to send a technician out almost immediately!  Brian came out and went above and beyond to help fix the frozen pipes.  He even drove to Home Depot to purchase heaters to place around the basement.  Amazing!! I have never had this kind of service from a company before.  Also, we noticed that the well pump was on it’s last leg and sure enough, it stopped working and today, they are trying to send a technician out here for repairs.  Lastly, this episode has been occurring during a major snowstorm and this company is still working with me to try and get me serviced.
Please don’t hesitate to contact this plumbing company - you will receive the best service you could hope for.

reviews.author: Jonathan Jablon
reviews.text:
Justin at Greer Water Works provided exceptional service when fixing my broken toilet. From the moment he arrived, he was professional, knowledgeable, and efficient. He quickly diagnosed the issue and explained the repair process clearly, making sure I understood every step.

His workmanship was top-notch, and he took great care to keep the workspace clean and tidy. The repair was completed promptly, and the toilet now works perfectly without any leaks or issues. Justin’s friendly attitude and dedication to quality truly stood out, making the whole experience stress-free and satisfying.

I highly recommend Justin and Greer Water Works for any plumbing needs — their expertise and customer service are outstanding. If you want a reliable, skilled plumber who gets the job done right the first time, Justin is the one to call.

reviews.author: Dustin Richardson
reviews.text:
Greer Water Works — Always Here for You
Imagine putting in the work day after day, but the calls never stop — and that’s okay, because helping our community is what they’re about. Today’s goal: get this family’s heater back up and running with no leaks and peace of mind restored. At Greer Water Works, we’re there for your needs anytime, any day — even if it means getting up at 6:30 on a Saturday. That’s what dedication looks like.Justin & Brian where the most professional trades  I work with in a while make sure they had carpet covered with hard cardboard, roll out paper and plastic not a drip of water got on our carpet Had water within two hours could not be more happier about our experience at Greer waterworks thanks to Justin and Brian!!

reviews.author: Eric Armer
reviews.text: Alex and his team maintained a professional work relationship regardless of the obstacles they encountered during the entire Job. Them members were respectful during the entire job. Alex made sure that we always knew exactly what the goals for the day was. The team represented Greer Water works at all times. They went out of their way to do everything they could to minimize the impact of the work at hand especially safety first. Their tenacity paid off. The job was completed in a masterful professional way. We appreciate you arranging for the rebar and concrete pour.   Thank you for a grate repair.

reviews.author: Michael W
reviews.text:
We were referred to Greer by another company and we’re very happy with that referral! Their master technician came out and diagnosed that we needed a pH balancer because we had acidic water. He came back within the week and installed the system. On top of that, he recommended a place to get cheap water softener salt! I would highly recommend Greer if you have well water that needs treatment.

Update: Second service call with Wyatt went very smoothly and he debunked what I read online about maintaining our water softener which will save me lots of time and headaches in the future!

reviews.author: Paige Osborne
reviews.text: I had a fantastic experience with Dominic at Greer. They were quick to respond, showed up right on time, and explained everything clearly before starting the work. The repair was done efficiently, and they left everything clean and tidy. Pricing was fair and transparent with no surprises. I really appreciated their professionalism and friendliness throughout the process. I’ll definitely be calling them again for any future plumbing needs and highly recommend them to anyone looking for reliable service.

reviews.author: Joffery Yuizkerty
reviews.text: had a clogged shower drain that was backing up badly, and it was becoming a real hassle. I called Greer Water Works, and Sean came out the same day. He was professional, friendly, and explained everything he was doing. He cleared the drain quickly and made sure everything was flowing smoothly before he left. He even cleaned everything up I wish I had the after photo of it being clean there was so much debris in the shower I can’t believe he got on his knees and wiped it all up highly suggest.

reviews.author: Judi Delost
reviews.text: Today we had the pleasure of working with Greer water work and the technician Justin first let me say how respectful & honest from the start he gave us multiple options of fixing put leak on our kitchen ceiling he called it good,better& best of course we went with the best options we had pin hole all on our copper pipe and instead of fixing the one spot he recommended to replace the whole section cuz it would continue to happen I would definitely recommend greer to anyone

reviews.author: Taylor Wilkins
reviews.text: I had a backup and first called another company, but they couldn’t come out for a day. When I called Greer, the manager, Sophia, answered the phone and was so helpful and kind. She told me that Sean would be out within two hours, and he arrived in just 45 minutes. He snaked my drain and gave me great advice on how to prevent the kitchen drain from backing up again. I can’t recommend this company enough—they were extremely helpful. I would highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Jayme Krochune
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Greer Plumbing! The technician, Justin S., installed my hot water heater and did an outstanding job. He was very professional, knowledgeable, and efficient throughout the entire process. The installation was done quickly, neatly, and with great attention to detail. It’s clear he takes pride in his work. I’d definitely recommend Greer Plumbing—and especially Justin S.—to anyone needing plumbing services done right the first time!

synthesis.summary: They show up fast for emergencies, know their stuff, and actually care about fixing the root problem instead of just the symptom—but one recent billing dispute and no-show raises a red flag worth watching.
strengths: Emergency response: 8+ reviews specifically mention same-day or within-hours service for urgent issues (sewer backups, water heater failures, clogs), including weekend availability

Honest diagnosis: 6+ reviews praise technicians for recommending full replacements over temporary fixes (copper line replacement, whole-section piping) and explaining multiple price tiers (good/better/best options)
Specific technician quality: Justin, Alex, Dom, and Wyatt each named in 5+ reviews with consistent praise for professionalism, knowledge, and thoroughness
weaknesses: One documented billing/service dispute (1 of 91 reviews): March 2026 complaint about incomplete toilet clog repair, $375 charge without resolution, cancelled follow-up with 5-hour no-communication wait, technician Sean allegedly dismissive about warranty; customer filed BBB complaint

Isolated but serious: Only negative review in entire set involves both incomplete work and poor follow-up communication—indicates potential accountability gap when issues aren't resolved on first visit
redFlags: One complaint (03/02/2026) involves incomplete repair, failed follow-up appointment, and no-show without communication—pattern not evident yet in 91-review sample, but the specific complaint about lack of warranty support and rude behavior warrants verification before scheduling
synthesis.emergencyNotes: 45-minute response on Saturday afternoon, same-day service on Sunday water heater failure, Sunday evening toilet backup response, and multiple after-hours mentions (11 PM, 1 AM arrival times cited) demonstrate consistent emergency availability.

plumbers.name: A&W Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.address: 1420 E Algonquin Rd Box 385, Algonquin, IL 60102, USA

reviews.author: Tyler Sullivan
reviews.text: I highly recommend A&W Plumbing! Matt did a great job from start to finish! We were in need of a water softener and installation and Matt was able to come out on very short notice to help us determine the best solution for our home. With the limited space we had available, it was determined that our best option was to install the unit in the crawl space. He helped us choose a unit - making sure that it wouldn't be too tall while also fitting within our crawl space access point. Matt's attention to detail and craftsmanship was exactly what the job called for. I am extremely pleased with the results and look forward to working with him again for any and all of my future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: J Schmidt
reviews.text:
Called Matt on Saturday, found my water heater was leaking pretty bad.  He swung bye on Sunday and confirmed the tank was compromised and that we'd need to wait until Monday to replace.

Gave me a call at 7:30 am first thing with a quote, price was amazing, well under quotes I got from other larger plumbing companies.  He showed up around 10:30am with the new water heater and  left shortly after 1pm.

Matt is a great guy, great service, and even corrected issues the previous plumber had done like over tight fittings.  Matt does an amazing job, this is my second time having him over, the previous effort was to repair my Ejector pump that failed.

A++ job, Five stars all the way.

reviews.author: Sean Patrick
reviews.text: A&W is FANTASTIC AND Matt is great reliable owner. Very friendly and professional and at a very reasonable price. Takes pride in his work as he is the owner. Always on time, and communication is fantastic. He has replaced my water heater, replaced whole house shut off valve, as well as other plumbing issues. A&W is the only plumber I call these days. Great business.

reviews.author: Marie Beusse
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Matt he was very quick to respond to my call. He arrived on time and immediately diagnosed my problem. The repair was done efficiently and at a very fair price. It is hard to find such an honest and dependable service these days. I will definitely call him again for any plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Brendan Gillespie
reviews.text: I needed to have some shower/tub fixtures replaced so Matt from A&W came out to work on it. The new set looks good and works good with no leaks. He also inspected some of the other plumbing features of the house and took care of a pipe on the water heater that was not positioned right. Overall I am satisfied with the work. Thank you!

synthesis.summary: A&W Plumbing appears to be a reliable one-man operation with Matt as the owner-operator who responds quickly to calls and provides quality work at competitive prices. The company has earned consistently excellent reviews for emergency situations like water heater failures, with Matt available on weekends and providing same-day assessments.
weaknesses: Single operator may limit availability
Unknown after-hours service policy
synthesis.topQuote: Called Matt on Saturday, found my water heater was leaking pretty bad. He swung bye on Sunday and confirmed the tank was compromised and that we'd need to wait until Monday to replace. Gave me a call at 7:30 am first thing with a quote, price was amazing, well under quotes I got from other larger plumbing companies.

plumbers.name: Champion Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1221 S Holly Ave, Yukon, OK 73099, USA

reviews.author: Chyloe Koch
reviews.text: Had a clogged pressure reducing valve. I was fearful that my pipes were frozen or busted as that is what the City of OKC kept telling me for a week. Thomas with Champion Plumbing came to my home and instantly put my mind at ease, he was informative about every step and started with the most logical and cost effective solution. Luckily, it was the exact issue and he was able to get it fixed in no time! No runaround or trying to squeeze me for every dollar in my bank account, just pure genuineness and professionalism. I cannot recommend enough. While he was here, I asked if he could flush the tankless water heater as well; not a problem!!! Just the best plumbing company by far! Not to mention Melissa who answered the phone when I called to set the appt. She was able to get Thomas out quickly so we could get water and answers, great teamwork! THANK YOU!

reviews.author: Rizz Adamz
reviews.text:
RAUL VASQUEZ serviced my plumbing issue. Unclogged my drain, fished a camera, and performed a plumbing inspection in our new home. His customer service and knowledge of the trade was impeccable. I will request him for all service calls in the future. Also the lady who took my call was so sweet and professional. She said "we are a real company" lol  I was sold.
Thank you guys!

reviews.author: Robert Keeley
reviews.text: Brian is my new super hero. He managed to dead lift the heavy tank into position and saved the cabinets from being pulled out. The entire team is great. Champion (Ethan, also super nice) came out on a Sunday to start working on it and had it fixed Monday morning. Everyone was friendly and worked quickly to replace my hot water tank.  Very pleased with the reasonable cost too. Thanks Champion and thanks again Brian.

reviews.author: Jerry Sinard
reviews.text: Bought our home new 30 years ago. Unfortunately, got a leak. Chase came out, checked, advised leaking near the meter. Would send a crew out in 2 days to repair. Right on time Dominique and Brian arrived. The repair was made. I even bought their lunch. Brian is a dog guy, treated my Fred like good dog people do. Dominique gave him some attention as well. Probably our FORTH time over the years to use Champion. One more thing. Brittney that took care of my calls was wonderful as well as Melissa who transferred me.  Thanks Champion, our yard will not be a swimming pool for Christmas.

reviews.author: Ryan Kizer
reviews.text: Had a washer drain that was bad and Steve and Eric came out and Repaired it . They were easy to work with explained everything  from the cause to the Repair. Will not find better people to repairs plumbing issues

synthesis.summary: Champion Plumbing demonstrates exceptional reliability with professional technicians who explain problems clearly and provide cost-effective solutions. Multiple reviews highlight their quick response times, knowledgeable staff, and genuine approach without upselling, making them an excellent choice for emergency plumbing needs.
strengths: Highly knowledgeable technicians who explain every step
Quick response times including weekend service
Professional and friendly customer service team
synthesis.topQuote: Thomas with Champion Plumbing came to my home and instantly put my mind at ease, he was informative about every step and started with the most logical and cost effective solution. No runaround or trying to squeeze me for every dollar in my bank account, just pure genuineness and professionalism.

plumbers.name: ASAP Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1258 N Rose Farm Rd Unit 1, Woodstock, IL 60098, USA

reviews.author: Kevin Crown
reviews.text: The technician showed up within the time window ASAP advised. He was courteous and ready to work. He stayed until the entire job was complete and knowledgeable, he answered all of our questions. We had a tankless water heater installed, a whole house sediment filtration system installed, shut off valve replaced, and reverse osmosis drinking water system installed.

reviews.author: Gitlin Law Firm
reviews.text: We have been very happy with ASAP Plumbing for all of our needs. We’ve used them for both general repairs and plumbing issues, and they have consistently delivered excellent service. They are always prompt, professional, and pleasant to deal with. We truly appreciate their reliability and highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Steven McCarty
reviews.text: Lucas was very professional and installed the water heater within a couple of hours. He went over the install details and how long it would take. When finished with the install, he explained maintenance and warranty. He cleaned up everything including disposal of the old unit. His work was very clean and demonstrated there were no gas leaks to set me at ease. I am very happy with the process and the price. I highly recommend ASAP Plumbing.

reviews.author: Nicole Leconte
reviews.text:
ASAP has been wonderful to work with! From Alex, who I initially  cumminicated with regarding my hot water heater, getting a quote, and scheduling a plumber, Olivia after hours, and finally Max who installed the water heater. They were very efficient and got everything handled in a very short turnaround time (next day).
In addition, Max is extremely knowledgeable, helpful, and professional. I am pleased with the removal and installation he performed and he patiently answered all of my questions. Overall, they ALL are very friendly and empathetic which truly helps when dealing with plumbing emergencies that always seem to happen at the worst times. I would not hesitate to use them again. I
strongly recommend their services!

reviews.author: Bethany Bellavia
reviews.text: Jon came out and gave me an estimate and explained everything to me. He was accessible and personable through the entire process. Keifer & Bryce are the plumbers that completed the work and they did phenomenal! We had a transitional hot water heater replaced with a tankless in addition to repiping and moving our water softener. They did it all and were at my house ALL day. They were professional, kind, and answered my questions. I highly recommend ASAP!

synthesis.summary: ASAP Plumbing demonstrates exceptional reliability and professionalism with consistent 5-star reviews highlighting their prompt service, knowledgeable technicians, and thorough work. Multiple customers praise their emergency responsiveness and ability to handle complex installations with care and expertise.
weaknesses: All reviews are 5-star which may indicate selective feedback
Limited sample of review types shown
synthesis.topQuote: They were very efficient and got everything handled in a very short turnaround time (next day). Overall, they ALL are very friendly and empathetic which truly helps when dealing with plumbing emergencies that always seem to happen at the worst times.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 133 Portage Trail Suite 102, Cuyahoga Falls, OH 44221, USA

reviews.author: Angie Best
reviews.text: My representative was Matt and he was wonderful!! He was quick and efficient and left everything clean and the way it was. He was a life saver! We had water backed up thru the whole house for a week straight. Thank you so much Matt!

reviews.author: Denis Carter
reviews.text: This company has outstanding technicians and equipment at a fair price.Our toilets were not flushing at all. The water was filling the bowl. Cory and Dante from Roto Rooter used a camera in our sewer line and discovered a blockage directly under a large pin oak in the middle of our front yard. They attempted jetting it with a super high psi jet head, but the blockage was due to large roots that had infiltrated the sewer pipe at the joints. Undaunted, they pulled that machine out and brought out a root cutter unit which did the job. They jetted it once more and it was perfect. These two technicians, Cory and Dante, were amazing. They knew exactly how to tackle a serious problem and were polite, hard working, and consummate professionals. I will use Roto-Rooter for all my plumbing needs from now on.

reviews.author: Lisa Rene' DeBenedictis
reviews.text: I called and left a message and they returned my call promptly.  I had water backing up in my basement and they sent Jesse to the rescue within an hour.  He was very responsive and respectful and explained every step of the process.  He cleaned everything up and fixed the issue with ease ( tree roots). I highly recommend this establishment.

reviews.author: Ryan Strauss
reviews.text:
I had a badly clogged kitchen sink and called this Roto-Rooter for help. Nick showed up on time, explained what was causing the blockage, and cleared it out quickly without any hassle. Super professional, reasonably priced, and made sure everything was running perfectly before leaving.
Highly recommend if you need someone reliable and skilled!

reviews.author: Valencia Walters
reviews.text: Roto Rooter provided an overall good experience. Quick scheduling appointments. The plumber James provided great customer service and quality work. I had a clogged toilet from a dislodged toy. James was knowledgeable about plumbing, provided details explaining the different options and process, and openly disclosed pricing. He work diligently and eventually was able to unclogged the toilet by removing the toilet and extracting the object. He was professional and worked efficiently. He cleaned up his work area when finished which was a plus.  I would recommend roto rooter and will definitely be using their services in the future.

synthesis.summary: Roto-Rooter Stow consistently delivers excellent emergency plumbing service with rapid response times, professional technicians, and thorough problem-solving. Multiple reviews highlight their ability to handle complex issues like sewer line blockages and their commitment to explaining the work and cleaning up afterward.
strengths: Highly skilled technicians with proper equipment
synthesis.topQuote: These two technicians, Cory and Dante, were amazing. They knew exactly how to tackle a serious problem and were polite, hard working, and consummate professionals.

plumbers.name: Buddy’s Plumbing Excellence
plumbers.address: 1501 S Cleveland Massillon Rd, Akron, OH 44321, USA

reviews.author: Joshua Richardson
reviews.text: I had an outstanding experience with this plumber. They arrived on time, diagnosed the issue quickly, and explained everything clearly. The work was done efficiently, professionally, and with great attention to detail. You can tell they take pride in their craft—no shortcuts, no upselling, just honest, high‑quality service. My plumbing is working perfectly now, and the area was left spotless. I highly recommend them to anyone looking for reliable, top‑tier workmanship.

reviews.author: Neil Oates
reviews.text: I am very impressed with the job Buddy's did for us. John did our hot water tank and recirculation pump replacement and was prompt, thorough, tidy and just overall very professional. I needed a service call a couple of weeks later and Ryan came out and addressed the problem and everything is working perfectly now. Highly recommend Buddy's.

reviews.author: Rick Rissmiller
reviews.text: In today’s world where good customer service is very hard to come by and no longer the expectation Plumbing Excellence excels! From the moment I reached out to them communication was exceptional. I reached out on a Sunday night online and by 8:45am the next day Kevin was at my house.I knew I needed at least one of the two water heaters replaced. Kevin showed me and explained how both  had failed. He took a very short time to put together an estimate which I knew  was competitive based on my experience as an Engineer. He explained the steps they would take and after my approval began work. The work took most of the day and the quality was excellent. They gave suggestions for maintenance that would help extend the life of the water heaters. I highly recommend Plumbing excellence.

reviews.author: David Campanale
reviews.text:
Called for an emergency appointment once our main drain backed up in our basement laundry room again. Jen was able to schedule a tech the same day. Matthew (Matt) was prompt and timely after communicating his drive time.
I knew I needed the pipes jetted from past situations.

I have to give Matt a huge shout-out cause he worked his butt off on the main drain for nearly three hours. He made multiple jet and camera passes to clear the clogged line and our water flows freely now.

He was very knowledgeable and offered us great advice. He was respectful and cleaned up well.

Thanks Matt for a job well done!

reviews.author: Joy Nixon
reviews.text: Amazingly quick service for a failed sump pump. They came the next day. Kevin was very informative and very nice.  I’d recommend Plumbing Excellence for their superior, friendly service!

synthesis.summary: Buddy's Plumbing Excellence demonstrates exceptional reliability for emergency situations with same-day and next-day service availability. Customers consistently praise their prompt response, thorough work quality, and professional communication, making them a strong choice for urgent plumbing needs.
strengths: Knowledgeable technicians who explain issues well
weaknesses: Limited sample of complex job outcomes
No pricing transparency in reviews
bestFor: drain cleaning and main line issues
synthesis.topQuote: Called for an emergency appointment once our main drain backed up in our basement laundry room again. Jen was able to schedule a tech the same day. Matthew (Matt) was prompt and timely after communicating his drive time.

plumbers.name: J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
plumbers.address: 200 S Main St Suite 3, Naperville, IL 60540, USA

reviews.author: Steve Johnson
reviews.text:
We opened up our finished basement to do some remodeling, and found the main gas line on the floor, badly corroded, as a result of continuous water intrusion. (You can see the corroded gas line in the first photo-basically a ticking time bomb!)

Shane from J Blanton came out, worked with us on the quote, and Edwin and Peter were scheduled within two days. It was a tricky route for the new pipe - tying into an offset T, moving the new pipe up higher (obviously), avoiding PVC drains, sump pump discharges, and electrical conduit.  They were friendly, efficient, and did great work - photos of the finished product below.

reviews.author: Laxman Jitarwal
reviews.text: Alex Cruz from J. Blanton Plumbing did an excellent job i specifically requested an early appointment and he arrived right on time around 8:30 AM, which I really appreciated he worked very hard for almost 4 to 5 hours straight and handled everything professionally. My water wasn’t running at all, and Alex stayed focused until he fully fixed the issue and got the water running again in my house he was knowledgeable, and clearly cared about doing the job right. You can tell he puts real effort into his work. I’m very satisfied with the service and would definitely recommend Alex Cruz and J. Blanton Plumbing to anyone

reviews.author: Joan Ralph
reviews.text:
If I could have given this company ZERO stars or negative stars that would have been my rating.  NEVER do business with this company!!!!!!!!!  They lie repeatedly about their service calls and are EXTREMELY expensive for what they do!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!  I have NEVER dealt with a worse company in my life!!!!!!
I just needed a valve replacement under my sink for a new dishwasher to be installed.  I talked to J. Blanton Plumbing and scheduled the work to be done the following week on a Tuesday.  The dishwasher was being installed the next day.  On Tuesday, a plumber wearing a "pretty" J. Blanton sweatshirt shows up NOT to do the work but to upsell me on having more plumbing work done!!!!  I told him he just needs to get the valve replaced as I was promised and he responds that he just drives a shell of a truck and has no repair equipment!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!  And that they would send a plumber out the next day which is when the dishwasher is coming!!!!!!!!!!!  After I pointed that out, I was promised a plumber at 8:00 a.m. Wednesday morning and got my delivery pushed back as much as they could on Wednesday.  The pretty sweatshirt knew that the work requirements were and I was promised the plumber would be here.  I even called 3x later on Tuesday to ensure they would stand behind their commitment.  Well, it's now Wednesday and no plumber showed at 8.  I called again at 8:50 and was told they would send someone over right away.  I called at 9:30 as no plumber yet and was told I was someone's next stop but they couldn't tell me when that would be!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!  My dishwasher delivery window is 10 - 2!!!!!  And this worthless, lying company knew this.
BOTTOM LINE:  Do not do business with them as it will be greater headaches that your current plumbing issues.  There are many good, reliable plumbers out there - J. Blanton is NOT ONE OF THEM!!!!!!!

reviews.author: irish
reviews.text: Cameron our plumber was just Awesome!! He worked like a machine and was very organized in how he went about the repairs.(I’m a Union Carpenter so I can relate!)He also KNEW HIS STUFF! And he was very personable and polite! I’d use him again for sure!👍👍

reviews.author: Charlie Benson
reviews.text: Ronnie came to take a detailed look and give me estimates on preventative maintenance. He was polite and thorough, shared his observations, explained options, and answered questions. They have great service tech, and the whole process was quick and seamless.

synthesis.summary: J. Blanton Plumbing has skilled technicians who do quality work, but there are concerning reliability issues with scheduling and service commitments. While they offer 24-hour service and have experienced plumbers, communication problems and potential dishonesty make them risky for time-sensitive emergencies.
weaknesses: Serious scheduling and reliability issues
Poor communication and broken promises
Expensive pricing
redFlags: History of lying about service calls and commitments
Sending upsell representatives instead of actual repair technicians
Multiple broken scheduling promises during time-sensitive situations

The pretty sweatshirt knew that the work requirements were and I was promised the plumber would be here. I even called 3x later on Tuesday to ensure they would stand behind their commitment. Well, it's now Wednesday and no plumber showed at 8.

plumbers.name: 1-Tom-Plumber
plumbers.address: 9200 Pyott Rd, Lake in the Hills, IL 60156, USA

reviews.author: Cordell Walker
reviews.text:
I had a wonderful experience with 1-Tom-Plumber from start to finish. They answered my call right away after I discovered my old water heater was leaking, which honestly caught me off guard since it was only about 8 years old. I had a big bulky 75-gallon Richmond power-vent water heater, and by the time I noticed the issue, water was leaking throughout my basement.

To make matters worse, some of my existing plumbing lines were already corroded and beginning to leak as well. I went a full week without hot water while trying to figure out the best long term solution, which was incredibly stressful.

When 1-Tom-Plumber came out, they were professional, knowledgeable, and took the time to explain all of my replacement options without pressure. After talking it through, I decided to upgrade to a tankless “endless hot water” system. I’m so glad I did.

The new system works amazingly well. I never run out of hot water, and unlike traditional systems, it doesn’t require a specific hard-water softener, so I didn’t have to invest in an additional water softening system. It also doesn’t require costly yearly flushes, which was a huge plus for me.

On top of that, the system comes with a 15-year manufacturer warranty and is made right here in America, which gave me even more confidence in my decision. The workmanship was truly top-notch, the installation was clean, and everything was explained clearly along the way.

I’m extremely happy with my experience and the upgrade. If you’re dealing with water heater issues or considering going tankless, I highly recommend 1-Tom-Plumber. They made a stressful situation so much easier and delivered excellent results.

reviews.author: Cy Nick
reviews.text: What I thought was a simple laundry clog turned out to be a much larger sewer job. Even though Justin was slotted for what was probably a fast job, he was still able to quickly adapt thanks to being incredibly prepared and having everything he could need in his truck, didn't have to run out for parts or tools even once. Got me back up and running quickly and expertly, highly recommend!

reviews.author: Kristina
reviews.text: I would absolutely recommend this company and its valuable employee Eric!  He was here within 2 hours (Sunday am at 7) for a leak in the garage ceiling.  Eric was professional and patient in answering our questions and very knowledgeable….for a cubs fan 😂.  He fixed the issue! I would absolutely recommend this company again

reviews.author: jose lopez
reviews.text: The place to call for sure , came home and my ceiling was about to cave in, called them and  they were here in the blink of an eye. Justin did an excellent job and was done in less than 20 minutes. Super friendly and professional.

reviews.author: Peter Bilik
reviews.text: Our tankless water heater froze during the recent subzero temperatures, causing the system to burst and we completely lost hot water. We have a 10 month old baby at home and it was a really tough spot to be in. 1-Tom-Plumber was recommended to us through a local community page and we gave them a shot. Eric was an absolute delight to work with, straightforward, and gave us multiple options not just equipment types but ways to pay. Moises, the owner was also very accommodating and they were all able to get us our hot water back in no time. The install looks clean and professional. They saved us during this big freeze. Thank you Eric!

synthesis.summary: 1-Tom-Plumber demonstrates exceptional emergency response with technicians arriving within 2 hours even on Sunday mornings and completing urgent repairs in 20 minutes. Multiple reviews highlight their preparedness, professionalism, and ability to handle complex problems that turn out bigger than expected.
strengths: Well-equipped trucks with all necessary parts
weaknesses: Limited sample size of reviews provided
