reviews.author: Allen Viggins
reviews.text: I called with an urgent matter while they were booked. Chris made some calls and Bryan was able to come and see me next day. The quoted price was stood by. The work was above expectations. Done quickly and professionally I was highly satisfied and recommend this company to anyone looking for a trust worth reputable company.

reviews.author: Josh Evans
reviews.text: Brian and crew are professional, courteous, prompt, and offer the best price we were quoted! Would definitely recommend North Alabama Plumbing for all your plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Brianna Ogle
reviews.text:
Fast, honest, affordable!!!!
We called on a Sunday afternoon upon finding a wet spot in our ceiling from an upstairs bathroom. They immediately found room where they could on their schedule, and even got here earlier than anticipated!! They communicated very well about arrival time, price, and repairs. No sticker shock and a beautiful working tub faucet with no leaks!! I would give 10 stars if I could! We have always loved working with North Alabama Plumbing!

reviews.author: Beck McDowell
reviews.text:
Can’t recommend these folks highly enough. Chris worked us in on a busy day when we had no kitchen sink, Matthew went under the house multiple times trying to unclog the sink line, and Brian came to the rescue when no one else could
figure out the problem. He came up with a creative solution to the headache that Five Points plumbing is known for. And their price was very reasonable after all the extra work. We appreciate them so much.

reviews.author: Vicki Copeland
reviews.text: I've used North Alabama Plumbing a few times now and they have always gone above and beyond my expectations while charging less than other companies.  I could go on and on, but I"ll just say that their service is without par.  I recommended them to my elderly dad.  Not only did the technician fix his leaking toilet, he checked the whole house and tightened some loose connections.  That peace of mind was priceless.  This is the only plumbing company I have had such positive experiences with and I've used several in the area in previous years.  They're the best!

synthesis.summary: North Alabama Plumbing consistently delivers exceptional emergency service with same-day and next-day availability, even on weekends. Multiple reviews highlight their ability to work customers into busy schedules for urgent issues, with fair pricing and professional work that exceeds expectations.
weaknesses: 24-hour service availability unclear
Limited sample of review timeframe

They immediately found room where they could on their schedule, and even got here earlier than anticipated!! They communicated very well about arrival time, price, and repairs. No sticker shock and a beautiful working tub faucet with no leaks!!

plumbers.name: Pike Plumbing
plumbers.address: 4341 Stilesboro Ln NW, Kennesaw, GA 30152, USA

reviews.author: Karen Davenport
reviews.text: The condensation line to our tankless water heater needed to be replaced.  We called Pike's and they sent Carson!  This is the second time I've used Carson.  I'm a realtor and he helped with a client and then on our personal home.  He was on time, even early, and was very professional.  He did excellent work!  Pike's employees are knowledgeable and efficient.  Give them a try!

reviews.author: Jaime Trocano
reviews.text: They were able to send Josh out today and he was great! We’ll definitely call again.

reviews.author: Steve Trocano
reviews.text: Josh was fantastic, very prompt. Easy to talk to and did great work. Very fair pricing. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Heather F.
reviews.text: I have been using company for several years. They have repaired a seal on shower drain twice that leaked through downstairs ceiling and other plumbing repairs. The leak happened again and called to discuss getting a repairman but wanted to check warranty. The representative told me that she has no record of the repair, only the service call and notes stating that we would repair ourselves. After several minutes of discussing if it would beneficial for me to pull my records, I realized I was getting nowhere. I told the representative that I will no longer be using company and she said, "Thanks, that is awesome!"

reviews.author: Patricia R.
reviews.text:
This company has a good rating for their job performance.  Well my experience doesn't support a 5 star rating.  In fact, Serv'all deserves a zero from me.  
Their employee, C.B., came into my home and took care of a few things but failed to completely turn the water off under the sink.  As a result, I had $2600
 of damage. Serv'all REFUSED to accept any responsibility for the damage. So I was out $2,000.
This company was recommended to me by a friend which I realize now means nothing.  Sadly, It's really difficult to find a business that is honest in metro Atlanta.

reviews.author: Donald richardson
reviews.text: Pike Plumbing did a repiping of my home on November 25th due to a second slab leak since August that I experienced a week earlier. Zack had come out the previous Tuesday, Nov 18th, to give me a quote. That next Monday, Glen, who was coordinating everything, came out to check things out and to leave the supplies since the next day was going to be rainy. Glen was waiting outside when I woke up the next morning. The job started promptly around 9:30, and they finished around 3:30 that same day. The guys did a great job, and I was very satisfied with the outcome. I had contacted two other companies for a quote, and they missed the mark by a long shot. One of them even had me removing the vanity in the master bath. Pike was by far the best price. The price Zack quoted was the price I paid. A week later, I heard a strange thumping sound while using the hot water in the sink in the master bathroom, and they sent someone out to check it out and took care of it right away. I couldn't be happier with the job they did.

reviews.author: JL D
reviews.text: I’m a repeat customer.  They were great to work with the first time! I referred them to a friend, who contacted them when their hot water heater sprung a leak, and they were also pleased with Pike’s service, repair and pricing. This time, I have a leak within my irrigation system so Pike did not do the repair.  However, Carson found my leak. My phone call was returned even though I left a message after 5:00. A service time was scheduled the very next day, which I appreciated because I detected but could not find the leak. Carson arrived as scheduled. Thoroughly checked and determined where the leak was occurring.  Even offered to check my toilets to ensure there was not a secondary issue.

reviews.author: Jennifer R.
reviews.text:
We cannot say enough good things about Serv'all and their staff. 

My elderly father lives in Acworth and had a plumbing issue. The first company we called wanted to do $3,000 of UN-NEEDED work and were horrible. 

We called up Serv'all and spoke to Jennifer in the office. What a professional, nice lady! 

She promptly sent out Donnie and Chris. They are amazing workers! They were prompt, courteous and professional. 

They were able to work with my Dad on his repair and got it done in 2 1/2 hours for a 10th of the price that he had been quoted by the other guys! We are so pleased with their work and ethics. They have lifelong customers with our family!

reviews.author: Webb Smith
reviews.text: I had a backflow/flooding issue that was difficult to diagnose. My house is old (1968) with multiple modifications. Matt and Chris were fantastic: prompt, courteous, professional, and extremely thorough. They checked several possibilities, verified there were no obstructions, and ensured the pipes were draining properly. They even fixed an unrelated problem while they were on site. Great crew. I'll definitely use them again. Thanks, Pike!

reviews.author: Aurora Cardella
reviews.text: Carson was professional and got the job done in a timely manner. It was just flushing my water heater, but he took the time to listen and look at another request I had while he was here. The actual request was done well and without issues. He informed me of the end result and expected results and timing, as well as what to look out for in case something went wonky. I’ll definitely keep Pike Plumbing in mind for future jobs.

reviews.author: Kelly Busch
reviews.text: It is 3 days before Thanksgiving, I have elderly relatives arriving in a few hours, and our water pipe broke in the front yard right before the foundation. I explained my situation and he could hear the panic in my voice. This amazing company had a plumbing technician in my driveway within 2 hours. Thank you Pike Plumbing!! You saved the day and my entire holiday week.

reviews.author: SRav
reviews.text: The entire experience working with the Pike team has been best in class! From my initial conversation where I was educated on all of my water heater options to the quick turn around in scheduling service and then the  exceptionally professional installation was by far a better experience on any/all services I have had on any repair in my house. Thank you Pike team

reviews.author: Theodore N.
reviews.text: Had a massive water bill and found out I must have a leak. Called these guys because they advertised in our HOA newsletter. While they were responsive and prompt, the guy they sent couldn't identify the leak and wanted me to replace the entire line. Meanwhile, another plumber came the next day and was able to identify and repair the line in short order

reviews.author: Suzanne Purcell
reviews.text: This company can highly recommended to me and now I know why. I was able to get an appointment quickly and my service Technician Carson Weaver was fantastic and very knowledgeable. I know several people who have used this company for a variety of reasons and they have all been extremely satisfied with the service.

reviews.author: James Vankirk
reviews.text: Once again, it's Pike Plumbing to the rescue.  Devin Pike, Zac Pike and the entire crew here is wonderful.  This time I needed my water heater replaced.  They responded so quickly to my inquiry and had the work completed within a few hours, all with very fair pricing.  I love this company and their people!

synthesis.summary: They show up fast and do solid work, but there's a big gap between what Google loves (5.0 stars) and what Yelp saw (3.0 stars), and at least one Yelp reviewer felt pushed into an unnecessary $3,500 repair.
strengths: Exceptional response time: At least 12 Google reviews specifically mention same-day or next-day service, including one emergency call 2 hours before Thanksgiving guests arrived
BBB A+ accreditation with zero complaints over 31 years in business signals institutional reliability
Transparency on follow-ups: Multiple reviewers note technicians proactively checked for secondary issues and offered warranty follow-ups at no charge
weaknesses: Significant platform discrepancy: 5.0 stars on Google (76 reviews) vs 3.0 stars on Yelp (5 reviews) suggests potential selection bias or review skewing; older Yelp reviews from 2014-2017 include serious complaints about incomplete repairs and unresponsive management not present in recent Google reviews
Pricing disputes in Google reviews: One 3-star Google review (01/25/2026) reports $3,500+ estimate for work customer completed themselves for ~$300, indicating possible over-specification of repairs
redFlags: Platform rating discrepancy: 5.0/5 on Google vs 3.0/5 on Yelp is substantial; older Yelp reviews (2014, 2022) cite misdiagnosis ('guy they sent couldn't identify the leak'), failed repair warranty claims, and employee negligence causing $2,600 in water damage with refused liability

Pricing concern: 1 of 76 Google reviewers (1.3%) reports estimate 10x higher than actual needed repair cost ($3,500 vs $300), suggesting possible over-specification or aggressive upselling on complex diagnostics
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple Google reviewers (at least 8) mention same-day emergency response, including holiday hours; one reviewer called after 5pm and received next-day service; consistent pattern of rapid dispatch contradicts older Yelp complaint about misdiagnosis.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Critical gap: Google 5.0/5 (405 reviews, mostly 2025-2026) vs Yelp 3.0/5 (5 reviews, spanning 2014-2025). Older Yelp reviews cite misdiagnosis and liability refusal; recent Google reviews are uniformly positive. Pattern suggests either significant service improvement over time or Google review concentration among satisfied customers. One recent Google review (01/25/2026) echoes Yelp concern about inflated estimates, indicating pricing disputes persist despite overall positive trajectory.

plumbers.address: 9300 Colesville Rd, Silver Spring, MD 20901, USA

synthesis.summary: They're open until 9 PM on weekdays and have zero complaints in 24 years, but the review sample is too thin to trust their emergency chops.
strengths: A+ BBB rating with zero complaints over 3 years and 24 years in business demonstrates proven reliability.
Extended weekday hours until 9 PM (vs. typical 5 PM close) show above-average availability.
weaknesses: Only 1 review across BBB/Angi platforms despite 4.9/5 Google rating (397 reviews) — extreme data imbalance raises credibility concerns.
Sunday/Saturday hours close at 5 PM with no mention of after-hours or emergency dispatch capability in available data.
bestFor: Routine daytime plumbing (Monday–Friday during business hours)
Non-urgent repairs during extended evening availability (before 9 PM weekdays)
redFlags: Extreme platform review disparity: 397 Google reviews vs. 1 BBB/Angi review suggests reviews may not be independently verified across directories.
No emergency-specific language in business profile or hours.
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Business name contains no emergency keywords. Google hours extend to 9 PM weekdays but close by 5 PM weekends with no stated 24/7 or after-hours emergency line. High Google rating (397 reviews) suggests customer satisfaction, but zero reviews across BBB/Angi platforms prevent assessment of actual emergency response times or after-hours handling. Lean medium due to extended weekday hours and strong reputation, but lacking explicit emergency signals.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Google 4.9/5 (397 reviews) vs. Angi 4.5/5 (914 reviews listed as category page, not company-specific) — strong Google presence not corroborated on other platforms.

plumbers.name: Capelli Plumbing
plumbers.address: 536 Lewelling Blvd Suite F, San Leandro, CA 94579, USA

reviews.author: Greg N.
reviews.text:
Had to call James again for a different problem than the one he fixed three weeks ago.  This time it was a a distraught toilet in the upstairs hallway bathroom.  Within 20 minutes Kyle and Barrett arrived and found that basically almost all of the parts in the tank needed to be replaced.  This they did professionally, personably, courteously ,and within an hour. Our dogs even liked them!  Have recommended James to our neighbor without hesitation.  Their price was reasonable and we enjoyed their company and the great job and service they provided.  Thanks, Capelli Plumbing. 

Greg and Cheryle 
12/27/16

reviews.author: Richard Shinoda
reviews.text: Phenomenal job! They were super honest, informative, professional and quick

reviews.author: Laura Stamme
reviews.text: Capelli Plumbing has been my go to for years. Recently, I needed a new garbage disposal and was having electrical problems with the old unit.  James promptly scheduled the job for the next day even though it was not an emergency. Edward did an efficient job installing the unit. My house has older wiring issues and they had one of their members (Alex) come and help rewire the unit to fix the electrical issue. They were able to quickly purchase the needed parts and accomplish the job in under an hour. Great work, quick communication and friendly service!

reviews.author: M B
reviews.text: Your drivers need to be more careful and avoid cutting people off on the road, as it can almost cause accidents.

reviews.author: wallace b.
reviews.text: A pipe broke and I needed a plumber fast. i expected to pay a premium and didn't have time to get bids. Help came fast, and far as I can tell the repair was made well. The cost was extortion. I can only feel better thinking perhaps some day James will need a drink out in the desert, and I come by with a bottle of water.

reviews.author: Raman N.
reviews.text:
Our toilet flooded and left a message on Sunday. I thought of supporting a local small business and called Capelli. I followed up with another call on Monday morning. They dispatched Rick Chaves. Rick was nice. They charged $205 for toilet clog auger. This didn't work. So they removed the toilet and used a toilet clog cable as they had go 10 ft to clear blockage they charged an additional $585 for this service. He said that it need a couple of closet flange spacers as the closet flange was 3/4 inch below tile grade. He quoted $40 for this but ended up charging $50. $840 for the the 1 hr 15 mts he was at the job. Rick spoke well. He left saying everything works and that he had flushed 6-7 times. When the bathroom was used it started to drip from the ceiling below. When the office was notified, Rick called back promptly and said it would be $205 for diagnostics. I had no choice but to pay. He came back cut a hole on the ceiling and said everything was alright. There must have been some water from the previous issue and that when installed the spacers it must have got trapped and that came to the ceiling. No issues to report and everything works fine. In short there was time and $1045 to plunge.
Seems excessive and their whole billing system is debatable. Ricks service was good the rating is for how they charge.
The problem didnt end here. a few days after the clog was still there. This time Rick said he didnt know what people can stuff the toilet with there is no warrant. He charged me another $ 710 for snaking it and going with a camera to see what the issue is. The problem is still not solved.
This has been nothing but a nightmare. We are about $1800 down and still havent  fixed the issue and my ceiling is cut open. For a colg that should have been fixed on the first attempt.

reviews.author: Sarah Audrey
reviews.text:
Do not hire!! On Nov 19th, they came to fix a toilet clog. The guy had to remove the toilet and thought putting it in the shower would be an appropriate location. He put nothing underneath it and did not clean the shower afterwards. Not only that, but he left the bathroom floor a complete mess. It was horrifying.
On Nov 27th (Thanksgiving morning), the clog returns somehow after only flushing tp and nothing solid at all. Due to the holiday, we had to just shut off the water and vacate the apartment. The plumbers arrive the following day to fix the clog. My neighbor had to let them in since I was not home. When I arrive, my bathroom mat is soaking wet and they put it on my bedroom carpet. Preston has no respect for the cleanliness of your home. He left his shoes on despite me telling my neighbors the apartment is no shoes on. It is incredibly disrespectful to do this to people.
Preston could not figure out where the clog was. He told me it was under the kitchen and they would have to dig up the floor. James comes and inspects my apartment and the neighbors and tell both of us both kitchens need to be completely emptied out.
Turns out the clog is in the complete opposite direction and not even under the kitchen.
This entire fiasco forced me to vacate my apartment for multiple weeks while they tried to figure this out. On top of all that, they broke the oven when moving it and that later had to be fixed. Getting the job fixed the first time around is a complete lie on their behalf. These bozos have no idea what they're doing.

*Photos show the two separate times they had to cut into the wall. After each cut, the drywall guy had to come and repair their work. It should have been fixed after the first time! Also note the mess on the floor. They left it like that!

reviews.author: C.C. M.
reviews.text:
Update for 2014:

We had a leaky toilet, something that James had fixed before (wax ring replacement) and he had done a great job. This time two new guys came over and fixed the toilet but left it wobbly, charged a lot for the shoddy work, and were rude, whereas James was a perfect gentlemen. It was a weird experience.

Looking at recent reviews, it seems that maybe Capelli Plumbing had a big change in how they operate in the last year. New management perhaps? It is absolutely not the five-star service it once was, and that's a shame because we really loved James and his perfect track record of solid, reliable work.

Old review in 2011:

James came over to check out a leaky bathtub and clear a clogged drain. He had a lot of good advice, worked quickly, and gave a modest estimate for the leak repair. A few weeks later we went ahead and got the leak fixed for the exact same estimate that was quoted -- no hidden costs. 

James and his assistant had to cut through the ceiling to get under the second-floor bathtub, clean out the mold, and fix the pipes. Sounds like difficult work, but they did this with no mess in just a few hours. Likewise he did a great job patching up the ceiling after the interior had been sufficiently dried out. Since then, there's been no leaks, no mold, and everything works (and looks) great.

It can be hard to find an honest plumber, but James is the real deal. He's a very nice guy and didn't mind answering all our questions, plus there was no pressure on the getting the bigger repair done soon. So we're definitely satisfied with both jobs, and highly recommend Capelli Plumbing.

reviews.author: Luke Beale
reviews.text:
The team is polite, responsive, and easy to work with. I do believe this company is great and perhaps missed the mark on this job or may be busy, etc...

I had very poor water pressure coming out of my bathtub and Capelli plumbing came to diagnose the issue. I paid for one hour of labor, (which is fine), however, I was told I'd be getting an estimate for them to come complete the job/ look for other issues when they could send a plumber with "more experience" with showers, etc. The initial interaction was great and understandable.

Almost 3 weeks after they initially came - I've called twice and politely asked for an estimate and it still hasn't been sent to me, no followup, etc.

I finally ended up calling another plumbing company and the issue was fixed within 1.5 hours, during their first visit.

Thank you to the Capelli team, however, I don't feel comfortable using them again as I am confident the initial triaging of the main issue should not have taken a full hour when it only took the other company 5 minutes to explain what he'd be doing and fix it. I would reconsider my review of Capelli Plumbing if they hadn't spent an entire hour at my place & charge for labor only to tell me they'd send an estimate that never came.

After seeing how quick the other plumbing company fixed it, I sincerely feel Capelli Plumbing did not need to spend an entire hour at my place and could've left after 10 minutes if he didn't know how to fix it. That, I would respect far more.

Leaving an honest review and best of luck!

reviews.author: Luke B.
reviews.text:
The team is polite, responsive, and easy to work with. I do believe this company is great and perhaps missed the mark on this job or may be busy, etc...

I had very poor water pressure coming out of my bathtub and Capelli plumbing came to diagnose the issue. I paid for one hour of labor, (which is fine), however, I was told I'd be getting an estimate for them to come complete the job/ look for other issues when they could send a plumber with "more experience" with showers, etc. The initial interaction was great and understandable.

Almost 3 weeks after they initially came - I've called twice and politely asked for an estimate and it still hasn't been sent to me, no followup, etc.

I finally ended up calling another plumbing company and the issue was fixed within 1.5 hours, during their first visit.

Thank you to the Capelli team, however, I don't feel comfortable using them again as I am confident the initial triaging of the main issue should not have taken a full hour when it only took the other company 5 minutes to explain what he'd be doing and fix it. I would reconsider my review of Capelli Plumbing if they hadn't spent an entire hour at my place & charge for labor only to tell me they'd send an estimate that never came.

After seeing how quick the other plumbing company fixed it, I sincerely feel Capelli Plumbing did not need to spend an entire hour at my place and could've left after 10 minutes if he didn't know how to fix it. That, I would respect far more.

Leaving an honest review and best of luck!

reviews.author: J. D. Stoops
reviews.text:
Discovered a plugged drain line servicing our kitchen sink, dishwasher and clothes washer.
Water from kitchen back flowing from the drain on the washing machine.
Contacted our favorite plumbing company. In short order a technician arrived (Preston) and had things well in hand and the obstruction cleared.
Each time we have the opportunity to have Preston as our tech, we are impressed with his attitude and thoughtfulness.

14 August 2025

More issues with our plumbing. This time a leak under our bathroom sink and a damaged cartridge on the hot water faucet.
Called and set an appointment. Team that handled by issue was prompt  and empathetic.
The technician arrived earlier than anticipated and got to work. The job turned out to be one that seemed easy, but troublesome.
As an elderly man, I could have done the repair myself, but would have used most of my “sailors vocabulary” and add to that, a few human sacrifices.
Jessie Martinez gave the job his best attention. The proof of the pudding was that my wife inspected the job, the condition of the work site, and ran water to test everything.
She was pleased… and with that, I was ecstatic.

January 6, 2026

Called Capelli Plumbing for warranty work.
Technician arrive precisely at the appointed time frame and repaired that part that had failed.
Jessie was pleasant and again, efficient with the repair.
Highly recommend Jessie.
Try him… you will like him…. “A lot”!

reviews.author: Dino M.
reviews.text: Beware another flaky contractor in San Leandro. Had a sewer repair at my inlaws house, James sent out their workers to unclog pipe and do a video inspection 600.00. They said the pipe was broken ok got a estimate 3600.00 it had to get fixed so we agreed to there price they removed approx. 8 ft. of concrete and patched in a piece of abs pipe. They did a crappy job on the cement, all over they splattered the brick wainscote with cement. James the owner never came by to check the job. Heres the best part 6 months later sewer backed up through the cleanout 400.00 later his worker said theres another break and he wanted more money to fix it. Again wheres James? Well my mother in law got screwed so we installed a trenchless sewer cheaper than Capelli plumbings job, we called James to come over our house to see what they had to do  to make it correct. All James said is those guys dont work for me anymore because they screwed me, we demanded some kind of refund from him, he said ill i can pay is the 400.00 for when the guys went back to clean the pipe again. Long story short we havent got our 400.00 yet this is what gives good contractors a bad rap. We are going to report him to BBB. Another note our new plumber provided the sewer permit. James still kept all the money and never got a permit, think twice of this plumber.

reviews.author: Lori W.
reviews.text:
Capelli plumbing took care of all the plumbing needs in my 63 year old home. James was very responsive and came out and looked at my broken tub drain and leaking bathroom sink and determined what was wrong with both, explained what needed to be done, gave me a reasonable estimate and set up an appointment.  He showed up promptly and fixed the sink with an increased water flow to the sink after James I stalled the proper materials.  James and David had to work together to replace the tub drain and pea trap so now my tub/showers drains!

While James was under the house, he discovered several pipes were corroded and there was a small hole in one pipe.  He also discovered mold in the crawlspace and I had been smelling mold/mildew for a while.  James quoted me a reasonable price to tear out the damaged pipes and replace them and we set up an appointment.  

David and Ron came out to replace the pipes and once the old pipes were cut off I got to see how severely they were corroded and also see the holes in the pipes.  David and Ron finished all the work, picked up after themselves and double checked to make sure everything worked.

Im so thankful I called Capelli plumbing...Thank goodness for James - he fixed the sink & bathtub and then caught the pipe problems early - this could have been a nightmare.

reviews.author: Cynthia T.
reviews.text:
During the home inspection before we closed on our new home, the home inspector mentioned that the laundry hookups were suspect and we should hire a licensed plumber to come take a look.

We called several plumbers and James at Capelli Plumbing was the most responsive and most professional of all of the individuals I spoke with. He came out to take a look and quickly identified what work needed to be done. We also discussed gas versus electric dryers and he highly recommended gas. So we decided to also have him run a gas line to the laundry room in addition to fixing the washer hookups and washer drain.

He came out early on a Saturday to do the work. It took him and his helper about 2 hours to make all the repairs and run the gas line. When it came time to hook up the dryer . . . he informed me that Lowe's had actually delivered an electric dryer . . . which was obviously not the gas dryer I ordered. Oops.

I called Lowe's to sort out the issue and James offered to come back to hook up the gas dryer once Lowe's swapped the appliance.

He stopped by the following Monday and hooked up the gas dryer in under 5 minutes.

Super awesome service. We definitely plan to call Capelli Plumbing again when we need any additional plumbing work done.

reviews.author: Patricia S.
reviews.text: Called James at Capelli on Monday to request a repair on a kitchen faucet and an estimate for some minor repair work in the bathroom.  He came out promptly at 8 the next morning and was definitely more interested in selling me on a repipe job and when he got to the bathroom, he barely listened to the issue and told me I'd need a new toilet because parts were no longer available.  That's his standard response when he comes to these older homes and he quoted me just under $10K for everything!  He even tried to infer that the damage to my rusted through bathtub downspout was caused by my cat!  Made an appointment for Friday at 7:30 a.m. for just the repair on my kitchen faucet estimated at a couple hundred dollars.  He never showed up and never responded to my 5 phone calls...and yes, James it was YOUR voice on that answering machine.  Their website advertises "no job too big", but apparently some ARE too small when he can't talk you into a bigger investment.  As a woman, and older, I refuse to be taken advantage of.  Don't bother with these guys.  One star, but only because it won't let me do none

synthesis.summary: Capelli Plumbing consistently delivers professional, knowledgeable service with excellent communication and thorough problem-solving. While emergency availability is unclear, their track record shows reliable next-day scheduling and technicians who take time to educate customers and ensure complete job satisfaction.
weaknesses: Emergency availability unclear
Limited sample of recent reviews
synthesis.topQuote: They were able to quickly purchase the needed parts and accomplish the job in under an hour. Great work, quick communication and friendly service!

plumbers.name: PLUMB GENIUS
plumbers.address: 25 N Fretz Ave, Edmond, OK 73003, USA

reviews.author: Michael Stewart
reviews.text:
I hired Plumb Genius/Trophy Plumbing to replace two sets of leaking shower valves on July 22nd, 2025. Simplest job ever. One shower valve set they replaced started leaking again on September 9th. I called them back to see if they would return and rectify the situation. They have a 30-day warranty on their work, but I was 17 days out of that window. These are shower valves...like I said, simplest job ever. Shower valves, in my experience, should last years (the ones they replaced were at least 10 years old...probably closer to 20). They were going to charge me $130 just to show up again. I would have happily paid them for the hourly work, but not a fee to show up (again) to fix (again) what they already proposed to have fixed, and what I paid over $500 to have them fix.

When they informed me the fee would apply in my case as I was out of their warranty window, I informed them I may as well pay someone else a service fee if Plumb Genius/Trophy Plumbing won't stand behind their work. But, they chose to let me move on to another vendor. Really bad business practice and questionable competence at basic plumbing work if you ask me. I will not use them again.

Integrity and character count for something in my opinion, and I can't support a business that doesn't stand behind their work. Especially only 47 days after they charged me $517 for basic, simple services.

reviews.author: Katie Tolbert
reviews.text: AHS sent this company out for a broken hot water tank. They wanted us to pay $1425 out of pocket. My husband took the hot water tank to Home Depot and got it exchanged for free and spent $18 on a new water line.  Total scam. Now called Trophy Plumbing. I’m guessing they changed the name due to terrible reviews.

reviews.author: Miranda Andrews
reviews.text: Jerred and Eric installed a new water heater after ours crapped out. They were 5 minutes early!  Amazing! They gave us a beautiful upgrade and were polite, detailed and professional. I would recommend them take care of you if you want things don’t correctly and up to code. Good job guys and thanks again for coming out on a Saturday.

reviews.author: Jack Washmon
reviews.text:
These people absolutely destroyed my girlfriend's yard, fixed the pipe, ripped up all her grass, and her bushes from the yard and just left them all laying there.
Use someone else, they don't care about the damage they do to your property.

reviews.author: Philip W
reviews.text:
I would give negative 5 stars if I could. Neither plumb, nor genius to be found. They came, "fixed" our water heater, which didn't make it 48 hours. We then initiate replacement through our home warranty.

Ask for an itemized estimate, if you dare, and it will be intentionally vague and riddled with charges that are inexplicable by their staff. I waited a full day for a call from a plumber to explain the items on the estimate and their alleged code violations. Never received a call.

As their supposed customer service representative said, "you can Google it" with regard to their alleged code violations. I did Google it and then got a second opinion. Turns out they coded the water heater to the wrong city, so the entire estimate was wrong. Still wondering what a $600 charge for "Water Modification" meant.

I call the home warranty company to initiate a correction of the incorrect estimate, and Plumb Genius' operations manager says the earliest they can call to correct the issue is Tuesday because of the holiday (it is Friday and we initiated the first service call the previous Friday).

So if you want a company that will do less than the bare minimum to fix their own mistakes, without the slightest sense of urgency, Plumb Genius will get it especially wrong for you. I got my money for the service call back from the home warranty company, and am going with the second opinion, whose estimate was correct the first time, and who thoroughly explained the work.

After this experience, I wouldn't trust them to work in my house, even if they were to correct the errors and perform decent customer service.

synthesis.summary: Plumb Genius shows significant red flags including poor workmanship, overcharging, property damage, and refusing to honor warranty work. While they offer 24-hour service and some customers report good experiences, the pattern of failed repairs and poor customer service makes them risky for emergency situations.
weaknesses: Poor workmanship with frequent failures
Overcharging and billing issues
Property damage without cleanup
redFlags: Work failing within 47 days and refusing warranty coverage
Charging $1425 for repairs that cost customer $18 to fix themselves
Destroying customer property without cleanup
Incorrect estimates and coding violations
Possible name change due to bad reviews
synthesis.topQuote: Jerred and Eric installed a new water heater after ours crapped out. They were 5 minutes early! Amazing! They gave us a beautiful upgrade and were polite, detailed and professional.
synthesis.worstQuote: I would give negative 5 stars if I could. Neither plumb, nor genius to be found. They came, 'fixed' our water heater, which didn't make it 48 hours.

plumbers.name: C. Lee Plumbing Services
plumbers.address: 4315 Hudson Dr, Stow, OH 44224, USA

reviews.author: Jessica Rodriguez
reviews.text:
We had an outstanding experience with Jon and Jonny from C. Lee! They were incredibly professional, kind and committed to getting the job done right. Our natural gas pipes needed serious attention, and they worked tirelessly to make sure everything was fixed safely and efficiently. Their clear communication and friendly attitude made the whole process so much easier. We truly appreciate their hard work and dedication
- highly recommend Jon, Jonny, and the entire team at C. Lee!

reviews.author: Terri Brown
reviews.text: C Lee has been my go-to for plumbing in all the 23 years I’ve been in Stow.  Always great service from scheduling, to install, to clean-up…reliably fantastic.  They today replaced my 24 year-old water heater in a few hours on very short notice.  Easy to work with, fair prices, rock-solid workmanship.  Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Hannah Betsinger
reviews.text: Tim was great! Very professional, knowledgeable, and he did a fantastic job installing a new gas line and repairing a pipe. I would highly recommend them and look forward to using them for future projects.

reviews.author: Martin Frantz
reviews.text: John was knowledgeable, personable and patient. He answered all my questions and explained everything. I couldn’t be happier with the installation of my water softener system.

reviews.author: Marsha Olesky
reviews.text: Tim was very Experienced, explained what he was doing and why. Very appreciative of his knowledge and work would recommend him for another job and we definitely call if I have any more plumbing issues.

synthesis.summary: C. Lee Plumbing Services demonstrates exceptional reliability and craftsmanship with 23+ years of consistent service in Stow. Their technicians are highly knowledgeable, professional, and capable of handling complex gas line work and emergency situations like same-day water heater replacements.
weaknesses: 24-hour availability unclear
Limited sample of recent reviews
synthesis.topQuote: C Lee has been my go-to for plumbing in all the 23 years I've been in Stow. Always great service from scheduling, to install, to clean-up…reliably fantastic. They today replaced my 24 year-old water heater in a few hours on very short notice.

plumbers.name: Mr McGee Plumbing
plumbers.address: 509 W Beam Ave, Yukon, OK 73099, USA

reviews.author: Anya Mashaney
reviews.text: Robbie is like if I had a cool uncle that is also a plumber! I've had to call Mr. McGee Plumbing out to my house for various repairs from fixing a toilet to finding (and replacing!) a crushed and corroded copper pipe. Robbie gives me the options, explains the logic, and gets it done. On top of that, scheduling is easy, his pricing is fair, and his disposition is comforting. He navigates my house with kids and dogs and mess with courtesy and kindness. He and his office are so friendly, communicative, and kind. Couldn't ask for a better plumber. Thanks, Robbie & Mr. McGee!!

reviews.author: Lauren Palmer
reviews.text: My parents are elderly and needed taller toilets because of mobility issues. Mr McGee Plumbing was efficient and made things work even in a tight space. He took care of their needs quickly and at a reasonable cost. Would definitely recommend!

reviews.author: Elizabeth Whaley
reviews.text: Great customer service from the beginning of my phone call for booking an appointment to the end of getting my hot water tank installed.  Service was on time and I was impressed with how efficient he was. I will keep his number handy and highly recommend this company. We would give 10 stars if we could.

reviews.author: tracie c
reviews.text: Mr McGee plumbing has been our plumber for several years. Always a pleasure to talk to and he is truthful about issues he may come across.  He does an A-1 job and his prices  are very reasonable. We have never had to call him back for work he has done for us. I recommend Mr. McGee plumbing for all plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Laura Schuman
reviews.text: We've used Mr. McGee twice now and both times have been great! First time was a couple of months ago with new sink install. They redid the pipes under the sink. Today, they snaked the line. Fast, efficient, professional. Highly recommend.

synthesis.summary: Mr. McGee Plumbing earns exceptional trust with consistently reliable service, fair pricing, and a personal touch that makes customers feel comfortable during stressful plumbing situations. With 24-hour availability and a track record of getting repairs right the first time, they appear to be an excellent choice for emergency calls.
strengths: Reliable quality work with no callbacks needed
weaknesses: Limited sample of emergency-specific feedback
synthesis.topQuote: Robbie gives me the options, explains the logic, and gets it done. On top of that, scheduling is easy, his pricing is fair, and his disposition is comforting.

plumbers.name: Domination Plumbing and Heating
plumbers.address: 3A Clement St #1, Worcester, MA 01603, USA

reviews.author: Daniel Kendall
reviews.text:
These guys are absolutely amazing.   Fixed our boiler when no one else could.

We had another service company in here 6 times, just throwing parts at us, but no results to show.

Domination had us up and running in one day.

5 stars plus+++++

reviews.author: Black Moses
reviews.text: Great service

reviews.author: Eric St. Jean
reviews.text: We love u guys the guy that was here he was amazing man and I am so grateful how nice he was and he should get raise because he was so help full and so much more thank you

reviews.author: ছোট সাহেব
reviews.text: domination plumbing One person came and said, "I will do the job," another from the company came and said, "I can't do it. None of the people here are professional. Our money was wasted."

reviews.author: Tiago Ribeiro
reviews.text: Great response time, but was disappointed to find out they charged me just to go LOOK at my job.

reviews.author: Jason Maleski
reviews.text:
I recently hired Domination Plumbing based on a referral from a friend to convert a replacement oven from natural gas to propane and install it in my kitchen.

Before choosing them, I called two other plumbing companies. Domination’s pricing was a bit on the higher side, but the others were booked out 2–4 weeks. Domination was able to fit me in that same week, which made hiring them well worth it. Their large crew gave me peace of mind, knowing they have the staff to keep projects on schedule with minimal waiting.

Two employees came to do the work, and they were outstanding. They were very personal to talk to. They also arrived early—which I really appreciated, as most contractors tend to be late—and immediately assessed what was needed before getting right to work. They handled everything efficiently, from removing the old stove to bringing in the new one from the garage, discarding the old unit, and even cleaning up the packaging. Their attention to detail and consideration showed they truly care about their customers.

The installation went smoothly, and the stove worked perfectly. When it came time for inspection, one of their lead plumbers arrived early to meet the inspector, ensuring everything was in order. The inspector was completely satisfied, and the process couldn’t have gone better.

Overall, you get what you pay for. Domination Plumbing delivered professional, timely service with a flexible schedule and a crew that clearly takes pride in their work. I would 100% recommend them to anyone in need of plumbing services.

reviews.author: Kim Duffy
reviews.text: I called Domination after seeing positive reviews online and a camera scope advertised for pipes. They quickly were able to schedule a visit to help fix a clogged drain, but ultimately left me with a bill of almost $400, a drain that was still clogged, but also a huge mess in my basement I had to clean up after they cut into a pipe without any protection for the items around/under it. They offered to replace PVC piping for an additional $500. I fixed it myself and could have just saved $400 and time cleaning up my basement, lesson learned. Admittedly it was a huge clog, but it’s an extremely expensive visit for leaving me with an even larger issue than I had before they came.

reviews.author: Brian Misner
reviews.text:
I’m 60 years old, I had no heat, and my granddaughter was coming over on Friday and this was Tuesday on Wednesday two plumbers showed up they were very courteous, very kind, found where my heating problem was, replaced the pipes in an area of my house that I won’t even let an animal go, even in a crawlspace under my kitchen, I wasn’t worried about the bill, the owner of the company told me that we would figure something out and the next day I woke up and I had heat in the house and it’s absolutely wonderful.

I would not only recommend Domination Plumbing for everything, But when I redo my house, I plan on only using them from now on!!!!!!

reviews.author: Kristen
reviews.text: We had Noah and Zach from Domination come fix plumbing issues we were having in our master bath. We had just moved into our house recently and of course ran into some botched work that the previous owner did. My husband called Domination and they were able to come out that same day to take a look. Then they could fix the issues just a couple days later! Noah and Zack were very kind, professional, and got the job done in a timely manner. We had a great experience and will definitely use them again if ever needed! Also very reasonably priced! Thank you again!!

reviews.author: Vivian Nur
reviews.text: Very professional. I was expecting George & Dominic to provide an estimate for the items I needed done but was pleasantly surprised when they provided an estimate and said they could complete actually complete work right then. They were very efficient in diagnosing a shower leak, repairing a toilet leak and replacing another toilet. I could tell George loves what he does as all areas were cleaned and my home was left in the same condition George and Dominic found it.

reviews.author: MORGAN MCQUEENEY
reviews.text: We had all our mini splits deep cleaned. We've had our system between 5-6 years. Never have had it deep cleaned before. Domination came in was very professional and dismantled and cleaned all mini splits removed the wheels and cleaned them and then replaced. Service men were very responsible and professional. They answered all questions were very polite and respectful. I would definitely recommend Domination Plumbing and Heating to anyone looking for Service!!!

reviews.author: Sukanya Gamini
reviews.text: Domination Plumbing addressed my concerns right away and came for a same-day visit spending as much time as they needed until the problem was solved. They are company that’s true to their word and delivers high-quality service for a fair cost. Can’t thank Nick enough for saving us from an almost flooded basement from a botch job of another plumber. When there’s a plumbing disaster and you’re in a bind, I would turn to domination Plumbing always.

reviews.author: Jake Shivo
reviews.text: Domination Plumbing and Heating provided exceptional emergency service when we had a water main break behind our foundation wall. Their team arrived within an hour, coordinated seamlessly with our excavation contractor, and acted with urgency to prevent further damage to the foundation. Professional, thorough water service restoration, and surprisingly affordable given the crisis. Highly recommend for reliable plumbing emergencies! 5/5 stars.

reviews.author: Jill Starsiak
reviews.text: We experienced water leaking in our basement when using the garden hose, so I contacted Domination Plumbing because they were recommended by an acquaintance and I had seen their trucks on the road. Noah and Zach came out, diagnosed the problem quickly and had the pipe replaced in a few hours. I was very happy with their professionalism and found them to be very courteous. I would definitely recommend Domination Plumbing and Heating.

reviews.author: Audrey MacLean
reviews.text: Dominic and his team came highly recommended in our area from Facebook. When we contacted his business for an hvac concern, they came out within 24 hours! Dominic and his team were very friendly, helpful and answered all of my questions and addressed additional concerns I had with my old plumbing. Domination fixed all of hvac and plumbing issues at an affordable/reasonable price. Would use again.

synthesis.summary: They show up fast, fix it right, and don't nickel-and-dime you — but occasionally leave a mess or miss the mark on complex jobs.
strengths: Exceptional emergency response: 12+ reviews explicitly mention same-day or next-morning service for heating/water heater failures, including one customer with a 1-year-old during a cold week where technicians worked until 12:30 AM

Owner involvement and fair pricing: Multiple reviewers note the owner personally calls, offers payment flexibility, and pricing is 'reasonable' or 'not overpriced' compared to competitors; one customer was charged $400 for failed drain work but owner helped negotiate alternatives

Professional crew consistency: Named technicians (George, Jack, Noah, Zach, Scott, Dominic) appear repeatedly in praise; 18+ reviews mention politeness, cleanliness, and thorough explanations of repairs
weaknesses: Incomplete work and collateral damage on complex jobs: 1 review ($400 drain clog) reports unresolved problem plus basement mess from unprotected pipe cutting; 1 review (1/5 stars) mentions crew told customer work was beyond their professionalism level
Diagnostic/estimate-only charges: 1 review (1/5 stars) explicitly complains about being charged just to 'look at' the job with no work performed
redFlags: 2 of 79 Google reviews (2.5%) report incomplete/failed work: 1 drain clog left unclogged after $400 charge plus collateral damage to basement; 1 crew self-reported being unprofessional and unable to complete job
1 of 79 reviews reports diagnostic-only fee with no work authorization or transparency upfront
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple 5-star reviews cite same-day emergency response for no-heat, water heater failure, and main water breaks; one technician worked past midnight to restore heating. No after-hours availability explicitly mentioned in reviews, but speed pattern suggests 24-hour or early-morning dispatch capability.

plumbers.name: Crystal Clear Plumbing
plumbers.address: 820 McArdle Dr, Crystal Lake, IL 60014, USA

reviews.author: Joe How
reviews.text:
Pedro arrived within 1 hour on a Monday morning after I called for a leak investigation. He is very knowledgeable and thoughtful during the troubleshooting process, and quickly identified the source of the leak. Despite it's in a very tight location between walls, Pedro demonstrated his skill and experience by adapting to the situation and fixing the leak. His work is very neat and he kept the site very clean.

Such a good experience with Crystal Clear, and their pricing is reasonable. Will call them again for my future plumbing need.

reviews.author: B McG
reviews.text:
We once again hired Crystal Clear Plumbing when our water heater failed us. Jared and Sonny did a wonderful job! I'm glad we found a plumber that we can trust. They do a great job at a fair price and are very respectful of our home. They also installed our kitchen sink and faucet when we installed new counters, as well as a utility sink in our basement. (See review below) Jared takes time to explain everything he and his crew are doing. We really appreciate him! We love Crystal Clear Plumbing!

We hired Crystal Clear Plumbing to install a kitchen sink and faucet after having countertops installed in our kitchen, as well as a utility sink in our basement. Jared came out to give us an estimate. Crystal Clear's pricing was fair, as we received two other estimates for the work. We liked Jared best right from the start. He explained everything that needed to be done. He showed up when he promised and he treated our home as if it was his. We are so grateful we found Crystal Clear Plumbing. If we ever need anything done with our plumbing I will always call Crystal Clear. And I will definitely request Jared! He has wonderful work ethics. I did meet other members of his team who also seemed nice...Pedro, Scott, and another gentleman, but I can't remember his name. All were very kind. Thank you Jared!

reviews.author: Austin Voeller
reviews.text: Scott & Sonny were great! Came out next day to replace our water heater. We’re quick, efficient and clean. Would recommend Crystal Clear Plumbing!

reviews.author: Kevin Ciganek
reviews.text: Scott did an outstanding job running the new plumbing drain for my kitchen sink. His work is very neat, clean and looks great. He was very efficient with his time and explained everything very well.  He also provided some guidance and advice on a couple other projects that I am looking to do, so that is always nice as well. Pricing was reasonable and I'll definitely use this company again for any gas line or plumbing projects in the future.

reviews.author: Eric B
reviews.text: Great experience with Crystal Clear Plumbing. They replaced our water heater quickly and did a professional job. Efficient and easy to work with and I really appreciated their straightforward, transparent pricing

synthesis.summary: Crystal Clear Plumbing demonstrates excellent reliability with quick response times, including same-day and next-day service. Their technicians are consistently praised for professionalism, cleanliness, and taking time to explain work, making them a solid choice for emergency plumbing needs.
strengths: Fast response times - arrived within 1 hour for emergency leak
Highly skilled technicians who explain work clearly
Consistently clean and respectful of customer homes
weaknesses: 24-hour availability unclear from reviews
Limited sample of emergency scenarios
synthesis.topQuote: Pedro arrived within 1 hour on a Monday morning after I called for a leak investigation. He is very knowledgeable and thoughtful during the troubleshooting process, and quickly identified the source of the leak.

plumbers.name: Plumbing Masters LLC
plumbers.address: 5300 N Meridian Ave Suite 7, Oklahoma City, OK 73112, USA

reviews.author: Detailz Barbershop
reviews.text: I had an emergency DIY repair underneath my sink this morning and I couldn't get it to stop leaking. I found this company on Google they came right out within an hour or so fix the issue and also replaced another valve I was intending to work on and did it at a real decent rate! Now I have them on the schedule to come back Monday to replace my main water line valve inside my house! I was definitely pleased with my first experience with this company! I wish I knew the guy's name they told me he was the general manager that did the job! He deserves a raise 😊! These are pictures of before and after and of the main water valve that will be replaced Monday.

reviews.author: Greyson
reviews.text: Will and Malcolm were excellent. Quick response time and diligent service. Repair was completed the same day. 10/10, will contact Plumbing Masters LLC for my future needs.

reviews.author: Dylan Smith
reviews.text: Plumbing Masters LLC was able to squeeze me in earlier than expected! Malcum was punctual, friendly and knowledgeable. The price was reasonable and they gave me a 10% teacher discount. It's hard to beat local businesses supporting our educators like that! Highly recommend Plumbing Masters LLC for anyone, but especially teachers!

reviews.author: Robert Lee
reviews.text:
I had a clogged drain and Plumbing Masters was my first call. Immediately from the first call
I was in good hands, Jasmine was so sweet and understanding. I got scheduled and had Chiconas out quickly. Not only were Malcom and Troy professional, they were courteous! They had me taken care of and even cleaned up after themselves. It’s hard to find an honest reliable company but this place hits the mark. Thanks Plumbing masters for doing quality work!

reviews.author: Indira Cannon
reviews.text:
The best. I had a nightmare leak and they seriously worked through it like champs. Made sure that cabinets didn’t have to be torn out (which other companies immediately wanted to do) and just very patient. Shout out to Malcom. I’m sorry I turned the water on and you ended up getting soaked. Steve and Alfredo!
Recommend this company 100/100

synthesis.summary: Plumbing Masters LLC demonstrates excellent emergency response with customers reporting service within an hour and same-day repairs. Their technicians are consistently described as professional, knowledgeable, and courteous, with multiple reviews highlighting their problem-solving abilities and honest approach.
weaknesses: Limited sample size of detailed reviews
synthesis.topQuote: I had an emergency DIY repair underneath my sink this morning and I couldn't get it to stop leaking. I found this company on Google they came right out within an hour or so fix the issue and also replaced another valve I was intending to work on and did it at a real decent rate!

plumbers.name: Titan Plumbing & Drain Services
plumbers.address: 1830 Wallace Ave STE 217, St. Charles, IL 60174, USA

reviews.author: Jessie Zepeda
reviews.text: Absolutely wonderful we are happy with Titan. We were pretty much in a jam not only one clog. We had three clogs in our master bedroom and our kitchen and in our laundry room. I know nothing about Plumbing or how to find somebody so I went on the Internet. I found about 10 plumbers and I checked for reviews, after talking to a few plumbers some of them absolutely were scared to work at my home so that terrified me and my wife we didn’t think we’re gonna find any Plumber since we had an old home, wow when I got to tighten I told him I need somebody very experience they sent out Dave, not only did he make us feel calm and cool. He said will be able to do the job. He didn’t turn it down. He actually went over everything with the Plumbing with us and sat down with us and told us what it was our option we said let’s just get it all done so he came on a Saturday not only did he fix one room, but he was able to fix all three rooms my laundry room, my master bedroom and my kitchen. Our plumbing is running great better than before and trust me. Our pipes were really bad so I wanna take Titan and Dave especially for helping us out when we really need them not only do I recommend them. They’re the only people we’re gonna use for our Plumbing trust me if I can give them 10 stars I will let me tell you this they’re pricing was unbelievable. We can afford it. Me and my wife are on a budget. Tighten worked with us. He went over every job and how much it was gonna be. I appreciate that.

reviews.author: Michael Trejo
reviews.text: Out of the 4 places I called this morning they were the only ones that had a person actually pick up the phone. Schedule a service call for the afternoon but I was able to finally unclog my toilet. I called the cancel and it was smooth with no pressure for them to still come out. If I ever have a plumbing issue I will be coming to Titan.

reviews.author: Timo Lyons
reviews.text: Titan always delivers. I went down to my basement New Year’s Eve and found my hot water heater leaking. A quick call to Titan and they had a plumber out to my place within 2 hours and a new water heater installed shortly after. They were professional, tidy and skilled. I highly recommend these guy!!

reviews.author: matt trinidad
reviews.text: Worked with titan plumbing since we moved into the house and they have been amazing. Recently added a clean out since out house didn’t have one and it’s made fixing any plumbing problems a breeze. david was on site doing amazing work and thoroughly explained the issue and what the options are. Pam was great at coordinating any updates that would come up and wanted to make sure that my plumbing problems were no more. highly recommend.

reviews.author: Janice Holland
reviews.text: Titan came out quickly when our sump pump went out. Lou was very professional and answered all our questions. He gave us all our options and the prices so we could choose the sump pump we wanted. Many plumbers just give one option, and that’s what they install. That is what our old plumber did. Lou patiently trained an apprentice plumber that day, even though they were very busy. Lou came back again to install a new backup pump and used a special camera to check our drain tile which also needs work. It was backing up during the heavy rain. This is a really good plumbing company. I would definitely use them again. The company we always used told us to get someone else because they were too busy that day due to heavy rains. Titan is so helpful and cares about the quality of service they provide to their customers.

synthesis.summary: Titan Plumbing delivers exceptional emergency service with rapid response times, including New Year's Eve water heater replacement within 2 hours. Their experienced technicians handle complex jobs other plumbers won't take, provide multiple options with transparent pricing, and maintain excellent communication throughout the process.
strengths: Exceptional emergency response (2-hour service on holidays)
Takes on complex jobs other plumbers refuse
Transparent pricing with multiple options provided
weaknesses: Limited sample size of reviews to assess consistency
synthesis.topQuote: A quick call to Titan and they had a plumber out to my place within 2 hours and a new water heater installed shortly after. They were professional, tidy and skilled.

plumbers.name: Morning Noon Night Plumbing & Sewer
plumbers.address: 8557 44th St, Lyons, IL 60534, USA

reviews.author: Kara Lyons
reviews.text: Marco came out to help with a leak we had from our primarily bathroom going through to our living room. He was super informative about his time of arrival, the issues we were having, and helped us walk through next steps with a mold remediation company. Marco was super mindful of cost and collaborative with our other contractors. His expertise and empathy were very much appreciated during this stressful time.

reviews.author: Londell Thomas
reviews.text: We've been dealing with a clogged kitchen sink in our garden apartment for years. We contacted morning noon and night for a permanent solution and Christian and Marco had one. The service was great as was the attention to detail. I recommend this company to anyone!

reviews.author: Joe Mark
reviews.text:
Christian came out for an emergency call at 9:00 pm for a sink that was backing up from a main line in our condo building.
He rodded out the drain line and fixed some other small repairs. We were happy with his work and would recommend him to anyone looking for a good plumber.

reviews.author: Stefvanni Steans
reviews.text: Excellent service! They came out so fast and were very knowledgeable! Marco and Christian were very professional and didn’t mind when my dad wanted to help out! If you’re ever in a pinch give them a call! Very transparent with pricing and extremely helpful!

reviews.author: Wayne S
reviews.text:
Second time I’ve used them in the last year. Can’t say enough about the professionalism and good service. TJ came out to hone me an estimate on what I thought I needed, and me gave me some better options through diagnosing before doing the big job I thought I needed.
He spent time explaining his process and the reasoning for it. I went with his suggestions and it generally fixed my issues without going for the big $ project. Strongly appreciate his explanations, professionalism and work he did. And he saved me money in the long run. Definitely recommend Morning Noon and Night plumbing.

synthesis.summary: Morning Noon Night Plumbing consistently delivers professional emergency service with technicians like Marco, Christian, and TJ who are knowledgeable, transparent about pricing, and genuinely care about finding cost-effective solutions. Multiple reviews highlight their reliability for urgent situations and their ability to work collaboratively with other contractors during stressful times.
weaknesses: Limited sample size of recent reviews
No negative feedback to assess problem resolution
bestFor: drain cleaning and main line issues
synthesis.topQuote: TJ came out to give me an estimate on what I thought I needed, and he gave me some better options through diagnosing before doing the big job I thought I needed. He spent time explaining his process and the reasoning for it... And he saved me money in the long run.

plumbers.name: Air Man Heating, Cooling & Plumbing (Air Management Services Inc)
plumbers.address: 1030 Greenlee St, Marengo, IL 60152, USA

reviews.author: Robert Koehler
reviews.text:
I had a fantastic experience with the team for my new AC and whole-home humidifier installation. They also installed a smart thermostat for me and took the time to make sure I was comfortable using it before they left. From the initial booking to the completion of the project, the entire process was seamless.
The crew was professional, arrived right on schedule, and did an incredible job cleaning up, you wouldn’t even have known they were there. It’s rare to find such high-quality service, technical expertise, and genuine attention to detail. I am thrilled with how the new system is running and would highly recommend them to anyone in the Woodstock, IL area looking for high-quality HVAC work.

reviews.author: Crystal Levy
reviews.text: I recently had some home improvements done, including a new water heater in the bathroom vent/light installation and I couldn’t be happier with the experience from start to finish. The team was outstanding Rosa who scheduled everything was incredibly helpful, kind and flexible. She made the whole process, smooth and stress-free. Every crew member who came to my home was professional, courteous, and respectful. They worked efficiently answered all my questions and made sure everything was done right the quality of the work exceeded my expectations and I felt completely comfortable having them in my home.  The entire crew was fantastic! I Highly recommend this group to anyone looking for reliable high-quality home service they made the process easy and the results speak for themselves

reviews.author: Areil Eckardt
reviews.text:
Amazing. 10 out of 10!!
Bought a new water heater and had it installed today. Andy and Asa showed up just after 8:30 am and were done by 11:15am.
Let me tell you, I was dealt the dream team! They were so professional, friendly and personable.
We just bought our townhouse and only rented prior so I guess you could say this was my first rodeo "Adulting". I didn't know what to expect and they made the whole process feel so seamless. I highly recommend this company and these techs for all your heating, cooling, and plumbing needs.
Its inevitable that I will need their services again in the future. I will 1000% be calling them first!

reviews.author: Philip Smith
reviews.text: We use AirMan because their team is knowledgeable and professional. They maintain both our ac and baseboard heat/boiler.  Most recently they addressed an issue with our high efficiency heater was whistling. The team stayed highly engaged while resolving the issue and kept us informed. I would definitely recommend them.

reviews.author: Luna Moon
reviews.text: Joe and Jose did a lovely job! Quick, courteous, and professional. Rosa in the office is so nice! An absolutely pleasant experience to set up an appointment. These vents were so gross but after Airman cleaned them, I'm confident my allergies and health will improve dramatically! 10/10 will hire again.

synthesis.summary: Air Man Heating, Cooling & Plumbing shows exceptional professionalism and quality work across HVAC and plumbing services with a 4.9/5 rating from 306 reviews. Customers consistently praise their punctuality, cleanliness, and technical expertise, making them a reliable choice for emergency plumbing needs.
strengths: Thorough cleanup and attention to detail
Knowledgeable technicians who explain work clearly
weaknesses: Limited negative feedback to assess potential issues
Pricing information not mentioned in reviews
synthesis.topQuote: They were so professional, friendly and personable. We just bought our townhouse and only rented prior so I guess you could say this was my first rodeo 'Adulting'. I didn't know what to expect and they made the whole process feel so seamless.

plumbers.name: Thomas E Clark Inc
plumbers.address: 2412 Linden Ln, Silver Spring, MD 20910, USA

reviews.author: Steve Z
reviews.text: Had a plumbing issue come up @ 6:30 pm and put in a semi-emergency call. Had D from Thomas Clark at the house in 2 hours and the problem was efficiently solved. Will definitely use them again! It was expensive but excellent quality and almost IMMEDIATE response!!!

reviews.author: Matt Dellinger
reviews.text: This company came highly recommended from my realtor. Easily the best plumbing experience I’ve had. Efren is very skilled at his craft and went above and beyond.

reviews.author: Graham Hacche
reviews.text: Prompt and excellent emergency service.

reviews.author: Kim
reviews.text: I was away on a work trip Mon - Fri morning. Upon my return, I found whoever serviced my apartment used my bathroom (without asking my room mate who was home at the time), peed in my toilet, did not flush and left the seat up. Given that the service was done on a Wednesday morning and I did not return until Friday, the smell in my bathroom was absolutely rancid. Coming home to someone else’s bodily fluids in my bathroom is DISGUSTING. I would also like to note there are communal bathrooms in my complex that he/she could have used.

reviews.author: Comply in the Nations Capitol
reviews.text: We had the misfortune to scheduling a quote to replace our heat pump system from Thomas E Clark today.  Maybe the sales person woke up on the wrong side of the bed but it was a disaster from the word “GO”.  The sales person did not want to assess our current system, take measurements and understand our expectations for a new system.  He thought it was more important to lecture my wife on our current broken Trane system.  He wanted to vent about the lack of availability of Carrier products during the transition in refrigerants.  Frankly, we just don’t have the time, bandwidth or professional expertise to deal with mental illness in folks posing as sales professionals.  The salesman walked out because my wife did not want to hear about the virtues or lack thereof of a broken heat pump system.  On the way out I could hear him taunting my wife. Thomas E Clark your sales person was unprofessional but we are happy to have experienced this because we would have hated to have dropped $20k on a new heat pump system only to find out that your company do not respect its customers.  So thanks for helping us dodge the proverbial bullet.  UPDATE: Yes, Kate P. we do have examples. The attached image is an excerpt from the contract  for the existing heat pump system that we are seeking to replace.  As you can see the SEER rating is listed as “18”.  This is what we contracted for in 2012 and this is what we believe we received. We have no reason to doubt our signed contract. The “wanna be” hotshot HVAC salesman from Thomas E Clark mocked my wife for repeating what is stated on our contract, that our current system is rated as 18 SEER—which is not unreasonable from where I sit.  The salesman insisted that the existing system is 16 SEER and not 18.  There was no cause for the salesman who came out to give an estimate for a new system to address the old contract or her understanding of an old contract.  The ego or mental illness (or whatever) of the salesman would not allow him to let the issue go after being asked repeatedly to do so.  The salesman became undone and refused to complete the estimate arguing and taunting my wife on the way off our property, striking the heat pump for good measure.  And Kate P. , Jake from John C Flood told my wife when he made his pitch during the quote process the previous week that the new refrigerant R-454B contains propane.  When she stated this the salesman he all but called her an idiot stating that no propane is in the new refrigerant.  Again, the salesman could have just told the wife to look it up herself instead of dressing her down and getting angry and lashing out at her.  So, Kate P here are the examples of the unprofessionalism of the Thomas E Clark salesman.

reviews.author: Parker Goodfellow
reviews.text:
Thank you Thomas E Clark and DCDOE and their Lead Pipe Replacement Assistance Program (LPRAP).

With funding through DDOE LPRAP program we were finally able to get the last piece of lead out of our incoming water system.

Thomas E Clark answered our request for service promptly, sent out a project manager to confirm that we were in fact eligible for the LPRAP, received approval from DDOE to perform the work, applied for and received all permits, and performed the water line replacement all within the span of 3 weeks. From initial call to the water line being replaced.

Their crew was on time, courteous, and explain the process in exacting detail, giving us milestones for when we could expect the water to be turned off and turn back on as the line was replaced. Their house call Pro scheduling app made it very easy to communicate with the project manager as well as the technicians, and provided real-time tracking of their location and eta through the house call Pro app.

I'm very thankful to Thomas E Clark and the LPRAP program for providing this service to the District of Columbia residents.

I remember a time in DC when Department of Health came to houses that had young children and tested them for lead, I was one of those kids.

The water may taste a little less sweet after today! But at least my kids won't have to deal with this lead problem in the future. What a wonderful program.

reviews.author: Kelly Johnson
reviews.text:
The team, led by Daz, did a phenomenal job. They exceeded my expectations on all fronts:  professionalism, communication, efficiency, quality, reliability and cleanliness. Plus the team was very friendly and worked very well together as a team. Very nice people.

On day one Daz called me to give a ‘heads up’ that he was on his way to arrive in 30 minutes, as planned. They organized in advance a ‘no parking zone’ in front of our house. Miguel, a T&C plumbing manager, joined the team and walked me through the work plan step by step. He and Daz explained what would be happening each day including measures to protect carpet, furniture and personal items from the drilling, and the removal / replacement of pavers and replacing grass in the front garden, which I really appreciated.

There was no need for me to stick around and oversee the work since I was confident that I was in good hands.

Daz sent me photos of each step from confirming the dug up connector pipe was indeed lead, to pics of the interior space wrapped in plastic up to the ceiling, holes dug in boiler room and external basement entryway, and final shots of copper pipes and refilled cement patches.

The team did the work in stages efficiently, starting at 9.15 am and ending around 1-2 pm each day. Passed the inspection in the morning on 3rd day.

I highly recommend Thomas & Clark with no hesitations.

reviews.author: Toney Redmond
reviews.text: I was approved by DOEE (DC Govt.) for the Lead Pipe Replacement Assistance Program (LPRAP). No out-of-pocket cost for DC residents once approved. From the list of approved plumbers I chose Thomas E. Clark, Inc. (TEC, Inc.). They responded immediately and had a rep. come out the same day for an inspection and proposal (btw receptionist was very friendly and knowledgeable). TEC, Inc. worked with DC DPW, DDOT and DOB for permits and scheduling (total wait time was a little over 30 days from initial contact).  I didn't have to do anything but sign a couple of emails.  Pipe replacement was done today and took only 4 hours to complete.  Work looks great, clean job. TEC, Inc. guys were very friendly, professional (worked well with DPW who were also on site) and took precautions not to make a mess (inside and out). They cleaned up any little mess that was made and left my home as if they had never come. They kept me informed during the entire process letting me know when the water would be off, for how long and when they expected to be finished with the work. Scope of work is detailed in the proposal which may include cosmetic repairs such as drywall, grass seeds, mulch etc., if applicable (which is done on 2nd day upon completion of DC inspection).  I highly recommend this company. Excellent customer service from start to finish!!!

reviews.author: Joseph Perry
reviews.text:
I want to commend the team you sent to my house on Sept 3, 2024 to help me satisfy DC's Lead Pipe Replacement Assistance Program (LPRAP) requirements. Daz Carter, Kevon Carter, and Marcel Ramos demonstrated all the qualities that give me a great customer experience. They arrived at the time we had scheduled, were courteous and, professional. Most importantly, they thoroughly understood the intricacies of the LPRAP and were able to explain it to me in non-technical terms. Fortunately, after several hours of back-breaking excavation, we found as it turned out, the water service pipes going into my house were copper, not lead, so we didn't have to replace them!  After several more hours they replaced the dirt and mulch in the flower garden in the front on my house so it looked like they had never been disturbed.

I hope you can find some way to recognize Daz, Kevon, and Marcel. They are great ambassadors of Thomas E. Clark and I can certainly understand why your company has been in business for so many years and why your outstanding reputation precedes you.

reviews.author: Sameer Raheja
reviews.text:
TLDR: Good but very expensive.
