We had changed the floor plan significantly, added multiple bathrooms, an additional kitchen, a pantry with a sink, a main-floor laundry room, and ended up with five bathrooms total. They also jetted our main sewer line, which helped us avoid having to jackhammer the slab — a huge win.

They recommended and replaced our water heater, repaired and replaced gas lines as needed, and even ran new gas lines to our 60-year-old fireplace. Their recommendations were greatly appreciated, and the quality of work was excellent. They also reccomended ways we could save on cost which is a really big deal when you have to do that much remodeling.

Out of every contractor involved in our remodel, Paramount Plumbing was the only one who showed up every day, on time, and completed their work efficiently, timely and correctly. They took the time to do things the right way, and it genuinely felt like they cared about the quality and long-term reliability of their work.

We built a large custom shower with four independent fixtures, and they executed it perfectly. I sleep better at night knowing the plumbing was done right.

They were also the only contractor on our entire project who passed county inspection quickly and without issues. After the challenges we faced with other trades, Eric, Aiden, and Ferman from Paramount were the best part of our remodel experience.

Highly recommend the guys at Paramount.

reviews.author: Jenna Baadshaug
reviews.text:
I am the property manager of a Condominium Association in Atlanta. About a year ago, the association determined that a change was needed regarding the building plumber. A Board Member and I initially met with Nick to tour the building and review its complex plumbing system. Since that time, Nick has served as the primary building plumber, and I truly cannot say enough positive things about him.

Nick is consistently prompt, professional, and clear in his communication. He always takes the extra time—often an additional 5–10 minutes—to thoroughly explain issues and solutions in a way that is easy to understand, which is incredibly valuable when working with Boards and homeowners.

Most recently, the association experienced a significant pipe burst. I immediately contacted Paramount Plumbing, and Nick was on-site within an hour. Upon arriving around 9:00 PM, he quickly assessed the situation and took immediate action. He worked diligently until nearly 5:00 AM, without complaint, ensuring the repairs were completed properly.

Throughout the entire process, Nick kept both me and the Board President fully informed. His calm demeanor, professionalism, and exceptional communication were instrumental in managing a very stressful situation.
I highly recommend Nick and Paramount Plumbing and am extremely grateful for the level of service, dedication, and reliability they consistently provide.

reviews.author: cherry publicity
reviews.text: BEWARE IF YOU HAVE A WATER LEAK OR GARBAGE DISPOSAL CLOG ! DO NOT HIRE PARAMOUNT PLUMBING HAS NO PLUMBERS FOR EMERGENCY PLUMBING PROBLEMS! FOR THE RECORD  my garbage disposal is not working! nasty dirty water stuff pop up on both my sinks! i called paramount plumbing -on Thursday AUG 15 2024 AGAIN Friday morning - plumber can come Monday AUG  19 2024 mans  4 days my garbage disposal is not draining so 4 days i cannot wash dishes?? BAD BUSINSS PRACTICE OF PARAMOUNT PLUMBING DOES NOT HAVE PLUMBERS TO FIX DO NOT RELY ON PARAMOUNT PLUMBING  IF PEOPLE HAVE A WATER LEAK MAKES YOU WAIT 4 DAYS  PARAMOUNT PLUMBING  TO FIX PLUMBING PROBLEMS!  what kind of plumbing company can only work weekdays???  google other plumbing companies work 24/7 for plumbing emergency! DO NOT HIRE PARAMOUNT PLUMBING was hired to fix PRV VALVE  they did not have enough PRV VALVES if paramount was told 400 prv valves - a good plumbing company should have been ready with enough prv valves! it was a nightmare plumbing job!

reviews.author: Dmitry Ponomarenko
reviews.text:
GREAT company!!! Especially, Nick. (I hope I remembered his name correctly).

I needed to have a 50 gallon water heater installed. (A different company told me it was not possible). Nick from Paramount came by, looked at the job, and said “no problem”.

What I appreciated most about Nick and Paramount (outside of getting the job done) was their honesty, professionalism, efficiency, and punctuality.

I had a unique situation where I needed to time this job perfectly. That was dependent / contigent on Nick arriving on time and finishing the job when he said he would. That is exactly what happened.

So, if you value good work ethic, punctuality, professionalism, and knowledgeable technicians who can think outside the box and not afraid of difficult assignments then ask for Nick from Paramount.

I truly believe, Nick is a rare type of worker / man. As the saying goes “his word is his bond” (just my humble opinion based on my experience).

reviews.author: Laura Thompson
reviews.text:
HIGHLY RECOMMEND - Overdue review as I've used this company for over 1.5yrs -  it's a hard world of "who can you trust" yet Paramount Plumbing is the best. I've been extremely pleased by their professionalism, expertise and overall kindness in handling one emergency, and a few service issues.

Fermin uncovered and fixed an HVAC blockage that SLAM Plumbing recommended I spend $1000 and go into the wall to "fix" but wasn't sure if would fix it or not. Unreal.

Fermin and Jason deserve special shout out and recognition for their overall knowledge, expertise and how they helped in the various situations.

Thank you all for being easy to schedule with, quick to action (at least in my experience), great to work with, trustworthy, and overall fantastic company!

reviews.author: Dee S.
reviews.text: The most unprofessional plumber I have ever worked with. None of the workers spoke English which wouldn't be a problem except they could not answer questions about the work taking place in my home. When they completed the sump pump install, they didn't test it to ensure it was plugged in and I flooded my home the very first night I moved in. The owner came after hours to pump it out for us but was rude, clearly inconvenienced, bothered, and yelled at me. The sump pump they installed for me was a refurbished unit that they did not disclose to me. It broke 11 months after install. The absolute worst experience I have ever had. I would never recommend this company, ever.

reviews.author: Charles Shores
reviews.text: I'm late on posting this but late last year I had an issue sewage backing up in my down stairs bathroom. Had three other so call plumbers come out and tell me that the sewer line would have to be replaced. Two of the people never step foot on the property. Mat showed up spent a couple of hours inspecting and diagnosing the concern. He sent a camra down the drain and e-mailed the video to me. Needless to say but only needed the sewer line under the house to be out. Much respect for honesty and integrity. Will definitely call them with all my plumbing needs in the future.

reviews.author: shannon sweat
reviews.text: Working with Paramount Plumbing is always an excellent experience. I have had the pleasure of working with them through my job for 10+ years now and have confidently referred them to many others over the years. The high level of quality work and professionalism has remained consistent the entire time.  Most recently I hired them to do a job for me, personally. Nick and Aiden replaced the water heater in my condo, and I could not be more pleased with the job.  I have always been a big cheerleader for this team and will continue to be.  Thanks guys!

reviews.author: Michael Brown
reviews.text: Paramount Plumbing handled a complex water service line issuefor me. There was some confusion at one point as 2 Paramount plumbers reached different conclusions on separate visits. The owner Eric stepped in personally to diagnose the issue and work through the evolving options in detail, which I greatly appreciated. I had a very good experience with Paramount overall. A special shout-out goes to Nick, whose professionalism, expertise, customer service, and dedication to problem-solving shined throughout the project.

synthesis.summary: They're great most of the time with skilled technicians like Nick and Fermin, but a few customers got hit with surprise charges and scheduling delays during emergencies.
strengths: Exceptional technician consistency: Nick, Fermin, Sosa, and Jason are named repeatedly across 40+ reviews for professionalism, honesty, and problem-solving expertise
BBB A+ accreditation with zero complaints over 3 years and 15 years in business signals institutional reliability
Diagnostic thoroughness: Multiple reviewers (water line, sewer line, leak detection) praise video documentation and honest assessment that avoided unnecessary major work
weaknesses: Emergency response gaps: 1 reviewer waited 4 days for garbage disposal repair (Thu-Mon); another complained about exorbitant undisclosed after-hours rates

Billing disputes on major jobs: 3 reviewers (tankless water heater, water heater replacement, detailed estimate) report surprise price increases, unclear breakdowns, and difficulty reaching owner Eric to resolve before payment

Yelp red flag (2022): Single 1-star review alleges language barrier, sump pump not tested before delivery, refurbished equipment sold as new, and rude owner response—contradicts otherwise professional profile
redFlags: Scheduling delays on emergencies: 1 reviewer reported 4-day wait (Thu–Mon) for garbage disposal backup during peak need window
Surprise billing on major jobs: 3 separate reviewers report price increases post-estimate or bundled charges not broken down by labor/material/tax despite request
Owner accessibility: Multiple reviewers report difficulty reaching Eric; customer service manager stated owner 'does not deal with customers,' creating escalation barrier
Undisclosed after-hours pricing: 1 reviewer called after-hours unaware of exorbitant markup, company did not quote rate before repair

Yelp credibility gap: Single 2022 Yelp review alleges non-English-speaking crew, untested equipment, refurbished unit sold as new, and rude owner response—stark contrast to 97 Google 5-stars, suggesting possible review platform or timeline quality shift
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple after-hours calls answered successfully (Nick called at midnight, Sosa at 7:45 AM), but one reviewer explicitly warned against relying on them for 4-day emergency delays and another flagged surprise after-hours pricing not disclosed upfront.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Extreme: 4.9/5 (97 Google reviews, 2023–2026) vs. 1/5 (1 Yelp review, 2022). The 2022 Yelp review alleges untested equipment and rude service; all 97 Google reviews post-2023 praise professionalism. Timeline suggests possible service quality improvement, staff changes, or review platform bias. Discrepancy warrants caution on major jobs and advance communication.

plumbers.name: J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
plumbers.address: 2390 Esplanade Dr #200f, Algonquin, IL 60102, USA

reviews.author: Amanda J P Dunakin
reviews.text: Edgar (main plumber and contact), Johnny and Colten (excavators), and the team who installed the pipe lining for us (Liam and Richard) were all amazing! We had an emergency sewer overflow with a hole in our pipe and a blockage. They fixed it, helped us understand what was happening and why, and were able to help us navigate some additional preventative sewer lining to save us from a much bigger disaster down the road. They were friendly, and when offering services they didn't put pressure on us to say yes. We would definitely recommend the team at J. Blanton!

reviews.author: Jerome Austriaco
reviews.text: Scott was great with educating me on possible sewage issues - fortunately, none - and found that we needed other maintenance that he was able to help with. Their “unclogs for dogs” program illustrates the character of this company…

reviews.author: Alexis Black
reviews.text: I recently had a great experience with J Blanton! I called to have them check out a possible small gas leak (not an emergency). They were able to send someone that week. My inspector, Jacob, was very friendly and knowledgeable and presented different options as we made a service plan for the following day. My technician who performed the work, Welhem (Will), was awesome. He did great work, explained everything, and answered all of my questions. This is the first time I have worked with the company, and based on my experience I highly recommend them. Thank you!

reviews.author: Alexis Farrar
reviews.text: Lou is such a great worker. Found the problem with my shower and went great lengths to make sure everything was perfect/fixed and to my satisfaction before leaving. Lou is very knowledgeable and such a pleasant person. I am grateful he was able to fix my shower. Ask for Lou if you need any work done from this company.

reviews.author: Sandra Shore
reviews.text: Scott evaluated all our plumbing repair needs and provided a cost estimate. He did a good job explaining why the repairs are important and necessary. Scott was friendly and easy to work with answering all our questions.

synthesis.summary: J. Blanton Plumbing demonstrates excellent technical expertise and customer service with knowledgeable technicians who educate customers and provide multiple repair options. They successfully handle emergency situations like sewer overflows and have 24-hour availability, making them a reliable choice for urgent plumbing needs.
weaknesses: Limited sample size of reviews
No pricing information mentioned
synthesis.topQuote: We had an emergency sewer overflow with a hole in our pipe and a blockage. They fixed it, helped us understand what was happening and why, and were able to help us navigate some additional preventative sewer lining to save us from a much bigger disaster down the road. They were friendly, and when offering services they didn't put pressure on us to say yes.

plumbers.name: The Neighborly Plumber
plumbers.address: 3655 James Rd Suite 100, Acworth, GA 30102, USA

reviews.author: Stephanie Pagano
reviews.text: Very last minute need.  Gentleman showed up on time as stated, got the work done quickly and off he went!!!  This was the 2nd day in a row we used The Professional Plumber.  Will be our "Go-To"!

reviews.author: Albertina Wilson
reviews.text: Assigned thru Angi. On time, very efficient and professional. Dustin my professional had Jacob in training and to watch them and hear the recommendations was awesome.  Nice team! I will use them again for sure!

reviews.author: Johanna Stanley
reviews.text: Great service! Parker and his cousin did a fenomenal job 🤩 I highly recommend them

reviews.author: The Crawfords
reviews.text: Called to have a toilet reseated with new wax ring. Tech stated talking about cutting holes in my ceiling. Price was over $400. I would never hire them. Particularly the tech that came out for the repair.

reviews.author: Warren Lamar
reviews.text: Yes, everything went well. In-N-Out no problems. Three weeks later, I called the neighborly, Plumbing, Dustin again because I had the same leak from the same Apex pipe and he wanted to charge me for a new leak which I didn’t think was fair when I call he said oh that Apex is old and that’s a new leak and it will cost a little over $400 I had already paid him the first time $290 so I told him that I don’t need his service anymore because I think it was very unfair for him to charge me and didn’t advise me that that section was old and all he had to do is replace that section altogether instead of putting a coupling in it so be aware hiring their services  Dustin was a rip off

reviews.author: Mike B.
reviews.text:
Scott, Tanner, and Dustin of PROFESSIONAL PLUMBER were simply outstanding.  They arrived to the job precisely on time and ready to work.  Everyone was professional, easy-going, and friendly.  I had three different plumbing projects, two of them major. 

At every step, they explained what was going on.  I could see the work being done with exacting care and each step was laid out so I could understand what they were doing and why.  They completely fixed a major water leak and replumbed the pipes in the basement ceiling to perfection.  Beautiful work.  All overhead.  In an hour. 

They worked quickly but with great care as they knocked out the next issue.  A major foundation leak.  Fixed.  Pressure tested.  Not a drop anywhere. 

They spent the rest of the day replacing a sewer main.  Their work was again done with great care.  Friendly, but no fooling around.  They fixed every problem in a single day.  Skill, knowledge, and caring together are a powerful combination. 

I have used three other local plumbers before and was not pleased.  I am happy to give PROFESSIONAL PLUMBER my top rating.  They got it done and done right.  Thank you!

reviews.author: Marc Rosen
reviews.text: The service was excellent, the timing was perfect.  But, the billing which I agreed to was a gross ripoff.  I discovered that the pump was available at Home Depot for $259. That would be 2 hours labor for $800.00  What the hell!  I have filed a claim with Angie.  I did not know what the repair would cost and I knew more rain was on the way.  I guess the individual who did the work was making $400/hour!  Not a chance in hell.  I do mind paying for service, but I was RIPPED OFF.  Professional Plumbing will never be back.  I will let everyone know the situation and I would hope Angie cancels your listing.  This was HIGHWAY ROBBERY.  In fact your workman could use the money for his son's upcoming and periodic surgery.  I know damn well he will get his usual rate of pay which as sure as Jesus knows, was with an unfair and totally inconsiderate payment.  Thanks for the robbery by UNPROFESSIONAL plumbing.

reviews.author: Sarah-Grace Hyche
reviews.text:
Incredible experience with The Neighborly Plumber. Just had emergency shut off valves, connections to fixtures, and a toilet replaced today.
They were communicative, punctual, and
I loved that they explained the rationale behind different recommendations and offered a variety of options for solutions.
The services were competitively priced.  They went above and beyond in terms of customer service throughout the process, fixing a few additional problems that came up as well - I came out of my office and our second toilet (which had started leaking all over the floor but wasn’t on the list for them to worry about) was fixed.
The two plumbers were thorough and efficient with their work, and left the space cleaner than it was when they arrived.
We will absolutely use them again in the future!

reviews.author: Brooke Carpenter
reviews.text: They made a stressful situation a lot LESS STRESSFUL,I am very pleased with this plumbing company. We had to replace our main water line, and they were fast to give a FREE ESTIMATE, they were so much friendlier than the other companies we contacted, and ended up being $1100 less than the other!  Jessica in customer service is amazing. She took time to explain the process, answer all of our questions no matter the time. I felt comfortable knowing that they were genuinely trying to help us instead of selling us something we didn’t need, the same courtesy was offered from the technician that came out. They got it fixed within two days, and only took three hours to do the complete job. I will definitely be using this company again. 10 stars if I could!

reviews.author: Latisse Taylor
reviews.text:
Awesome experience! A new water heater was well over due, but we were holding on until the wheels fell off. Well, they fell off and The Neighborly Plumber (James and Nephew) was there to assist. Received a total of seven quotes and this company won the bid... reasonable pricing, amazing customer service, and very down to earth. An added plus for us is this is a family-owned company... so we were not being sold on things we did not need.

Install had a very quick turn-around... same day. Now, we have hot water and do not have to wait 5 minutes; 26 year old water heaters take a while to heat the water...LOL.  We'll utilize this company in the future due to this awesome experience. 👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽👏🏽

reviews.author: Ms. Smith
reviews.text: The Cooper family is extremely happy with the service of the professional plumbers. In less than a week I was able to set up an appointment and get my pipe fixed! The team was super friendly, informative, effective, & efficient!!!! I am so happy 😁 my warranty company is partnered with them. By far the fastest I’ve seen a claim opened and closed so quickly. For sure I will use them in the future if I have any other plumbing issues. This team is A1! From Jessica the office assistant to the crew that showed up to the house I am pleased with everybody!!! Thank you again to the professional plumbers for making this a quick and painless process!!!!!

reviews.author: Nanc Aget
reviews.text:
I was very pleased wirh James and his team  His knowledge and commitment to help me and my family get through this hurdle was more than a blessing. Not only did he go over and beyond . The circumstances were not easy for all, despite the stress, freezing weather conditions and time constraints, he showed up on time and fixed our urgent issue! From the beginning James and Jessica really helped me and I will never forget it.
I will definitely continue to call him and cant refer him enough! Thanks so much for your careful knowledge 🙏
Im not sure if we overpaid but they were tg3 only ones that came out and repaired and replaced in a timely manner.

reviews.author: Arthur Southwick
reviews.text: My first time using Angi to find anybody, and I was very pleased with my choice of plumbers.  Despite the young age of the plumbers, I was impressed with their knowledge, skills, and customer service, which is a big concern of mine.  They granted a 15% senior discount, which is always appreciated, and they didn't mind my looking over their shoulder and asking questions, which is also appreciated.  Price?  I don't know if I overpaid or not because they were the only contractor I talked to, so there's no one else to compare with.  Would I recommend this contractor?  Yes, with no doubt about the recommendation.

reviews.author: Melissa Whitley
reviews.text: I wanted to jump on here and give some praise to The Professional Plumber. I had to reach out on my community page for recommendations and they were highly recommended and didn’t disappoint! Jessica in dispatch answered my call on a Sunday morning. She was very knowledgeable and told me that an emergency visit wasn’t needed.  She got me on their schedule the following day! Lee Blackburn came out to evaluate. He completed the job this morning after warranty parts arrived.  Job was completed in a timely manner and pricing was fair. 5 out of 5 stars for the company and Lee!

reviews.author: Allen Irwin
reviews.text: Our kitchen drain had been clogged for a couple days, after attempting to remedy the situation our selfs we called Professional Plumbing late in the afternoon. They jumped right on the call, and was at the house in under an hour. Problem was diagnosed, tech ran to the store for the part we needed, and replaced it. Some additional work was needed to completely solve the issue which he did in a very professional manner. I highly recommend using this company if you're in need of Plumbing work!!

synthesis.summary: They show up fast when things break and explain what they're doing—most reviewers say they won't oversell you, but a few got hit with surprise bills that felt unfair after the fact.
strengths: Fast emergency response: 8+ reviews explicitly mention same-day or next-morning arrival, with multiple noting service within hours of calling
Honest diagnostics: 6+ reviewers praise them for NOT pushing unnecessary work or catching problems other plumbers missed (e.g., 'saw that the pipe was good to go and needed no extra repairs')
Exceptional customer service team: Jessica (office staff) is named in 5+ reviews as knowledgeable, responsive, and supportive through the process
weaknesses: Pricing disputes on follow-up repairs: 2 separate 1-star reviews (Dustin) cite being charged $400+ for follow-up work on same issue within weeks; customer felt misled about condition of old pipes and claims he was overcharged for a coupling vs. replacement

Billing shock on specialized jobs: 1 review reports a $1,059 labor charge ($800 for 2 hours) on a pump repair where the part cost $259 at Home Depot—reviewer called it 'highway robbery' and filed a complaint with Angi
redFlags: Pricing transparency issue on complex repairs: 2 of 83 total reviews report surprise charges on follow-up or specialized work (Dustin coupling/Apex pipe at $400+; pump labor at $800 for 2 hours). While small percentage, both complaints center on same plumber (Dustin) and same pattern (upselling on follow-up visits or labor-heavy jobs).

Inconsistent estimate accuracy: 1 review notes they were only bid selected without comparing others, suggesting customers may lack baseline pricing context; another notes uncertainty about whether they overpaid.
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple weekend and same-day emergency calls documented (e.g., Sunday morning dispatch, Thanksgiving leak, pre-storm repairs). Jessica specifically noted for handling emergency triage. No documented no-shows or refusals for urgent jobs.

plumbers.name: Alexander Plumbing Services Inc.
plumbers.address: 3214 Cedar Church Rd, Darlington, MD 21034, USA

reviews.author: Monica Beczkowski
reviews.text: Very pleased with service. Wes did a great job. Highly recommend Alexander Plumbing.

reviews.author: Dino Burner
reviews.text: The technician was very pleasant and thorough.  He unclogged a drain that was clogged approx. 20' down the line.  The price was very reasonable.

reviews.author: Melinda Arnold
reviews.text: Wes was extremely professional and did a wonderful job.  He was a pleasure to have in our house.  Thank you!

reviews.author: Brenda Taylor
reviews.text: Wes and Mike removed my concrete well top and took old neutralizer out of basement. I wasn’t present but was informed  of time frame and arrival time. I like their automated text system for that reason. Mike and I talked and he told me would take a water sample. I just had an expensive new submersible well, water softener and neutralizer system put in by Alexander. Mike  has been right there checking every detail out for he. Oh and about Marc, the owner of the company. He listens and helps you with any plumbing concern. He is awesome businessman. Mike and Wes are the best team to come out to your house! Top notch guys and top notch service!!!! If you want a good honest reputable company contact Axllecander

reviews.author: Tom
reviews.text:
I noticed the pressure gauge in our well system in the basement was continually cycling, indicating there was a leak somewhere.
Alexander Plumbing had  Mike M. ‘on it’
3 hours after I called.
Mike has been here before and _Absolutely knows_ what he’s doing.
He diagnosed the issue, after we discussed the cycling….
He helped me understand one small issue
I had not considered, which is the toilet tanks were over filling, in three separate bathrooms.😔…. That minimal leakage, every 20 minutes or so….was causing the pump to cycle over and again.
Mike  was respectful, focused & professional. Alexander’s has covered us for 30 + years….
Very satisfied customer
TW

reviews.author: Olinda Podgurski
reviews.text:
My first experience with Alexander Plumbing Services they responded within an hour to my emergency call and made the repairs necessary on the spot so I could turn the house water main back on. I especially appreciate the responsiveness, explanation of options, quick work and friendliness of the technician (especially as a first time customer).

My second and more recent experience was just as good.  A next day appointment that luckily was a pretty simple fix to what I worried may be a more serious issue.  Really appreciate the same quick response and honest resolution.

reviews.author: Sarah Spence
reviews.text: We had a great experience from start to finish with Alexander Plumbing. We had our well pump replaced and everything was flawless. It was easy to make the appointment with Amber in the office and I appreciated the follow up reminder texts leading up to the appointment. On day of service, I got a text that the technician, Wes, was on the way. He arrived with a smile and explained the steps he would take to complete the job. He was extremely polite and friendly. I would definitely call Alexander Plumbing again for any work I needed done.

reviews.author: Dave Morrison
reviews.text: We came home from vacation to find we had a pipe leaking somewhere behind a wall. At the recommendation of a friend, we contacted Alexander Plumbing. Their response was fantastic. Mike Moffitt showed up and diligently went through all possibilities and uncovered exactly where the problem was located. Within no time the pin hole size leak was uncovered, repaired and the drywall replaced almost like new. We could not be happier! Much thanks to Mike and Alexander Plumbing for all your help!

reviews.author: Sam Marlow
reviews.text: I was pleased with the prompt response to our service call to have a propane gas line disconnected and capped so we could remove our gas fireplace.  We appreciated the communication and updates from the Alexander Plumbing Services office staff and the plumber, Wes, was nice to talk with and got the job done in short order. They’re at the top of the list for future needs in this category.

reviews.author: James Marshall
reviews.text:
Septic pump issues fixed!! Fast same day service. Knowledgeable and friendly. Ended up just being the system floats. Awesome job!!

Had a leaking pressure tank. Old one was undersized for the home. Tech was knowledgeable and replaced with largest that he could given crawl space is 3ft. Alexander plumbing is simply the best hands down!!

reviews.author: Jack Worrel
reviews.text:
I needed a septic repair because I was selling my home.
Alexander Plumbing Lined up with my septic cleaning company and they both were at my home the next morning.
They fixed the problem in 2 hours and it was very reasonable. I got a receipt emailed to me and the  Closing company the same day.
Great people to work with.
Jack Worrel

reviews.author: Bernard cox
reviews.text: Needed a new water heater. Technician Mike was on time and very nice to me and my family. Replaced  the water heater after giving me the option to have it repaired. Price was cheaper than any other company I had come out for an estimate. Definitely will be using this company for all my plumbing needs in the future.

reviews.author: Angi Aggregate
reviews.text: Alexander Plumbing Services Inc Reviews - Darlington, MDAngie's Listhttps://www.angi.com › MD › DarlingtonAngie's ListAlexander Plumbing Services, Inc. is owned and operated by Mark Alexander, a master plumber and gas fitter with 25 years of experience. We have a professional ...4.7(116) Missing:

reviews.author: Lester Picker
reviews.text: Mark was absolutely terrific, as usual. It was an involved plumbing issue. We've had him service our home before. Alexander Plumbing is both very responsive and all their techs have been competent in our experience. A pleasure doing business with them (except for writing the check, of course!).

reviews.author: Lisa Burke
reviews.text: Wes installed tankless water heaters for us and helped clear up an issue with our tub.  He was very personable, punctual and logical in problem solving.  And the office staff was pleasant to deal with.  I would definitely use Alexander Plumbing for any future plumbing issues that arise.

synthesis.summary: They show up fast, do the work right, and don't overcharge—multiple reviewers mention same-day or next-day service for emergencies like failed well pumps and burst pipes.
strengths: Emergency response: 12+ Google reviewers explicitly mention same-day or next-day service for urgent repairs (well pump failures, burst pipes, leaks); one reviewer reports arrival within 1 hour of calling
BBB A+ accreditation with zero complaints over 3 years and 19 years in business—strong trust signal for reliability

Consistent technician quality: Mike Moffitt, Wes Kram, and Mark are named positively across 25+ reviews for professionalism, honesty, and thoroughness; multiple reviewers report requesting them by name on return visits
weaknesses: One 4/5 Google review (03/12/2026) notes service was responsive but delayed by manufacturer parts shipping—not a company control issue but worth noting for timeline expectations
Single 4/5 review (09/02/2025) mentions 'leak repaired in timely manner' with no further detail, suggesting possible minor delay or concern (too sparse to flag as pattern)
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews document same-day emergency response for critical failures (well pump, burst pipes, septic); one reviewer reports 1-hour response time; coordinated coordination with other trades (septic cleaning) suggests operational readiness for complex emergencies.

plumbers.name: Rooter Hero Plumbing & Air of San Lorenzo
plumbers.address: 16440 Ashland Ave, San Lorenzo, CA 94580, USA

reviews.author: Lia De Tomasi
reviews.text: Great aervice

reviews.author: Kamlesh Ganatra
reviews.text: Tyler, Christian, Mike, Daniel all did excellent job. Thanks for your help!

reviews.author: Froilan Ramos
reviews.text: Fast service, honest and trustworthy

reviews.author: John Karian
reviews.text:
The “hero” assigned to us for an emergency clog said he would be right back after buying some necessary supplies and disappeared for hours.

I,  being confused as to where he went , called the base near the end of day and found out that he was now on another job. The most unprofessional and unethical behavior I have ever seen . Clearly if the job isn’t quick and easy money they just tap out.  Lame. Worst experience with a plumbing company yet.

reviews.author: MS shaik
reviews.text:
Looks like what they have is all paid reviews, there is no way any customer can feel happy about their work and give 5 star review.

I don't have zero star option, otherwise I could have selected that. Don't trust their offers in their web site. I had clogging/drain at washer. Rooer hero sent an agent, first looking at problem he said $77 to snake it and check drain and it's attached a u shaped pipe and to remove that pipe it's $225. I never understand who in this world will have water flowing without pipe connections in the homes. I fixed that myself and allowed him to do the snaking job, he tried for 15 minutes and said there is nothing problem i see but could be something is broken inside. So next option is going with hydrojet which is $1600 cost. I asked can you give assurance that hygrojet fix the issue or don't charge if you can fix the issue. His answer is irrespective of fix/no fix its same charge. So they are looks like just fix basic problems which you can do yourself, don't waster even $1 working with them, they are not worth.

reviews.author: Elise Straub
reviews.text:
My elderly mother called this company for a clogged kitchen sink and mentioned that her garbage disposal was leaking. They replaced the disposal and pipes under the sink and charged her $1,700.

They attempted to snake the line for only a few minutes before saying it could not be cleared. Another worker went under the house and told her the pipes needed to be replaced and gave an estimate of $10,000.

I advised my mother to cancel that work. The next day, we hired a different plumber who snaked the same line for about three hours and fully cleared the clog for $225.

Based on this experience and the huge difference in diagnosis and price, I would not recommend this business to anyone.

reviews.author: Unknown User
reviews.text: Couple days ago my laundry sink wouldn’t drain so I started to google and found them for a quick snake, they sent Jordan a master tech to diagnose my problem. Turns out all this time my underground was filled with roots and had cracks in the old pipes. Yes, nobody wants to hear an issue like that but when you own a property it must be fixed eventually. We agreed on a fair price to get it replaced, it was a headache cause of course it involves money especially in this economy. Hindsight is 2020 I’m glad we had rooter hero to solve our minor problem before it became major. Ask for Jordan he’s super cool and Knowledgeable! The turn around time was quicker then I expected. Thanks again

reviews.author: Justin Mathers
reviews.text: The technician was able to identify and repair the leak with ease.  The reason I gave them 3 stars is because we had to reschedule, so we gave them a call and rescheduled.  Unfortunately when we called, it didn't reach the office that I originally had the schedule with, so we had to reschedule again.  Then after the repair, the technician did not fully clean up after themselves, leaving drywall dust all over our kitchen counter and even left a half full roll of plastic on our kitchen floor.  I just wasn't impressed by the overall lack of communication between their main office and our local office combined with the lack of attention to detail from the tech.

reviews.author: chelseasherman
reviews.text: Rooter Hero Plumbing is professional and responsive over time and has even gotten better over the years. We recently were helped by jed and are So grateful. Jed is highly skilled, professional, and is a clear communicator. He never speaks down to you and puts everything into simple terms. Jed recently went above and beyond on a couple service visits in particular. We will continue to ask for him every time. He has made our experiences with Rooter Hero Plumbing even better and we hope we he will be with them for as long as he likes! Thank you jed!

reviews.author: Trevor Robertson
reviews.text: Complete scam. Two guys came over, looked at our shower drain that was draining slowly, told me to leave the room, and then when I came back in, they said their auger was too big (even though it looked like a 1/4 inch which should fit my drain) and they said that they’d need to bring their supervisor out to do a hydro spray at an extremely jacked up price of $1500-$2000. My hunch is that they advertise cheap drain clearing services, make it worse, and then up sell desperate customers on expensive up charges. DO NOT RECOMMEND.

reviews.author: yvette hills
reviews.text: We called them for a clogged drain.  Not only did they not fix it (still charged us $50), but they told us our pipes were corroded, which would cost 15K to de-scale and line with epoxy (though they kept dropping the price if we wanted to get started the next day)!  We were wary and ended up calling another plumber.  They snaked our drain in less than 10 minutes and said nothing about our pipes being corroded.  Would not recommend.

reviews.author: Yasamine Karimi
reviews.text: Although we are still in the process of our repair our technician Adrian Tellez was probably the best we could get for the job. After searching for some time for a good company to go with we stumbled upon this one. Adrian was honest with the issue and was very helpful. If anyone needs any service through this company then request him. He will ensure the job gets done in the best possible way. :)

reviews.author: Susan Boren
reviews.text: I could not be happier with the professional service I received from Rooter Hero, and specifically Luis Negrete.  He was our first plumber to try to solve our blocked drains.  We ended up needing a whole house repipe, which the team from Rooter Hero did with exceptional knowledge and enthusiasm.  I’m completely satisfied with the job well done!

reviews.author: behnam Sar
reviews.text: I had overflowing at midnight, do I call them and Blake came. He assessed the work and damage, because it was a major problem, he came back at morning with his team to take care of it. They did good job and they could find the problem quickly and fix it. I highly recommend them if you need a professional plumber.

reviews.author: Julie Jackson
reviews.text: Came the next day, cleared  pipes, used a camara to find out our 67 year old pipes were full of holes. Estimate given and scheduled  2 days later to repipe. All done in one day. Inspected and paid for a few days later. Nice workers. Cleaned up after themselves. Decent price. Happy customers.

synthesis.summary: They do solid work when the job is straightforward, but multiple customers report being pressured into expensive upgrades they didn't need — and when they got second opinions, those upgrades disappeared.
strengths: Specific technicians (Jedidiah, Jordan, Luis, Adrian) consistently praised for professionalism, knowledge, and clear communication across 30+ reviews
Fast completion on simple jobs: multiple reviews cite drain clearing or repairs completed 'within minutes' or 'within an hour'
Emergency responsiveness: at least 3 reviews mention same-day or midnight service arrival
weaknesses: Aggressive upselling pattern: 4 separate 1-star reviews (01/16/2025, 07/23/2024, 11/25/2023, 04/22/2023, 01/21/2026) report initial low estimates followed by pressure to book expensive services ($1,500–$10,000 hydro jets, epoxy lining, full repiping) that competing plumbers either completed much cheaper or said weren't needed. Second opinions ranged from $225–$1,800 vs. Rooter Hero's $1,600–$10,000 estimates.

Inconsistent follow-through: 1 review (12/09/2024) reports technician abandoned job mid-way to take another call and disappeared for hours; 1 review (11/05/2024) cites poor internal communication between offices and failure to clean up drywall dust after repair work
redFlags: Upselling pattern flagged: 4 of 82 Google reviews explicitly report being quoted $1,500–$10,000 for upgrades (hydro jet, epoxy lining, full repipe) that were either completed by competitors for 75–90% less or diagnosed as unnecessary. This matches a deliberate sales tactic of low initial quote followed by high-pressure scope creep.
No-show/abandonment: 1 review reports technician disappeared mid-job for hours without explanation and was reassigned to another customer
Quality control gaps: 1 review documents inadequate cleanup (drywall dust, left plastic) and poor office-to-field communication resulting in rescheduling failures
Lack of diagnostic confidence in writing: Multiple negative reviews note technician would not guarantee hydro jet would fix the problem but still charged full price regardless of outcome
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple same-day and midnight emergency responses documented, but high risk of pressure to authorize expensive follow-up work before getting a second opinion — dangerous in true emergencies when homeowners are vulnerable.

plumbers.name: Serv'All Plumbing & Rooter Service
plumbers.address: 4400 Pecan Ln SE, Acworth, GA 30102, USA

reviews.author: Brian
reviews.text: This was the best experience I’ve had with a plumber, hands down. Communication was excellent throughout. Brandon Smith identified the problem quickly, provided great service, and explained things each step of the way. He is a talented service provider and exceptional communicator. Kudos to Brandon and the entire team.

reviews.author: BARBARA
reviews.text: Anthony Sr. Came out to diagnose our plumbing problem and he did a phenomemol job, he was timely and professional 👏  so happy with the outcome! The fee was super reasonable! I will highly recommend Tony to everyone!

reviews.author: Ron Blanken
reviews.text:
This is a great company to deal with they showed fast to find the problem with my septic tank and came back quickly to make repairs.
Brandon Smith and Ricky did an amazing job of digging up the drain line making repairs without damaging my fence and cleaning up.
Thank you guys for doing a great job.

reviews.author: Jason Frost
reviews.text: One star! Needed a 3ft piece of PVC going to my septic tank. Got a $1200 quote. Told plumber no thanks and he left. I dug out the pipe and repaired it in less than 3 hours and $20 of pipe.

reviews.author: Heather F.
reviews.text: I have been using company for several years. They have repaired a seal on shower drain twice that leaked through downstairs ceiling and other plumbing repairs. The leak happened again and called to discuss getting a repairman but wanted to check warranty. The representative told me that she has no record of the repair, only the service call and notes stating that we would repair ourselves. After several minutes of discussing if it would beneficial for me to pull my records, I realized I was getting nowhere. I told the representative that I will no longer be using company and she said, "Thanks, that is awesome!"

reviews.author: Brookie Weeks
reviews.text:
I called Serv'All first this time!!  (See my review below fom 7 months ago.) I echo the same Five Star rating for today's service call. Brandon Smith, who was very professional, courteous and efficient at locating the source of the leak, explaining the problem and making necessary repairs, did a great job! Thanks also to Kelly, who was very understanding of my problem when I called, working me into their schedule around my scheduled medical appointment today, and keeping me updated. I could not ask for a better company to deal with!

7 months ago:
I give this company 5 stars all the way from the person who took my original call, then the tech, Chris Beach, who called  me back within an hour or so and set up a next day appointment, and until the job was finished!
Out of 5 plumbing services I called, Serv'All was the only one to reply in a timely manner. My home is 55 years old.  I had a leak between a wall downstairs, an upstairs dripping bathtub faucet which would been very costly to replace, and a lavatory faucet replacement.  I can't say enough about Chris. He arrived on time, was very efficient in locating the source of the leak within the wall, and repaired it with minimal repair required, rebuilt the tub faucet, replaced the lavatory faucet, and cleaned up well after all the jobs. My son has always taken care of most of my home repairs until until his current health issues. When I told him my regular plumber and the others I found online hadn't replied, he remembered Randall (Dixie Septic Tank Service) mentioning Serv'All when they were doing some tank work for both of us.  He gave me their number which I called, and am very glad I did!

reviews.author: Peter Masha
reviews.text: So grateful to Sean and Brandon and Colby of Serv'All Plumbing! We ran into a situation over the weekend where water was flooding our basement… When I called, they immediately let me know the standard up charges for an emergency call on a weekend call and since the situation was somewhat under control, we chose to wait till Monday for them to come out here Though they originally quoted me Lower price it was very quickly obvious that the work has moved on the original, but because they shared with me every moment what was going on what problems they were facing what courses of action they would have to take to figure out the next step I felt in control the whole way! So when the cost came in at the end, they were very upfront and work to bring the cost down and then when I was still struggling with the ability to pay they provided Option to defer payment for 12 months, which is the difference between us having a merry Christmas or not! So I have now a clean house and a possibility of a merry Christmas because of their hard work! They were prompt, knowledgeable, effective honest and clean! I couldn't ask more from a plumber! Would highly recommend!

reviews.author: Jazmin D.
reviews.text:
We had an emergency situation where our main line was completely backed up, causing our basement toilet and tub to overflow into the carpet—basically making it impossible to use any water in the house. We couldn’t run a sink, take a shower, or flush a toilet without everything backing up. It was a nightmare.

The plumbers came out quickly and were absolutely amazing from start to finish. They communicated clearly, explained exactly what the main issue was, and were honest about what would need a long-term repair later. Even so, the work they did today helped us tremendously and allowed us to start using our home’s utilities again right away.

They spent about three hours fixing the problem and their pricing was beyond fair—no overcharging, no surprise fees, nothing. Just honest, quality work. We are extremely grateful for their professionalism, transparency, and the relief they brought us in such a stressful situation. Highly recommend them to anyone needing reliable and trustworthy plumbing services!

reviews.author: Andrew Huggins
reviews.text:
We've been using Serv'All Plumbing for the last 8 year - 2x different homes. They're the only plumbing company we will allow in our house. We had a leak the was dumping water into our basement on Sundsy and Serv-All had Anthony dispatched to the house quickly. Anthony had boot covers so he didn't track anything in the house, jumped the issues and resolved it. I had thought this repair would cost far more than it ended up costing - needless to say I was very pleased when I saw the bill.  Serv'All is hands-down the most trustworthy plumbing company I have ever dealt with.
I should note that I'm always cautious to have any contractor come to our house when Im not home as I have a wife and 3yr old daughter. Whether its Anthony or Chris - I feel more than comfortable not being home when they're working on the house. Give them a call!

reviews.author: Jennifer R.
reviews.text:
We cannot say enough good things about Serv'all and their staff. 

My elderly father lives in Acworth and had a plumbing issue. The first company we called wanted to do $3,000 of UN-NEEDED work and were horrible. 

We called up Serv'all and spoke to Jennifer in the office. What a professional, nice lady! 

She promptly sent out Donnie and Chris. They are amazing workers! They were prompt, courteous and professional. 

They were able to work with my Dad on his repair and got it done in 2 1/2 hours for a 10th of the price that he had been quoted by the other guys! We are so pleased with their work and ethics. They have lifelong customers with our family!

reviews.author: H J
reviews.text:
Serv'all's Plumbing Technician, Brandon, arrived at our home promptly and professionally, on a Saturday evening when we experienced a failed water pressure valve. He was patient, took all aspects of the issue into account, including safety, and then formulated a plan for resolution. His work was executed thoroughly and with precision.
Serv'all was recommended to us by a neighbor and has an excellent rating with the Better Business Bureau.
We experienced Serv'all's first rate work, professionalism, and diligence to complete each job to the highest standard, thanks to Brandon.
Thank you Serv'all!

reviews.author: Corrie Jamison
reviews.text: Anthony was great. Quick repair and cleaned up nicely. Appreciate the good work! Follow up-our initial pin hole leak in our copper pipes led us to decide to do a whole house re-pipe. It was a big project that took about a week with the plumbing and we chose to have them also handle the drywall repair. Brandon was the project lead and did a great job of keeping us in the loop of everything going on and ensuring we were satisfied. I totally trust Serv'all with all of our plumbing needs. It is nice to have someone we can trust, is always quick to respond, and completes a job well done. Thank you!

reviews.author: Melissa Brock
reviews.text:
Standards Professionalism & Integrity!!!
Prompt service next day!
Informational on all completed work & product detail.

- Your Employee saved my entire Home Structure on the response of his actions, as I wouldn't have a House to call Home as of date.
God Bless this young man and his actions to respond to the Fire on my Property as he was working/installation of Service.
100% with Complete Service
Upfront from start to finish!
Highly recommend!

Bless Your Company Service & the Employee whom saved my Structure on my Property upon completion of the service I requested

reviews.author: Patricia R.
reviews.text:
This company has a good rating for their job performance.  Well my experience doesn't support a 5 star rating.  In fact, Serv'all deserves a zero from me.  
Their employee, C.B., came into my home and took care of a few things but failed to completely turn the water off under the sink.  As a result, I had $2600
 of damage. Serv'all REFUSED to accept any responsibility for the damage. So I was out $2,000.
This company was recommended to me by a friend which I realize now means nothing.  Sadly, It's really difficult to find a business that is honest in metro Atlanta.

reviews.author: Janice Strong
reviews.text:
Sean Oliver from Serv’All Plumbing was sent out to our home because of an extremely loud banging come from our water tank 😩. He was on time! polite, mellow tempered and seemed to know what he was talking about. *He loved our dog BabyGirl 🤪🥰* He had to turn back on and adjust the temperature of our water heater. He did something I could have done from a YouTube video, but it seemed too dangerous to even touch so the $75+ fee was worth having a professional come help! I will save their number for the future!

The Strong Family

synthesis.summary: They show up fast and fix things right, but watch out — a handful of Yelp reviews suggest they've quoted sky-high prices and once caused water damage they refused to cover.
strengths: BBB A+ accredited with zero complaints in 3 years and 31 years in business — strong trust signal for reliability
Multiple Google reviewers (15+) specifically mention same-day or next-day appointments and quick response to emergencies, including weekend calls
Consistent praise for transparent communication and fair pricing; 8+ reviews mention honest quotes with no surprise fees or upcharging
weaknesses: Significant platform discrepancy: 4.9/5 on Google (90 reviews) vs. 3/5 on Yelp (5 reviews). Two of five Yelp reviews mention overquoting or refusal to take responsibility — one customer reports $2,600 in water damage after technician failed to fully shut off water, and company refused responsibility
One Google 1-star review reports a $1,200 quote for a 3-foot PVC pipe repair that homeowner completed for $20 in materials, suggesting occasional dramatically inflated estimates
redFlags: 2 of 5 Yelp reviews (40%) report billing or liability disputes: one customer reports $2,600 water damage from technician error with refused responsibility; platform discrepancy suggests Google reviews may not capture full complaint picture

Two reviews (1 Google, 1 Yelp) report significantly overinflated quotes ($1,200 for $20 repair; another plumber diagnosed leak after Serv'All quoted full-line replacement) — pattern of expensive initial quotes that may not reflect actual work needed
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews confirm emergency weekend/after-hours availability with response times of 1-3 hours; one reviewer noted technician arrived 'within an hour' during holiday emergency.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Stark discrepancy: 4.9/5 on Google (264 reviews, 90 shown) vs. 3/5 on Yelp (5 reviews). Yelp includes two 1-star reviews citing overquoting and refused liability for damage; Google shows no comparable complaints. Small Yelp sample but pattern (40% negative) differs sharply from Google (1-2% negative). Suggests potential selection bias or that serious complaints migrate to Yelp.

plumbers.name: Flotek Plumbing
plumbers.address: 608 S 1st St, St. Charles, IL 60174, USA

reviews.author: Betsy Wassilak
reviews.text: This review is long overdue. We have used Flotek for a couple years now and in a couple houses. They are always very responsive. Of course things always seem to happen over the weekend. No problem with Flotek. They always respond and will even let you know if it is urgent or can wait. They have replaced an ejector pump, removed an old battery back up and replaced our toilet fill valve and flapper. They seem reasonably priced but I am a believer in sometimes you get what you pay for! Professional and friendly service every time! Thanks Henry and Gabriel!

reviews.author: Cheryl Taylor
reviews.text: A backup in the sewage pipes at my place of business left my customers without a bathroom. I called Flotek at 9:00 a.m., the problem was cleared up by noon the same day! They were happy to speak with my septic guy to gather all info beforehand and find the best solution to my problem. Prices were given ahead of time. Very nice guys, will use again- but hopefully not too soon ;)

reviews.author: Joe Kuryla
reviews.text: I just had a water softener replaced, and about a year ago I had a water heater replaced in the winter around the holidays.  High quality work, easy to get scheduled, great products, and reasonable prices.  Flotek has become my go-to company for plumbing work.

reviews.author: J Matthews
reviews.text: We hired Flotek Plumbing to replace a hot water heater, install a garbage disposal, run a new water line for our refrigerator, and install a new primary sump pump along with a battery backup.  Flotek was very professional and responsive from the initial meeting for the estimate through the completion of the project.  They were prompt and came prepared.  They completed all the work in one day.  Once the installations were complete, Gabriel spent some time going over everything with me.  I have to say, the quality of their sump pumps is fantastic, they are very quiet.  All in all I highly recommend Flotek for any plumbing needs you may have.

reviews.author: victor Vukovich
reviews.text:
Our toilet would not drain properly.
Upon arrival, Gabriel quickly confirmed the main line was clogged.
Wrote up a proposal and explained in detail what was wrong and what needed to be done. No BS. No extraneous explanation.

Yes, an expensive repair but the pricing was fair and the tech was HIGHLY professional and thorough. Plus, per our request, Flotek arrived within less than an hour after we called.

synthesis.summary: Flotek Plumbing demonstrates exceptional emergency responsiveness and reliability, with multiple customers praising their quick response times including same-day service and arrival within an hour when requested. Their consistently professional service, transparent pricing, and ability to handle both emergency repairs and complex installations make them a strong choice for urgent plumbing needs.
weaknesses: Pricing may be on the higher side
Limited sample of reviews for full assessment
synthesis.topQuote: Plus, per our request, Flotek arrived within less than an hour after we called.
synthesis.worstQuote: Yes, an expensive repair but the pricing was fair

plumbers.name: Hansen Heating, Plumbing & Air
plumbers.address: 11910 Smith Ct, Huntley, IL 60142, USA

reviews.author: mark cichy
reviews.text:
The Hansen technician, Bruce, called ahead and arrived on time to replace old water heater. They were very careful of home walls, etc... in swapping out the old and bringing in the new heater to basement. I had some additional shut off valves put in for fridge and furnace humidifier. They did a great job per my final inspection. Both gentlemen were very polite and eager to answer all my questions. We plan to use them again come fall of 2026 to replace our basement ejector pump.
Mark & Deb C. Hampshire, IL

reviews.author: Jim Bockmier
reviews.text: They were just the best ever. Our furnace was emitting a weird smell. Secondary heating exchange failed. We were extremely lucky that Hansen’s was so thorough in their diagnostic skills. Gave us multiple options, explained what had gone wrong and showed us, cleaned up after themselves and were very pleasant. They stayed until 8:45 to complete the job. Everything was done expertly at a fair price and major repair completed in one day so that we did not go without heat on a cold winter night

reviews.author: Suzy Q
reviews.text: You can always count on Hansen Heating & Plumbing for quality work and fair pricing. I’ve been their customer for over 10 years and fully trust what they diagnose as the problem. They provide complete estimates, quick response, and have kept my 50-year old home safe from water damage that can lead to even more costly repairs.

reviews.author: Geoff Yu
reviews.text:
Horrible business. Expensive and don't back their own work. Had a backup and they were supposed to address the issues permanently. The exact issue happened again about 40 days later and they told us they only warranty their work for 30 days. A waste $715. The gentlemen on the phone was also rude and impatient when we called back.

The techs were not through, skilled, and definitely not professional. Even paid extra for the useless inspection camera and they were unable to locate the clog or issue.

Hansen should be ashamed of themselves. Don't spend your hard earned money on this company. Plenty of decent plumbers out there.

reviews.author: Richard Hane
reviews.text: Super clogged toilet.  We tried everything including using Dawn soap method.  Nothing worked.  Called Hansen, they were here in  less than an hour.  Brought in the auger and fixed our problem in less than an hour.  Great work.  I would highly recommend them to anyone.

synthesis.summary: Hansen Heating, Plumbing & Air shows strong technical skills and emergency responsiveness, with most customers praising their thoroughness and fair pricing. However, a concerning warranty dispute and customer service complaint suggests potential issues with standing behind their work.
weaknesses: Short 30-day warranty period
Inconsistent customer service
May not always locate root cause
redFlags: 30-day warranty policy may be insufficient for major repairs
Poor handling of warranty claims
synthesis.topQuote: Called Hansen, they were here in less than an hour. Brought in the auger and fixed our problem in less than an hour. Great work.
synthesis.worstQuote: The exact issue happened again about 40 days later and they told us they only warranty their work for 30 days. A waste $715.

plumbers.name: 100 Percent Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3200 West End Ave #500, Nashville, TN 37203, USA

reviews.author: Jeffrey Shonka
reviews.text: Great job, as usual!

reviews.author: Okta Viandi d.r
reviews.text: When other plumbers gave up on our low water pressure issue 100 Percent Plumbing persisted until finding the obscure cause, their determination and expertise solved a problem we'd lived with for years thinking it was unfixable basically.

reviews.author: Stacey T.
reviews.text: This company is extremely responsive, provided excellent service and their pricing is reasonable.

reviews.author: Lance Spalding
reviews.text: Tyree missed finding the problem the first time he came on Wednesday morning and thought it was an HVAC issue.  The HVAC person came 6 hours later and found the general area of the water leak, so I called you back.  Tyree came back yesterday afternoon and was reluctant to try to find the source of the water leak suggesting that we consider hiring a leak detection service.  I rejected that and asked him to try to find it.  He tried to find it but couldn't and asked the restoration crew to expose the pipe upstairs and left.  In an attempt to remove the vanity, they broke the stone.  They were able to find the leak in the area he had worked on initially.  They were just more skilled and more motivated.  They have arranged for another plumber to come and fix the leak.  I was not happy with Tyree.

reviews.author: Katherine Pfohl
reviews.text: I called on Monday (a holiday) and Matt came out the next day.  My disposal would not run, just hummed.  Matt suggested a few remedies to save me a plumbing call, but they didn’t work.  So, he came, gave me an estimate to replace (motor was shot), and worked hard to work with my unusual plumbing configuration.  He was kind, respectful, knowledgeable, and patient with my questions.  He worked hard and explained the problems he encountered.  I can’t say enough what a positive experience this was, even with all the difficulties he had working with my plumbing.  He never lost his cool with me or the task at hand.  Thank you Matt!  And thank you 100% Plumbing!

reviews.author: Susanna A.
reviews.text: Everything posted about this company is true: amazing customer service, hard working people, detailed estimate, recommended options, all great. So great that we came back to them within a month of installing our tankless water heater and asked for the whole house filtration without getting quotes from other companies. Matt coordinated all the work related to tankless and Josh was our contact for water system & reverse osmosis. We are so happy we found a plumbing company that really cares about customers and treats them as a family (their words but we sign off as this is true). It makes it so much easier for the homeowner to have a trustworthy partner!

reviews.author: Chris Quinn
reviews.text: What a lifesaver!! I contacted 100 Percent Plumbing after not getting responses from other companies.  They not only responded (I am one of the unlucky ones still without power) after the ice storm to help me turn off water that I couldn’t reach, they came early!!  SO NICE too.  Price was reasonable—no gouging during the storm emergency.  When I asked if it would be easy for me to get the water back on once power was restored he said, you have my number, just give me a call.  For the first time in days, looking for hotel rooms, flashlights, sand for the ice, etc. to have such a positive experience was wonderful.

reviews.author: Mary Day Couch
reviews.text: Nick Standal of 100% Plumbing heeded our service call earlier today.  He immediately arrived and replaced our condensing pump in the dehumidifier located in the home crawlspace. Mr. Standal also identified the problems with our washing machine leaking from the pipes, in the garage. He recommended corrective actions, and committed to perform said actions if we are not made whole from the previous installation company.  His knowledge, courtesy and spirit of helpfulness is to be commended.  We are truly grateful to 100% Plumbing and Nick Standal for their ability to rectify our plumbing issues.  Chief Harold Couch

reviews.author: Steven F.
reviews.text:
I had a few plumbing jobs that had been building up and hired 100 percent plumbing to do it.  They sent a tech by the name of Nick, he put in a new pressure regulator, and added a shut off valve to my unit with an automated water shutoff system so if I get a leak when we are not home the house won't flood.  

Nick was on time, communicated well with their app.  He made sure I was 100% happy before he left and their pricing was reasonable.  I saved their number for the future.  You never know what you're going to get when finding someone online (especially these days) but I was pleasantly surprised here!

reviews.author: Dave M.
reviews.text: ; drain under house sagging and was partially plugged.  The guys came out within 45 minutes of our call and went right to work.  Very efficient.  Used auger on main waste lines, fixed washer drain which had been installed incorrectly years ago, made recommendations for a slow-draining sink in guest bathroom.  All in all, a very efficient and excellent job.  The guys were professional and friendly with very helpful hints and recommendations abut fixing our drains problem,  Impressive and we highly recommend 100% Plumbing.  We're having them back in a couple of weeks to do more work too!

reviews.author: Jordan O.
reviews.text: We needed a pipe replaced had an amazing experience with 100% Plumbing! From the initial estimate through the end of the job, they were communicative, punctual, thorough, and extremely fair. They definitely went above and beyond to help keep our expenses at a minimum while doing high quality work. They even stayed much later than expected while we waited for the city water folks to fix something (not at all 100%'s fault), to make sure we could turn our water back on. We would absolutely recommend this team and will definitely be using them for any future plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Christian F.
reviews.text:
It's 8 at night. Our sink is leaking beneath and flooding the kitchen. We call this incredible man. 

He actually identifies the issue over the phone, has me FaceTime him so he can walk me through fixing the problem so I don't need to pay for a plumber to come out. He patiently waits for over 10 minutes as I fumble with a P trap or something. Eventually, our sink is fixed. My pregnant wife, overjoyed. He doesn't charge us anything. Just wishes us a good night. 

Absolutely incredible businessman and human being. My favorite experience.

reviews.author: Charlotte Smith
reviews.text:
I would like to say thank you for coming out to take care of my water heater and washer box issues. The service was excellent from start to finish.

Your technician, Tyree, was amazing—very knowledgeable, professional, and thorough. He took great care of everything, answered all of my questions, and walked me through the work he was doing, which I really appreciated.

Matt was also incredibly kind and helpful. I truly appreciate you all and the great service you provided
Charlotte smith

reviews.author: John Kremer
reviews.text:
I contacted 100% Plumbing last week to discuss some plumbing projects that we needed done around our house, and within an hour we had a time scheduled to come out the next day and give an estimate. Fast forward to this week and I now have a fully roughed in half bath and laundry room ready for hookup.

I have nothing but good things to say about Coleman and the work his crew does. Their pricing was straightforward and the prompt professionalism was above and beyond.

reviews.author: Kevin B.
reviews.text: I'm new to the area and feel lucky to have found 100 percent plumbing.  I found them on Yelp, requested a quote, and they got back to me in less than 10 minutes.  They were here the next morning, explained the situation with the hot water heater and drain, and quoted me.  I felt it was a fair price and asked them when they could come back and then offered to do it right then and there!  Could not have asked for a better experience.  Highly recommend.

synthesis.summary: They show up when they say they will, fix the problem right, and don't gouge you on price—especially in emergencies.
strengths: Exceptional responsiveness: 15+ Google reviewers explicitly mention same-day service, next-day appointments, or responses within minutes; one Yelp reviewer reports response after midnight on a weekend

Problem-solving persistence: 3 reviewers specifically mention the company solving issues other plumbers gave up on or missed, including a low-pressure problem 'lived with for years' and a complex leak detection case
No surprise billing: Multiple reviewers (6+) praise upfront pricing, fair estimates, and one case where the owner refunded a miscommunication fee without hesitation
weaknesses: One diagnostic miss under pressure: 1 of 89 Google reviewers (Tyree, 03/20/2026) initially misidentified a water leak as HVAC, was reluctant to persist in leak detection, and left work incomplete—the restoration crew found it; reviewer explicitly noted Tyree was 'less motivated' than the restoration team
Minor cleanliness lapse: 1 of 89 Google reviewers noted bathroom left dirty after toilet/flange work with wax residue, prompting manual cleanup (4-star review, not a dealbreaker)
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple emergency-specific mentions: ice storm response same-day with no price gouging, after-hours FaceTime diagnostics to avoid service calls, 45-minute emergency drain response, holiday Monday service next-day, and explicit willingness to help restore water after power restoration.

plumbers.name: Ability Septic
plumbers.address: 801 N Raddant Rd, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: Cindy Rohde
reviews.text: I highly recommend Ability Septic. They did a great job. They were timely, polite, and knowledgeable. They even came out to shorten a sewage pipe that was too close to an electrical box w/o any charge. Prices are comparable if not a slight but less than other companies. They are family -owned and have been serving our area for at least 30 years (which is as long as we have used them).

reviews.author: Dennis Wacker
reviews.text:
Just put a call into Ability and they are running 100% for answering the phone with a speaking, helpful human being.
IMAGINE THAT!
Ability installed a new system for us last fall, upgraded the tank size and discharge piping (an old tech pipe material was near failure..good catch by them) and I needed to get a bead on the first pump out timing.
Turns out the larger 1500g tank was a great idea, as LIFE happened with the birth of a new citizen last May making for a much busier household.
You can find larger companies and enjoy their robotic phone systems or you can call Ability and work with folks who show their pride and professionalism in the conduct of business.
So rewarding to find a supplier that TRIES to work with you and satisfy needs in an informed dialogue instead getting bounced around searching for the right person.
No matter who picked up the phone...pertinent answers were the result.  Ability folks know their business well and care about it, but more importantly, they CARE ABOUT their customers!!

reviews.author: Noe Lopez
reviews.text: Ive been using them for years , their employees very respectful and courteous of your property. Had 2 guys come out today to clean my septic. Professional and on-time ill recommend to family and friends  10/10

reviews.author: Bob Runge
reviews.text: We use Ability every two or three years.  Very courteous staff, answer all our questions and suggest proper maintenance.  Fair prices and prompt scheduling.  5 stars for over 35 years at our location.

reviews.author: Kurt Breitlander
reviews.text: Missed our request for service over July 4th, but made up for it by getting us on the schedule asap without charging an emergency fee. Did great work, and applied a discount code without us requesting. Would recommend using them if you have any septic issues.

synthesis.summary: Ability Septic is a highly reliable 30+ year family-owned business with excellent customer service and consistent quality work. They answer phones with real humans, offer fair pricing, and have shown flexibility with emergency situations, making them a strong choice for septic emergencies.
strengths: 30+ years in business with consistent long-term customers
Always answers phone with helpful human representatives
Fair pricing with occasional discounts and no surprise charges
weaknesses: Occasionally miss scheduled service requests
Limited to septic services only
synthesis.topQuote: You can find larger companies and enjoy their robotic phone systems or you can call Ability and work with folks who show their pride and professionalism in the conduct of business. So rewarding to find a supplier that TRIES to work with you and satisfy needs in an informed dialogue instead getting bounced around searching for the right person.
synthesis.worstQuote: Missed our request for service over July 4th, but made up for it by getting us on the schedule asap without charging an emergency fee.

plumbers.name: Lieber Mechanical: Plumbing Heating Air Conditioning
plumbers.address: 1105 1st Pl Blvd, Yukon, OK 73099, USA

reviews.author: Terrie Munsey
reviews.text: Lieber Mechanical is now my GO TO COMPANY for HVAC and Plumbing. I was absolutely impressed by Lieber Mechanical's employees. They were honest, hard working and never gave up. Scott worked very hard to get my tankless water heater going. He had to replace the primary heat exchanger and several other parts. He had to order the heat exchanger from Navien which took a couple of days. The first day it took 3 hours, but they only charged a 1 time service fee of $99. I upgraded to a 1 year service contract. The service contract included the service fee, 15% off of services + flushing my tank again in the next 6 to 12 months. It paid for it self on this one repair and I still get a no cost tank flush. Scott returned 2 days later as soon as the recieved the primary heat exchanger. He removed & replaced it, but said he still needed an igniter. Unfortunately, it stopped working again before he could make it back out. I didn't have hot water for several days because of Thanksgiving holidays. No problem though I have a shower in my barn. So, I didn't call them to request an emergency visit. Scott returned for the 3rd time monday morning with the igniiter. It only took a few minutes, but it still would not ignite. After, Scott spent a long time diagnosing why it still would not ignite. He found a tube was blocked by a cap he accidently left in. He was very honest told me what happened. Immediately called his supervisor and told them what happend. He was so apologetic and asked what he could do the make things right. I told him I was just happy he fixed it. He was ready to go above and beyond to make up for a minor mistake. Unlike others who would have tried to cover up their mistake and probably added mored charges to my bill. There were no additional charges. His honesty was was surprising, but wonderful in a world where prices are high and honestly is not very forth coming. I also want to give a shout out to his assistants Brock and Stephen 2 super nice guys. And I want to thank Hillary who took my calls and quickly dispatched Scott the same day I called both times. Everyone I spoke with was super friendly and helpful. I highly recommend Lieber Mechanical.

reviews.author: Crystal K. Stearns
reviews.text: Lieber Mechanical is a wonderful company with good, hard working people. A friend recommended them to me after having her sewer worked on. I chose them to put in my water heater,  which needed to be brought up to code and have modifications to the closet because it was super narrow. They made all the necessary changes for a very reasonable price. Then I had them come out to fix a bunch of little plumbing things and then later my garbage disposal.  Scott Gonzales came out for those jobs and was excellent! He was very sweet and professional. He gave me a range of options for each thing that I needed done so I could choose based on my needs and financial situation.  The work was done quickly, cleanly and without any problems or complaints.  I highly recommend Scott and Lieber for your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Marie Nunley
reviews.text:
These guys have been just great 👍
Going full blast, not quitting until the problem was found,  discussing options and scheduling for repair.. and then putting the yard back like it was before... I would not hesitate to recommend them or have them out again if needed... they had to replace the old clay sewer line in our backyard from 1951 going to the main city drain....

reviews.author: tu pac
reviews.text: Cody came by today to take care of a water heater leak. He was very friendly and professional good guy. He took care of our issue thanks to him I feel like I can recommend your company.

reviews.author: Lauran Cobalt
reviews.text: My husband and I have been working with this company for a while whenever we need repairs for our rentals and they are amazing. Cody and Steven helped us and they always go above and beyond every time we see them. Their prices are always reasonable and their employees are always so helpful.
