If there is a problem with something that they fixed they always make it right by us. I definitely recommend working with them.

synthesis.summary: Lieber Mechanical appears to be a highly trustworthy plumbing company with exceptional customer service and honest technicians. While one review mentions extended service over multiple days, the company's integrity in handling mistakes and commitment to making things right demonstrates reliability for emergency situations.
strengths: Exceptional honesty and integrity when mistakes occur
Highly skilled technicians who persist until problems are solved
Reasonable pricing with transparent service contracts
weaknesses: Complex repairs may require multiple visits
Unknown 24-hour emergency availability
synthesis.topQuote: His honesty was was surprising, but wonderful in a world where prices are high and honestly is not very forth coming. There were no additional charges.
synthesis.worstQuote: I didn't have hot water for several days because of Thanksgiving holidays.

plumbers.name: Bay Area Plumbing BAP Inc.
plumbers.address: 2648 Richard Ave, Concord, CA 94520, USA

reviews.author: Kody Myler
reviews.text: Thanks!

reviews.author: Guillermo Gonzalez
reviews.text: Great service! Ron showed up in less than 30 minutes after I called. Not only fixed what was needed, but he give me advice, and order a part for me to save me money. Ron (The Dutchman) is the only honest plumber in the Bay Area.

reviews.author: John
reviews.text:
They were prompt to respond, at the job on time and schedule, and did the job on the budget. Will use them again.  😃

I am reviewing again for another water heater problem. Ron responded promptly and we arranged for a timely repair. Another five star review for Ron and Bay Area, Pumbing.

reviews.author: Courtney McQuade
reviews.text:
Ron and Bay Area Plumbing are absolutely the BEST in the Bay Area!
After trying four other plumbers, we finally found Ron, and we’ll never use anyone else. He’s incredibly fast to respond, extremely knowledgeable, and just as happy to take on small jobs as he is with larger projects—a rare find in this industry.

While Ron charges by the hour like most plumbers, he’s incredibly mindful of your time. He comes prepared, works efficiently, and gets the job done quickly without cutting corners. I appreciate the way he takes the time to explain the situation and offer solutions and options, and what to watch out for in the future. We’ve had him out to our place twice now and it’s clear he values his customers and takes pride in delivering top-notch service.

We trust Ron implicitly for all our plumbing needs, big or small. If you’re looking for a plumber who’s reliable, thorough, and truly the best in the business, Ron and Bay Area Plumbing are the ones to call. He’s also incredibly nice and fun to chat with! We can’t recommend him highly enough!

reviews.author: Rodney Villa
reviews.text:
Dec 4, 2025
Woke up yesterday, Dec 3, 2025, to a toilet leak and wet floor mats.  Called BAP Bay Area Plumbing and was able to arrange for repairs the next day.  Ron contacted me the day of, to inform me of his arrival time and kept me well informed of his arrival and what repairs needed. I HIGHLY recommend BAP Bay Area Plumbing and Ron Lem.  GREAT customer service as he did more work than I expected, without additional cost.  Very happy with results. Thanks for a job well done, BAP Bay Area Plumbing and Ron.

reviews.author: Francis Ramos
reviews.text: Big props to Ron at BAP! Not only did he pick up my call on a holiday, but he also walked me through an easy, free fix for a faucet leak that would’ve cost $270 to service otherwise. Wanna know how companies gain loyal customers? It’s through interactions like this and showing true dedication to simply being helpful that you build good will. Should any other plumbing issues come up in my home, Ron and BAP will be my first call!

reviews.author: Evan U
reviews.text:
I needed a pressure balance cartridge replaced in my shower, and Ron was fantastic! He replied to my request promptly and scheduled a time that worked for me.

Ron was very tidy, making sure to clean up thoroughly once the job was done. He took the time to clearly explain the issue and walked me through the repair process, patiently answering all my questions.

Highly recommend him for any plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Joe Mattos
reviews.text:
I had a backed up sewer and wanted to go with a new company. I started calling plumbers and was getting no answer. Ron responded quickly and was out to take care of the problem within an hour. He was very thorough about his work. He took extra time to explain exactly what was going on so it was clearly understood. He is very knowledgeable and professional.
Highly recommend.

reviews.author: falcaraz12
reviews.text: My toilets shut off valve had a small leak. I contacted Bay Area Plumbing and was helped by Ron. I was just inquiring at first, but was very impressed by Ron’s responsiveness and attention to detail. He had my business from that point forward. Good communication and customer service is hard to find now a days. My toilet was fixed within a few hours of making the call.

reviews.author: Rizalene Briggs
reviews.text: As a real estate agent I work with many vendors and I can say that Ron is highly competent, efficient, communicative and just top tier. He did a sewer lateral inspection for my clients and was extremely thorough and takes pride in his work . I will use his services again and refer him to all of my colleagues! 10/10 recommend for all plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Riley Polek-Davis
reviews.text: Friends recommended me to Bay Area Plumbing and I just used them to diagnose and fix a hot water issue in my shower, as well as flush 2 tankless water heaters. Ron was amazing! He was able to make it out quickly and was super punctual, friendly and took great care of my house in the process! I will definitely call them again when I need a plumber!

reviews.author: Alyssa Asadoorian
reviews.text:
We had a beyond wonderful experience with Bay Area Plumbing (BAP). Ron was so responsive, attentive, and his install of our guest bathroom toilet was smooth and stress free. We could not recommend BAP and Ron more, we will definitely be using them again for future services. Thank you again, Ron!

- Casey & Alyssa (Walnut Creek, CA)

reviews.author: Nicole Brisbois
reviews.text: Ron was able to come out to our house on the weekend with short notice about a leak in our garage; he was very thorough in his fixes and did a great job. He also helped us out with advice about a few other plumbing issues we were having and saved us from some major headaches. We will definitely be using his services in the future!

reviews.author: Al Hagedorn
reviews.text:
Was leaving phone message with their firm and immediately received a text from Ron advising a simple fix. It worked. I am most impressed with their immediate contact and solution advice that avoided a service call. Never have experienced such a professional plumbing service.
I highly recommend Bay Area Plumbing

reviews.author: Keita Grant
reviews.text: He came around 30 minutes after my phone call. I was impressed! He was very friendly, very patient with my questions, and extremely knowledgeable. Completely took care of my issue in a timely fashion. Reasonable price as well! Definitely someone you want to keep in your contact list!!

synthesis.summary: Ron shows up fast, explains everything clearly, and fixes problems without upselling — reviewers consistently mention calling him as their new go-to plumber after trying others.
strengths: Exceptional response time: 8+ reviews explicitly mention same-day service, arrival within 20-30 minutes, or early morning callbacks after evening calls

Transparent communication and education: 12+ reviewers specifically praise him for explaining the problem, walking through repairs, offering options, and providing maintenance advice to prevent future issues

Fair pricing and honest assessment: 9+ reviews mention reasonable/fair rates; multiple reviewers note he diagnosed issues correctly where other plumbers wanted unnecessary replacements (water heater flushing vs. replacement, simple fixes avoiding $270+ service calls)
weaknesses: No identified weaknesses across 83 reviews — zero complaints about pricing disputes, late arrivals, incomplete work, or unprofessional behavior
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews document same-day emergency response, including late Saturday calls, Father's Day availability, 10 PM callbacks with next-morning service, and arrival within 20-30 minutes of calling.

plumbers.name: Maryland Sewer & Plumbing Service Inc
plumbers.address: 104 Dale Rd, Pasadena, MD 21122, USA

reviews.author: Consumer Appraisal and Realty Services
reviews.text: Came out to the house New Year's Eve. Very professional and knowledgeable. Awesome service will use this company again.

reviews.author: Millie Brown
reviews.text:
After my plumber of whom I’ve used personally and for my business for more than 13 years was a no show , I called Maryland Sewer in the hopes of getting the sewer main snaked as soon as possible. I left a message with the answering service and within 5 minutes I received a call. I spoke with Ronnie, explained what was going on and he came out immediately to resolve the issue. Ronnie was friendly and thorough to a fault.  What seemingly was a huge challenge initially, didn’t bother him- he kept pressing forward and made it happen. He  took measures to protect my home with tarps and more. He went above and beyond by helping me in removing the drawers to my bathroom vanity so that I could clean the mess up that was underneath from the sewage flooding. In doing so, he found another issue and resolved that as well! I couldn’t be more grateful and thanks to Ronnie, he’s just an all around good guy. Couldn’t ask for a more honest guy and thanks to him,
I could peacefully have a drink and take a shower. As a business owner and property manager,  I would recommend Maryland Sewer 100%. Thank you Ronnie and Maryland Sewer!!

reviews.author: Gina L
reviews.text: Brandon was super helpful and pleasant. Although we had to ultimately call the county for our issue he gave us the number and called additionally for us to hopefully speed them up to come.

reviews.author: Scott Davis
reviews.text:
I spent a good amount of time researching and reading reviews before reaching out to this company. We originally believed we had a failed septic system, but later discovered it was just a drain pipe blockage. Brandon came out the same day.

He’s personable, honest, and genuinely seems to enjoy his job and working for this company. I work in underwriting for construction financing, so I have a pretty good sense of when something feels off. He didn’t come close to giving me that impression.

Good people. I’m honestly disappointed I’ve lived out here for five years and am only now discovering them. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Pamela Barrier
reviews.text:
I am very happy with Maryland Sewer & Plumbing. I was kept informed every step of the process. Appointment was easy to make and it was at my convenience and I was notified of tech that was coming and the time frame. I was notified when tech was on the way.
My tech Ronnie M. was very professional and explained what the issues were and how he would correct the problems. Before he left he made sure that I was satisfied with the job he had done. Asked if I had any additional questions. He had left the job site very clean.
I will definitely use them again and refer them to anyone who needs a great plumbing company.

reviews.author: yvonne williams
reviews.text: MD Sewer & Plumbing Service sent Brandon to unclog my bathtub. The clog was so bad that when I turn on the faucet at the vanity, it would backup in the bathtub. There was dirty water standing in the bathtub and it wouldn't budge. Brandon worked his magic and cleared the drain until everything was working properly. Brandon is a hard worker who doesn't give up no matter what it takes. He's the best plumber I have ever had to service my home. If you need plumbing work, I highly recommend MD Sewer & Plumbing Service. You will definitely be satisfied with their work.

reviews.author: Ryan Myers
reviews.text: We had a different “drain cleaning” company come out and “couldn’t get through the roots” leaving my sewer more backed up than when they got here. I called Maryland Sewer and Ronnie came out just to give me an estimate to replace the sewer drain. I asked if there was anything I could do to get us through the weekend until they could do the work and he said let me take a look and try to snake it. He got the drain clear and explained the whole situation to me. 100% will recommend and will use them again! So relieved right now.

reviews.author: Portia Anglade
reviews.text:
Brandon did a very careful, thorough inspection of the line and patiently explained the situation.  I am grateful for the kind, professional manner in which this inspection and diagnosis was conducted.

A couple months after the camera inspection, I had MD Sewer replace the sewer line.  This was a very scary job for me because of unknowns and the cost was  big. The MD Sewer guys explained the worse case scenario to prepare me and I appreciate that in the end, the job was accomplished with fewer complications than expected.

reviews.author: Brenda
reviews.text: I had an excellent experience with Maryland Sewer & Plumbing Services Inc., even under challenging circumstances. The price for their services was very reasonable. Ronnie was wonderful and incredibly knowledgeable. I wholeheartedly recommend them for any plumbing services or emergencies. Although I usually have a regular plumber whom I’ve relied on for years, I called Maryland Sewer & Plumbing for an after-hours emergency. After my experience tonight, I may consider using them regularly instead.

reviews.author: Harrison Bonvissuto
reviews.text: Brandon was incredible. Not only did he communicate clearly when he'd arrive, he showed up and was able to assess the issue very quickly. It's obvious he's extremely knowledgeable in his field - I learned a ton! He was able to fix a clog in my main sewer drain, as well as identify an issue on the city's side of the pipe that they need to repair. My experience with Brandon was professional, and he took extra time to ensure I was happy with the job and fully understood the process.

reviews.author: diana ashburn
reviews.text:
Ronnie is an asset to your company
He is polite, does professional work,
answered all of my questions.
He left me with the impression that he was honest
and that your company is honest.
Honesty, integrity mean a lot to me
He made sure everything worked before he left
I will use your Maryland Sewer and Plumbing and
Ronnie should I have any more problems .
Put new faucet in tub and cleared the main drain
I have peace of mind that these 2 things were
taken care of.
Thank you

reviews.author: Darcell Gholson
reviews.text:
I've used Maryland Sewer & Plumbing when I managed Weinberg Place so I'm very firmiliar with the professional service.  When Ronnie called I knew my repair would be corrected in a timely manner. He shared with my son the part needed for my tub and shared some important information with us as well.

Ronnie provided professional plumbing and customer service. I will share your contact information with others if and when needed.

Thank you,
Darcell

reviews.author: Jessica Koenig
reviews.text: My family will reccomend this company to everyone. We had a plumbing emergency on a weekend and no other company we called helped or even had a person we could speak to. Scott fixed our issue less then 24 hours after our first call, as new customers, and they are so reasonably priced. They're also really kind to you when you're completely panicked, and we spoke to a representative and technician within 30 minutes of calling on a Sunday evening.

reviews.author: Gene
reviews.text: My service tech was Brandon R. He arrived just about an hour after I called the office, and was friendly, polite, and able to remedy our plumbing issue in a short period of time. I highly recommend this company by the nature of their quick response and the character of their technician.  If the others are anything like Brandon, then they should meet any plumbing concerns to your satisfaction. I know that I have found my go-tp plumbing company.

reviews.author: Amy Shlemon
reviews.text: I received excellent consideration and service from office, to field, to replace a sewer line. I highly recommend this company. They identified the problem quickly and demonstrated skill and knowledge for quick resolution. The price was below competition and the service was far above. Thank you to everyone at Maryland Sewer Repair for responding to my emergency with professional empathy and excellent service.

synthesis.summary: They show up fast for emergencies and actually fix the problem without leaving you panicked—multiple reviewers mention getting same-day or next-morning service even on weekends and holidays.
strengths: Exceptional emergency response: 12+ reviewers explicitly mention after-hours, weekend, or holiday availability with response times under 1-2 hours (Friday midnight, Saturday night, New Year's Eve, Thanksgiving eve)
Technicians solve difficult problems other plumbers couldn't: 2 reviewers specifically state Maryland Sewer fixed issues that 3+ other plumbing companies failed to resolve

Consistent professionalism and communication: 25+ reviewers praise individual technicians (Ronnie, Brandon, Scott) by name for being knowledgeable, patient, and explaining work clearly; 3+ mention proactive text/photo notifications of arrival
weaknesses: Pricing concerns emerge despite overall satisfaction: 1 reviewer rated 4/5 specifically citing 'too expensive' despite acknowledging good work; multiple 5-star reviews preemptively mention 'reasonable' or 'fair' pricing, suggesting price sensitivity is a factor
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Strong after-hours and weekend capability: 8+ reviews document same-day or next-morning emergency responses including late Friday nights, Saturday mornings, Sunday evenings, holidays (Thanksgiving, New Year's Eve), with typical callback within 5 minutes and arrival within 1-2 hours.

plumbers.name: Command Plumbing Inc.
plumbers.address: 1 O'Plaine Rd Unit 8197, Gurnee, IL 60031, USA

reviews.author: Taylor Neill
reviews.text: Dan, Joe and his staff are great to work with.  We recently had a water heater and toilet replaced and highly recommend Command Plumbing.  Joe went over options, was super friendly and professional and did a great job. Their pricing seems very fair and it’s great to work with a local family owned company.  We would certainly recommend them and have them out again.

reviews.author: David Lornson
reviews.text: Since 2018, Command Plumbing has been our source for plumbing repairs.  I appreciate that we have always received excellent, fast, and reliable service.   I contacted them by email recently, and within two minutes Dan responded with an appointment.  Rich came out to clear our kitchen sink drain - and we were good to go.  These guys are the best!

reviews.author: Joel Hughes
reviews.text: Dan and Joe are the best. Absolute pros and very good people. They are fast, clean, and highly skilled. I've dealt with a lot of trades and I very much recommend Command Plumbing.

reviews.author: Jennifer Lach
reviews.text: Highly recommend Command Plumbing.  Joe replaced a hot water heater and hose bib in just a few hours.  The craftsmanship was excellent and you could see the attention to detail.  He was also very courteous and made sure everything was neat and tidy.  He took the extra step to clean up the surrounding area so it was much cleaner than when he arrived!  It has been a few months now, and everything is working great, no issues.  Would have them back in an instant for any further plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Greg S
reviews.text: Command Plumbing did a great job with the rough-in for my bathroom renovation. The work included a tub / drain install, reconfiguration of shower valve, and changing from a single to dual sink. All interactions were highly professional. A quote was provided on the spot, and service was completed in short order. Their quote was slightly favorable to another local plumber. I highly recommend and would use them again without hesitation.

synthesis.summary: Command Plumbing Inc. appears to be a reliable, family-owned plumbing company with consistent 5-star reviews praising their professionalism, quality work, and fast response times. While they excel at standard plumbing services like water heater replacements and drain clearing, their 24-hour emergency availability is unclear.
weaknesses: 24-hour emergency availability unknown
Limited sample of review types
synthesis.topQuote: I contacted them by email recently, and within two minutes Dan responded with an appointment. Rich came out to clear our kitchen sink drain - and we were good to go.

plumbers.name: Helton Plumbing Hero
plumbers.address: 1217 Blackhawk Ave, McHenry, IL 60051, USA

reviews.author: Ben Isaacs
reviews.text:
We were in the process of having a bathroom remodeled, and just our luck, our water heater goes out. I was recommended to contact Helton Plumbing by our contractors. I spoke with the owner, Jeremy, who was very helpful in my time of panic. Jeremy was able to give me the information about upgrading to different types of water heaters: tankless, tanked and power vent. What I appreciated was the upfront tasks required to install each one, as well as the pros and cons of each unit. We ended up going with the Navian tankless water heater. I've included pictures of the before and after.

Carey was my technician for the project. I cannot say enough about how magnificent Carey was. Answered all my questions, explained the process, gave me insight on the new product (including gas use, electrical use, rebate possibilities, etc). Additionally, Carey completed this entire task by himself, wasting no time to get the project going - it was an all day task. Carey even recommended a type of recirculation valve in the primary bathroom that will help to heat the primary bathroom faster (it is the furthest away from the water heater, so historically the shower took 60+ seconds to get hot). The recirculation valve and new water heater have the primary bathroom hot in under 10 seconds. It is sorcery.

I am very pleased with the service. Words can't explain how much we are enjoying the new water heater and the constant hot water. Also, the floor space that it opened up is monumental too. I will say that to go from a tank to tankless, it is an investment. It is expensive to make the change. It is definitely worth it - high efficient appliance, lower gas bill and constant hot water. We have young children and always worried about those 'hot pockets' of water in a tank water heater burning one of our kids. The tankless is so consistent I wish our Chicago Bears would take note. Overall, couldn't be happier with how it turned out. If you are on the market for a new water heater, consider Helton Plumbing. They fixed my issue entirely in one day!

reviews.author: Georgia Kelly
reviews.text: I came home from vacation to a leaking pipe and puddle of water on the floor. Helton was able to come within a couple of hours. Carey immediately put my mind at ease. He diagnosed the problem and explained it to me with a photo. He gave me an estimate before he began the work. He had everything he needed to replace the cracked piece of pipe and worked efficiently and professionally. He was friendly and courteous. This was the second time I’ve used Helton and have been 100% satisfied. Julie who took my call was great also.

reviews.author: Robert
reviews.text:
We have used Helton plumbing many times over the years for various issues (water heater and other pipe related problems)
They always do an excellent job. Yesterday they replaced three toilets in our house. Their tech arrived on time and looked over our problems and gave me two options to solve it. One- to rebuild the toilet ( new parts) or two- to replace the entire fixture. We opted for replacement. He had to pick up the fixtures an hour away and then come back to begin. One man on his own and he removed and replaced all three units in three hours. After removing one of the toilets he found a broken flange that needed replacing. And he was equipped for that too.
He removed the toilets and wrapped each one in plastic so nothing dropped on our floors.
He arrived on time and did the job quickly and cleanly. He took the old toilets and all of the cartons and garbage left over from the install to dispose of. If I could give them more than five stars I would.

reviews.author: Bill Spelman
reviews.text: We are relatively new to the area and found ourselves in need of a plumber. I like to shop local and found Helton Plumbing had a lot of happy customers. Unfortunately we now live in a time of horrible customer service, however, Helton is the exception. They are extremely knowledgeable, polite, prompt, affordable and the finished job was done to perfection. I will not hesitate to use them again. Thank You Helton for supplying good old fashion customer service

reviews.author: Kevin
reviews.text: Have used Helton for a while for jobs ranging from hot water heater repair, frozen pipes, and one off needs. They give straight forward honest quotes and do great work. Would highly recommend.

synthesis.summary: Helton Plumbing Hero demonstrates exceptional reliability and customer service with quick emergency response, expert technicians, and comprehensive problem-solving capabilities. Multiple customers praise their prompt service, honest pricing, and ability to handle both simple repairs and complex installations with professionalism.
strengths: Highly skilled technicians who explain problems clearly
Honest upfront pricing and multiple solution options
Professional cleanup and disposal of old materials
weaknesses: No clear indication of 24-hour availability
Limited geographic coverage area
synthesis.topQuote: I came home from vacation to a leaking pipe and puddle of water on the floor. Helton was able to come within a couple of hours. Carey immediately put my mind at ease. He diagnosed the problem and explained it to me with a photo.

plumbers.name: Alexander Plumbing
plumbers.address: 221 E Chicago St #9, Elgin, IL 60120, USA

reviews.author: Isidro Perez (Sid Perez)
reviews.text: Had them come out and repair a water washer inlet hose that had rusted together. They came out the same day I called, and repaired the issue in less than and hour. They were cheap and affordable and I would highly recommend Alexanders Plumbing for any of you plumbing needs. I've used them several times thru out the years and they never disappoint. The are professional, courteous, and very affordable in their prices.

reviews.author: Alicia Smith
reviews.text: The speedy response and work was amazing. Neil did an amazing job of explaining the work he was doing as well as explaining prevention of future issues. He kept his work area clean. I’m so happy I called them. I believe I found a lifetime plumber for my forever home.

reviews.author: Greg Bowman
reviews.text: We had a sewer back up into our laundry room. I called Alexander Plumbing and they were at our home within the hour! They had the line rodded out and were all done in two hours. AND, they cleaned the floor in the laundry room. Looked like nothing ever happened, all resolved by 11am. I am super thrilled with their work, their character and the decent people they are! Absolutely will call them again - and highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Scott Hanssler
reviews.text: Pat is the man, he really came through for me when moving into my new home and had an immediate issue with the hot water heater. Went out of his way to help me over the phone and with a part out of kindness. Not many people/places nowadays would take the time to do this. If I ever have a plumbing issue in the future I’ll only call here.

reviews.author: Marty McGovern
reviews.text: They did a great job; handled all phases of the repair. Explained everything in detail and were prompt  and thorough. We would highly recommend them !

synthesis.summary: Alexander Plumbing demonstrates exceptional emergency response with multiple customers reporting same-day or within-the-hour service. Their technicians are consistently praised for professionalism, thorough explanations, and going above and beyond expectations, making them a reliable choice for urgent plumbing needs.
weaknesses: Limited sample of review types
All reviews are 5-star which may indicate filtering
synthesis.topQuote: I called Alexander Plumbing and they were at our home within the hour! They had the line rodded out and were all done in two hours. AND, they cleaned the floor in the laundry room. Looked like nothing ever happened, all resolved by 11am.

plumbers.name: HT STRENGER Plumbing Inc.
plumbers.address: 28915 N Herky Dr #101, Lake Bluff, IL 60044, USA

reviews.author: David Zelken
reviews.text:
We went with HT Strenger to install a new water heater and couldn’t be happier with the work or their competitive pricing. They showed up on time, completed the job efficiently, and left no mess behind. There’s a reason they’ve been around so long and continue to earn excellent reviews.
Friendly, knowledgeable, and professional service—you really can’t go wrong. They’ll definitely be the first call I make the next time we need something done.

reviews.author: Janice Bautista Sassin
reviews.text: We had a very last minute job that needed attention and Brad was there to save the day! We were hosting a large dinner party later in the evening and the HT Strenger team was able to fit us in between jobs. Every company in the area charged ridiculous amount for same day service and their staff wasn't nearly as kind as the folks at HTS. Needless to say, great service, very accommodating folks and professional job well done (all within 25 minutes!). We like problem solvers with service with a smile!

reviews.author: Kevin Cullum
reviews.text: Brad was awesome. He's been to our house multiple times and always handles business well and efficiently. Most recently, he also took a look at our water heater (he was not there to look at it originally) and made a few quick adjustments which were huge. HT Strenger didn't even install the water heater, but Brad went above and beyond to help us out. Really appreciate it and would recommend HT Strenger to anyone.

reviews.author: Arif Ali
reviews.text:
We have used this company for over a decade and I’ve been thoroughly impressed by their service.
I recently had an issue after hours. I received a call back from one of the technicians, Brad within a few minutes of calling the operator. He was able to troubleshoot my FloLogic water shutoff device with just a few questions.  Thanks HT Strenger!

reviews.author: Randi Carlson
reviews.text: I was referred by Cahill since I needed someone out quickly and they were fully booked. When another company refers you that says a lot. HT got someone out super quick, they fixed the issue quickly and my panic was gone quickly!  I definitely recommend HT Strenger and if the needs arises again, I'll definitely use them!

synthesis.summary: HT Strenger is a highly reliable plumbing company with exceptional emergency response and customer service. They consistently deliver fast, professional service with competitive pricing and go above and beyond to help customers, making them an excellent choice for urgent plumbing needs.
synthesis.topQuote: We had a very last minute job that needed attention and Brad was there to save the day! We were hosting a large dinner party later in the evening and the HT Strenger team was able to fit us in between jobs. Every company in the area charged ridiculous amount for same day service and their staff wasn't nearly as kind as the folks at HTS.

plumbers.name: U.S. Allied Plumbing & HVAC
plumbers.address: 191 Poplar Pl, North Aurora, IL 60542, USA

reviews.author: Sam Chase
reviews.text:
Quickly fixed a problem behind my shower faucet that a different company cut holes in my ceiling and quoted me 3k needlessly for.
So grateful for Howard and Zach coming out and swiftly and honestly fixing the problem.

reviews.author: Jason Lehner
reviews.text:
We had a significant leak coming from the main in the basement Howard from US Allied came out with an hour to help.  He was able to band aid fix the leak until the correct part can be ordered so it can be replaced properly.  We are super thankful for his friendly, honest professional service we would highly recommend.

Follow up: US Allied came back out Monday morning as promised to replace the valve where the main comes into the house.  Kyle did an amazing job he was informative, fast and super funny.  Kyle is super friendly type of guy he is the kinda guy you wanna go and crack open a beer with after work just a great attitude. He explained everything he was going to do in detail so there wouldn't be any surprises.  He even took the time to replace a spigot for me while he was here.  Amazing job I stick by my statement I would highly recommend

reviews.author: Matthew Pronger
reviews.text:
Knowledgeable and professional, the plumber, first of all, brought his own boot covers to protect my home. Next, he performed a timely assessment and provided me with the issue and the repair cost before he did anything else. He also provided me with a replacement option.
During the replacement, he was respectful of my home, my budget and my dog. (My dog loved the attention) The work was clean,  time efficient and cost effective.
Thank you, US Allied. We've never had so much hot water. I will definitely use you again.

reviews.author: Mr. MKETHPN Hills
reviews.text: Kyle did an excellent job and provided a thorough overview of what needed to be repaired. More importantly, he provided a competitive price that exceeded my expectations. I will definitely keep US Allied Plumbing and HVAC stored for future repairs and consultation.

reviews.author: Steven Zink
reviews.text: Alex did an excellent job!  Positioned the new water heater so that the controls would be accessible, added vertical run in the vent line for improved draft, added an expansion tank, explained very clearly what routine maintenance is recommended.  Looking forward to the next project with US Allied!

synthesis.summary: U.S. Allied Plumbing & HVAC demonstrates exceptional reliability with technicians who respond quickly to emergencies, provide honest assessments, and complete quality work at competitive prices. Multiple reviews highlight their ability to solve problems other companies couldn't fix and their professional, respectful approach to customer service.
strengths: Quick emergency response and temporary fixes
weaknesses: Limited sample of reviews
24-hour availability unclear
synthesis.topQuote: We had a significant leak coming from the main in the basement Howard from US Allied came out with an hour to help. He was able to band aid fix the leak until the correct part can be ordered so it can be replaced properly.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 1070 Marina Village Pkwy UNIT 202, Alameda, CA 94501, USA

reviews.author: Jessie Xenakis
reviews.text: We had a plumbing backup and subsequent leaking under our house which we wanted addressed quickly. We called Roto-Rooters and they sent their technician, Rick, out within a couple of hours. He was incredibly friendly, knowledgeable and professional. He diagnosed our issues and fixed them right away! We’d definitely call them again for any needed repairs in the future.

reviews.author: dino graniello
reviews.text: Rich is super easy to work with and professional!

reviews.author: Jason Reimann
reviews.text: I had a backed up main sewer line that has caused a major plumbing issue in my home. Both the technician and field supervisor were very knowledgeable and professional. The were thorough with addressing the problem and able to explain what was happening as well as my options in a way that was clear and understandable.

reviews.author: johnny nguyen
reviews.text: Even they don’t give me invoice, I tried to them so many times, but no result

reviews.author: N S
reviews.text:
AMAZING SERVICE! Had a random emergency issue in my home today (renter) and after contacting the company, a team of 3 arrived in less than an hour.

It was a big job - but the three workers came, listened, assessed thoroughly, and got right to work.

In the process, two toilets had to be taken out, sewage/water that flooded into two of the showers had to be vacuumed out, lines/pipes had to be cleared out, and all effected areas needed to the be cleaned up afterwards (which was a lot to clean up).

They worked their butts off for hours until everything was done, no complaints or breaks (even though I could tell it was very tiring).

They worked together without issue, communicated throughout (with me and my landlord both/they worked out payment etc with him over the phone for me) and were all super friendly and down to earth as well, which made the whole experience way less stressful.

The company will also be sending another team member out in a couple days to inspect and mar a plan to fix any potential damage as a result of today’s issue if needed.

****TERRENCE, AMAD, and MATT were the 3 workers who did the job today****
Y’all rock!

Thanks again!!

P.S - I do have one small suggestion for management though.

For emergency issues that happen to fall on weekends and that might require someone to come out and inspect for damage AFTER a situation like mine (from water damage) -

Having whatever general documents your company requires the customer/owner to sign before someone can be sent out to do a post inspection - readily available somewhere for them to access and get signed as soon as possible without having to wait until a weekday/when office opens again would be really helpful and avoid any delays.

In my case it’s Saturday, so I’ll wait until Monday, but would have liked that to be done today. It’s not a huge deal, Monday is okay too! But just a suggestion!

Again thank you for the amazing service!!!

reviews.author: Alyssa G
reviews.text: Roto-Rooter was AMAZING!!! We needed assistance in installing a drain pan for a washer that needed to be connected to a pipe. Within the hour of calling, the technician Francisco arrived and was a class act! He helped my husband move the washer and then took it from there. The difficult part was getting the exact measurements so that we can fit our new washing machine in the drain pan due how our laundry room is set up. Francisco not only installed our new drain pan, but removed the old one and hauled it away for us. Previously before finding Roto-Rooter we called 9 different companies/small business technicians to see who can help us and wanted our business, however no one was helpful unless you purchased a product from them OR they flat out didn’t want to do it…..so thank you so much Roto-Rooter and the technician Francisco for helping us!!!

reviews.author: ma c
reviews.text:
Rich, from Roto-Rooter, just cleaned out our main drain in the front yard. What a nice gentleman. He did a wonderful job, cleaned up the mess that the plugged-up drain left behind. He was conscientious, professional and made sure that the drain was completely unclogged. I am very satisfied and glad that I chose Roto-Rooter.

Roto-Rooter also sent a second person, Jason, to run a camera down the drain to make sure that the drain was cleared to my satisfaction; it was.

Finally, Roto-Rooter had a $100.00 coupon that I could use, making the job very affordable. I will definitely use Roto-Rooter again.

reviews.author: Sam Goldhaber
reviews.text:
Richard service technician 7280 from Roto-Rooter's team made the experience of getting plumbing done at my home painless.
Additionally he spent the extra effort and time to explain the service he provided.

Roto-Rooter isn't the cheapest option in the Bay area but the service quality provided by this individual made it worth the investment and he worked with me to find a price that I could agree on.

I hope someone at his company is able to read this review because it was absolutely his work and professionalism that made me decide to say yes to the service as well as satisfied upon its completion.

reviews.author: Heather Johnson
reviews.text: Rich saved the day when our shower was backing up and found the culprit in a massive hair ball! He was patient, customer service oriented and very courteous as he releived us of our bezoar burden. He answered all of our questions and spent the necessary time ensuring the job was done right. We consulted a couple of other companies first and ultimately we are so glad we went with Rich and Roto Rooter because the service and price were impeccable. Thanks Rich, you rock!

reviews.author: Megan Coughlin
reviews.text: I had two issues and was unable to find an explanation or any solutions. During an estimate visit, I was given a good description of both issues and instructions on how to resolve them and keep future problems from happening. This was exceptional handling of the situation from my tech, Rich. He also pointed out an issue with outside faucets in my townhouse complex and gave me all the instructions for how this can be resolved before a problem happens!

reviews.author: Josh McCormick
reviews.text: I own a small business and had a plumbing problem that was going to potentially result in closing my business in order to get it resolved. Terrence arrived shortly after I called, quickly diagnosed the problem, and resolved it in less than an hour. I’m extremely appreciative for the quick, thorough, and definitive fix, as well as his professionalism and kind demeanor. Terrence was fantastic and I’m very appreciative. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: PD Wanjari
reviews.text:
We had an emergency kitchen sink drain problem, and on a friend's recommendation, decided to call Roto Rooter. Within the next 2 hours they were at my place working.

The work was prompt and to satisfaction. Apart from that, Richard, out technician, shared several tips to ensure longevity of pipes. Overall, when it's plumbing, I think I need not see elsewhere, but Roto Rooter.

Highly recommend the company, and Richard, in specific.

reviews.author: Derrick M.
reviews.text: I can’t say enough about Terrence! Incredibly professional, well spoken, knowledgeable, and an excellent communicator. He was upfront about everything, and explained his process before he got to work. He was able to get the main pipe cleared out for us quicker than the UFC fight I watched while he worked his magic! I’ll definitely be a return customer for a long time to come. Great work Terrence, and thank you again brother.

reviews.author: Dana Holliday
reviews.text: Rich, the technician that came to the house at 10pm on a Sunday night was super quick, friendly, knowledgeable and resolved the issue. We had a block in our sewer line that led to water coming out of our downstairs shower and flooding the bathroom. Appreciate roto rooters speed to action and ability to quickly resolve the issue.

reviews.author: Susan Bradley
reviews.text: Terrence was so knowledgeable, kind and helpful! I had never had anything like this happen at my home and he was reassuring and confident in getting it done. He always had a smile on his face and was extremely capable! He truly is an asset to roto rooter! Thank you Terrence for making a not great situation fell not that bad :)

synthesis.summary: They show up fast and know their stuff, but be ready for sticker shock—initial quotes can be wildly high before negotiation brings them down.
strengths: Fast emergency response: 12+ Google reviewers explicitly mention arrival within 1-2 hours, with several praising late-night/weekend availability (10pm Sunday calls, Thanksgiving Day service)

Exceptional technician quality: Named technicians (Rich, Terrence, Richard, Francisco, Armando) consistently praised for knowledge, explanations, and professionalism across 70+ reviews; many reviewers mention being taught preventive maintenance tips
BBB A+ accreditation and 91 years in business establish institutional trust, despite high complaint volume
weaknesses: Severe pricing volatility: 1 reviewer reported initial quote of $7,000 dropping to $900-$1,000 after negotiation; 1 other reviewer noted price 'seemed high'; suggests inconsistent or aggressive initial quoting practices

BBB red flag: 781 total complaints over company history is substantial; while accredited, the complaint volume relative to positive reviews (86 Google reviews vs. 781 BBB complaints) signals systemic issues not fully reflected in Google ratings
Missing critical documentation: 1 reviewer reports technician did not provide invoice despite multiple requests—raises accountability and record-keeping concerns
redFlags: Pricing disputes: 2 of 86 Google reviewers report unexpectedly high initial quotes or pricing negotiation required; combined with 781 BBB complaints (many historically complaint-driven), suggests pricing transparency or quoting consistency issues
Missing documentation: 1 reviewer unable to obtain invoice after service despite repeated requests—potential compliance or operational accountability concern

High BBB complaint volume (781 total): While accredited A+, the absolute complaint count is a significant reliability signal relative to visible positive reviews and warrants scrutiny of complaint types (unavailable in data)
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews confirm after-hours dispatch (10pm Sunday, late evening calls), rapid arrival (under 2 hours typical), and holiday availability (Thanksgiving, Christmas Eve service documented). Strong emergency infrastructure.

plumbers.name: High Priority Plumbing and Services, Inc.
plumbers.address: 317 Northpoint Pkwy, Acworth, GA 30102, USA

reviews.author: Mackenzie Holtzclaw
reviews.text: Justin was so awesome, helpful, and super informative.

reviews.author: JaKayla Caprice
reviews.text:
Justin was fantastic! He took the time to educate us on where our water meter is located, how to check it, and how to properly turn off the water valve. He was extremely helpful and quickly identified the source of the leak. After receiving outrageous quotes from several other companies just to locate the issue, it was such a relief to have someone diagnose and fix the problem the very same day.

10/10 — highly recommend! Be sure to ask for Justin if you want excellent customer service.

reviews.author: Mariah Mitchell
reviews.text: Thanks Steven for installing my new water heater.

reviews.author: Charles Barclay
reviews.text:
Greetings!
I used High Priority to help find the source of a leak. I’m very thankful that High Priority sent Devin to assist. When Devin came to my home, he told me how he usually troubleshoots in order to determine the source of a leak. He also told me some of the steps had he already taken before entering my home. Devin then went to each faucet and toilet of my home and very carefully figured out the source(s) of the leak. What I appreciate the most about Devin was his willingness to explain (and sometimes re-explain) how to identify the source(s) of a leak and how to fix the issue(s). He even showed me how to replace a flapper. I’m really grateful for Devin’s service today (02/16/2026). He did a sterling job!

reviews.author: Bravo Charlie
reviews.text:
Highly professional and thorough service.

Steven communicated when he would be here and arrived on time, punctuality is huge plus.

At each step in the investigation and repair of our leak, Steven asked if we had questions. He talked us through the "how" and "why" of each step in the process.

The thorough review of our plumbing and attention to detail, highlighted another issue that we will be working with High Priority plumbing to fix. Again, he displayed high levels of communication and professionalism.

We ended with a clear plan for the next step to correct our plumbing problems. I would highly recommend High Priority Plumbing and specifically Steven for future use.

reviews.author: Gabrielle Washington
reviews.text: Plumbing issues is never something you want to have to deal with. Yet it’s easier to deal with when you have someone who’s willing to see your issues out before saying no or direct you to someone else that may waste your time. Aaron was prompt, professional and transparent with expectations. His approach to this problem made it less stressful. I’m grateful a solution was provided, the effort and patience is key to why I’ll continue to do business with this company! Thank you

reviews.author: Ang
reviews.text: Mr. Darren from the Acworth location, for my AHS appt, he came and took care of 3 or 4 plumbing issues for me, I forgot to add 1 thing. He took a look at it anyway, it was an electrical issue instead and he could not help.  But that it did not stop him form wanting to do the repair when I forgot to add it to my list.  That is a Great Contractor in my book, not just a good contractor.  Thank you Mr Darren, you are lucky to have him Priority Plumbing!!!***

reviews.author: Michelle Newman
reviews.text: My experience with High Priority Plumbing was excellent!  Aaron was very courteous,  knowledgeable and professional.  He explained what was happening with my hot water heater and recommended for it to be replaced.  Upon his return to install my new hot water heater, he explained exactly what he would be doing during the installation.  I am very pleased with this company! Aaron is the best!!  American Home Shield got one right!!

reviews.author: Mike B
reviews.text:
I’ve been in the construction industry for 26 years and am a licensed General Contractor, so I don’t give praise lightly.

Steven was outstanding—professional, knowledgeable, and clear in explaining the issues and solutions. He quickly identified what needed to be done and helped move the repairs forward. Based on my experience, he’s easily in the top 1% of vendors I’ve worked with.

Highly recommend this company.

reviews.author: Buck
reviews.text: Priority Plumbing did a great job again! Justin came by and replaced my sewage ejector pump fast and professionally. He showed up on time, explained everything clearly, and made sure the job was done right before he left. The whole process was smooth, clean, and stress-free. I really appreciate the quality work and great customer service—highly recommend Priority Plumbing and Justin for any plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Rebecca Camon
reviews.text: Shoutout to Jordan Harrington! He is professional and kind. I have had him on two occasions. The worst one was whenI had a real bad clog in my sink. It had my house smelling so terrible for days. The guys came out and were very professional. They unclogged my sink and told me what I did wrong so I can do better. Great service. Highly recommend

reviews.author: Allek S
reviews.text: Aaron was phenomenal. high priority was contracted through my home warranty, which can be hit or miss. Aaron took the time to diagnose, explain the issues and next steps through the lens of my warranty, and resolved the main issue within one visit, while flagging other suggested services to optimize plumbing given the age of my appliances.

reviews.author: Denise Picus
reviews.text: Great customer service! Steven did a thorough job determining the source of our leak which was coming from our master shower valve & was not a pipe. He replaced the shower cartridge which fixed the problem. We did, however, have to involve a water restoration company to assess the water damage in the crawlspace. Steven did a great job!

reviews.author: Willingham Family
reviews.text: David went above and beyond to make sure our problem was solved, even going to get a part we needed that was non-standard.  David was professional, thorough,  and provided superior expertise. I would trust him with any complex plumbing issues and recommend him and High Priority Plumbing with the highest possible rating!

reviews.author: Elissa Oshinski
reviews.text: Great experience overall! Communication was clear and easy, and the technician, David, was super friendly and professional. He fixed my hot water heater quickly (within his control) and did excellent work. Everything was explained well and left clean afterward. I’d definitely recommend them and would use them again.

synthesis.summary: Steven and their team consistently show up knowing exactly what's wrong and explain it in plain English—96 Google reviews all 5 stars, 25 years in business, virtually no complaints.
strengths: Exceptional diagnostic clarity: 15+ reviewers specifically mention technicians explained the problem and solution in detail before charging
Individual technician standouts: Steven appears in 25+ reviews with consistent praise for knowledge and professionalism; Aaron, David, Justin, and Jordan each mentioned 5+ times with similar patterns
Educational approach: Multiple reviewers note technicians taught them how to identify issues themselves or maintain systems, reducing future emergency calls
weaknesses: One upfront payment requirement mentioned: Single reviewer (01/09/2026) noted the company 'initially wanted up front payment...which in my experience is not customary,' though issue was resolved
No BBB accreditation despite A+ rating: 25 years in business with only 1 complaint on record suggests strong reliability, but lack of accreditation is a minor trust gap
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviewers mention prompt arrival and same-day resolution; at least 3 reviews explicitly reference emergency situations (water heater failure, severe clog, leak during family crisis) handled rapidly. No after-hours or weekend availability explicitly mentioned in reviews.

plumbers.name: Five Star Plumbing Services
plumbers.address: 2018 Mountain Rd, Joppatowne, MD 21085, USA

reviews.author: Liz Matiacio
reviews.text: I had a clog in the bathroom which plugged up the shower, toilet, and tub on one side of the house. The two young men who came to help me were kind, patient, polite, and not deterred by some extra challenges. They started with a 25 foot snake, but had to then use a longer one. They first found a small hex tool in the drain. Then they continued to look for the actual clog. It took a few hours but they found it, and it was stubborn. These two guys just kept working at it until it finally broke apart. They maintained a sense of humor. I thought the price was extremely reasonable. I would highly recommend 5 Starr Plumbing and these two guys without hesitation and with a lot of praise for a challenging job well done.

reviews.author: James Conley
reviews.text: I don’t write post often but feel compelled to share my experience with Five Star Plumbing.     I had a water line leak originating from the outside and leaking into my basement. Unfortunately, my home warranty company nor home owners insurance company covered the repair. This turned out to be a significant out of pocket expense. I called several big named companies and was met with broken promises and quotes between $7,300.00 and $8,300.00 being the highest. Something inside of me told me to keep looking for a better deal. I ran across Five Star Pluming online and gave them a call. It was a Sunday morning. I spoke with Chris who said they could repair my leaking line on Tuesday morning. I appreciated the honesty. The big companies said they could do the job the same day, only to come up with excuses. I reluctantly asked Chris how much the job will cost. The quote Chris gave me was thousands less. The quote included replacing all plumbing leading to the county meter inside. No other company offered this as part of their quote. Five Star Plumbing arrived on time and did an awesome job as promised for thousands of dollars less. Did I mention Five Star guaranteed the water line for 10 years? If you want a job done right, honesty upfront and a fair price, chose Five Star Plumbing.

reviews.author: Melissa Bettinger
reviews.text: They replaced a water main line for us. I called someone was out the same day to give me an estimate. Way below what I had received from other major plumbing businesses. They were here the next morning did the job quickly, efficiently and cleaned up afterwards. Will definately use them again.

reviews.author: Donald Littleton
reviews.text: Company charged me $606 for a garbage disposal replacement. The badger 5 cost $114 ! This is grossly overpriced for a 30 minute job. I contacted the owner, he refunded me $60. He said his overhead contributed to the cost although he claims to be a small business owner. Further I contacted 3 other local plumbing companies, they quoted me $306, $359, and $399. Simply unacceptable! Beware. Please get 3 quotes before using this company. Very unprofessional to say the least.

reviews.author: Yungjin Kim
reviews.text:
We recently completed two projects with Five Star, including the replacement of the water line between the main shutoff valve and the house. The cost and quality of their service for that work were excellent, and we had no complaints. Based on that experience, I would recommend Five Star for main waterline leak repairs.

During the water line replacement, I also asked Chris about repairing a leaking bathtub faucet. He said they could send another technician the next day to replace the diverter cartridge. The following morning, the technician arrived and, after a quick inspection, provided an estimate of $471 for the repair. He explained that the work required replacing the shower diverter cartridge, consistent with what Chris had mentioned. Although the estimate was higher than I expected, I approved it, assuming the repair might be complex and because the technician was ready to proceed.

After I shut off the main water for him, I took a short break to have a cup of coffee. Before I even finished it, he had completed the replacement and asked me to turn the water back on for a leak test. The technician was very professional, and the repair was completed within about 20 minutes with good results.

However, I felt that $471 was excessive for the level of labor and complexity involved. I later checked the price of the T809206 shower diverter cartridge and found it sells for about $57 at Home Depot, meaning roughly $410 was charged for about 30 minutes of labor. Because Five Star had previously provided fair pricing and excellent service for the main waterline repair, I did not obtain multiple estimates for the bathtub repair—I relied on my loyalty and trust in them. Afterward, I checked with other plumbers and learned that comparable repairs typically range from $250 to $350, including parts.

This experience was a lesson learned: relying on a single provider, even one with whom you have had good experiences, may not always result in fair pricing. It is always best to obtain multiple estimates before making a decision, regardless of prior loyalty.

reviews.author: Kayla F
reviews.text:
I could've sworn I'd left my review already but it seems I haven't.
Five star came out back in July to repair our main line sewer pipe because it had collapsed. From start to finish they were excellent. They explained everything in a way we could understand, showed us the video footage and did a great job getting it repaired. They had to dig a massive hole and when they were done you could barely tell they'd done it. I'm used to most places not putting things back the way it was and leaving the mess for me to clean up.

Today I had to give them a call because we started hearing bubbling from our basement toilet again. They came right out to us checked everything over and offered a quick simple solution to try out rather than just trying to push some expensive repair on us.

Five star is absolutely our go to plumber now and I highly recommend them for any of your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Bigliss90
reviews.text: There is a reason they call themselves Five Star Plumbing. This was the absolute best experience I ever had with a service provider. Five Star Plumbing is my new company for any plumping issues. I called about a leak and the plumber was at my house 30 minutes later. My toilet flange was leaking into my basement. Jay was the plumber that fixed my leak and he was an absolute professional. He walked me through what was wrong and exactly what he was going to do to fix it. He was so kind, thorough, and truly great at what he does. Additionally, he gave a very fair price to fix the issue and warranted the work for a year. Lastly, Jay fixed the leak that day. All in all, I could not have had a better experience. This is a local company that has top notch employees. I would highly recommend you to give this company a shot. I know this is going to be my go to company for now on.

reviews.author: Demetrios “Jimmy”
reviews.text:
After 26 years, my wife and I moved to a new location and needed a new plumber.  After reading all the excellent reviews we decided to go with Five Star plumbing.  An excellent decision was made on our part. I Can't say enough about the folks from Five Star plumbing. The guys arrived here on time, were  polite, courteous and most importantly extremely knowledgeable.  They were able to get everything we needed accomplished and the prices were very reasonable.  I've been a homeowner for over 27 years so I have an idea about pricing and plumbing. Mitch and Jay were extremely detailed, thorough and were very conscious of keeping everything clean.
We have our electricians,  HVAC, septic, general contractor and now we have found our new plumbing company!

reviews.author: Flash Brasch
reviews.text: My experience with Five Star Plumbing was excellent. Miss Cindy was gracious and professional when we called on a Monday morning, and she dispatched TJ on the same day. In less than 4 hours, TJ effected repairs on our black water/gray water discharge pipe after detailing our options to us in easy-to-understand language, with pricing included. After a week of regular use now, there are no leaks, and TJ's work looks solid, indeed. Thank you Miss Cindy and TJ for a job well done at a reasonable price! :)

reviews.author: Rocky Robertson
reviews.text: When I called for an appointment I expected them to tell me they would be at my house in a couple of days but to my surprise they came the same day. They replaced my kitchen faucet. They asked me what kind of faucet I wanted and went to Home Depot and got a perfect match. When they returned they installed the faucet in less than 35 minutes and the price they gave me up front was the price they charged. And the price was very reasonable. If you need a plumber this is the company to call.

reviews.author: Mal Baker
reviews.text: We discovered water leak from the main pipe , which needed to be replaced . After few estimates we went with Five Star Plumbing which turned out to be the best decision! Brian showed up on time , extremely knowledgeable and professional. Explained everything they were going to do and did just that . We had a tree with huge roots on their way but Brian and his team worked hard to dig out all they needed and repair what was necessary. Would definitely recommend them to anyone !

reviews.author: monica Thayer
reviews.text: Five Star Plumbing responded immediately to our call for service. The plumbers gave an estimate of the cost for repair of our leaking copper pipe. The work was completed within 45 minutes and the plumbers explained how the pipe had been repaired.  Work was done quickly and neatly and to our satisfaction.  The plumbers were kind and professional, calling us 15 minutes before they arrived and making sure they had answered all of our questions before departing.

reviews.author: Ahmed Zouita
reviews.text: Great Company! The owner Chris was great to deal with. I received quotes from a few companies and he beat their prices by a good amount. They even cut a bush that was in the way. They finished everything within one day, like they said. Once they finished up, they cleaned up after themselves and took the trash with them including the part of the bush they cut. Thank you so much to Chris and everyone who helped restored our water with a new system.

reviews.author: Sabrina Nolan
reviews.text: It's good to know there are still kind, honest people in the world. We got four estimates on plumbing work. This company was the only one that made us feel comfortable. When explaining the work, they were so detailed, patient with our questions, and confident. We're thrilled with the work, and grateful for the extremely fair pricing. Super thankful we were referred to Five Star Plumbing, we will absolutely use this team in the future. Thank you!

reviews.author: Cherise Petty
reviews.text: Five Star Plumbing Services came to my home to install a submersible well pump after my jet pump failed.  Chris and his team performed the job efficiently.  They answered all of my questions and believe me, I had many!  Weather wise, it was a windy and rainy day, but they stuck with it until the job was complete.  I had other issues, but Chris took care of it.  Thank you so much for your expertise and patience.  I will call upon you again!

synthesis.summary: They show up fast and fix it right, but you'll pay premium rates for labor—get multiple quotes before committing.
strengths: Same-day or next-day service mentioned in 15+ reviews; multiple emergency repairs (main line breaks, no water situations) completed within hours of call
BBB A+ accreditation with zero complaints across 3 years and 35 years in business—strong trust signal for reliability

Consistent praise for professionalism, cleanliness, and detailed explanations; technicians named (Chris, TJ, Pat, Brian, William, Jay) appear repeatedly across positive reviews, suggesting stable, trained staff
weaknesses: 3 separate reviews (Sept 2025, Nov 2024, Dec 2025) cite labor rates of $250/hour+ resulting in bills $580–$606 for 20–30 minute jobs (P-trap replacement, garbage disposal, cartridge swap); industry comparisons show competitors charge $250–$350 for same work. Customer in Dec 2025 review initially felt overcharged but company did follow up to apologize

4 reviews mention inability or reluctance to provide upfront estimates without $89 service call fee; two reviewers (March 2023, Sept 2025) note pricing not disclosed during scheduling, leading to sticker shock
redFlags: Pricing disputes in 3 of 84 Google reviews (3.6%) involving labor rates perceived as excessive relative to job complexity and competitor quotes; two customers felt misled by lack of upfront pricing disclosure. Company did refund or follow up in at least one case, but pattern suggests systemic pricing communication gap for small/quick jobs
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews confirm same-day emergency response (30 minutes to a few hours) for critical failures like main line leaks, no water, and sewage issues. One Sunday morning callback mentioned. Strong pattern of rapid dispatch during emergencies.

plumbers.name: Emergency Plumbing service
plumbers.address: 449 Lakeside Pl, Highland Park, IL 60035, USA

reviews.author: Paul Tsupin
reviews.text: I’ve had an excellent experience with this plumbing company across my home and multiple other properties. Their service is always prompt, honest, and professional. The team is extremely knowledgeable, takes the time to answer all questions clearly, and consistently resolves issues the right way the first time. Communication is outstanding from start to finish, which is rare and very much appreciated. Reliable, transparent, and high-quality work every time. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Orlando
reviews.text: Konstantin reached out and was able to squeeze me in last minute to provide assistance and repair a copper pipe that was damaged during a remodel project. That speed in which he replied and showed up for the repair, the professionalism, the knowledge, and the efficiency he displayed during the short, quick visit was phenomenal. Well worth the price of service.

reviews.author: Ziyad Nazem
reviews.text: I’ve used this plumbing service several times, and every experience has been excellent. They are always prompt, reliable, and available when needed, and their rates are very reasonable. The quality of work has consistently been great, and I’ve never had an issue. Konstantin, in particular, does a fantastic job—professional, courteous, and efficient. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Aaron
reviews.text:
$35,000 DISASTER FROM A SIMPLE CLOGGED TOILET!!!

We called "Emergency Plumbing" with a clogged toilet in August 2024. After their plumber visited us, we ended up with THREE ROOMS DESTROYED BY WATER AND SEWAGE, costing $35,000 IN REPAIRS that took SEVERAL MONTHS, and then later getting dropped by our brand new homeowners insurance due to the claim!

"Emergency Plumbing" happily took my several hundred dollars in payment for "clearing the clogged toilet". They have offered no recompense for causing our massive loss. But, to their credit, they did say "sorry" a couple times.

THE FULL, DISGUSTING, DANGEROUS, SAD STORY:

In August 2024 I called about a clogged toilet I couldn't plunge clear. They were able to schedule a plumber for early in the morning.

He tried an auger to clear the clog, to no avail. So, he asked to see the sewer cleanout. We went to the basement, where things were about to go DANGEROUSLY BAD.

He opened up the cleanout and A FIRE HOSE RIVER OF SEWAGE immediately began to spray out onto him and our finished basement. He panicked and asked for garbage cans / bags to catch the sewage river.

My wife brought down some large utility garbage bags. The plumber and I held up and filled about 3-4 large bags of sewage over our heads during the next several minutes before the flow finally stopped and he could cap off the cleanout. He reassured me by saying, "sometimes stuff like this happens". We were both drenched in sewage from head to toe. Some had splashed in my eyes and mouth.

He started to hand mop up the large sewage puddle with some paper towels. I told him "don't bother, this all will need a mitigation company". He replied, "all you really need is some soap and water". Ummm no.

We dried off, shedded clothes and went back upstairs. The toilet still wouldn't drain, so he said he'd drive back to get the larger auger. He asked if I had any toilets upstairs, and I replied yes. He said "OK, you can use your upstairs toilet and shower, just don't use the clogged one down here". He left and I started to shower.

After showering I came back down to the main floor to discover that SHOWER WATER WAS GUSHING OUT OF THE TOILET INTO OUR BATHROOM AND HALLWAY!!! More fun!

In the second panic of the day, I tried my best to dam up the NEW RIVER OF WATER now FLOODING my main level hardwood floors. I ran downstairs to see even more water now soaking many ceiling tiles and raining onto the sauna and floor.

I called the plumber and the head plumber agreed to come join the fun. He arrived, I explain the scene, and he said "Oh no, he should never have told you to use the fixtures upstairs". Oh no!

The first plumber later returned with the larger auger. They managed to clear the clog with it. They did some hand mopping up of the now destroyed first floor powder room, hallway, hall closet, and living room. They asked for a check for several hundred dollars, said sorry for the problems, took my check and left.

The next day we opted for a water & sewage mitigation company, rather than the plumber's recommendation of "soap and water". We then watched much of our house get ripped apart and endured days of loud fans a dehumidifiers.

The insurance claim process and reconstruction took place over the next couple months. We had to cancel our Thanksgiving party, as we were still wrapping up the rebuild by then.In the weeks after the plumbing adventure, I texted and called the plumber, hoping to get some recompense for this disaster, maybe cover my insurance deductible, maybe even my money back? We talked on the phone once and I made my case. He didn't offer anything at all. Haven't heard from them since.

0 STARS - CANNOT RECOMMEND FOR ANY PLUMBING WORK. Maybe the head plumber is good? But whatever junior plumber they sent to unclog my toilet basically destroyed much of my new house. They were arrived on time and were friendly to talk to, though, tiny bonus points for that. ONE QUARTER OF A STAR

reviews.author: Igor Khaletskiy
reviews.text: I hired Emergency Plumbing to install a new water heater and was very impressed. Konstantin, the master technician, explained everything clearly and did an excellent job. The work was done quickly, professionally, and at a fair price. I’m very satisfied and would recommend them to anyone.

synthesis.summary: This plumbing company shows strong technical skills and excellent customer service from their master plumber Konstantin, but has a concerning track record including one catastrophic incident that caused $35,000 in damages. While most customers praise their professionalism and reliability, the severe emergency response failure raises serious questions about their junior staff's competency.
strengths: Highly skilled master plumber (Konstantin) with excellent reputation
Fast emergency response and last-minute availability
Consistent quality work for routine services
weaknesses: Major competency issues with junior staff on emergency calls
Poor crisis management and responsibility for damages
Inconsistent service quality depending on which plumber responds
redFlags: $35,000 in damages from improper emergency toilet unclogging procedure
Junior plumber gave dangerous advice causing extensive flooding
Company refused to take responsibility for catastrophic damage they caused
synthesis.topQuote: Konstantin reached out and was able to squeeze me in last minute to provide assistance and repair a copper pipe that was damaged during a remodel project. That speed in which he replied and showed up for the repair, the professionalism, the knowledge, and the efficiency he displayed during the short, quick visit was phenomenal.
synthesis.worstQuote: $35,000 DISASTER FROM A SIMPLE CLOGGED TOILET!!! We called 'Emergency Plumbing' with a clogged toilet in August 2024. After their plumber visited us, we ended up with THREE ROOMS DESTROYED BY WATER AND SEWAGE, costing $35,000 IN REPAIRS that took SEVERAL MONTHS, and then later getting dropped by our brand new homeowners insurance due to the claim!

plumbers.name: J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
plumbers.address: 964 N McLean Blvd, Elgin, IL 60123, USA

reviews.author: Hershel Perlmutter
reviews.text: I had a fantastic experience with Edgar as he replaced our kitchen sink drain system. He was thorough and patient with me, as he explained what the issue was and how was going to solve the problem. He even walked me through the repair/installation at key points during the process. I'd highly recommend Edgar and J. Blanton for any of your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Logan Cook
reviews.text: Greg was very professional and knowledgeable. He made quick work of our toilet repair and was willing to double check the plumbing underneath to ensure we didn’t have any other connected problems. Would recommend.

reviews.author: Christopher C.
reviews.text: Dominic ran into some very large build up during the cleaning, but was able to modify his approach to make sure the job was done perfectly. Very thankful for his expertise and service.

reviews.author: Bill Keller
reviews.text: Cameron showed up in time, was super knowledgeable, friendly and paid attention to detail.  He offered advice, conscious about the property and building shut off time frame.  He made sure that all water sources in my condo were working when finished.   Well worth the time and money spent.

reviews.author: Carmen Bello
reviews.text: Zach Staar was the technician we had out to our building to help diagnose some plumbing issues. He is a great guy to work with and is very thorough and up front and explains everything in detail. You can tell he's a guy who cares about the work he does and wants to do the right thing for the home owner. It's increasingly rare to find people like that these days so it was a breath of fresh air working with him.

synthesis.summary: J. Blanton Plumbing consistently delivers professional, knowledgeable service with technicians who take time to explain repairs and ensure quality work. All reviews praise their thoroughness, expertise, and customer-focused approach, making them a reliable choice for emergency plumbing needs.
strengths: Excellent communication and explains repairs clearly
Thorough work with attention to detail
Multiple skilled technicians mentioned by name
weaknesses: Limited sample size of recent reviews
synthesis.topQuote: He is a great guy to work with and is very thorough and up front and explains everything in detail. You can tell he's a guy who cares about the work he does and wants to do the right thing for the home owner.

plumbers.name: 1-800-PLUMBER +AIR
plumbers.address: 351 E Main St, Yukon, OK 73099, USA

reviews.author: Joseph Rivera
reviews.text: My experience was as good as it gets. In 2017 my sewer and gas lines were replaced to the main. Unfortunately I didn’t have the right plumbing company. They only did the bare minimum.  Now in 2025 my drains weren’t draining so 1800 plumber of Yukon+ air assessed my situation and thank the lord I had coverage from HomeServe who covered me for 1500 of my bill . The plumbing team was awesome, courteous and professional. My job took one day to complete and they removed cast iron and lead pipes from 1951 and put pvc everywhere drains were needed for my home. They up sold me a back flow preventer which if I ever need it will definitely be worth it.

reviews.author: TERRY JOHNSON
reviews.text: Floor drain was backed up, the technician (Travis) who came out was completely awesome. His whole goal was to make sure I was satisfied. This comment is truly not about the service but the great work that he did, to get the drain unclogged. He was professional, determined and most of all honest! his work ethics are impeccable and you don't find many like that these days. Great Job Travis and continue to serve your customers the way you do!

reviews.author: eugene McCarrell
reviews.text: Excellent work! Travis and his helper came to do repair on my dripping shower. They came courtesy of my home warranty company and they were very respectful, as I had another person in my home at the same time. They did a first class job. I have to replace the drywall but it is great knowing that the drip has stopped.  I now have full access to my shower. Thank you.

reviews.author: Freda Yamah
reviews.text: Owner is extremely rude. He yelled at me so bad because I called to get clarification as to why my garage disposal is no longer sitting in my sink aligned well like it was prior to them removing it to perform the job. He told me to meet him at the unit the next day so he could show me exactly but the way he yelled at me on the phone no way I was going to meet him in person. No way he should feel comfortable speaking to anyone like that it was absurd!!

reviews.author: Yohana Sheridan
reviews.text:
This company was assigned to me through my home warranty. The representative who came out to do the inspection was absolutely amazing, professional, friendly, and thorough.
