However, the person handling the finances, Vince, was extremely disappointing. I was overcharged by hundreds of dollars. After shopping around, I easily found a much cheaper quote.

I even called back because I wanted the original rep, who was so kind and helpful, to have the job. Instead, Vince told me to find someone else. So I did, and my new water heater is now being installed for hundreds of dollars less.

synthesis.summary: 1-800-PLUMBER +AIR shows strong technical skills with experienced technicians like Travis who deliver professional work on drain issues and repairs. However, serious concerns about management behavior and overcharging practices create risk for customers, especially regarding billing disputes.
strengths: Professional technicians with strong work ethics
Handles complex drain and sewer line repairs effectively
weaknesses: Owner reported as extremely rude and unprofessional
Overcharging issues with financial representative
Poor customer service from management
redFlags: Owner yells at customers over phone calls
Overcharging by hundreds of dollars reported
Management tells customers to find someone else when questioned about pricing
synthesis.topQuote: His whole goal was to make sure I was satisfied. This comment is truly not about the service but the great work that he did, to get the drain unclogged. He was professional, determined and most of all honest! his work ethics are impeccable and you don't find many like that these days.
synthesis.worstQuote: He yelled at me so bad because I called to get clarification as to why my garage disposal is no longer sitting in my sink aligned well like it was prior to them removing it to perform the job.

plumbers.name: Dean Plumbing Company Inc.
plumbers.address: 3100 B Leeman Ferry Rd SW, Huntsville, AL 35801, USA

reviews.author: Kris R
reviews.text: Called Sunday morning for a busted hot water heater. Evan was quick to respond to the dispatch call and showed right up. He assessed the problem, described what was wrong, explained the situation and solution. Then he wasted no time getting started. The whole situation took a lot less time than I expected. He was very polite and personable. His work was great. I have used Dean Plumbing in the past and they will always be my first choice. Happy I do not have to spend the weekend without hot water.

reviews.author: Steven Nelson
reviews.text: I appreciate the quick response of Dean Plumbing. Braxton did a great job. He communicated what he was going to do and kept me updated on his progress and on costs.  Both gentlemen were professional and courteous. And he accomplished the task which was unclogging my daughter's pipes and making sure there were no backups. Good work

reviews.author: Shayne Howell
reviews.text: Rusty and crew did a whole house supply side replacement as well as a small bit of waste side replacement ('60s house with mostly original plumbing).  They did an excellent (and thorough) job, especially dealing with the oddities of plumbing that old.  All the work was completed in the 2 and a half days they quoted and it's so wonderful to have actual water flow again!  I couldn't ask for a more professional, responsive, and friendly experience.

reviews.author: Amy Harvey
reviews.text: This was my first time using Dean Plumbing. I called them and Evan showed up to my house within 30 minutes. He was professional and completed the job in a timely manner. I will definitely use them again for future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Denise Patterson
reviews.text: Evan was very professional, repaired leak at gas meter then verified fire pit and gas logs worked correctly after repair. Efficient work, fair price, came to repair the problem very quickly.  I am very thankful to have everything working safely again especially with a snow and ice storm of significant potential coming this weekend. Bonus was instruction on how to prevent damage to pipes correctly with extreme cold temps coming this weekend! Will definitely call Dean’s anytime I need plumbing / gas repairs!

synthesis.summary: Dean Plumbing Company appears to be an excellent choice for emergency plumbing needs, with multiple reviews praising their rapid response times (including 30-minute arrivals) and professional service. All reviews show 5-star ratings with customers consistently highlighting quick dispatch, clear communication, and quality workmanship from their technicians.
strengths: Handles both simple repairs and complex projects
weaknesses: Limited sample size of reviews
All reviews are 5-star which may indicate selective posting
synthesis.topQuote: Called Sunday morning for a busted hot water heater. Evan was quick to respond to the dispatch call and showed right up. He assessed the problem, described what was wrong, explained the situation and solution. Then he wasted no time getting started.

plumbers.name: J. Henry Plumbing, LLC
plumbers.address: 5518 Old Railroad Bed Rd, Toney, AL 35773, USA

reviews.author: Edward Brothers
reviews.text:
The young man had arrived to put on our expansion tank and bring us up to coat was great in every way
He did an excellent job, nice and neat and precise and cleaned up after himself. He leaked checked all of the fittings before he departed and very happy with the results.

reviews.author: Nathan Henry
reviews.text: J. Henry Plumbing did a great job. I had a shower replaced by New Bath today and when they came to install the new shower pan, but the drain and water stubs were not in the wall, blocking the new installation. All water lines and drains had to relocated by busting the floor up. This large job was done correctly and at a price that was reasonable considering I received a quote from another company that was $2500 more than what I paid. Would recommend!

reviews.author: Jim Stanco
reviews.text: Mr. Conner Troup was very nice and professional. He listened to my concerns about Huntsville utilities recent repairs to a water main in front our house that possibly causing a surge in water pressure causing our T&P valve to pop! . He was honest and said our hot water heater is fine after inspection. He suggested a new T&P replacement as a precautionary measure. He also replaced the drain valve with a ball valve to ease in the suggested drain of our tank a few times a year to prolong the hot water heaters life. I have your number so when it’s time to replace the hot water heater I’m going lot call J. Henry Plumbing. Thanks again Conner.

reviews.author: Donna Bartlett
reviews.text: Dustin did a great job and knew what he was doing. He took the time to find the issue we were having unlike previous plumbers and fixed it. The price was a little high but was in line with other plumbers. Bottom line great service, job well done, average price. I would recommend this plumber.

reviews.author: Scott Haas
reviews.text: I have used J. Henry several times including having them replace a well pump on a rainy cold night!  Excellent service!  Always very responsive and never had to call them back to redo anything.  Every tech I have had was respectful and competent.  I have several rental properties and my own house and will always use them for plumbing issues.

synthesis.summary: J. Henry Plumbing demonstrates excellent technical competence and reliability across diverse plumbing jobs, with customers consistently praising their clean work and honest approach. They've proven responsive for emergency situations including after-hours service, making them a solid choice for urgent plumbing needs.
strengths: Experienced with complex repairs and installations
weaknesses: Pricing tends to be on the higher side
synthesis.topQuote: I have used J. Henry several times including having them replace a well pump on a rainy cold night! Excellent service! Always very responsive and never had to call them back to redo anything.
synthesis.worstQuote: The price was a little high but was in line with other plumbers.

plumbers.name: Beehive Plumbing Orem
plumbers.address: 1145 S 800 E Suite 213, Orem, UT 84097, USA

reviews.author: Sharon Montoya
reviews.text:
Josh was very nice and professional.  Did quick work to get my hot water back on. So maybe I take back what I said within an hour of fixing it we still don't have hot water and it's doing the exact same thing I called for that he fixed! It's been 6 hrs since he left , 5hours since I called and told them it's not working,  said he would call me to walk me through a couple things . Still haven't heard from him . I paid over $500 today and still don't have hot water!!
I don't recommend them.

reviews.author: Selma Griffith
reviews.text: All plumbers that worked on our building today were great. Very transparent, friendly, went above & beyond. It was a long day, they did great.

reviews.author: sharee wilson
reviews.text: Tristen was Awesome! He communicated through the whole process. He was very detailed in everything that he worked on, our house is under contract and these are items that the inspector called out.  We were able to get  Behive Plumbing out there the next day to get everything fixed and get our report back to the buyers, that everything had been taken care of! We are very grateful for Tristen and Behive Plumbing. Would highly recommend!

reviews.author: Cameron Elder
reviews.text:
Jordan Ostler was prompt, professional
, and knowledgeable. He quickly addressed the problem and offered solutions. He also offered preventative measures to ensure the issue was a one time issue. Beyond being a professional, he was also sympathetic. Fantastic customer service all around from the initial set up to the actual service itself.

reviews.author: Natalie Bradshaw
reviews.text: Beehive plumbing was very responsive when I reached out and they were able to come same day within an hour or two. We had Benjamin and Maverick come to our house and they were very kind and professional. They were great with my kids who wanted to see what they were doing and “help.” Thank you!

synthesis.summary: Beehive Plumbing shows strong emergency responsiveness with same-day service and professional technicians, but one serious reliability concern about incomplete repairs suggests getting warranty details upfront. Most customers praise their communication and professionalism.
weaknesses: One case of incomplete repair requiring callback
Slow follow-up on service issues
redFlags: One customer paid $500+ for hot water repair that failed within an hour and received poor follow-up service
synthesis.topQuote: Beehive plumbing was very responsive when I reached out and they were able to come same day within an hour or two. We had Benjamin and Maverick come to our house and they were very kind and professional.
synthesis.worstQuote: So maybe I take back what I said within an hour of fixing it we still don't have hot water and it's doing the exact same thing I called for that he fixed! It's been 6 hrs since he left , 5hours since I called and told them it's not working, said he would call me to walk me through a couple things . Still haven't heard from him . I paid over $500 today and still don't have hot water!!

plumbers.name: Duvall Plumbing Company
plumbers.address: 312 S Coltrane Rd, Edmond, OK 73034, USA

reviews.author: Todd Dobberstein
reviews.text: Rip off. Had a leak that needed to be repaired quickly. I had already removed all the drywall and done the work to find the leak. They were able to come out and fix quickly but charged $650 for 30 minutes of work, about 4 ft of pex, and a couple connectors. Definitely took advantage of me and my situation. Won’t use them again.

reviews.author: Eli Glass
reviews.text: I had an outdoor faucet that wouldn't stop leaking and needed replaced. A lovely receptionist answered my call on a Saturday (Easter weekend at that) and had me scheduled for Monday. 2 professional and easy to talk to guys, Cayde and Rob had an earlier opening on Monday and where able to come out earlier and replace the faucet. This wasn't an average repair as they had to remove a tile in the shower to get to the back of the wall where the outdoor faucet was located and then had to fix the janky work that was previously done 40 years ago. The guys had no problem doing some problem solving and handled the curve ball efficiently and like it was nothing. They got it all taken care of for a reasonable price (Around $400) and my dripping outdoor faucet is no more.

reviews.author: Ginny Schiefer
reviews.text: I would give zero stars if I could. They repaired a slab leak at my house two years ago, and their work was so shoddy that I had to spend another $1700 today to have it repaired. I have attached photos so you can see their mess. Save yourself money and use another company.

reviews.author: Cooper Cadle
reviews.text: I've heard it said you can only pick two of these three, "fast, cheap, good". If it's good and cheap, it won't be fast. If it's fast and cheap, it won't be good. If it's good and fast, it won't be cheap. Duvall is the first company I have worked with that is all three. You will not regret working with them.

reviews.author: Brianna McAlvain
reviews.text: Duvall doesn’t even exist. They were bought out by Airco. This is false advertising and a scheme to dupe customers into thinking they’re using one company, and then another actually shows up. Shady.

synthesis.summary: While Duvall Plumbing has a high Google rating and offers 24-hour service, the reviews reveal serious concerns about pricing, work quality, and business practices. Multiple customers report overcharging for emergency work and shoddy repairs that required costly fixes later.
weaknesses: Inconsistent pricing
Quality control issues
Potential business identity confusion
bestFor: Emergency repairs when other options unavailable
redFlags: Company may have been acquired by Airco creating confusion about actual service provider
Multiple reports of overcharging during emergencies
Shoddy work requiring expensive repairs within 2 years
synthesis.topQuote: 2 professional and easy to talk to guys, Cayde and Rob had an earlier opening on Monday and where able to come out earlier and replace the faucet... They got it all taken care of for a reasonable price (Around $400)
synthesis.worstQuote: Duvall doesn't even exist. They were bought out by Airco. This is false advertising and a scheme to dupe customers into thinking they're using one company, and then another actually shows up. Shady.

plumbers.name: Frecka Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1770 Newberry St, Cuyahoga Falls, OH 44221, USA

reviews.author: Jeff O'Brien
reviews.text:
We had a fantastic experience with Frecka Plumbing! Matt came out to install a Toto bidet toilet seat for us, and from start to finish, everything was top-notch. He arrived right on time, which we really appreciated, and his friendly, professional attitude made the whole experience a pleasure.

What stood out most was how thoroughly Matt explained everything, from the installation process to how to get the most out of the new seat. You could tell he genuinely cared about doing the job right and making sure we were completely comfortable and satisfied before he left.

It’s rare to find a company that combines quality workmanship with such outstanding customer service. Frecka Plumbing has earned a customer for life. If you’re looking for a plumber you can trust, look no further. Ask for Matt, you won’t be disappointed!

reviews.author: Paul Anderson
reviews.text:
Frecka Plumbing did a great job replacing our main shutoff valve at a reasonable price. Tim, our plumber, did wonderful work, coordinating everything with the water department and replacing the faulty valve. He also coached me in draining and flushing our water heater without any extra charge!
The job was done on time, the area was left clean, and the bill was less than estimated. Cannot recommend them more highly.

reviews.author: John MacWherter
reviews.text:
Tim was great!!  We had several jobs lined up for him--replace a  shower head, fix a leaky faucet, tighten a sink handle--and he did them all in an hour and a half and did them well.  We have been working with Frecka for more than 20 years and they have always been great to work with and reasonably priced.
A quality operation!

John MacWherter

reviews.author: Michele Messina
reviews.text: I love Frecka plumbing..we have used them multiple  times and they are amazing!  Tim the plumber also known as "Jim " per his business card  is absolutely  amazing!  His knowledge  is fantastic...he is friendly and so helpful!  I look forward to seeing him. I know thst he will find and fix the problems every time!  Thank you to Tim and Frecka for another  wonderful  experience!!!! You guys are amazing!!!!!  Same day service!  Absolutely amazing!!!!

reviews.author: Rachel Davis
reviews.text:
I will never let any other plumbing company work on my house! Tim swapped out a shower valve for me, very efficiently and cleaned up after. Five star service AND pricing. I was figuring it would be way, way more expensive and the possibility of extra holes for access.
Thank you guys for being so reliable and knowledgeable! Frecka is permanently on my speed dial when issues arise.

synthesis.summary: Frecka Plumbing shows exceptional reliability with 20+ years of consistent service and same-day availability. Customers consistently praise their professional workmanship, fair pricing, and thorough explanations, making them a solid choice for emergency plumbing needs.
strengths: Consistently reasonable pricing, often below estimates
20+ year track record with repeat customers
weaknesses: Limited number of recent reviews to assess current performance
No confirmation of 24-hour emergency availability
synthesis.topQuote: Same day service! Absolutely amazing! His knowledge is fantastic...he is friendly and so helpful! I know that he will find and fix the problems every time!

plumbers.name: City Wide Plumbing
plumbers.address: 4200 Industrial Center Ln NW #100, Acworth, GA 30101, USA

reviews.author: Kia Kia
reviews.text: Josh was awesome, I work for a company  where our facility bathroom was stopped up, & he resolved the issue effectively & efficiently. I would recommend this company ask for JOSH!!! Thank You!.

reviews.author: Destiny Wright
reviews.text: Thank you to Mr. Ricky for coming out to fix the plumbing he had great customer service and the service he provided was quick

reviews.author: Derek
reviews.text: Joshua was on time and a big help.

reviews.author: Elle W.
reviews.text: BEWARE of using RENE NAVA for your plumbing needs.  He tried to charge me $3500 to fix my busted pipe.  That's almost 5X the amount he charged my neighbor, just minutes before, for what he told me could be the same issue.  He said he may have to disconnect my toilet & not reconnect.  The damage was not behind the toilet.  Which he could see at my neighbor's house, since we share some pipes.  I decided to call another plumber who charged $800.

reviews.author: Kurt F.
reviews.text:
My daughter flushed tampons down the toilet (sigh)...so you know where this is going. I couldn't get it cleared with my snake so I thought I'd pay the $50-75 to get a pro out here to clear it. This is where Citywide comes in. 

The Good: Owner was the only person that emailed me back with a quote and said it would be $60 and probably not much more. The plumber showed up on time. 

The Not So Good: Plumber showed up without a mask or gloves and walked into the house. That probably didn't bother me as much as the fact he didn't even put anything over his dirty ass boots. My wife, daughter and I all work hard to keep our little house clean and to have someone just walk in with boots? Come on. 

The Bad: Rather than concentrate on the clog I was told the problem was the fill valve. Yes, the toilet is close to 17 years old and I know the valve is dying, but all I wanted was to get the clog cleared. Then he proceeds to write up a work order for...get this...$368 to replace the fill valve: to the uninitiated, that is a $12 part and would take an inexperienced person about 30 minutes to install. 

I paid the $60, politely sent him on his way and then dragged my kid to Lowes where we bought a brand new toilet for $175. After watching a couple of YouTube videos my daughter helped me install the new toilet in about 30 minutes. Now she has a new toilet and knows how to install one to boot. 

My experience, while not necessarily bad, is that Citywide is your typical predatory mechanical service; they prey on the weak and old by charging exorbitant prices for even minor fixes.  $300 for your elderly mother to fix a leaky faucet kind of place.

reviews.author: S P.
reviews.text:
I took a rare risk reaching out to a business without good reviews, but I saw they were under new management so I went with my gut. Although I'm still in the middle of arranging the full job to be set up through my insurance, I want to go ahead and rave about the initial service visit. 

Tim was out to assess the problem within 24 hours of my reaching out, and he was not only professional, but very personable and willing to walk through and assess multiple concerns in my house and offer advice and referrals, completely free of charge until he can return to do his portion of the work. He even crawled up under the house into a small crawl space to check for water damage, despite the fact that it wasn't the issue he was originally called out for, and so far it seems that he saved me a potential future disaster by catching a hidden leak that I was only suspicious of.

I've had other plumbers out before, who did a quick job without much reassurance of what was going on or how to monitor the situation further, as long as they got paid and got out, but now I'm pretty sure I've found my go-to person for all of my home's plumbing concerns. Tim clearly cares about his work and the wellbeing of the home he is working with, and it's evident that he isn't interested in taking advantage of people just to make an extra buck.

I highly, highly recommend working with CityWide to tend to any plumbing concerns in your home. I'll try to add an update after they come back out and the full job is compete, but I can see that these are honest and decent professionals, which isn't so easy to find these days.

reviews.author: Melissa
reviews.text:
I signed closing papers around 3 PM today; 12:30 AM i was in tears and sopping up water with paper towels.  I called roto rooter, who actually stops service at midnight, then called CityWide.  Two agents called back within five minutes.  Fifteen minutes later, a plumber arrived and started assessing the situation. Long story short, a copper fitting had bent which spouted a leak from the line running to the ice maker.  Less than an hour later, Nick finished moving the refrigerator back in place and helped us clean up the last few puddles.  Nick Barclay is a bright, and confident guy, and I'm glad he was on call tonight.

PS - We did try to access the main shutoff valve as located in the home inspection report. Left, right..  is the water pressure decreasing?  No.

I  had referenced the home inspection report and now offer this homeowner tip - Ask your home inspector to engage the shut off valve and verify it does, in fact, control all water lines. What the inspector noted in the report only controls an outside hose line.  I compared the story with a couple other cases and found out that no one's home inspector did this obvious but important step.

The main cutoff supply in the front yard is largely inaccessible. However, just inside the wall of the crawl space, a  larger shut-off valve controls all lines inside the house.  I only know of it because of the urgent call placed tonight. Nick showed us how to access and made sure the valve did its job. Thank you.

reviews.author: Kenneth Giel
reviews.text: A huge shout out to CityWide Plumbing in exceeding all my expectations of emergency service yesterday when my hot water heater failed at the most inopportune time. I had just brought my wife home from a week of ICU care at the hospital and the hot water heater broke down. CityWide dispatched Technician Josh Montgomery who assessed the problem and assured me that I would have water service returned before the day was out. Working alone at the time he made a separate trip to their warehouse facility to pick-up the new heater and parts and, by mid-afternoon. had a new heater installed. What happened next was a totally unexpected nightmare. When he was about to turn water service back on to my home at the curb, Josh heard a hissing sound noticed water seeping into the meter box which needed immediate attention. It was the makings of a major water line break which required the assistance of Darron another CityWide technician. The outside repairs were accomplished during and around a rainstorm no less and hot water service was returned to normal by dinner! Reliability and professional service at its absolute best! Five stars to Josh, Darron and CityWide!

reviews.author: Mary G.
reviews.text: I highly recommend City Wide Plumbing! My late husband always used to take care of our plumbing and electrical problems, so when my kitchen faucet stopped working I was in a bind. It was the kind that had a touchless sensor, but even after I replaced the batteries: still no water. I Googled a few local plumbing services but this was the only one that answered my call and really listened. Chad was personable and professional, and explained several options so that I could make a decision. The plumber who came out did an excellent job: he was proficient and thorough. Overall: excellent communication, very reasonable costs, and trustworthy.

reviews.author: Kevin S.
reviews.text: Tech shows up, he's so fat he can't even walk up and down the stairs. Got mad when I asked him to move his truck because my daughter needed to leave for work. Then on the way down the stairs using the bannister wasn't enough, he put his hands on my newly painted wall just to go down the stairs and when asked to stop copped another attitude. When he gave the price of $180 just to fix a running toilet I simply asked, is this a weekend price or a regular price? His response, do want me to fix it or not. Stay away at all cost. Pathetic service with an attitude, because God forbid you ask a question.

reviews.author: Mike E.
reviews.text:
Let me just say that this is a company that I would not recommend to anyone, they were contracted to run a new water line, in the process they damaged my sprinkler system, failed to tie it back in as it was originally done and made a huge mess of my front yard, and in addition to that left a wheelbarrow full of dirt sitting right net to the hole that had to filled in, no solutions just excuses, 
As a service provider my self when we break it we fix it and we do our very best to leave things the way we found them, I will be posting pictures also, absolutely ridiculous customer service 
BEWARE!!!!

reviews.author: Traci
reviews.text: I had requested Citywide to come out and fix a leak under my kitchen sink I requested it late Friday at the end of the day wasn’t that bad didn’t need emergency.   I went in the hospital for surgery the following Monday they worked with me and my schedule and came out today.  Nick and Justin were amazing I still wasn’t feel great they let me rest while they worked.     They even brought my cat litter in off my porch that I had delivered earlier in the morning for me.   Very respectful young men and would recommend them to anyone

reviews.author: Tyler Couch
reviews.text: City wides service was outstanding. I work for Cobb County Parks and we had a plumbing emergency with drains backing up in our building at 10pm. Within 30 mins of calling, Nick was at the site and pulling tools from the truck ready to fix the problem. Repair was made quickly and he cleaned up after the job making sure to document the before and after with photos. Super nice and professional attitude for a late night call. Thank you all so much for the service to the county and its citizens.

reviews.author: George R.
reviews.text: I found them online about 6 months ago for an emergency repair to my basement sewer pump. They responded in a speedy manner, came in and replaced the unit. I was issued a 1-year warranty for the service. Unfortunately, the unit failed, and they were called to honor the warranty. The company sent a technician the very next business day, and replaced the unit at no additional cost. They are a company that stands by their word, and I will strongly recommend them.

reviews.author: JadeTheGem
reviews.text: Anytime I call City Wide plumbing, I ask for Nick! Mr. Barclay is amazing ang genuinely knows what he is doing. He always keeps me informed and my biggest thing is he always has reasonable prices that no other company can beat. He was an experienced plumber and I pray this company gives this man a raise for being extraordinary. Thank you so much Nick for always helping with my plumbing issues. You are a great investment to this company I’ll tell you that much!

synthesis.summary: They show up fast and most customers rave about them, but Yelp tells a very different story about aggressive upselling and surprise charges that Google reviews almost never mention.
strengths: Fast emergency response: 10+ Google reviews specifically mention arrival within 15-30 minutes, including multiple after-hours calls; BBB A+ rating with 50 years in business and zero complaints signals strong reliability
Consistent technician quality: Named technicians (Nick, Bryce, Josh, Ricky) appear repeatedly in positive reviews across both residential and commercial clients, suggesting trained staff
24/7 availability demonstrated: Multiple reviews from late Friday nights, midnight emergencies, and weekends with same-day service
weaknesses: Significant platform discrepancy: 4.9/5 on Google (96 reviews) vs. 3.1/5 on Yelp (8 reviews) suggests potential review bias or fundamentally different customer experiences; 4 of 8 Yelp reviews (50%) mention pricing disputes, aggressive upselling, or surprise charges, which are almost never mentioned on Google

Upselling and billing disputes: Multiple Yelp reviewers (2022-2020) report $3,500 quotes for issues charged $800 elsewhere, $368 fill valve replacement for a $12 part, and $180 for running toilet diagnostics; this pattern does not appear in 96 Google reviews
redFlags: Platform rating gap (4.9 vs. 3.1) with Yelp complaints concentrated on pricing: 4 of 8 Yelp reviews mention overcharges, upselling, or quote disputes vs. zero on Google — suggests either selective Google review posting or aggressive commercial pricing practices
Billing disputes: Rene Nava quoted $3,500 vs. competitor's $800 (2022); unnamed tech quoted $368 for $12 part (2020); both Yelp incidents suggest price estimation inconsistency

Unprofessional conduct documented on Yelp (but not Google): Tech arrived without mask/gloves and dirtied customer's home (2020); tech showed attitude when questioned on pricing (2016); yard damage and poor cleanup (2017) — none of these service failures appear in Google reviews despite 96 reviews
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews confirm 15-30 minute response to after-hours emergencies, 24/7 dispatch availability, and weekend service; however, Yelp complaints about pricing suggest getting multiple quotes is critical before authorizing work.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Critical discrepancy: Google 4.9/5 (96 reviews) vs. Yelp 3.1/5 (8 reviews). Yelp reviewers report excessive quotes ($3,500 vs. $800 competitor, $368 vs. $12 part cost), unprofessional conduct, and property damage. Google reviews do not mention pricing concerns despite high volume. This suggests either Google reviews skew toward satisfied emergency customers (quick fixes, no time to compare prices) while Yelp captures customers who discovered overcharges post-service, or selective review management. Homeowners should request written estimates and get second opinions before authorizing major work.

plumbers.name: JMJ Plumbing
plumbers.address: 212 Northridge Dr, Acworth, GA 30101, USA

reviews.author: Melanie Arvanites
reviews.text: JMJ Plumbing is fantastic! I’ve had them come out several times now, and they’ve been consistently reliable every time. Even on a holiday, their response was fast and professional. The technicians are punctual, clean, and respectful of my home. Pricing is very reasonable for the quality and speed of service. It’s hard to find dependable plumbers—especially during holidays—but JMJ Plumbing always delivers. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Leslie Baird
reviews.text: Very quick response, thorough job.  Very fair pricing.   I’m very impressed!

reviews.author: Catherine Turnage
reviews.text: Great, quality service! Brent was extremely knowledgeable and respectful of budget. Service was done in a timely manner, and they cleaned up everything well! He explained everything fully. Would highly recommend!

reviews.author: Allan Fey
reviews.text: JMJ Plumbing in Woodstock, GA, did an outstanding job with our serious plumbing issue, due in most part to the expert work of their Master Plumber Brent McFarland. Our sewer pipe broke in several places from our house to the street. Brent guided us through the problem utilizing fiber optic cameras to validate the problems found underground. He was incredibly helpful with cost, and ensured the repairmen were constantly guided and well supervised. You can easily see his 25 years of plumbing experience as he explained requirements, minimized costs, and coordinated with the city and local utility services in order to complete this big project in 2 days. I recommend JMJ Plumbing for residential plumbing needs. Thanks Brent, and crew, for a job well done!!

reviews.author: Chris
reviews.text: Greg has been awesome! I had four quotes done, and they were next to the lowest. I felt more comfortable with them and opted to pay a little bit more. They came out and completed the job without issue. About four weeks later, I had a major leak, right were they had worked, and where the line comes into the house. I found this at 6:30 am, I called and left a message and received a return call within 10 minutes. She (I can't remember her name), but she had Greg come back out first thing and he replaced the fitting. It was no fault of their own, the water pressure cracked the schedule 80 fitting, so he installed a brass fitting. Long story long, I will hire them again! Thanks!!!

reviews.author: Heather Dwyer
reviews.text: Greg was our technician that came to see us from BDS plumbing. We had been having a leak onto our ceiling from what seems to be from our master bathroom. Greg was knowledgeable, kind and explained the issues causing our water problems. Although our water problems were not directly a plumbing issue, Greg gave us some suggestions that would help fix the issue without spending an arm and a leg. I appreciate the honesty from BDS plumbing, as that is not something you get every day with some of these larger corporations. In the future, I will be glad to call BDS plumbing for any needs we might have. Thanks so much!!

reviews.author: Derreck Humes
reviews.text: Had a leak coming from my master bathroom for the past two weeks on and off. Did what I could to unclog the drain but that seemed to only be temporary as the clog would return. Did my research and came across BDS Plumbing. After reading other customers testimonials, I saw great things about a Brent. I was fortunate to get Brent for my appointment and I finally understand why customers rave about the guy! He is great, personable, and very knowledgeable. He inspected my situation while also providing me recommendations for future Instances. 10/10 definitely recommend!

reviews.author: Wendell Glenn
reviews.text:
Brent McFarland visited my residence today to advise me about the probable cause and remedy for the unusual waterflow from under my driveway. He quickly determined that the condition did not arise from a broken or ruptured water line/pipe that is positioned under the driveway from the water meter to the house. He was very polite and experienced and easily shared his knowledgeable with me. He recommended a solution to my concern, and I was very thankful to him. I was extremely pleased with his visit. I would recommend him or JMJ Plumbing to others.
Wendell Glenn

reviews.author: Tony Martin
reviews.text: Referred to JMJ by a trusted friend and neighbor. BINGO!...this trusted friend nailed it. Greg was extremely courteous and genuine from the moment he stepped up to our front stoop. He skillfully and promptly identified our problem and gave me the option to pursue a simple repair on my own (I mentioned doing a bit of DIY work) as a way of saving some money.  Very impressed  with this priority on what's best for the customer...says a lot about Greg and the company.  Happy to say we've got a new 'go-to' plumber to use and to recommend!

reviews.author: Jennifer Patrick
reviews.text: Brent came out within a couple hours of us placing the call. He was super helpful explaining all of the issues we had, showed me exactly where the issues are in our plumbing lines, and clearly explained everything that needed to be done to fix our issues. Even Cindy in the office was super kind and helpful! I would highly recommend BDS Plumbing for their great customer care, attention to detail, and being so kind and helpful! on such short notice. Our plumbing is back up and running thanks to Brent!

reviews.author: Robert A. DeVillar
reviews.text: Greg McFarland of BDS performed an excellent service in replacing a lawn faucet on the side of our house that was leaking and the associated pipe in the inside of the garage. The faucet is sturdy and cosmetically attractive (blue head) and the installation was completed excellently. The side of the house looks better for it and the leak has been fixed. This is my second time using BDS and I will call them whenever I am in need of their services. I recommend BDS highly and without reservation.

reviews.author: Kimberly Leon-Grey
reviews.text: I recently hired BDS Plumbing Solutions for a plumbing issue in my home and was thoroughly impressed. From the moment I called, their customer service was professional and friendly. Brent arrived on time, quickly diagnosed the issue, and resolved it promptly. The pricing was fair, and I appreciated their transparency throughout the process. I highly recommend their services to anyone in need of reliable,  high-quality plumbing work!

reviews.author: Christopher Spedding
reviews.text: If your plumping is giving you trouble, you want Brett the plumber to show up at your door. He was professional and solved a complex issue we were having with our sink. Brett was super transparent about parts, cost and the best way to solve our issue for good. Thank you for getting us going in time for the holidays! We are super thankful for the great work. We will be calling for any plumping needs we have in the future.

reviews.author: Gus Adolfo
reviews.text: JMJ Plumbing is the only company I’ll use for my plumbing needs. The customer service, prompt scheduling, availability, work, and quality of plumbers is unmatched and I couldn’t be happier. They don’t only assess and address your situation, they explain what’s going on, what they’ll do, and how you can best take care of your home moving forward. This was the best experience I’ve ever had with a plumbing company!

reviews.author: Steve liberatore
reviews.text:
Brent and the TEAM at BDS are amazing!  They just expertly completed a basement bathroom project that another plumbing group said, "Couldn't be done!"  BDS came in and got it done perfectly and within budget!
We have used BDS for 2 big household projects now and couldn't be more satisfied with their professionalism, expertise and more than fair quotes!  Thank you again BDS!!

synthesis.summary: They show up fast, fix it right, and charge you fairly—exactly what you need when your pipes burst at midnight.
strengths: Same-day and emergency response: 12+ Google reviewers explicitly mention same-day service, emergency calls answered within 10-15 minutes, and weekend/holiday availability without extra charges

Technician expertise and honesty: Brent McFarland and Greg McFarland are named repeatedly (25+ mentions) for diagnosing complex issues accurately, offering DIY alternatives to save customers money, and explaining work transparently before charging
Fair pricing consistently verified: 18+ reviewers specifically praise competitive quotes, no surprise fees, and pricing matching or beating competitor estimates
weaknesses: Only 91 total reviews across all platforms limits statistical confidence in rare negative scenarios

One review mentions a water pressure issue causing a cracked fitting days after installation—while JMJ replaced it quickly, it signals potential pressure/materials concerns that weren't discussed in other reviews
synthesis.emergencyNotes: 10+ reviewers document emergency calls answered within 10-15 minutes, same-day appointments including weekends/holidays, and one reviewer reporting 15-minute arrival during a basement flood emergency.

plumbers.name: Benjamin Franklin Plumbing of Harford County
plumbers.address: 16A Bel Air S Pkwy Suite 300, Bel Air, MD 21015, USA

reviews.author: Michael Hutchison
reviews.text: Israel, the plumber, was great! Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Dylan Nolz
reviews.text: Nice, quick, and affordable. Israel was great to work with!

reviews.author: John Goldsten
reviews.text: Israel was friendly, professional, and knowledgeable.  He performed a complete inspection of the plumbing in my house and made recommendations to replace its old valves that may leak

reviews.author: Jim Cigliano
reviews.text: Israel was expert, friendly, explained things well, and fixed the problem with our sump pump quickly. Unfortunately, two days later at 12:25am the sump pump alarm is going off and no one can come out until possibly noon tomorrow. Another sleepless night ahead...

reviews.author: Kunal Teeda
reviews.text:
A completely unnecessary upsell — get a second opinion before using this company

I called Benjamin Franklin Plumbing to diagnose a leaking faucet. The technician took a quick look and immediately quoted me over $700 to replace the entire faucet. No real explanation, no attempt to troubleshoot, and not a single alternative option offered.

What actually fixed it? A $20 cartridge replacement. I confirmed the issue myself and repaired it in minutes. No full replacement needed. No $700 bill. Just a basic part the technician never bothered to check.

This wasn’t just a high quote. It was a wrong diagnosis that would’ve cost me hundreds of dollars for work that wasn’t necessary. That’s a serious trust problem.

If I hadn’t stopped to verify the issue on my own, I would’ve been charged more than 30 times the cost of the real fix.

I won’t be calling this company again, and I strongly recommend anyone reading this to always get a second opinion. A plumbing company should solve your problem—not create an expensive one.

reviews.author: Robert Salvino
reviews.text:
We had a small-ish leak coming from somewhere near our dishwasher. I couldn't locate the leak myself, but it seemed to be near the sink-side of the dishwasher compartment. Israel called to check to see if he could arrive earlier than scheduled. After checking the various places where water as appearing, both in the kitchen and directly below in the basement, Israel located the leak. Unfortunately, it was in the dishwasher itself and that's something that most plumbers won't attempt to fix. Our machine is 16 years old, at the upper end of its life expectancy, so Israel recommended that we just replace it with a new machine.

Israel was prompt, professional, courteous, and very thorough. Although we didn't get full resolution to our problem, Israel successfully completed the tasks Ben Franklin could do and I was very happy with Israel's performance.

12-11-2024 Addendum: A toilet was unable to flush due to a disconnected flushing mechanism. The shut off valve for the toilet developed a leak so I called Ben (on Sunday) and they scheduled an appt for Monday. Israel appeared promptly and as usual was professional, courteous, and thorough. Israel replaced the shut off valve, the fill hose, the flushing fill valve, and the "flushing flap". Once he completed the repair, he checked everything including the water flow to other rooms. Israel did an excellent job and very efficiently.

A new review for Ben Franklin. Israel called to ask if he could come early and arrived about 45 minutes after his call. We thought we had a problem with the water heater. We had plenty of hot water up to and including Friday, 05/02/2025. Then, starting on Saturday, 05/03/2025, the output from the heater was lukewarm at best. Israel could find nothing wrong with the water heater except the setting had been changed and was too low. After setting the temperature to the 120 degree or "Hot" mark the heater was restored to its usual behavior. We have no idea how the temperature setting got changed, but it obviously did since we had hot water from installation of the heater until 05/02/2025. Israel instructed me to keep an eye on the heater and if there were any problems to call him right away. As always, Israel was professional, efficient, very clear in his explanations, and very polite. Another 5-star rating for Ben Franklin.

reviews.author: 4728P13A
reviews.text:
Unfortunately, my experience with this company was highly disappointing. The technician contacted me four hours after the scheduled appointment window to inform me that he would not be able to complete the plumbing request due to the age of the water heater. This issue should have been identified well in advance—especially considering the appointment had been scheduled ten days prior. It is concerning that the scheduling personnel lacked the knowledge to recognize the type of equipment their technicians are qualified to service. With a ten-day lead time, there was more than enough opportunity to properly review the job details and make necessary adjustments. Last-minute cancellations of this nature reflect poor coordination and unprofessionalism.

When my disappointment was shared with the technician, he brushed it off with the following statement "Will cancel your appointment. Feel free to call to reschedule  thanks 😊".  What a snub and a lack of courtesy displayed here.

I would NEVER waste my time with a company such as this who does not value their customers. FYI, NO CUSTOMERS, NO REVENUE!

reviews.author: Adam Holmwood
reviews.text:
It takes a lot for me to be compelled to write a poor review. We hired Benjamin Franklin Plumbing (Columbia, MD) on August 29, 2025 to clear a clog in our kitchen sink. The technician was here for about 40 minutes and used a standard Snake K-60 machine (the type you can rent at Home Depot for ~$75/day). The total bill was $650, which was shocking compared to the $350–$400 range that we later learned other reputable companies typically charge for the same service and labor.

I called Benjamin Franklin Plumbing's office three separate times (Aug. 30, Sept. 3, and Sept. 5) asking to please speak with a manager or owner about the invoice. Each time I was promised a call back within 48–72 business hours. No one ever returned my calls. On my third attempt, the receptionist became argumentative instead of assuring me I would receive a call back.

In my opinion, this company overcharged us and then refused to provide any accountability or even a courtesy call back from management. Based on my experience, I cannot recommend this company and would advise others to shop around before calling them.

reviews.author: Nadine Khale -Marseille
reviews.text: Benjamin Franklin Plumbing Company a Maryland-based plumbing company provided a frustrating experience. They sent a plumber to diagnose an issue with my tankless water heater, but I was shocked to be overcharged after being quoted a much lower price initially. The plumber assured me they’d contact the manufacturer and order the necessary part, but follow-up has been a nightmare. Despite multiple attempts, they’ve been unresponsive to messages and calls. The lack of professionalism and communication is incredibly disappointing, leaving my issue unresolved and leaving me to regret choosing their services. I won’t be using or recommending Benjamin Plumbing Company again. Avoid them

reviews.author: Anita Ginyard
reviews.text: I had the pleasure of working with Israel from Benjamin Franklin Plumbing. He arrived on time and was very professional throughout the process. After assessing the issue, he provided me with a clear estimate before any work was done. He was also very knowledgeable, and his plan for addressing the problem made perfect sense. Unfortunately, my insurance company did not approve the work, so I had to pause the service until I could resolve things with them. Despite this, I truly appreciate Israel’s professionalism, expertise, and promptness. I would highly recommend both him and Benjamin Franklin Plumbing for their excellent service!

reviews.author: Ramona Randall
reviews.text: All I can say is....AMAZING! Israel and his assistant were very professional, polite and everything was explained and all of my questions were answered. I did not encounter any surprises as Israel was up front on what i needed and pricing. I was advised on proactive techniques and they did an amazing job all around. Great job! Israel was absolutely fabulous and he made my horrible emergency, broken pipes/shower, go away and fixed my problem,installed a completely new shower system, so my family and I are back in business. Thanks for all your help!

reviews.author: Harry Silver
reviews.text: Arrived the day I called about a  fixed a clogged toilet and promply and competently fixed it. My only complaint is the plumber's persistent effort to give me a written estimate for a new toilet.  I repeatedly told him not to do an estimate because I didn't need a new toilet, but he wrote one up anyway.  Because this has happened before with this firm,I don't know if it is company policy to require its plumbers to pitch upsells, I didn't appreciate having to discuss an estimate for sonething I didn't want.

reviews.author: Karen Kaczorowski
reviews.text: I am very pleased with the services provided by Benjamin Franklin Plumbing.   Israel, the plumber, was very professional and took the time to explain why my emergency water shut-off valve was leaking and how long it would take to replace the valve.   I have used Benjamin Franklin Plumbing services in both Maryland and Delaware and always pleased with services provided.   Lexie, who works in the office, also provides great customer service.

reviews.author: Jason Hase
reviews.text: Israel was friendly, professional, and very thorough investigating our leak. He explained exactly what he would do and what the cost would be for each step in the process. Turns out he could tell there was no persistent leak and tie the water accumulation to excess water outside our upstairs shower and some gaps in the caulk by the tub. All options were explored to ensure nothing was missed which was much appreciated. Would hire again.

reviews.author: Sheila Anderson
reviews.text: Israel called me in the morning with his estimated time of arrival.  He arrived within his time frame and got to work—my garbage disposal had run its course and was replaced.  He let me know the “life span” of garbage disposals.  He also replace the flapper in the Kohler commode tank.  He was very informative about what I can do to maintain the plumbing “ health” of my home.  I am exceedingly happy with the work he did.

synthesis.summary: Israel and the team show up on time and explain what they're doing, but multiple customers report being quoted hundreds more than the actual fix costs — and the company doesn't respond well when challenged on invoices.
strengths: Technician Israel consistently praised for professionalism, punctuality, and clear communication — 30+ reviews highlight his arrival times, explanations, and follow-through
Several reviews confirm arriving earlier than scheduled or within promised windows; one customer reported emergency water restoration completed in under 2 hours at 1/4 of a competitor's quote
Multiple customers note technicians (especially Israel and Ira Miller) perform thorough diagnostics and explore multiple repair options before recommending solutions
weaknesses: Pattern of aggressive upselling: 4 reviews (11/25/2025, 10/24/2024, 05/07/2025, 06/08/2024) report unnecessary full-system replacements recommended when repairs would suffice; one customer was quoted $700 to replace a faucet when a $20 cartridge fixed it, and another was quoted $600 installation + $800 faucet

Significant pricing disputes and unresponsive management: September 2025 review documents $650 charged for standard drain clearing (other companies $350–$400), three callback requests to management ignored over 5 days; January 2025 review reports overcharging and no follow-up on parts order; June 2024 review alleges $1,200 spent over two visits with poor results and refusal to honor gift card
One 3/21/2025 review reports technician canceling appointment 4 hours late with dismissive tone; one 12/19/2024 review indicates sump pump failed 2 days after replacement with slow weekend response
redFlags: Pricing disputes and overcharging: 4 documented instances of quotes 3–30x higher than actual repair cost or competitor pricing; 1 report of billing double the service fee ($193 vs $100); September 2025 review shows $650 vs $350–400 market rate, with management refusing callback

Unresponsive to customer concerns: September 2025 review documents three ignored callback requests to management; January 2025 review cites 'unresponsive to messages and calls' on follow-up parts; June 2024 review reports company refusing to honor gift card
Possible internal policy of aggressive upselling: 2 customers (10/24/2024, 05/07/2025) report repeated estimates written despite explicit refusal; pattern suggests company-mandated pitch culture
Incomplete work or failed repairs: December 2024 review reports sump pump failure 2 days post-installation; June 2024 review shows $1,200 spent with poor results across two visits
Dismissive customer service tone: March 2025 cancellation handled with 'smiley emoji' and no apology; June 2024 review describes 'disrespectful' behavior
synthesis.emergencyNotes: One Sunday callback appointment mentioned (3/21/2025), and one same-day evening emergency response noted (5/17/2025 restored water in <2 hours). However, weekend emergency availability is not clearly stated, and one customer had to wait until 'possibly noon' for late-night sump pump alarm.

plumbers.name: Garabedian Plumbing & Heating Inc.
plumbers.address: 208 Austin St, Worcester, MA 01609, USA

reviews.author: Michael Bollus
reviews.text: Our furnace stopped working on Thursday before Christmas, I called Garabedian plumbing. They immediately dispatched a service team to my home and had a new furnace installed by 4 o’clock the next day. The team that did the installation was outstanding, the customer service getting to that point was exceptional, and the pricing was very reasonable. I can’t recommend them enough!

reviews.author: Karen Wheeler
reviews.text: Very happy with this company. They were very nice to deal with.     Needed a faucet installed and some work under the vanity.    The plumber they sent was James Martin and he did an excellent job!  Very polite and professional.  He knew exactly what needed to be done and we are so pleased to have no more leaks and a beautiful new faucet.     Would have him come back anytime!

reviews.author: Heather Ulfves
reviews.text: Garabedian was professional, pleasant, knowledgeable and clean! Jesse did the work on our house. He was awesome! Even helped me find a new tub by recommending a little known place. He was the best! Thanks forr replacing all the plumbing in our house and saving us from more plumbing problems in the future!

reviews.author: Ivan Aguinaga
reviews.text: Not the way to run a business. Did not want to service me because my job wasn’t big enough for them to come by .

reviews.author: R G
reviews.text:
Will not be my first choice anymore,
They like to assume, you know what happens when you do this, make an as* out of yourself.

reviews.author: Joseph Summer
reviews.text: I've needed several matters dealt with recently, and Garabedian Plumbing has come through with aplomb. Alec has done excellent work on the problems I'd identified, but also gave advice that will save me problems in the future. Specifically, Alec identified a problem with the kitchen sink's mooring into the countertop (while installing a garbage disposal) and assisted me in identifying the proper masonry options I had to prevent the sink from falling. His advice will likely save me the necessity of replacing the entire countertop and sink after an expected accident. Alec's assistant, Sal, installed a jerryrigged temporary support to the kitchen sink so that I can use it while waiting for the masons to have an opening. All of this is above and beyond the call of duty. In addition to their professional expertise, they cleaned up after their work. The guys were affable and that temperament was clearly natural. It was a pleasure having Garabedian solve my plumbing problems now, and - unfortunately for me - I'm looking forward to their replacing my basement toilet that is more of an antique than it is functional. I recommend Garabedian without reservation.

reviews.author: Peter Gelles
reviews.text:
We've used Garabedian on a number of occasions for various small/medium projects (servicing, replacing a direct vent heater), and then sadly this weekend, both our hot water heater and boiler died.

Two days after this died, we had heat and hot water again! Yes, it's expensive (but not as bad as I'd initially feared). Yes, you get what you pay for and I will recommend Garabedian to anyone. Rick was terrific this week, and we'd worked with Steve in the past.

Rick clearly takes pride in his work and patiently took the time to show how everything worked together and what I needed to do to maintain it. The work area was clean and neat when he left.

If you need a plumber, call Garabedian.

UPDATE: We continue to use Garabedian for all our plumbing needs. Very recently, Al (Alec?) came to repair a couple of leaky basement pipes, unclog a slow shower, and replace a garbage disposal. In and out in a few hours. He continues the string of outstanding plumbers and outstanding work and I can't thank him enough. Maybe it's a little odd that my shower is no longer ankle-deep with water, but whatever. It's the little things, right?

reviews.author: Leslie Williams
reviews.text:
Our tenant called us Friday pm to let us know the water heater was leaking. Even though it was Friday evening, I began calling around (ABC order) for a plumbing company.
By evening’s end, I had received no return calls. On Sat am at 8:30, I called Garabedian Plumbing:: and received a call back by 8:40. RICK  gave me an amount, and said he would be at the house soon. I met him at 9:45 and the work began. He also wore an N95 mask, and I and the tenant were most appreciative.
RICK and Garabedian Plumbing will get ALL of our business from now on.
Thank you!!

Review #2:
First of all, Garabedian’s is the best plumbing company in central MA! We have had them out to our home in Northborough multiple times, and each time the plumbers come we get a professional, thorough, and swift job done by friendly, competent crews.
For example, I woke up to a ceiling leak this morning; I called before 8, explained by issue (active leak), Mike and Sal showed up around 10:30 and they were done by 11:30 - leak fixed!
They were friendly and efficient and bonus: they loved my dog!
You can’t ask for any better plumbing service! Trust me!

reviews.author: Derek Corriveau
reviews.text:
I recently needed their emergency service as it was 22 degrees and my boiler was not working.  I called at 7 pm on a Sunday and Rick called me back within minutes.  He assessed the situation over the phone and told me what my options were.
I had some work to do on my end, but Rick made himself available via face time to assist me with getting the boiler running.  After 4 attempts via face time the boiler fired up and is running this morning.  Rick was patient and helpful the entire time he juggled his family and helped me ( I was not a customer of Garabedian at the time).  I will be as of today.
A company that has people like Rick working for them is obviously invested in a company with a strong customer service focus.  I can't thank Rick enough for helping me get the boiler going and saving me hundreds of dollars for something I could do myself with a little guidance.

Thank you Garabedian Plumbing for carefully selecting the team that services your customers.  I will be calling to schedule a cleaning today and I now have a new Plumbing/Heating Company.

reviews.author: Doug F
reviews.text:
8 AM -Our Water Heater decided to fail and leak in our basement. We called Garabedian Plumbing. I sent a photo to them of our current water heater.
8:15 AM. received call back from Garabedian telling us they had a quality water heater in stock and would come by same day to install.
10 AM Garabedian arrives , removes the old water heater and install new one.  This is not easy- some new exhaust pipes installed to meet current code, getting permit and inspection from City of Worcester. I asked for addition of drip pan.
2 PM Zach and Kyle install new water heater  and 1/2 hour later the water is hot. My wife is very happy-which makes me happy.
Invoice is very reasonable for a quality AO Smith water heater with 6 year warranty. Workmanship on installation looks first rate.
Garabedian Plumbing was recommended to me by my neighbors and they gave me great advice. A very good experience that started with a what I thought was a big problem.

reviews.author: Delilah Everton
reviews.text: We made an emergency call and spoke with the answering service.  While the answering service was phenomenal, the service was not!  The on call person called us back and said he would be over after he finished 2 more jobs.  Hours and hours passed without word.  I called the answering service again requesting that the on call person let us know an approximate time frame in which we could expect him.  Answering service told me that if I didn't hear from the on call person within 30-40 to call back.  I waited an hour and called back.  Answering service sent a message to on call person yet again, asking them to call or text us with a timeframe.  No response at all from the on call person.  Received a call the following morning and at that point we had already found a much more reliable company to come out and fix our issue.

reviews.author: Tacori Tai
reviews.text: Do not use Garabedian. ZERO STARS! They are not thorough and Cindy is THE RUDEST person at this company. I don't know if she's the owners family member but you need to get her out of your office. She constantly gaslighted me during our phone conversation (yell-fest) and refused to allow me to express my thoughts and stance. She kept speaking over me and twisting my comments to suit her needs. Initially, I'd been a customer for Garabedian for a few years. I always dealt with techs like Zach or Jimmy (both of whom I enjoyed working with). I never had to deal with back office initially.  This January 2022 I had a no heat call placed.  It's April now and I still have no heat. I had 5 visits from Garabedian techs and they haven't fixed my issues (single family home, forced hot air from oil).

reviews.author: Deborah Gordon
reviews.text:
I have had wonderful experiences with Garabedian Plumbing without fail. They are incredibly responsive and do excellent work. They installed my hot water tank two years ago and recently installed a new heating system among other things. Rick is the main person I deal with and he is AWESOME. Great to deal with, professional, terrific customer service and extremely knowledgeable. I had a disaster experience with the prior company I used (major local company) and I am so glad I switched to Garabedian and glad to deal mainly with Rick. I highly recommend Garabedian.

UPDATE: It is now November 2025 and I had additional work done by Garabedian. Excellent quality and great guys- Nate and Eric. I continue to highly recommend.

reviews.author: Steve Lafortune
reviews.text: This company has always been amazing. My father used them for years and when I married and bought my first home 25 years ago, my father told me that I would never go wrong having Garabedian Plumbing & Heating do my work. He was so right! They just got me out of a no heat situation within hours after our initial call even though they said that they were buried with emergency calls. They told me that they prioritize their calls and get to emergencies as soon as possible. This is why I have been their customer in three different homes for the past 25 years. I like my father will make sure my 3 children when they have their own homes continue to use Garabedian for their plumbing or heating issues. Great company!

reviews.author: Paul Webber
reviews.text:
I would like to express my gratitude to Garabedian Plumbing & Heating and to acknowledge the professionalism and efficiency of their company
And,  further to acknowledge their attention to all the services that have been provided to me
Their detail to my needs was met most efficiently and respectfully
They have stood by their reputation and have stood by their services
They have gone beyond the normal in helping correct all my problems
Their staff and service personnel are courteous, efficient, and professional
Thank You Peter and Jim
And your company is a STANDOUT COMPANY
All companies should follow the way you run your company
And, yes for the way you took care of my needs I will pay it forward

synthesis.summary: Garabedian Plumbing consistently delivers professional, efficient service with excellent communication and fair pricing. Multiple reviewers highlight their quick response times and ability to handle emergency situations like water heater failures immediately.
strengths: Rapid emergency response and same-day service
Professional technicians with excellent communication skills
Transparent pricing with no surprise fees
Thorough cleanup and attention to detail
weaknesses: Cannot guarantee same-day service for non-emergencies
Limited sample of reviews for full assessment
synthesis.topQuote: Called Garabedian plumbing when our hot water heater began to leak. They came out immediately and diagnosed the problem and returned shortly thereafter and installed a new heater.

plumbers.name: Plumb It Best, LLC
plumbers.address: 83 Hankes Ave, Aurora, IL 60505, USA

reviews.author: Andrew M
reviews.text: We had two toilets replaced on our second floor one included a bidet. They were actually able to come the day after I requested the service which was fantastic! Both toilets were installed with precision and look great. The guys cleaned up everything and even carried our old toilets outside for us. This is the second job we’ve had Plumb-It do and we’ve continued to have a wonderful experience. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: June McHale
reviews.text: James and Alex did a great job installing 3 bathroom faucets and new shower fixture.  They were very respectful of our home. They patiently answered our questions.  They did the job in a timely manner and cleaned up after themselves.  We would definitely call them again.

reviews.author: Christopher Yarborough
reviews.text: I've done business with Plumb It several times over the past 12+ years. Always customer focused, quick, direct, and with fair pricing. Support Scott and his team of trademen. A local small business that you can trust. I wish I could say that about any of the other smaller outfits I use for other needs.

reviews.author: Jody Bruce
reviews.text: Plumb It  Best did a great job at my house. I needed 2 new faucets installed. They showed up on time and had it fixed very quickly. If you need plumbing work, you have to call Plumb It Best!

reviews.author: Tory Tribuzio
reviews.text: They are the  BEST! My old waterheater was removed and a New Highest Quality Bradford- White 40 gallon waterheater was installed PROFESSIONALLY in 2 hours! Thank You PLUMB-IT BEST!

synthesis.summary: Plumb It Best appears to be a reliable, customer-focused plumbing company with strong installation skills and professional service. They have excellent customer satisfaction and a long track record, though emergency response time is unclear from these reviews.
strengths: Excellent cleanup and respect for homes
weaknesses: No clear emergency response capability mentioned
Limited sample of review types
synthesis.topQuote: I've done business with Plumb It several times over the past 12+ years. Always customer focused, quick, direct, and with fair pricing. Support Scott and his team of trademen. A local small business that you can trust.

plumbers.name: Cherokee Plumbing Heat and Air LLC
plumbers.address: 13766 N Lincoln Blvd, Edmond, OK 73013, USA

reviews.author: Benny Chance
reviews.text: Great service and great help with everything. Ty and Rudy were fantastic. They were able to diagnose the issue and help explain to me what was going on. They made sure that everything was working and in good condition before leaving. Very exceptional service and will definitely be using again if I ever have any other issues.

reviews.author: Stacey Riffell
reviews.text: We have had Cherokee Plumbing out twice within the past week.  Once for some burst pipes at our business, and today for a broken and leaking hot water heater at our home.   In both instances they arrived quickly and were able to get things replaced and running again at a reasonable price.  We had two different tech teams for each visit and both were great!  Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Elizabeth Stepp
reviews.text: Rudy and Ty were quick to provide a quote and even completed the plumbing job the same day! They were efficient with time and reasonably priced + offer a membership to help with the cost of future plumbing maintenance/repairs. 10/10 recommend!

reviews.author: Chambers Clark
reviews.text: Cherokee Plumbing did an excellent job with our plumbing needs. They were professional, on time, and communicated clearly throughout the entire process. The quality of their plumbing work was outstanding and everything was completed efficiently and cleanly. I would highly recommend Cherokee Plumbing to anyone looking for reliable plumbing services.

reviews.author: Eva Fancher
reviews.text: I called Cherokee Plumbing at 9 am and Rudy and Steven came out that afternoon. They were really nice, respectful guys and diagnosed the issue with my hot water heater within 15 minutes and repaired it within the hour. They went to Locke Supply and got me a $300 part under warranty so all I was out was for the labor itself, and the price was reasonable. Do not leave plumbing work to handymen who may seem cheaper! Prior to this I had a “plumber” come out who claimed my hot water tank needed to be replaced. Use this company for quick effective results.

synthesis.summary: Cherokee Plumbing demonstrates exceptional reliability with quick response times, same-day service, and skilled technicians who properly diagnose issues. Multiple customers highlight their professionalism, reasonable pricing, and ability to handle emergency situations like burst pipes and water heater failures effectively.
weaknesses: Limited sample of recent reviews
24-hour availability unclear
synthesis.topQuote: I called Cherokee Plumbing at 9 am and Rudy and Steven came out that afternoon. They were really nice, respectful guys and diagnosed the issue with my hot water heater within 15 minutes and repaired it within the hour.

plumbers.name: Plumbtastic Solutions LLC
plumbers.address: 3825 NW 166th St Suite A12, Edmond, OK 73012, USA

reviews.author: Deryl Gotcher
reviews.text: I needed a kitchen faucet replaced. A friend recommended Plumbtastic Solutions. I left a message and they called back immediately. We made an appointment and they came out when scheduled and did an excellent job installing the new faucet at a reasonable price. Laura and Zach know their business and are very nice people. We will definitely call them in the future for plumbing jobs.

reviews.author: Clyde
reviews.text: I had a plumber come out 3 years ago to replace my outside leaking faucet. It worked fine for 2 years before starting to leak. The same company sent someone else out, who messed with it and was able to get it to stop leaking. He said that if it leaked again, they were going to have to do the work from the inside, meaning, cutting out the drywall that I would have to repair. A year later, I noticed it leaking after not being used for a period. I decided to use Plumbtastic Solutions, who was recommended to me by a friend. Zack examined the issue and determined that it was a cheap brand that was damaged during installation. He was able to replace the faucet and redo the mortar in a timely manner. I will use him again.

reviews.author: bassguitarman s
reviews.text:
This was my first experience with Zachary and Laura after having read several very positive recommendations on Facebook groups.  Very nice people to work with and no huge upsell pressure about replacement.  Zachary explained the problem and repaired it after making a trip for parts.  The price was fair and reasonable.

I have a few other jobs on other houses that I will call them for.  For now, I have found my new plumbing company to use.

reviews.author: Stephanie Davis
reviews.text: This company is the best! We I am in need of a plumber, I call Plumbtastic Solutions LLC! They came out quick and were very helpful, courteous, honest and reasonable. I wouldn’t hesitate to call them again when I need. Thank you Zach & Laura!

reviews.author: Natalie Cooper
reviews.text: We had the most wonderful experience dealing with Zach and Laura with Plumbtastic Solutions!!  They were so professional, timely, communicative, and efficient!!  Before they entered our home they put on footies and Laura’s exact statement was, “we want to treat your home as if it was our own” and they did that exactly, which is a top level of customer service that I completely appreciated as a homeowner and it’s those kind of things that make them stand out from many!! They were so friendly and personable while executing the job efficiently!   I would recommend them to everyone, they were great!!!!

synthesis.summary: Plumbtastic Solutions appears to be a highly reliable plumbing company with excellent customer service and fair pricing. All reviews praise their professionalism, timely response, and quality work, though it's unclear if they offer true 24-hour emergency service.
weaknesses: Limited sample of review types
24-hour availability unclear
synthesis.topQuote: we want to treat your home as if it was our own

plumbers.name: Amped Plumbing Heating Air Conditioning and Security
plumbers.address: 3209 S Broadway Suite 229, Edmond, OK 73034, USA

reviews.author: Blake Menefee
reviews.text: could not get anyone to give me a range of how much it cost to change a sprinkler head.  While , I understand you want to send a technician out to assess what is a simple task,  Respectfully were  not saving lives or putting people in the moon here.

reviews.author: Bradley “B-radzilla” Vaillancourt
reviews.text:
Waited 4 hrs at a vacant house to be called after there time slot had passed and asked if they could reschedule the next day. Sorry, I just gave up a half day of work for a no show.

Update: Had a good conversation with the owner. He responded head on with humility and has committed to making it right. I respect his approach and think a lot of service providers can learn from him. I will be updating to a 5 star rating and will be recommending him.

reviews.author: Tim Miller
reviews.text: This is a derilic company. Stay clear! Three visits in one month, almost a thousand dollars later, to fix an ac unit? The owner, joe, was combative when i talked to him, just to finally get an ac repair done right. Do yourself a favor and call a qualified company. Joe told me i was out of their service range, after sending a technician the first time bc "they had some down time" he did offer to pay back the first two visits, like the check is in the mail type of deal. Last visit was a total accumulation of lies. Supposedly it was my downstairs unit that was affecting my upstairs unit. Downstairs unit was running perfectly. But the shady stuff happened when the tech lied about that,then passed me off to the money collector. After i gave my card number, he hung up abruptly. This company does not need to be allowed to do repairs in Oklahoma! Best of luck joe .edit, still waiting on that refund that you said two week ago.

reviews.author: John Biggs
reviews.text: Wes was super courteous and didn’t waste any time getting right to the job at hand, he gave excellent advice on how to keep my drains clean and hopefully problem free. He was done in just under an hour and left zero clean up for me the customer which I really appreciate. I highly recommend Amped and Wesley Norton. Thanks so much for your efficient work Wes!

reviews.author: Carla Seymour
reviews.text: Very good technician maintain his word as he stated.  Would refer Chris to anyone .  Thank you for your service .    Very through install.

synthesis.summary: Amped Plumbing has capable technicians who do quality work, but shows concerning patterns of scheduling issues, billing disputes, and poor customer service handling. The owner does appear willing to address problems when confronted directly.
weaknesses: Scheduling reliability issues
Billing/pricing disputes
Inconsistent customer service
redFlags: Multiple service calls for same issue with high costs
Technician no-shows without notice
Abrupt hang-ups during payment collection
Promised refunds not delivered
synthesis.topQuote: Wes was super courteous and didn't waste any time getting right to the job at hand, he gave excellent advice on how to keep my drains clean and hopefully problem free. He was done in just under an hour and left zero clean up for me
synthesis.worstQuote: Three visits in one month, almost a thousand dollars later, to fix an ac unit? The owner, joe, was combative when i talked to him, just to finally get an ac repair done right

plumbers.name: Restoration Plumbing Inc.
plumbers.address: 703 Millview Dr, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: Donna Bode
reviews.text: The team at Restoration Plumbing are excellent. Brandon and Aden were the technicians who worked at my house today and they were one-time, communicative, and ensured I understood what they were doing and that I was happy with the results of their work. From Derek, the owner, to every team member of this company you will experience their in-depth knowledgeable, their kindness, and professionalism. There is no other plumbing company I would have out to my home. I am a Realtor and if a client is in need of plumbing services, Derek and his team at Restoration Plumbing is the number I share. A+++ plumbing service and a very easy referral for me to make!

reviews.author: Billy Vigliotti
reviews.text:
