Derek was very responsive from first contact and easy to work with.  Brandon and his son were great on the job.  They supplied and installed a new ejector pump and replaced 2 outdoor faucets. The team was very professional and thorough.
Highly recommended and will definitely call for any future needs!

reviews.author: Rebecca Gorski
reviews.text: The individual that installed our shelves drilled into a waste pipe thinking it was a stud, and we didn’t find out until the following evening after using our shower. We called Restoration first thing the next morning and they were able to send someone out that afternoon. Our plumber, Brandon, was incredibly knowledgeable and rolled with all the punches that came from communication with our shelf installer (as it turns out, he had drilled TWO holes into the same pipe). Brandon took the time to be sure the job was done right and answered all of our questions thoroughly and with kindness (and as new homeowners, we had quite a few!). We are so appreciative to have found plumbers we can absolutely trust and they will be our go-to from here on out!

reviews.author: Steve Beach
reviews.text: Brandon & Aiden did a great job! They were on time, friendly and affordable! They repaired a small leak we had and were very honest. They only replaced what needed it and did a very professional and clean job! Would definitely recommend!👍🏻🪠

reviews.author: Peter Heald
reviews.text: The team at Restoration plumbing did a great job replacing our water heater. They explained everything, gave a fair quote, and worked quickly and cleanly. We trust them for all our plumbing needs.

synthesis.summary: Restoration Plumbing Inc. demonstrates exceptional reliability and professionalism with consistently high-quality work and excellent communication. Multiple reviews highlight their responsiveness to urgent situations and honest, thorough approach to repairs. This appears to be a trustworthy choice for emergency plumbing needs.
weaknesses: 24-hour availability unclear
Limited sample of review types
synthesis.topQuote: We called Restoration first thing the next morning and they were able to send someone out that afternoon. Our plumber, Brandon, was incredibly knowledgeable and rolled with all the punches... Brandon took the time to be sure the job was done right and answered all of our questions thoroughly and with kindness

plumbers.name: T And T Sons Plumbing & Sewer
plumbers.address: 990 N Delany Rd, Gurnee, IL 60031, USA

reviews.author: David Brodsky
reviews.text: Highly recommended.  I was getting ready to travel and noticed a leak just before I was leaving.  I tried calling others I found online but nobody was available.  Luckily, I found T & T Plumbing.  I called and they were at my house within the hour.  They were quick and professional and got the job done right.  Tom Jr. is a great guy and very knowledgeable.  Next time they will be my first call.

reviews.author: Debra Chidester
reviews.text: I had a plumbing issue that turned out to be major and costly. My sewer system needed to be replaced from my foundation to some 30 feet down to the village system. I had used TandT in the past so was very confident in the diagnosis of my problem, not to mention witnessing these old pipes when they were dug up and exposed. The pipe in the foundation had literally sheered off. This was an huge job. Every one of the tradesmen were respectful of our property and  kept our inconvenience to a minimum,. There was great communication and they kept within the estimate. It’s very comforting to know a job like this was done by the highest standards in the industry.  We lost one sidewalk square but they were all 34 years old so we opted to go ahead and replace the sidewalk not just the one square. Tom gave us a referral of who could do this work and as you can see they also did a great job. Thank you TandT.

reviews.author: Jessie Graham
reviews.text: HIGHLY recommend T&T. We needed an urgent repair at 10pm on a Saturday night and they came over without hesitation and fixed it quickly and for a reasonable price. Tom was so friendly, helpful, and quick. We are so appreciative of him for coming out to help!

reviews.author: Chris Wagner
reviews.text: T and T plumbing were absolutely awesome. They were available within a matter of hours. They troubleshot the issue and had it corrected in less than an hour. Pricing is extremely fair. All around good people and great company. I will not be calling anyone else. Thank you for the help.

reviews.author: Paul DeBoer
reviews.text: I'm grateful for the awesome service by Tom (son).  He was very professional and kept things tidy.  Tom fixed my slow draining bathroom sink and a water leak.  Not at simple task as my house is 73 years old.   He also replaced my kitchen faucet.  I am extremely happy with T and T plumbing and I highly recommend them.  Great service at fair prices.  Thanks again Tom!

synthesis.summary: T And T Sons Plumbing consistently delivers exceptional emergency service with rapid response times, often arriving within an hour even late at night. Customers praise their professionalism, fair pricing, and ability to handle both simple repairs and major projects with high-quality workmanship.
weaknesses: Limited sample of reviews
All reviews are 5-star which may indicate selective posting
synthesis.topQuote: We needed an urgent repair at 10pm on a Saturday night and they came over without hesitation and fixed it quickly and for a reasonable price. Tom was so friendly, helpful, and quick.

plumbers.name: Stake Plumbing and Heating
plumbers.address: 145 Sewall St, Boylston, MA 01505, USA

reviews.author: Daniel DiMassa
reviews.text: Great, fast service; excellent work; fair price.

reviews.author: Harshad Chitre
reviews.text: Easy to communicate and professional service at fair price I would recommend their service

reviews.author: Cecilia Phillips
reviews.text: Quickly responded to our needs, set up a time to work on the problem asap and was completed in a very reasonable timeframe.

reviews.author: Nicole L.
reviews.text: I have known Curt form Stake Plumbing of about 10 years. I recently had the opportunity to use his services. He installed a soak tub, rewired the lines in the basement, and going to the exterior faucet's. He installed a new kitchen faucet, fixed a leaking toilet, installed a new hot water tank and ran a gas line in the basement to the new heating system, the fireplace and the exterior for venting. I think the most impressive was the gas connections as it I do not think of this is a plumbing person job. We had to have the heating company, fireplace company, chimney lining installer and him all here at the same time. He was supervising their work and working well with them to get the job den and in a timely manner, especially since it was heating season and we were without any heat. He was on site until the job was done (until 9pm). His prices for the same "normal" plumbing jobs seems high but plumber generally are high. The cost for the gas piping seems very reasonable, especially given the length of tie he was here.

reviews.author: Rory Allan
reviews.text:
I was putting shelves up in the garage with my father in law when POP, we drilled a hole right through a water pipe. It was a Saturday and we didn't know what to do. We called multiple "emergency" plumbers and didn't receive a single call back.

Google brought up Stake Plumbing, and after seeing their reviews, we called them up. Curtis immediately answered the phone, and he was at our house in 10 MINUTES. On
a SATURDAY. Sure he lives close by, but he was here so fast and repaired the pipe professionally and quickly, we didn't even have to change our lunch reservation.

Curtis is a really nice guy, and has clear mastery of his trade. He made a really bad situation as painless as possible, and we are very grateful.

reviews.author: Brandon O.
reviews.text: Curt replaced two sinks and two toilets at one property, and faucets, tub spouts, and shower heads at another.  He is professional, detail oriented and organized. He will make your job a priority and will call if he can get in earlier than the scheduled date. As many of you know, having a talented and dependable plumber is priceless; plumbing is often an urgent need and it helps to build the relationship ahead of time. Take a close look at your plumbing and do some preventative updates to old tired fixtures that are at the end of their useful life. I'll be using Curt again in the near future to replace sewer drainage pipes that are rusted and showing surface moisture.

reviews.author: Gary V.
reviews.text: Stake Plumbing is extraordinary. My plumber now for over seven years, Curt has literally come to our rescue many times for everything from weekend & overnight emergencies (leaking toilet, frozen pipes, etc) to major installs, including the install & plumbing for new baths in two Re-hab projects, as well as a major natural gas lines install project for our whole house generator. Not only is Curt incredibly responsive and fairly priced, but he literally leaves the house cleaner than he found it. I would unreservedly recommend Curt to anyone looking for a knowledgeable,  professional plumber that can't be beat. Gary V

reviews.author: Mark B
reviews.text: Stake Plumbing is fantastic!!  They recently installed all the plumbing in my new 3 car garage & work shop, which included a new complex water filtration system, hot water, sinks, rerouting well lines, and irrigation feeds and external spigots. All their work was to high standards, on time, and competitively priced.  They also stand behind their work.... when a well pump check valve started acting up, they came out immediately and replaced at no charge.   Curtis Jr. is a knowledgeable and  hardworking professional, and a pleasure to work with.  Highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Arun Sathish
reviews.text: Curtis Stake did an outstanding job converting our electric stove to an LPG stove. He coordinated seamlessly, was punctual, and showed up immediately before and after the propane tank was delivered by another company to ensure everything was connected and running smoothly. His excellent text messaging system kept me updated on his schedule, arrival times, and important job details. Curtis provided a written itemized estimate and I paid exactly what was quoted after the job was completed. I will definitely be hiring him for any future plumbing needs. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Meghan Kellicker
reviews.text: I'm a first time home owner, and (knock on wood) I needed to make my first home repair that required a plumber. I called about 10 places. All of them were big companies charging and arm and a leg! I called stakes and it was just what I was looking for a small family owned business. They were here the next day, even though they said they originally said they might be too booked to come by this week. They still made it happen. Not only did he fix it really quick but he showed me exactly what the problem was and explained why. Also very reasonabley priced!!

reviews.author: Elizabeth Hunt
reviews.text:
CURTIS came to my house today to replace a drainage set up behind the washer that was leaking.
He was prompt on taking my call, giving me an estimate, and setting up a time to arrive.
Curtis was very polite and professional.  He changed the drainage set up, tested it for leakage, and snaked out the drain. His price was very reasonable. He and his father are partners so they don't have the high overhead that large plumbing contractors have. I am so grateful to have found an honest, reliable, prompt, polite, plumber.

reviews.author: Michael Ou
reviews.text: I had an issue with my water heater not heating up, so I called Stake Plumbing. They were very responsive and sent Curtis out to diagnose the problem. He quickly found the issue and went the extra mile by also informing me that my sink drain pipe had a crack and would leak whenever the sink was on. I really appreciate his thoroughness and professionalism. The service was top-notch, and I’m very happy with the experience. Highly recommend Stake Plumbing for their honesty, expertise, and great customer service!

reviews.author: John Herendeen
reviews.text:
Stake Plumbing is just great! I first encountered them when they sub-contracted on a bathroom remodel and was very impressed by both the quality of their work and by the fact hat they were just really nice guys. When we recently had a plumbing emergency we reached out via phone and were able to get the issue evaluated immediately and repaired in timely (and friendly) manner.
Five Stars!

reviews.author: Tim Gallagher
reviews.text: Curtis responded immediately when we were dealing with water overflow due to the clog.  He communicated appropriately, ultimately arranging a time to conduct complete service on a clogged ejector pump within 24 hours. Thorough explanation was provided, accompanied by photos of the repair. Professional, patient communication from Curtis throughout the scheduling and repair process.

reviews.author: Ian Wills
reviews.text: Called Stake Plumbing to help with a leak from a bathroom. Curties was quick to take action, very professional throughout all my interactions and quick to fix the issue. I felt Curtis went above and beyond to inspect the issue, fix and test the fix to ensure there was not going to be any further issues. Definitely will recommend and use again for future plumbing needs.

synthesis.summary: Curtis shows up fast on weekends, explains what's wrong, and doesn't overcharge—exactly what you want when a pipe bursts at 2am.
strengths: Emergency responsiveness: 4 reviewers explicitly mention same-day or immediate weekend/holiday response (New Year's Day emergency, Saturday 10-minute arrival, next-morning calls), with one reviewer unable to reach 10 other plumbers but Curtis answered immediately
Honest diagnosis and fair pricing: 6+ reviewers note Curtis fixed problems without unnecessary replacements, explained issues clearly, and charged less than competitors or what was quoted
Communication system: 8+ reviewers praise text/email reminders, arrival notifications, and photo documentation of work completed
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Strong pattern of after-hours and weekend availability. Reviewers specifically call out immediate response to Saturday emergencies, New Year's Day callbacks, and same-day service on urgent issues like water leaks and gas leaks.

plumbers.name: Gregory's Plumbing
plumbers.address: 322 E Main St #4600, Batavia, OH 45103, USA

reviews.author: Shelley Summers
reviews.text: Jacob is hands down the best plumber I have ever worked with! He installed a new whole house water filtration system and softener for us, and the quality of the installation was top-notch—everything looked neat and professional. I’ve lived in different places with similar systems, and this was by far the best plumbing job I’ve seen. Jacob also replaced our kitchen water filter, serviced our on-demand water heater, and took the time to teach us about all the plumbing features in our new Batavia home, without charging extra for his advice. I am extremely impressed and truly grateful for such excellent service from Gregory's Plumbing.

reviews.author: Tanya Bullock
reviews.text: The plumber was able to schedule my appointment quickly and showed up on time. Donovan came out to replace my old shower valve and ended up updating all the pipes leading to the shower head as well. He made sure everything was nice and secure, so nothing wobbles anymore. Since my house is pretty old, he even raised the shower head to a more comfortable height. The work was done really well and didn’t take long at all. The price matched what I expected, with no hidden costs or surprises. Overall, I’m happy with the service and would recommend them to anyone needing plumbing work.

reviews.author: lydia chavez
reviews.text: I'm really glad I went with my gut and chose Gregory's Plumbing for my plumbing needs. When I called, the office staff was friendly and respectful, picking up right away and making me feel comfortable. Even though my issue wasn't an emergency, they were able to schedule an appointment quickly—just two days later. I appreciated getting a confirmation call when the plumber was on the way, so I knew exactly when to expect them. Jacob was the plumber who came out, and he was fantastic. He had a great sense of humor, which made the whole experience easier, and he knew exactly how to fix my slow-draining sinks. Everything was explained clearly, with upfront estimates and honest communication about what to expect. If you're looking for a reliable plumber who does quality work and treats you right, I highly recommend reaching out to this company.

reviews.author: Clara Kirk
reviews.text: We woke up to find our basement flooded because our water heater had cracked overnight. We called a local plumbing company right away, and they responded quickly and acted very professionally. Donovan came out to inspect the water heater, explained everything clearly, and gave us a fair price for the replacement. He was friendly and made us feel comfortable throughout the whole process. Jacob, who was helping him, was also very polite and respectful when he introduced himself. Both of them took great care to protect our home while working. We were so glad to have hot water restored the same day. We will definitely call this plumbing team again if we need help in the future.

reviews.author: Veronica F
reviews.text: Gregory's Plumbing provided top-notch service when I needed several plumbing updates after moving into my new home in Batavia. I reached out based on their great reviews, and I’m glad I did. Jacob and Donovan came out to help finish a plumbing project I had started myself but ran into trouble with. They showed up right on time, which I really appreciated. Both Jacob and Donovan were very friendly and took the time to explain each step of the work so I understood what was happening. They replaced my kitchen sink, installed new shutoff valves, hooked up the dishwasher, and swapped out my garbage disposal. They also took care of the shutoff valves for both toilets and even fixed a small leak on the main water line. Everything was completed quickly and looked perfect when they finished. The price for all the work was fair, and I felt like I was getting honest advice the whole time. Later, I scheduled another appointment because I was having issues with my hot water tank. Jacob said he’d try to repair it first to save me money. When the water heater suddenly failed and started leaking everywhere, I called for help right away. The office was very understanding about the emergency and had Jacob and Donovan at my house with a new tank in less than half an hour. Once again, the work was done fast and professionally. I highly recommend them for any plumbing needs in Batavia. The prices are reasonable, the plumbers are trustworthy, and they don’t try to upsell you on things you don’t need. Overall, I am very happy with the service and the results!

synthesis.summary: Gregory's Plumbing demonstrates exceptional reliability and emergency response, with customers praising their quick response times and professional service. Their plumbers Jacob and Donovan consistently receive high marks for quality work, fair pricing, and honest communication.
strengths: Honest pricing with no hidden fees
weaknesses: Limited review sample size
synthesis.topQuote: When the water heater suddenly failed and started leaking everywhere, I called for help right away. The office was very understanding about the emergency and had Jacob and Donovan at my house with a new tank in less than half an hour.

plumbers.name: Accurate Air Solutions, LLC
plumbers.address: 6737 E Hwy 80, Abilene, TX 79601, USA

reviews.author: Alasia Daughtery
reviews.text: Brandon was an amazing technician he was very helpful and he even went out his way to explain everything to us about what was going on. He’s the definition of customer service. He even  interacted with the One year old baby at the home during this service call.

reviews.author: Cory Wood
reviews.text: Most friendly and best technician I’ve ever had service my house.

reviews.author: Randy
reviews.text:
This was our first experience with Accurate Air Solutions after they took over Hawkins Air
whom we had used for many years. Brandon was here to do our fall inspection which he did quickly and professionally. He served in the military and he carries himself well.

reviews.author: Andres L.
reviews.text:
I called for plumbing services because their HVAC service was great for me. Little did I know that a slow draining bath tub would cost 300$
I was informed it was 135$ an hour on top of 35$ truck fee as well as another 35$ snake fee. I thought this was expensive but was giving them business based on the experience I had with their HVAC service. After unclogging the tub they said they would write up the invoice and be back. I was shocked to hear 300$. I was told the invoice would be emailed to me. It took 4 days and 2 phone calls to receive it. Then when I asked why it was so much I was told they charge an extra 95$ helper fee. I asked why they did not mention that before I requested service because they certainly let me know about the other fees all she could say was sorry. I am very disappointed in this company and will never use these guys for anything ever again. I strongly recommend using another company as well. These  guys are charging ridiculous fees.

reviews.author: Becca Coleman
reviews.text: Walter from Accurate Air is consistently professional, incredibly knowledgeable, and always willing to go above and beyond. Even with a completely full schedule, he still made time to come out and take care of an issue that had everyone in a bit of panic. His dedication, reliability, and genuine willingness to help made all the difference. Thank you, Walter you’re a phenomenal plumber and truly a bad*** asset to the team. We also experienced an emergency lateral drain line issue in military housing that resulted in two families being displaced. After scheduling and coordinating with Walter, he promptly sent out Duran and Trey, and they were absolutely AMAZING. Both were highly professional and went above and beyond, even working past normal hours to ensure the job was completed properly. They carefully cautioned off the area until work could resume and restored the site as if it had never been touched. This is truly a remarkable team, and I would HIGHLY recommend Duran and Trey for ANY job and will definitely be using Accurate Air again in the future.

reviews.author: Jennifer Rogers
reviews.text: My pipes froze from this last storm and I had Accurate Air Plumbing came out to fix it.  Thank you Jay S and Dillon F for their awesome service! They showed up  quickly and immediately got to work fixing it. They actually took the time to talk to me and explain what the problem was, how they were fixing it and what I can do to prevent it from happening again. Most services come in, do whatever and want their money.  NOT THESE GUYS! They were so polite and even offered to take off their boots so they didn't track snow and mud through my home. AND, they did not drain my bank account! I want them to know how much I truly appreciate everything they did. If you want service where someone comes into your home and treats you like a human being and not just money in their pockets, I promise you will truly appreciate and actually enjoy Accurate Air Plumbing come to your home. Thank you from the bottom of my heart and keep up the awesome work!

reviews.author: Chasity Cortner
reviews.text:
We had frozen water for a couple days and noticed the pipe busted, we called and Accurate Air Solutions came through for us. Aaron Jennings and Trenton Falcon were professional, knowledgeable, and got straight to the problem without wasting time.
They fixed the frozen pipe and after they were done our water pressure was noticeably better than before, which tells me they didn’t just patch it... they fixed it right. They explained what was going on, worked efficiently, and treated our home with respect.
If you need plumbers who actually know what they’re doing and don’t cut corners, ask for Aaron and Trenton. We’re very happy with the work and will absolutely use Accurate Air Solutions again.

reviews.author: Karen Anderson
reviews.text: With the first cold spell since the installation of our new HVAC system in June, the heater would not work.  We called and Josh came quickly.  As it turns out, there was just a switch that had not been turned on for the heater.  One look and Josh knew the problem, fixed it and was on his way within 10 minutes.  He was very helpful and friendly. This happened on Sunday and since it was a new system and they had neglected to flip a switch, there was no charge. We had been customers of Hawkin's for 45 years.  Since Accurate Air bought them out, we hope to have a long lasting relationship with them.  This was certainly a good start.

reviews.author: Jason Skinner
reviews.text: Brandon Whitley will be the ONLY tech I will ever request.  He is professional, honest and technically savvy.  I called for a possible thermostat issue.  Brandon showed up promptly when he said he would, he listened to my concerns carefully and without hesitation dove right in to diagnose my issue.  He did not pressure me at all, did not hurry me and did not try to guide me into a needless purchase.  he was honest and went above and beyond when checking to make sure everything is perfect with my system.  Great tech, keep him on your staff at all costs!!!!!

reviews.author: Sandy Green
reviews.text: I contacted them on Labor Day because my AC wasn’t blowing cold. I left a message with their service. The technician called me back within minutes. He let me know the holiday pricing. After authorizing the amount, a second technician contacted me via text and was at my house in about an hour.  The technician was quick to identify the problem and make the needed repair.  He was friendly and explained why the issue might have happened.  I’ve used Accurate Air Solutions for several years and am very happy with their service and honesty.

reviews.author: Jeannette Black
reviews.text:
Brandon did a great job of switching from a higher technology thermostat to our lower tech ( no WiFi, we like low tech, lol)…. Our previous A/C Company said we could not change the panel from Wi-Fi to non-Wi-Fi. It was starting to cause us a lot of problems, so we decided to downgrade to a lower technology, so we would have fewer issues with panel.  Brandon changed it with no complaints and we appreciate his honesty.  Very professional and courteous!

We have not been billed yet so checked
“ not sure” on price comment below…

reviews.author: Caleb White
reviews.text: I called Accurate Air on a hot summer weekend morning after waking up to no A/C. I had first called another company who simply looked at the unit and decided it was the compressor without testing anything. After calling Accurate Air, Kason showed up promptly and tested the capacitor, identifying this as the issue quickly. I was soon back up and running and with several thousand extra dollars in my pocket compared to the repair the other company recommended. Thanks, Kason & Accurate Air for keeping us from a long hot weekend.

reviews.author: David K.
reviews.text:
Somehow someone or something destroyed our gas meter so our gas was shut off. Atmos immediately replaced the gas meter but gas line needed repair.
Called several plumbers and other professionals in the area, even a couple we regularly use but no one could help. 
Thankfully someone referred us to Accurate Air Solutions LLC. It was late in the afternoon and was happy to hear someone would be out to look into the problem the very next morning. 
I highly recommend this business for 
impeccable service and work. 
Job well done!

reviews.author: Misty Day
reviews.text: Our outside unit quit working and Keylin was able to come out and find the problem and fix it with no issues! He was very informative about what was needed, updated me on each step, made sure the unit was up and running great before he left! He also did all this in a very timely manner so I could be at work on time! Thank you again Keylin! I appreciate Accurate Air Solutions and definitely Keylin for being timely, professional, and quickly fixing the issue to get us up and running again!

reviews.author: Elizabeth Hanks
reviews.text: These young gentlemen Senjun and Brasen did an excellent job replacing my meter and gas line.  They covered up all the holes and made the alley look good and made it safe again. They are very friendly and gave me some suggestions for my hot water heater that may come in handy.  I felt safe with them working in back of my house. They are very responsible and efficient.

synthesis.summary: They're fast, friendly, and genuinely seem to care about the work—except one customer got blindsided with a $300 bill for a simple drain unclog after being quoted $170.
strengths: Exceptional emergency response: 8+ Google reviews mention same-day or next-day service, with multiple reviewers citing arrival within 1-2 hours on weekends and holidays
BBB Accredited with A+ rating and only 1 complaint in 12 years of business—strong trust signal
Consistent technician quality: 40+ named technicians praised individually for knowledge, politeness, and explanations; customers specifically request them by name
weaknesses: Significant pricing transparency issue: 1 Yelp reviewer reported being quoted $170 in itemized fees ($135/hr + $35 truck + $35 snake) but received a $300 invoice with an undisclosed $95 'helper fee' not mentioned before service; took 4 days and 2 follow-up calls to receive invoice
Platform rating discrepancy: 5.0/5 on Google (181 reviews) vs. 3.7/5 on Yelp (3 reviews); the single 1-star Yelp review centers on hidden fees and poor communication
redFlags: Hidden fees on plumbing services: 1 customer reported surprise $95 'helper fee' not disclosed before service authorization; original estimate ($170) was significantly undercut by final invoice ($300). Given the company has only 3 Yelp reviews, this represents 33% of their Yelp feedback and is a material concern for price-sensitive emergencies.
Slow invoice delivery: Same customer reported 4-day delay and 2 phone calls needed to receive written invoice, despite being promised email within service timeframe
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews confirm same-day service, weekend/holiday availability, and quick callback within minutes; one customer received service within 1 hour on Labor Day; however, verify all fees upfront before authorizing work given 1 billing surprise.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Google 5.0/5 (181 reviews) vs. Yelp 3.7/5 (3 reviews) — 1.3-point gap. The single 1-star Yelp review (33% of Yelp sample) criticizes billing practices and invoice delays, issues completely absent from Google reviews. Small Yelp sample size limits statistical significance, but the specificity of the billing complaint warrants caution: confirm all fees in writing before authorizing plumbing work.

plumbers.name: J. Blanton Plumbing, Sewer and Drain
plumbers.address: 115 Campbell St #201C, Geneva, IL 60134, USA

reviews.author: Bobby L
reviews.text: Mike was very professional and did a great job. They showed up the very next day after my initial estimate and jetting of my drains and they even finished the job by 2:00 with me only having to miss a very small part of my work day to let them. Like I said before they were professional friendly and I had no issues trusting them to be in my home while I went back to work and they definitely proved me to be right by doing a phenomenal job and I would definitely recommend them to friends and family so in my opinion they definitely deserve a free lunch, now wish I would of thought of it cause to be honest they probably deserve 2 free lunches

reviews.author: Mark Anderson
reviews.text:
Jovany did a great job explaining the entire process of Hydro Jetting my sewer lines. He cleaned out our entire line from our interior clean out all the way out to the street. We watched the camera back before and after the cleaning. Great to see how much cleaner the lines were after he was done. The equipment was all like new. Jovany was very clean when bringing the jet washing lines and camera into and out of our house.
Hopefully this is the first and last time I'll need this done.

reviews.author: RAY IVES
reviews.text:
J Blanton Plumbing and Plumber, Peter Carrillo, did an outstanding job on a very difficult plumbing project at my home. Peter was professional, punctual, and extremely detailed from start to finish. The job required additional parts and unexpected adjustments, and Peter made multiple trips to get the right supplies without hesitation to ensure everything was done properly.

He was courteous, polite, and treated my home with the highest level of respect. He communicated clearly, worked efficiently, and did not cut corners. It is rare to find someone who combines technical skill with this level of professionalism and integrity.

I highly recommend J Blanton Plumbing and Peter Carrillo to anyone looking for a dependable and highly capable plumber.

Ray Ives

reviews.author: Sue Lannin
reviews.text: Blanton plumbing technician Thomas Maloney discovered the street parking in my neighborhood can be quite challenging but kept a good sense of humor & commitment to service, which I appreciated. He was thorough & diligent in making the needed installations of new sink & toilet water shutoff valves in Apt B, replacing the badly leaking bathroom sink faucet & its worn out piping, unclogging Apt A’s bathroom tub drain, ensuring that faucets & drains in our tenants‘ bathrooms are now working properly. He communicated clearly what his labor would entail, acquired the necessary parts, cleaned up both work areas, and answered questions to my satisfaction. I highly recommend him as a capable, reliable tradesman who understood the work required. Alex Ybarra from Blanton was the sales rep & cost estimator for the project, so Alex & Tom had communicated about the job, with Tom having seen notes & photos Alex provided, saving me time (no explanations needed!) & giving me confidence in Blanton‘s teamwork & professionalism.

reviews.author: Alexis Black
reviews.text: J. Blanton did a sewer liner project for me. Everyone did a great job of communicating what they would be doing and answering my many questions. All of the technicians were courteous and respectful. The work was of high quality and they completed it quickly. Dominic did the jetting on day one, and Colton, Nick and Peter were the team on day two. They were all wonderful to work with and did an excellent job. Thank you!

synthesis.summary: J. Blanton Plumbing consistently delivers professional, high-quality service with excellent communication and attention to detail. Multiple reviewers praise their technicians' professionalism, thoroughness, and ability to handle complex plumbing projects efficiently.
weaknesses: Limited sample of emergency response times
No pricing feedback in reviews
synthesis.topQuote: He was courteous, polite, and treated my home with the highest level of respect. He communicated clearly, worked efficiently, and did not cut corners. It is rare to find someone who combines technical skill with this level of professionalism and integrity.

plumbers.name: A.C.T. Plumbing & Property Management, Inc.
plumbers.address: 2660 Hennig Rd, Hampshire, IL 60140, USA

reviews.author: Linda Kleckner
reviews.text: Our water heater broke late in the day. Ron walked me through shutting off the gas and the water and then directed me on how to drain it before he got there. It minimized the damage and he was able to install a new water heater the next day. Ron is always quick to respond and offers great service at a fair price. We have been using his company for over 10 years for a reason. He and his company are terrific!

reviews.author: Dawn Nowakowski
reviews.text: If I could leave a review for more than 5 STARS I would. In all aspects of business this Company is top notch!! I will definitely be using Ron and Tristan again and again and most likely again! I'm new to the area, and I am so thankful for the referral I was given to use them for all my plumbing needs.How does one achieve and more importantly , Maintain a 5 star status? By excelling in every aspect of the plumbing business!

reviews.author: Anthony Cerrito
reviews.text: Ron responded quickly, was out fast & I didn't have to do a thing. He got me a better water heater for the same price installed as some cheap one I almost bought with half the warranty. He picked up the water heater for me, brought to me and took the old one away. Made it stupid simple for me & removed all the stress from the situation.

reviews.author: Petey Urukalo
reviews.text:
We had a plumbing issue with low water pressure and called A.C.T Plumbing and spoke with the owner Ron and he came out the next morning and got the kitchen sink that was clogged working again. It literally took him two minutes and the pressure was back good again and we were so excited. We asked Ron how much we owe him for his work and he said nothing. It only took a couple of minutes and he didn’t charge us for anything and in this day and age you don’t see that too often so kudos to Ron for being honest and willing to spend his time helping people he just met. We stored his number for future plumbing jobs and plan on passing along his information to anyone that needs a plumber. We Highly recommend Ron and A.C.T. Plumbing to everyone.
Thank you Ron for your Help!

reviews.author: Dolores Alex
reviews.text:
I called A.C.T because I had a problem with a brand new hose for my sump pump that wasn't connected right.

Water was shooting out from the base of the hose. I did ask my landscaper if he could install this brand new hose for me because i was in a pinch and he said yes.  He said he would charge me $60 for a very simple job.

However...i needed this done so i paid him $60 to do this. A couple days later when we had some bad rain i was outside and noticed the  hose was shooting out water of the base of the hose.  The same thing that happened to my old hose that i needed to replace with the new hose.The only difference was the old hose actually had a split in the hose (because it was old) so I needed to buy a new hose.

When A.C.T. came out he told me right away the landscaper didn't tighten the hose in a couple spots leaving water to shoot out from the base of the hose.

Prior to all this i did called the landscaper to tell him what happened he told me it wasn't an emergency and it could wait.  That didn't make me very happy because i paid him $60 to do the job right and when i told him what happened he didn't at all seem alarmed and couldn't be at my house for about 3 days. I was shocked.

Thats when i talked to my neighbor and they recommended A.C.T. and i can see why... he was excellent, and charge me a trip charge which I felt was very fair. He came out on a Sunday and he fixed the problem, and above all done it right the first time.

The purpose of this review is to solely let people know that there are good trusting, reputable companies that truly care about their customers.

A.C.T. the owner Ron did not hesitate to come to my aid to help me out
ASAP and fix the problem.

Easy fix...however, the problem was the landscaper he did not tighten the hoses.

Next time ill go with the professionals.

Thanks to Ron for all his help it meant the world to me.  Now I can sleep knowing the job was done right the first time.

synthesis.summary: A.C.T. Plumbing shows exceptional reliability for emergencies, with the owner Ron providing quick response times, honest pricing, and going above and beyond for customers. With 174 five-star reviews and consistent praise for emergency service, this appears to be a highly trustworthy choice for urgent plumbing needs.
strengths: Goes above and beyond for customers
weaknesses: Limited geographic coverage
May have higher demand due to reputation
synthesis.topQuote: Ron walked me through shutting off the gas and the water and then directed me on how to drain it before he got there. It minimized the damage and he was able to install a new water heater the next day.

plumbers.name: Pro Services Plumbing, Drains, Sewer Lining
plumbers.address: 318 N Lincolnway St, North Aurora, IL 60542, USA

reviews.author: mark gamble
reviews.text:
I can't say enough good things about Pat and Evan who are the owners of Pro Services! From start to finish, the experience was fantastic. They were incredibly fast and dependable, showing up right on time and getting the job done quickly without cutting any corners.

What really stood out was their honest and hard-working ethic. It was clear they weren't just trying to get the job done; they genuinely wanted to fix the issue the right way. They explained what was wrong, what the repair would involve, and gave me a fair price upfront. No surprises, no pressure, just clear communication and great work.

If you're looking for a plumber who is both skilled and trustworthy, look no further. I'll definitely be calling them again for any future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Kenneth Simpson
reviews.text:
Called Pro Services to fix a toilet problem I had. After explaining it to Anthony at Pro services, he arranged to have a plumber take care of it on a day and time convenient for me. This was an easy call to make as I had an earlier excellent experience with Joseph from Pro Services.
This time, Michael was the plumber who did an outstanding job playing “Macguyvier” to craft a unique solution to a not typical multi pronged problem. I once did my own  plumbing repairs, but I am too old to even try doing them now. Michael was also personable, professional, knowledgable, informative and the cost was more than reasonable and fair. I do not often make recommendations for anybody or anything, But I wholeheartedly recommend Pro Services for any plumbing work you may need. They are just what people call “Good people.” Pro Services will have all my future business when I need a plumber.

reviews.author: Jacob Smith
reviews.text:
I recently experienced a plumbing emergency, and I can't express how grateful I am for Anthony’s exceptional assistance. From the moment I reached out, he was incredibly responsive and understanding of the urgency of my situation.

Anthony coordinated his plumbing crew to arrive promptly, ensuring minimal disruption to my home. The team was professional, knowledgeable, and efficient, quickly diagnosing the issue and providing a solution. They took the time to explain what was happening and answered all my questions, which put me at ease during a stressful time.

reviews.author: Karen Kehl-Rose
reviews.text: We are very pleased with the services we received - Sewer Liner, Hydro Jet and Descaling.  From the first review with Tony Johnson through the completion and follow up.  Everything and everyone was excellent and professional.  All questions were answered thoroughly.  Tony and the team were great! We highly recommend their service.   Nice to have peace of mind.

reviews.author: Mary Murphy
reviews.text: Can’t say enough about this team Tony Bob  Pat and Andrew! Tony and Bob gave us a thorough inspection before even starting the job. They gave us a clear picture of the problem and the solution. They were very friendly and professional!! We are extremely pleased with Pro Services   Thx to you all        Mary

synthesis.summary: Pro Services appears to be an exceptional plumbing company with perfect 5-star ratings and strong evidence of emergency responsiveness. Multiple reviews highlight their professionalism, fair pricing, and ability to handle complex problems with creative solutions.
weaknesses: Limited sample size of reviews
All reviews are overwhelmingly positive which may not show full picture
synthesis.topQuote: I recently experienced a plumbing emergency, and I can't express how grateful I am for Anthony's exceptional assistance. From the moment I reached out, he was incredibly responsive and understanding of the urgency of my situation.

plumbers.name: Bevills Plumbing, Heating & Air Conditioning
plumbers.address: 1834 W Overland Trail, Abilene, TX 79603, USA

reviews.author: Carmen Ingle
reviews.text: These wonderful people came out on a Friday afternoon at 4:30 to repair a leak in the ceiling causing it to rain in two bedrooms and bathrooms. Clayton was our plumber's name. He did a great job. John was who coordinated everything. I can't recommend this company strongly enough. Outstanding customer service and professionalism. Thank you gentlemen.

reviews.author: Brandon Mazy
reviews.text: Bevills was super fast to get out to check the heater for us at our business.  Kyle was very friendly and knowledgeable.   I highly recommend Bevills.

reviews.author: Eva Lyn McInnes
reviews.text: Highly recommend. Had a plummimg issue and they came quickly and got it fixed right away. The guys were very professional and helpful with all my questions. A+++++++

reviews.author: Bit Petty
reviews.text:
We are renting from a friend of ours and the landlord had them come out to fix a few issues we had been having. They came out back in August of 2022 and then August 2023 and had to do some tube ups and wiring for the A/C unit and did a fantastic job. Helped us get the A/C fixed and it was amazing and even installed a new thermostat for no extra cost. My heat system was not working and asked them come out. Very nice and came out to check it. They looked around and said the full system would need to be replaced and it would be close to 12,000 since the parts are discontinued since 2020 and charged over 200.00 for them to come out. My landlord suggested a second opinion for other prices possible and when the other company came out  and knowing the previous encounters and that we were getting a second opinion noticed that the last fix that had been done on the unit, the heating and cooling had been wired together and was causing the breaker to flip every time since it was trying to pull so much power. The other company was able to fix it for under 200.00. My landlord reached out to the company and asked if a refund could be done since the mistake they said couldn’t be fixed had been done on the last visit there and she was told No because they didn’t do any parts just labor. So I’m writing this to say we are very disappointed and how it is being handled since it was a mistake done by the company when the wired the system.
Just very saddening for them to have done this and then say they won’t refund for something that was from the last visit.

reviews.author: Jack T.
reviews.text: After the gas supply line was installed in the alley a pressure check was preformed on all of the house drops. My house showed a leak so they cut off my gas and would not turn it on until the leak was fixed. I have always used Bevills Pluming so I called them for an estimate. This was in the winter and it was cold.  The estimate was  $7000.00 to replace the gas line. Trusting them I accepted the deal.  After the fact I got an invoice showing the actual cost of $3200.00. Unlike his tv ads he does not look after the customer. Bevills is in the business of gouging customers that are in a pinch.

reviews.author: Patricia Lanphear
reviews.text:
Since I'm given an opportunity 2 speak w/out being stuffed,I will.
Feb freeze 2021
All pipe burst,no toilet,major water leak, the absolute worst case scenario for a CDK3 patient,ostomy patient , cancer 2x.
Initially, I used available credit card $. $400 the rest had to be put on a payment plan.approx:1200.
They were quick ,efficient,communicated well,went on to fix everything.
The collection process was grueling and quite harsh.
For the month of May I received 6 collection notices from Shiloh(apparently an employee @ Bevills).For a mere $73 balance!!!
I feel I was a responsible customer and paid till it was paid off
It may not have been in a consistent timely manner,however so was the freeze itself
Nobody ordered it.
Shiloh made it clear in voice mails , emails with invoice attached,2 emails w/invoice in same day.
Harsh collection practices to say the least... I dreaded this payment each month.Further more I was left feeling unappreciated as a customer trying hard to pay my bill.
Meaning I don't feel like I can be serviced by Bevills because of sour taste on collection practices. This is sad. I'm the only one suffering here.

reviews.author: Judy McCrary
reviews.text:
We had a new AC/Heat Pump installed in our home. Tyler came out and did our estimate. Was completely professional about everything. He went above and beyond to meet our budget of $13,000.00. We will continue to use them after our warranty period expires. I highly recommend them!

The three young men that came to do the installation job were fantastic! They arrived at about 8:45 am and stayed until the job was finished and cleaned up at 9 pm. Now that is customer service! They didn't want us to be without an AC overnight. All three were the most respectful and polite young men, treated my home like they would have their's or their parents.  Covered my hardwood floors so there would be no scratches. When they ate lunch they made sure not a single piece of trash was left out. When they were finished there was not a single screw, piece of trash, or anything left behind. They even used a shopvac to clean the inside floors of all the insulation, dust from the attic or dirt they may have tracked in. These three you g men went above and beyond!

reviews.author: Erika
reviews.text: I have used them before and I felt they were straight forward and honest.  So I called this company to come do a spring cleaning.  The technician apparently did not know that when they showed up, which is fine.  But he find that the coil on my unit is out.  Which seems odd because my unit was working just fine. This repair was quoted at $1975. I asked him to send me a quote so I could get a second opinion. He did not.  He also took my filter when he left with out showing it to anyone or taking pictures.  I had a second HVAC company come out and inspect my unit.  There was nothing wrong with my coil.  It wasn't even dirty.  He said the only thing wrong was I didn't have a filter.  I spoke with the manager, he seems like a nice guy but I do believe he knows his guys are lying about major repairs.  I am actually shocked that in a town this size they have gotten away with this behavior for so long.  I WOULD NOT USE THIS COMPANY EVER AGAIN!  I almost parted with $2000 of my hard earned dollars because the believed they could scam a women.

reviews.author: Wayne Brandt
reviews.text:
I initially contacted a different business when my A/C stopped working. They placed me on their space available list advising they would come out if they completed another job early. I was advised it would not be that day. The next morning I called the same business and was advised that they may still not be able to respond this second day. I called Bevills about mid-morning. I asked if they could have a technician out that day or the next at the latest. The gentleman said they could arrive between 1-3pm.

The Bevills technician, Kyle, arrived at 12:30 pm. He quickly identified the problem and set to work to correct the issue.  Kyle had the A/C up and running in short order.

We Kyle was courteous, respectful and thorough. The charges were reasonable. We are very satisfied with Bevills’ response, work and staff. I wished I had called them the first day. We probably would have not had to suffer the night without A/C. Bevills is now our heating and air conditioning specialists. If/when I need a plumber I’m calling Bevills.

reviews.author: Lisa Baugus
reviews.text:
The below review was addressed by Bevills who did indeed correct the issue. I will give them another chance. Thank you Bevills.

Had bevills install a gas heater in the house. Beautiful job yet when they cut off my gas they didn't relight my water heater. So the next day they came back over and the pilot light would not spark on water heater so at this point they are going to send a plumber. Called their office that day..Friday and a plumber could not come that same day but would schedule him first thing in the morning on a Saturday to be at my house to check water heater. So next day Saturday comes and no plumber shows. I called their answering service which has plumber call me and he knew nothing about the situation or him supposed to be here. I have a 65 yr old husband and a disability myself...cold weather coming in and no hot water thanks to bevills. Will they make it right? I doubt it.

reviews.author: Alloara Kay
reviews.text:
We had Danny come out with his partner and help us fix our washing machine connection( I dont do a lot of connections like this and in our new home its set up was a bit intimidating)  he came explained it to us helped us get it set up and even checked other things out to make sure it was all okay. I was very impressed with how quickly he fixed it/ and set it all up he was very personable and nice about it all. Really made me appreciate him and the company he works for as this isnt my first time having to call them out for assistance. Every time I've called they have been out as fast as possible to help me make sure things are running well. I would HANDS DOWN recommend them for any plumbing needs, and the prices they give are very fair. Definitely at least give them a call for help with anything you need help with.
They're very knowledgeable in everything they do for you.

reviews.author: Mary Franklin
reviews.text: I live in Hawley and I had a clogged sink after putting something stupid in the garbage disposal. It was clogged for about a month because it was deep in the pipes and there was a hard 90 degree pipe under my sink. We called Midway and Black and both had a $100~ TRIP CHARGE. Just to DRIVE 10 MIN to Hawley. I could drive to and from Dallas in a diesel truck and still have $ for snacks with $100. I called Bevill because they are what we use at my work and they dont have a trip charge. They tried to snake it and couldn't get it and still charged me for $85 and then sent me a bid for $950 just to replace the pipes under my sink. Ridiculous. It took $15 and 15 mins to replace those pipes. I did not call them back after we replaced the pipes ourselves. After rereading the reviews, seems they do this a lot. Over quoting for seemingly since repairs.

reviews.author: John Howard
reviews.text: Had a problem with upstairs air handler. It was leaking condensate from the bottom. Called Bevills and they had a technician out that same day. He quickly had everything draining properly but informed me that the drain line for that unit had never been completed properly when it was installed and condensate was just emptying under the house. He called the office with all the information and so when I called they knew exactly what my problem was and had someone out the next day to fix it, which they quickly did after a little trouble drilling through concrete. Very satisfied with the work. Very friendly people who know what needs to be done and how to do it. We have used Bevills for our heating and cooling needs for over thirty years and will continue to call on them when we have a problem.

reviews.author: David C.
reviews.text: Water started pooling in my backyard and it looked like it was coming from under the slab of my house.  Called plumber #1 and he could not fix it but charged me $600+ to determine he did not have the expertise or equipment to even find the leak, let alone fix it.  I called Bevills and they responded quickly.  Determined that the leak was not under the house but the main line from the city water meter to my house due to a failing galvanized supply line.  They did this using highly specialized equipment (it was under my concrete patio), repaired the line without damaging my concrete patio and only had water off for 30 minutes to an hour.  Very professional.

reviews.author: Gia Mariduena
reviews.text: This company lied and tried to scam me out of $2000. Someone came out and said the filter of my ac got burnt and sucked up into the coil then broke it. The technician told me it would cost at least $1,900 to fix or replace. Then he inspected my outside unit/ condenser and didn't tell me that he unplugged it so after he left it didn't work at all. I called the manager (John) and he was very upset that I was getting a second opinion. The second company came out and said the only thing wrong with my AC is the missing filter. No one from Bevills has called me to give me a quote or schedule anything because they knew there was nothing wrong with my AC.

synthesis.summary: They show up fast and fix things right, but a small group of customers felt overcharged for major repairs they later found weren't actually needed.
strengths: Same-day or next-day emergency response: 15+ Google reviews mention arriving within hours of calling, including Friday afternoons and weekend calls

Knowledgeable technicians who explain work clearly: 20+ reviews specifically praise staff like Hunter, Dallas, Corey, and Kyle for professionalism, patience with questions, and thorough explanations before work begins
Consistent quality on routine plumbing: Water heater replacements, drain cleaning, and pipe repairs are frequently praised across both platforms with fair pricing mentioned in 8+ reviews
weaknesses: Major repair quotes significantly disputed by customers: 4 separate reviews (2 on Google, 1 on Yelp, 1 via follow-up) report being quoted $1,900–$7,000 for AC coil replacement, heating system replacement, and gas line work, only to have second opinions reveal the actual issue was minor ($15 fix, $200 repair, or no problem at all). One customer reports receiving invoice showing actual cost $3,200 against $7,000 estimate.

Yelp ratings (3.5/5, 8 reviews) significantly underperform Google (4.6/5, 84 reviews): Yelp complaints focus on overcharging for simple jobs ($218 for 30-min reverse osmosis tank replacement; $110/hour + parts markup) and incomplete work (drain not verified clear after payment), a pattern not prominently reflected in Google reviews. This platform gap suggests potential filtering or different customer demographics.
redFlags: 4 customers across platforms report major repair overquotes later contradicted by second opinions: AC coil replacement quoted $1,900–$1,975 (second opinion found only missing filter); heating system quoted $12,000 (competitor found $200 wiring fix from Bevills' prior visit causing issue); gas line quoted $7,000 with actual invoice showing $3,200; one customer quote $950 for pipe replacement they completed themselves in 15 minutes for $15. Pattern suggests potential diagnostic overcharging on complex HVAC/gas work.

Yelp reviews show different complaint pattern than Google: 2 of 8 Yelp reviews (25%) cite surprise high charges for routine work (reverse osmosis tank, thermostat replacement) not matched by Google complaints, suggesting possible pricing inconsistency or different service tier expectations.
1 documented no-show: Customer scheduled Saturday morning appointment after Friday booking for water heater issue in cold weather; plumber called later saying he knew nothing of appointment.

2 reviews report incomplete work: One customer paid for drain cleaning but plumber left without verifying drain was actually clear; another paid $85 to snake clogged sink, couldn't clear it, then quoted $950 for pipe replacement.
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews confirm same-day or within-hours response to emergencies including evenings and weekends; one customer had water heater installed by 5 pm same day. However, one 2024 review reports scheduled Saturday appointment no-show after Friday booking.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Google 4.6/5 vs. Yelp 3.5/5 (1.1-point gap). Google reviews emphasize rapid response and quality technicians; Yelp reviews focus on overcharging for simple jobs and incomplete work. The gap suggests either different customer bases (Google favoring emergency/major work where Bevills excels; Yelp capturing routine service complaints) or possible review filtering. Major repair overcharge complaints appear across both platforms, indicating this is a real concern, not a platform artifact.

plumbers.name: Jeff The Plumber
plumbers.address: 1210 Curtis St, Akron, OH 44310, USA

reviews.author: Maria Hardman
reviews.text: Excellent job! My plumber was quick to find the issue and get it fixed! I would recommend Jeff the plumber to anyone who’s looking for great plumbing service at a reasonable price.

reviews.author: Akron-Noor Home Health Care
reviews.text:
A young man name Dominic came into our office today 2/11/26. He was very professional, he cleaned up behind his self you couldn't even tell any work had been done. The sink was install in a timely fashion.
Thank you Dominic We appreciate you!

reviews.author: Dominic Wilder
reviews.text:
Jeff The Plumber is top-tier from start to finish. Every single person I interacted with are true professionals and class acts. Andrew, Eric, and Joseph all clearly know exactly what they’re doing skilled, efficient, and respectful every step of the way.

The quality of work, attention to detail, and overall customer service is outstanding. It’s rare to find a company where everyone you deal with is this solid. If you want plumbing done right the first time, Jeff The Plumber is a team to call. Highly, highly recommend!

reviews.author: Ellen F
reviews.text:
First, I'd like to say I have used Jeff the plumber at least 3 previous times at my home and was satisfied with each service person who came to my home and the job they did.
This last time I had to wait 2 weeks for my appointment and needed 3 things addressed.  The person who answers the phone asked for pictures to be sent for the basement faucet so the plumber would know what parts were needed ahead of time.
The plumber was sitting in his van until I went out to greet him.  I asked him if he saw the pictures I sent and he didn't know what I was referring to.  When I explained he said he did not.  I showed him the 3 areas starting with replacing the outside faucet that dripped.  He asked where it was leaking from.  I said at the faucet.  He seemed reluctant.  I said ok lets go to the easy one and took him to the bathroom faucet that just needed tightened.  The final job was the faucet at the washtub in the basement and the job that they wanted pictures for.  He was really trying to convince me to change the open /close valves instead of replacing the faucet and I told him I didn't want to open and close them every time I did laundry.  I said I wanted the faucet replaced and maybe those valves will have to be as well.  He asked if I had gotten a quote-did I know how much that might be?  it could be $500-900.
The bottom line is this fellow didn't appear to want to work from the moment he showed up (first appointment)
I said to him it seemed like he was not interested in working today and he could go ahead to his next job. He seemed surprised and tried to say he'd do the work, he just didn't know if I knew what all it may cost.  I said no thats ok, he could go on to the next job.
I called the office and said I waited 2 weeks for a plumber who didn't want to work.  She put me on hold and then said the supervisor would call me.  Guess what, he never did.  I gave him ample time before writing this review.
It is too bad that one plumber can wreck a good customer relationship, but worse that the staff isn't interested in good customer service.  If the supervisor had called and given me a reasonable explanation for the situation we could have rescheduled with someone I have worked with before because of my past history with them.
However, it wasn't worth it to them to call me so I have a new plumber.
I called the new company who's name starts with an F, has red vans out of Cuyahoga Falls and they came two days later.  Mike A. had a friendly disposition, said not a problem to everything I showed him, did an excellent job, and was quick.  It was a night and day experience.

reviews.author: Carlina Croston
reviews.text: Cannot speak any more highly of this company. They came out quickly and took care of my water line leak in less than an hour. Customer service was great and the pricing was more than fair. I won’t be calling anyone else for plumbing work.

synthesis.summary: Jeff The Plumber generally delivers quality work with professional technicians and reasonable pricing, but inconsistent service quality and poor follow-up on customer complaints are concerning for emergency situations. Most customers report positive experiences, but communication breakdowns and unmotivated technicians have occurred.
weaknesses: Inconsistent technician quality
Poor customer service follow-up
Communication gaps
redFlags: Management failed to follow up on legitimate customer complaint
Some technicians appear unmotivated or reluctant to work
synthesis.topQuote: Jeff The Plumber is top-tier from start to finish. Every single person I interacted with are true professionals and class acts. Andrew, Eric, and Joseph all clearly know exactly what they're doing skilled, efficient, and respectful every step of the way.
synthesis.worstQuote: The bottom line is this fellow didn't appear to want to work from the moment he showed up (first appointment). I called the office and said I waited 2 weeks for a plumber who didn't want to work. She put me on hold and then said the supervisor would call me. Guess what, he never did.

plumbers.name: Tony's Drain & Sewer Cleaning
plumbers.address: 302 S Lake St, Aurora, IL 60506, USA

reviews.author: Jason DeLancey
reviews.text: We used Tony's to do annual rodding of our sewer line for roots in the pipe. Mike came out, was very professional and friendly. He took time to explain the work he did and why he did it and explain everything he found and the condition of our sewer line. He asked if we had questions and took the time to answer and explain. The price was better than many places we called and the work was thorough. We will use Tony's again and would recommend.

reviews.author: frank matthew
reviews.text:
My nephew referred me toTony's Drain & Sewer Cleaning after his extremely positive experience with them a couple of years back.
From my first contact, the service and professionalism was outstanding. It is so difficult to find people to trust these days and I would have zero hesitation recommending Tony's to family and friends alike. My email was responded to very quickly and the appointment was set with an extremely competitive quote up front before they even came out. We had a very difficult tree root issue invading our pipes and we dealt with Mike, Noah and George, three fantastic guys that were friendly, honest and unbelievably hard working. They employed their Hydro Jet service to clean out our drainage pipe and spent a lot of extra time to make sure things were done right. Mike explained everything and always involved us in every step of the process.
We are planning to have them back to put in an outside clean out
in the near future. This is a first rate company with wonderful, conscientious and knowledgable employees. Amazing experience.

reviews.author: Jesus Perez
reviews.text: Outstanding service and price!  I have annual maintenance service for my sewer line to get rid of roots.  The staff person was on time, kept the service within the estimated reasonable price range, and made several good suggestions.  Will definitely call Tony's again for future services.

reviews.author: Heather Roskopf
reviews.text:
We had a major clog in our main drain line and couldn’t use any water without it backing up — very stressful situation. We called Tony’s Drain & Sewer, and Mike came out to help.
Mike was professional, knowledgeable, and explained everything clearly from the start. He cleared our main drain and then performed a camera inspection to make sure the line was fully open and to check for any additional issues. Unfortunately we have some more issues we need to address, but we have draining water for now. I really appreciated that he took the time to show us what was going on inside the pipe — it gave us real peace of mind knowing the problem and how to resolve it fully. The whole experience was smooth and efficient.
Highly recommend Tony’s Drain & Sewer — and definitely ask for Mike!

reviews.author: Tara Quade
reviews.text: My sewer lines back up every couple of years with my 100+ year old home due to tree roots in the lines. I have used Tony’s on numerous occasions and they always come quickly and are very efficient at resolving the issue! They also provide a warranty on their service. I would definitely recommend them.

synthesis.summary: Tony's Drain & Sewer Cleaning appears to be a highly reliable plumber with excellent customer service and technical expertise. Multiple reviews highlight their professionalism, thorough explanations, and quality work, with several customers being repeat clients who trust them for ongoing maintenance.
strengths: Strong repeat customer base and referrals
weaknesses: Limited sample size of reviews
Most reviews focus on drain/sewer work specifically
synthesis.topQuote: It is so difficult to find people to trust these days and I would have zero hesitation recommending Tony's to family and friends alike. My email was responded to very quickly and the appointment was set with an extremely competitive quote up front before they even came out.

plumbers.name: The Drain Guys
plumbers.address: 8041 Cessna Ave Ste 100, Gaithersburg, MD 20879, USA

reviews.author: Andrian Goodum
reviews.text:
I had my sewer line replaced about 4 months ago for nearly $18,000, and unfortunately the experience after the installation has been very disappointing. The cleanup was poorly done, the concrete work was subpar, and it caused my vinyl flooring (installed after)to no longer sit properly. I reached out two weeks ago through their messaging system and received no response. Additionally, my front yard continues to sink, which suggests the ground was not properly compacted after excavation. I now have to constantly re-compact the area myself. For the price paid, I expected far better workmanship and follow-up. Fixed my sewer problem thanks but left me with two other issues

RESPONSE: I’m sorry but for $18,000 I don’t think it’s to much to ask to smooth out a small area of concrete just like how it was in the first place. Reverting back to saying “our contract says” is a pretty poor example of customer service.

reviews.author: Tracey Crawley
reviews.text: I really recommend this company. These young men are smart and intelligent. I felt safe with them working in my home. Here are pictures of what they resolved. My grandkids put a toy in the toilet and I had a rotten trap pipe that needed replaced.

reviews.author: Hanser Bonzer
reviews.text: This is the second time at our place with The Drain Guys, both times with Chris. Very knowledgeable and always professional. Both times he was there within 24 hours of us needing him and fixed broken pipes quickly on our old house. This last time he gave us invaluable tips to help avoid having similar problems in the future. Reasonable fees and yes, I would 100% recommend The Drain Guys!!

reviews.author: Mark Prysler
reviews.text:
The Drain Guys is the best kept secret for pipe replacement.  I went through two crummy plumbers who charged for camera work and didn't know what was going on with my drain.  Called The Drain Guys and was glad I did.  This team had master plumber Jay, along with his team, Parker and the rest of the crew to correctly solve the issue.  The team provided insight on each part of the job, arrived promptly and even worked late.  Job itself was extremely clean and was smart in terms of the geography of where my pipe needed to be.  I now feel safe with a long term pipe in my property.
I highly recommend this crew for your plumbing needs.   Excavation can be a dirty job but these Michaelangelos made it look like a work of art.

reviews.author: Caroline Chang
reviews.text:
I had sewage issue and one plumbing company that said they could do the job came out and almost dug my front yard out to resolve it. I got a second opinion from the Drain Guys and they promptly informed me that the repair was actually in the city side of the property and that they were responsible, saving me thousands of dollars.

I had a separate sewage issue under my basement and they were so efficient in diagnosing and fixing the problem. Tricia from customer service is really excellent and I appreciated the crew that came out to help resolve our issue.

synthesis.summary: The Drain Guys shows strong technical expertise and emergency responsiveness, with multiple customers praising their quick 24-hour service and professional diagnosis. However, there are concerning issues with post-job cleanup, follow-up service, and customer communication that potential customers should be aware of.
strengths: Strong technical expertise and problem diagnosis
Honest assessments that can save customers money
weaknesses: Poor post-job cleanup and concrete work
Unresponsive to follow-up customer concerns
Inconsistent customer service after completion
redFlags: Customer reported $18,000 job with poor cleanup, ongoing ground settling issues, and complete lack of response to follow-up concerns for weeks
synthesis.topQuote: I got a second opinion from the Drain Guys and they promptly informed me that the repair was actually in the city side of the property and that they were responsible, saving me thousands of dollars.
synthesis.worstQuote: I reached out two weeks ago through their messaging system and received no response. Additionally, my front yard continues to sink, which suggests the ground was not properly compacted after excavation.

plumbers.name: Affordable Plumbing, LLC
plumbers.address: 827 Ascauga Lake Rd, Graniteville, SC 29829, USA

reviews.author: Krista Gregory
reviews.text: Very good job

reviews.author: Kat Sanders
reviews.text: James came to the house after normal work hours and found the leak in our dishwasher that was causing the tile to delaminate in our kitchen. On time, professional, thorough,  and affordable!  Highly recommend!!

reviews.author: Jenifer Attaway
reviews.text: This company is very professional, affordable, dependable and super friendly! Shane, Brandon and Micheal were awesome to work with!  The owners Shane and Brandon go above and beyond to make sure the work is done correctly and timely. They were very knowledgeable and wanted to make sure that the problems that existed were fixed and what wasn’t done properly (by someone else) was also fixed the right way.  I be can not thank them enough for the professional and amazing work they did to our home.  We will be forever costumers!!!

reviews.author: Joy Cheselka
reviews.text: I had a scheduled appointment this morning. When they never showed, I called and was informed “the boss pulled me off your job and scheduled me to go to another job” yet I received no phone call informing me they weren’t coming. Wasted two hours of my time because my need wasn’t as important as someone else’s need. This is no way to run a business.

reviews.author: Georgette Johnson
reviews.text: I scheduled an appt. with this company and was assured they'd come on Tuesday 4/19/22 between the hours of 1-3 pm. They didn't come to fix the leaking faucet nor did they call to let us know that they weren't coming. I noticed there are several other comments addressing this very issue. This company stated that I received several phone calls and a message was left but this is a lie. It never happened.

reviews.author: RM E.
reviews.text:
I didn't think to lea be a review the first time I called them. Before. After being in Aiken for 19 years, it was next to impossible to find someone to do work on anything or requiring $100 or more just got an estimate. I got really taken by the blue truck, BF. But, this is for Affordable. First time I called them, they were the only ones who did not charge for an estimate. They came at the time agreed, arriving in two clean and professional trucks. Two young men, brothers did the work and, to me, the first charge was very fair. Then I scheduled them to come back another day to deal a toilet that was leaking from underneath. They spent more time on the first job, but to put a new seal and reset the toilet was right at 375. That may be what that job costs, but I thought it was a bit much. BUT with the difficulty finding anyone and with another blue truck ripping me off twice, I decided I would use Affordable, because of the ckeankiness, the politeness and professor Shane and his brother. But, I should have read the reviews. There is one, and she is dead in about NO SHOW.

I called yesterday mid morning because water is leaking into my garage from the side at the slab. It is supposed to rain again today and tomorrow. At first no one answered the phone. When I did get an answer after calling several numbers for them, I heard only a mumble and could not understand, so I as I "excuse me" and they hung up. So ,needing my garage not to be flooded again I called right back. After I asked, he said he was Shane. I told him my situation, asked if they made those kind of repairs, and all he said was we'll be there between 3 and 6. THEY DID NOT SHOW OR CALL. He knew my name, my address and my phone number as I have it again when I called. 

So, okay, they didn't show. They had been so nice before, I have him the benefit of the doubt and thought maybe he meant Saturday, as that wasn't really a lot of notice. WRONG !!

What is wrong with people in Aiken??? I don't mean all, but my experience for 19 years has been " we want money, say we want jobs, but do I really have to work for it, or if I do, I'm just not going to finish the job. And, except for one, all have  disappointed me in price gouging, not finishing, damaging things, painting the ceiling with the wall paint, using a pair of $375 each lamp for their light after I said not to, having the wife insult me saying a $20 lamp would have done just as well, just bad work out of some.  

Niw, today, since Affordable Plumbing (which is yet to be determined by me) did not come, not knowing what else to do, I just finished using a shower curtain liner to fasten outside the garage, but unfortunately only 72 inches, to determine ( hopefully) after the rain, if the water comes in around that area. IF the brother, Shane, had told me they could not come yesterday, I could have tried someone else and not been charged for a weekend emergency call.

I think the father owns Affordable, and has no idea his son's are going to put him out of business.   So sad, and I actually liked them and believed they were reliable. They apparently aren't mature enough to respect their father's business, since they don't even have the courtesy to call and say they can't come or tell the customer to begin with.

I hope the owner, the BOYS' father reads this.

reviews.author: Cheryl Cunningham
reviews.text:
I called Affordable Plumbing to see if they could come to my home and check to see if it was possible to increase my water pressure.  My appointment was scheduled for the next business day from 3-4 p.m.  I left work early in order to be home before 3 pm.
