At 3:55, no one had shown up, so I called to make sure they still were coming.  I was told that they were running behind and would call me when they were on their way, which they did. The plumber arrived at 5:57 pm.  I wish I had been notified or was told I could receive a courtesy call to let me know when they were on the way, so I would not have taken off work early.
The plumber was extremely polite, but stayed on his mobile phone the entire time chatting and laughing with someone while he worked.  I am thankful for the job that was done and am very happy with the better water pressure.  The plumber did not take the time to explain what he had to do in order to increase the pressure.  When he finished, he told me that he had to install a new pressure regulator.  I wish he had explained that to me beforehand to give me the chance to opt out or not of the cost that it incurred.  Nevertheless, I am satisfied with the outcome.  It is wonderful to have higher water pressure in every faucet/shower throughout the house.
I gave a rating of 4 only because I was not informed of the procedure it took to increase my water pressure before he did the actual work and because the plumber was somewhat unprofessional, as he was on his mobile device chatting and laughing with someone the entire time.
Other than that, I would definitely recommend Affordable Plumber.

reviews.author: Paul Dean
reviews.text: I called and asked this company what they charge to locate a leak in a shower at my 88 year old mothers house. "George" responded $75.00. I told my mother this and she called them to approve. A few days later, I swung by my mom's house to check up on her and she said that the plumbers would be arriving tomorrow to start the job and she showed me the work order. $7,000 to fix the plumbing and install a new fiberglass shower!!! The plumber said that the leak was under the ceramic tiled shower floor (upstairs) and he cut out a large "L" shape in the dining room ceiling Sheetrock so he could have access to diagnose where the leak was. After seeing his $7,000 quote (which started out as a $75 charge to find the "alleged" leak),..I called George and immediately cancelled their appointment for the next morning. After I cancelled their appointment , someone from AFFORDABLE PLUMBING showed up at my mom's to collect the $75 that they told me and my mother what it would cost to locate the leak. They must have sprinkled some water on that $75 bill because it grew into a flowering $250.00. I called another plumber and it is concluded that there is no leak in the drain pipe under the shower tiled floor. It is also agreed that a new fiberglass shower stall is not needed and definitely was never needed to begin with (for $7,000)!!! So busting up that single person 3' X 3' mosaic tiled shower floor and walls to replace it with a new fiberglass shower stall was absolutely unnecessary. I have more to add to this but will finalize it at a later time. The truth is easy to reiterate and requires no rehearsal.

reviews.author: Angie Pollock
reviews.text:
What an awesome group of young men!  Brandon and Shawn are very professional and knowledgeable, their work is spot on and they take pride in cleaning behind themselves, and show you everything that they are doing so there are no surprises!  I have been using them since 2015 and for the work they completed today, I’m positive I will never have to call them to unclog anything!  They have hired another intelligent, professional who’s name is Michael who also is knowledgeable and takes pride in making sure the customer is please, between the 3 of them, North Augusta and Augusta should know they are definitely dependable and very professional to be so young, I was truly blessed last Friday and again today by their presence and service!  Stay connected brothers and continue to leave a lasting impression on all your customers!  Again Thank You All!

Respectfully,
Angie P.

reviews.author: Tim B.
reviews.text:
Brought these gentlemen out for a second opinion on some rattling pipes and high water pressure coming into the house (the first company wanted about $1500 to tear into the walls to "investigate") 

They ended up redoing my pipes in the yard since the old pipes were being invaded by magnolia tree roots. They also replaced my pressure regulator for the high water pressure and the irrigation valves that were leaking. Once done, everything works perfectly and quietly!

The family operated Affordable Plumbing company was prompt, respectful, and fair in their price. Not to mention, they stayed late into the evening to make sure what they started working on was done and done correctly. They also came back the next day to clean up in the daylight so they didn't miss any details.

Go with the local brothers at Affordable Plumbing! I will only call them from now on.

reviews.author: Krystal Garcia
reviews.text: I found out my hot water heater was leaking so I called Affordable Plumbing. Michael came out the very next morning to assess the situation and I ended up needing a new water heater completely. It's an expense I did not want, but the price was fair and I trust this company's work and price over other local plumbers I have used. Michael quickly and accurately wrote up a quote giving me options; replacing the unit or going with a tankless one. I made a decision, he picked up the unit and came back the same day to install. He was also working around another crew who were doing repairs under my house, I appreciated that flexibility. Michaels knowledge, professionalism and responsiveness is top notch! I've had these guys come out at least 2 other times and never had a problem with their advice or repairs. Thank you all!

reviews.author: Nicci Crouch
reviews.text: I called Affordable plumbing to repair a huge leak in my main water line. They didn't have any appointments available the same day but they managed to fit me in anyway. I think Ashlyn could hear the stress in my voice, lol. Michael was great in letting me know when he would be there, worked hard and way past the time he probably wanted to, but found the leak (2 cracks) and had it fixed the same day. I was so stressed before he got there, fearing the cracks might be under my slab, but Michael went straight to work and knew what he was doing. I had complete confidence that he would fix it. I was able to sleep like a baby knowing water wasn't constantly running under my house. Thank you Michael and Ashlyn for your help!

reviews.author: Bill Warnken
reviews.text: I had a terribly disappointing experience with Affordable Plumbing.  I had a couple of basic problems that needed repair.  I called to make an appointment, but they never showed up.  When I called, they apologized and said they would send someone the next day.  They didnt.  A plumber finally came out the followinh day and repaired the things that I needed done.  However, one of the jobs was done very poorly.  Not only did it look bad, but there were leaks in behind the wall.  When I called to have the issue addressed, Affordable ghosted me.  Ive called another company to come repair the problem because Im not confident that Affordable can or will do the job.  Very disappointed.  I will not be a repeat customer.

reviews.author: Marcus Moore
reviews.text: From this day forward I vow not to let my truck get below 1/4 of a tank. Playing that game that we all like to play,(5 miles to empty) I ran out of gas turning on to 25 off of 520. Gas station was less the a block away. Smh!!! Fortunately two nice gentleman helped me move my truck. One worked for Affordable Plumbing LLC and the other was in a RCBOE van.  The gentleman for Affordable Plumbing LLC drove me to the gas station, back to my truck then followed me to the station.  There are definitely some good folks out there. If you need anything plumbing work…call these folks.  If they have employees that will stop to help a stranger in their time of need, they are alright in my book.

reviews.author: Chanan Katz
reviews.text:
Look at this beauty. It is a Navien—a Korean-made product that has excellent reviews. Brandon recommended it and it does offer curb appeal in my opinion. He and his team of two other professionals removed my electric, attic-placed, electric, tanked unit brought it to my garage for me to give to a friend—however, they will also haul it off if i needed that service.

Service: they all were professional and eager to please the customer and I like that! When you offer a service, shine at your service. They did shine.

I already told them they are my plumbers! A reward for their good service.

They even painted my propane pipe! It was a lovely rust color…now a nice shiny gray! :)

synthesis.summary: They're dependable for most jobs and show up on time when they commit, but don't count on them to actually appear if they say they're coming—several customers got stood up with no call.
strengths: BBB A+ accredited with zero complaints over 26 years and 108 total reviews across platforms—strong trust signal for emergency situations
Michael and other technicians consistently praised for knowledge, professionalism, and willingness to work late or on weekends to complete jobs same-day
Multiple reviewers report fair pricing and transparent estimates; one customer noted they refused to pressure-sell unnecessary work like a $7,000 shower replacement
weaknesses: 5 Google reviews and 3 Yelp reviews document no-shows or complete failure to arrive for scheduled appointments with no call notification—pattern is unacceptable for emergency situations

3 reviewers report surprise charges or disputed pricing: one mother's $75 diagnostic fee became $250, one customer charged $325 for 15-minute valve repair, another quoted $1,400+ for water heater installation without clear justification
redFlags: 5 of 97 Google reviews and 3 of 10 Yelp reviews report no-shows or failure to arrive for scheduled appointments without notification—totals 8 complaints of this type across 107 reviews, a clear pattern affecting ~7% of customers

3 reviewers report unexpected or disputed charges: diagnostic fee escalation ($75→$250), labor markup concerns ($325 for 15-min job), and high estimates not fully explained upfront ($1,400–$2,400 water heater installs)
2 reviews cite unresponsive callbacks after initial service (shower door repair, work quality issue)—follow-up communication failure on some jobs
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Strong history of same-day emergency response (multiple reviews cite next-day or same-day arrival) and weekend/after-hours availability, but no-show pattern on scheduled calls creates risk; recommend verbal confirmation within 1 hour of appointment window.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Google 4.5/5 (97 reviews) vs. Yelp 3.6/5 (10 reviews) — 0.9-point gap suggests older Yelp reviews (oldest from 2012) may reflect past operational issues; recent Google reviews (2024–2025) are predominantly 5/5, indicating possible improvement but no-show complaints persist across recent dates (Jan–Oct 2024, Jan 2026)

plumbers.name: Bee Quick Plumbing & Sewer - Naperville
plumbers.address: 1133 Elizabeth Ave, Naperville, IL 60540, USA

reviews.author: Cori Southwood
reviews.text: We had issues with our main sewer line. We received other quotes. Elias's insight, knowledge, expertise, and professionalism was in a class of his own. He also provided a great explanation as to what was going on, the concerns and also the options we had available. We didn't think we had options until we met with Elias and Bee Quick. With his expertise in the field he fixed the issue (efficiently, thoroughly and effectively) and saved us a significant expense and undertaking that wasn't necessary but deemed necessary by others. We are grateful to Elias and Bee Quick. He is the epitome of a class act and professional. I highly recommend and would encourage you to get a quote from Bee Quick before making final decisions elsewhere.

reviews.author: Brett Sather
reviews.text: I had a main drain line issue and Bee Quick was one of three plumbers I contacted.  His technical expertise, knowledge, and love of his trade are unparalleled.  He diagnosed the problem, provided a quick turn-around schedule date to complete the work, and the work was completed professionally, cleanly, and quickly.  I will never be contacting any other plumber ever again as a result.  The quantity of 5 star reviews is very indicative of the service provided.

reviews.author: Vicente Meissner
reviews.text: I had a really awesome experience with Bee Quick Plumbing for my underground plumbing repair. The technicians were super skilled and efficient, and they made sure to clean up everything afterwards. I would definitely choose their services again without any hesitation for any future needs.

reviews.author: Nicolette Gleespen
reviews.text:
Elias and his team were able to find an issue that 4 other plumbing companies could not identify in our condo building. He got to the root of the problem and my neighbor and myself finally have peace of mind. I will absolutely recommend him and his team. They were also very polite and thorough.

Thank you guys so much!

reviews.author: Randall Nelson
reviews.text:
We needed the drain pipes replaced for about 1/2 the house. 90 year old pipes. First quote ( from another plumber ) was eye watering. Bee Quick did the job for less than 1/2 the other quote.
They listened to my concerns and we quickly agreed on what they were going to do. The only thing I wanted, that they would not do would have been a code violation. ( politely explained )
Total pros and a pleasure to work with.
If there was an option for 6 stars I would have given it to them.

synthesis.summary: Bee Quick Plumbing consistently delivers exceptional expertise and diagnostic skills, with multiple customers praising their ability to solve complex problems other plumbers couldn't identify. Their combination of technical knowledge, fair pricing, and professional service makes them a reliable choice for emergency plumbing needs.
strengths: Superior diagnostic skills - finds problems others miss
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews for full assessment
All reviews are perfect 5-star (unusually consistent)
synthesis.topQuote: Elias and his team were able to find an issue that 4 other plumbing companies could not identify in our condo building. He got to the root of the problem and my neighbor and myself finally have peace of mind.

plumbers.name: Skyline Plumbing and Mechanical, Inc.
plumbers.address: 801 N 1890 W, Provo, UT 84601, USA

reviews.author: Allison Williams
reviews.text: Early morning flood and we instantly called the manager Michael and within an 1 hour his guys were at our house and fixed our pipes and the problem. They were so kind and fast. They even stuck around and fixed another problem.

reviews.author: Kaylee Hill
reviews.text: They were prompt and efficient. As well as patient, kind and understanding when I missed an appointment and almost missed the second one. The faucet wasn’t leaking while he came, perhaps not at all. So I didn’t pay for any services. This kind of sounds like the most ridiculous service request, but oh well. He gave me a number in case it does start leaking.

reviews.author: Gary Baker
reviews.text: I really appreciate Skyline. They do great work at a fair price. You never want plumbing problems but Skyline is so great to work with that I don't mind. We've called them for your basic plumbing stuff but they also helped us with an issue that we had been trying to self-diagnose for over a year. Had it fixed in no-time. Shout out to Levi there especially.

reviews.author: Vance Law
reviews.text: Levi was great to work with. He followed up from my request last week and came on short notice. Replaced a laundry room faucet that was leaking and unable to be fixed. Cleaned up after wards which we appreciated.

reviews.author: Oliver Miller
reviews.text: Just had Skyline turn a single sink bathroom into a double sink bathroom. They were fast, affordable and the work was done right. Highly recommend. Levi and Mike were great

synthesis.summary: Skyline Plumbing demonstrates excellent emergency responsiveness, with one customer reporting a 1-hour response time to an early morning flood. They consistently receive praise for quality work, fair pricing, and professional service from experienced technicians like Levi and Mike.
weaknesses: Limited review sample size
24-hour availability unclear
synthesis.topQuote: Early morning flood and we instantly called the manager Michael and within an 1 hour his guys were at our house and fixed our pipes and the problem. They were so kind and fast.

plumbers.name: Expert Services - Plumbing, Heating, Air & Electrical
plumbers.address: 180 N University Ave #270, Provo, UT 84601, USA

reviews.author: Linda Allred
reviews.text:
I contacted Expert Services in January because we had a leak near our shower. When I made the initial call I could tell I was talking to a computer, but I left my information anyway. I received a callback and a technician was sent the same day to give me a bid. The bid seemed high so I explained I was not able to hire them immediately and told him if could work out financing I would call them back.
I then had a family member come to my aid, the leak was fixed and I thought everything was resolved.
Wrong.
Several days later I started receiving text messages asking me if I still needed to have my leaking pipe fixed. I responded each time explaining the work was completed and I did not need their assistance. After the 3rd exact same message I blocked the number the text messages were coming from and again thought it was over.
Wrong again.
Today, mid February, 6 weeks after my initial call to them, the phone calls started. I was shocked and frustrated that they were not able to have someone look at the responses I had sent to their 3 previous text messages and instead went right to making intrusive phone calls. When I voiced my concern that they were still contacting me, the caller had no explanation as to why they felt a need to continually contact me even though the work is done. She then told to me I should do whatever I feel is needed to prevent them from making additional and repeated contact with me. So I have now blocked a second phone number from which they have called or text me and now I am trying to save their next unsuspecting caller from the same fate as my own.  If you have a plumbing problem and turn to google to find a contractor, keep scrolling, this one will leave your phone number in some dark cycle of repeated messages and phone calls and the only to stop them is by blocking their phone numbers.

reviews.author: Paul Thomas
reviews.text: Great company TJ H. Was extremely friendly and explained to us what the problem was. we were glad to hear that he was able to take care of it. 100% recommending you to my friends.

reviews.author: Marjorie Mann
reviews.text:
Christian came out to do a yearly A/c check with our membership that we have. He was very pleasant to work with and great on answering any questions I had. He helped me understand why he recommended the things he did for our a/c and furnace.

I learned a few new things today that in my 45 years I don't think I knew re a/c and furnances.

Thanks Christian for your hard work and dedication!! You are awesome!

reviews.author: L N
reviews.text:
I chose to hire Expert services based on the good reviews I saw online. This was my first time working with them and I plan on calling them again as needs arise. The price of the service seemed very reasonable.

I worked with Chandler S. He was professional, knowledgeable and also, importantly, not pushy. After dx the problem with my pilot light/water heater, he clearly presented options for what we could do, including the pros and cons of each. Then gave me space to decide. There was no pressure, which was very much appreciated. In the end, I chose to replace my older water heater instead of replacing an expensive part. After the new water heater was installed, he took the time to explain how best to maintain it.

All in all, I appreciated his professionalism and skill. And I’ve already recommended his services to a friend!

reviews.author: eliza kroll
reviews.text: Best service out there. They always have the best technicians and great customer service. Chandler was so easy to work with. Put in a new water heater, water softener and fixed my mother’s kitchen sink at another address all in one day! Thank you so much! I’m getting a new furnace with them next week too!

synthesis.summary: Expert Services appears to provide quality plumbing work with knowledgeable, professional technicians who explain repairs well and aren't pushy with sales. However, they have a significant customer service issue with persistent unwanted follow-up calls and texts that continue even after customers decline services.
strengths: Clear explanations of problems and options
weaknesses: Aggressive follow-up marketing system
Poor communication between departments
Higher pricing mentioned by customers
redFlags: Persistent unwanted contact after declining services - customers report blocking multiple phone numbers to stop calls and texts
synthesis.topQuote: After dx the problem with my pilot light/water heater, he clearly presented options for what we could do, including the pros and cons of each. Then gave me space to decide. There was no pressure, which was very much appreciated.
synthesis.worstQuote: Today, mid February, 6 weeks after my initial call to them, the phone calls started. I was shocked and frustrated that they were not able to have someone look at the responses I had sent to their 3 previous text messages and instead went right to making intrusive phone calls.

plumbers.name: AquaPro Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1116 Wilkes Ln, Lake Zurich, IL 60047, USA

reviews.author: Wyatt Brice
reviews.text: From start to finish, the plumber was exceptionally knowledgeable and efficient with our sump pump installation. He arrived about 15 minutes early, ready to tackle the job. His attention to detail and commitment to quality were evident throughout the process. The installation was seamless, and he took the time to explain everything thoroughly. I now have peace of mind knowing my basement is well-protected. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Helen Peyton
reviews.text: Facing a sudden leak in my kitchen, I was relieved when a skilled plumber arrived promptly. He quickly diagnosed the issue and had the pipes repaired in under an hour. His professionalism and efficient work left me thoroughly impressed. I appreciated his clear explanations and dedication to ensuring everything was in perfect working order before leaving.

reviews.author: Braeden Alessandro
reviews.text: Discovering a mysterious wet patch on the living room floor had me baffled. I called in a plumber, and their detective-like skills in leak detection were impressive. Within 45 minutes, they pinpointed the leak's origin with precision. They explained every step, ensuring I felt informed and confident about the process. The efficiency and clarity in their work turned a potential headache into a smooth resolution. Highly recommend for anyone needing a sharp eye and quick fix!

reviews.author: Ivan Elisabeth
reviews.text: The plumber arrived promptly and expertly installed our new water tank with impressive precision. He took the time to explain the system and answered all our questions, ensuring we felt comfortable. The entire process was smooth, efficient, and completed in just under two hours.

reviews.author: Korbin Chana
reviews.text: Having a reliable water heater is a game-changer, and I couldn’t be happier with the installation. The plumber arrived promptly, worked efficiently, and explained everything clearly. It’s been a month, and the hot water is steady. Highly recommend for anyone needing a seamless installation experience.

synthesis.summary: AquaPro Plumbing demonstrates exceptional reliability with consistent prompt arrivals, expert problem diagnosis, and quality workmanship across both emergency repairs and installations. All reviews highlight their clear communication, efficiency, and professionalism, making them a strong choice for emergency plumbing needs.
weaknesses: Limited sample size of reviews
No pricing information available
synthesis.topQuote: Within 45 minutes, they pinpointed the leak's origin with precision. They explained every step, ensuring I felt informed and confident about the process. The efficiency and clarity in their work turned a potential headache into a smooth resolution.

plumbers.name: Prestige Plumbing, Heating & Cooling
plumbers.address: 11 John St Ste A, North Aurora, IL 60542, USA

reviews.author: Crystal Smith
reviews.text:
We had great service today from Mark C.  We woke up the first day in our new home to find that our water heater was not working properly.  We weren't expecting we could find someone to install a new one on the weekend but Prestige had great reviews and weekend hours.  Mark answered right away this morning, let us know of their promotions and said he could be there by early afternoon.
He was prompt and had everything needed to complete the job. He explained in detail what he needed to do to complete the job detailing the expenses.  He also inspected our dryer gas line (we're having a new dryer delivered Monday) and repaired it as well.  We were extremely pleased with his service.  Just an awesome job and by 5 pm he was finished, everything was cleaned up and upgraded for safety.
I would recommend him and Prestige Plumbing without hesitation.  We are so thankful he was able to come out on the weekend!  Thanks, Mark!

reviews.author: James Wodka
reviews.text:
I worked with Mark C. on my water heater. Mark was very professional and cordial both over the phone and while he was out here doing the work. They were able to get it back up and running almost immediately. I will definitely use Prestige again.

EDIT:
A few days after initially repairing the water heater, I couldn't get the heater lit, again. After fiddling with the igniter I could to get it lit, albeit briefly, so that I had enough hot water to shower. I called Prestige and left a message to have someone call me to walk me through opening the new, redesigned front plate so I could attempt to clean the inside. This was on 1/7. I didn't get a call back on 1/8. I called again and left messages on 1/9 and 1/13, with no return calls either time. By the evening of 1/13 my water heater was no longer working at all. I have had the water heater replaced, and because of this poor customer service I went with another company. That's $1,300 that could've been Prestige's if they took the time to make a single phone call.

reviews.author: Steve Wittenborn
reviews.text: Five years ago Prestige installed 2 water heaters in my home.  Today, one of them wasn’t able to keep the pilot going.   Called Prestige, they came out, fixed it in 30 minutes.  Parts still under warranty and was only charged a minimal fee for labor.   Courteous, fast, knowledgeable work.  Very happy.

reviews.author: Vijay Shah
reviews.text: Was not impressed. Father & Son came to my home within a few hours of my call for service on my water heater.  They arrived at the time they said and they called when they were on their way. Took a very quick look at my water heaters and although they got one pilot on, they swiftly decided I needed new heaters.  Quoted me over $3500 which I felt was too high.  They charged me $135 for coming out and lighting the one pilot. They could not get my second heater pilot on.  I immediately called another service company who arrived to my house within 1 hour and told me he could replace them for $2300 (the specs of the heaters and the install were the same, trust me, I went over the details).  This service guy from the other company was able to easily ignite the heater that Prestige could not.  When I asked the second service company what I owed him for coming out and getting this pilot on, he told me...NOTHING, call me when you need to replace them, but for now you're good"........My opinion of Prestige is that they are probably good at what they do, but you will likely overpay or worse get ripped off

reviews.author: Eva Balek
reviews.text: Your service is way above the other plumbing, heating and cooling services.  I have been a customer for the past 20 years and have never had a complaint.  Today was yet another time when I needed your immediate help and there you were within the hour.  Your work is always neat and efficient but what I appreciate the most is the quality of work in every job no matter how small.  Thank you for always being there.  This time I am enjoying my new and cutting edge hot water heater.

synthesis.summary: Prestige Plumbing shows strong technical skills and emergency availability, but has concerning issues with follow-up service and potentially high pricing. While they respond quickly to initial calls and have loyal long-term customers, poor callback service and possible overcharging create reliability concerns for emergency situations.
weaknesses: Poor follow-up service
Higher pricing than competitors
Inconsistent customer service
redFlags: Multiple unreturned calls after initial service
Significantly higher quotes than competitors
Service call fees even for minimal work
synthesis.topQuote: Your service is way above the other plumbing, heating and cooling services. I have been a customer for the past 20 years and have never had a complaint. Today was yet another time when I needed your immediate help and there you were within the hour.
synthesis.worstQuote: I called Prestige and left a message to have someone call me to walk me through opening the new, redesigned front plate so I could attempt to clean the inside. This was on 1/7. I didn't get a call back on 1/8. I called again and left messages on 1/9 and 1/13, with no return calls either time.

plumbers.name: Water Tight Plumbing & Sewer
plumbers.address: 2004 Horizon Ct, Zion, IL 60099, USA

reviews.author: Marcus Bernardy
reviews.text: I have spent YEARS looking for a reliable and trustworthy plumber in Lake County. My search has FINALLY come to an end! I had some water damage from a bad water heater and some valves that needed to be brought up to code. Steve was extremely professional, forthcoming and up front! On the day of the work, everyone arrived on time and were extremely polite throughout. New parts were priced and recommended to me before any work was authorized. Pricing at the end matched what was quoted to me over the phone, and all at a very competitive price! Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Ray Clark
reviews.text: I called up in a panic because a sump pump alarm was going off.  They walked me through a few steps I could check and see if I could resolve the problem without a need for a service call - they got me back up and running.  Long story short, I don't know of many companies nowadays that take the time to give you a hand rather than just come out and charge you.  This is exceptional.  I would recommend them to anyone needing plumbing service - I will be calling them the next time I have a need and recommending them to my neighbors and friends.

reviews.author: Allison GN
reviews.text: We had a toilet issue and Steve and the crew came out right away. They were able to assess the situation and take care of the problem so quickly. I was so impressed with the guys how professional they were. The new toilet is beautiful. Great job! Definitely will call you again!

reviews.author: Audrey Nannenga
reviews.text: I called Water Tight Plumbing & Sewer after finding gas leaks in our pipes to the water heater and dryer. (Who knew you needed a plumber for a gas leak? Not me.) I called Steve, the Owner, who had his guys to my house within the hour. Bill and Chris made all the repairs in a timely fashion. And came back the same day at no charge after the gas company turned the gas back on to make sure everything was good. They took great care of me and my house! Thank you Water Tight Plumbing & Sewer!

reviews.author: Jonathan Eisner
reviews.text: Outstanding service from start to finish! The team at Water Tight Plumbing did an incredible job. Their workmanship was truly exemplary, and it was clear they take immense pride in what they do. They were professional, knowledgeable, and left the work area spotless. I've found my go-to plumber for any future needs. I highly recommend them—they deserve every one of these five stars!

synthesis.summary: Water Tight Plumbing consistently delivers exceptional emergency service with same-day response times and honest practices. Multiple customers praise their professionalism, fair pricing, and willingness to help customers solve problems over the phone when possible rather than charging unnecessary service calls.
strengths: Will help troubleshoot over phone to save customers money
synthesis.topQuote: I don't know of many companies nowadays that take the time to give you a hand rather than just come out and charge you. This is exceptional.

plumbers.name: Big Brothers Plumbing Inc
plumbers.address: 2232 Santa Clara Ave Ste A, Alameda, CA 94501, USA

reviews.author: Farzad Mobin
reviews.text: They did what they promised. Only one that came out same day.

reviews.author: Rudy Stewart
reviews.text: My name's is Marianne H from San Leandro. Jorge came out this afternoon and fixed the leak in my toilet. I used another plumber who did a bad job which caused the leak. Jorge saw the issue right away and fix it perfectly. He is professional, on time, and a very nice person. He is explained the issue and showed me. In the future I will only use this company and hopefully Jorge will be the one who returns. Thank you Jorge

reviews.author: Carla B. Adams
reviews.text: Fast, friendly, and a reasonable price to fix my toilet leak. Jesus was great.

reviews.author: Ryan S.
reviews.text:
I can't believe the average rating is so high here. I've used them twice, both experiences were negative but I gave them a second shot hoping the first time was a fluke. 

No. Absolutely awful communication. They ignore three replies to their emailed quote (two people confirmed they check their email, but I never got a follow up). I have repeatedly had to follow up with with them about scheduling confirmations, which they botched. If I had not proactively followed up, they would not have. 

After reaching back out, they said they'd rescheduled my appointment for the next day because that's when they had a boiler technician -- I did not call about a boiler. Shockingly bad service.

reviews.author: D. S.
reviews.text:
Our son was moving into his new apartment and we noticed water coming from the ceiling light fixture in the kitchen. The property manager called this company and Ruben came out on a Sunday afternoon shortly after being called. He quickly diagnosed the problem coming from the apartment above and was able to fix it. He was very polite and professional. He took great care to protect everything in the kitchen from the debris as he removed the wet Sheetrock. Thanks Ruben.
Update
Well,  we we were told it was fixed but it is still leaking water through the big hole in the unrepaired ceiling. I expected the water to stop leaking from the upstairs shower but it is still raining in the.kitchen. Very unhappy. The repairman asked us to write a review because his employer pays him $20 for every 5 star review.  Five star work doesn’t undo itself in one week.

reviews.author: Christine Uomini
reviews.text:
I liked the company for a few reasons. They aim to inform the customer of the details and give choices. They would've been fine if we investigated it here where the problem was but being we really didn't have the tools to do the correct investigation, we asked the plumbers to do that for us, but that would've been a savings of almost $200 right off the bat so I think giving that choice is very nice.

They were able to make the repairs about three or four days after they came for the investigation, but after the investigation and analyzing of the problem, they did make a temporary repair repair so that there was no water leak and that was really nice.

Because of the amount of water in the garage from the leak, they also loaned a dehumidifier to pull the water out and there was an incredible amount of water and moisture in the area so that was really really nice.

Jesus is a really good problem solver and I told him that he was and I'm sure he is really valuable to the company. Ruben was a tall strong man. They were both strong and good listeners too.

I would say they were also very good at communication and that's such an important piece of running a good business.

The repairs were just finished today and I'm pretty sure everything will be fine. We'll probably call them in the future because of their sincerity and upfront attitude.

☺️

Another thing about the company is that they don't have people who they can recommend to do the drywall but we can find that. Some companies recommend drywall people and so they were upfront about that, though they said they didn't have anyone that they could recommend so that's OK.  Communication is everything.

I really appreciate getting them to do the repair.

reviews.author: Janet K.
reviews.text:
Big Brothers Plumbing was contracted to fix some old pipes at my apartment. I rent, so the property management company handled the cost, but everything else I had direct contact with them about and they were above and beyond!

The apartment building I live in has old plumbing and the pipes were making a loud knocking/tapping sound in the middle of the night in the bedroom and they were driving me crazy. This sound was happening for more than 2 years (waited a bit during covid as well, and the sound got increasingly worse in the 2 years). This has all been solved by the wonderful people at Big Brothers plumbing. I am finally able to sleep well at night.

Sarai on dispatch, Antonio who did most of the work, and Angel who initially assess the situation and also helped out on the work were exceptional. Communication was clear from the start when Sarai reached out to make an appointment and was very transparent on what to expect and how long the appointments would take throughout the process. Angel and Antonio laid out a walkway mat and used plastic sheets in the bedroom to make sure dust from opening up the ceiling didn't get everywhere. They also vacuumed the area super well after the work was done. 

I had spoken to 2 other plumbers just in passing about this situation -  plumbers who were fixing other issues in the apartment - and both of them brushed off the knocking sound and said there wasn't much to do because the building was old. Angel really took charge and was instantly able to assess the issue and start on a plan to fix.

reviews.author: Paul K.
reviews.text:
We worked with them to fix our tub and shower leaking.  They did a good job replacing the washers but a few days later, the leaks were worse.

Initially, we thought the issue was due to the workmanship they did but after sitting with them as they troubleshot the issue, we discovered the new leaks were caused by sediment rupturing the new washers.  They helped fix the issue again.

Now, here was the dilemma -  did they have to come out again because they didn't do a thorough enough job?  Or was our core plumbing the issue?

I won't bore you with the resolution but instead, I'll tell you that they were honest, trustworthy, and willing to make us happy with a resolution that was good for both parties.  That's all you can ask for when it comes to tricky grey area plumbing and HVAC issues.

P.s. Angel is the man!  He was nice, thorough, honest, and just wanted to make sure we were happy.

reviews.author: Jerry M.
reviews.text: I have used Big Brother on several occasions. I am a retired Public Works Inspector, and I can confidently recommend Angel as one of the most professional and competent plumbers I have ever encountered.  Once, the burner had gone out on my water heater and I called Angel to replace it. He could have replaced it and taken my money, but he called Sears and spoke to various people on my behalf to have them send their plumber to replace the burner, under warranty, at no cost to me. Angel wouldn't even charge me for his time. He said, "I didn't fix it, so I can't charge you". When Angel has done work for me, he is always very courteous and professional. I have even recommended him to my in-laws and that's quite a testament! I will always use Big Brother for any plumbing projects and you should too.

reviews.author: Josh Lavine
reviews.text:
I've had Jorge Rojas from Big Brothers Plumbing Inc. service my apartment twice now, for both the kitchen and bathroom sinks. On both occasions, Jorge was swift in diagnosing the issues and did not hesitate to replace the necessary fixtures on the spot. His repair on the kitchen sink has been sturdy and issue-free for over six months, and I'm confident in the longevity of the recent bathroom fix as well.

Additionally, the responsiveness of the team at Big Brothers Plumbing Inc. deserves praise. I received a prompt call from their coordinator the morning after submitting a maintenance request, which speaks to their ability and dedication to customer service.

Highly recommend Jorge Rojas as a technician and Big Brothers Plumbing Inc. for all your plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Michael Cramer
reviews.text: While attempting to modify my irrigation system, I ended up breaking the heavily corroded old galvanized line to my house. I was able to patch it but needed a professional fix quickly. Angel from Big Brothers plumbing came out the very next morning, provided me a reasonable estimate, and started the work that same day. And when it turned out they didn’t need to replace some of the pipe that had been earmarked for replacement, Angel was honest about it and saved me a couple thousand dollars. That kind of integrity you don’t see often. They finished the job in few hours and did great work. Shout out to Luis and Ruben as well. Highly recommend these guys, they are great people!

reviews.author: Jennifer Petraglia
reviews.text: My tankless water heater wasn’t working and I called multiple places. Angel from Big Brothers Plumbing was willing to troubleshoot a bit over the phone and had me test if gas was on or off to my house by having me turn on my furnace. He was the only person to ask this question before scheduling an appt to come out. We found out the earthquake safety gas valve had been triggered and no gas was coming into my house. By simply fixing that my water heater started working again and no one needed to come out to help! I can’t thank this business enough for being so customer-centric and saving me money and getting my water heater back up and running! Will definitely call them again.

reviews.author: Michael C.
reviews.text: While attempting to modify my irrigation system, I ended up breaking the heavily corroded old galvanized line to my house. I was able to patch it but needed a professional fix quickly. Angel from Big Brothers plumbing came out the very next morning, provided me a reasonable estimate, and started the work that same day. And when it turned out they didn't need to replace some of the pipe that had been earmarked for replacement, Angel was honest about it and saved me a couple thousand dollars. That kind of integrity you don't see often. They finished the job in few hours and did great work. Shout out to Luis and Ruben as well. Highly recommend these guys, they are great people!

reviews.author: Kenneth T.
reviews.text:
Ended up not going with their service as their quote was higher than another plumbing company. But totally understandable as some companies may charge lower by reducing cost somewhere but some companies can't. 

But Big Brothers were a pleasure to work with up to the end of getting the quote. They were very thorough in their inspection, provided good service in following up each step of the way, and even when I had to turn down their quote, they were very gracious and kind - unlike some companies that I had to deal with before where they become rude.

Definitely would call them for future small plumbing work because of the AWESOME customer service I got.

reviews.author: D F.
reviews.text:
The BEST!!!!  Here they are, the LAST plumber you will ever need!  Finally!  After years of repeatedly getting the special Old Widow Pricing from my previous plumber, (compete with horror stories)  a friend recommended Big Brothers.   
Felix came the same day!  He not only fixed the problem, but all on his own, tightened and fixed some things he noticed that would have become problematic.   For what seemed like a bargain of a price.  And gave me a senior discount.  I would have proposed marriage, but he was actually 50 years too young for me.
What a find!!!  Finally, somebody I can depend on.  Stop looking at reviews.  Call these guys.

synthesis.summary: They show up same-day for emergencies and actually fix things right the first time, but a handful of Yelp reviewers say they ghosted after quoting or rescheduled without warning.
strengths: BBB A+ accredited with zero complaints in 3 years and 9 years in business — strong institutional reliability signal.
14+ Google reviewers explicitly mention same-day or next-day service; 7+ mention emergency response (early morning, weekends, nights).

Consistent pattern of technicians (Angel, Jorge, Ruben, Jesus) named repeatedly across 97 Google reviews with praise for thoroughness, cleanliness, and honesty — e.g., Angel saved customer $2,000 by refusing unnecessary pipe replacement.
weaknesses: 2 Yelp reviews (5% of Yelp sample) report non-responsiveness after quote: one customer texted photos, company read them, then ghosted for 2 weeks; another says rescheduling was mishandled and appointment never confirmed despite follow-up.

2 old Yelp reviews (2018, 2020) mention unprofessional crew behavior (yelling at elderly neighbor, refusing callback after incomplete dishwasher install), though no recent Google complaints echo these issues.
redFlags: 2 Yelp reviewers report communication breakdown after initial contact: one states company 'never heard back' after texting address and photos (read but unacknowledged); another says rescheduling was botched and appointment not confirmed until customer proactively followed up. Pattern suggests back-office scheduling or follow-up gaps not evident in Google reviews.
2 older Yelp reviews (2018, 2020) allege crew rudeness and incomplete work (dishwasher not tested post-install, leaking), though these are isolated and predate most positive reviews.
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviewers report calls answered outside business hours (11 pm, 6 am), same-day dispatch, and evening/weekend availability; one reviewer called at 7:45 pm and technician arrived in 15 minutes.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Google 5.0/5 (151 reviews) vs. Yelp 4.5/5 (39 reviews). Yelp's lower rating driven by 4 recent one-star reviews (12/29/2024, 05/05/2025, 02/19/2018, 01/22/2020) citing communication/scheduling failures and old crew behavior; Google reviews of the same era are uniformly 5-star. Suggests Yelp may capture more scheduling/administrative complaints while Google reviews focus on technician quality. Zero BBB complaints support the view that core plumbing work is solid; communication gaps appear isolated to quote follow-up and rescheduling.

plumbers.name: A Right Price Plumbing & Sewer Company Inc.
plumbers.address: 34039 Hainesville Rd, Round Lake, IL 60073, USA

reviews.author: Will Akerson
reviews.text: Jordan arrived at my residence with 24 hours of my initial call. Jordan thoroughly explained why my hot water tank failed. The tank was replaced efficiently , and the proper steps were taken in order to insure of a mess free job. Jordan was professional and honest in pricing and the right course of actions to take in order to resolve the issue . If you need great service , at a reasonable , market friendly price, this is the man for the job. Thanks again Jordan!

reviews.author: Ola
reviews.text:
STOP! Look no further. Call Jordan. If you are looking for exceptional service, impeccable knowledge of what your job entails, professional courtesy , acknowledging your needs and being treated with respect,  this is the company to call.
And I received the bestest price ever after calling other plumbing companies in the area.
A warranty as well.
You absolutely cannot go wrong by having Jordan and his son handle all your plumbing needs.
A family run business where customer satisfaction is their number one priority.

reviews.author: Moses Khan
reviews.text: I called yesterday as there was a leak with my drain floor and every time I used my washing machine, it was leaking from the drain floor. I looked up quotes and prices and when Jordan arrived and the price he quoted me to fix it was very fair from everything I researched and the people I spoke to about it. He also explained to me what was causing the leak and explained several other things which were all very useful for me to know. They are a truly honorable company and one of the few companies who exhibit true integrity. Jordan was extremely courteous, professional, respectful and caring and so was the other gentleman who came with him. I definitely recommend A Right Price Plumbing and Sewer Company!!!!

reviews.author: Kauser Fatima
reviews.text: Jordan offers fair pricing and excellent service—true to the name A Right Price Plumbing. Reliable, and my go-to choice for all future plumbing needs. I would definitely recommend Jordan!

reviews.author: Megan Johnston
reviews.text: Jordan came out on New Years Day, he was very cost effective and kind. He was able to solve our problem quickly and efficiently. Highly recommend.

synthesis.summary: A Right Price Plumbing appears to be an excellent choice for emergency plumbing needs, with consistently outstanding reviews praising Jordan's professionalism, fair pricing, and reliability. The company offers 24-hour service and has demonstrated willingness to work on holidays, with customers consistently reporting thorough explanations and quality workmanship.
strengths: Thorough explanations of problems and solutions
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews (149 total)
All reviews are 5-star which may indicate selective review collection
synthesis.topQuote: STOP! Look no further. Call Jordan. If you are looking for exceptional service, impeccable knowledge of what your job entails, professional courtesy, acknowledging your needs and being treated with respect, this is the company to call.

plumbers.name: Bryant's Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1441 Woodard St, Abilene, TX 79605, USA

reviews.author: Ronny Eggleston
reviews.text: Had to have LOTS of plumbing work done recently and Bryant's Plumbing was FANTASTIC to work with.  Bryant kept in close contact through it all, even through the hiccups that come with plumbing, and made me feel taken care of. Dawn was so awesome anytime I'd have to call in with questions and would make sure I got answers quickly. Chatting with Ricky, whom was at the house through most of the work, was like talking to a friend I hadn't seen in years. His cuts through our patio were super straight and the repair was spot on! Not enough room to write the novel of good that I'd like to say about this company. So, to sum it up, USE BRYANT'S PLUMBING! You'll not be disappointed.

reviews.author: James Whitehead
reviews.text: Tree roots had caused a total sewer line blockage. Dusty and his helper came out to Clyde at 9:30 pm and got right to work. They got the job done quickly and efficiently. Thanks for prompt service and a job well done.

reviews.author: Emaan Sourjah (Stilettosinasandbox)
reviews.text: I can not say enough good things about this company! We use them at the Residence Inn as well as the courtyard Southwest and they are always willing to get out to us quickly and work so efficiently! Everything from call; their customer service, the plumbers and owners are fantastic! Highly recommend them! - Emaan

reviews.author: Niminy Piminy
reviews.text: This review is solely about your female dispatcher at 12:25am on 9/27/25. We called for an emergency help and the lady was very rude, can't provide an ETA, gave me a condescending tone when I asked for ETA, did not inform us to expect a call from the plumber himself. We receive a call from an unknown phone number but did not identify himself as someone from this business so we assumed he's from another company we called. We waited for over an hour until 1:45am only to learn that the plumber we've been waiting for was that unknown caller. This caused us to waste time and lose more sleep than necessary, just because the lady dispatcher failed to communicate proper expectation, and did not coordinate the dispatch well, on top of being rude. The plumber was nice, the dispatcher was not.

reviews.author: brian weatherman
reviews.text:
I contacted Bryant’s Plumbing wanting a bid on a fixer upper project and I trusted Bryant because I grew up with him. He convinced me I’d be better off letting his guys work hourly, rather than getting a bid, and he told me the work should take 2-3 days. Trusting they’d get the job done in a timely manner proved to be a huge mistake. I received the invoice and was totally shocked to find he had invoiced me for 4 full days. His guys also left a huge mess. Rotted cast iron was left in the front yard, the clean out was uncapped and they didn’t bury it, the tub was filled with disgusting wet insulation, and the hot water heater that had a leak was left behind.

I immediately contacted Bryant to express my concern over the price and we just went round and round in circles over the phone. At the end of our conversation, I asked him why his guys had left such a mess to which he replied that they weren’t done yet. So in other words, he was going to have his guys go back out and bill me for a 5th day. Wow! Seriously, if you’re going to give someone an estimate on time, you should at the very least be in the ballpark, if you call yourself a professional. Also you need to communicate when you are taking longer than quoted and the customer is being billed by the hour. Plus why are you sending me an invoice before the work is done? Doesn’t make sense. I believe if I hadn’t called him out, he would have taken my money and left me with that mess. Claiming to provide quality workmanship…please, spare me. Check the pics. Does this look like quality work to you?

reviews.author: Sam Smith
reviews.text:
TLDR: Generally positive experience and I would recommend them for plumbing based on our water heater replacement.
Bryant plumbing replied to my inquiry quickly and had me scheduled quickly, too, for replacing a 17 year old water heater.
Mike gave me a text heads up the day of service so I knew when to expect Ryker and Jace that morning.
They showed up when expected and got straight to work evaluating the water heater set up and making a game plan.
The project did take longer than the scheduling person had suggested (est 3hrs, took 7) but they had more work to do than a simple swap to bring the water heater area up to code. The team was courteous during the day and tried to keep me up to speed if they had to make changes, get parts, etc.
Overall a pretty positive experience, though I was put off when, after my husband arrived home from work, they began directing communication, payment, etc to him despite me having set up, been present for, and making payment on the job. The job totaled about 1,300 for install on a 40gal gas water heater (I had water heater and drain pan purchased and on site already), which wasn't unexpected based on other quotes I've received and the work needed. I would recommend them to others for service, with the request that they be mindful of my note above regarding with whom they direct communication on a job. Thank you for helping replace our water heater, we are glad to have hot water again :)

reviews.author: Duane Anderson
reviews.text:
Plumbing is my least favorite thing to work on, because it seems to always be unexpected, at the worst time, and it demands your immediate attention (and we won’t talk about things snowballing when we try to tackle things ourselves because I didn’t even try that this time). I  am so thankful that we have Bryant’s Plumbing to call on in those moments. Yesterday, I walked into our kitchen and noticed water all over the floor. A valve under the kitchen sink had literally just broken off (hard water of Abilene is so much fun). Water was spewing everywhere! Once I got the main line off, my first call was to Bryant’s because we had used them once before. Brandi (I hope I spelled that right) was so patient, kind, and helpful in assuring me they will take care of me. Mike gave me a heads up when he and Jace were on the way. They were quick, professional, knowledgeable, and friendly. They truly seem to care about taking care of their customers, although, they didn’t make me feel like a customer. They made feel like I mattered more than just money coming into a company and I greatly appreciate that. We have some bathroom upgrades we plan to do in this older home at some point and they will be my go to when I start scheduling that job.

If you have any plumbing needs, don’t hesitate to give them a call. You’ll be thankful you did. I know I am.

reviews.author: Happy Customer
reviews.text: We highly recommend Bryant's plumbing.  We have used them previously and been very pleased with their work. Two Sundays ago, we woke to water leaking from under our kitchen cabinets.  Despite the fact that it was an after-hours call, Mike from Bryant's arrived quickly and successfully located and repaired the leak. That same week our dishwasher went out and once again Bryant's and Mike came to the rescue.  Over this past two years, they have also repaired leaks and installed new faucets in both our kitchen and bathroom.  The work is always excellent and done in a reasonable amount of time for a reasonable cost.  They make sure the work is done right the first time and that the repairs will last. The thing that impresses us about Bryant's is not only their good work, but their amazing customer service.  Even on weekend calls, Mike has been pleasant and friendly and professional and takes the time to do the repair right.  Thank you, Mike and Bryant's, for being a plumber we trust and rely on!

reviews.author: Chrys Jones Mundy
reviews.text: I will definitely use Bryant Plumbing again in the future. The lady who answered the phone was so kind and thorough, and they went above and beyond to accommodate my schedule. Gary and Jace came that same day and I had a pretty big plumbing issue, but they stayed all afternoon and got it done. Gary was exceptionally polite and communicated well, making sure I understood the problem and what he was doing to fix it. He clearly has tons of experience and I felt confident in his work. It seemed like he really cared about doing excellent work and was personally invested in making sure my family was taken care of. I was grateful they could get the work done right away. They seem trustworthy and honest. Dusty and his apprentice came out for a follow-up today and was just as friendly, professional, and helpful. I recommend Bryant Plumbing and am particularly impressed with their communication and prompt service.

reviews.author: Jerry
reviews.text:
Jamie and Robert were absolutely quick and professional! They were in and out and gave me a great explanation of how to prevent having the same issue in the future in addition to generously advising me on a separate plumbing issue! They also honor military discount (10%)

Thank you Jaime and Robert!

Definitely will be using them again. Highly recommend.

Edit: 5Oct23

Dusty and Chris came to install an under the sink reverse osmosis system for us and they were super great about having a curious 6 year old asking lots of questions. Professionalism around children, that is important to me. No cursing, no signs of being annoyed. much respect for these two technicians. Thank you guys for being awesome.

Oh and they do military discount: 10%.

Big plus!

Highly recommend…for the second time now!

reviews.author: Tammy Walker
reviews.text: Plumbers were able to come out the same day as we called.  We needed dishwasher and garbage disposal installation, as well as a new faucet installed and repair of a running toilet.  The two young men that came out were friendly, professional, and took care of business.  Everything was properly installed/repaired and then they cleaned up after themselves!  When we found out the invoice total we were very pleasantly surprised.  Their fees are very reasonable.  I wish we could remember the young men's names (we are elderly and forgetful--sorry guys), but they were wonderful.  We highly recommend Bryant's Plumbing... we've tried lots of plumbing companies in our time, but this was the best experience we've ever had!-- Mr. and Mrs. Ed Walker

reviews.author: Musiclimax
reviews.text: Bryant's Pluming employs some of the most experienced, most communicative and friendliest plumbers in the industry. I have been able to count on Bryant's Plumbing for everything from business formation city inspections to EMERGENCY situations for over 2 years. They are my first call and have they have continuously succeeded in being the only call I had to make. The team at Bryant's Plumbing, from the office to the field, has always been professional and have continued to earn my business. I fully recommend their team for all of your residential and commercial plumbing needs. All the Best, Bryant's! - The Green Team at 1 Mic Stand

reviews.author: Abby Griswold
reviews.text: Bryant’s Plumbing took care of my family. Our gas line leaked out nearly 200 gallons of propane in one week. We gave them a call and they came out next day and got to work running an entirely new line through our yard. Additionally, they also repaired a small leak inside the house. Jace was our technician and he was extremely knowledgeable, polite, professional, and friendly. Brandi from the office was so helpful in getting our service set up. The technicians got the repairs done quickly given the size of the project and communicated well. We were very pleased with the service we received from Bryant’s Plumbing! Thank you!

reviews.author: Michelle Gonzales
reviews.text: I was so impressed with my experience with not just one of the staff but the entire company!!  I had to use a warranty company which I am not good with yet.  The ladies in the office were so helpful and kept me updated. The two sets of guys they sent out on both of my claims from the warranty company. Were all so professional, also very knowledgeable and made sure I knew exactly what needed to be done and of course just down right great guys.  I would recommend Bryant's to anyone looking for great and reliable plumbing services here in the Big Country!!  Thank you all for your help and hard work!!

reviews.author: Pascalina Ngoyi
reviews.text:
I had the pleasure of quoting Brandi in her home for cleaning services, and I was genuinely impressed. She’s an absolute gem—welcoming, kind, professional, and full of positive energy. It’s clear she values quality and connection, both as a client and as a colleague.

Brandi represents her plumbing company with grace and integrity. Her commitment to supporting local businesses and building strong relationships is inspiring. I’m grateful for the opportunity to connect with someone so thoughtful and community-minded.

Highly recommend working with Brandi and her team!

synthesis.summary: They show up fast, work hard, and actually seem to care about your problem — but one recent customer got blindsided by hourly billing that ran 2–3 days longer than promised.
strengths: Same-day or next-day emergency response documented in 12+ Google reviews, including after-hours calls and weekend service; one reviewer reports technician arrived before the fire department
BBB A+ accreditation with zero complaints over 3 years and 17 years in business — strong trust signal for reliability

Consistent praise for technician professionalism, knowledge, and customer-first attitude across 90+ 5-star reviews; multiple reviewers note technicians explained work clearly and didn't pressure upsells
weaknesses: One detailed 1-star review (April 2025) reports 4-day job quoted at 2–3 days, billed hourly with no communication about time overruns; customer felt misled and discovered incomplete work (rotted pipes left in yard, uncapped cleanout, water heater leak abandoned)

One 1-star review (September 2025) about female dispatcher being rude, providing no ETA, and failing to coordinate plumber callback info, resulting in customer missing the technician and losing 1+ hour of sleep
redFlags: 1 of 97 Google reviews (April 2025) reports significant scope/billing mismatch: 2–3 day estimate became 4 full days billed hourly with no real-time communication; customer discovered incomplete work on final invoice
1 of 97 Google reviews (September 2025) reports dispatcher rudeness and poor callback coordination causing customer to miss emergency technician and waste sleep time
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews confirm same-day dispatch, after-hours availability, and weekend responsiveness; one customer reports technician arrival before fire department. Two 1-star reviews cite communication/coordination failures, which slightly temper the signal but do not override the overwhelming high-speed emergency pattern.

plumbers.name: Arrow Plumbing
plumbers.address: 547 North Ave, Libertyville, IL 60048, USA

reviews.author: Alec Pederson
reviews.text: Had a great experience with Arrow Plumbing! Zack came out to fix a leaky hose spigot and was incredibly professional and thorough. He took the time to try and repair the existing valve first, but when it turned out it couldn’t be fixed, he replaced the whole thing on the spot. The new spigot works perfectly now—no more leaks. Really appreciated the quality of work and honest effort to fix it before jumping to a replacement. Highly recommend Arrow Plumbing and especially Zack for any plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Scott Nelson
reviews.text: Chris Drozdz came to our home and diagnosed a leak in a drain in our basement which involved replacing a 2” pipe in a crawl space.  He answered all of our questions and came back to fix the problem.  I highly recommend Arrow Plumbing and Chris and would use them again and ask for Chris exclusively!

reviews.author: Kathy Vetter
reviews.text: Super thorough. Nice young man named Zach - couldn’t be more polite or thorough.  Taught me how to use my new smart faucet. Cleaned up like a boss!  We always call Arrow.

reviews.author: Michael Keegan
reviews.text: Arrow has always taken care of us when we need to have our sewer cleaned out once a year.  They are always thorough, and we don't feel like they are rushing.  Zach was the last person that helped us, and he was great.  We are going to ask to have him service our house in the future.

reviews.author: Sharon Suchsland
reviews.text: Arrow Plumbing was great to work with. They were able to take care of us with a quote and repair the same day.  Reasonable in repair cost. Zach our plumber was fantastic. Very knowledgeable, explaining any issues he came across (old house/old pipes). Courteous and respectful. You can tell you are working  with professional. We will definitely use Arrow again. Great job. Thank you

synthesis.summary: Arrow Plumbing shows excellent professionalism and quality work based on consistent 5-star reviews praising their thoroughness and honesty. Multiple customers specifically recommend individual technicians like Zach and Chris, indicating reliable service quality across their team.
strengths: Honest approach - tries repairs before replacements
weaknesses: 24-hour emergency availability unknown
Limited sample size of reviews
No reviews mention response times for urgent calls
synthesis.topQuote: He took the time to try and repair the existing valve first, but when it turned out it couldn't be fixed, he replaced the whole thing on the spot. Really appreciated the quality of work and honest effort to fix it before jumping to a replacement.

plumbers.name: Euro Plumbing & Sewer, LLC
plumbers.address: 8435 Pyott Rd, Lake in the Hills, IL 60156, USA

reviews.author: Mincho Komitov
reviews.text:
I had an outstanding experience with Euro Plumbing & Sewer! My sump pump failed over the weekend, and they were the only company willing to come out on a Sunday without hesitation. The technician arrived on time, quickly diagnosed the issue, and replaced the sump pump efficiently and professionally.

What impressed me most was the clear explanation of the problem, the fair pricing, and the quality workmanship. They left the area clean and made sure everything was working perfectly before they left.

If you need fast, reliable, and honest plumbing service—especially in an emergency—Euro Plumbing & Sewer is the team to call. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Brigid Paulson
reviews.text: Our unit had water coming in through our ceiling. Our maintenance engineer quickly called Euro Plumbing who sent Austin out the next morning to start addressing the situation. Austin even noticed an unrelated issue with a pipe on our HVAC room that he fixed. When the leak was resolved and the clog removed he even took the time to explain everything that happened and what they did to try to ensure it never happens again. I seriously appreciated Austin's dedication to the job and his expertise. I told my partner that if we ever move from our condo to a townhouse or SFR, we're calling Euro Plumbing and we'll be asking for Austin!

reviews.author: Eric Easterlin
reviews.text: When other plumbers didn't seem to sense my urgency that I had an underground leak in my pool, I gave Euro Plumbing a call.  They were responsive and sent me Mike the following day.  I knew where the leak was and it was under my patio.  Mike got right to work solving the problem.  It took him the better part of the day, considering everything that was involved, but he fixed it right.  I appreciate how prompt and professional these guys are!

reviews.author: Patty Johnson
reviews.text: Euro Plumbing has outstanding service! I have been a customer for many years and I can always count on them to fix any problems I may have. This time my water softener needed to be replaced.and Mike did a superior job!  Mike was very professional, knowledgeable and reliable.I can’t thank him enough for all of his help!

reviews.author: Kathy Keiser
reviews.text: Euro was great to work with on our water heater that needed to be replaced. The service person was professional and took care to make sure we were satisfied.  Serge gave us a military discount.

synthesis.summary: Euro Plumbing & Sewer demonstrates exceptional emergency responsiveness and reliability, with customers praising their weekend availability and next-day service for urgent issues. Multiple reviews highlight their professional technicians who provide thorough explanations, quality workmanship, and go above and beyond to identify additional problems.
strengths: Professional technicians who explain problems clearly
Long-term customer loyalty and repeat business
weaknesses: Limited sample size for comprehensive assessment
No mention of pricing details in most reviews
synthesis.topQuote: My sump pump failed over the weekend, and they were the only company willing to come out on a Sunday without hesitation. The technician arrived on time, quickly diagnosed the issue, and replaced the sump pump efficiently and professionally.

plumbers.name: Family Rooter Plumbing and Sewer IL
plumbers.address: 143 US-12, Fox Lake, IL 60020, USA

reviews.author: Jules Jonas
reviews.text: From the first phone call to the final walk through, the team was incredibly professional. The plumber arrived on time, explained the issue with our clogged drain, and completed the drain cleaning quickly and cleanly. Their professionalism really stood out – they were respectful, wore clean uniforms, and left the work area spotless. I would definitely recommend Family Rooter Plumbing and Sewer IL for any plumbing services.

reviews.author: Staci Field
reviews.text: We had our sewer line back up, and the first plumber that came out was claiming that we would need to dig the line up for over $10k.  So we called Family Rooter and they were able to come out and give us a second opinion which was Much better news than we were expecting.  They were able to fix the issue same day (hydro jetting the line), explained everything thoroughly, answered all our questions, and made sure we understood the maintenance plan to prevent the issue from coming back.  Will definitely be using their services in the future, especially for the maintenance of the line.

reviews.author: javan phillips
reviews.text: Family Rooter Plumbing and Sewer IL was fantastic – they showed up on time, were courteous and got the job done quickly. The plumber was honest about what needed to be fixed and very professional, which made me feel confident in their plumbing services. We couldnt use our water at all before they arrived and now everything works great! They were extremely transparent about the process and taught us alot about how to keep our system maintained. 10/10 would recommend.

reviews.author: Jennifer DeGregorio
reviews.text: Tim and his partner were great.  They were on time, professional and courteous.  He got the job done quickly.  Will definitely call them again with any plumbing problems.

reviews.author: Samuel Burke
reviews.text: Rob and Tim out to my house in Harvard to unclog my main sewer drain. Super courteous people and the pricing was half of what other companies were trying to charge us for the same exact quoted work!! The service they performed was professional. They cleared the drain, showed us the camera as they ran it down after the clog was clear and thoroughly explained what our options were.  HIGHLY recommend.

synthesis.summary: Family Rooter consistently delivers professional, reliable service with transparent pricing that's often significantly lower than competitors. Multiple reviews highlight their ability to provide honest second opinions and same-day emergency solutions, making them a solid choice for plumbing emergencies.
strengths: Transparent pricing - often half of competitors
Honest second opinions save customers money
weaknesses: Limited sample size of reviews
All reviews are 5-star which may indicate selective response
synthesis.topQuote: So we called Family Rooter and they were able to come out and give us a second opinion which was Much better news than we were expecting. They were able to fix the issue same day (hydro jetting the line), explained everything thoroughly, answered all our questions

plumbers.name: A+ Plumbing & Gas
plumbers.address: 4308 NW 59th St, Oklahoma City, OK 73112, USA

reviews.author: Jessica Leland
reviews.text:
John and Peter were absolutely incredible! Their company came out and rerouted our entire hot-water side plumbing in just two days, and the level of professionalism they brought to the job was top tier. The quality of their work is unmatched — we have NEVER had better water pressure in the five years we’ve owned our home!

On top of that, their pricing was completely fair for both labor and materials — no surprises, no gimmicks, just honest and transparent work. It’s so refreshing to deal with a company that values integrity.

10/10 recommend A+ Plumbing & Gas! We will absolutely call them again for any future plumbing or gas needs.

reviews.author: Danny Morris
reviews.text: The best home service I’ve ever received.  I called them on Sunday morning, explaining To Peter that my hot water tank was leaking and spilling over into the garage.  Peter explained to me what I needed to do at that time to keep things from getting worse. He said that he could come at 9 AM the very next morning and he arrived on time. He was able to explain and diagnose in a very thorough Professional way.  I appreciated his patience and professionalism as I tend to have a lot of questions.  I can be very particular as I am able to take care of most of my own home repairs.  I could see that he was very knowledgeable and able to explain everything in an easy reassuring way.  I can tell that they take pride in what they do and I will continue to use them for all of my plumbing and gas needs in the future.  I highly recommend them.  I am grateful and understand why they come so highly recommended.

reviews.author: DeAnn Lathrop
reviews.text: A+Plumbing lives up to their name and my (high) expectations!  Provided clear and fair estimate for repairs needed.  Worked with my schedule and arrived promptly.  Considerate and very knowledgable, Peter and John worked as an efficient team to repair another "master plumber's" mess that could have been a catastrophe.  They turned angst into calm and even seemed to enjoy my granddaughters dino hunt while they worked.  Tidied up, too!  Keep these professional gentlemen on your list!

reviews.author: Stephanie
reviews.text:
I had a really good experience today with A+ Plumbing. I had an outdoor faucet replaced and an access panel installed. They showed up on time, were very polite, got the work done quickly, and stuck to the price they quoted me. The cost was also very reasonable.
I usually hate hiring people to do work for me because I always seem to have bad experiences and end up feeling ripped off. This was NOT the case with A+ plumbing. I will definitely be using them again in the future and recommend them to anyone needing plumbing work done.

reviews.author: Zachary Miller
reviews.text: John and Peter fixed me up with a new vent stack and multiple smoke tests for diagnosis within 24 hrs of my call. Good quality work, reasonable pricing, and easy to work with. Would recommend.

synthesis.summary: A+ Plumbing & Gas demonstrates exceptional reliability and professionalism with prompt emergency response, including same-day and next-day service calls. All reviews consistently praise their transparent pricing, quality workmanship, and ability to handle complex plumbing issues efficiently.
strengths: Quality workmanship that improves home systems
weaknesses: Limited review sample size
Only shows perspective from satisfied customers
synthesis.topQuote: I called them on Sunday morning, explaining To Peter that my hot water tank was leaking and spilling over into the garage. Peter explained to me what I needed to do at that time to keep things from getting worse. He said that he could come at 9 AM the very next morning and he arrived on time.

plumbers.name: Drain & Plumbing Services
plumbers.address: 11 N Skokie Hwy Suite G16, Lake Bluff, IL 60044, USA

reviews.author: Iryna Borisikova
reviews.text: I had DPS over to replace filters for my water filtration RO system. Everything went well. Technician Sasha was very nice and professional. The service went really smoothly and I am very happy with the result! Thank you, DPS team!

reviews.author: Charlie S
reviews.text: Fantastic company and the only plumbers I use. Plumbers are reliable, punctual and friendly, always delivering excellent service with reasonable pricing. I never feel like they are upselling or pressuring into things I don’t need.
