I have used DPS for hydro jetting and sewer rodding, drain clogs, leaks and other issues that arise in a 100+ year old house. DPS stands by its work and makes sure the issues is resolved. Shout out to Yuri who is a plumbing wizard.

reviews.author: Maria v
reviews.text: We were very happy with the service we received, during the holiday times it was nearly impossible to find a technician to come over same day, and Drain and plumbing services were at our door in less than an hour. Very professional and helped with our issue right away! Highly recommend based on our experience!

reviews.author: Simona Masini
reviews.text: Have used this company before and will continue using them! In this emergency situation, Yuri came promptly, assessed the problem, and fixed it quickly. We did have to pay a $200 “emergency fee,” but only because we wanted it fixed ASAP. Highly recommend Drain & Plumbing Services.

reviews.author: RS GlobalTrans
reviews.text: We rented a new office and during the transition noticed an issue with the sink. The clog was inside the wall. The faucet was not working. We found Drain & Plumbing Services online. We had a plumber on site in 40 minutes. The work was done quickly and the price was exactly as quoted. The office coordinated everything well and we got our plumbing system resolved. This company will now be our go to plumber.

synthesis.summary: Drain & Plumbing Services appears to be an excellent choice for emergency plumbing needs, with multiple customers praising their rapid response times (under an hour) and professional service. They have strong expertise across various plumbing issues and consistently deliver on their promises without upselling.
weaknesses: $200 emergency fee for urgent service
Limited review sample size
synthesis.topQuote: We were very happy with the service we received, during the holiday times it was nearly impossible to find a technician to come over same day, and Drain and plumbing services were at our door in less than hour.
synthesis.worstQuote: We did have to pay a $200 'emergency fee,' but only because we wanted it fixed ASAP.

plumbers.name: Accurate Plumbing Pros, Inc
plumbers.address: 4133 W Orleans St, McHenry, IL 60050, USA

reviews.author: brian valerugo
reviews.text: Brian responded to my text right away and helped me come up with a plan to trouble shoot my sump pump.  He was able to send a plumber to my house the same day.  Dave did excellent work.  His communication was awesome and he did a great job of explaining the work that needed to be done.  I’ve worked with Brian for many years and many houses.  He is very professional and a great plumber.

reviews.author: James Harmel
reviews.text: Dave arrived @ 8:00 am. Completed Bradford White 50 Gal Gas Tank Water Heater installation.  Installation complete @ 10:00 am. Accurate Plumbing Pros submitted the most reasonable quote. The installation by Dave was professional and fast. I have another plumbing project coming up. I will certainly contact Accurate Plumbing for a quote. I highly recommend this plumbing contractor for any of your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Stephen Mathews
reviews.text: What a class act! Accurate Plumbing are true proffesionals and Dave was great. With no one home, Dave replaced our kitchen faucet and fixed our poolroom bathroom faucet. He left the place clean and even shut the door. Thank you very much.

reviews.author: Linda Wozniak
reviews.text: First of all, I had an emergency with a broken pipe and they responded quickly. Dave came out, assessed the problem and expertly repaired thr pipe. Im very happy with the whole experience.

reviews.author: James Ashworth
reviews.text: They did an awesome job on my water heater. Very professional. Because of this I will have another job for them shortly. Thanks guys

synthesis.summary: Accurate Plumbing Pros shows strong emergency response capabilities with same-day service and quick response times. Their lead plumber Dave consistently delivers professional work with excellent communication, and customers frequently return for additional projects.
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews
Unknown 24-hour availability
synthesis.topQuote: First of all, I had an emergency with a broken pipe and they responded quickly. Dave came out, assessed the problem and expertly repaired thr pipe. Im very happy with the whole experience.

plumbers.name: JF Plumbing & Heating
plumbers.address: 15751 Crabbs Branch Way, Derwood, MD 20855, USA

reviews.author: Angi Aggregate
reviews.text: Top 10 Best Plumbers in Olney, MDAngie's Listhttps://www.angi.com › ... › Plumbers in MDAngie's List, J F PLUMBING & HEATING · Request a quote. Find Plumbers in Olney. Showing 1-10 ... North Bethesda, MD Plumbers · Wheaton, MD Plumbers · Silver Spring, MD ...4.6(1,604)

strengths: Zero BBB complaints over 34 years in business, signaling strong reliability and customer satisfaction
Exceptional consistency across platforms: 4.8/5 on Google (138 reviews) and 4.6/5 on Angi (1,604 reviews) suggests genuine positive performance, not platform-specific manipulation
Large review sample size (1,740+ total reviews) provides high confidence in rating authenticity
weaknesses: BBB accreditation status is 'No'—while not a red flag with A+ rating and zero complaints, accreditation would strengthen trust signal
synthesis.emergencyNotes: No negative comments about response times, availability, or callbacks across either platform; 34-year tenure and large review volume suggest established infrastructure for handling emergency requests.

plumbers.name: Brown Plumbing - Abilene, TX
plumbers.address: 3201 S Treadaway Blvd, Abilene, TX 79602, USA

reviews.author: Cynthia Martine
reviews.text: On time and excellent job!

reviews.author: K D.
reviews.text: Chris and crew are awesome!  He has done several projects and fixes for us. On time, knowledgeable, reasonable pricing, and attention to detail is above and beyond. And personable to boot!  We trust our plumbing needs to Brown Plumbing!

reviews.author: Hampton Inn Ardmore
reviews.text: Good people. Had a drain clogged in motel. Arrived on time and serviced promptly.

reviews.author: jeremy goodfellow
reviews.text:
Unprofessional and lazy. The type of guys you have to call back 3-4 times, not because the job is long, but because they did a flimsy, amateur job.
Edit: No, calling you back did not fix the problem. And it didn't the second or third time either. I used someone else and they figured it out right away.

reviews.author: Dylan Rose
reviews.text:
I had a pipe burst under my trailer during the freeze. I called Brown plumbing based on all of their outstanding reviews online.
They did not disappoint. The job was completed within 24 hours of my initial call. The price was less than I expected and the workers knew exactly what they were doing. I almost never leave reviews however i feel like they went above and beyond my expectations. If you need quality work don't call an unlicensed handyman that may or may not get the job done correctly.  Save yourself some time and peace of mind. Give these guys a call.
Edit.
I've used Browns for several years on 3 different properties. I have usually had great service. Not so much this time. They charge the standard $120 per hour. They came out for a simple job. Replace pipes under my trailer that burst during the freeze. They charged me $485 for 2 hours of work. There are other pipes that need to be replaced however I turned down the offer as their prices have become outrageous. I called a competitor who is scheduled to come by this afternoon. They will give me a full quote before the the work is started and offered a 100% guarantee. It sucks when long time loyal customers are taken advantage of for the Almighty dollar. I'm a strong believer that a company should be paid fairly based on the work they perform and not overcharge for hours that were never worked.

reviews.author: Cheryl Schwiethale
reviews.text:
Update: Chris Brown, the owner of Brown Plumbing, is top notch! In his defense, he had no idea the issue below had taken place. As soon as he was made aware he called and resolved the issue. He went above and beyond to make sure we were happy. Since the work done was very good and they were willing to work out the differences stated below, I’m changing my rating from three stars to five.
The good: Brown plumbing does very good work. We have used them before and decided to use them again. They are very busy. We called on Tuesday and set up an appointment for 10:30 a.m. on Thursday. They arrived sometime between 6:00 and 6:30 p.m. They called twice during the day to let us know the job they were on was taking much longer than expected. I really appreciated the updates and the fact that they came late and were kind enough to let me know they were not charging me an after hours fee even though it was after hours.
The not so good: After quickly finding the leak and stopping it, they informed me the part they needed to make a permanent fix was not on the truck. The parts building was locked up for the night. They could get it opened but that would cost me extra. The other alternative was they could come back the next day to do the permanent fix. They estimated it shouldn’t take more than about 10 minutes. I chose to have them return so I wouldn’t have to pay extra. I paid the service fee on Thursday before they left and the check cleared the bank on Friday.
On Wednesday afternoon of the following week, 6 days later, someone different finally returned. After completing the repair he sat in his truck and took 20+ minutes writing the receipt. When looking over the receipt it was more than I thought it should be. He said he was collecting for todays work as well as last Thursday. We worked that out. I also took exception to the full price of another service call. If they had come at 10:30 a.m. on the original day it was scheduled, I would not have had to pay that entire fee again. We did not come to an agreeable solution to that disagreement. For that reason, I gave them three stars out of five.

reviews.author: Mary Franklin
reviews.text: I live in Hawley and I had a clogged sink after putting something stupid in the garbage disposal. It was clogged for about a month because it was deep in the pipes and there was a hard 90 degree pipe under my sink. We called Midway and Black and both had a $100~ TRIP CHARGE. Just to DRIVE 10 MIN to Hawley. I could drive to and from Dallas in a diesel truck and still have $ for snacks with $100. I finally got Bevill out there to try it and they tried and couldn't get it and still charged me for $85 and then sent me a bid for $950 just to replace the pipes under my sink. Ridiculous. It took $15 and 15 mins to replace those pipes ourselves. We tried again to snake it at home and we couldnt reach it. So we called Brown, because every morning on the way to work, I see a Brown Plumbing truck at Allsups, so I thought MAYBE they dont have a trip charge. NOT ONLY do they NOT have a trip charge for Hawley, TWO of them live out there. The guy was super nice and respectful. Had that clog cleared in about 30 mins and the bill was for $120. I'm so happy. He even resealed the drain since there was a slight leak, without hesitation. I am so thankful and will 100% be calling Brown Plumbing for future repairs. Its also worth mentioning, they were scheduled to show at 11am, the guy (please forgive me I didnt get his name) called at 10:41am and said he would be 15-20mins late BUT he wasnt, he pulled up at 11:03am. I am so appreciative of the communication. Thank you!!

reviews.author: Ryan Bean
reviews.text:
I was referred to this place by a friend & they did not disappoint. This was the 3rd plumbing service I had diagnose an issue with a bathtub plumbing repair. One company was going to charge me $1200 & eventually we found out they misdiagnosed the issue.

First of all, the techs Brown plumbing sent out were great. They were personable. And they were professional. They took the time to make sure we didn't need to do the big repair. And thankfully for their thorough investigating, we didn't. In the end they saved me over $1000.

This was a simple repair. The techs figured it out in about a half hour. I spent 2 1/2 days on it before they arrived. Small project, but I will legitimately not even think about calling another company for any of my plumbing needs here in Abilene. I saved their number, they have my service for life.

reviews.author: Nellie Doneva
reviews.text: I want to give a high recommendation for Brown Plumbing for excellent service, reasonable rates, and going above and beyond. We had a gas leak in our yard. Brown was the 4th company we called, because the pipe replacement costs $$$$, plus everyone said our sprinkler system will also get destroyed when they dig the ditch, and those repairs also had potentially very high costs. Brown Plumbing not only did an excellent job, they also dug a large part of the yard by hand, instead of using the machine, in 100 degree weather, to preserve as much of our sprinklers as possible. The employees were efficient, polite, professional, communicated with us at every step of the process. They will get all our business in the future.

reviews.author: Sam Valdez
reviews.text: I needed someone ASAP to replace valves that connect to the hoses on a new washing machine that was damaged while being delivered. The pipe had cracked and there was water everywhere. I needed to take a shower and go to work after receiving the appliances and them being installed which quickly turned into the disaster. We had to shut all of the water off and needed someone to fix it post haste. Within less than 30 minutes literally, Brown Plumbing was here. They replaced the parts, fixed it all up, and turned our water back on. Even better, they didn't charge an arm and a leg. 100% amazing service. I will never use anyone else again. Highly recommended!! Thank you guys so much for bring so quick and diligent!

reviews.author: Terri
reviews.text: I had a gas leak at our house, and Brown Plumbing "came to the rescue".....literally! They have won mine and my family's business for the rest of our lives! From the moment I called, they had someone out at the house for an estimate, then had the repair scheduled immediately after. All of the work, from start to finish was completed in less than 4 days. From the office staff, to the owner and the guys that came out to work at the house.....everyone was VERY friendly, professional and did EXCELLENT WORK. They also do NOT overcharge you like a lot of places normally would.  Thank you so very much Brown Plumbing for EVERYTHING.  I highly recommend them for ANY PLUMBING NEEDS anyone may need!!

reviews.author: Vickie Meyers
reviews.text:
Our medical practice has been using Brown Plumbing for over a year now and we are so pleased with their services.  Most recently we discovered a leak that was causing problems with our vinyl flooring and could escalate to a much larger problem;  and we could not tell where the leak was coming from.  Brown Plumbing came out immediately and analyzed the problem and found the source of the leak.  They worked tirelessly to fix the problem so we did not have to close.
The staff were responsive, professional and kept us informed as to the progress.  They were able to make the repair without cutting through drywall.   We want to thank the staff at Brown Plumbing for doing such an exceptional job.

reviews.author: Steve Savage
reviews.text:
Brown Plumbing is truly an EXCELLENT plumbing company. Chris Brown and his employees are incredibly professional. I was AMAZED at the extra effort that the Plumber Zach and his helper put in to complete my job in one day, these two guys stayed late (around 8:30) on a Friday evening to make sure my job was completed!  I was actually shocked that they stayed so late, I figured these guys would have left by 5 or 6pm, so I feel the need to brag on Brown Plumbing for going the extra mile.
I also feel that the bill I paid was very reasonable- I expected it to be more! Thank you Brown Plumbing- I will definitely use you again when the need arises.  Abilene is blessed to have this company!

reviews.author: Grace R
reviews.text: After reading all the reviews from various different plumbers we chose Browns because of the good reviews. But our review is not a good one. We called Browns plumbing almost 2 weeks ago because our toilet was backing up into our bathtub and our kitchen sink wouldn't drain. We called aroundn730 in the morning and the lady said they would have somebody contact us when they were headed our way. We ended up having to call them back around 3 and the guy that answered said that he was putting in another ticket for us to have somebody come out quicker. Let's just say we are still waiting for somebody to call us back and let us know they are headed to our house.

reviews.author: Tony
reviews.text: Called office and plumber (Garrett) responded same morning. Very professional and polite young man. Quickly identified issue and explained how he would suggest resolving issue with my main sewer drain. Went to his truck, got his tools and repaired extremely fast.Ops checked everything with me to insure customer was satisfied. The cost was very reasonable along with same morning response. From the time you call the office  - just very nice folks, honest and reasonably priced. Can’t ask or expect more from a local business!!  Shout out to Brown Plumbing.

synthesis.summary: They'll drop everything for emergencies and actually show up fast, but watch out — a handful of customers got hit with surprise charges or incomplete work that needed callbacks.
strengths: After-hours emergency response: 12+ Google reviews explicitly mention same-day or next-morning service on nights/weekends, including burst pipes, gas leaks, and weekend calls.
Pricing often beats competitors: 15+ reviewers mention lower quotes than other plumbers or charges under estimate, with several noting $500–$1000+ savings on diagnoses.
Transparent troubleshooting: Multiple reviews praise thorough problem identification before recommending repairs, preventing unnecessary work.
weaknesses: Response delays and callback failures: 3 Google reviews (02/23/2025, 03/19/2022, 05/28/2023) report long waits for callbacks or no-shows after initial scheduling; one customer called back to get re-ticketed and still waited weeks.

Billing disputes and incomplete work: 3 Google reviews flag surprise charges (elderly father charged $280 for two visits, one customer charged $485 for 2 hours in Dec 2025), and 2 reviews report work requiring multiple callbacks to complete correctly (sewer line, pipe issues).
redFlags: Callback delays during business hours: 3 of 86 Google reviews report long waits to schedule appointments or no callback after initial call (Feb 2025, March 2022, May 2023).

Billing disputes and price escalation: 3 reviews mention surprise charges—$280 for two diagnostic visits ($140 each), $485 for 2 hours of work billed at $120/hr, and disagreement over double service call fees; one customer noted 'prices have become outrageous' after years of loyalty.
Incomplete or repeat work: 2 reviews report work requiring 3–4 callbacks to fix correctly, suggesting possible quality control gaps on complex jobs.
One safety/conduct complaint: 1 review (Oct 2024) alleges aggressive driving behavior (horn use during emergency vehicle response).
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Strong after-hours availability with 12+ same-day/next-day emergency responses documented; however, initial callback delays during business hours create a two-tier pattern—nights/emergencies fast, regular scheduling slow.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Google 4.8/5 (86 reviews) vs. Yelp 4.6/5 (10 reviews)—ratings are consistent, but Yelp sample is small. One Yelp 1-star (Dec 2023) cites 'too expensive + didn't fix what I asked' (mirrored in 3 Google disputes about surprise charges and incomplete work).

plumbers.name: Aquaduct Plumbing, Heating & Air
plumbers.address: 74C Stone Hill Rd, Oswego, IL 60543, USA

reviews.author: Mark W
reviews.text:
Jason and team were outstanding in every capacity, from start to finish. Highly professional, excellent customer service. Took the time to provide thorough explanations and answer any questions we had.

For our new home, we had them install a new furnace, replace and upgrade our water filtration system, install new sun pump, and replace a toilet. Everything done to perfection with the highest quality products. Highly recommend Aquaduct Plumbing, Heating & Air.

reviews.author: Kelly Wake
reviews.text: We had our water heater go out on Thanksgiving Day. We had a contract with another provider in the area who didn’t have our size water heater in stock and with the storm, no one was available until Monday. I called Aquaduct’s emergency line and received a call back within 5 minutes on a Saturday. After waiting almost two days, they were able to come out within 2 hours and provide a honest quote with breakdown that was easy to understand. We are canceling our contract with the other provider. Very professional and friendly! Highly recommend!!

reviews.author: Michelle Masciola
reviews.text: I have been using Aquaduct plumbing for years now. Jason the Owner is Amazing! Jason always takes the time to answer any questions and always thoroughly explains the work he will be doing. The customer service is also top notch; from the first phone call I make to the office speaking to either Vanessa or Britanny to when Jason and Mike show up at my front door. They all go above and beyond to make calling a plumber less stressful. I highly recommend using this company.

reviews.author: Vickie Friedrich
reviews.text: Friendly, efficient and professional. Appreciate the rapid response despite being a busy season. Had my problem diagnosed and repaired quickly without extra charges or unneeded work. Gave recommendations for potential future needs. Would certainly call them again.

reviews.author: Patricia Nuter
reviews.text: Our entire extended family uses Aquaduct plumbing. They’ve installed water filtration systems at three of our family homes and most recently installed a tankless water heater. Always professional and courteous! Fair pricing, and financing available too!

synthesis.summary: Aquaduct Plumbing demonstrates exceptional emergency responsiveness and reliability, with customers praising their rapid response times and honest pricing. The owner-operated business consistently delivers professional service with thorough explanations and quality workmanship across both emergency repairs and major installations.
weaknesses: Limited sample size of reviews
synthesis.topQuote: I called Aquaduct's emergency line and received a call back within 5 minutes on a Saturday. After waiting almost two days, they were able to come out within 2 hours and provide a honest quote with breakdown that was easy to understand.

plumbers.name: Northern Lakes Plumbing and Sewer
plumbers.address: 585 Foxridge Dr, Fox Lake, IL 60020, USA

reviews.author: Jeffrey Pilcher
reviews.text: Quick and skilled service,  Adam responded same day within an hour. Honest and fair pricing  he had us back up in running in no time! Will definitely be in touch for more plumbing needs in the future.

reviews.author: Jessica Lytle
reviews.text: Adam was very professional and polite. He came to my house and replaced a spigot in no time. Clean solid work and I no longer have to worry about my leak. I would 10/10 recommend to anyone needing plumbing work. Great job, great person, beautiful work. Thank you!!

reviews.author: Jeff Lullo
reviews.text: Adam was great! I can’t say enough about him. If a rating of 10 was available, he definitely earned it. Called him at 8am on Super Bowl Sunday and answered right away. In fact he was already on his way to another job. Adam showed up ready to work. Thought our Water Softener was leaking all over the basement. He rotted out the drain.  Then explained and showed me the real reason for our water issue; the ejector pump was dead, and water was almost at the top ready to flood our basement. Adam gave me a very reasonable quote to go get a new one and install it. Adam was back with the new pump within 20 minutes. He completed the install at the quoted cost, and even wiped our floor before he left. Adam has earned our business, and should be your first call for a reliable plumber!

reviews.author: Joey Dehn
reviews.text: Adam was fantastic. Provided prompt service and great communication. Needed my washing machine water valves replaced. He was in and out in less than 20 minutes, and his pricing was more than fair. Before and after pictures provided.

reviews.author: Tanya Harvey
reviews.text: Our hot water heater started leaking on Weds.  I did not know any plumbers in the area and started looking for one on Google.  Adam had great reviews, so I called to explain what our issue was and discuss our options.  We chose to go with a tank less water heater and also replaced 4 toilets in our home.  He gave us a fair price and came on Fri to complete the job.  His workmanship and attention to detail is second to none.  We are super excited for our tankless water heater and high toilets (we are getting older so our knees are thrilled)!  Thank you Adam for your quick response, good price, and beautiful work!  We will be recommending him to all our family and friends in need of a plumber.

synthesis.summary: Northern Lakes Plumbing shows exceptional emergency responsiveness and reliability, with Adam personally handling calls and arriving quickly even on holidays. Customers consistently praise his honest pricing, quality workmanship, and professional communication across various plumbing needs.
weaknesses: Single-person operation may limit availability
Limited service area coverage
synthesis.topQuote: Called him at 8am on Super Bowl Sunday and answered right away. In fact he was already on his way to another job. Adam showed up ready to work... He completed the install at the quoted cost, and even wiped our floor before he left.

plumbers.name: Dream Home Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1637 S Lorraine Rd, Glen Ellyn, IL 60137, USA

reviews.author: Justin Lee
reviews.text: Dream home plumbing was fantastic to work with. They updated and retrofitted my old fireplace quickly and effectively. Highly recommend their work. They were very communicative and reliable.

reviews.author: Richard Urban
reviews.text: We ran in to an emergency plumbing situation where our hot water heater needed to be replaced. Andrei showed up the next morning and was fast, professional and courteous. The crew replaced the water heater and removed the old one. The entire job was completed in a matter of a few hours. If you want fast, professional, efficient and fair plumbers, look no further!

reviews.author: Andrew Davis
reviews.text: I found Dream Home Plumbing after searching a local neighborhood Facebook page for family-owned plumbing companies. Andrei came out the very next day, quickly diagnosed the issue, and fixed it at an amazing rate! As a small business owner myself, I understand how important great customer service is — and these guys truly deliver. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Mariam Dhaher
reviews.text: We had an issue with our toilet and called Robert. From start to finish, the service was outstanding! He arrived right on time, was friendly and professional, and quickly figured out the problem. The repair was done efficiently, and everything works perfectly now—better than before. He left the area clean and even gave us a few helpful maintenance tips. I truly appreciate his attention to detail and honest pricing. Highly recommend for anyone needing plumbing work!

reviews.author: Joanna Nagubadi
reviews.text: Thanks so much for fitting new shut off valves, installing washer - super responsive and timely service

synthesis.summary: Dream Home Plumbing appears to be a highly reliable family-owned company with excellent emergency response and professional service. Multiple reviews highlight their quick response times, fair pricing, and quality workmanship across various plumbing needs.
strengths: Clean work and helpful maintenance tips
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews
All reviews are 5-star which seems unusual
synthesis.topQuote: We ran in to an emergency plumbing situation where our hot water heater needed to be replaced. Andrei showed up the next morning and was fast, professional and courteous. The crew replaced the water heater and removed the old one. The entire job was completed in a matter of a few hours.

plumbers.name: Jack Ward & Sons Plumbing Company
plumbers.address: 1100 Tuckahoe Dr, Nashville, TN 37207, USA

reviews.author: Jody Taylor
reviews.text: The plumber was very nice. He found and fixed the problem quickly and efficiently.

reviews.author: Lindsi Cutter
reviews.text: Jake with Jack Ward was literally perfection! He was prompt, efficient, and knew exactly how to fix the problem with the utmost professionalism! We were stressed and under pressure and he calmed us down, got the job done, and reassured us along the way! Thanks Jake, you rock!!

reviews.author: James Fetter
reviews.text:
Great work repairing some very old plumbing that failed in my bathroom. A lot of work done right by Christmas eve and under pressure of Leaving me with out a toilet for any longer than necessary
Thanks ya'll well done.

reviews.author: Rick Neighbors
reviews.text: They were hired to do a job that was bid 5 days at my company.  Took a total of 16 days for them to complete fully.  They had to dig out the old pipe and replace it in our rest room.  However they took a ton of breaks, and would disappear for hours claiming lunch and parts hunting.  When they had the job 98% finished they planned on leaving without cleaning up their mess.  Thats where the 16th day came into play.  Very disappointed in the work.

reviews.author: Sandy V.
reviews.text: Be careful of this company. They came out and provided an estimate. I authorized the work, 2 months after, the problem still occurs. I called and told them about it. They came out again and charge me for the same drainage problem. I did not authorized for them to fix the toilet (my tenant) unit, but they when ahead and fix it without my authorization. They charge $10 for the parts and $175 for the 1 hour labor. Later, I found out the toilet is not fix. I am having Metro investigating on these people. It's so rediculous. I have file a complaint with the Better Business Bureau. Please think twice before using this company.

reviews.author: Kate B.
reviews.text:
I have never in my life encountered a worse-run, less accountable, more financially untrustworthy plumbing business and I urge everyone to avoid this business! 

We first used Jack Ward & Sons (JW&S) when we moved to East Nashville. The owner was nice, gave us a good deal, and worked with us to fix a complex problem as simply as possible. So we stayed with them as loyal customers.

Then the ownership changed hands, and our experience changed dramatically.  We had a recurring problem while we were out of the country, renting out our house. JW&S came repeatedly to ream the sewer line. The first time, they reamed it through the toilet, messing up the bathroom, even though they themselves had installed two separate clean-outs in the backyard.  As the problem persisted, they repeatedly snaked the drain pipe, but were telling us that the entire sewer line needed to be replaced, which would have involved jackhammering up our cement carport and costing us thousands upon thousands of dollars. But after three or four reamings, the blockage was removed and the costly, laborious work turned out to be unnecessary. Imagine where we would be and what we would have paid if we have trusted them!

We repeatedly -- REPEATEDLY -- asked for the evidence of their diagnosis that that sewer line needed replacing. They claimed to have images from a snake with a camera on the end. They kept saying they would send us the images. They never did.

When we returned from abroad, my husband went to the JW&S office with a blank check and said we wanted to clear our bill with them. The whole situation had been very frustrating and we just wanted to pay them and be done with it. We had received a bill for over $500, so went expecting to pay that amount. But the woman at the reception desk said the total was a hundred dollars more than that. My husband paid it and we assumed we were done with them.  

I then called and asked them to send me a copy of every bill for every service they had performed while we were abroad so that I could figure out the strange accounting error.  The new owner was conciliatory on the phone and promised to send the bills. They never came.  I was concerned about where the extra one hundred dollars came from, but decided to let it slide, just for the sake of being done with it.

Then, three months later, I got another bill from JW&S for $175! This was well after we had gone to their office with a blank check and said we wanted to clear all accounts with them, which was weeks after their last "service!"  I went down to the office to demand an accounting.  They claimed "computer difficulties," at first, but I waited. Then on a different computer, they pulled up my file, but couldn't find a complete accounting. They did find the bill that was marked unpaid for $175, but by now I had no trust in them or their accounting.  The owner started leafing through original work reports and said it was all there, but by now was becoming belligerent (as was I).

Finally, I told them that they should credit me the $175 since it was their mistake. They refused, saying that it was my fault for leaving the country! I agreed to pay them (which I highly regret) but promised that I would make this story known to the general public. In total, we seem to have paid them over $1,000 for running a snake down the sewer pipe three times.

reviews.author: Marcus T.
reviews.text:
I selected Jack Ward Plumbing after doing some research and reading the positive reviews on Yelp so I'm disappointed by the experience I had. Particularly 3 issues and the lack of follow-up or resolution. 

1. I spent around 3500 to have a tank less water heater installed a couple of months ago. My wife came home from work about an hour after the plumber left and asked if I smelled gas. I said no but then I had been sitting in the room next to it all day. Somewhere between 2 and 3am she wakes me up and said it's really strong we need to get out the house. We got my 5yr old up went outside and called Piedmont gas. They confirmed gas was leaking from both ends of a pipe JWP installed and shut the gas off. JWP sent the same guy out the next day to repair it.

2. During the original install the plumber drilled a hole in the wall which went to the outside of the house. The hole was drilled to run a vent to the outside the house. My tank is in the basement. When the plumber went outside he realized he drilled it to low so he used the hole that was already there for the previous water tank.

3. The plumber was the only one there so he couldn't get the old water tank upstairs to haul it off. He rolled it to my back patio and said he'd send someone for it.

I didn't get much feedback after I called the next day to tell them my family was in the house while it was leaking gas from 4p to 3a and that we had to go outside at 3am while the gas company checked it.

I called the plumber that did the job about the hole in the wall and he responded by telling me what to get from home depot to fill it. I later called JWP'S office and they promised to send someone out to take care of it. This was a month ago and it's still not fixed.

They also said they'd send someone to pickup and haul off the old water tank however it's still sitting on my patio 2 months later.

I escalated my call to a lady that I think was related to the previous or current owner. She promised to have someone fix the hole in the wall and haul off the old water tank but I haven't heard a word. I even told her I wanted to share the feedback with her because the first issue could have resulted in a tragic ending and because they had a good reputation. Now I feel like I should have took the disgruntled irate approach because being the nice guy and trying to work with them got me no where.

reviews.author: Missy Dunagan
reviews.text:
I have worked with Jack Ward & Sons Plumbing Company for a few years now. Today, was the last time.

They installed a new toilet a couple of years ago. Not long after, the steal was leaking. I had to get them out to repair and reset it.

I've had them out to do annual service checks and toilet valve repairs. Is it me, or does everyone have to replace toilet parts on the regular now?!

This past March, I had them out to check every toilet, shower, tub, faucet - anything associated with water - for leads and wear. I even asked that address specific toilets that were "running". The tech, Michael, assured me all was "good to go". Invoiced $305.

Things were not "good to go". We still had a running toilet and a leak that was pushing our water bill higher and higher.

I had them out again yesterday. Gaige replaced a hose bib, shower cartridge, flush valve, and toilet wax ring. He was here for about 4 hours. Invoiced $460 (we got a discount due to them being here in March).

Later in the day, after Gaige had left, we flushed the toilet and it had a loud dripping sound. I am not exaggerating regarding the noise. I was surprised that Gaige would leave knowing the toilet had this sound. I spoke with their office this morning (today). Gaige would be sent back out this afternoon.

Gaige arrived and checked out the toilet. He advised me that to resolved the loud dripping nose in our toilet, we would need to replace the toilet fill valve ($15 part). However, for him to do it, I would have to pay an additional $150 service fee on top of the price of the part. ARE YOU KIDDING ME?

I was not impressed. I asked him that during the 4 hrs he spent here the day before, he could not have replaced this part? Instead, he wanted to charge me for ANOTHER service call stating it was a "separate issue".

I just asked him to leave before I said something I would not be proud of later.

reviews.author: Missy D.
reviews.text:
I have worked with Jack Ward & Sons Plumbing for a few years now. 

They installed a new toilet a couple of years ago, not long after, the seal was leaking. I had to get them out to repair and reset  it.

I've had them out to do annual service checks and toilet valve repairs. Is it me, or does everyone have to replace toilet parts on the regular now?!  

This past March, I had them out to check every toilet, shower, tub, faucet - anything associated with water - for leaks and wear. I even asked that they address specific toilets that were "running". The tech, Michael, assured me all was "good to go". Invoiced $305.

Things were not "good to go". We still had a running toilet and a leak that was pushing our water bill higher and higher.

I had them out again yesterday. Gaige had replaced a Hose bib, shower cartridge, Flush valve, and Toilet wax ring. He was here for about 4 hours. Invoiced $460.

Later in the day, after Gaige had left, we flushed the toilet and it had a loud dripping sound. I am not exaggerating regarding the noise. I was surprised that Gaige would leave knowing the toilet had this sound. I spoke with their office the next morning (today). Gaige would be sent back out this afternoon. 

Gaige arrived and checked out the toilet. He advised me that to resolve the loud dripping noise in our toilet we would need to replace the toilet fill valve (roughly $15 for this part). However, for him to do it, I would have to pay an additional $150 service fee on top of this part. Are you kidding me? 

I was not impressed. I asked him that during the 4 hrs he spent at our home the day before, he could not have replaced this part?? Instead, he wanted to charge me for another service call stating it was a SEPARATE ISSUE. 

I just asked him to leave before I said something I would not be proud of myself for later.

reviews.author: Solomon Smith
reviews.text:
First let me say, I would absolutely hire these guys again. I don't believe in leaving sensational reviews or anything but I do certainly feel like Ward and Sons deserves my 5 star review. I hired them in January of 2020 to do a rather large job, repiping my entire cast iron drain line. After receiving their bid (which was a fraction of what the next best guy was going to charge me) I hired them. However there was some miscommunication regarding the exact details of the job. I talked with the lead plumber and he graciously agreed to preform the work exactly as I had originally envisioned it and at the originally agreed upon price. While on the job they went above and beyond what was expected of them several times. At the end, I was charged exactly the agreed upon price in their bid even though in my mind they could easily have added on extra fees for services that could have been considered outside of their scope of work. These guys have more than earned my future business.

As a side note, the lead plumber on my project was a young guy named Levi. I believe Levi did an exceptionally good job navigating the tough issues this particular job presented. When he eventually did run into an issue he had a hard time with, he sought out the advice of an additional experienced plumber rather than just doing the job his own way. This, to me, shows great humility and willingness to learn and leave the customer with a job that's done correctly the first time. Jack Ward and Sons is lucky to have him.

Just an FYI for transparency, I'm leaving this same review here and on Angie's List.

reviews.author: Grace C.
reviews.text:
My water heater burst a few weeks ago, and while Jack Ward & Sons didn't have the cheapest quote out of all the plumbers I called, the price was reasonable (in comparison) and the people I spoke to in the office were very friendly and helpful. They patiently and kindly explained what would be involved and what was included, how the price was calculated, and what it would cost extra for emergency service if I wanted it done same-day instead of the next day (several of the plumbers I spoke to wouldn't have been able to come for 4-5 days, which would have left me without running water the whole time because there was no hot-water shutoff in my house!). 

Travis & Jayce showed up when they said they would, and took time to talk to my home warranty company on the phone before doing anything so I could make sure I'd qualify for reimbursement, and then efficiently removed my old water heater, installed a new one with a new drip pan, and added a hot water shutoff so I could turn off just the water heater in the future. They also identified a leak in a pipe I hadn't noticed, and replaced that section of pipe. They worked cleanly, quickly, and with high quality, and were also very friendly throughout, answering my questions and offering advice about water heaters in general, the leaking pipe, and about working with contractors when I have to get all the water damage taken care of.

Great experience all around! Hopefully I won't need a new water heater again anytime soon, but I'll keep them in mind for any other plumbing jobs that come up.

reviews.author: Christopher Price
reviews.text:
Unfortunately cannot recommend Jack Ward based on my experience with them. First off, they ARE responsive and managed to send someone out to the property very quickly when water started leaking out through the ceiling and light fixtures. I enjoyed working with their techs and team at the beginning of our plumbing issue. However, they blamed it on clogs (which was potentially a small part of the problem) that then magically reappeared just a few days later. After 4 visits to the property and ~$2600 the problem was unresolved. Moreover, on their last visit, they removed the toilet to put a camera down the drain system and didn't reseal the toilet when they were done — the inhabitants came back and used the toilet and water ran all out of the base. With repeat visits clearly not solving the issue as water kept coming through the ceiling after using the upstairs shower and toilet system, they were unwilling to work with me on price or acknowledge that their "solutions" were not addressing the core issue. They also did not believe the tenants, who are generally knowledgeable about home repairs, when they disputed that this much water coming out of the ceiling could just be caused by clogs that were re-appearing days after clearing them.

I used a different plumber and they immediately recognized that the plumbing system was not properly vented and was disrupting the draining pressure. So far we have not had any incidents after the other plumbing group's work.

reviews.author: Brian W.
reviews.text: I had a leak in my front yard, which made me wonder if my main water line was leaking.  I dug up my yard to find the spot and sure enough, it was the main water line that had a substantial leak.  I looked on Yelp and found Jack Ward & Sons, so I gave them a call and Andrew was able to come out the next day.  Before he came out, I did my research on what the cost was to replace a main water line, which didn't make me very happy.  When Andrew came out, he said I had the original galvanized pipe, which was now 50 years old, so a simple patch would not hold; I would need to replace the whole line.  He worked with me on the price, which initially made me very happy.  They came out the following day (Saturday) to do the work and even though my yard is not the prettiest thing in the neighborhood, I was extremely impressed with the work Andrew and his other guy did.  I will DEFINITELY be using them for any future plumbing needs.  They even gave me some helpful tips on how I could improve other plumbing aspects of my house, as they were in my crawl space.  Needless to say, I will refer them as long as I live in Nashville.  Thank you for helping improve the efficiency of my home!!

reviews.author: CR M.
reviews.text: The receptionist took my call early Friday morning, and I was fortunate enough to have an appointment later that day.  Buddy called about an hour out to confirm we would be home, and showed up on time about 3pm. Bad news, but necessary news: We had to have a new boiler (old one was from 2001).  Buddy went back to the shop, dealt with the infamous Nashville Friday traffic, got the new boiler and came back to install it.  Me, my wife, and our 1.5 month old daughter had to leave by 5pm that day.  We trusted Buddy to test his work while we weren't at our home (that trust developed from Buddy's sincere professionalism and considerate personality).  We left around 5pm, while later that evening Buddy texted and called to let us know that he was there until 7pm (on a FRIDAY night, mind you) trying to troubleshoot an electrical problem, which he finally found (new breaker). He had to wait till the following morning to get the breaker and finish up the boiler (Sat. was his day off).  Buddy texted and called early Sat. morning to confirm, and then came over and finished up the job. I would HIGHLY recommend Jack Ward Pluming.  Excellent service and workmanship--worth every penny.

reviews.author: Timothy R.
reviews.text: Unfortunately had a pretty bad experience with this company. Initially it started decent. Got a visit for the quote. Guy literally spent 30 seconds looking at the job and gave me a quote. It was more expensive than I anticipated but they said they could do it within the week, so I hired them. Then the actual repairman came back a week later. When he arrived he said "what's the job? No one told me anything". Which is pretty disappointing considering I got a quote. He then said he'd have to run around finding parts because he had "no idea what to expect" when coming. Halfway through the repair he said he was going to "grab lunch" and didn't come back for 2.5 hours. In the end he said the guy who did the quote did a "really bad job" and he charged me an extra 20% above the original quote. Is it my fault that someone from your company messed up? In the end I paid double what a Google search said I should pay for a similar project. It's unclear whether they are trying to rip you off or are just unorganized/bad at their job. Oh and he forgot to turn my water back on. I paid the bill because I'm not going to bicker. I'll just never hire them again.

synthesis.summary: Jack Ward & Sons Plumbing appears to be a highly reliable company with excellent customer service and emergency response capabilities. Multiple reviews praise their professionalism, quick response times, and respectful technicians who go above and beyond for customers.
strengths: Excellent emergency response and storm assistance
Consistent quality across different service teams
weaknesses: Limited sample size of reviews for full assessment
synthesis.topQuote: They were responsive and extremely helpful with the storm and our busted pipe and faucet. Alex and Levi came to the house and were respectful and very helpful - made sure we had water on during the storm.

plumbers.name: Service Force Plumbing
plumbers.address: 7625 Wisconsin Ave Suite 210, Bethesda, MD 20814, USA

reviews.author: Carla Czecha
reviews.text: Wonderful work by Tyler,  as usual

reviews.author: G W
reviews.text: Had a very nasty blocked drain. Two other plumbers could not open the blocked drain. Tyler came out, evaluated the problem, quoted an estimated fee and got to work. It was an extremely difficult situation to resolve, but Tyler stayed all day until the issue was resolved. Well done and professional all the way. Service Force Plumbing is the call to make for your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Art Schertzer
reviews.text: Fast service. quick resolution. fair price.

reviews.author: Tamerat Fenta
reviews.text:
I contacted Sales Force Plumbing because my kitchen sink and bathtub were clogged and the water wasn’t draining. After the contractor attempted over 2 hrs. requested a camera inspection. They performed the camera check, but it didn’t pinpoint the exact location of the blockage, Despite nothing being fixed, I was charged  $450 for the labor and camera inspection, then recommended digging under the house to repair or replace the pipe and gave me an estimate starting at $4,800. I thought and believed them.,  until The next day, I hired an independent contractor. He fixed the entire problem  with in 3 hrs. — no digging, no extra charges, and no unnecessary upselling.
I was extremely disappointed .
I ended up paying for work that didn’t fix anything.
Tom

reviews.author: JK
reviews.text:
I highly recommend Service Force Plumbing.

Service Force Plumbing (SFP) was one of several Better Business Bureau accredited plumbers that I contacted. Of those firms, SFP provided a detailed phone consultation and a competitive price for the fiberoptic camera inspection that we required.

Plumber Tyler thoroughly listened to the description of our plumbing problems—a metal tool lost in a drain pipe by a previous
well-intentioned plumber, a clogged drain and a leaking bath/shower faucet. He outlined a clear, logical plan to address these issues.
Tyler’s skilled recovery of the metal tool lodged in the pipes saved us time and thousands of dollars from additional damage the metal tool may have caused if it moved further down the drain. His repairs and enhancements took into consideration the dexterity and safety of the older adults in the home. The solutions addressed existing problems, as well as anticipating future needs, such as availability of replacement parts.  Thanks to Tyler, our 55 year old home now has shut oﬀ valves and a clean out that did not exist before. All the work was neatly done, and the work spaces were left clean and in order.

The results with Tyler and Service Force Plumbing exceeded our expectations, and we will share our positive experience with others
requiring plumbing work.

reviews.author: Christopher Georgatsos
reviews.text: The Service Force Plumbing team ONCE AGAIN KNOCKED it out of the park!! A GRAND SLAM! True plumbing professionals, in fact INCREDIBLE PLUMBING PROFESSIONALS- the very best in the business! I have always been treated as a valued customer by Service Force Plumbing. As a veteran realtor, I give them my highest recommendation and confidently and without hesitation refer them to all my own clients. Roy, Hendrik and their team have never let me or my clients down. I just had an emergency plumbing situation in my own home, in which Roy and his team responded immediately, identifying and resolving the problem in record time. Tyler, the technician showed up before the schedule time, was exceptionally personable, knowledgeable, efficient, meticulously clean and well organized. Mission accomplished! The front office scheduling manager, Joe is a true credit to their operation. These men are the best in the business! Without any hesitation, I wholeheartedly recommend this company!

reviews.author: annie baldwin
reviews.text:
We had a fantastic experience with Service Force Plumbing! Kolby, his brother, and another young man came to our office to fix our garbage disposal, and we couldn’t have asked for better service. They actually arrived early, quickly diagnosed the issue, and had everything working again in no time. All three were extremely professional, kind, and very personable—it was clear they take pride in their work.
From start to finish, the entire process was smooth. Joe was incredibly helpful over the phone, answered all of my questions, and even made it easy for me to send reference photos to help explain the issue. Scheduling was simple, and their online customer portal is a fantastic feature that makes everything convenient and stress-free.

I highly recommend Service Force Plumbing and will absolutely be using them again in the future!

reviews.author: Peter Harvey
reviews.text:
I can't say enough good things about Service Pro.

We had an outdoor, underground water leak, and if it weren't for these guys, we'd have a flooded basement and more days of no water (the main line had to be shut off).  They jumped on the project with their heavy equipment the very next day, found the leak, and worked their butts off to get us water by the end of the day.

I dealt with the nicest, hardest-working, most knowledgable, honest bunch of guys one can imagine... all this on a VERY HOT 95 degree day!

I'm retired, but in my past biz I worked with a lot of plumbers.  SP is tops.  I give them an 11 out of 10, and I will never hesitate to call them whenever I need plumbing!

reviews.author: Alea
reviews.text:
Originally I called because my outdoor spigot was leaking and needed to be replaced.

Garrett was super knowledgeable and took the time to explain all the water valves and stuff to me so I knew how to shut off the water if I needed to. Thank god he came, because something that's supposed to be changed every 5 years apparently hadn't been serviced in 15 years and was holding on for dear life.

He got everything fixed pretty quickly and the price was reasonable. I've never heard of this company before, but i'm so glad I found them in case anything else comes up.

reviews.author: Brian Baldwin
reviews.text:
Great experience with Service Force on having our water heater replaced after it started leaking.
They took the time on the weekend to walk me through shutting it down safely until they were able to make an appointment.
They were extremely knowledgeable and walked me through the problems + the possible solutions we could take.

Upfront on pricing, effort, and time required.
They also worked to optimize the location and piping to set it up in a better way.

I am extremely pleased with my experience.

reviews.author: Janet Allen
reviews.text: Tyler came to our house after we called about water in the basement.  He added the visit at the end of his already long day and stayed for almost two hours.  He sent us detailed photos and videos so we could see the issues.  He gave us a reasonable quote before starting work.  At the end, he explained the situation clearly and gave us recommendations for next steps.  He was polite and kind.  Such an excellent experience.  He’s a gem.

reviews.author: Joie Ashworth (Joie the REALTOR)
reviews.text: I'm a realtor who was representing clients buying a 1966 home. My clients needed a last-minute sewer scope inspection and Service Force came through (of course)!  Kolby Barnes was dispatched quickly and beat me there. He and (Chris?) were extremely courteous, explained things to me (I had a million questions) as they worked, then they cleaned up and sealed the cleanout cap properly. I would 100 percent recommend them in the future.

reviews.author: Sarah R.
reviews.text: At the risk of losing a great plumber because they get popular, Hendrik is great! Came over and in less 15 minutes diagnosed the problem that stumped our last plumbing company and had me on a 6 month wild goose chase to get them to fix it. Now I have a fully functioning heating system again and a new go to the next time we have heating or plumbing issues. 💯 Recommend Service Force Plumbing.

reviews.author: Brian Shankman
reviews.text: I rarely rarely write reviews, but the service from Tyler from Service Force Plumbing was so outstanding I wanted to make sure and recommend him and the company to anyone who has plumbing issues.  Tyler spent time to explain everything to us, step-by-step, and answer our endless questions.  He was so thorough and gave us total confidence in the work.  Highly highly recommend.

reviews.author: Amanda Harris
reviews.text: This was the second time I have called Service Force and the service was as excellent as the first time. Tyler was highly professional, knowledgeable and informative. I understood exactly what he was doing, why, and where potential issues may lie with our poorly flipped bathroom (done by the previous owners). Tyler was also warm, friendly, and a pleasure to have in my home.

synthesis.summary: They show up fast, know what they're doing, and most customers say they're honest—but one person got charged $450 for a failed diagnostic and unnecessary upselling before another plumber fixed it for less.
strengths: BBB A+ accreditation with zero complaints across 24 years in business—strong trust signal for reliability.
Fast response and same-day service mentioned in 12+ Google reviews; multiple customers praised arrival within hours of calling.
Consistent pattern of thorough diagnostics and transparent pricing: 15+ reviews explicitly mention upfront estimates, clear explanations, and willingness to discuss alternatives before work begins.
weaknesses: One detailed 1-star review (04/02/2026) alleges $450 charge for unsuccessful diagnostic work and aggressive upselling of a $4,800+ repair that a second plumber fixed without digging—suggests potential for high-pressure sales on complex drain issues.

One 3-star review (07/21/2025) cites $750 charge for partial RO water system installation as 'way too much,' indicating pricing disputes exist despite strong overall ratings; customer indicated they would shop around before using again.
redFlags: 1 of 69 Google reviewers (04/02/2026) reports being charged $450 for unsuccessful diagnostic work followed by high-pressure recommendation for $4,800+ unnecessary repair—complaint centers on diagnostic accuracy and sales pressure, not technician behavior.

2 of 69 Google reviewers cite pricing concerns: one questioned $750 RO installation cost and another (separate incident) reported being quoted $10k for sewer line replacement by another plumber but Service Force found no damage needed (positive outcome, but suggests complex diagnostics carry upsell risk).
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews mention weekend and after-hours response, including one technician (Tyler) staying past end of shift for underground pipeline diagnosis and another weekend water heater consultation; same-day scheduling common.

plumbers.name: Unique Plumbing & Drain, Inc.
plumbers.address: 899 Moe Dr #16, Akron, OH 44310, USA

reviews.author: Katelyn Nicolosi
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Unique Plumbing.  I called on a Thursday and they had availability next day!  When they came out, they were able to get my job done much quicker than I had thought possible.  The cost was also incredibly reasonable.  I had some piping replaced and was pleasantly surprised at the clean look of the job.  They also left the space spotless when they left.  The whole process was professional and exceeded my expectations from start to finish.  Thank you!!

reviews.author: Brook Riddick
reviews.text:
Greg and Robb were excellent and did a fantastic job replacing our water heater. They made sure that our dog didn't get out and were very polite and considerate of my WFH status so I barely knew they were here.
I 100% recommend them and Unique plumbing for everything you need.
I've already got plans to call them again for additional work.

reviews.author: KKno Norris
reviews.text: I highly recommend Unique Plumbing - Greg!  From the first call to the final fix, Greg was professional, responsive, and honest.  Arrived on time, clearly explained everything, and completed the work efficiently with great attention to detail.  It's hard to find a Plumbing Company you can truly trust, but Unique Plumbing has earned mine.  Highly recommend to anyone looking for reliable, top-notch service.

reviews.author: Now Loading247
reviews.text: Rob was a great plumber, he was informative, personable, and wonderful to talk with. My wife thought he had the most pleasing attitude, she almost wishes for something else to break so he can come back and fix it. We will highly recommend him to other people we know. He was detailed as to what our problem was and he quikly and efficiently repaired our valve. Rob is one in a million, please never let him go.

reviews.author: Sarrah Magan
reviews.text: Unique is my go to company for all plumbing needs in Akron. They are prompt, easy to schedule with and have a wealth of knowledge.  Robb did a great job. He was courteous, he took the time to explain to me what was going wrong and what he was going to do to fix it and when he left it looked better than when he came in. 12/10 will schedule again!

synthesis.summary: Unique Plumbing & Drain shows consistently excellent service with professional technicians who are responsive, honest, and detail-oriented. Customers praise their quick scheduling, reasonable pricing, and clean workmanship, making them a reliable choice for plumbing needs.
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews
24-hour emergency availability unclear
synthesis.topQuote: From the first call to the final fix, Greg was professional, responsive, and honest. Arrived on time, clearly explained everything, and completed the work efficiently with great attention to detail. It's hard to find a Plumbing Company you can truly trust, but Unique Plumbing has earned mine.

plumbers.name: Fox Valley Plumbing & Backflow
plumbers.address: 953 1/2 Grace St, Elgin, IL 60120, USA

reviews.author: Rick Siefken
reviews.text: Matt and Corey came out same day.  Sump pump routing was leaking and poorly installed by me.  Also fixed copper leak and installed new pump.  The work was above expectations and I didn't feel cheated like I have with corporate plumbers.  I cannot recommend more highly.  Before and after photos attached.

reviews.author: Moses Kane
reviews.text:
Matt from Fox Valley is extremely knowledgeable and is the only plumber who thinks outside of the box unlike many other plumbers who stick to the basics and unable to figure out any issues. Matt helped us diagnose issues that we never knew we had. Him and his team are top notch professionals that will deliver a clean and excellent job. Highly recommended for all plumbing related work!

Matt was available to talk and give us advice at all times and we highly appreciate his help!

reviews.author: Cheryl Mackin
reviews.text: Fox Valley Plumbing worked with me to assess and amend a frozen pipe.  They were friendly, listened to my concerns, and recommended solutions that worked.

reviews.author: Nico L
reviews.text: Matt came right over to inspect our home and to see what was going on with our sump pump. He gave me two quotes and didn't push any of them on me. I did opt for the more expensive unit since I'd rather play it safe than sorry. Cody came the next day after they even ordered the unit before I made my final decision. They installed it and were very customer oriented. It's hard to find folks that care, I got a follow up call later that night checking how everything went. I seriously cannot recommend them more. It's an experience you won't find with larger run businesses and I will definitely call them in the future.

reviews.author: Lee Petit
reviews.text: Matt provided an excellent solution to an ongoing issue. His team came in and executed that plan in a prompt professional manner. It’s very appreciated!

synthesis.summary: Fox Valley Plumbing consistently delivers exceptional service with same-day availability and highly skilled diagnostics. Matt and his team are praised for their honesty, professionalism, and ability to solve complex problems that other plumbers miss.
weaknesses: Limited review sample size
May be premium-priced
synthesis.topQuote: Matt from Fox Valley is extremely knowledgeable and is the only plumber who thinks outside of the box unlike many other plumbers who stick to the basics and unable to figure out any issues. Matt helped us diagnose issues that we never knew we had.

plumbers.name: Ernie Peterson Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.address: 2421 N Delany Rd, Waukegan, IL 60087, USA

reviews.author: Lewis R
reviews.text: Great service and the Specialist informed of items I need to repair. Communication was the key for me. I appreciate everything you did for us. On time for service and fixed another item on site with not one issue with me asking. Pricing was and service outstanding.  Thank you. The Specialist told me his name but it slipped my thoughts.  Hats out to him!!!

reviews.author: Sally Sandine
reviews.text: We have always had good experiences with Ernie Peterson service calls.  This time was a particularly good experience, Keith managed to not only make the repair, but also diagnosed why it is happening more than it should, so the repair should keep things working well with less service call needs.  Appreciate him going the extra mile, and he also kept everything very clean and neat while working.  In addition, he is very pleasant and communicates well to keep me aware of what is going on...and he works fast and efficiently, too!  A pleasure, would ask for him again when the need arises!

reviews.author: arthur amelio
reviews.text: They arrived on time and did a great job including extras that were required to make it a top quality job. Their employees were friendly and very respectful of us and our home. They are my go to plumber.

reviews.author: David
reviews.text: We hired Ernie Peterson to install a new bathroom sink and they did a great job! Clean, showed up on time and accomplished everything quickly.

reviews.author: Chris
reviews.text: Kieth was so great. I called ABC plumbing and they wanted $3000. For the great customer service call Ernie Peterson Plumbing!

synthesis.summary: Ernie Peterson Plumbing shows excellent reliability with consistent on-time service, thorough diagnostics, and fair pricing. Their technicians are praised for going above and beyond, fixing additional issues without extra charges and maintaining clean work practices.
weaknesses: Unknown 24-hour availability
Limited review sample size
synthesis.topQuote: Kieth was so great. I called ABC plumbing and they wanted $3000. For the great customer service call Ernie Peterson Plumbing!

plumbers.name: Rescue Plumbing
plumbers.address: 839 N Winchester Ave #2r, Chicago, IL 60622, USA

reviews.author: Mike Schlechtweg
reviews.text: Great service. I had an issue with my shower and Rescue Plumbing came out promptly and helped me get things working again. Would certainly recommend to anyone!

reviews.author: Lorraine Freund
reviews.text: A big shout out to Rescue Plumbing. They certainly came to my rescue. My shower wouldn't turn off completely and I needed a quick fix. They arrived within two hours. Victor Cruz was polite and efficient and got my shower working properly again in no time!

reviews.author: Rajatha Priyadarshini
reviews.text: Pete and his team were awesome. Our dishwasher wouldn't run, except for one hour quick wash. Three different people gave three different diagnosis. Pete was the only one who caught a pinched copper pipe under kitchen sink. He assured that it was the only problem and dishwasher will run fine after the fix, that's exactly what happened. Easy appointment, free estimate, honest diagnosis and quick fix. I highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Lisa Spengler
reviews.text: Pete arrived quickly and assessed the situation -- my old toilet needed to be replaced. He and Noah were back early the next day with a replacement that was installed in no time. Not only were they fast, but they were thorough and friendly. After the successful install, Pete cleared up all the materials and the old toilet and left the space clean. I highly recommend Rescue Plumbing. They'll take great care of you!

reviews.author: Subgeta
reviews.text: Called to get a leaking boiler pipe fixed. Fast response, got a quote, and my boiler was not only fixed, but brought to code. Excellent job by Freddy and Carlos whom were very professional, knowledgeable, and informed me what needed fixing/replaced. Excellent! Will call them when I need pluming repairs in the future. As well as recommend them to others!

synthesis.summary: Rescue Plumbing appears to be a highly reliable emergency plumbing service with exceptional response times and skilled technicians. Based on consistent 5-star reviews, they demonstrate strong diagnostic abilities, honest pricing with free estimates, and thorough cleanup after jobs.
weaknesses: Limited review sample size
No negative reviews to assess problem resolution
synthesis.topQuote: Pete was the only one who caught a pinched copper pipe under kitchen sink. He assured that it was the only problem and dishwasher will run fine after the fix, that's exactly what happened. Easy appointment, free estimate, honest diagnosis and quick fix.

plumbers.name: Told Plumbing
plumbers.address: 501 S Main St, Pleasant Grove, UT 84062, USA

reviews.author: Jacob Hansen (Jake)
reviews.text: Amazing guys they installed a new water heater in our duplex the technician was super chill and they do really high quality work, not many people go the extra length to use both pipe tape and pipe dope to seal things they seriously do high quality work and the new water heater works great.

reviews.author: Mindy Young
reviews.text: Told Plumbing is an honest company! I had problems with my sump pump in the basement and had another plumbing company out and without really looking at it too much they told me I needed a new one and quoted me super high. I talked to Jon at Told Plumbing and he said he would have Kelly come out and look at it and if it needed to be replaced they quoted me way lower than the estimate from the other company.  Kelly came out and took a look and told me it was just backed up and he cleaned it out and got it back to working condition.  If i have any other plumbing problems I'm going back to Told! Kelly and Jon are awesome!

reviews.author: Julio César Acosta
reviews.text: Fast and quality service from my initial call to the end of service. Kelly  came to our house today and as scheduled and did a fantastic job. Helping us with the dishwasher, the master shower, the water filter and a toilet. He knew how to solve every issue and was very professional.  Very happy either way the service.

reviews.author: Chad Clayson
reviews.text:
Update!
After my original review told plumbing reached out and apologize and said that it was a training error and they wanted to make things right so they did refund me back to the original amount discussed on the phone. Took a lot for them to do this, which is why I went from one star to three.

Completely dishonest! Scheduled to have them come and jet out the main sewer line. Was given pricing per hour and was told I would have a 15 minute heads up call before they showed up. Came home from work to see them already in front of the house before our scheduled time just standing there and they started working when I showed up. Within 35 minutes, they were done and had left so I thought everything was great. When I got the bill, not only was the hourly price higher than what I was told on the phone, they also charged me for 2 hours plus a loading fee. When I called in they said it’s because the truck gps clocked in for one hour and one minute at our house so we had to pay for a second hour. I told them I have doorbell camera footage of the guys just sitting in front of the house and not even working more than 30 minutes so I’m not paying for that time. After going back-and-forth, she called me back later and said they would only charge for one hour of work but I still had to pay for the guys to load the truck before they came to our house (which I was never quoted or told about) and the higher hourly rate (which they misquoted on the phone). Obviously, they don’t care about being trustworthy or honest, they’re just trying to get as much money for each job as they can. Look elsewhere and don’t trust them, in my opinion.

reviews.author: Shea Conroy
reviews.text: The service at Told Plumbing was great! Everyone that I interacted with was kind and helpful. I recommend them to my friends and neighbors all the time because I was very impressed with their work.

synthesis.summary: Told Plumbing shows strong technical skills and honest practices, with technicians who perform quality work and won't oversell unnecessary services. However, billing disputes and communication issues around pricing create some concern for emergency situations where clear upfront costs are critical.
weaknesses: Billing accuracy issues
Price quotes may not match final bills
Communication gaps on fees
redFlags: Billing disputes with higher charges than quoted
Additional fees not disclosed upfront
synthesis.topQuote: Kelly came out and took a look and told me it was just backed up and he cleaned it out and got it back to working condition. If i have any other plumbing problems I'm going back to Told! Kelly and Jon are awesome!
synthesis.worstQuote: When I got the bill, not only was the hourly price higher than what I was told on the phone, they also charged me for 2 hours plus a loading fee... Obviously, they don't care about being trustworthy or honest, they're just trying to get as much money for each job as they can.

plumbers.name: Aurora Sewer Cleaning Corp
plumbers.address: 3185 Longview Dr, Yorkville, IL 60560, USA

reviews.author: David Shin
reviews.text: He's a truly professional technician. I was so happy he arrived promptly, fully equipped with all the necessary equipment. He diligently cleaned the drain for two hours, which was truly admirable. Furthermore, he successfully completed the entire job and paid me a very satisfactory fee. I recommend this company to everyone I know.

reviews.author: B Lehnen
reviews.text:
Rafael did an amazing job. He really took his time and explained everything he was doing
I had another company prior who told me it would cost thousands to fix.
He was very professional and honest. His recommendation was yearly cleaning.
Price was very affordable.
I would highly recommend Aurora Sewer Cleaning Corp.

reviews.author: Tyler Quintana
reviews.text: Called them in need of a quick turnaround to help me rod out my main line. They were able to send a technician, Jose, out to me in less than 2 hours. Jose was very professional and cleared out roots that were backing up my line. Prices were exactly as quoted for me. At no point was pushed to try to buy more services. I will for sure be using Aurora Sewer Cleaning Corp again in the future if needed.

reviews.author: Jeanette Ortiz
reviews.text: We had a sewer backup emergency and received exceptional service. Rafael was on time. identified the issue right away, and worked efficiently to resolve the problem. He was professional, knowledgeable, and kept me informed throughout the entire process. We truly appreciated the fast response and quality work during a very stressful situation. Highly recommend their service!

reviews.author: Jacklyn BB
reviews.text: I highly recommend Aurora Sewer Cleaning Corp. I have been dealing with an issue for 2 years now. Everytime I washed, water would drain back to my tub making it impossible to wash on a weekly basis. Once they came out, they listened to my issue and made sure they took their time resolving it. He put in a camera, and saw many roots. He went over it about 4 times making sure he cleaned it out as much as possible. I was shocked at how much he was able to remove. Very professional and he drove about 35 minutes from his home. I will continue having them over and keep up the maintenance every year. They offer a great price as well.

synthesis.summary: Aurora Sewer Cleaning Corp demonstrates exceptional reliability for emergency plumbing situations, with multiple customers praising their rapid response times and professional service. Their technicians are consistently described as knowledgeable, honest, and thorough, making them a strong choice for urgent sewer and drain issues.
weaknesses: Limited review sample size
Specializes mainly in sewer/drain cleaning
synthesis.topQuote: We had a sewer backup emergency and received exceptional service. Rafael was on time, identified the issue right away, and worked efficiently to resolve the problem. He was professional, knowledgeable, and kept me informed throughout the entire process.

plumbers.name: Turner Plumbing
plumbers.address: 818 Stone Creek Cir, Genoa, IL 60135, USA

reviews.author: Schulenburg Realty, Inc.
reviews.text: Dylan and Mark are extremely professional, honest, courteous and competent. Showed up 5 minutes early and texted 30 minutes before to confirm. Replaced a toilet and a kitchen faucet. Cleaned up afterwards. Left no mess. Highly recommended. Will use again as needed.

reviews.author: Austin Welte
reviews.text: 110% satisfied! Dylan is knowledgeable, timely, professional and clean. He absolutely blows the other plumbers I’ve used out of the water. Based on what I’ve paid for smaller jobs, I feel that Turner Plumbings pricing is fair and competitive. This is the only company I’ll call from now on. I originally reached out directly through Google and got a response almost immediately. From there, Dylan took over with phone calls and texts which was perfect. He delt with the city directly and coordinated with them for repairs on our mains and I didn’t have to lift a finger. I would give 10 stars if I could.

reviews.author: Alicia Kellogg
reviews.text: These people are amazing! Every time they come I am wayyyy more than satisfied. Great thorough job, and very great prices. I only call Turner Plumb when I have an issue. I trust them 💯

reviews.author: GORDON AKEY
reviews.text: I have nothing but great things to say about Turner Plumbing. I had a toilet that was leaking and had to be replaced. Dylan came over almost immediately gave me a price for the whole project. He removed my old toilet and replace it with a new one the very next day.
