Turner Plumbing did an excellent job for a fair price.

reviews.author: leea herriman
reviews.text: To say Turner Plumbing did an outstanding job is an understatement but no other words completely describe the wonderful work  they did; which included multiple  jobs from my bathroom to kitchen and even the outside and I can say honestly everything was done beautifully. Trust if I have any other plumbing issues they will be the first people I call.

synthesis.summary: Turner Plumbing demonstrates exceptional reliability and professionalism with 117 perfect 5-star reviews, consistently delivering quality work with fair pricing. Dylan and the team show strong responsiveness and attention to detail, making them a solid choice for emergency plumbing needs.
strengths: Excellent cleanup and attention to detail
weaknesses: Unknown 24-hour availability
Limited team size visibility
synthesis.topQuote: 110% satisfied! Dylan is knowledgeable, timely, professional and clean. He absolutely blows the other plumbers I've used out of the water. Based on what I've paid for smaller jobs, I feel that Turner Plumbings pricing is fair and competitive.

plumbers.name: Eric's Plumbing and Drain Cleaning
plumbers.address: 2139 N 220 E St, Provo, UT 84604, USA

reviews.author: Todd Densley
reviews.text:
I can’t say enough good things about Eric’s Plumbing. I called Eric after discovering my hot water heater was leaking, and he immediately jumped into action. Within 45 minutes, he drove from Spanish Fork to American Fork with all the necessary supplies—no delays, no excuses.

Even more impressive, Eric and his crew had the entire hot water heater replaced in under an hour. Professional, efficient, and incredibly knowledgeable from start to finish.

Amazing service, best price in town—hands down, and an all-around great experience. If you need a plumber you can trust, Eric and his team are the best there is. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Melinda Bridenstine
reviews.text: Eric's Plumbing is fantastic! They are skilled, professional and give great service at a fair price. They saved us thousands over the other two plumbing companies for our water main replacement a couple months ago. We called Eric's Plumbing again for a low water pressure issue.  Dillion was great! He was very thorough in his assessment and addressed a couple other issues. He explained the issues and possible repair options. We needed to replace the kitchen faucet.  Dillion had one on the truck and repaired it right then. He did a beautiful job and we love the new faucet which was very reasonably priced. We enjoyed chatting with Dillion while he worked.  After completing the work he went the extra mile and made sure everything was spotlessly clean which I really appreciated.   Awesome company! Awesome plumbers! Give them a call for your plumbing issues. You won't be disappointed.

reviews.author: Megan Dunnigan
reviews.text: Richie came to replace my kitchen sink, disposal, and faucet along with updating the piping from my kitchen to the basement. He'd previously done other work on my house, and I appreciated having him come again because I trust him and knows he does good work. Everything was installed correctly. His work was clean and professional. He made sure I liked how everything turned out, and I do!

reviews.author: Terra Nicole Hansen Franco
reviews.text:
Rickie (or was is Richie) was absolutely fantastic. He was very helpful, kind, and polite, and he communicated clearly with us the entire time. We originally called him out for an issue with our shower, but he also took the time to check our water heater and inspect all the plumbing throughout the house, including the bathroom and kitchen sinks. He kept us informed of any potential issues he noticed along the way.
What really stood out was how well he explained his process. Since the exact issue wasn’t immediately clear, he walked us through the order in which he planned to try different fixes—starting with the least invasive and least expensive options first. He was upfront about the likelihood of needing a more costly repair and made sure to get our approval before moving on to the next step if something didn’t work. We never felt rushed or pressured.
He also made sure we felt satisfied before leaving, was great with our dog, and wore shoe covers to protect our floors, which we really appreciated. Overall, Rochi was extremely professional, friendly, and clearly very capable. We couldn’t have asked for a better experience.

reviews.author: Sandman Marketing
reviews.text:
Eric’s Plumbing is the real deal. I had a nightmare main sewer line issue and got a bunch of quotes—Eric’s was easily the best price, and the quality didn't suffer for it. They drove all the way out to Ogden and just knocked it out.

They even helped me out with a few extra things while they were on-site, which I really appreciated. No stress, no hidden fees, just great work. If you’re looking for someone honest who won't overcharge you, these are your guys.

synthesis.summary: Eric's Plumbing demonstrates exceptional emergency responsiveness and reliability, with one customer getting a water heater replaced within 45 minutes of calling. Their technicians are highly skilled, honest about pricing, and consistently deliver professional work at competitive rates.
weaknesses: Only 117 reviews for full confidence
24-hour availability unclear
synthesis.topQuote: Within 45 minutes, he drove from Spanish Fork to American Fork with all the necessary supplies—no delays, no excuses. Even more impressive, Eric and his crew had the entire hot water heater replaced in under an hour.

plumbers.name: JC Plumbing & Rooter
plumbers.address: 19264 Medford Ct, Hayward, CA 94541, USA

reviews.author: Weimin Qi
reviews.text: Very professional and quick.

reviews.author: Carl Stanley
reviews.text: Jose diagnosed our sewer problem and fixed it. He arrived quickly and did excellent work for a reasonable price.

reviews.author: Rheddy Setgo
reviews.text:
Jose was very thorough with his work. Highly recommended! He worked on our Noritz for 4 hours to descale, clean filter and troubleshoot the problem that cropped up in between. The previous company that installed our Noritz didn’t install a local shutoff valve, glad Jose recommended we did that. Thank you!
He showed us how to clean and descale ourselves, he said it’ll save $300 per year. Not sure we’ll have time so we will likely get him to do it for us when it’s time. Great communication and very timely. No need to call anyone else, choose JC!

reviews.author: Sharif M
reviews.text: The owner of this business does not respond to messages over a week that I left. I have been calling him each day to get some clarification on the water heater that he suggested me to buy from a supplier. I had called him many times each day, which is ridiculous that he never had a courtesy to respond to one of my messages. Good thing I did not hired him and today I had to hire another plumber.  I will not recommend this business.

reviews.author: S M.
reviews.text: Horrible experience with trying to get hold of this business after initial conversation with the owner of the business for a water heater replacement. I had called him many times over a week now and left many messages as I had a question on the water heater before I purchased it from the supplier. He didnot returned any of my calls and nor did he texted. He doesnot have good business ethic as I have been waiting for a week. Good thing I didnot had this experience after the installation was completed and when I had any issues with my water heater. I decided to hire another company to do the job and who are responsive and helpful. I will definitely not recommend this company.

reviews.author: Daron C.
reviews.text:
Guys....not to be confused with J.C. Plumbing AND Rooter...they are separate companies??? eesh....

WHOA! May have just found my plumber for life. My renter in the basement's sump pump malfunctioned on Friday afternoon and as a result, she couldn't use the toilet because it would back up (nothing was getting pumped up and, well, you know...). I called the plumber who installed it and he wasn't available until Monday morning (which turned to Monday at 11:30 am). This plumber came and took a look at it and said there's grease built up inside it and that he couldn't remove it because he doesn't do grease removals. 

I called around to SIX (6!) different companies and almost no one could do it because it was a septic tank with grease except for one septic tank specialist company (A1 in Hayward) who wanted to charge me $1000 (!!!!) to clean it (seriously WTF b/c the whole sump pump and installation cost $950 two years ago). 

But I didn't give up. Luck number 7 company that I called I found on google who ranked first (I forget what I googled...something with septic tanks). 

1) Jose the owner picked up the phone EVEN WHEN HIS WIFE WAS SCHEDULED FOR C-SECTION later on in the day (Grats on your new baby Jose!!!...can't wait to see the pics!)  Seriously...who does this.

2) He was calm, knowledgeable, and came up with an innovative solution to clean the sump pump that honestly no one other company offered as a solution.

3) He sent his brother over just a few hours later and he quickly, cleanly, and professionally completed the job as described! 

4) $225 out the door (WUT!) ...I've never been happier spending $225! 

THANKS JOSE! I'm using you guys again in the future! Highly, highly recommend!

reviews.author: Antonette F.
reviews.text:
I would urge others to be cautious when considering this company. They were performing services at our neighbor's home when an incident occurred involving my husband's company van, which was parked in front of our side street parking.

From our front window, I observed one of the workers repeatedly pushing and pulling my husband's van side mirror back and forth. The movement triggered the van's alarm. If the alarm had not gone off, the mirror could have potentially been damaged.

I immediately called the company as they were leaving, but my calls were disconnected multiple times. I also sent a text message but did not receive a response.

Later, the owner of the company communicated to our neighbor that the mirror was only being folded in because the vehicle was parked too close and that no damage was caused.

At the end of the day, it would have been more professional to simply acknowledge what happened and take responsibility instead of avoiding communication. This behavior is extremely unprofessional and unacceptable.

For transparency, our RING cameras captured the incident from three different angles. We are happy to share the footage with anyone who would like to see what occurred.

reviews.author: Mabel Orellana
reviews.text: I had a great experience with this company. I called them and asked about their prices, they were the first plumbing company I had contacted that was upfront and transparent with their pricing. They had someone come out that same day to help me with my problem. The person that came was very professional and really tried to solve my issue communicating with me every step of the way before moving forward. Previously I had a different plumbing company Mr. DRAIN come out to unclogg my septic pipe and they didn't unclogg it at all and where trying to charge me $12,000 to supposedly replace some pipes that where broken. Can you imagine the relief I felt when this  company actually unclogged my pipes and charged me a fair price and re assured me my pipes where in fact not broken at all. They even suggested calling the city to check the clean out which I did and was part of the problem because when they came out they did a big clean outnof their pipes as well. I never leave reviews and much less this long but I feel the need for people to know how shady plumbing companies can be however this one right here is not they were very honest and amazing at what they do.

reviews.author: S L (SuZL)
reviews.text:
JC is awesome. Best communication of any service person in my experience, quick response, fair rates, excellent follow-through, deep knowledge, long experience, clean, polite, and very clear and detailed explanations about problems, solutions, and charges. Highly, highly recommended. Plumbing problems are no fun, but JC made it all as painless as possible.

We had a tricky kitchen sink clog. Jose went step by step from the simplest possible fix on and on through to the second-most-complicated, which we chose over the most-complicated. We were able to make that decision confidently because of Jose's clear and detailed explanations about the house's entire plumbing system. He also determined all the causes of the clog, so we can reduce the risk of the problem coming back. Along the way he diagnosed and fixed some minor problems and worked with us to limit disruptions.

First time out we were scheduled late in the day, so he got delayed, but he communicated clearly about it. Second time out he came hours early.

No photos or videos because nobody needs to see that. Chhiii!!!

reviews.author: Amanda Serenyi
reviews.text: I could not be more impressed with Jose.  He’s responsive, thorough, knowledgeable, and reasonably priced.  I first worked with him on a warranty call to replace part of my water heater that the company had provided.  He came with a trainer and patiently talked both of us through his diagnostics and replacement steps.  Then, a week later when we noticed our sewer clean out had overflowed in the wake of recent storms, he came out and used some pretty powerful tools to first clear the clog and then to run a camera through the pipes to help us both understand our system.  He took several photos along the way and was eager to explain everything he saw and  answer all my questions.  Throughout, and in a detailed follow up invoice/summary, he gave specific advice on how to follow up with our builder and the city when we encountered items they should address.  I will not hesitate to contact him again with the next plumbing/sewer related issue.  He’s a model for all tradesmen—trustworthy, a genuine teacher, and a pleasure to work with.

reviews.author: Denny Chan
reviews.text: I recently switched my home insurance to farmers and one of their new requirements to get discount is to install a flo by moen smart shut off valve by the main water supply. I started my research online and I found JC plumbing. I reached out to Jose and he asked for more details about my house and water main. I didn’t have any pictures on me at that time and nobody was home, so he went up my place with my approval to check out the water valve and gave me a free estimate. He discovered a few issues such water pressure was too high and water valve leak. He suggested that I would save money by buying the smart valve off Amazon instead of thru him. I got my flo by moen a week later and I scheduled Jose and his crew to come do the installation. Jose and his crew did amazing work. They kept the front of the house tidy despite having to dig down two inches to replace new pipe.  They kept me updated on the progress of the installation whole time he was there. I attached some pictures of the before and after. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Marmar Goat Lady
reviews.text: VERY GOOD experience. You don't want a mediocre or bad experience with a plumber. My Navien tankless water heater suddenly had something wrong with the heating cycle. I looked at the Navien website for authorized repairs and installers and called 3 in the area.  2 never replied, Jose at JC was very prompt. He was here within a day, diagnosed the problem with Navien tech-support, the problem was a Check valve that needed to be replaced. He ordered the part locally and came back installed it. His final bill for services was $100 less than his initial quote. He kept his workspace tidy, cleaned  everything up before he left. He reminded me his services include Repairing and installing all sorts of Hot water systems, including tankless, and any plumbing problems including rooter service.  He can repair or replace your toilet and faucets. I will definitely use Jose again, and have recommended him to family and friends. I do not think you will be disappointed.

reviews.author: Stephen Whelan
reviews.text: JC Plumbing is absolutely amazing!!! Jose is the owner - he is very talented and reasonably priced. My sewer pump was running constantly. I called on Monday (Memorial Day), he showed up Tuesday afternoon to investigate the problem, then he showed up on Wednesday morning with the parts. Instead of jumping into jetting the line, he used his camera and checked the line. The line was in great condition, so he replaced a faulty check valve, cleaned the tank, checked the system and was complete in less than one hour. I can't say enough good things about JC Plumbing & Rooter's timeliness, quality of service, and fair pricing! He will be my "go to" plumber for ALL of my plumbing needs in the future! I forgot to mention how prompt Jose was. He told me that he would arrive at 10:00am to perform the repair work, he arrived at 9:55am!

reviews.author: Steve W.
reviews.text: JC Plumbing is absolutely amazing!!! Jose is the owner - he is very talented and reasonably priced. My sewer pump was running constantly. I called on Monday (Memorial Day), he showed up Tuesday afternoon to investigate the problem, then he showed up on Wednesday morning with the parts. Instead of jumping into jetting the line, he used his camera and checked the line. The line was in great condition, so he replaced a faulty check valve, cleaned the tank, checked the system and was complete in less than one hour. I can't say enough good things about JC Plumbing & Rooter's timeliness, quality of service, and fair pricing! He will be my "go to" plumber for ALL of plumbing needs in the future! I forgot to mention how prompt Jose was. He told me that he would arrive at 10:00am to perform the repair work, he arrived at 9:55am!

reviews.author: Christine S.
reviews.text: I cannot say enough good things about JC. The first time I called him, I was frantic and stressed out looking for any available plumber to fix the leak under my sink as I had a planned delivery from Home Depot for a new dishwasher in a couple of hours. Somehow I was fortunate to call  him after reading some reviews on yelp and he was at my place fixing the problem with time to spare before my new dishwasher arrived. He also made sure they installed my dishwasher correctly and helped us with a with an unrelated cabinet issue. When my garbage disposal started leaking, I immediately called him Sunday evening and he had fixed Monday morning. He is punctual, professional, responsive, honest, and just an all around good guy. Highly recommend him to anyone in need of a plumber!

synthesis.summary: Jose shows up fast, explains everything clearly, and charges fair prices—but he's sometimes hard to reach after the initial contact, which could be a problem in emergencies.
strengths: BBB Accredited with A+ rating and zero complaints over 3 years—strong trust signal for licensed, insured work.
Exceptional response time on initial contact: 15+ Google reviews explicitly mention same-day or next-day arrival, often arriving early or within hours of calling.

Transparent pricing and honest diagnostics: 20+ reviewers praise upfront quotes and willingness to recommend cheaper solutions (e.g., buying smart valve on Amazon instead of markup) or repair instead of replacement.
weaknesses: Communication breakdown after job booking: 2 Yelp reviews (out of 7) report Jose not returning calls/texts for days despite multiple attempts, creating uncertainty before service. Contradicts 'Great Communicator' badge claim.

One report of unprofessional incident handling: Yelp review documents worker moving neighbor's van mirror without acknowledgment, then Jose avoided direct communication when called—only relayed response through neighbor instead of addressing homeowner directly.
redFlags: 2 of 7 Yelp reviewers report non-responsiveness to follow-up calls/texts over days after initial contact or quote—significantly higher complaint rate on Yelp (29%) vs Google (2 of 94 = 2%). Suggests communication issues surface post-booking.
1 Yelp review documents alleged unprofessional handling of incident (worker touching neighbor's vehicle without acknowledgment, then owner avoided direct communication when confronted).
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Jose personally answers phones and schedules same-day emergency calls (multiple mentions of 'called Friday, fixed Tuesday'; one review shows he picked up even during his wife's C-section). However, post-booking communication gaps could delay follow-ups on multi-visit jobs.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Google 4.9/5 (115 reviews) vs Yelp 3.9/5 (7 reviews)—significant 1.0-point gap. Yelp contains 2 one-star reviews citing communication/responsiveness issues and 1 one-star incident report not visible in Google reviews. Suggests negative experiences may cluster on Yelp or be filtered/removed on Google. BBB zero-complaint record does not align with Yelp communication complaints; may indicate complaints not escalated to BBB or customers resolved offline.

plumbers.name: K.B.I Sewer & Drainage
plumbers.address: 2016 W Indian Ridge Dr, Johnsburg, IL 60051, USA

reviews.author: PermablockTank - FukCal51
reviews.text: Keith and his crew were awesome. They replaced a section of sewer line under my basement floor. Right on time. Super polite. Kept me informed the whole time. Oh, and the work is top notch. Definitely recommend these guys.

reviews.author: Ashleigh Holley
reviews.text: KBI was super respectful and professional when they came to install our new water heater. We had bought our own water heater and had them install it for us. Keith Jr. was so nice and respectful. He did a great job on the installation and even ran out to get a drip pan that we had requested. The price was very reasonable and way less than I expected. We will be using them for all our plumbing needs in the future!

reviews.author: James Kutz
reviews.text:
I had a Sunday afternoon backup of sewage in my basement floor drain. I called and spoke to Keith Jr., who made it by the same day within a couple hours. He talked me through the process and accurately quoted me the cost over the phone. A couple hours later, my sewage line was flowing again. He provided me with some long term solutions and estimates regarding the coming months/years so that I could begin planning for similar issues in the future. He was kind, patient, informative, and diligent considering I needed his services on a Sunday evening. Based on my research, his pricing was very competitive considering the time of the week.

Thank you Keith Jr.!

reviews.author: Jon G
reviews.text: Owner Keith and his team did a wonderful job. Modern equipment , honest, knowledgeable, and great work.  I had drainage issue.  Came out right away for a free estimate.  Access wasn't easy but he showed me using a camera exactly what was going on and offered alternatives.  Keith took care of working with the village and identifying all the lines.  His pricing was good and fair.  The work was done as quickly as possible and was quality work.  Cleaned up everything nicely.  I will use them again and recommend them to everyone.

reviews.author: Jeffrey Bautch
reviews.text: We needed a sewer lateral in our basement repaired and Keith from KBI Plumbing came out immediately to give us a free estimate, which was a great deal more reasonable than the previous contractor had quoted. They were right on time the day the work was scheduled to be done. Their crew was very polite and did a fantastic job. They cleaned everything up, it was left spotless! I would HIGHLY RECOMMEND them! They did an excellent job and were very reasonably priced.

synthesis.summary: K.B.I Sewer & Drainage demonstrates excellent emergency responsiveness and reliability, with Keith Jr. providing same-day Sunday service for sewage backups. All reviews highlight professional service, fair pricing, and quality workmanship, making them a strong choice for emergency plumbing needs.
weaknesses: Limited review sample size
All reviews are 5-star (may lack balance)
synthesis.topQuote: I had a Sunday afternoon backup of sewage in my basement floor drain. I called and spoke to Keith Jr., who made it by the same day within a couple hours. He talked me through the process and accurately quoted me the cost over the phone.

plumbers.name: A&P Grease Trappers, Inc
plumbers.address: 801 N Raddant Rd, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: Kyle Stoffers
reviews.text: Highly Recommend A&P Grease Trappers for your business. Our technician, Bruce, was on time for our appointment and was not only extremely knowledgeable and helped us out with cleaning our grease trap, but he was also incredibly nice and personable. Bruce really went above and beyond our expectations and clearly and politely made recommendations for what we should do in the future. We hope to use A&P for our business again in the future.

reviews.author: Dawn Phillips
reviews.text: I have had great experience with this business from start to finish. They were efficient, knowledgeable, and clearly take pride in the work they do. Everything was handled smoothly and professionally, and I always felt like I was in good hands. It’s refreshing to deal with people who know what they’re doing and genuinely care about delivering great service. I’m very happy with the results and wouldn’t hesitate to use them again or recommend them to others!

reviews.author: Collin Dissette
reviews.text: First time using this company for my restaurants , absolutely fantastic experience by everyone I interacted with !!

reviews.author: Cesar Lopez
reviews.text:
Received a $675 bill to clean my grease trap after they were just there 2months ago.
Claimed I needed hydrojetting services, once they opened up the grease trap it showed the unit was only vacuumed out, the walls were left with 2-3” grease layer. After three years or business at $225 a clean out they offered me $125 off my next cleaning.
I’m sorry but that’s not good enough

reviews.author: Justina Pikor
reviews.text: They are always on schedule and do a great job cleaning our Grease Trap!  It is always clean after they leave too

synthesis.summary: A&P Grease Trappers specializes in commercial grease trap cleaning rather than residential plumbing emergencies. While they receive high marks for professionalism and scheduling reliability, there's a concerning complaint about incomplete work and overcharging that raises quality control questions.
weaknesses: Specializes in grease traps, not general plumbing
Quality control issues reported
Pricing disputes with customers
redFlags: Recent complaint about incomplete work despite full payment
Appears to focus on commercial grease trap services rather than emergency residential plumbing
synthesis.topQuote: Bruce really went above and beyond our expectations and clearly and politely made recommendations for what we should do in the future.
synthesis.worstQuote: Received a $675 bill to clean my grease trap after they were just there 2months ago. Claimed I needed hydrojetting services, once they opened up the grease trap it showed the unit was only vacuumed out, the walls were left with 2-3" grease layer.

plumbers.name: Redbeard Plumbing, LLC
plumbers.address: 431 Acadia Dr, Joppatowne, MD 21085, USA

reviews.author: DB Carey
reviews.text: These guys have a 5 star rating in all of their reviews for a reason.  I had an emergency situation and called Tuesday morning.  Fortunately for me they were finishing up a job nearby and were at my house in about 30 minutes.  They were able to diagnose the problem quickly, quoted me a price and started right away. They explained everything clearly as they were working and made suggestions about other things they noticed  (that didn't need immediate repair) as they went along. Sam & Donovan did great work and they will be the first I call in the future!

reviews.author: Sean Flanagan
reviews.text: Very knowledgeable and prompt. Great communication. Would definitely recommend!

reviews.author: christopher sigmon
reviews.text: On the Sunday between Christmas & New Year,  we woke up to no water.  The well pump needed replacing over 300 feet down.  Red Beard saved the day,  working WELL into the dark of a cold winter evening to restore the flow of water and give my sweet dog a fresh drink.

reviews.author: Jesete Martinez
reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of working with Redbeard Plumbing LLC  I couldn’t be more impressed with their professionalism and quality of work. From the moment I contacted them, their team was responsive, knowledgeable, and courteous.

The plumber arrived on time, equipped with all the tools needed, and quickly diagnosed the issue. They explained the problem clearly, offering practical solutions without any unnecessary upselling. The repair was completed efficiently, and the quality of work was outstanding.

What stood out most was their attention to detail and commitment to customer satisfaction. They left the work area spotless and ensured everything was functioning perfectly before leaving. Their pricing was transparent and fair, with no hidden fees.

I highly recommend Redbeard Plumbing LLC for any plumbing needs. It’s rare to find a company that combines expertise, reliability, and excellent customer service so seamlessly. I’ll definitely be calling them for any future plumbing projects!

reviews.author: Amy Wassum
reviews.text:
Used Yelp to locate a plumber for a possible in wall leak. Sam was the first plumber to respond so we connected and he came out within 2 hours. Extremely personable, knowledgeable and cost effective. He explained what he found, showed us and discussed the repair before moving forward. Since in the last year we had a new HVAC system and tankless water heater installed he also reviewed the BTU each used and looked at our gas meter to ensure it was compatible for the volume. He went out of his way which most don’t. I will continue to use Sam for all my plumbing issues. 1000% recommend 🎉 (2024)
Now March 2026 we had a pipe burst inside the interior wall on a Sunday evening. Called Sam to schedule him and he was able to come first thing in the morning (my choice). Kudos to him explaining what happened and going through the process to fix and options we had available. Also added a new turn of valve just for the outside pipe. I highly recommend this small business, Sam’s the man!

reviews.author: RzUp
reviews.text:
I contacted Redbeard Plumbing, LLC to repair an internal water pipe that was leaking and had caused a great deal of damage to my basement. I was in need of getting someone out fairly quickly bc my water had to be turned off to prevent further damage. I spoke with Sam and shortly after I was assigned a plumber who was scheduled to arrive within hour. Donovan arrived and immediately diagnosed the issue. He thoroughly explained and demostrated exactly what needed to be done.  He worked on the pipe inside, as well as changing the hose bib outside (despite having to walk through ice). Within a couple hours my repair was completed and I had running water again!
Donovan also provided information on options for future updates to some of my dated equipment which I appreciated. I highly recommend Redbeard Plumbing, from their customer service to their actual plumbing skill. I would definitely contact them again! Thank you!

reviews.author: Kiara T
reviews.text: After living in my home for 5 years, I realized that I should be getting my water heater flushed annually. I had no idea! Shout out to TikTok! I requested multiple quotes on Yelp and Thumbtack for a tankless water heater flush. Sam from Redbeard Plumbing was one of the individuals that contacted me about my inquiry. Contrary to what I expected, and what other companies did, Sam provided his honest opinion that I should NOT get a flush done because I had not maintained my heater. He provided a thorough explanation as to why, and answered all of my questions. Even though I technically did not get any service, I am writing a 5 star review because this is the type of company we need to keep in business! I appreciate your honesty. Thank you, Sam!

reviews.author: Keniesha
reviews.text: Sam came out and provided an estimate and although we haven't decided on moving forward as of yet it wasn't because of the experience that was provided. Sam is very knowledgeable and you can tell he has a strong passion for his line of work. I thank him for taking his time to come out and look at our problem and even if we don't move forward at this very time that is not bc of our experiencw with the company. We would  consider him in the future for sure if not today! It is important to have people who do not try and get over you and will give you honest information. So again Sam thank you for taking your time to provide your service. We will be in touch!

reviews.author: Eric Warth
reviews.text:
My water heater finally gave in to its battle with old age and started leaking which was why I reached out to Sam at RedBeard Plumbing. He gave me a call same day(on a Sunday) to get some more info and since I knew it was time to replace he was able to give me a quick quote on what I needed. The price was fair and I agreed to have him do the work.

Sam was there the next next day to replace my water heater and did an excellent job. He was very knowledgeable and had no problem answering all my questions. I hired Redbeard to do some additional work on my house and based on my experience would certainly recommend them for anyone in need of plumbing services!

reviews.author: Robyn Zumbrun
reviews.text:
This is the second time recently that we used Redbeard Plumbing for our business. They answer the phone promptly, there is a friendly,  helpful voice on the other end. Both times they have been able to come to our establishment within an hour or so to do the work. They have come prepared, they are efficient, friendly, thorough and cost effective. I plan to use their services in my personal home. Thank you for your great work!
Adding on to this. We used Redbeard for another toilet leak at the business location. Great response, same day service, professionally done. Very affordable and highliother potential upgrades for the future. Thank you.

reviews.author: Mighty Quinn
reviews.text: My name is actually Rick M. I used RedBeard to resolve a water pressure problem at my home. Sam from RedBeard diagnosed the problem and explained the solution. We discussed the solution and he realized we also turn off the water for vacations. Sam gave suggestions and choices (no up-sale pressure just information, very pleasant). The solution I chose was completed quickly and expertly with no mess left behind. I would use RedBeard Plumbing again and strongly refer them to any friend or neighbor.

reviews.author: Cal Caliburnus
reviews.text: True to name, red beard. Sam was knowledgeable and experienced. He was cleanly, professional, friendly, prompt, and equipped to do the job. I had botched a dyi attempt to snake my drain to septic. He quickly removed my rental equipment without damage and cleared the drain, offering up possible future issues I could be facing and options to deal with it should they arise. Cost was pricey but no more expensive than any other mechanic/plumber on the market. I was pleased with the service.

reviews.author: S. Anne
reviews.text: So far, so good! We had a mess of a leak, a split copper pipe behind the sink and dishwasher. The owner came out and evaluated, let us know the price ahead of time, scheduled the appointment, and finished the work in one quick go with an additional employee, and they cleaned up afterwards. Pricing was very reasonable. We're happy with the work. Will update if there are changes, but don't anticipate any. We will probably be using them again in the future.

reviews.author: dolores montague
reviews.text: We had an emergency after hours. I am fairly new to the area and don’t have any established home repair contacts. I called multiple contractors that I had seen given kudos on our town neighborhood app. Sam was the only one that directly answered his phone. He was so nice and easy to talk to. He came over and stopped the emergency and will be back tomorrow morning with the parts needed. I will add him to my contacts for any future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: John Sullivan
reviews.text:
After our usual plumber left us in a pinch in an urgent situation on a Saturday evening, I cold called Redbeard plumbing and I'm glad I did.

They were responsive and pleasant which are not typical in my experience of any contractor on off hours.

He was put to the property quickly and had the issue resolved fast.

I will be happy to use them again in the future.

synthesis.summary: Sam at Redbeard shows up fast even on weekends and holidays, explains everything clearly, and refuses to upsell unnecessary work — reviewers consistently praise his honesty over his speed.
strengths: Emergency responsiveness: 12+ reviews explicitly mention same-day or next-day service, including weekend/holiday availability (Sunday evening pipe burst, Christmas week well pump replacement, Saturday evening drain backup)

Transparent pricing and honest recommendations: 8+ reviews highlight fair pricing without upselling; notably, one reviewer gave 5 stars even though Sam advised against a service (tankless water heater flush) because maintenance hadn't been done
Clear communication and education: 15+ reviews mention Sam explaining the problem, offering options, discussing alternatives, and teaching homeowners about their systems
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Strong after-hours availability confirmed: responded to calls on Sunday evenings, Christmas week, Saturday nights, and one reviewer notes Sam answered his phone directly when other contractors did not. Multiple reviews mention next-day or same-day emergency service.

plumbers.name: SPG Plumbing, Drain and Sewer Gurnee
plumbers.address: 3838 Grandview Ave, Gurnee, IL 60031, USA

reviews.author: Manuel Rivera
reviews.text: I contacted Sam at SPG to quote a water heater replacement. After getting bids from two big box stores and two independent contractors.  I selected SPG because they provided more new heater options and a very competitive cost. Sam scheduled the installation and secured my selected heater that same day.  The plumbers, Massimo and Kevin, were super professional and did an excellent job of getting the heater up to my condo and installed, without any damage to the new heater or the condo.  I deeply appreciated their service and friendly attitude. Overall, SPG was responsive, professional, and committed to customer service. I hope this review will help others in need of similar services.

reviews.author: Mike Jose
reviews.text:
If you’re looking for Plumbing Drain Sewer services, you need to avoid SPG!
They SPG charge to you before they start to provide service, which means you have to pay full price first even if they don’t get work done properly.
They SPG charged me $1000 but couldn’t not fix my plumbing pipe. They SPG did not refund neither!

reviews.author: Alyse Black
reviews.text: Really great experience! They answered quickly on a Sunday during a snowstorm and came out that morning. Kevin was our guy and he did great work. Even helped clean up after he finished. Super nice, reasonably priced and very prompt!! Would absolutely recommend and use again!

reviews.author: Steve Paul
reviews.text:
Leaking angle valves and faucet needed to be replaced before becoming a big mess.
Massimo did a wonderful job, quick and efficient at a reasonable cost.
Will use SPG plumbing again. Thanks for the help!

reviews.author: Liviu Soneriu
reviews.text:
Excellent Service from SPG Plumbing!
​I recently had an issue with a leaky faucet and called SPG Plumbing based on a recommendation. I'm so glad I did! From the moment I called, they were professional and friendly. They scheduled a technician to come out the very next day, which was a huge relief.
​The technician arrived on time and was incredibly knowledgeable. He quickly diagnosed the problem and explained the repair process to me in a way that was easy to understand. He had all the necessary parts with him and fixed the leak efficiently, leaving the work area spotless.
​I was very impressed with the quality of their work and their excellent customer service. The price was fair and transparent, with no hidden fees. I highly recommend SPG Plumbing for any plumbing needs. They've definitely earned a loyal customer in me!

synthesis.summary: SPG Plumbing shows strong technical skills and excellent emergency response, including same-day service during storms. However, one serious complaint about payment practices and incomplete work raises concerns about consistency and refund policies.
weaknesses: Payment disputes reported
Inconsistent service quality
Potential refund issues
redFlags: Customer reports paying $1000 upfront with no refund for incomplete work
synthesis.topQuote: They answered quickly on a Sunday during a snowstorm and came out that morning. Kevin was our guy and he did great work. Even helped clean up after he finished. Super nice, reasonably priced and very prompt!!
synthesis.worstQuote: They SPG charge to you before they start to provide service, which means you have to pay full price first even if they don't get work done properly. They SPG charged me $1000 but couldn't not fix my plumbing pipe. They SPG did not refund neither!

plumbers.name: Big Smile Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3115 Beaumont Ave, Oakland, CA 94602, USA

reviews.author: abby b
reviews.text: Rolando was so sweet and amazing, and came to access the situation quickly. He was very understanding and helpful. He gave us tips on how to prevent any future cloggings as well! He was fast but the quality was amazing.

reviews.author: Connie Tremblay
reviews.text: Rolando and team showed up on time and were easy and pleasant to communicate with. They took care of my issue immediately. I am very happy with the service.

reviews.author: Linda Vu
reviews.text: I called around 6pm to set up an appt for a quote. Rolando was able to come within minutes (just so happened to be nearby), gave me a quote and immediately started work. Kitchen sink faucet replacement so I can attach my portable dishwasher. Rolando was professional, skillful, and stayed through the end to make sure my dishwasher was functioning properly. It took about an hour to finish the job, and Rolando was friendly too. Would recommend and use this company again!

reviews.author: Kyra Dempsey
reviews.text: We had water leaking into our half-basement from under a wall, within a few minutes Rolando had found where it was coming from, told us what we could and couldn't use, and even helped us clean up after a test sent more water into our house. Within two days he and his brother Juan had dug a big hole and found a pipe clogged at a sharp angle that had back-flowed into a disused drain line that had been obsoleted during an ancient remodel. They fixed the pipe, capped off the disused line, and even reset our sump pump, which they discovered had been turned off inadvertently. Payment was a total breeze. And Rolando did it all with a big smile on his face, as advertised. Couldn't have asked for a better experience!

reviews.author: Karyl Anne Dimaculangan
reviews.text:
A few months ago, I moved into an apartment in an old building. Though it is very spacious and airy—along with the charms of this older unit, came a sleuth of plumbing issues 😅

Cue Rolando from Big Smile Plumbing to the rescue! I’ve worked with him about 3-4x now, and each time Rolando was not only professional, but he was also friendly and a pleasure to work with!

He even helped expedite a repair for an unknown sewage problem that we discovered when he was working on a completely different repair (roof leak).

Rolando lives up to the company name and always delivers great service with a big smile 😊

Definitely recommend his services to everyone in need of a plumbing hero!

reviews.author: Jen Jackson
reviews.text: Rolando communicated quickly on a Saturday with us to schedule for first thing Monday. In the meantime, we were able to install our water heater ourselves but needed help w a valve and getting the pilot started. He came in the scheduled window, checked our work and showed us how to do the pilot ourselves for the future. He installed the shutoff valve we asked for, all quickly and with good communication up front about costs. I wish it had been less money, but it was similar in price to others and we had an excellent experience! Rolando said he has electricians on staff, too, so we will definitely call Big Smile for both plumbing and electrical in the future!

reviews.author: L XW
reviews.text:
Great pricing, quality install and easy service!

I was in a tight bind when my 20+ year water heater broke Thanksgiving week. After four different plumbing inspections, I chose Big Smile, while each plumber suggested similar plans, Rolando’s quote was reasonable - lower mark up and addressed truly necessary needs.

Rolando and his team were quick, diligent and communicative - easy and patient with follow up and questions. Inspection was thorough with practical suggestions and keeping coding needs in mind. I needed a new water heater and Rolando able to install, brace and replace needed piping in a few hours. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Alvin Llaneza
reviews.text:
Rolando was such an amazing worker. He is so nice and so understanding and knowledgeable.
He explained everything into detail with a smile on his face even though he had just came out of the crawl space with dirty hands and hair and always answered all my questions and concerns.
He assured me that the work will get done properly. During the repair, one of the pipes broke and he did not charge me extra for the replacement. When I told him that I did not have the budget to upgrade certain things he helped me stay within my budget. I would highly recommend Rolando and his team for furure plumbing repairs. Thanks again guys!

reviews.author: MS
reviews.text: Pretty happy with the service I got from Rolando.  He responds to messages quickly and communicates well, so it was a breeze to get him in quickly and have him get started on everything he needed to do.  Had him install several items and re-plumb under my kitchen sink with a waste drain that's higher than it should be, and he got everything running smoothly.  He also kept my house clean in the area he was working in, put down tarp and brought shoe covers, which not every plumber is conscientious enough to do.  Will definitely have him back for future jobs.

reviews.author: Susan Moffat
reviews.text: Big Smile did a great job replacing our sewer lateral. Their communication was prompt and clear, Rolando had great attention to detail on the site and did a neat and clean job, always explaining things fully (and as advertised, with a big smile!). Ricardo at the office also communicated well via email. Their price was significantly lower than three other bids I got. All of this was a relief after a previous experience hiring another plumber for the sewer lateral inspection where the coordination and follow-through were poor.

reviews.author: Phil Robinson
reviews.text: I feel very lucky that when I had a plumbing emergency I called Big Smile Plumbing. Rolando was prompt, polite, professional and very thorough. Our building is old and he had to crawl into a tight space to determine and fix our problem. He walked me through what needed to be done and ensured I had the documentation necessary for my HOA to cover the costs. His prices are also very fair. I will absolutely call Big Smile Plumbing anytime I need plumbing work done.

reviews.author: Adam Miller
reviews.text: Rolando is the best plumber for real. He’s so friendly and helpful! I thought my shower drain was clogged, and he came over and fixed the issue immediately. It took him literally a minute to fix my issue, and because of that, he didn’t even charge me for his time! I’m definitely going to call him back next time I have a real issue! The least I can do is write a kind review because he deserves all the plumbing business. Hire him!

reviews.author: Sarah Cole
reviews.text: Ronaldo has come to fix plumbing issues in my apt multiple times and is absolutely wonderful. He always communicates when he is on his way, arrives promptly, and truly greets me with a big smile. He’s quick and efficient and always tries to get things done the same day even if he needs additional parts. He’s so nice and always communicates what he is doing. I highly recommend Ronaldo at Big Smile Plumbing!

reviews.author: Hansoo Kim
reviews.text: Rolando from Big Smile Plumbing came by and fixed both of our toilets—absolutely fantastic experience! He was incredibly friendly, cheerful, and worked with a smile the whole time. Not only was he fast and efficient, but the repairs were done perfectly. Everything’s working great now. If I ever have another plumbing issue, I’ll definitely be calling Big Smile Plumbing again. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Cheryl Webb
reviews.text: Our front load washer pushed water out faster than the drain capability so drain was enlarged but also reconfigured to avoid backup into bathroom sink. So happy to have found Rolando of BigSmile Plumbing and have this work done. His knowledge and plumbing experience made him a pleasure to work with. Next time I won’t wait so long to give him a call.

synthesis.summary: Rolando shows up fast, fixes it right, and actually seems happy to be there—77 Google reviews all 5 stars with zero complaints anywhere.
strengths: Exceptional same-day and next-day availability: 12+ reviews explicitly mention same-day service, Saturday/Sunday availability, or coming within hours of the call, including midnight emergencies
Transparent pricing and honest work: 8+ reviews specifically praise fair quotes, no surprise charges, staying within estimates, and choosing repairs over replacements to save customers money

Consistent professionalism and communication: 15+ reviews mention clear explanations, keeping homeowners informed of ETA, responsiveness to callbacks, and attention to cleanliness (shoe covers, tarps)
synthesis.emergencyNotes: 10+ reviews confirm willingness to respond to after-hours emergencies (midnight leak, Saturday morning calls within hours); consistently delivers same-day diagnostics and repairs for urgent plumbing failures like water heaters, burst pipes, and sewer backups.

plumbers.name: Oakland Rooter Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1614 Fruitvale Ave, Oakland, CA 94601, USA

reviews.author: Adi S.
reviews.text:
Straightforward, honest and professional.  Will showed up for the free consultation within 30 minutes from the time I called. He quoted me a fair price and explained the work that would get done -- promising that there will be no charge if they couldn't fix it issue! 

I chose to get more items fixed because of his demeanor and transparency. The work and verification took much longer than we both expected. Yet, true to their word I was only charged the amount quoted. 

I already plan to get more work done through this business. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Dave S.
reviews.text: Easy phone call to a responsive human, showed up on time, estimate given, problem fixed!

reviews.author: John G.
reviews.text: We got the run around from another plumbing company shortly before Christmas.  We had a leaking drain beneath our kitchen sink.  By the time I had realized that I was getting nowhere with the other company, it was Christmas Day.  I called Oakland Rooter and left a voice message.  Within 10 minutes I received a text informing me that they were closed (which I expected) but could schedule someone for the next morning.  They told me someone would be at our house between 9 and 11 AM.  Gil arrived at 9:15 and after I showed him the problem area he gave us an estimate saying he could finish the repair that day but would need to go to the store first.  The price seemed fair and to be honest we were getting desperate by that time.  (The other plumbing co. failed to show up on Christmas Eve as promised).  Gil went to the store for the supplies he needed and returned, working non stop until he finished after 3 PM.  He did a great job and even did a little extra work on our cabinet that was water damaged.  The price charged was the same as his estimate.  It is such a relief to have our kitchen sink usable again as we had Christmas dinner on paper plates and clean up was done in the bathtub.  I highly recommend Oakland Rooter & Plumbing.  They came through for us when we really needed it!  Photo is of old pipe over 100 yrs. old that was replaced.

reviews.author: Amy S.
reviews.text:
I called Oakland Rooter and Plumbing at 8:30am on Saturday morning because my smart toilet bidet had stopped flushing completely. Because it is a smart toilet, and only 6 months old, I wanted a professional to fix this issue. I made a point of telling them it's a tankless smart toilet bidet to ensure they had experience with them. I know I'm one of many that have opted for the tankless smart toilet, so I assumed they could work on them, and the dispatcher said as much. Until today, I have had zero issues with it. 

The technician arrived on time, diagnosed the issue as a clog, and said he needed to use the auger. Now, any Google search will tell you not to use a standard drain auger on a smart toilet. It will scratch the porcelain. So, I assumed since I called a professional plumbing  company that the technician would have a toilet auger. This is super important because toilet augers, unlike standard drain augers, are wrapped to protect the porcelain coating on a toilet. 

The technician unclogged the toilet in minutes and was finished and out of my home within 30 minutes. I thought, amazing work! However, after he left I inspected the toilet and noticed small flecks of debris down around the bottom of the toilet drain, I don't know the term for this, but it's the hole that everything goes down when you flush. Point is, the auger that was used scratched the porcelain coating up horribly. 

I'm extremely unhappy and will be calling the company. If you have a smart toilet, I'd call another company.

reviews.author: Janice F.
reviews.text: Please price around before you take there price. I feel that they are dishonest. Some guy from this company quoted me 1200 for a small leak. I call Mauro's plumbing and the quote was 280.

reviews.author: Joey M.
reviews.text:
Elaine Benes: "Different pipes go to different places! You're gonna mix 'em up!" 
George Costanza: "I'll call a plumber right now!"

-Seinfeld

Da Scene:  This time it was a faulty p-trap under the kitchen sink, slow drip leak flooded the cabinet bottom spilled onto the hardwood floors overnight., not a great wake up to a Saturday morning.  Hand tightening the nuts didn't help so YELP! to the rescue.  Contacted our friends at Oakland Rooter & Plumbing via the messaging/quote function. They arrived on site early Sunday morning...

Da Work:   We've had several jobs done by this team over the past 2 years, all with fine results:

- Toilet replacement and drain cleaning
- Kitchen sink faucet/fixture replacement
- Run/route gas lines for new stove and oven
- Another toilet replacement and bidet installation (LOVE the bidet, gonna have them back to install them on the other toilets).

A quick inspection of the leak and a replacement of the p-trap was needed, wasn't the nut/s but a crack in the pipe.  Technician had the parts and was done in an hour, would've taken me 1/2 a day for sure!

Da Service: 

-Good communications from initial contact through job completion.  Was kept informed on work, changes, cost, timeline throughout.
-Courteous and tidy (boot coverings, masks, gloves, left the work site clean)
-Skilled technicians completed work with excellent results and pretty quickly

While it was different technicians each time, they have been consistently excellent, this shows me that it's a CULTURE of the company leadership from dispatch, to technicians, to back office - they care about doing a great job and keeping their customers happy - even gave me a break on this job as a repeat customer.  Quality, Customer Service, Value... I'll call them 1st every time!

reviews.author: Eva L.
reviews.text:
An overdue review. Woke up on a Sunday morning with multiple leak notifications so my husband had to shut off the main water outside the house. We called our usual plumber but he wasn't available on Sunday. I searched the web, called around and found Oakland Rooter on Yelp which also boasts high ratings and solid reviews. I called and a gentleman picked up, he was able to send someone out to take a look for no cost with same day service (keep in mind, this happened to be on a Sunday.) 

Shortly after, the assigned plumber, Gil called and was able to stop by the house within the hour. We explained the situation and he ran some diagnostics to figure out the exact location of the leak. Ultimately, he informed us that the entire water line from the main water meter to the house needs to be replaced from PVC to copper. He quoted us a price (labor and materials included) and it was fair, considering the cost of copper is high and this happened on a weekend. We agreed to have him perform the work and he started the job immediately. To make the process as efficient as possible, he also reached out to another plumber to help with the job.

They had to dig a big trench to get to the old water line in order to replace it with a copper line. The digging took awhile, they started the job at around 1 pm on Sunday, worked till 5:30 pm that day. Gil and his colleague returned on Monday at around 9 am and continued the digging. They were done at 1 pm with the job. Over 30 feet of the water line was replaced. Both plumbers finished the job as quickly as possible and left our front yard spotless. Fast and quality service, and price is reasonable, I am bookmarking them for all future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: A.
reviews.text:
I know it's weird to say you love a plumber, but I love this company.

The sewer main backed up to our house. Ugh. A charming young man named Eduardo Navarro arrived the next day, on a holiday weekend, and quickly assessed that we needed some major work done. He was able to return with a camera the next night and give us a very comprehensive review of the problem - roots had grown into the pipes, and he was able to pinpoint exactly where this had occurred in our yard, despite our not having a clean-out pipe.

He then offered no less than 3 suggestions, fully explaining them and their associated costs, all the while not being pushy about any of the solutions. He wanted to make sure we fully understood what was going on. Eduardo was so patient with us and explained everything so well as we slowly realized what needed to happen.

Because of the situation, he gave us a price break on the snaking, and later even added an extra service gratis because the problem ended up being two different areas of root breakthrough rather than one.

He worked all day, partly in the rain, barely taking a break. He showed us the damaged pipe once he reached it so we could fully understand the problem. He also showed us a future problem we will have (roots growing through the pipes, but under the street) that will require a different, more expensive plumber, but he assured us we didn't need that yet.

I would hire Eduardo again in a heartbeat. We felt informed, educated, safe, and respected throughout. We felt we got value for our money because we felt he wanted to do his best for us at the best price.

I highly recommend Eduardo and Oakland Rooter Plumbing.

reviews.author: Bernadette P.
reviews.text:
Just wanted to write a review to not only give Oakland Rooter a shoutout for having great technicians on their team as we've called them twice now to come fix issues at our house in San Leandro and for both instances the technician was very friendly and helpful, but to also specifically shoutout Jose M. who came by for repairs on 5/24/25. 

I have been having issues with Water Pressure in a couple of the bathrooms and I tried so many DIY fixes (Extra Pressurized Shower Heads etc.), but then I figured it might be due to the house having old piping so I called to get a diagnosis and hopefully a fix for the issue. 

Jose M. came out bright and early around 8:30am on 05/24/25 and ended up spending majority of the day working away at the issue. Throughout the day as he was working he was very kind and explained not only the issue to me in simple terms for me to understand, but also the different things he was trying to see if they would be a good work around for now as I was trying to steer away from replacing all the old piping at once. I was seriously so impressed and grateful at not only his tireless work ethic, but that he was willing to help me find a way to get the Water Pressure working a bit better even just for now. 

I am very grateful for the great service Jose M. provided to us and he even gave me a quote to change all the piping whenever I'm ready. Overall it was a 10/10 experience and I will be using Oakland Rooter and requesting Jose M. again for any other issues.

reviews.author: Kedar Korde
reviews.text: Just had a wonderful experience with Jose M. from Oakland Rooter. We had a backup in our shower and toilet after the washer drained. It hadn't happened before and the backup relieved itself, but we were still concerned that there was a clog/block somewhere downpipe of the shower. Jose came out and checked the cleanout pipe and recreated the same situation. Ran the shower, flushed the toilet while draining the washer. He showed me the cleanout and how there wasn't an apparent blockage anymore. All pipes were draining. He showed me how to check for a block if it were to happen again. If water isnt getting to the cleanout, you will know there is a block and that snaking is needed. He explained it using an analogy of veins and arteries and it made a lot of sense. I am not well-versed in plumbing and having a plumber explain how household plumbing works in a very easy to understand manner and without judgement made the whole thing a true learning experience. I can now explain to the family how we can all check to see if we have an issue with our drains and where it might be located now that Jose explained how/where to look. Jose and Oakland Rooter made what was a nerve-wracking situation into a stress-free one. I called at 9am to for the initial service and Jose was at the house at noon. Amazing customer service from phone to arrival to service.

reviews.author: Justen W.
reviews.text:
First, I wanna say that I ultimately went back to this company because they installed my tankless water heater and were really great to work with back in 2014.

But yesterday, when my very kind housekeeper pointed out that I had a leak under my kitchen sink, I went looking for a plumber, having not remembered Oakland Rooter straight away. I found them on Yelp, saw the great reviews and so decided to call them again.

First impressive thing was that they picked up the phone immediately. Next, the lady who helped me was professional and nice, and also had a same-day appointment within a two hour timeframe of when I was calling.

Daniel, their excellent service technician, called me to confirm he was on the way and arrived within 30 minutes of my initial call. He then diagnosed and fixed it within another 30 minutes. Daniel was professional, friendly, was happy to answer questions and did an overall great job. 

I'm not going to say it was cheap but what can you expect for same-day service fixing the problem immediately. It wasn't horribly expensive, though, relatively speaking. 

If I have another plumbing issue, you can be sure Oakland Rooter and Plumbing is going to be the first place. I call next time.

reviews.author: 俊傑 /Zachary
reviews.text:
I wish to give all my utmost compliments to ANDRES who showed up to help solve my plumbing problem in a lightning fast and super professional way.

Having been a landlord for years and owning different properties, I often have to deal with repair issues of any nature one can and cannot imagine.

Over the years, I have had countless unpleasant experiences with service providers, technicians, and repair companies of all shapes and sizes to a point I questioned myself repetitively why did I choose to own properties and also be a landlord !!  My life is all about constantly dealing with issues very painfully.

But, meeting ANDRES gave me renewed hope : )

I have got to say, having ANDRES helped me was the best repair experience I have had in many many years.  I truly wish that he does more than just plumbing work.  I would use ANDRES for any and every kind of work that he is capable of doing.  Because he is trustworthy, a person with integrity, has righteous principles and pride in what he does.

I know that I will NOT be getting a Mickey-Mouse-quality type repair and/or installation jobs out of ANDRES.

Of equal or more importance, you won't too : )

reviews.author: Abhinav Sharma
reviews.text:
Bought a 1928 house, and initially we wanted to get a few plumbing fixtures upgraded like shower head and adding dishwasher/refrigerator supplies.
Then with the help of Jose Sanchez(there are 7 Jose at Oakland Rooter so ask for the best one 😄),we found rusted galvanized steel pipes.
He didn't try to upsell and offered that he patched such pipes considering our budget constraints.
But then there would be multiple patchworks over several years down the line, so we decided to go for repiping.
The work involved replacing all the pipes and opening up drywall.
Jose Sanchez and team really deserve a shout-out for their promptness and clean work.
They guarantee their work, are licensed and a delight to work with(very respectful).
Jose and the team advised me on the best approach to everything plumbing and then some.
Lastly on prices, Jose provided the best quote I got and broke down the job by priority, and even offered drywall patching services.
Jose helped with our bathroom makeover by installing marble slabs around the bathtub.
Did I already mention that these people are a delight to work with?! :)
Thank you for such a professional job Jose!

reviews.author: Austin W.
reviews.text:
Yesterday morning, my wife and I noticed a leak in our downstairs bathroom and the ground was wet. We immediately searched around on Yelp for a plumber and Oakland Rooter & Plumbing was able to send somebody over within the hour.

When the plumber stopped by, he carefully assessed the situation and explained his thinking aloud. He walked us through all the steps that he would take in order to try to fix the problem and gave us a full rundown of our options as well as the cost for each of those options. I appreciated that this guy was very honest. Instead of recommending the most expensive option right off the bat, he told us what he would do if it were his house, and how he would proceed if it did not work.

I loved the thoroughness from start to finish. In the 40 minutes that the technician was on-site, he was able to unclog the back-up -- first trying with an auger and then using a traditional plunger. 

Getting a professional to stop by always feels a bit expensive but getting a same day appointment and the problem fixed right away is worth the peace of mind. Definitely would call up these guys again if I had another plumbing issue.

reviews.author: Allison Shore
reviews.text:
My bathtub/shower faucet decided to break late Friday afternoon before a long weekend (of course). The water was gushing out of the faucet and could not be turned off!! I called a few places recommended by friends and none could come out until the following Tuesday - yikes so much wasted water! Then on Sunday I decided to search yelp and found these amazing plumbers. I called on Sunday afternoon, and Ygnacio, the owner, answered immediately. After explaining my problem and doing a quick analysis over FaceTime, he confirmed he could send someone out to turn the water off, and then within an hour Alberto came to the rescue! Working with some challenging peculiarities of my situation, he quickly assessed and got the water off. So within maybe 2 hours of finding Oakland Rooter on yelp, on a Sunday, my issue was dealt with - and at an affordable price. No weekend overtime!

Additionally, Alberto was very respectful of my health (high risk for COVID) and property - he wore a mask at my request and shoe covers which I was so grateful for.

Honestly, these guys are awesome! Thanks Albeto and Ygnacio!

synthesis.summary: They show up same-day, fix it right, and don't try to upsell you—this is the plumber people call when they're desperate and relieved to find.
strengths: Same-day or next-day service: 40+ reviews explicitly mention same-day dispatch or arriving within hours of calling, including weekend emergencies

Honest pricing and no upselling: 15+ reviews praise competitive quotes, willingness to lower estimates, or refusing unnecessary work; one reviewer noted they were $3,000 under a competitor's quote on a sewer lateral
Staff accountability and follow-up: Multiple reviews (including one 1/5 that became 5/5) show management personally addressing complaints and resolving issues transparently
weaknesses: Pricing disputes on high-ticket jobs: 3 Yelp reviews report surprise quotes significantly above expected market rates ($350 for a simple faucet, $1,200 for a small leak vs. $280 elsewhere); one Google reviewer flagged 3x markup on an easy job

Inconsistent estimate accuracy: 1 Yelp review reported a technician didn't show at appointed time; another (Yelp 6/28/2025) describes damage to smart toilet porcelain from use of standard drain auger instead of toilet-specific tool—suggests potential quality control gaps on specialized jobs
redFlags: Pricing inconsistency on complex jobs: 3 reviews mention unexpectedly high quotes ($350 faucet, $1,200 leak) that appear to drop significantly when challenged; suggests estimate process may be anchored high rather than transparent

Potential quality control gap on specialized work: 1 Yelp review (6/28/2025) reports technician used standard drain auger on smart toilet, causing porcelain damage despite caller specifically mentioning smart toilet equipment; technician reportedly assured customer they had experience with these units

Address/service area inconsistency: 1 Google review (1/3/2025) reports Google Maps listing showed Oakland address but dispatch sent plumber from Hayward; confusion about actual service zone or listing accuracy
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple Sunday/evening/holiday emergency responses documented; owner Ygnacio personally answered calls outside business hours; 15+ reviews confirm same-day dispatch within 1–3 hours; one review shows 1-hour response on Christmas Day.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Google 4.9/5 (99 reviews) and Yelp 4.9/5 (100 reviews) are nearly identical, suggesting consistent customer experience across platforms. However, pricing complaints cluster slightly more on Yelp, and one Yelp review explicitly warns 'price around before you take their price'—a signal that initial quotes may not reflect final negotiated rates. BBB A+ with zero complaints over 14 years strongly supports overall legitimacy despite isolated pricing disputes.

plumbers.name: Michael Gardner Plumbing
plumbers.address: 16038 Vía Nueva, San Lorenzo, CA 94580, USA

reviews.author: L Bac
reviews.text:
Thankfully, Michael came out immediately after the call and that same day snaked the shower drain which was clogged.

He also addressed the slow running sink, replaced 2 faucet cartridges in the laundry sink, installed a new kitchen faucet, and even reconnected our garbage disposal before we even asked! There are probably even more things that I’m forgetting to mention.

He took the time to look at all the issues in our bathrooms, kitchen, garage, and outdoor plumbing. We really appreciate his professionalism and the several hours he spent fixing a variety of issues.

Thank you, Michael!

reviews.author: Stephen Uyeno
reviews.text: What a relief! And during the holidays too, when most are taking a break. Mike came out immediately (around half hour) and assessed our situation, and got to work. He was very thorough in his explanations so that we’d understand our options. I really appreciate his thoughtfulness and sincerity when it came to discussing the problem and how to address it. Will definitely call again and recommend to others!

reviews.author: Gareth Shannon
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Michael with his inspection of the plumbing in my crawl space. Michael was quick to respond and thorough. He followed up in his report with photos of the crawl space and provided a simple breakdown of the different options. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Advances Ludwig
reviews.text:
**Outstanding Plumbing Service by Michael Gardner Plumbing **

I recently had the pleasure of hiring Michael for a plumbing issue in my home, and I cannot recommend them highly enough. From start to finish, the service provided was nothing short of exceptional.

Firstly, Michael was incredibly prompt and professional. They arrived right on time and immediately assessed the situation with a keen eye for detail. Their expertise was evident as they quickly diagnosed the problem and explained the necessary repairs in a clear and concise manner.

What stood out most was the care and attention Michael showed throughout the entire process. They worked diligently and efficiently, ensuring that the job was completed to the highest standard. They also took the time to answer all my questions and offered helpful advice on preventing future issues.

The quality of the work was impeccable. Michael used top-notch materials and techniques, and it was clear that they take great pride in their craft. Additionally, they left the work area spotless, which was much appreciated.

In terms of value, the pricing was fair and transparent, with no hidden fees or surprises. I truly felt that I received excellent value for the quality of service provided.

Overall, Michael exceeded all my expectations. Their professionalism, expertise, and commitment to customer satisfaction were truly impressive. I will undoubtedly be calling them for any future plumbing needs and highly recommend them to anyone in need of a reliable and skilled plumber.

If you want peace of mind and outstanding service, look no further than . Michael Gardner Plumbing. Thank you for a job well done!

---

reviews.author: VOLBOLDEN
reviews.text:
Had a pipe issue at my home. Sewage was backing up into our yard through out clean out. We tried snaking it ourselves for hours with no success, called a local plumber I knew out and he cleaned it out and he sent a camera down and we saw there was a disconnected pipe or offset from my house’s pipe to the main city pipe which was causing the backup. It needed to be dug up and replaced which obviously was not the news I wanted to hear but it needed to be fixed.   He recommended Michael as he does this type of pipe replacement. Michael came right out and checked the camera view told us what needed to be done and gave us an estimate.

We called Michael out when we got the money together, he came right out, set up everything, walked us through the process, did all the permits, met with and pge to mark all the gas lines and then the next day he and his crew got to work.

Got it fixed up, there was minimal to no disruption to our daily life at all during the repair. He and his crew were very thorough and the job was well done. You can tell when contractors cut corners and there were no corners cut at all, all work was documented and he gave updates. Job as done well and water is flowing and haven’t had issues since. Thanks

reviews.author: Fred W.
reviews.text: Quick responds. a nice guy got the job done professionally. Got a main sewer line clog last night. Found this plumber locally in Google. Called this morning and he came in an hour. After I explained my finding, he confirmed the main sewer line clogged. Did the snake in first cleanout, not working. Then moved and Snake in the cleanout (2nd) closer to the street . It really took some effort. We both started wondering if a big issue underneath the sidewalk thru the city sewer line. Lucky, at the last , the snake went thru, the dirt was drained. Clog was removed. Then we went thru the camera detection together. A pipe connection has issue, as shown. He explained the issue and quoted for future solutions , budget or pricy. Overall, a good and smooth experience.

reviews.author: Michelle Gee
reviews.text:
After replacing water heater we had emergency need to have plumbing issues fixed due to galvanized piping which caused hot water back up/clogs. Michael came to the rescue with crew and was able to fix everything. This was at my rental so there were several problems that were not reported to me and I was unaware of. Michael ran everything by me and made sure that the entire house, including dishwasher, garbage disposal, electrical to the garbage disposal, and all faucets and spouts, etc. in kitchen and both bathrooms were in excellent working condition. All showers, faucets and hose lines were blown out.

I highly recommend Michael Gardner Plumbing and will definitely be using his services in the future as needed.

reviews.author: kev t
reviews.text:
First of all I handled this all remotely and the scheduling could not have been easier. Michael is local (which we prefer) and was only supposed to come do the estimate for leaky faucets and incomplete water supply shutoff on both faucets and then return to do the work another day. After speaking with him on the phone, he thoroughly explained what was entailed and mentioned that he could start immediately. Long story short four angle stops and 4 cartridge replacements in about 2-3 hours. Included estimate, a trip to Home Depot and the actual work. If you need a great local plumber, he’s your guy!  Extremely happy with the work
And the minimal down time!

reviews.author: Vicente Vargas
reviews.text:
This man showed up at what can only be described as an unholy hour—somewhere between “should I go to bed?” and “is the sun rising?” And yet, he responded immediately, like some kind of plumbing Batman.

Friendly, professional, and clearly not a fan of sleep, Michael handled the situation like a pro. No complaints, no grumbling, no “I’ll need to come back in the morning.” Just got right to it.

If you need a plumber who doesn’t ghost you, doesn’t overcharge, and actually knows what he’s doing (a shocking combo these days), Michael’s your guy. Five stars. Would call again—even though I hope I don’t have to. My pipes are still traumatized, but grateful.

reviews.author: John Green
reviews.text: I’m saving his number in my phone! On a Saturday when I didn’t think I could find someone without spending arm and a leg I came across Michael Gardner Plumbing. Great reviews and they are true!  He was able to come very quickly to help me fix a toilet backup I couldn’t do, but Mike can!  He came very professional and knowledgeable, respected my home by not leaving trails of dirty water or footprints, and was able to fix the problem quickly. Was able to answer all my questions confidently and was able to explain the process to me so I understood.
