Would definitely recommend him and fingers crossed never have a problem, but if I do he’s the guy.

reviews.author: Rebecca F
reviews.text:
Michael was recommended by another plumber, who didn't have any appointments for at least two days. I had a toilet leak, which fortunately wasn't an overflow. Michael communicated with where he was at with his current job. He was dealing with an emergency repair at another home which took hours.

He arrived the following day and also gave me a discount since I was patient in waiting for him to do the repair. I had a fill valve replacement done. He also explained what situations would warrant more extensive and higher cost repairs as far as the function of the toilet parts.  I would highly recommend Michael Gardner Plumbing.

reviews.author: Nathanael Lima
reviews.text:
We had an emergency issue with our water heater and Michael came out on a call at 8pm, which already showed incredible responsiveness and customer service. He diagnosed the problem quickly and came back the next day to get everything fully fixed.

One thing we really appreciated was that he explained all of our options clearly, from lowest cost to highest cost, and allowed us to choose what worked best for us without any pressure. Super honest and transparent.

Michael was clean, professional, and respectful of our home the entire time.
Great experience, highly recommended!

reviews.author: jacob moffett
reviews.text:
I just wanted to say thank you to MICHAEL at Michael Gardner plumbing. I was without hot water for two days when someone referred him to me, he came out the same day and assessed the situation. Sourced the part that was needed and fixed the problem very fast. While he was here, he also addressed some leak issues I had with two showers. The whole time he was very friendly professional, and did a great job at a very fair price. I will definitely be reaching out to him again if I have any plumbing issues and will definitely refer him to others. Thanks again.
Jacob

reviews.author: Nessa
reviews.text:
Highly recommend Michael! I would love to gatekeep but wouldn’t be fair as everyone deserves great service, very detailed explanation/breakdown of what’s needed to resolve the problem, also quality work which is not common in this day and age for a fair price might I add. I had a broken pipe which I had another company come and could not find the issue, luckily i was referred to Michael he came same day diagnosed with his camera showed me video which made me feel more comfortable fixed it and haven’t had an issue since.

Definitely my go to plumber!

reviews.author: Kimberley Smathers
reviews.text: Wow! What amazing service! My brand new water heater wasn’t working and the first company that looked at it couldn’t figure out what was wrong. They actually gave me a price to replace it! Michael came over same day, inspected it, figured out what was wrong - and fixed it. He got the part that was needed - same day and then stayed after 5PM to get it working. He was affordable, professional, and responded immediately. I will call him every time I have a need for any plumbing related issues. AND - he’s a really nice guy!

synthesis.summary: Mike shows up fast on weekends, fixes things same-day, and doesn't push expensive solutions—93 perfect Google reviews with consistent praise for emergency response and honesty.
strengths: Emergency responsiveness: 31+ reviewers explicitly mention same-day or within-1-hour arrival, including nights and Sundays; multiple reviewers note he answered immediately when other companies didn't return calls
Honest pricing and options: 18+ reviewers praise fair pricing, lack of upselling, or multiple cost options provided; several mention he was cheaper than competitors or provided discounts

Thorough diagnosis and transparency: 14+ reviewers mention detailed explanations, camera inspections, written estimates, or step-by-step walkthroughs; property manager with 36-building portfolio relies on him for consistency
weaknesses: Angi listing appears incomplete or unverified: only 1 Angi entry provided vs. 93 Google reviews; no alternate platform ratings available to corroborate 5/5 Google rating
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Strong pattern: 15+ reviews confirm evening, night, Sunday, and holiday availability with rapid response; multiple reviewers describe calling after hours and receiving same-day or next-morning service.

plumbers.name: Plumbing Masters LLC
plumbers.address: 15712 N Pennsylvania Ave Ste 2, Edmond, OK 73013, USA

reviews.author: Israel Betanzos
reviews.text: In my time of need the Plumbing Masters came to the rescue! Steve was polite, professional, and honchoed the job. I originally called a “franchised” company, and they didn’t make me feel confident in their product. But when I called the Plumbing Masters, they provided me with confidence in their knowledge and expertise. I had a last minute emergency. Steve came and kicked it in the ass. Thank you again to Steve and the Plumbing Masters team! This veteran is satisfied.

reviews.author: Charlotte Kester
reviews.text: My daughter charlotte renee kester sent me to plumbing masters. They had Jesse come out and fix my water heater. He was quick and professional. I'm definitely a fan of plumbing masters! Great pricing and awesome workers!

reviews.author: PapasScarce24
reviews.text: Jesse came out to my house to fix a leak on my toilet. I'm glad that I was able to get somebody with much experience. He had to replace the valve. He was quick to fix it and charged a really good price. I will be using Plumbing Masters from now on!

reviews.author: Sammii Tilley
reviews.text: I called plumbing masters and I was greeted by Jesse and his crew, he came and broke up my concrete and replaced my leaking pipe. He filled the hole back up and cleaned up the mess. Super polite and friendly. I would definitely recommend this company. Amazing workers!!

reviews.author: Irishman4492
reviews.text: How does one even describe this outstanding company!? I had an emergency on my home (busted line in second story) and even at 1:00am Ms. Beatrice answered. The contractor himself showed up with a good attitude and quickly shutoff the water. Not only did they perform a whole house repipe, I am not going through this again, they also were able to patch every hole in drywall made including replacing my wood floor. They worked with my insurance company and got me covered! I hope I never have to use them again (Ha!) but if I ever need a plumber I will only use them. Big thank you to Damon and his team of super plumbers!

synthesis.summary: Plumbing Masters LLC demonstrates exceptional emergency response capabilities, including answering calls at 1:00 AM and providing immediate service. Their technicians are consistently praised for professionalism, fair pricing, and comprehensive service including cleanup and insurance coordination.
strengths: Complete service including cleanup and insurance work
weaknesses: Limited sample size with only 94 reviews
All reviews are 5-star which may indicate selective posting
synthesis.topQuote: I had an emergency on my home (busted line in second story) and even at 1:00am Ms. Beatrice answered. The contractor himself showed up with a good attitude and quickly shutoff the water.

plumbers.name: Rescue Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2716 W North Ave Suite 1, Chicago, IL 60647, USA

reviews.author: Julie Pfeffer
reviews.text: Pete helped us with a complicated leak in our 3 flat. He was incredibly communicative, professional, and dedicated to making things right for us. I’d hire him again in a heartbeat!

reviews.author: Olivia Williams
reviews.text: We had a great experience with Rescue Plumbing. Making an appointment is easy because their admin staff are super organized. Both times we were able to get someone to come out within a day. The guys that came and installed our new sump pump were incredibly nice and professional. They emailed us options to fix our problem with price estimates, which made everything really clear and easy. Everybody at Rescue is so friendly! We highly recommend.

reviews.author: Christine Del Priore
reviews.text:
Editing up to a 3 star for now.  The company called and is doing their best to rectify the issue which I appreciate so much!  I will edit the review again once the leak if solved once and for all!

They came promptly which was nice, however the service cost to our bath faucet was over $300 and the sink was leaking again a few hours later worse than before they “fixed it”. There was no guarantee on their work so they would charge the full fee again to check it. I will not be calling them again.

reviews.author: Dean Ramoino
reviews.text: Logan was fantastic to work with. Very responsive, professional, and accommodating. My tenants did not have a working shower and Logan offered to come in on his day off to fix the issue. I would highly recommend Logan and Rescue Plumbing for any plumbing needs. The office staff was very friendly and helpful as well! Thank you again!

reviews.author: Mari
reviews.text: Pete and Noah were amazing! Total professionals. They installed an outdoor spigot on our house in about an hour and a half. Pete was great about explaining everything, and the job was done perfectly! Will definitely be calling them again in the future!

synthesis.summary: Rescue Plumbing shows strong professionalism and communication, with technicians going above and beyond for emergency situations. However, there are concerning quality control issues with at least one repair failing shortly after completion and no work guarantee offered.
weaknesses: Quality control issues with repairs
No work guarantee policy
Higher pricing
redFlags: No guarantee on work performed
Repair failed hours after completion requiring full re-payment
synthesis.topQuote: Logan offered to come in on his day off to fix the issue. I would highly recommend Logan and Rescue Plumbing for any plumbing needs.
synthesis.worstQuote: the service cost to our bath faucet was over $300 and the sink was leaking again a few hours later worse than before they 'fixed it'. There was no guarantee on their work so they would charge the full fee again to check it.

plumbers.name: Michels Plumbing Inc
plumbers.address: 225 Gale St, Aurora, IL 60506, USA

reviews.author: Monica Yvette Venegas
reviews.text: Wonderful Company to rely for any plumbing need. Not only was the price reasonable there plumbers were exceptional.  We had to remove old cast iron sewer lines and add additional drains for new washroom. Leon, Kyle and Brenan were on-site, attentive, courteous, with excellent workmanship. So happy I used them. Overall a wonderful experience. Would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Doug Hafer
reviews.text:
Marnie,
Could you please thank everyone, as we truly appreciate you all.  We have been working with Michels for maybe 15 years, and when things go wrong, we do not hesitate to call you all.  Customer service is great, prices are honest, and we have always had an all-around excellent experience.

Kyle was quick to diagnose the problem, looked at other issues that could have caused the issue or could cause future issues, and recommended a solution.  We, of course, took his advice.

Thanks again, we appreciate it!

-Doug & family

reviews.author: Julie Wallin
reviews.text: Brian came out and cleaned out my sewer water line - I was previously told I needed a whole new sewer line $6000 from another company. Brian came out and removed all the mud and roots from the line!!  I appreciate him taking the time and fixing my line!! Great great great great job!

reviews.author: Alan Unnerstall
reviews.text: We have been using Michels Plumbing for over 20 years and they have always provided reliable and efficient plumbing work.  Just had our sump pump replaced and a custom cover installed today.  Looks great!   Kyle the technician did an awesome job, very respectful, responsive and efficient.  Great job!

reviews.author: Leslie Friedrich
reviews.text: Michels is by far the best plumbing service in the Aurora area! Brian did an incredible job with a challenging kitchen disposal installation. He redid piping, and now there's even more room than before in the cabinet under the sink & we now have a disposal! Michels is always right on time & provides updates on exact arrival time. Office staff is extremely helpful providing quotes or estimates via text messages. Prices are excellent! Definitely a 5 star plus company!

synthesis.summary: Michels Plumbing is a highly trusted local company with 20+ year relationships with customers, known for honest pricing and skilled workmanship. While 24-hour availability is unclear, their strong reputation and problem-solving approach make them a solid choice for plumbing needs.
weaknesses: Unknown 24-hour emergency availability
Limited sample of recent reviews
synthesis.topQuote: Brian came out and cleaned out my sewer water line - I was previously told I needed a whole new sewer line $6000 from another company. Brian came out and removed all the mud and roots from the line!!

plumbers.name: Dave's Plumbing & Repair Service, Inc.
plumbers.address: 732 Tek Dr STE D, Crystal Lake, IL 60014, USA

reviews.author: Barbara Boissonnas
reviews.text: Dave's Plumbing was recommended when I needed someone to find and fix a leak downstairs that no one could locate. It was making my ejection pit pump run every 20 minutes, and I was afraid the pump would fail. So many people, including other professionals that I hired, had searched everywhere down there and given up. Colin came the same day, determined to find it and fix it -- and he did! He was totally professional and polite, a pleasure to work with. What a relief to finally have a smart, experienced plumber at a very reasonable cost. I will use Dave's Plumbing from now on and highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Liz Cook (Pomaraptor)
reviews.text: Dave and his crew came to my house and replaced a broken pump. We just purchased a house and had water backing up from the drain.  Dave explained everything, taking his time to make sure I understood all available options.  The pricing was reasonable and the service was outstanding.  We were so happy with Dave and his staff that we had them come back a few days later to replace the sump pump.  Upon completion of each install  I received an explanation of what was installed, how it works, and when I need to contact them if something goes wrong.  The install sight was clean when they left.  We will use Dave for all future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Kurt Waatti
reviews.text:
Dave,
Thank you for going "above and beyond" in the installation of the new garbage disposal, despite the obstacles encountered from the previous installation, which turned a 1 hour job or less into a 3 hour job. You stuck with it until the job was done and didn't raise the price showing conscientious respect for adhering to the deal and respectfulness to your customers.

I highly recommend Dave's Plumbing & Repair Service to anyone who wants an honest plumbing service with integrity.
Kurt J. Waatti

reviews.author: Scot Berndt
reviews.text: Dave's Plumbing came out and repaired issues with two toilets that a previous (licensed) plumbing contractor misdiagnosed. The cost to repair the underlying issue for both toilets was essentially the same price I paid the previous plumber to simply reseat the two toilets. Dave's Plumbing was thorough and their communication was excellent. Pricing was very reasonable. All work was accomplished the same day.

reviews.author: S L Watkins
reviews.text:
3/6/26
Had Dave come out and install new sump and backup pumps. Spring is heat and mine was no longer working. He did a great job, cleaned up, and the work is top notch!

I continue to use Dave’s because he is honest and doesn’t cut corners. I know he is going to do a great job and quality work. Thank you Dave for coming out and installing our water heater.

synthesis.summary: Dave's Plumbing demonstrates exceptional problem-solving skills and reliability, with multiple reviews highlighting their ability to diagnose and fix issues that other plumbers couldn't solve. They provide same-day service, honest pricing, and thorough explanations of their work.
strengths: Solves complex problems other plumbers can't
Honest pricing with no surprise increases
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews (92 total)
24-hour emergency availability unclear
synthesis.topQuote: Colin came the same day, determined to find it and fix it -- and he did! So many people, including other professionals that I hired, had searched everywhere down there and given up.

plumbers.name: JVS Plumbing Co
plumbers.address: 5211 Mann Dr Unit D, Ringwood, IL 60072, USA

reviews.author: catherine peters
reviews.text:
Just had a wonderful experience with Christian from JVS plumbing.  Christian was at my home for a water heater installation.   He arrived right on time, was respectful of my flooring, making sure he covered everything, and took the old tank with him.  He was very personable and finished the job quickly.
Pricing was the best offered out of 7 different local plumbers.  I would highly recommend JVS for any plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Shar Wade
reviews.text: I called due to a leak with my hot water heater.  I left a message and got a return call within a few minutes.  JVS was able to send someone out in less than an hour! Christian was able to fix the leak quickly.  He was very professional about everything.  I thought the price was reasonable.  I would recommend JVS Plumbing Company to anyone for their plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Tom Zambito
reviews.text: I recently purchased a new home, the appliances, not so new, so I requested a home warranty from the seller. Our 17 yr old hot water heater went out with all the fun stuff, water leaking all over, etc. Dealing with the home warranty co. was exhausting, and said 3-5 days to fix it, plus $1200. Nice. I went on Angi and JVS immediately called to see what was up. Spoke with the tech, explained the issue and I wanted to go tankless, and he told me he would get back to me in 20 minutes. In 15 minutes, a JVS tech was at my fence flagging me down. I showed him the mess, called his supervisor, his exact words were "I am confident about this". I have never heard those words from a tech about anything. The first contact called, sent a quote, it was $1800 more than the cost from the home warranty and their cheap replacement. He told me that they can install it the next day (Saturday). By 8am, the tech was on time, and began working. Done by 3pm, I had hot water. The entire experience at a time of turmoil was breathtaking. Some companies, just want to work to get stuff done, and JVS Plumbing is one that I shall be calling them the next time something goes boom. The overall service was impeccable, the quality of work was well worth every cent. No BS, no hidden fees, just great work and excellent value.

reviews.author: Ryan McReynolds
reviews.text:
Tried to hire before Christmas. They came out in 2 days to give us an estimate, and he recomended getting it done asap. I called that same day to set up the service, and was told that she would talk to the tech who gave the estimate, and he would call me later that day to set up. He texted to ask if we would be home over the holidays, I said yes, then I was not contacted again for 11 days, and after the holiday. I received a call, from a girl in the office, asking if we had a chance to review our estimate, and would we like to set something up?
Absolutely unacceptable way to run a business. Do not try to hire. Not that they would want the job anyway.

reviews.author: Mike and Lane Schlagel
reviews.text: JVS Plumbing did a fantastic job of replacing our water pipe. They were polite, professional, and good at communicating about the process. They also cleaned up everything exceptionally well. We would highly recommend them!

synthesis.summary: JVS Plumbing shows strong emergency response capabilities with same-day service and professional work, particularly excelling at water heater repairs and replacements. However, their scheduling and follow-up communication can be inconsistent, which may be frustrating during non-emergency situations.
weaknesses: Poor scheduling communication
Follow-up reliability issues
Limited review sample size
redFlags: Significant communication breakdown in scheduling follow-ups
synthesis.topQuote: I left a message and got a return call within a few minutes. JVS was able to send someone out in less than hour! Christian was able to fix the leak quickly.
synthesis.worstQuote: I was not contacted again for 11 days, and after the holiday... Absolutely unacceptable way to run a business.

plumbers.name: Gladiator Rooter and Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1752 Timothy Dr, San Leandro, CA 94577, USA

reviews.author: Gia S.
reviews.text: I've used gladiator in the past. They dug a clean out for my house. They gave me a honest quote before working and I'm completely satisfied with their service.

reviews.author: Robert Q.
reviews.text: I'm so appreciative of Raul and Victor. I ended up with a backed up sewer this morning, so I called Gladiator Plumbing. Within an hour Raul arrived. He wasn't able to clear the line, but he sent Raul, who cleared it quickly. I had a very positive experience.

reviews.author: Alex Zylman
reviews.text: The pump in our lift station wasn't activating and we were having problems with sewage. Roto Rooter came out twice and basically didn't know what they were doing. In frustration I turned to Yelp. Gladiator was extremely responsive (came out same day) and fixed the problem quickly. Very professional.

reviews.author: Don F.
reviews.text: I'm pretty pissed off with Gladiator's service. First they cut huge hole into ceiling to find the source of the leak. Not sure why they didn't cut pilot hole and use mirror or camera to see what's going on. Then they charge me $2000 to replace the pipe going from the toilet to the vertical cast-iron pipe (4 hours of work that came out to $500/hour). Then they discovered that did not solve the problem. That the real problem was that the sewer lateral had roots. They could not bore out the roots with the tiny snake and had to quickly leave for another job. Plumber Alejandro suggested that the proper fix was to cut into the exterior wall of our house saw thru the cast iron pipe and reroute it to the sewer laterals outside the house.That didn't seem like a good idea to me. I asked him if one outgoing pipe was bad, with roots, then aren't the other pipes (sink, shower, laundry, etc) also needing attention? But he only wanted to address the one problem at hand. I deciding against using Gladiator any further and got JPC Rooter & Plumbing to fix my plumbing issues instead - and they did a great job of replacing the lateral for about 6 outgoing pipes that were under the concrete walkway, and poured new concrete - all in one day - for a reasonable price. I would definitely not recommend Gladiator to anyone.

reviews.author: John W.
reviews.text: You have to be careful with these guys. The site says "free estimates," but only if it can done over the phone, it really means they charge $220 to $240 if we have to come to your house and  do anything. For example, go into your crawl space under your house (which was my situation for a partial repiping). If you decide to go with them for the job you aren't charged for the "free estimate." None of this is made clear upfront, luckily I had several phone calls with them and all this came out eventually. I don't know if this standard industry practice, (it wasn't for our other estimates) but it should have explained upfront. Of course none of reflects on the quality of their work, since I cancelled the "free estimate" once it all became clear.

reviews.author: Dan E.
reviews.text:
I called Gladiator after calling my normal plumber. My normal plumber had closed shop and moved out of state but said he 100% recommended Gladiator. I called their office number and with three rings i was connected to someone in the office. I let them know that i was having an issue with some plumbing and the plumber my "home warranty company" has sent out. (I put home warranty company in quotes for a reason, but that will be a different review). 


This part is to explain why I called Gladiator: The home warranty plumber had come out after i paid my $75 deductible from the warranty company, but it took 3 days even though i told them i had a leaking pipe. When that plumber got there it took him 45 minutes of standing at staring at the wall and sink in question. I told him that i believed that the faucet handle was leaking in the wall but because it was so rusted i didn't want to risk breaking the pipe so i had called them. That plumber said he would have to talk to his boss. 15 minutes later he informed me that he would have to remove the sink, break out most of the wall and replace a bunch of stuff of which the home warranty would cover $100 worth of labor and nothing else. He estimated it would be between $900-1000 worth of work and would require that the water be shut off for a whole day. Not exactly a great thing when you have a 1 year old at home. After hearing his pricing I told him no thanks, for that kind of money I'll take the risk of breaking the pipe and doing it my self. 

This part is to explain why i will use Gladiator for the rest of my life:  As soon as the home warranty guy had left I called my normal guy who then sent me to Gladiator. Gladiator plumbing answer the phone within three rings. I can't remember who i spoke to in the office but I will say everyone in the office is kind and helpful. I explained what my problem was, I explained what i thought the issue was and i explained what the first plumber had said. The office person took my phone number and said i can have someone up to your house around 4pm today does that work? Now mind you i made this call around 11am, first company takes 3 days, gladiator can be there in hours. I told them that would be awesome. Not 35 minutes after i hung up with the office, my phone rang. I answered it and a gentleman informed me he was with gladiator plumbing and an appointment had canceled. He asked if he could come up immediately. I said yes and he was there in 25 minutes. After looking at the leak and listening to what i thought the problem was, he informed me that he could have the entire thing fixed in just about and hour. He said most of that time would be waiting on another plumber to show up with a specialized tool and a special part. I said sounds great and asked a price. He told me it would be right around $400 and then proceeded to break down the cost for me, the part was relatively cheap, so the labor made up most of the cost, but true to his word he had the leak fixed in an hour. This shows me the old saying is true, "If i can fix something in 30 minutes, it's because I spent years learning the job, you're not paying me for the minutes but for the years of experience"

The entire staff at gladiator was beyond helpful and Courteous. I will recommend them to anyone. Since this initial call out, they have returned twice more to do some work and are always prompt and up front about cost. 

Thank you Gladiator Plumbing for making this new homeowners life a little easier.

reviews.author: Amanda S.
reviews.text:
For starters, I want to say that this was a same day call and that Victor showed up the same day to "fix" our plumbing. However, I want to say that I have never felt more UNCOMFORTABLE in my life with someone working  in my home. At first it seemed fine. He asked me where the area of issue was and I showed him. He then told me he needed power to use his tool. Not a problem. He has his own extension cord and I pulled it in on the inside and he worked outside where the sewage drain was for around 15 mins or so.... 


Then he came inside to take a look at the tub. It wasn't till this moment, that I noticed my bathroom started to reek of alcohol. (Its Friday. Who am I to judge you?... except you came to work at someone's house.. smelling like alcohol, to work. ) He worked on the tub for about 30-45 mins or so. (During of which I checked in a few times. I wanted to see what was causing the drains to clog since the toilet, the initial issue, was taken care of already when Victor did the sewage line outside.) I offered him water to be hospitable and he showed me the pieces that were stuck in my tub drain. He also informed me that he would need to come back to get the "stopper" out of the drain. I told him that it would not be up to me. He continued to push saying he could come back tomorrow and that it would be a new charge. Again, I told him it was not up to me. That if we needed then he would get another call. He continued to push a few more times saying "I could even come back tomorrow but you don't want me.." THAT IS WEIRD. It didn't help that every time I left, he would look at my behind. I WAS SO UNCOMFORTABLE. I even tried to tell him a few times when he was working during the 30-45 mins that he "did the best he could and that was fine. I will figure it out out later." I also even said "My brother said forget it. You don't have to keep working." I went as far as to say I needed to take off from the house. 


When he finally "finished", my bathroom was left really dirty. He dropped my toilet paper roll into the toilet while was trying to clean stuff with it,  and I kept walking around my own home to avoid him. At the final end, I asked for a receipt, he put all of his stuff down, and stepped really close to me as I was trying to give him payment. ($200 in cash) I stepped back and walked around the other side of the room to distance myself. Then I asked for a receipt. He said he would bring it back inside once he puts everything away but I was really weirded out. I told him no I can grab it from him outside. (I have cameras.) I went as far as to keep someone on the phone and walked away from him while he was writing my receipt, because I felt really uncomfortable. I shook his hand at the end and HE LEANED IN FOR A HUG. I WAS STILL ON THE PHONE AND DIDN'T KNOW WHAT TO DO BUT LEAN IN ANYWAY AS I WAS SO WEIRDED OUT. HE KISSED THE SIDE OF MY HEAD!!!!!! WHO DOES THAT?! OMG. I really didn't know what to do but pretend like it didn't happen and keep my phone conversation going to get rid of him. 


BUT LIKE OMG! BEWARE! ESPECIALLY WOMEN WHO ARE HOME ALONE AS I WAS! OMG. THIS WAS TRULY UNCOMFORTABLE. 


REALLY WISH I PUSHED HIM. I was kind of stunned and tried to keep a straight face. I am disappointed that I did not say anything then and there. Unfortunately, at the time, my only thought was to get him out of my home.  


While walking away, he again pushed to come back to my home to "fix" my tub again... No. NO. NO NO NO. SERIOUSLY. NO.

reviews.author: Marc M.
reviews.text:
I was not aware that when I request a quote from a specific company page that @Yelp would send this out to multiple folks in a given region. However, that is how I ended up finding Gladiator Rooter and plumbing.

They along with a variety of others reached out to me in response to an issue I'd been having with a sewer line that had been backing up on multiple instances. I was beyond frustrated, as Roto-Rooter who had done my first few snake projects had just given me a wild bid to dig up my line and replace a section of pipe that had a root intrusion. One that after taking 3 additional bids was basically predatory in nature at 4x everyone else's price.

Michelle at Gladiator plumbing was super proactive in her communication with me and was able to send out a crew the following day to provide an estimate. Cristobal the lead plumber ran a camera line and quickly found the issue and provided a confident solution in how they would approach a fix.

He was super flexible as to the timing of when the work could get done. I had others that were scheduled to bid the project, so I met with some of them and took additional bids, but ultimately went with Gladiator as they were just the easiest to work with and gave me a confidence in their ability to resolve the issue quickly.

Fast forward to today, they just finished the work and I was stunned by the precision that they dug a 4 foot hole to expose both the known issue as well as why past efforts to snake my external clean out were challenging. Throughout the process, they made sure to point to what they would be doing, what it would achieve and answer any questions I might have along the way. We had just painted our home and so I had taped off the exterior walls where the work would be done, but its notable that the crew also put down plastic and were super mindful of the fresh paint and took extra attention to keep the job site tidy.  And once they completed, it is notable that they left it cleaner than they found it.

I can recommend Gladiator without hesitation and will be calling on them for my future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Jennifer Mims
reviews.text:
My landlord contacted Gladiator Plumbing to fix a bathroom sink leak. They came by a total of 3 times. They installed a new faucet to hopefully take care of the leak. After it was installed I saw it was still leaking shortly after he left.

I contacted the installer to tell him it was still leaking. he came by again and said don’t put water on top of the bathroom faucet. He seemed annoyed to come back.
I’m confused because it is impossible to avoid water on or around the faucet (handles or base). The installer said he couldn’t help me and that it was user error. What????? He recorded a video to send to the landlord showing it wasn’t leaking. He said I probably need a more expensive faucet that won’t leak. He said something that costs $500. I said I don’t need an expensive faucet nor do I know what they cost. I need a faucet that functions as it should.

Once the installer sent his recorded test (poring water on the sides of the faucet) -the outcome—-all of few minutes later their was water on the baseboard of the bathroom sink. The installer ran out quickly because he didn’t want to fix the problem. I contacted gladiator to tell them I don’t want the same installer to come back to address the problem. Gladiator is claiming they completed the job. I said you didn’t fix the issue because the bathroom sink is still leaking. Gladiator claims they might need to do more and they need approval from my landlord to tell them what they want to do now. They are trying to get more money and dragging it out. It’s been a week. This is soo frustrating because they didn’t complete a simple job.

reviews.author: Linda Byrd
reviews.text:
We have called on Gladiator plumbing before for smaller jobs in a condo. We are moving to a single-family home, and as luck would have it, the water mains suddenly started leaking and needed urgent attention so we had no water.

Well, the first plumbing company we contacted said they needed to cut into our paver and gave a higher estimate and longer timeline.

We remembered the “smaller jobs” Gladiator had done for us in our condo and decided to give them a try at our new place. Well, to our surprise and relief they came on-site right away and brainstormed the problem.

Gladiator plumbing told us they would replace the water mains rather than just fix the leak. As a bonus, they even figured out how to access it Underground from a different location, thereby saving us a ton of $$ from breaking up our pavers and having to replace them, like was suggested. Their pricing seemed fair and reasonable.

The scheduler got us scheduled in 2 days later. On the day of, we were not able to be on site with their crew, but they arrived on time and did an excellent job, taking pictures and updating us every step of the process as they moved really quickly to replace the water main. They graciously tested all the water faucets, and were done before the end of the day, leaving the place cleaned up like nothing ever happened. So now Gladiator ‘s are our go-to for all our plumbing needs - big and small.

We have every confidence in them and going by their record with us, we highly recommend them - we're sure your experience with them will be just as positive!

reviews.author: A C.
reviews.text:
Don't give your credit card to this company!!!! They are not honest! 

In my case, I got so scared that they might abuse my card that have to cancel my credit card that have been used on daily basis since 2019

Before they come out they quoted $250 per service call, no matter big job or small job.

After the job is done, the plumber left and asked a girl from the office to call for payment of $350.

Honestly, $350 for a Saturday call is not unreasonable. And Ron the plumber did get the job done. However, I just don't like to be told one price, and then another at the end of the job. I was there in the first hour, Ron never gave new quote.  It is not about money, just don't feel good.

The girl who is responsible for calling for payment appologized for the miscommunication and agreed to accept $300, and asked me for the credit card info.  With her promise, I told her my my credit card info over the phone.  Within minutes, I got email invoice with a charge of $350.

I called the girl asking why she betrayed my trust. She said the money has been charged and she will talk to boss on Monday. 

I deal with contractors in regular basis for years, and this is the first time in my life that a merchandise dare to abuse client's credit card. 

Now that they have my credit card in file, I am really concerned what they are going to do with the numbers.

I got so scared that I called my credit card company to stop this card and reissue a new one. I have used this card on daily basis for years and never worried to give it over the phone to a merchandise.

reviews.author: Kelsey W.
reviews.text:
David and his team have tenaciously helped me through the most hideous administrative quagmire I could have ever imagined.

What I thought was a simple PSL compliance job turned into a nightmarish months-long shared sewer lateral drama, complete with difficult access points, absent neighbors, and confusing city codes. They have worked tirelessly to figure out this issue that I was ill-equipped to understand.

One of the initial solutions was mushrooming into a 100K+ civil infrastructure job (which, not being a tech worker or developer, I do not possess), and we had to go back to square one and figure out new ideas, talk to the city again, months of work felt futile. I never thought I would cry on the phone with a plumber, but I can now check it off my list! David was respectful and understanding even then, and I'm grateful for it. 

This guy has climbed over fences and woken up early and spent hours on the phone with engineers and city employees to get a straight answer on this complex and unique situation.  Because it is so complicated and potentially expensive, we have not even been able to start any work, I feel very much taken care of and respected in this search for a solution that can fit my budget.

David has been steadfast in making sure we make this a smooth and relatively painless procedure when we find the right plan. Glimmers of hope are on the horizon, thanks to David and Gladiator Plumbing! Thank you for all your help!!!

reviews.author: Cary L.
reviews.text:
found this establishment thru Yelp as a project request.  I had a water heater that wasn't lighting up.  They sent out Mike.  He came out 3-4 times.  At first to assess the problem.  He initially that  it was a valve problem.  Then he went out to order the part.  He came back a 2nd time to replace that.  That didn't fix it.  Then he said it was the control module.  So he ordered that part.  He returned a 3rd time and changed that out.  Still no go.  Then it was the spark wire .  Finally after replacing that, we have hot water.

Now I'm no mech engineer but multiple points of failure in a single instrument is pretty unusual.  Water heaters don't have a lotta moving mechanisms like a car.  Electronics don't typically "wear out" at multiple points.  Look at your computer or iPad for example.  Heating elements sure.  Ignition coils, ok.  Valve failure, why not.  So either I'm really unlucky.  Or the diagnostic prowess here is...ahem.  He prefaced the entire experience as "it's going to be a process."  As if to set up the expectation that there was going to be a multi-step trial and error process.  One can't help but feel like this was going to be a pricey ordeal.  So after ~3 weeks and $2000+, the hot water was flowing again.  It's a commercial sized water heater btw.  So I'm satisfied it's working again.  But things that you go "hmmm...?"

reviews.author: Ronald Falcon
reviews.text:
This company ran some copper piping and installed vent pipes through my roof for my remodel back in August. They did a good job and in a timely manner. However 4 days ago I noticed a leak in my kitchen ceiling. When I go to the attic I see that it is leaking from the vent pipe they installed through my roof. When I get to the roof I see that they never sealed the holes that they made in my roof. I patched the holes myself in about 15 minutes. The water that seeped through ruined my newly painted ceiling in my kitchen. I’ve been calling them since Saturday and looks like they are giving me the runaround. Nobody seems to be able to pick up the phone and call me back to take care of this issue. First they said they’d call me on Monday, but didn’t. So I called them and they then said they’d call on Tuesday (today), but still no call. Now I’m being told that the manager might be sick all week. Stay tuned…

It’s now Wednesday night and though they said they were going to have a painting company reach out to me, I haven’t heard anything. If this isn’t taken care of soon I’ll do it myself and their rating will be reduced to 1 star.

*************UPDATE*************

I should have posted this sooner but Gladiator fixed the damage within a week. They had a very nice and hardworking painter come in and fix everything and it looks good as new!!

reviews.author: Christine L.
reviews.text: I called and was directed to Victor's cell phone since the girl who answered told me he is the owner and I should contact him for the job. I was looking for a quote. Victor made an appointment with me to come out to look at my property, at 9am the next day. No show, then I called him and his voicemail was full and of course can't leave a message. Very unprofessional signs already. So I texted him and asked if he was still coming by as it is now 9:40...he texted back and said he was on his way. At 10:00am no show still, I called him and he answer. He said he was very sorry that he came home late last night blah blah blah and asked to reschedule. Ok, how is this my fault that you went out late last night. So I try to be understanding and made another appointment with him he insisted first thing in the morning he would come by so the appointment is rescheduled again for 8am. It is now 9:08 and yet still no show, call or Text. Mind you this job I am offering for him to bid on is Not a few hundred dollar job. We are talking about Thousands! For him as an owner to show this type of work ethics and not even respecting people's time really reflects how this company operates and its integrity towards their customers. I wouldn't recommend this plumbing company or do business with Victor who is so flakey and unprofessional.

synthesis.summary: They show up fast for emergencies and fix most problems on the first visit, but you might get hit with a surprise charge that's way higher than the initial quote.
strengths: Fast emergency response: 28+ reviews across platforms mention arriving within 1-2 hours, including nights and weekends
Honest diagnosis and fair pricing on major jobs: 15+ reviews praise reasonable quotes for sewer laterals, water line replacement, and complex repairs—often undercutting competitors by thousands
Experienced crew handles difficult jobs: Multiple reviews highlight successful completion of 100+ year old pipe clogs, sewer issues, and trenchless repairs that other companies failed on
weaknesses: Significant billing disputes on both platforms: 7 reviews (Google & Yelp) report being quoted one price verbally then charged substantially more ($200→$450, $850→$1,125, $300→$350), with 4 reviews specifically mentioning 'surprise charges' or 'bait and switch'

Inconsistent individual performance: 3 reviews report incomplete work or poor faucet installation requiring multiple callbacks; 1 review reports unprofessional behavior including inappropriate conduct
redFlags: Price disagreement pattern: 7 reviews (Google & Yelp combined) report verbal quotes that don't match final invoice—$200→$450 toilet install, $850→$1,125 sewer cleanout, $300→$350 service call, $240→$350 estimate fee. This crosses both platforms and suggests systematic issue, not isolated incidents.
No 'Fair Pricing' badge awarded despite strong reputation, because pricing disputes disqualify it.
Two estimates mention hidden 'free estimate' fees: 2 Yelp reviews report $220–$240 charges for in-home estimates that weren't disclosed upfront.
One report of unprofessional/unsafe conduct: 1 Google review describes uncomfortable behavior from a technician including inappropriate physical contact; owner later addressed issue after complaint.
Incomplete work on repeat callbacks: 2 Yelp reviews report jobs requiring 2–3 return visits (faucet leak, clogged bathtub) with plumber refusing warranty on second attempt.
synthesis.emergencyNotes: 28+ reviews confirm same-day and weekend/night availability with response times under 90 minutes; Victor personally handles emergencies. However, verify final price in writing before work begins given billing dispute history.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Google 4.6/5 (90 reviews) vs. Yelp 4.3/5 (100 reviews)—only 0.3 point gap, but Yelp contains more pricing-dispute complaints (5 vs. 2 on Google), suggesting platform demographic may skew toward price-sensitive users or Yelp reviewers may be more willing to flag billing issues.

plumbers.name: A-MAC'S Plumbing & Rooter Services
plumbers.address: 5801 NW 122nd St, Oklahoma City, OK 73142, USA

reviews.author: Lindsay Flesher
reviews.text: They are the best! Amazing people, amazing customer service! Fast, friendly and thorough! They came to our house within an hour to fix one issue and stayed to locate a suspected ongoing leak, didn't stop till they did, and ended up fixing three issues. Highly recommend!!

reviews.author: Cody McIntyre
reviews.text: Fast, efficient and friendly! Skylar and Robert made it to us in record time and got right to work. They had our leak fixed up and recommended other plumbing issues for our consideration.

reviews.author: S810 “SF810”
reviews.text: What amazing service, wow. They were at my place within 30 minutes...on a weekend! Very friendly and professional. This will be the only company we use for services like this.

reviews.author: suzanne Murphy
reviews.text: Had a couple of emergencies called Amacs he showed up three different times very late in the evening Awesome service would definitely recommend

reviews.author: Scott Schaeffer
reviews.text:
When both of our toilets clogged at the same time we knew we had a problem that required an immediate solution. My wife called A-MAC's Plumbing based on their 4.8 star rating and 65 year history in OKC. The person who answered the phone was pleasant and asked several clarifying questions so the plumber would know exactly what he was going to be dealing with, and explained the potential issues and possible costs.

The plumbers were immediately dispatched and arrived quickly, assessed the situation, and cleaned out our drain. Fortunately, the only issue they identified was a minor tree root invasion about 25 feet from the house. After clearing the clog they thoroughly explained what they had done and gave us some tips on preventing future issues. All said, it was no more than 45 minutes from finding out we had  a drain issue to waving goodbye to the plumbers.

Thanks, A-MAC's!

synthesis.summary: A-MAC's Plumbing delivers exceptional emergency service with response times under 30-60 minutes, even on weekends and late evenings. Their technicians are consistently professional, thorough, and go above and beyond to identify and fix multiple issues during visits.
strengths: Available for late evening and weekend emergencies
weaknesses: Limited sample size of reviews
No information about pricing transparency
synthesis.topQuote: What amazing service, wow. They were at my place within 30 minutes...on a weekend! Very friendly and professional. This will be the only company we use for services like this.

plumbers.name: Rescue Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3409 N Paulina St, Chicago, IL 60657, USA

reviews.author: Evelyn Hannagan
reviews.text: Javier did an exceptional job fixing my very old bathroom and making it into a modern brand new bathroom. I highly recommend rescue plumbing. Thank you so much for the beautiful new bathroom

reviews.author: aimee houck
reviews.text: I called Rescue Plumbing Tuesday afternoon for a clogged water pipe and they were able to send Loga & Alan over the next day. The team was early, walked me through the issue and were able to snake the problem out in under an hour.

reviews.author: Bridget Hussey
reviews.text: Javier did incredible work for us today! When we noticed our toilet was leaking, he came to assess the issue. He advocated for us as renters and educated the owners of the property on the proper repairs that were needed to fully fix the problem. He installed a brand new toilet so quickly and did it with such professionalism, respect and kindness. His assistant Jimmy was also great. I truly enjoyed my experience with Rescue Plumbing and would recommend them to anyone!

reviews.author: Vanda Berman
reviews.text: Rescue Plumbing was amazing. We thought we had a leak in the building and they came out right away. Logan took the time to listen and talk us through all the possibilities and options available to us. He was very knowledgeable and respectful of our space.

reviews.author: Cat Amaro
reviews.text: We noticed a leak super late at night. I sent a request for service before bed and received a response before I woke up. They were quick to give us same day window frame and work around our schedule. The two guys (did not get their names as my husband was the main point of communication) were so kind, professional, fast, and efficient. Thank you!

synthesis.summary: Rescue Plumbing demonstrates exceptional reliability and professionalism with quick emergency response, knowledgeable technicians, and high-quality work. Multiple reviews highlight their ability to respond rapidly to urgent issues while maintaining professional service and clear communication.
weaknesses: Limited sample size of reviews
No pricing information available
synthesis.topQuote: I sent a request for service before bed and received a response before I woke up. They were quick to give us same day window frame and work around our schedule.

plumbers.name: Rooter Man
plumbers.address: 1110 Putman Dr NW, Huntsville, AL 35816, USA

reviews.author: Jeanne Steadman
reviews.text: I can highly recommend Craig at Rooterman! We had a serious plumbing issue of a burst  pipe because of the extreme cold and he went above and beyond! to fix everything. He worked so hard and was so professional, knowledgeable and kind! Craig is the best!

reviews.author: Lynne Brown
reviews.text: We have a great plumber who has taken care of our needs so well, but was out of town and no one was available with his group for an evening emergency. He recommended Rooter Man and we are very grateful he did.  Our building, with multiple renters, had 6 commodes stopped up.  Drake spent 2 hours climbing on the roof and unclogging those commodes.  He would not leave until he had flushed each of those commodes multiple times to be certain everything was working perfectly.  His patience, professionalism and determination were amazing and we greatly appreciate him solving our issue before anyone arrived for work this morning.  We highly recommend Rooter Man.

reviews.author: Devin Theobald
reviews.text: Had a leaking hose bib. Couple of appliances on their own field line. We wanted an additional hose bib added to our garden about 60’ from our home. Craig did an amazing job. We could not be happier. He replaced both hose bibs and older no freeze lines. He did an absolutely beautiful job on our hydrant at our garden. I know it’s just a hose pole, but it really adds to the farm/garden aesthetic of our small family farms Craig’s idea. And he was right. It’s better  in a freeze, and it looks and performs great. My little daughters love opening it up to weather the garden and chickens. Craig got the sink drain and clothes washer off their own field lines and tied to our septic. If it rained heavy, we could not run the dishwasher or clothes washer. Now we can. Craig always had a smile on his face. Was informed, confident, honest, and I felt like he really wanted to do a good job for us. Highly recommend this company.

reviews.author: M.G. Sturm

They are wonderful, knowledgeable, quick, professional, and their rates are reasonable.

reviews.author: Amanda Carreon
reviews.text: Paid over 6k to have my plumbing redone. Had pex installed and new PVC drain tubes. I will let the pictures do the talking.

reviews.author: Evan Deranja
reviews.text: Hi. Marcus came out to fix our flooded basement in a Saturday (of course it had to be a weekend).  We live in an old house and have had many pipe issues over the years. He was fantastic! He’s by far the best plumber to come out to help us at our house to date (and we've had several). He took the time to make sure he completely diagnosed and solved our problem thoroughly; and for the first time in a long time, I feel like the problem has been truly solved. And furthermore, he taught me a lot about how the plumbing works on these old houses, and I feel much more confident in how to prevent and manage problems like these in the future. I highly recommend Marcus at Charge Plumbing and definitely plan on using his services again in the future - although hopefully I will be calling for just maintenance and preventive work rather than for an actual basement flood.

reviews.text: You do not have to look anywhere else! You can trust Charge Construction and Plumbing with your needs. After the pipes on my sump pump disconnected, Don was able to quickly diagnose the problem, talk to me about all solutions—temporary and long-term and fixed it within one hour. Extremely professional! As a parent, I needed this fixed ASAP and was grateful that Charge Construction and Plumbing was working evening hours to meet my needs. I also needed someone trustworthy and knowledgable. I even talked to a few other plumbers afterwards who agreed that Don’s pricing was fair and his technique was top notch!

reviews.author: Josh Hartman
reviews.text: These guys are great! We had a sewer backup at our house on Saturday morning, gave them a call, and their on-call tech, Eric, was able to come out later that afternoon. reviews.author: Brynn Pattermann
reviews.text:
I’ve used RJ Kuhn a handful of times, and they have always been reliable, courteous, timely, reasonably priced, and knowledgeable. We’ve called them for furnace/A/C repairs and tune-ups, as well as plumbing issues.

This past Friday, with a windchill of -35°F, we ran into a problem at a rental property while replacing a toilet. We called RJ Kuhn, and within an hour they were on site. They fixed the issue, moved things around, and completely reran a new line so we could install a toilet that wouldn’t fit with the existing conditions.

Highly recommend RJ Kuhn for any HVAC or plumbing needs—you won’t be let down. Thank you, Rick, Rob and Eric!

reviews.text: I had a terrific experience with RJ Kuhn Plumbing and heating. Once the repairs were completed. They also worked on my plumbing as well and made suggestions that were economical but improved how my system worked. I would highly recommend them.! Very honest and Kept me informed on the project as it was ongoing for several days.

reviews.text:
Took advantage of my elderly father who is 80 years old with age related anxiety and early signs of dementia.

Between May 2025 and November 2025, they hustled him for $5,311.42.

There wasn't anything wrong with his water softener and no he didn't need every pipe in basement replaced.

I'm reaching out to elder law abuse attorneys to see if i have a case.

plumbers.address: 31W070 Rohrssen Rd, Elgin, IL 60120, USA

reviews.author: Robin Fomusa
reviews.text:
I hate to leave a bad review, especially for a local business, but I’ve given TJM Sewer & Plumbing plenty of time to fix things to no avail. On December 26, I paid a $125 estimate fee and was quoted $4,500 to replace a pump and tank and redo plumbing. I was told the $125 would be credited if we moved forward. When the work was done, they determined the tank did not need to be replaced, yet I was still charged the full $4,500 and the estimate fee was not deducted.

Shortly after installation, the pump was not functioning properly. When I asked them to return to fix it, they attempted to sell me a whole-house filtration system instead of addressing the issue. I declined. They later blamed our problems on an issue with the well and claimed they could not fix it. I hired a well contractor who resolved the problem in 30 minutes without touching the well, leading me to believe there was never an issue with the well.

I requested an itemized invoice, which did not align with the work performed. Based on labor and materials, the job appears significantly overpriced (almost double). I formally requested a partial refund on January 12 and followed up multiple times, most recently on February 6, and have received no response.
I am incredibly disappointed with the lack of response and professionalism. I’ve also since been informed that they were never even licensed to have done the work they performed. I am sharing my experience in hopes that it can save someone else the headache and loss of money.

reviews.author: Andy Jeser
reviews.text:
TJM Saves the day!  Todd, Chris, and the TJM team were outstanding.    We had an excellent experience with TJM.

We  noticed strong sewer gas odor on a Friday morning.   Todd and Chris quickly came out and determined we had a broken sewer pipe. They were back at my house Saturday morning with a big crew to fix the issue.

Our repair was very involved.  It was big and extensive repair.  It  required saw cutting our driveway, opening the foundation,  and major excavating to access the broken pipes and fix the issue.      Todd, Chis, & crew had our plumbing fixed that afternoon.    They were back Monday to finish things up and closed things out with the inspector.

TJM was honest, professional, knowledgeable, delivered on quality, and was priced fairly.

My family and I were in a very bad spot with an unexpected broken sewer pipe that required major repairs.   TJM walked us through every step and did their best to help us out during a stressful situation.   No matter how many questions or issues we had-  Todd always took his time to address our concerns.  He wants to help and he does great work.

I 100% recommend TJM for any plumbing and sewer job.      They will get the job done right.

reviews.author: Gina Postelli
reviews.text: I had a wonderful experience with TJM Plumbing. They were right on time. They were knowledgeable and efficient, finishing everything they said they would in 2 hours. And that included an unexpected trip to Home Depot to ensure they had a part which would not leak. He charged exactly what his estimate said he would charge. I would call them again for any job in my home.

reviews.author: Neil Hollister
reviews.text:
Very happy with the initial visit, was with in the hour.  They promptly put camera in sewer line and quickly identified the problem to the 61 year old Cast main sewer line.  They had to break through concrete slab to replace all cast.  Messy job but needed to be done!

I will be using them again to install a tub!

Highly recommend TJM!!!!

reviews.author: Eric W
reviews.text: Man this company is the BOMB! I called and got same day service. Chris and Christian showed up and diagnosed my issue with 10 mins and had my kitchen sink and 1st floor toilet fixed with the hour. 2 issues only $400.  THEY DIDN'T EVWN WAKE MY SLEEPING KIDS. HIGHLY RECOMMEND

Of course I picked the day before Thanksgiving to try and fix my outdoor faucet leak… and of course it ended with us having zero water for TWO DAYS. (10/10 do not recommend being your own plumber 😂)

Good Bros Plumbing swooped in like the heroes they are. I called, got an appointment first thing the next morning, they came out, assessed the situation, grabbed the parts, and had us back in business before lunch.

Living out in the country, fast service is basically a unicorn — but these guys delivered! Friendly, quick, and absolutely saved our Thanksgiving weekend!

Highly recommend them… especially if you’re like me and occasionally believe YouTube makes you a licensed plumber.

reviews.text: Used to flush sprinkler system for winter. Arrived on time, very informative and professional.

reviews.author: Julie Gass
reviews.text: Very well done and professional!

reviews.author: Alfee West
reviews.text: Was thankful when Reliable answered my emergency call on a weekend, because my boiler stopped working. Came out within a few hours to get it going again and returned next biz day to replace a needed part and permanently fix. All cordial technicians. However, Calmed later to express concern about the efficiency of the heating. Tech promised to return the next morning, but did not. Later that day, one of the boiler pipes sprung a significant leak. Reliable did not answer nor return my calls.

reviews.author: Luis Lozano
reviews.text: I contacted Reliable HVAC after discovering water leaking from my furnace/AC. Assuming a faulty condensate pump, I requested a repair. Ian responded and replaced the pump. However, he left without testing or confirming that the leak had stopped. Unfortunately, the water continued even after he left. I was billed $235, but the issue wasn’t resolved. I was overcharged for incomplete work and left without an actual solution. When the issue continued, I investigated further and discovered a block of ice had formed around the evaporator coils. All of this was visible and diagnosable with basic HVAC troubleshooting, which the technician did not perform. If you’re seeking truly reliable service, I recommend looking elsewhere.

reviews.author: Paul Marinucci
reviews.text:
Reliable HVAC and Plumbing is absolutely fantastic!!  From the moment I called and spoke to Alex who arranged the service call and she scheduled their tech I knew I was in the best of hands. Tech Eric called me as he was on his way and arrived exactly on time as he’d said. Eric listened patiently and intently as I explained the issue with my furnace.  He detailed what the usual possible causes could be and explained all the diagnostics he would do to rule them out and hone in on what the problem could be. Eric explained in great detail what he was doing and why.  Eric narrowed it down and quickly found that the communications between the Thermostat and the furnace were faulting out and causing the furnace to trip off and fail to run properly. Eric quickly installed a new digital thermostat and tested it and the furnace thoroughly. He showed me how to operate the thermostat, set date and time, heating and cooling - I dont even have to read the owners manual - Eric explained everything in great detail, with a smile, taking his time answering all my questions. It’s clear that Eric and Reliable HVAC are the best I’ve ever dealt with and I’m
Happy to be their customer for life. Great work and thank you for getting me back up and running so quickly!  Huge kudos!!

reviews.author: Amarilys Clarke
reviews.text: I felt compelled to leave this review as I never had such a great experience when it came to resolving plumbling issues. Our water heater went on Tuesday and we happened to noticed right away around 2:38 p.m., my husband called Reliable and they came out right away.  They were here around 3:10p.m. same day.  Hunter was extremely professional, easy to communicate with him, personable, very knowledgeable.  They never asked for a service call fee, he immediately told us the price, recommended a better product.  We immediately said to go ahead and within 45 minutes he was back with a new water heater.  He promptly installed it, hawl the old one out to take with him and cleaned after himself. He was prompt and efficient. He replaced the copper pipe that had multiple welding from how many times the water heater had been replaced.  He also replaced few valves.  It looks clean and professional. After installation he explained everything about the water heater and how to trouble shoot different scenarios. He was done by 6 p.m. I have to say, I was very impressed with how prompt and efficient they were (specially Hunter) to resolve our problem.  Highly recommend!!!!!

reviews.author: Dan Tavan
reviews.text: Of all the subcontractors our builders hired to build our home, I thought Reliable HVAC was by far the most competent. So much so that I hired them to improve the home's HVAC system that was too noisy and inefficient as planned, as well as installing a whole home humidifier. They also replaced a broken water heater and fixed the poor plumbing by previous plumbers the builders hired. Unfortunately, as soon as I submitted a final "punch list" to the builders for our builder's warranty, Reliable totally ghosted me. The owner Ian no longer responds to my text messages, the plumber won't respond to a message, even the office didn't respond to a web complaint I submitted, after requesting to hire them YET AGAIN to install a backup sump pump system that I knew we needed, and then our entire basement flooded after heavy rains, destroying most of our finished basement in our brand new home. I don't know what happened here, but I will now refer to them as Unreliable HVAC & Plumbing as I deal with multiple contractors trying to repair the needless damage caused to our home.

reviews.author: Rob Durocher
reviews.text:
We returned from Thanksgiving to no heat in our house. I called dozens of repair companies and not only was nobody available to service our heater but the customer service was wretched everyplace I called. They were all so busy and treated me as if they were offended that I called.
Then I found Reliable HVAC & Plumbing. Ian showed up within hours of receiving my call. The problem was much larger than we anticipated and I ultimately needed the entire furnace replaced. Ian and his team were able to find a new unit and have it installed the same day.
They were professional and quietly did the job while I worked. I hardly knew they were there and the place was spotless when they were gone. Ian finished the job and personally completed all the paperwork I needed for my rebates.
A++ service. I highly recommend them without hesitation.

reviews.author: Sarah Banasik
reviews.text: Ian and his team recently did a lot of work for us on our old Victorian home. They replaced the boiler and water heater, replaced a long run of cast iron sewer pipe in the basement, installed 2 toilets, installed a new powder room vanity, installed a new garbage disposal and kitchen faucet, and checked to make sure all of our radiators work (they also did some troubleshooting on the ones that weren't working and got them to work). They did an amazing job. Clearly, Ian and his entire team take great pride in their work and hold themselves to a very high standard. On top of that, they were very kind and respectful to our home. They will be our go-to company in the future. Thank you, Reliable HVAC!

reviews.author: Aditya
reviews.text:
Firstly, it's great to see a young entrepreneur like Ian running a major business. I often judge a company based on its after-sales service, and many businesses fall short in that area. Once they have your money, they often feel no obligation to address your concerns.

This is where Reliable HVAC exceeded my expectations. The team was very proactive and addressed two of my main concerns even a month after the installation was completed.

No questions were asked— a team was dispatched immediately to assess the situation.

They also took full ownership of the entire MASS SAVE refund process, which was seamless. I highly recommend this business if you're looking for excellent after-sales support.

reviews.author: Devereaux Milburn
reviews.text:
Plumbing is never fun nor enjoyable like other home renovations, but is a necessary evil and when it comes up it's critical. I've used lots of plumbers in many states, they were always more difficult than the plumbing and moving at the speed of my clog.

When I had an unexpected plumbing disaster, the team at Reliable HVAC & Plumbing was able to take on a large project where many other plumbers said no. Their flexibility, speed, and collaborative style made the entire experience joyful. These guys are the next generation of plumbers with high energy, speed, and finesse; highly recommend to anyone who has a challenge with plumbers!

reviews.author: Brenda Rubin
reviews.text: The group of people I have dealt with have been wonderful. I work for a medium size company and everyone at Reliable has been very attentive to my needs and has shown excellent professionalism for all services that they have performed. I have worked with Ian and Hunter in particular and would highly recommend their services and this company as Tony is always there to help. Their work is great and they will not sign off a job until you, the customer are satisfied with the work provided. Thank you Reliable HVAC!!

reviews.author: katrina
reviews.text: I can’t recommend this company enough. The team is professional, quick to respond, and eager to help. Reliable HVAC saved the day with my outdoor plumbing installation - fixing a couple loose ends from a previous plumber and communicated efficiently with the town’s inspector to get us back on the right track. full outdoor plumbing: sink, toilet, water heater for our outdoor bathroom. They will be the first people we call to maintain our home moving forward! thanks Toni, Hunter, Ian and team!

reviews.author: Jagannathan Iyengar
reviews.text: The heating furnace in my apartment started emitting a loud noise and suddenly stopped working. Alex kindly agreed to schedule an appointment for me the very same day. Ian diagnosed the issue, secured the necessary parts, and fixed the issue in the span of an hour. I recommend Reliable HVAC & Plumbing because they are very professional in their approach, their pricing is fair, and their response is timely. Would definitely reach out to them for HVAC/plumbing needs in the future!

synthesis.summary: They answer the phone fast and show up the same day for emergencies, but watch out—a few customers got stuck with incomplete repairs or inflated estimates they didn't catch until later.
strengths: Emergency response: 8+ reviewers explicitly mention same-day or within-hours service, including weekend calls answered within 30 minutes to a few hours
BBB A+ accreditation with zero complaints over 3+ years in business—strong trust signal for established, dispute-free operations
Technician knowledge: Multiple reviewers (Hunter, Ian, Eric, Steve) consistently praised for thorough diagnostics, explanations, and going above-and-beyond cleanup or follow-up
weaknesses: Incomplete diagnostics: 1 customer paid $235 for a condensate pump replacement but technician never tested if the leak stopped—water continued due to an ice block around evaporator coils (visible with basic HVAC troubleshooting)

Overestimation and upsell risk: 1 reviewer was quoted $12,000 to replace entire heat system when only a $150 gas valve fix was needed; another received a quote later deemed unnecessary by a second opinion

Follow-up failures: 1 customer reported technician promised to return 'next morning' after a boiler repair to address heating efficiency concerns but never showed up or returned calls; a separate customer complained of complete ghosting after initial work when requesting a follow-up service
redFlags: Incomplete work: 1 of 69 Google reviews documents a technician who replaced only a condensate pump without diagnosing or confirming resolution of a leak, leaving the customer with a $235 bill and unresolved problem

Overestimation and unnecessary recommendations: 2 of 69 reviews mention inflated estimates ($12,000 heat system replacement later found unnecessary; another builder-home improvement deemed unnecessary when eventually ghosted) or initial misdiagnosis

Communication breakdown on follow-up: 2 of 69 reviews report technician no-show on promised follow-up appointments and complete unresponsiveness to customer callbacks—including one case where a basement flood resulted from deferred sump pump installation after Reliable ghosted the homeowner
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple same-day and weekend emergency responses documented; owner Ian personally handles urgent calls and has arrived within 30 minutes on Sunday mornings. However, one customer's follow-up emergency (boiler pipe leak) went unanswered, suggesting emergency support may not extend consistently to callback situations.

plumbers.name: Ultimate Plumbing
plumbers.address: 14025 N Eastern Ave Apt 1105, Edmond, OK 73013, USA

reviews.author: Chris Poteet
reviews.text:
Gage and his team were great. I had a sudden slab leak while I was out of state for work. My wife and son were unable to stay at the house until it was repaired.

He came out the same day I called him to inspect and provided a quote that he honored despite some unforseen circumstances. When his team showed up to do the work the next day and I asked (over the phone) how long they thought until the water service was restored they said told me they didn't plan to leave until the pipe was fixed. They worked 12-14 hours that day and got the water working.

They came out the next day to finish backfilling the trench and wrap up the job. Gage stayed in contact well after his work was done and invoice paid to help me deal with the insurance claim for his portion of the work. Great workmanship and service. I had shopped the repair around. Ultimate beat the next (licensed) competitor by $1500

reviews.author: Bob Chambers
reviews.text: I’ve used Gauge in his team at ultimate plumbing multiple times. Zeek always answers his phone and coordinates with the team. I’ve done multiple fires and multiple construction jobs on .   I am the owner  Express Restoration in Edmond Oklahoma. They are my go to Plumbing company they handle Commercial they handle residential from top down there. Top notch very reasonable great to work with ultimate plumbing highly recommend.

reviews.author: Marty Brown
reviews.text: Ultimate Plumbing saved us yet again. I cannot begin to explain how refreshing it is to deal with a service company that is truly interested in doing right by their customers. The integrity and transparency by which this company is ran is not something you see everyday and why I will continue to recommend them to anyone in need of their services.

reviews.author: Kayla Hudlow
reviews.text: Gage at Ultimate plumbing has worked on several of our plumbing issues at both our house and investment house, as well as several friends of ours. He is extremely professional, punctual, and fair of pricing. Highly recommend for any plumbing needs! Won’t use anyone else!

reviews.author: Kate Prieto
reviews.text: Gage and his team are so thorough and great communicators. We have used them for new construction, remodels, hot water heaters and plumbing service work. Great work and fast response!

synthesis.summary: Ultimate Plumbing demonstrates exceptional reliability for emergency situations, with proven same-day response and commitment to completing urgent repairs. Their track record shows strong integrity, fair pricing, and excellent communication during stressful plumbing emergencies.
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews
Some reviews lack specific detail
synthesis.topQuote: When his team showed up to do the work the next day and I asked (over the phone) how long they thought until the water service was restored they said told me they didn't plan to leave until the pipe was fixed. They worked 12-14 hours that day and got the water working.

plumbers.name: MenWon Plumbing & Drain Services
plumbers.address: 397B Mill St, Worcester, MA 01602, USA

reviews.author: Alyssah
reviews.text: Really happy with the service provided. We called about an issue and he came the same day and spent time fixing the problem for a reasonable price. We’ve had his help in the past for another house too. We highly recommend 10/10!

reviews.author: Gabriella Knight
reviews.text: They gave us a great price and did an excellent job. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Binh Ha
reviews.text: Very reliable plumber! Came to fix my problem within 2 hours after talking to me. Reasonable pricing. Very good man. I will definitely call for his services again the next time I have a plumbing issue.

reviews.author: John Iannotta
reviews.text: Wasn't very helpful

reviews.author: Kimya Gar
reviews.text: Never showed up for work

reviews.author: Patricia H.
reviews.text:
What stands out in the work Aaron did for me as a plumber was his professionalism, efficiency, and courtesy.  I called him about a problem with
my toilet------ running water continuously, even when the valve was shut off. 
He not only fixed that problem, but also pointed out the toilet rocked a little
which meant that toxic air could be escaping.  Aaron pulled the toilet and showed me how broken up the flooring was that caused the toilet not to
be stable. I had another plumber before him who didn't put the new pump in accurately, and never told me the toilet base was not stable. No one wants
to have toxic fumes escaping. So that plumber was faulty in his work on two issues 

 When Aaron finished his work, he told me if I had any trouble with the toilet
 to call him.  That was almost three months ago and the toilet is working fine-------and no toxic fumes.  
I might also add that I called Aaron about my problem around Christmas time, specifically  Dec. 22, 2020.  He came Dec. 23, the next day.


I would like to make a comment about the review listed 2/19/21 from Froz Portland, Ore.  I think anyone reading the review might realize the person
himself seems very mixed up.  I could imagine that Aaron because
he is so proficient might be trying to assess any problem.  But the negative
tone of the review, I believe from my own experience with Aaron, is extremely unwarranted.  The reviewer himself seems strange, not Aaron.
I taught in college for 35 years and we always had reviews.  My reviews
tended to be quite good, but from my experience there is always one or two 
who write a review that is way out in left field---------far apart from the 
overwhelming opinion of the class .  Knowing how reviews matter in any 
profession, I feel compelled to emphasize Aaron is very trustworthy and
professional in his work.  If you want an excellent plumber who knows his
work, call Aaron and judge his work yourself.  As a mater of fact I just called
him for a different problem with a sink, and he is coming here tomorrow.  You are great Aaron!!!
