reviews.author: Froz F.
reviews.text:
This contractor very strange.  I called and explained i already the same dimension and i will pickup new one I already bought from Lowes.
All he needs to just install swap out. I already empty water out from the old one.  So, he will be in and out no time.  Once he arrived i show him the water heater then he started to walk around and spying my house.  I told him pls dont go without ask me.  Because all he has to do just move the old one aside.  The recycle metal guy will comes in and take it.  He said he wants to see what's the back door? Then he started to taking picture of my place and saying he needs to replace my gas pipe.  I told him there is no need to replace.  Was working fine.  All i need just install the new water heater.  Then furnace didnt have sticker.  I spent almost 10mins to explain to him that i bought this house like this when i moved in and work fine.  I didnt have any issue.  I might update a new furnace but not till spring or summer. 
Than he keep saying he didnt seen a new update on my duct vent clean. I told him I don't need too.  Is he a hvac guy so i can talk to in when warm weather to about my hvac.  he said he's only doing plumbing for gas and pvc pipe..  Then, he quetion why i have an air filter over my intake duct vent.  I told him when bought this house my home appraisal told me to do that will help to keep dust away.  Then he quote was $708 for to just to connect a new heater.  which my old one is 59" and new on is 60" and already bought extra accessories just incase he needs them.   I told him other home advisor gave me a quote for $350 including permit.  He will pickup from Lowes. but he's in the  middle of the job.  so i have to wait till tomorrow morning he said.  He said the permit is cost $120 and so i have to pay for for $470.  But, he isn't believe that.  I said thank you to him so he can leave.

reviews.author: Ronnie L.
reviews.text: Our basement sewer pump stopped working last night, and I have to call any plumber available first thing this morning to have it fix before it floods our basement in-law apartment. I called Aaron, and he told me it will cost $1,500 to fix the sewer problem. I have no idea how much it will cost and how long it will take. We have to take anyone who is available, so I agreed to it. He arrived by himself around 9:30 am and finished by 11:30 am. I thought it would take a whole day. I asked him for a break down of the costs, he told me the pump cost $720 and labor costs $780. I googled on the spot that the Zoeller Mate 267-0001 sewer pump is selling on Amazon for $400, but he charged me $720. Then I asked him why he charged me almost $400 per hour, as most plumbers charge $95 per hour in my neighborhood. He said sewer work is a dirty work, so he needs to charge more. I asked how would 400% be reasonable. He said that he charged by the job, not by hour. He even threatened to report me to the credit bureau if I refuse to pay him. Then I asked him for the invoice with $1,500, and I told him that I will pay him after consulting with the Consumer Advocates Association and the Massachusetts Licensing Board. If they told me the pricing is reasonable, then I will pay him. He refused to give me the invoice. I was forced to take pictures of his van and video tape him for evidence. As a consumer, I just want to have the problem fixed and pay a reasonable price. I proposed to pay him $1,200, which includes $480 labor for 2-hour's job or $200 per hour rate. I hope his work is solid, as sewage is no joke. Dear neighbors, think twice before you call this company for your work. His pricing is no joke, guarantee rip off.

reviews.author: Natalie Ly
reviews.text:
I want to express my utmost satisfaction with Menwon Plumbing and specifically highlight the exceptional service provided by Aaron. Having availed of Aaron's expertise on two separate occasions over the past couple of years, I am compelled to share my consistently positive experiences.

Aaron's knowledge in plumbing is truly commendable. He not only possesses a deep understanding of the intricacies of plumbing systems but also demonstrates an impressive ability to identify issues with ease. What sets Aaron apart is his remarkable skill in swiftly resolving problems, leaving me thoroughly impressed on both occasions.

Beyond his technical proficiency, Aaron's honesty and reliability have been a cornerstone of my positive interactions with Menwon Plumbing. In an industry where trust is paramount, Aaron has consistently proven himself to be a professional of the highest integrity. This, coupled with his unwavering commitment to getting the job done efficiently, has made him my go-to plumber.

I wholeheartedly endorse Aaron's services and Menwon Plumbing. If you are seeking a knowledgeable, reliable, and honest professional who excels in delivering effective solutions, Aaron is the plumber to call. Five stars don't seem sufficient to capture the level of satisfaction and confidence I have in his services. Thank you, Aaron, and Menwon Plumbing, for consistently exceeding expectations.

reviews.author: Karen M.
reviews.text:
This is the third time we've hired Aaron for our plumbing issues. A couple of years ago we had him replace a toilet and 2 faucets. He showed up the day after we called to give us an estimate. He showed up on time, gave us an estimate and completed the work the same day. 
Last year he installed a new garbage disposal for us.
At the end of March this year, we needed a new hot water tank. Again, this was completed the same day as the estimate.  
Aaron is professional, friendly and does quality work. His prices are fair and reasonable. He stands by his price estimates.
We've hired Aaron 3 times and would not hesitate to call him again should the need arise.
Pay no attention to the one star review by Yuming B. If you look at this person's 6 yelp reviews, all are one star.

reviews.author: Sandy Wade
reviews.text: Arron was great! Very professional and personable. We had a clog that was causing the main drainage pipe to overflow water onto our basement floor each time we took a shower. Arron was able to fit us in the same day and fixed the issue which was an invasive tree root that was blocking the water from passing through. He showed me the ball of roots and gunk that he pulled out of there. As a first time homeowner, I had a lot of curious questions and Arron was more than happy to answer all of them for me. I highly recommend Arron and will not hesitate to call him again for any other plumbing projects or issues that arise. I will also happily recommend him to family and friends as a resource.

reviews.author: Gwyn
reviews.text: My experience with MenWon was fantastic. Aaron was extremely friendly and knowledgeable. I called him on a Thursday and my repair was done by Saturday afternoon. He took a look at the issue on Saturday and had the repair completed, all in under 3 hours. Aaron replaced copper piping connected to the water heater that was leaking for a fair price, and did not attempt to upsell me on services when I asked him a few questions about other plumbing issues. I will definitely be using MenWon for any future plumbing work. Anyone looking for a reliable, professional, and local to Worcester plumber, I would highly recommend you choose MenWon.

reviews.author: Ben Cortes
reviews.text: Aaron was extremely professional knowledgeable; flexible with our schedules .He  promptly responded to our call. Aaron did not hesitate to assist us as he responded immediately to help us out and fixed our many and complicated plumbing problems .He came right over immediately and took care of a very difficult plumbing issue .Aaron went above and beyond helping us and accommodating us with very reasonable prices for his excellent work. We highly recommend Aaron “ Menwon Plumbing services “ . As he will promptly assist you and will take great care of any Plumbing issue you may  have .

reviews.author: Susan S.
reviews.text: we had a toilet emergency which was urgent and called Aaron at Menwon, who we had used before with very excellent results. He came over right away. he is so professional and such a nice guy--it is a pleasure to see him even under difficult circumstances. he had the part we needed in his truck and was in and out in such a short period of time. we trust him and rely on him. we would not even consider any plumber except Menwon because we feel that he has our back when we need him. His charges are reasonable and his showing up for us so fast when we need him is priceless.

reviews.author: Susan S.
reviews.text: Plumbing problems are never easy but Aaron at Menwon certainly makes them as easy as they can be--instantly responsive and there to take care of you within what feels like minutes of your call. I have used Aaron at Menwon several times in the last few years and it is always the same--smiling face, quick diagnosis, fast solution. He seemingly never has to order parts--everything we need is always in his truck (sort of like my mother's purse). I think his prices are reasonable and competitive with other plumbing services but I wouldn't know because we never use them.

synthesis.summary: Aaron shows up the same day you call with the right parts already in his truck, but Yelp reviewers report he sometimes quotes one price over the phone and charges significantly more in person.
strengths: Same-day or next-day response: 25+ Google reviewers explicitly mention Aaron arriving within hours or the next day of calling, including multiple emergency situations (basement floods, holiday service calls)
BBB A+ accreditation with zero complaints over 3 years and 6 years in business — strong reliability signal
Detailed explanations and education: 10+ reviewers praise his willingness to explain problems in layman's terms and walk customers through solutions
weaknesses: Pricing discrepancies between phone quote and final bill: 2 separate Yelp reviews (both 1-star, from different reviewers) report being quoted one price over the phone and charged double or significantly more upon arrival — one drain cleaning quote allegedly doubled, another sewer pump job quoted $1,500 with customer reporting $720 for a pump available elsewhere for $400

Platform rating gap: 4.8/5 on Google (69 reviews, mostly 5-star) vs. 3.9/5 on Yelp (13 reviews) suggests possible divergence in customer experience or review platform differences; Yelp reviews contain more pricing complaints
redFlags: 2 Yelp reviewers (separate incidents, 1-star each) report significant pricing discrepancies: phone quote vs. final bill doubled or nearly doubled — one explicitly states drain cleaning quote was doubled, another sewer pump installation quoted $1,500 with customer disputing $720 pump markup and $780/hour labor as inflated
1 Google reviewer (1-star, 06/12/2023) reports no-show: 'Never showed up for work'
1 Google reviewer (1-star, 03/27/2023) — appears to be duplicate of Yelp complaint — reports same pricing bait-and-switch on drain cleaning
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews confirm same-day emergency response (2-hour arrivals mentioned, holiday availability documented, basement flooding and burst pipes handled immediately), but verify final pricing in writing before work begins given Yelp pricing discrepancy reports.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Google 4.8/5 (69 reviews) vs. Yelp 3.9/5 (13 reviews) — 0.9-point gap driven by 4 one-star Yelp reviews citing pricing surprises and no-shows, which appear rarely or not at all in Google reviews; Google reviews heavily emphasize fair pricing and estimates kept, while Yelp reviewers report unexpected charges and quote inflation

plumbers.name: The Plumbing Ministry
plumbers.address: 1996 Alvarado St, San Leandro, CA 94577, USA

reviews.author: J J.
reviews.text:
The Plumbing Ministry has helped my family out with a # of jobs from a Sewer Lateral replacement to fixing a broken kitchen sink pipe.  I've met a few of the guys and they've all been incredibly professional and very knowledgeable.  

Louis is very responsive and has always been very straightforward to work with.  His pricing is also very competitive.  

I highly recommend their work and have had a wonderful experience with Louis and his company.

reviews.author: Anne Brockhoff
reviews.text: Very professional and work was completed quickly. We highly recommend.

reviews.author: Erin J.
reviews.text:
We had a leak in October and I saw water tricking down our hill before the rain started. It turned out to be our main water line coming into our house from an old galvanized pipe. Our driveway needed to be pulled up, the gas company called.. there were many steps along the way and the job took several days from permit to finish. Jose and his team were fantastic, walking through each step with me and making sure I understand and was happy. 

Water is on and we are happy to recommend them.

reviews.author: Linda H.
reviews.text: I have used this company twice. I think they do good work, but their billing practices are questionable. I won't use them again.

reviews.author: Adam S.
reviews.text: They had to reschedule 2 separate times. Trench in sidewalk wasn't fully covered leaving a fall hazard and personal liability.

reviews.author: Karin S.
reviews.text:
I posted the following review in July 2014 but the post is no longer visible. I'm posting again because a friend told me that they were considering using this company based on yelp reviews:
If only it were possible to find words eloquent enough to dissuade you from calling the Plumbing Ministry!

If you want to pay someone thousands of dollars for a job that's destined to fail because the underlying problem wasn't addressed, go ahead and call the Plumbing Ministry.  If you want to wait around all day for someone to show who comes late or doesn't come at all, call the Plumbing Ministry. If you want to be told several days in a row (on the days that the plumber actually DOES come) that your sewage problem is now fixed and then have sewage under your house within a minute of turning on your water, then call the plumbing ministry. If you want someone who refuses to answer phone calls or emails or text messages to try to remedy the problem unless it's convenient, call the Plumbing Ministry.    But of course, it's all worth it since he is there to tell you that "Jesus loves you."  

I actually was foolish enough to have recommended Louis and The Plumbing Ministry to friends and neighbors after he did work for me a few years ago.  I regret that decision terribly.  I was surprised to read the negative reviews on Yelp when I went to find his phone number again; I was foolish enough to have ignored those reviews and trusted that my initial experiences were a testament to a solid work ethic and professional expertise.  Wrong on both counts.  I'll give some of the details below for those of you who are still inclined to trust the positive reviews.

1. He failed to determine that the reason I've had to repeatedly repair my sewage pump (and replace it several times at a cost of thousands of dollars per pump) is because the waste line from the pump to the  city sewer line wasn't installed properly in the first place.  This was in spite of my asking him why I was having such frequent problems when my neighbors never had to replace or repair their pumps.

2. When my pump failed again (and the alarm he installed never went off- I discovered it because of the smell of raw sewage under the house), his team of plumbers did determine that the cause of the problem was the sewage line to the sewer main.  As one of them said, "If I had put the pump in myself, I would have checked the line and recommended this be fixed. It should have been done before."   Remember, the Plumbing Ministry plumbers were the ones who DID install the pump.

3. That first day, the plumber said he got everything working again, that I could use the plumbing normally but that the lines would need to be fixed soon but not emergently.  After he left, I turned on the water, and thesewage tank promptly overflowed.  I called and left urgent voicemails.  No response, I called the office mid-morning.  I was assured that someone would go out that day to fix it.

4. The first day, the plumber was two hours late in arriving.  The second day he didn't come at all.  No phone calls about it either.

5. I called that night and actually reached Louis, who promised me someone would fix it the next day. I made a HUGE deal about wanting someone to call me since I couldn't be on site and let me know if the problem wasn't completely fixed.  I came home the next day. No one called. No notes, messages, voicemails, or emails and nothing in the mailbox.   I turned on the water, and the tank overflowed immediately.  Again.

6. I sent a bunch of urgent texts and emails to Louis, who said "it was working when he left yesterday."  He said he'd send someone out before 9 the next morning.

7. After unanswered calls, texts, and emails starting at 9, the plumber arrived after 9:30.  He said he was "doing me a favor by coming since he wasn't even supposed to be working" and that he wasn't here to fix the problem, just to figure out what was wrong.  He was rude and disrespectful.  He tried to tell me that the pump had been unplugged (which it wasn't but I didn't say anything to contradict him) and that was why it wasn't working. He said it was working now and tried to leave. I told to wait, turned on the water, and the tank overflowed.  Then he said he "jiggled it" to get it working but now it was working. The tank overflowed again. Then he said it was failing because I wasn't giving the tank time to empty (but a working pump with an open drainage line can empty the tank in well under a minute, and he completely disregarded the fact that the tank was allegedly empty when I turned on the water in the first place).  Then he said that the reason that the tank was overflowing was because the line was backed up (duh) but that he wasn't going to fix it since he had somewhere else to be. He said someone else would come later that day to fix it.  
It has been days since I was told that my problem was fixed.  Louis hasn't returned calls, texts, or emails.  call someone with a work ethic!

reviews.author: Suzy G.
reviews.text:
NOTE: Many of the reviews for this company are from real estate agents who are not invested in either the cost nor the actual need for repairs.  Most of the other positive reviews include the phrase, "they found out I needed to replace blah blah blah..."  No one EVER says, "he found that nothing further needed to be done."  One reviewer even mentions that his first inspector said there were no problems but the Plumbing Ministry magically found that repairs needed to be done.  Those are red flags to me.  The Plumbing Ministry tried to get me to pay thousands of $$ for work that a second opinion proved was not necessary.  

Here's my story, I call it A Tale of Two Plumbers:

We're selling our house in Alameda and we needed to get a sewer lateral certification, per city code, before the close of escrow.  Our agent hires The Plumbing Ministry.  The day Luis arrives there are other inspectors and contractors running around and it's very clear we're selling the house.  He says nothing to anyone, films the sewer line, and gives me a dvd of the inspection.  I pay him $150 on the spot.

Fast forward 6 weeks - it's only days til closing.  I learn that this is NOT AT ALL what the city needs and Luis KNEW THAT at the time.   He acknowledged this on the phone and then said, "well, that's not what she asked for - she just asked for the dvd."  He was difficult to get in touch w/ and then rude and sullen on the phone. He then emails me a quote for $2000 to have my sewer replaced and updated. He never actually said anything to me about whether the work needed to be done or whether he was just making shit up.  Never discussed it at all.

I call up BONAFIDE PLUMBING last night and he explains thoroughly what the city is asking for.  He then immediately makes a call to a contact in the permit department and determines that the certification was done before I owned the place and that it's still effective.  He picks up the paperwork I'll need for the sale and drops it off this morning at my house.  $115.  It was worth every penny to get my needs met so quickly and to be communicated with in such a professional fashion.

When you ask for a termite inspection, you expect a pest report, not a guy saying, "yup, you have termites."  When you ask for a tune-up you expect the mechanic to point out that your hoses are about to blow.  When you complain about sore boobs you expect your doctor to check for cancer, not give you tylenol. 

Moral of the story: it's the job of the professional to know more than you do about what you need and to advise you of the best course of action!  

I got that from Bonafide Plumbing.  I did not get it from The Plumbing Ministry.

reviews.author: Melissa S.
reviews.text:
This company deserves a NEGATIVE star review, but since we cannot do that we are sticking with 1 star. 

We have been dealing with this company for 4 months now for our sewer lateral replacement and testing, a project that should have taken 3 days. 
This is a dishonest company that uses tactics of bait and switch, miscommunication, and unskilled labor. They never finished what they were contracted to do and more than doubled charged us for the unfinished work.

Here are the bullets points.
-Project should have been around $2000 - we ended up paying $4250
-Misleading and miscommunications all throughout the entire project
-Poor craftsmanship:
     +Fined by the City of Alameda for "discharge of sediment runoff" and "discharge of runoff water and ponding water associated with excavation activities flowing into the City municipal storm drain system"
      +Buried a barrel underground (found when our second plumbing company came to fix the work of Plumbing Ministry)
      +We were disconnected from the sewer for several days and when we inquired with a worker if we should be concerned, he said yes and said that he was there to clean up the poor work previously start 
       +Took pavers and lost them and replaced them with bricks on the patio
-Never completed the contracted jobin order for us to get a certificate and tried to charge us more money to finish the job
-Took almost 4 months for a 3 day job and we still do not have a certificate

Plumbing Ministry played a game of bait and switch and used poor communication to make this our worst experience with any contractor or business we have ever worked with.
They have no integrity in their work.  At this point we have hired a new plumber who has been working hard with us to get this project finished and we expect it to be completed by end of the week. 

During this process of locating a new plumber to finish this job, we heard from several companies that Plumbing Ministry has a reputation of using unskilled workers with no experience to do the labor, and the owner spends most of his time in Realtors offices trying to drum up business, instead of doing his due diligence to scope the work and better supervise his workers. This appears to be true from our experience with Plumbing Ministry.  

We are placing this complaint with Better Business Bureau as well, as it has been indicated that this company has treated other clients in a similar manner and are not providing services they promise and ripping people off.  We informed the company that we would be filing a BBB complaint and they did not care.

reviews.author: Christian K.
reviews.text:
Never, I mean never do any business with this company. Don't even think about it. Try a reputable company like Pipe Spy; it's not worth any money you might save.

I, like my wife in the comments below, do not enjoy writing bad reviews as I know it does effect their business and was the reason I gave Louis (the owner) a chance to make us remotely satisfied customers after his company botched both our sewer lateral jobs. But, now I am here writing a review on a company I no longer want to think about. 

So here are a few more details on our dealings with Plumbing Ministry. It's almost amusing, if it wasn't so odor-ifically and ecologically painful.

After 50 some odd days of fecal matter in our front and side yards that is directly above the Fruitvale Creek and after taking 2 half days off work, Louis sent me a check for $325. It should be noted I spent over $9000 on his horrific services. I left a voicemail message with Louis that he spelled my name wrong on the check he sent and that I did not cash it yet. After not hearing back from him (as always), I cashed the check. The payment was stopped on the check and I was charged $5 from my Bank. This was after he told me their communication could be better. He did not communicate to me that he was stopping payment and was sending another check! Amazingly classic! He is still costing me time and money and they are done with there work...and their repair work.

So the real issue is a lack of communication both internally and externally with the company and their processes. In short, they had 2 different crews come out on each day and then did not check to make sure the they did the job correctly, like say flush a toilet and watch the water flow out the lateral? Speaking to Louis on the day he repaired his company's mistake, it is clear that he was not learning from his miss-steps and would not change his processes and would do this sort of thing again. I own a business myself, and if I made a huge mistake, I would not hesitate to pay all of the cost, especially if it was a customer that had had 2 jobs with me.

I real could go on for days about this, but I am done complaining about this disaster of a company. I still have not spoken to anyone at the company who knows if they removed the feces in my front yard or just left it there. But least my toilet flushes now.

Don't be like me, choose a good company that cares about it's customers.

reviews.author: Danielle J.
reviews.text:
I pondered about posting this review as it has been sitting in my drafts since October 2019:

Me giving them 2 stars in more than generous after the horrific experience I had with the owner, the workers and the 2 LOVELY (sarcasm) women who work in the office. I can say the work did finally get done correctly but the customer service I received was absolutely disgusting. It all began when I pulled up to home and found out the workers had taken over not just my driveway but also my neighbors driveway and they had debris all over the place. I had to call the office and get that handled. But that's not the worst part. I received a text from the owner saying the work was complete and he needed full payment. I was at the sight less than 4 hours before he sent the message and we were no where near complete. I had someone else stop by and check to make sure everything else was cleaned up and squared away. The photos I added show how it looked when he demanded full payment. At that point one of the most disrespectful conversations I have ever had with a contractor ensued. I began be yelled at by the women who worked in the office and the owner. I let them know that they would not be receiving a payment from me until the work was completed. They then attempted multiple times to send me a "invoice" saying they needed a deposit for the work which should had been sent before the work began. I then informed the owner that he would need to meet at the sight the following morning so we can see what he calls complete vs what I call complete. He never showed and dodge each and everyone of my phone calls. I took off of my job in order to deal with this man. Once they said the work was complete I myself went by and doubled checked. I then proceeded to head to their office so I can put a face to the name of both the disrespectful office assistants once I arrived the room was filled with tension and disrespect. They then blamed me for why the merchant rejected the payment over night. Saying that they don't make transactions that large ($7500.00) and that's why they wanted a deposit. Which if they would've been up on their paperwork and paid attention to what was going on they would've sent over a invoice for a deposit.
With that being said please run far,far,far,far,far,far away if you can from them. And if not make sure you get everything in writing and don't let them bully you around.

reviews.author: David K.
reviews.text:
Full disclosure, the rating is based on poor communication, withholding information, and a lack of respect for their customers.  I can't actually speak for the work, although to be fair it did pass EBMUD inspection.  I don't actually know the quality, because I never saw it once it was completed. 

The BIG issue I have...

I hired these guys to replace my upper sewer lateral.  I came home the first night to find that my gas line had been turned off.  I found out only because PG&E left me a note stating they had to turn my gas off due to the gas line being hit.  PG&E came back at 11pm that night to finally turn it back on. I never heard anything from these guys about the incident.  No apologies until I brought it up after the work had been completed.  No attempt to rectify or even acknowledge the incident, which turned out to be a bigger deal than I originally thought.  I learned from my neighbor, who happened to be around and who took some pictures, that multiple fire trucks were called out to to handle the situation.  Luckily it was handled without any additional damage to the home.

SMALLER issues I have...

I was told on the phone that the work would ensure 20 years compliance with EBMUD - turns out that's only if they replace the entire sewer lateral...found that out after the work had been completed.  When I was told by Louis, I was made to feel like this was my fault and that their employees know better than to give me this kind of misguided information. 

Additionally, I was also told by an employee that they guarantee their work for 11 years and that any issues would be resolved by them.  Still waiting to know if this is actually the case, because Louis continues to dodge the question.  

Instead of responding to my question, I just got a call from their administrator asking to finalize my payment.  Got it, I need to pay, will do.  But at least resolve any issues I have before requesting your payment.  

Working with these guys just made me feel like they were all about the money and moving as quickly as possible.  I had to follow up with them to come and clean up the mess they had left behind once the work had been completed. 

Again, can't really speak about the work itself, but if you're looking for some honest and open communication with your plumber...these guys aren't the ones for you.

reviews.author: Brad J.
reviews.text:
The Plumbing Ministry replaced a sewer lateral near me, on a busy street, as part of a real estate transaction. The entire process has been marked by a total lack of professionalism, disregard for rules, and total lack of respect for the neighborhood.

As I write this, they have left a large (12+ inches deep) hole in the middle of the road, filling with water, spilling gravel into the bike lanes. The hole isn't marked. Cars are bashing into it, and it will cause a bicycle or motorcycle to wreck.

This is just the latest example of a total lack of professionalism or care for the safety of anybody. They illegally blocked parking with cones, then left them for days. They parked construction trailers in bike lanes, left a large pile of dirt in the sidewalk. They made no effort to get permits to remove parking or properly divert traffic. Neighbors, getting home from work late at night, had to remove their cones and junk from street parking. All the neighbors are totally sick of them. When they first showed up and blocked 6-8 spaces with cones, I called their office to inquire how long they intended to block parking. They lied and said they were not blocking any street parking. They left those cones laying around the street for days.

Update in response to the owner's comment:
His claims are false. The photo attached to this review shows the state of the patch as left by uniformed employees of The Plumbing Ministry. It was done poorly, with no compaction -- employees simply dumped bags of asphalt in the hole. I live across the street and watched this all. No asphalt was ever removed. The patch simply sunk because of poor workmanship.

I'm pretty sure the owner knows this, because after neighbors complained to the City contractor oversight office,  he or somebody else from The Plumbing Ministry office showed up to put a cone in the hole, and came back almost every morning to replace the cone after it was hit by cars. 

The final patch was done by *another* contractor. 

The owners comments seem to be simply another example of the outright dishonesty that has marked all my interactions with this company. The owner's comment are simply false. This was done entirely by the Plumbing Ministry. And I believe the owners knows this. 

Read the rest of the comments here. My experience is not an outlier.

reviews.author: Seido Karasaki
reviews.text:
EDIT: ***See the owner's response. Note the total lack of empathy or ownership for the mistake. Do you really want to do business with plumbers who don't even try to help when something goes wrong, especially when it affects somebody who had nothing to do with the job? I would encourage everyone who is thinking of hiring this company to think twice - read all the negative yelp and google reviews to see what you're really getting into when you hire the Plumbing Ministry. One review even notes that the only positive reviews are from real estate agents who want the bare minimum done. I would highly encourage anyone reading this review who has had problems with the Plumbing Ministry to reach out to the El Cerrito City Department, Better Business Bureau, California Department of Consumer Affairs, and California Attorney General's Office to file a complaint.***

My neighbors hired the Plumbing Ministry to do some plumbing work. This involved the company coming on July 24th and digging up the pipes in the street area between my neighbors place and residence. They then proceeded to accidentally cut our cable and wifi service line, which resulted in a brief interruption to cell service. As of today, July 28th, the wifi service still has not been fixed.

The Plumbing Ministry has not offered to resolve this situation in any way whatsoever. They first tried to deny they had anything to do with it, but after confronting them, they told me they would contact the office and the right people to get this fixed. Since I had not heard anything from them and no work had been done to restore access, I called the office number for the plumbing ministry. I talked to the owner who was apathetic at best, denied all wrongdoing by stating that our cables were unmarked (which does not seem like a reason to cut them in the first place), and told me that there is nothing they can do.

Wifi may seem unimportant to most, but as somebody who works remotely, I find the apathy and the lack of ownership taken by the Plumbing Ministry to be appalling. I believe my experience to be indicative of the work they perform and the service that they provide as a business.

reviews.author: Susan W.
reviews.text:
When my toilet and shower drainage was clogged again, I figured it was time to find a good plumber to get the issue detected at the source and have it fixed for the long run. When it was clogged before, a bunch of roots were found that had caused the clogginess. Immediately I thought about Louis. I used his service before and initially got the recommendation from by my neighbor, a UC professor. Since I was happy with his service and efficiency, I decided to contact him again. 

When I texted him ( a way he prefers for communications with him/his company), he responded speedily and asked me what exactly the problem was and the inch-width  of the pipe. He later showed up at the house per my request with the camera snake and showed me how the equipment worked and what he found out. It turned out that my pipe was replaced partially before and the section by the bath room near was still the old terra-cotta pipe where roots got in through the joint. Louis mentioned that drainage pipe is his area of specialty.

He explained the issue distinctly and offered me pragmatic suggestion- having the old pipe replaced with cast iron instead of keeping it and ending up paying about $450 each time to have  a plumber fix the clog. He gave me the heads-up about the length of hours for the work and reminded me to prepare for the noise created by jack-hammer digging. He also checked and made sure there was outlet outside for the crew. And he had his staff unclog/clean the toilet and shower drainage on the same day.

His crew showed up punctually at the time/day we'd set up and completed the work smoothly.  

Overall, Louis and his crew have the efficiency and smoothness that suits my expectations for a good plumbing service. It'll continue to be the top one on my choice list.

reviews.author: Tontra L.
reviews.text:
Not fair that I can't publish negative stars. HORRIBLE! HORRIBLE! This is the worst company I have come in contact with for a long time. When they replaced the sewer line for my neighbor, they ripped up my front yard instead, tore out plants that had been growing for 15 years, and placed a large sewer circle in my front yard. This was after my neighbor told them not to. When I tried to contact the owner, he never once apologized for anything. He wouldn't talk to me, only texted. When I finally got him on the phone he was extremely dismissive. The only thing he would say is that they should not have touched my yard. After weeks one of his supervisors said they would not remove the line (because it cost more money), but they would bury it and replace the plants. It took over a month for them to do anything. They did buy the plant I requested, but only two small ones instead of the entire space they destroyed. When I tried to follow up, they continued to ignore me. Another neighbor on the next street said their neighbors had many problems with them as well. My neighbors were so upset and even with both of us complaining, they did not do much. They are a HORRIBLE company. If I could give them negative stars, I would. Do not use them. They are the reason I am writing my first negative review and I have been on yelp for years. To make it worse the boss ends his message with, "Remember, Jesus love you." He just uses that to continue being horrible to those around him.

The other option was replacing the line and rerouting it or taking it to the sidewalk. That was ignored and no one ever made contact. You did not use shared space, you destroyed my front yard on my property line. Wish you had talked to me once like you posted on yelp.

synthesis.summary: The Plumbing Ministry shows a concerning pattern of poor accountability and professionalism despite some quality work. Multiple customers report property damage, unprofessional behavior, and the company's refusal to take responsibility for mistakes, making them risky for emergency situations.
strengths: Quality technical work when done properly
weaknesses: Poor accountability for mistakes and damage
Unprofessional behavior reported
Property damage issues
redFlags: Multiple reports of property damage with no accountability
Alleged theft of customer belongings
Company denies responsibility for cutting utility lines
Owner described as apathetic to customer concerns
Pattern of leaving jobs unfinished or poorly completed
synthesis.topQuote: The staff was always timely, courtesy, respectful, and hard working. KUDOS to Louis and his team!!
synthesis.worstQuote: The technician had clearly taken it from my belongings and used it as a pad while working under my house and left it there! The technician is the ONLY person who had access to my crawl space since the home was purchased, but Plumbing Ministry denied that their employee did this and refused to compensate me for the loss.

plumbers.name: Doctor Drain & Sewer Cleaning
plumbers.address: 127 Ridgeway Ave, Aurora, IL 60506, USA

reviews.author: Sonia Agudo
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Dr. Drain and Sewer Cleaning Company. They were very punctual, professional, and provided excellent service from start to finish. They cleaned the sewer lines thoroughly and took the time to explain what was going on and share their expertise. I really appreciated their honesty and attention to detail. If you’re looking for a reliable company to handle drain or sewer issues, I highly recommend them!

reviews.author: Orbelin Martinez
reviews.text: Great service, friendly staff very fast and efficient took care of our problem. I highly recommend them use them for any small or big job. They will definitely take care of you. Prices are very good. Not like other companies that charge an arm and a leg.

reviews.author: Anita Martinez
reviews.text: Today we encountered a serious problem at our home. The drain was clogged in all our toilets and main drain system in the home, as I called the drain doctor, he came out quickly within the hour, took care of the problem and discovered that there was roots in our sewer system. I highly recommend this company to anyone in the area. Their prices are very friendly and the team works fast and efficient.

reviews.author: Keith R.
reviews.text: Called them on a Friday night for a recurrent issue we’ve had with our sewer backing up, which hasn’t happened in 5 years, nevertheless it needs to be taken care of fairly urgently. Javier spent a good amount of time explaining our options and what we can expect from the service tech coming out. Ended up going with Doctor Drain over the other companies that I called for bids on based on the amount of time they spent on the phone with me, and they were out here within 36 hours of my request. He took extra time working on everything and our drain flow better than it did even before the blockage stopped things up, and showed me where the sludge was collecting in our pipes. Don’t hesitate to call Doctor Drain out for your drain and sewer needs! Reasonably priced, great service in home, great customer service over the phone, and quick to respond, what more can you ask for?

reviews.author: Eric Barrera
reviews.text: I couldn’t be more happier with  having Dr. Drain and sewer coming out and unclogging my basement drain. The pricing he charged me was unbeatable compared to any other companies I’ve called. He’s very reasonable, very professional and knowledgeable when it comes to his work I highly recommend him!

synthesis.summary: Doctor Drain & Sewer Cleaning shows excellent reliability with fast emergency response (within 1-36 hours), professional service, and competitive pricing. All reviewers praise their expertise, thoroughness, and honest communication, making them a solid choice for drain and sewer emergencies.
weaknesses: Limited review sample size
Only sewer/drain specialization mentioned
synthesis.topQuote: Ended up going with Doctor Drain over the other companies that I called for bids on based on the amount of time they spent on the phone with me, and they were out here within 36 hours of my request. He took extra time working on everything and our drain flow better than it did even before the blockage stopped things up

plumbers.name: Intelligent Service: Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Drain Cleaning
plumbers.address: 951 N Old Rand Rd Unit 104, Wauconda, IL 60084, USA

reviews.author: sheshannah kuhl
reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of working with Anthony DiBari from DiBari Plumbing, and I couldn’t be more impressed. From the moment I called, they were responsive, friendly, and quick to schedule an appointment. When they arrived, they were punctual, respectful of my home, and fully equipped to tackle the issue at hand.
Not only did they fix the problem efficiently, but they also took the time to explain what went wrong and how to prevent it in the future. The pricing was transparent and fair, with no hidden fees or surprises.
I’m genuinely grateful for the level of expertise and customer care they provided. I highly recommend Anthony DiBari to anyone in need of plumbing services. They’ve earned a customer for life!

reviews.author: David Hunter
reviews.text: These guys always do an excellent job. On three different visits, they installed a new AC, furnace, and humidifier. Their prices are reasonable; they installed the new units only a few days after I called; they got the job right the first time; and all the units were quality products. I'll definitely be calling them again if I need plumbing help.

reviews.author: Irv Bomberger
reviews.text: We have used Intelligent Service for over a decade and have consistently enjoyed excellent service.  Most recently we needed them to replace a shower cartridge in an old shower in an old house.  It could have been an expensive fix given the old piping and framing of the house, but our service technician worked with us to carefully fix the problem without structural damage.  This level of expertise and service is invaluable.

reviews.author: Mike M.
reviews.text:
Boomer and the crew fixed our sewer problem quickly and let me exactly what they were doing.  They explained the process perfectly.
Very satisfied and will use them again.

reviews.author: Varg James
reviews.text: Geo was professional and courteous. He came to perform a tuneup service for the furnace. He exudes confidence. Explained everything he performed in detail. I will definitely consider their service in the future.

synthesis.summary: Intelligent Service appears to be a highly reliable plumbing company with over a decade of consistent service and expertise in handling complex problems. Customers consistently praise their professionalism, fair pricing, and ability to explain issues clearly, making them a solid choice for emergency situations.
strengths: Experienced technicians who explain work clearly
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews for full assessment
No specific emergency response times mentioned
synthesis.topQuote: It could have been an expensive fix given the old piping and framing of the house, but our service technician worked with us to carefully fix the problem without structural damage. This level of expertise and service is invaluable.

plumbers.name: Friendly Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1128 Algonquin Rd, Lake in the Hills, IL 60156, USA

reviews.author: Karen Smith
reviews.text: Michael is terrific! Quick response. Knowledgeable. Friendly and extremely fair. Professional,  respectful, direct. Follows through and truly cares. Love this company.  Can't say enough good things!!

reviews.author: Paulette C
reviews.text: Friendly Plumbing is a wonderful company.  We had a leak in our storage area and were so worried about what was happening.  I called Friendly Plumbing and Michael was here the next day.  Looked at the issue and told me all I needed was an end cap on a vent pipe and he wouldn't take any payment from me. So nice to work with an honest company.

reviews.author: m m
reviews.text:
I had an emergency water heater issue on a Sunday and called Friendly Plumbing.  Even though they were technically closed, they answered my call, gave me instructions for safety until they could arrive the following morning and provided me with warranty information on the unit within minutes of us talking

The next day when Michael arrived he knew within minutes what the issue was, explained why it malfunctioned and had the faulty parts installed.  Because of the previous days water leak, the unit wouldn’t stay lit because everything was still wet so we set up a large fan to dry it out and he returned later to finalize the repair.  Michael has done other work at my home over the years and it’s always done meticulously, professionally and  of course Friendly!  He’s a plumbing genius!  Fortunately for me he installed a floor drain years ago in the utility closet and that saved my adjoining room’s flooring during this incident

From start to finish this company was amazing- made a tough situation much easier to navigate. Highly recommend them for sll your plumbing needs

reviews.author: Nany Michael
reviews.text:
Total ripoff! I hired them to take a look for a partially clogged toilet. A guy came and asked, if I wanna remodel?!!! I said no
He said; well, it will cost you $825!!!
For what?!! He said we will remove the whole toilet and unclogged.
I told him it’s just a partial clogging. He said:” I know but that’s our price”!!
Total RIPOFF

reviews.author: Susan McKinney
reviews.text: I cannot speak highly enough of Friendly plumbing. The owner is so conscientious. He resolved my tree root drain clog quickly and competently, left the area spotless,  and even resolved an additional issue I had with low water pressure in my faucet. He was also so personable and polite. I would hire him any time.

synthesis.summary: Friendly Plumbing shows strong reliability and honest practices, with the owner Michael receiving praise for quick emergency response and fair pricing. However, one concerning review about excessive pricing for a simple toilet clog suggests potential inconsistency in estimates.
weaknesses: Inconsistent pricing on simple repairs
Limited review sample size
redFlags: One report of excessive pricing ($825 for toilet unclogging)
synthesis.topQuote: Even though they were technically closed, they answered my call, gave me instructions for safety until they could arrive the following morning
synthesis.worstQuote: Total ripoff! I hired them to take a look for a partially clogged toilet... He said we will remove the whole toilet and unclogged... it will cost you $825!!!

plumbers.name: Mass Pike Plumbing & Heating
plumbers.address: 100 Front St suite 401, Worcester, MA 01608, USA

reviews.author: Starlin Pichardo
reviews.text: Excellent service from start to finish! The plumber arrived on time, was extremely professional, and explained everything clearly before starting the work. The repair was done quickly, pricing was fair, and they left everything clean and tidy. Highly recommend this company for anyone needing reliable plumbing services.

reviews.author: Rob Bemis
reviews.text: Quick and easy, nice guy

reviews.author: patricia philbrick
reviews.text: Evan’ service was great. He arrived on time and fixed  and replaced the pipe problems.He then  installed our new washer and dryer.  He also replaced our dryer hose that goes outside. His price was very reasonable.

reviews.author: Nathia Reed
reviews.text:
I’m a homeowner who has trusted Evan from Mass Pike Plumbing for years, and there’s no one I would call before him. He’s handled everything for me from unclogging tubs, repairing toilets, replacing and fixing my boiler, and most recently rescuing me when my sump pump broke and water started flooding the basement.

Evan treats every home like it’s his own. His attention to detail is unmatched and he never cuts corners. At the same time his time management is incredible because the job gets done right and it gets done fast. He’s extremely knowledgeable and always takes the time to explain what went wrong, how to prevent it, and what future issues to watch for.

I’ve recommended Evan to countless people and they can’t stop raving about him. Even my former landlord, who first hired him years ago, was so impressed with his work that he began calling Evan for all of his properties and business needs. Work with Evan once and you’ll never look anywhere else. If you want a plumber who is honest, reliable, and truly cares about protecting your home, Evan and Mass Pike Plumbing are the only choice. He’s not just a plumber, he’s peace of mind.

reviews.author: Nicole Freeman
reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of working with Mass Pike Plumbing & Heating, and I couldn’t be more impressed with their professionalism, reliability, and quality of work. From the moment I called, Evan was courteous and responsive, scheduling an appointment that worked with my schedule.

Evan arrived on time, quickly diagnosed the issue, and clearly explained the repair process. Not only did he fix the problem efficiently, but he also went the extra mile to ensure everything was working perfectly before leaving. He kept the workspace clean and treated my home with respect — which I really appreciated.

It’s rare to find a company that combines skill, honesty, and great customer service, but Mass Pike Plumbing & Heating checks all the boxes. I wouldn’t hesitate to call them again or recommend them to anyone in need of plumbing services.

Thank you again for a job well done!

reviews.author: Stefanie DePaul
reviews.text:
Evan Ryan & Mass Pike Plumbing & Heating are THE BEST! Evan is one of the hardest working people I have ever met in my entire life. I met Evan years ago and whenever I have any issue with my plumbing, Evan is there right away! Evan has installed a rainforest showerhead for me. Evan has come on a Sunday and fixed a clogged kitchen sink that was full of crushed egg shells in the garbage disposal. (he also taught me that the garbage disposal is for crumbs and not for actual food!) Evan has come to my office and unclogged a toilet on a Sunday. He is also installed plumbing for a washer and dryer at my office. He always gives a fair price and he always cleans up after himself and leaves the place nicer than he found it.

I highly recommend Evan and Mass Pike plumbing and heating! 10/10 Recommend! 😀

reviews.author: Vitamin Enriched
reviews.text:
I had an awful plumbing situation at my grandmother's house after business hours. The only person to call us back was Evan. I was very upset when he called, and he took the time to  calm me down, and assured me he'd be able to make it out to the house. He did! He was so kind, and walked us non-plumbing folks through the process, the payment, and resolution.

On top of his technical expertise, he was  respectful of her home, and left everything cleaner than when he arrived. Finding a professional with this level of reliability and integrity is rare which is why I'm a customer for life. You can trust Mass Pike with your grandma! And let’s be honest, you definitely want this guy on your side in a shitty situation.

reviews.author: Allan Pires
reviews.text:
Doing business with Evan was a satisfying experience! He came to rescue me when I most needed. Long story short: The pipe connection to my water heater burst on a cold Friday night around 10:50pm. Instantly I was left with no hot water in the house. I contacted Evan first thing Saturday morning, after seeing all his great reviews. He promptly showed up, diagnosed my water heater with rusty pipes, and gave me a fair estimate. Evan replaced my water heater and all the plumbing connections on the same day.
From now on I’ll be Evan’s customer for all my HVAC/plumbing needs. Thank you, Evan! Keep up the outstanding work!
Allan Pires

reviews.author: Lee Giombetti Britt
reviews.text: When we lost heat and hot water we had another company come out, who after hours,  said we needed some part that took a week to come in. After a week with no hot water they installed the part and still no heat and hot water. Our niece then gave us the number for Evan and Mass Pike Plumbing & Heating. Evan came right away and within 15 minutes knew what was wrong. He had it fixed and cleaned up in under an hour and at a very good price!! Evan is extremely knowledgeable, professional, and friendly. Evan and Mass Pike Plumbing & Heating will now always be our go to and I will definitely recommend Evan whenever I can!

reviews.author: Nicole Ruf
reviews.text: Evan has been our go to Plumber for a couple years now. He is very responsive with communications and he always makes room for us in his schedule. We feel confident and safe with Evan as our plumber. He is respectful, trustworthy and reliable. He has been able to diagnose all our problems and fix them same day or within a couple days. If you are looking for a reliable plumber for any of your plumbing problems or emergent needs Evan is your guy. He will show up, ready to figure out how to help your family best, he will communicate clearly, and he will get the job done in a timely manner.

reviews.author: Gigi Moise
reviews.text: Evan was dispatched to my home due to my toilet not working properly and bathroom sink clogged . He arrived on time and went straight to work. He was attentive to the situation . Explained every step of the way . Even caught a leak I wasn’t aware of. 🫣Identified the problem and remediated as quick as possible. I couldn’t be more happy with the service. If you’re looking for prompt, professional, knowledgeable  and overall positive experience look no further then Mass Pike Plumbing and Heating. Tell them Gigi sent you .

reviews.author: Stephanie L
reviews.text:
Quiero recomendar a mi plomero Evan, quien hizo un trabajo excelente!!!
Sus empleados son muy profesionales y, además, hablan español, lo cual fue de gran ayuda para entender claramente el problema con mi plomería. Se tomaron el tiempo para explicarme todo con paciencia y amabilidad. Además de ser muy amable y profesional, ofreció un precio justo por un servicio de alta calidad.
***Sin duda volveré a contratarlo y lo recomiendo totalmente a cualquiera que necesite un plomero confiable!!
Gracias Evan!

reviews.author: Peter Tran
reviews.text:
Evan did an outstanding job with my plumbing repair. He was professional, efficient, and clearly knew exactly what he was doing. The work was completed quickly and the results are perfect — everything is running smoothly again. I’m so happy with the quality of his work and the care he put into the job. It’s such a relief to have everything fixed properly.

I highly recommend Evan to anyone who needs reliable, skilled plumbing help. Truly a five‑star experience!

reviews.author: Agnes Gallant
reviews.text: Mass Pike Plumbing and Heating installed my dishwasher and I couldn’t be more pleased with their service.. They arrived when they said they would, worked quickly and efficiently, and cleaned up afterwards. They did all this with friendly service and reasonable prices. In fact, they were so good that I used them to install a new sink and toilet in my bathroom. This company is reliable and friendly and I highly recommend them,

reviews.author: Lorna Jean Pogue
reviews.text: All of a sudden I had no hot water and reached out to Evan who literally came the next day and he didn’t have to come right away but he did. He already knew what the issue was and I needed a new water heater thing in the basement. He got the work done at a reasonable time and very quickly. Very honest, straightforward. Evan is amazing at what he does and I’m glad I have someone like him who I trust to service my home.

synthesis.summary: Evan responds to emergencies within 15 minutes on weekends and holidays, diagnoses problems faster than competitors, and charges fair prices—multiple reviewers mention he fixed what other plumbers couldn't.
strengths: Emergency responsiveness: 4 reviewers explicitly mention same-day or next-day service during heating/water emergencies, with one holiday emergency response in 15 minutes
Diagnostic accuracy: Multiple reviewers report Evan identified issues other plumbers missed or solved problems previous technicians failed to fix within a week
Fair pricing consistently mentioned: 8+ reviewers specifically praise pricing as reasonable or below competitor estimates, no surprise charges reported
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Strong pattern of after-hours and holiday availability—reviewed positively for Saturday morning response, holiday emergency response (15 min), and winter heating emergencies. Multiple reviewers credit Evan for solving problems other companies left unresolved.

plumbers.name: Roto-Rooter Plumbing & Water Cleanup
plumbers.address: 895 Hampshire Rd, Stow, OH 44224, USA

reviews.author: Charles Honsinger
reviews.text: purchase new water heater back in 12/12/2024 water heater under warranty but labor to install new water heater was 1600.00 the biggest ripoff I would never recommend rotor rooter out stow Ohio for any plumbing issues

reviews.author: Abbey kavanagh Marshall
reviews.text: So extremely disappointed by this company. We had a sewer back up in our basement, they came out in a timely manner which I appreciated. However, the guy looked into the pipe with flashlight and determined it was a “sludge buildup” and recommended we got hydro jetting for 738 dollars. Turns out after the problem getting worse and getting a second opinion it was tree roots.

reviews.author: Michael Junewicz
reviews.text: I had an emergency at my home with a couple of drains backed up. I didn't know what to expect about how the issues would be addressed. Roto Rooter sent a plumber on the same day that I called, and he addressed both drains quickly. I worried that the second drain might be a big ordeal, but the plumber was able to snake it without changing the price he'd already quoted for the first drain. One of the drains was a floor drain, and it finally has a proper cover on it, as it has needed for a while. I'm very happy with my service.

reviews.author: Ron Long
reviews.text:
Well, I had about as good of an experience as a person with sewage in his basement can have! Brian, my technician, was polite, punctual, articulate and informed! He answered all of my questions and understood my reservations about how we needed to proceed. In the end, it was taken care of professionally and efficiently. I was educated as to what caused the problem (That camera that can go out the sewer line was pretty cool!) and given some reasonable recommendations on follow up service.
I called Roto-Rooter because of their good reputation and I was not disappointed!
Lee
Stow, Ohio

reviews.author: Steve Shimko
reviews.text: My 86 year old grandmother paid $5,000 to have a 150 foot section of downspout pipe that goes to the street replaced. We had a technician out initially to try and snake the drain. The tech worked for 20 minutes with a hydro jet and decided that the pipe was broken underground. They charged $500 for a 20 minute service. He then told us that another tech would be out the following day to run a camera and locator through the pipe to decide what further action needed to be taken. That tech was there for another 20 minutes and did nothing but right a quote for having the pipe replaced. He initially told us that it would cost $3,900 dollars, he then spoke on the phone with a supervisor who told us that it would cost an additional $4,500 to have it fixed. So that’s how we got to $5,000. We were told they would call the day before before they came to do the work which they did not. They did the work in 1 day. It wasn’t a small job, but hardly worth $5,000.  They left a huge mess  of boulders, roots and broken concrete on my grandmas yard and told her that it would “settle out in 5 to 8 months” and that they weren’t landscapers. For 5k they could’ve tried harder to clean up their mess. They also took $20 worth of corrugated pipe that I had temporarily rigged up so that her basement wouldn’t flood. Sure, she now has a good piece of pipe in the ground but I’m pretty unhappy with the way they treated my grandmother and her property. They didn’t cover the concrete that they put in and it rained on it. The day after, my grandma is almost in tears because of the way they left her yard.

synthesis.summary: Roto-Rooter Stow responds quickly to emergencies and has skilled technicians who can diagnose problems effectively. However, their pricing is significantly higher than competitors and there are concerning issues with misdiagnosis and poor treatment of elderly customers.
strengths: Fast emergency response - same day service
Skilled technicians with proper diagnostic equipment
Professional communication and explanation of issues
Effective problem resolution when properly diagnosed
weaknesses: Extremely high pricing compared to market rates
Misdiagnosis leading to unnecessary expensive services
Poor cleanup and follow-through on large jobs
redFlags: Misdiagnosed tree roots as 'sludge buildup' leading to wrong $738 treatment
Charged elderly customer $5000 for pipe replacement with poor cleanup and unprofessional treatment
$1600 labor charge for water heater installation described as 'biggest ripoff'
synthesis.topQuote: I had an emergency at my home with a couple of drains backed up... Roto Rooter sent a plumber on the same day that I called, and he addressed both drains quickly.
synthesis.worstQuote: For 5k they could've tried harder to clean up their mess... I'm pretty unhappy with the way they treated my grandmother and her property.

plumbers.name: AHS/TOPTEC Plumbing & Sewer Repair
plumbers.address: 345 E Park Ave, Libertyville, IL 60048, USA

reviews.author: Benjamin Ferdinand
reviews.text:
I just moved into a new house and called Dan at AHS Plumbing twice for two separate plumbing emergencies within our first week!  First up was a sewer line clog.  Dan arrived quickly, cleared the clog and offered recommendations to avoid future problems.  Call #2 was at 4am during a heavy rain storm as my old sump pump and the battery backup were failing to keep up with the rain.  Dan answered the phone on the first try, and after I explained the problem, he was at my house in 40 mins.!  We ended up replacing two sump pumps and battery backup systems for a very fair price, especially considering it was all done same day.

Is AHS Plumbing cheap?  No, but you get what you pay for.  Done right quickly and the first time.  No BS add-on charges.  Very skilled and professional service.  Incredibly responsive.  Dan earned my trust and will be my “go to” plumber for all future needs.

reviews.author: Linda Louis
reviews.text: I had a plumbing issue in my kitchen last night and called at 5:30 pm. By 8am this morning, Dan was at my door! He had booties to walk through the house, offered thorough explanations and practical advice, and fixed the problem in about an hour. He also checked out the pipes in my basement to make sure that everything was in proper order there, explaining what had completely mystified me about our plumbing. Thank you so much, Dan! I hope I won't have to call again, but I definitely will go with AHS if I do experience more issues in the future!

reviews.author: Mathew Joseph
reviews.text: Dan did an amazing job installing shutoff valves for my homes existing outdoor hydrants. He also installed one for me in my garage. He was on-time, courteous and very helpful. I highly recommend Dan to anyone with any type of plumbing repair or installation!

reviews.author: Kim W.
reviews.text: Dan and his partner worked on changing Several faucets and even came back to my house few days later when our laundry machine backed up with water. They did a great job in all the work they did. I had alot of questions about our plumbing and he answered all of them without being annoyed by all my questions. I trust them when it comes to doing plumbing around my home and am grateful for the work they did. They are honest, do quality work and are affordable, my husband and I are so glad we had them fix our plumbing issues!

reviews.author: Brittani Michela
reviews.text: To say that Dan at AHS Plumbing is a superhero doesn’t reflect the magnitude of how outstanding he is. We called Dan in an emergency situation - out sewage pipe sheared away from foundation. We had major backup with raw sewage leaking onto our foundation. Dan answered our call and drove right over to talk to us. He was calm, knowledgeable, friendly, and reassuring. He quoted us half of what local plumbers and bigger companies (Roto-Rooter) were wanting to charge. He fixed our issue and brought the plumbing up to code. Turns out, it’s a very common problem in the Mundelein area, so Dan knew what to do...he’s done it, literally, a hundred times, in this area. We were so lucky to have called him. Not only was he extremely efficient with this job, he took the time to explain everything he and his team was doing. We felt that communication was totally transparent and honest. If you need plumbing help, call AHS Plumbing!

synthesis.summary: AHS/TOPTEC Plumbing shows exceptional emergency responsiveness with Dan answering calls at 4am and arriving within 40 minutes during storms. Multiple customers praise his transparency, fair pricing, and quality work that's done right the first time.
strengths: Transparent pricing with no surprise charges
weaknesses: Limited sample size of reviews
Higher pricing than budget options
synthesis.topQuote: Dan answered the phone on the first try, and after I explained the problem, he was at my house in 40 mins.! We ended up replacing two sump pumps and battery backup systems for a very fair price, especially considering it was all done same day.

plumbers.name: Wendricks-White Plumbing
plumbers.address: 912 W Greenwood Ave, Waukegan, IL 60087, USA

reviews.author: Mike Carlson
reviews.text: Leaky exterior faucet was replaced by Ed, who was friendly and worked efficiently and quickly. I'm satisfied with the work performed and will certainly use them again. Thanks!

reviews.author: Doug Carlson
reviews.text: Mario and Fernando were very personable, friendly and professional from the first minute. They told me what they were going to do and how much it would cost. And kept to both their time and cost estimates with a smile.

reviews.author: Frances Groves
reviews.text: Tom arrived on time with a smile to perform an emergency repair on the leak from one of the pipes in my basement.  He did an excellent job and left the work site clean and tidy.  I have been using Wendricks for all my plumbing work for more than 20 years and am very happy with their prompt and excellent services.

reviews.author: Linda Kerby
reviews.text:
Great company. Amazingly attentive and prompt to fix our plumbing problem. Ed was very  professional and knew exactly what to do. The job was over in no time! We have used Wendrick’s for many years and will continue to do so. The best!
Also, the young lady setting up appointments was very helpful.  She went above and beyond to accommodate our situation.  She actually seems to care about her job and providing service. Not at all like other companies that act like they’re “doing you a favor” by even talking to you! Keep up the great work!

reviews.author: Darin Kuklis
reviews.text: David did a fantastic job.  Very professional and personable.  He explained everything he was doing and showed respect for my home and property.

synthesis.summary: Wendricks-White Plumbing appears to be a highly reliable company with over 20 years of proven service and excellent emergency response. Multiple customers praise their professionalism, punctuality, and fair pricing with no surprises. The consistent 5-star reviews and long-term customer relationships suggest they're a safe choice for emergency plumbing needs.
strengths: Over 20 years of proven service history
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews for full assessment
All reviews are 5-star which may not show full picture
synthesis.topQuote: I have been using Wendricks for all my plumbing work for more than 20 years and am very happy with their prompt and excellent services.

plumbers.name: Clog Doc
plumbers.address: 556 Tallmadge Rd, Cuyahoga Falls, OH 44221, USA

reviews.author: Evan Matthews
reviews.text: Jonathan and his crew could not have been more efficient and professional. They quickly diagnosed the pipe issue I was having and provided a quick solution. They were informative and worked hard over the course of 2 days to get my plumbing back in shape! I highly recommend ClogDoc!

reviews.author: B. Johnson
reviews.text: We highly recommend Jonathan and his team (John, Joe, and others). They are one of the best contractors we have ever worked with, demonstrating honesty, expertise, efficiency, and exceptional skill. We have hired them for projects ranging from simple drain cleaning to extremely large, complex new system installation job. In every case, they orchestrated the work with remarkable confidence and competency, making each project truly a work of art.

reviews.author: Stefanie Cardinal
reviews.text: I cannot say enough good things about Clog Doc! The owner, Jonathan and his crew, Phil, Francisco and Joe were all super nice and really pay attention to detail. They spent 12 -14 hrs over 2 days really looking inside the pipe, hydro-jetting, snaking, re-jetting and looking again to ensure they didn’t miss anything. Due to the condition of our pipe we went with their re-lining process for our situation. Jonathan and the guys really took the time to show us how it worked and what to expect. They actually use a high-power UV light to set the epoxy liner that they put in place. They are very thorough and Phil is funny as hell! Unfortunately for our situation, we had to have a hole dug in our yard so they could gain access to our pipe, however just know that this relining process can also be done without them having to dig at all! From start to finish, the men were all great to work with considering the situation at hand. And they are also very reasonable! We got the vibe that they cared way more about the job they were doing instead of the payment. They really cared and their cost came in WAY lower than other companies we had estimates from. Definitely give them a call if you’re having any issues! We can’t thank them enough and if we ever any issues with anything again we will call them first for sure!

reviews.author: Krystal Mudery
reviews.text: If anyone is looking to have a sewer repair done. This is the place to call. Very knowledgeable staff. Timely and efficient.  Step by step communication the entire way from start to finish.  I was never left wondering what was the next steps or process.  Johnathan was in constant communication while job was being performed,  as well sent videos of before and after . I am.very pleased with the service they provided.  I couldn't recommend a better company.

reviews.author: James Tolley
reviews.text: Clog Doc did an excellent job of cleaning the main drain in my house. They showed me (via camera) the condition of the pipe before and after. They went above and beyond and had to work longer than expected. But they stayed until the job was complete. They were friendly, and considerate about cleaning up. I highly recommend them.

synthesis.summary: Clog Doc appears to be an exceptional plumbing company with outstanding customer service and technical expertise. Reviews consistently praise their thoroughness, professionalism, and reasonable pricing, though 24-hour emergency availability is unclear.
weaknesses: Unknown 24-hour emergency availability
Limited number of reviews (71 total)
synthesis.topQuote: They are very thorough and Phil is funny as hell! We got the vibe that they cared way more about the job they were doing instead of the payment. They really cared and their cost came in WAY lower than other companies we had estimates from.

plumbers.name: Convenient Plumbing
plumbers.address: 200 South Dr, South Elgin, IL 60177, USA

reviews.author: Ami Engel
reviews.text:
The team at Convenient Plumbing is great. I have used them for years to help with all kinds of needs, large and small. They are responsive and strive to educate you when they are doing repairs so you understand the need. They won’t do a repair if it is not warranted, and they will talk you through those situations as well.

We have had their help with our toilet, the outdoor spigots, the ejector pump, and our water heater. They even did a camera view of the pipe that goes out to the street.

I appreciate their service and certainly recommend their services to others!

reviews.author: Jeremy AmRhein
reviews.text: Had a great experience working with Convenient Plumbing.  They turned my Thursday night nightmare into an early Friday morning solution.  My water heater broke down and Ed and his son Jeremy came the very next morning to diagnose the problem.  After a discussion about the cost to repair versus the cost to replace (10 yr old heater), I decided to replace the unit.  They replaced the unit within a few hours.  Fast, efficient and honest.  Straight forward communication, no upselling or pressure.  Rare to find these days.  Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Joe F
reviews.text: We just had Convenient Plumbing fix an issue with our ejector pit backing up. They were upfront about all charges and options to resolve the issue. They were  amazing, professional, and speedy. Great work, great company.

reviews.author: Leo
reviews.text: They are now my go to plumbing company. Called 3 different plumbers. Ed called me back within minutes and stopped by within 15 to take a look at what needed to be done. Quoted me on the spot, scheduled to have the village shut off the water a few days later and was here a few minutes after the water was turned off. Ed and Jeremy worked quickly, explained everything and answered all my questions. They did a great job and I will definitely recommend them to anyone needing a professional plumber.

reviews.author: Carlos Durand
reviews.text: Had recently needed our ejector pump replaced, called and was quoted properly over the phone and the work was done within 2-3 hours of me calling, and here I thought I was just going to be calling to schedule! Walked me through what was done and some tips with the new pump, highly recommend for anyone in the Fox Valley area that is looking for both reliable and speedy plumbing service!

synthesis.summary: Convenient Plumbing demonstrates exceptional reliability and emergency responsiveness, with customers consistently praising their quick response times and honest pricing. Ed and his team have built a strong reputation for same-day service, transparent communication, and quality workmanship across various plumbing needs.
strengths: Extremely fast response times - often same day service
Honest pricing with upfront quotes and no upselling
Educational approach - explains repairs and options clearly
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews (68 total)
24-hour availability status unclear
synthesis.topQuote: Called 3 different plumbers. Ed called me back within minutes and stopped by within 15 to take a look at what needed to be done. Quoted me on the spot, scheduled to have the village shut off the water a few days later and was here a few minutes after the water was turned off.

plumbers.name: All Suburban Plumbing & Sewer Service Inc.
plumbers.address: 15W134 Lexington St, Elmhurst, IL 60126, USA

reviews.author: Jana McNally
reviews.text:
It’s wonderful to have a company that you can rely on and All Suburban is that for our family.  We’ve been using them for almost 10 years and they have always been fair, reliable, responsive, and done great work!

I noticed a one star review and I believe they must have the wrong company because they reference an office woman and there is no office woman with this company. When you call you get directly connected to the plumber (a male).

reviews.author: DK 13
reviews.text:
I was trying to change all the powder outlets, switches and a light fixture on my new condo by myself. When I faced a difficulty I gave up and I called these guys. The guy on the phone was super friendly and helpful. He told me instead of coming here and charge me he could help me on the phone and tell me what to do since it was an easy fix… and he did it!!! I really appreciate that!
