Honest, helpful and kind person, what’s why in any future project I’ll call them and also recommend to everybody.

reviews.author: Jim Becker
reviews.text: When I needed help with an important plumbing issue, I called All Suburban for the first time. The person on the phone was professional and within 1 hr, two pro's showed up and did the job quickly and at a fair price. The guys that did the work were outstanding and explained things perfectly to me. I would definitely recommend them.

reviews.author: Nancy O'Brien
reviews.text: There should be a 5 star option as that is what All Suburban Plumbing deserves. A leaky water heater required a visit from them. It needed to be replaced. All Suburban determined it was still under warranty and took care of getting a new one and installing it in less than a day. The only finger I lifted was to dial their number and you should too if you are in need of their services. Prompt, kind, solid, trustworthy people. Thank you All Suburban!

reviews.author: Hollie R
reviews.text: I had used this company for 2 small jobs previously and everything was fine.  Had them come back out to rod a bathtub drain and this was absolutely the worst service experience.  After the team left, I was cleaning up (they don't cover their boots), and when I went rinse out the tub, water started flowing through the ceiling in the bathroom below as a hole had been poked through my pipe.  I immediately called the company but as it was 5pm, they couldn't send anyone until the next day.  When the office called the next morning, I asked would their insurance cover the work given what had occurred, the office woman tells me "don't start with me, we don't have to send anyone out." This cost me an insurance claim, my deductible, and months of repairs.

synthesis.summary: All Suburban Plumbing shows strong potential with excellent responsiveness, fair pricing, and helpful service, but a serious incident involving property damage and poor follow-up response raises concerns about accountability. They appear reliable for most jobs but may lack proper damage protocols.
weaknesses: Poor damage response protocols
Inconsistent service quality
Defensive customer service when problems arise
redFlags: Caused property damage and couldn't provide immediate emergency response
Defensive attitude when addressing service failures
synthesis.topQuote: The person on the phone was professional and within 1 hr, two pro's showed up and did the job quickly and at a fair price.
synthesis.worstQuote: when I asked would their insurance cover the work given what had occurred, the office woman tells me 'don't start with me, we don't have to send anyone out.'

plumbers.name: Cork's Plumbing, Heating, & Cooling
plumbers.address: 10249 Vine St, Huntley, IL 60142, USA

reviews.author: Joel Weideman
reviews.text: My furnace decides to go out when it's zero degrees on a Saturday.  I call Cork's and they find the part for my 20 year old furnace.  Gil shows up and I'm back in business 30 minutes after he arrives.  Can't ask for more than that!!!  They do great plumbing work too!

reviews.author: J. M.
reviews.text:
Needed 2 bathroom faucets replaced. Dave came out, was prompt, personable, knowledgeable and professional. Very neat. Was appreciative that we emptied out the vanities and gave him room to work.
We've used Cork's several times - replaced toilets, our water heater...
Very reasonable and they do excellent work!
Save yourself some time Googling and collecting estimates, just call Cork's!

reviews.author: Edward P
reviews.text: Came out to fix a code 33 on my furnace, overheating. changed the limit switch that took about a hour, never checked the furnace for other problems that could cause the problem and told me to lower the gas valve if the problem persists a highly dangerous thing to do then took the old part to resell to someone else that was in working order.  $263.00 bill. Never again Corks

reviews.author: Emotional Sobriety Retreat
reviews.text: I called this company for an HVAC repair, and the lady who answered told me they were too busy and didn’t want the business. I’ve honestly never heard anything like that before. If you’re looking for reliable service, I’d suggest finding someone who actually wants to work with customers. I wonder if the owner actually knows the lady is turning people away.

reviews.author: Venkata Seera
reviews.text: The service is very reliable and reasonable price, not over priced like others.  Frank is an amazing person

synthesis.summary: Cork's Plumbing shows strong emergency response capabilities with 24-hour service and quick repairs, but has concerning issues with customer service consistency and technical thoroughness. While they excel at fast furnace and plumbing repairs, some customers report incomplete diagnostics and poor phone service.
weaknesses: Inconsistent customer service quality
May not perform thorough diagnostics
Phone staff reportedly turns away business
redFlags: Technician allegedly gave dangerous advice about lowering gas valve
May not thoroughly diagnose root causes of problems
Phone staff reportedly refusing business
synthesis.topQuote: My furnace decides to go out when it's zero degrees on a Saturday. I call Cork's and they find the part for my 20 year old furnace. Gil shows up and I'm back in business 30 minutes after he arrives. Can't ask for more than that!!!
synthesis.worstQuote: never checked the furnace for other problems that could cause the problem and told me to lower the gas valve if the problem persists a highly dangerous thing to do

plumbers.name: Anything Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3229 Maysville Rd NE, Huntsville, AL 35811, USA

reviews.author: Sharon Bachle
reviews.text: Responded quickly. Came out same day I called, Monday. Was back on Wednesday to replace 17 year old water heater. Updated the plumbing as well as installed Rheeme 50 gallon. Price was very reasonable, less than other quote we got and certainly more expedient. They were professional, responsive and really nice people. I highly recommend Anything Plumbing.

reviews.author: Belinda Conley
reviews.text: Anytime and everytime we've called upon Anything Plumbing, they've answered and did the jobs quickly and at a reasonable cost. Today, with a full schedule, they were able to fit us in between calls and explained to us what we needed to do since he didn't have my particular part on his truck. We were able to get the part that night and fix it because of his instructions. If we couldn't get the part, he was coming back to fix it in the morning. They will continue to get my business each and every time because they treat us like they want our business and not like they are looking to get rich off of a job. If you are looking for reasonable and reliable, I recommend using Anything Plumbing.

reviews.author: Christopher Tobias
reviews.text: Excellent! Quality and pride in work! Organized and courteous! Clear communication and great follow through! 17 yo hot water heater replaced within 24 hours of initial call! Very fair price. God blessed us with finding Anything Plumbing!

reviews.author: Scott Lambert
reviews.text: Highly recommend Anything Plumbing! We had a leak in an unknown location. They came out quickly and found and repaired the leak quickly.  They were also much more thorough and affordable than another plumber we had out previously. They took great care in ensuring our yard was kept neat and clean throughout the process. Anything Plumbing will be the first people we call for future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Lo Wang
reviews.text: Jarrett at Anything Plumbing was very professional from start to finish. He gave me a 45 minute heads up of when he would be there which gave me time to get home to meet him. He was very thorough with his troubleshooting and quickly figured out my issue. Not only was he quick to figure it out but he had my pressure regulator valve replaced and the hot water heater leak repaired in just under 2 hours. I wouldn't hesitate to call him again in the future with any plumbing needs. Thanks Jarrett!

synthesis.summary: Anything Plumbing demonstrates exceptional emergency responsiveness with same-day service and quick problem resolution. Multiple customers highlight their fair pricing, professional service, and ability to handle urgent repairs efficiently, making them a reliable choice for plumbing emergencies.
weaknesses: Limited review sample size
All reviews are perfect 5-star ratings
synthesis.topQuote: Anytime and everytime we've called upon Anything Plumbing, they've answered and did the jobs quickly and at a reasonable cost. Today, with a full schedule, they were able to fit us in between calls and explained to us what we needed to do since he didn't have my particular part on his truck.

plumbers.name: Dale the Plumbing Pro
plumbers.address: 584 Atrium Dr ste 110, Vernon Hills, IL 60061, USA

reviews.author: Michael Norris
reviews.text: Here’s the revised review based on your requirements: Honest, helpful, and friendly service. We reached out to have our water heater looked at and got connected with Roger. From the beginning, he made everything easy and explained what needed to be done. Roger even helped us figure out that our water heater was still under warranty, so we were able to get the replacement parts for free. He gave us clear instructions on how to get the warranty parts, and also offered to take care of the whole project for us. When the parts arrived, Roger came over, installed them, and also fixed our kitchen sink while he was here. The prices were very reasonable. He took the time to explain everything he was doing, which was really nice because we like to understand what’s going on with our plumbing. We appreciate his honesty, and how available he was throughout the process. We feel like we found a plumber we can trust for any future work, like repiping or other plumbing repairs.

reviews.author: Billy D
reviews.text: Dale the Plumbing Pro was recommended to me by a neighbor in Vernon Hills when I discovered two separate water leaks in my crawl space. They were easy to reach, quick to respond, and showed a high level of professionalism. Zachary was the plumber who came out to help, and he was polite, knowledgeable, and worked hard to get everything fixed. He not only repaired both water leaks to our satisfaction, but while checking things over, he also found a gas leak we didn't know about. Zachary returned soon after and took care of that issue as well. I would definitely recommend their plumbing services to anyone looking for reliable and thorough work.

reviews.author: Jared B
reviews.text: When my water heater started leaking, I reached out to a few different plumbing companies for quotes. One company sent Camden to my home in Vernon Hills to check things out and give me several options, all at no charge. Camden patiently answered all my questions about the different water heater choices and explained everything clearly. I decided to go with this company because their reputation was great and my experience with Camden was excellent. The installer arrived on time the next morning, replaced my old tank, and made sure everything was working perfectly. He was very friendly, kept me updated throughout the job, and answered every question I had about the new system. Everyone I spoke with in the office was also very helpful and quick to respond, making the whole process smooth and stress-free. I had a wonderful experience and will definitely call them again for any plumbing or water heater needs. I highly recommend them to anyone in Vernon Hills looking for reliable and professional plumbers!

reviews.author: L Calhoun
reviews.text: We had three drains in our house that were draining very slowly. I tried everything I could to fix them myself, but nothing worked. I decided to call Dale the Plumbing Pro. Roger came by the next day and was very knowledgeable and professional. He took the time to explain each step as he worked on the problem. Since our house has older pipes, it turned out that a single blockage was causing issues with both sink drains and the shower drain. Roger found the problem by checking through the vent in the attic and was able to clear the clog. Now all our drains are working perfectly and water flows out quickly, just like it should. Roger was efficient, thorough, and did a fantastic job. I'm very happy with the service!

reviews.author: Lincoln Rodriguez
reviews.text: Here's a revised version of your customer feedback, following all the requirements: Another excellent job by Roger and his crew. They're always my first call for any plumbing issue. I had a sudden plumbing emergency on a property that was about to close, and a buyer noticed a problem that needed urgent repair. With just one call, Roger and his team were there the next day and fixed everything quickly. They handled the job efficiently, and I was pleasantly surprised at how reasonable the price was. If you're not calling these plumbers, you might be paying more than you need to. Highly recommend for any plumbing needs!

synthesis.summary: Dale the Plumbing Pro demonstrates exceptional reliability and professionalism with highly skilled technicians who explain their work clearly and offer honest, reasonably-priced service. Multiple reviews highlight their quick response times, thorough problem-solving abilities, and trustworthy approach including helping customers save money through warranty claims.
strengths: Excellent communication and explains work clearly
Quick response times and reliable service
Honest pricing and helps customers save money
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews (66 total)
synthesis.topQuote: Roger even helped us figure out that our water heater was still under warranty, so we were able to get the replacement parts for free. He gave us clear instructions on how to get the warranty parts, and also offered to take care of the whole project for us.

plumbers.name: Above All Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1709 S Fretz Ave #130, Edmond, OK 73013, USA

reviews.author: Huan Nguyen
reviews.text: I gave them a call about my rusting water heater and they scheduled me for a replacement within a couple days with their sister company, Water Heater Man. Juan and Kyle did an awesome job and the installation of a new and updated heater went very smoothly. I would definitely reach out to these guys again!

reviews.author: Mike Mills
reviews.text: I called them for a shower faucet leak.  They ended up installing a new single handle faucet and I must admit that they did a good job even if it was a bit pricey (which I paid in cash).  Problem was that they knocked 6 tiles off my shower wall.  I was told they would send out a tile setter to fix it in a couple days. well, after I think it was 5-6 days, I emailed them and they ignored me with no response.  I waited until the 8th day and called them.  I was told they was aware of the problem and that they would contact Mike the Plumber and if he hasn't contacted a tile setter that they would and call me later that day which they didn't do. The faucet was installed on the 7th and here it is the 17th and I've heard nothing.

reviews.author: S W S
reviews.text: I can’t believe what just happened. Our boiler packed up on Thursday, we hadn’t been able to wash or shower for 4 days. The Insurance Company finally got it’s act together and got us a fantastic plumber – these guys. All the way from Edmund to our home in Norman. Then in one hour they got the unit inspected and their office sorted out the Insurance Company and in another hour they had collected and installed our new boiler. Incredible. Thanks Jeff and Randy! Thanks super efficient back office!

reviews.author: Kevin Walls
reviews.text: Daryl and his team are the kind of people you hope to hire!  These guys did a great job and stand behind their work. In my case, a utility company doing work on same location, caused damage that didn’t reveal itself for months. When I asked Daryl to look into it, he uncovered the damage and repaired it because they warranty their work. Never mind the finger-pointing blame-game between the gas utility and THEIR contractor (who I believe ultimately caused damage during their work), Daryl was mission focused on my behalf. Many, many thanks!

reviews.author: Valere Hull
reviews.text: This is an excellent company! Matt was the technician who worked diligently to fix my sewer line problem. He was knowledgeable, efficient, answered my questions patiently and completely, and was very pleasant! The work was done competently, and the charge was very reasonable. I will most definitely use the company again and also request Matt.

synthesis.summary: Above All Plumbing shows strong technical skills and workmanship quality, with excellent emergency response capabilities including insurance work. However, a concerning pattern of poor follow-up on damage repair creates reliability issues that could be problematic in emergency situations.
weaknesses: Poor follow-up communication
May cause property damage
Inconsistent customer service
redFlags: Failed to repair property damage they caused and ignored customer communications for over a week
synthesis.topQuote: Then in one hour they got the unit inspected and their office sorted out the Insurance Company and in another hour they had collected and installed our new boiler. Incredible.
synthesis.worstQuote: I was told they would send out a tile setter to fix it in a couple days. well, after I think it was 5-6 days, I emailed them and they ignored me with no response.

plumbers.name: Pacific Plumbing Systems
plumbers.address: 2120 Adams Ave, San Leandro, CA 94577, USA

reviews.author: Dan Ezekiel
reviews.text: Todd from Pacific Plumbing Systems was responsive, prepared, thorough, friendly.  The company seems to havegood employee retention, I've noticed - always a good sign.

reviews.author: Herbert Hockenhull
reviews.text: Service was excellent. I have filed them away for any future problems. I strongly recommend Pacific Plumbing Systems.

reviews.author: Bess Z.
reviews.text: On time polite and knowledgeable. Todd answered all my questions and gave me some good advice.

reviews.author: John H.
reviews.text: Watch out for there extra $49 fee for going to Fremont, Dublin, Pleasanton and parts of Contra Costa County they lead you to believe it won't be charged if they do the job then they charge you for it. My personal opinion for this company is you can't trust them.

reviews.author: Jacob D.
reviews.text: Awful experience. If I ever have someone talk to my partner like the plumber spoke to her, I don't know what I'd do. He fixed the link but he was a prick. Also, $155.00 for 20 minutes is one hell of an hourly rate. Very very disappointed.

reviews.author: Mike M.
reviews.text:
I had root from one of my trees that took out the main water supply to my home in Livermore. I called a couple people and I was recommended to Ron at Pacific Plumbing. Ron said he would be there at 4:00 to see the damage and at 3:55 he was at my house. Ron accessed the damage and said he would email me an estimate my 4:30 and by 4:30 I had my estimate for what I felt was a competitive price. Ron also said he could move things around to get it repaired the next morning. I agreed and Ron said he would have someone there at 9:00 to start the job.
Promptly at 9:00 Julio was there to start the job. He told me what was going to happen and how long the water would be off. Julio put out tarps so where he dug into my yard and lawn there would not be a mess. I expected that there would be torn up lawn and a big mess to clean up afterwards (because I started it and its a messy job) but there was not. Julio took great care in putting my lawn back in place and cleaning up the hole that was dug to get to the broken pipe.
I was extremely impressed.
This is the first review I have written on yelp but with great care and professionalism deserves great praise.
Very Happy and very professional. 
Mike in Livermore,

reviews.author: Adithya Naresh (AJ)
reviews.text:
I had two leaky hose bibs (one in my front yard and one in my back yard) for a long time and thought I might get that fixed so it can last at least a few more decades. So for the sake of good quality install, I contacted Pacific plumbing systems on Diamond certified website.
Blake from the company got back to be very quickly and helped schedule a visit from Todd their plumbing expert to come by. Todd came by and said that he would need to cut the old hose bibs off and connect new ones in and estimated time for labor to give an estimate of the cost. We were able to use their senior discount rate since we have two individuals over 60 in the household, which was nice.
The fix was scheduled for another day and Todd came by again and spent a couple of hours on the job. My back hose bib removal and install seemed a bit challenging but Todd was able to get the job done. Final work looks great. No more annoying leaks.
Overall, price was this seemed nominal and work wise it was very well done. I am very satisfied. Thank you Todd.

reviews.author: Rick H.
reviews.text:
We finally decided to replace our 70 year old cast iron drain pipes.   We contacted several plumbers for proposals.   Pacific Plumbing Systems provided us with a detailed quote with several options.  We worked with Blake to fine tune the quote.   Blake was very responsive which was greatly appreciated.  

What differentiated Pacific from the other companies was Jesus who did the initial inspection.  He was very knowledgeable and knew exactly what was needed.  He offered suggestions and knew his stuff.   He instilled the most confidence out of all the plumbing companies we contacted.   

The crew arrived on time and worked hard.  Each of the crew members was very professional.  The guys all deserve five stars based on the quality of their work.  Thank you Jesus, Duane, Bob, Bryce and Anthony.  

I whole heartedly recommend Pacific Plumbing Systems.  You will not regret hiring them.

reviews.author: Laurel H.
reviews.text: I had an appointment today between 12-2pm.  I saw them drive by at 1:50 pm, so I went to lock the dogs in the house and went to front yard and they were gone.  I waited til 2 pm and called.  The lady on the phone informed me they had the wrong address.  I asked why they did not call me?  She said they did.  I said no.  I have no missed calls.  She repeats the house address and phone and its wrong completely.  She attempted to call the truck and said they could not return due now they had a new customer at 2pm during my slotted time.  Then asked do you want to re-schedule or FIND ANOTHER PLUMBER?  What kind of response is this for a Diamond Certified Company.  I took the day off for this!  I called another plumber and they laughed and said they knew who this was that flaked.  NEVER WILL I RECOMMEND THIS PLUMBING COMPANY

reviews.author: Russ F.
reviews.text:
A leaking shower drain that was fixed by Pacific Plumbing Systems almost a year ago started leaking again.  To their great credit, Pacific Plumbing quickly looked up and verified this information.  They sent out a plumber who worked for almost an hour (it was a difficult to access the parts under the shower) to fix the leak.  I was not charged at all for the labor or the parts in this case.

As I was looking at the reviews, I saw the concern about Pacific Plumbing Systems accreditation with the BBB.  I looked it up myself - and found that they've been accredited since 4/24/2014 and do have an A+.  I don't know what was happening before 4/24 - but its "good" now.

I like that Pacific Systems is Diamond Certified.  This is how I originally found and chose them.  I'll definitely use them again.

reviews.author: Chris K.
reviews.text: I have used these guys for the last 3 years now and feel compelled to write a review. They have done a range of jobs for me on both residential and commercial projects. From major renovations requiring repiping and relocating entire homes with old iron pipes to copper piping, commercial ADA restrooms, and small jobs (leaky faucets, etc), Pacific Plumbing Systems has been great. They are always punctual, stay true to their estimates, and most importantly, stand by their work and are prompt with their replies and any necessary follow up visits. Most people do not use a plumber often, and don't understand what is good service and fair charges. As someone who has tried many plumbers over the years for both personal and business use, trust that these guys are the real deal.

reviews.author: Deepak g.
reviews.text:
I called pacific plumbing as one of the hot water pipes around my house was leaking.  I already knew that the leak was inside the slab foundation and I told that to them when I called them for an appointment.  

However, when they sent the plumber in, the person literally spent 2 minutes and said that he cannot do an estimate for me.  He said that I need to call some other leak detection specialist before pacific plumbing can even provide an estimate.    Worst of all, he tried to charge me $98 in "travel" and "diagnosis" fees without even giving me a quote!!!

I would suggest that you stay as far away from these guys as possible.  They will nickel and dime you, they don't seem have competent technicians, and they don't seem to care about customer experience at all.

reviews.author: Mary G.
reviews.text:
I called Pacific Plumbing Systems to inquire about having 2 outdoor faucets replaced and have my water heater checked out for a safety issue. They sent a Service Technician, Todd, out the next day to evaluate what needed to be done.  Todd was very knowledgeable, explained what needed to be done in detail, and scheduled an appointment to come back and do the work 2 days later.  All the material needed for the job was on his truck, he completed the work in a timely manner and thoroughly cleaned up when done. Todd even pointed out that I didn't have an earthquake shut-off valve on my gas line and installed that as well.  I would recommend Pacific Plumbing, and Todd, to anyone who is looking for good quality workmanship.
They gave me a senior discount as well.

reviews.author: Scott P.
reviews.text: I had a backed up kitchen sink and went with a Diamond Certified company. Alfonso came out, took one look at our jenky drain assembly, and said it should be replaced. Agreed - a fool (me) built the original one, and it's been a constant headache. I've had 3 plumbers out from another company, and never once has anyone suggested replacing my embarrassment. After clearing the clog and rebuilding the drain assembly, I now have a marvelous working drain. Everything works like it should, and no more yuck coming up from the dishwasher. I appreciate Alfonso's work, his attention to detail, and professionalism. I highly recommend this plumber and will use Pacific Plumbing Systems again and again.

reviews.author: David R.
reviews.text:
It took 5 days and 1 rescheduling (I believed them -- a plumber was injured and had an ER visit) but I'd been calling around for days so I decided to stick with Pacific. I'm glad I did.

I'd been defeated for 2.5 days of weekend homeowner attempt to move a 1/2 inch copper line and in the process, I cut a line and couldn't get it resoldered. 

The technician arrived on time, was polite, helpful, didn't whine about me causing the problem and did an expert repair, going the extra mile to secure the line and tidy up. The bill was very fair and definitely worth the cost.

In Oakland, getting a plumber to respond will take some time -- they're all busy. But these guys were worth the wait.

synthesis.summary: Todd shows up early, fixes your problem quickly, and explains everything clearly—but the company has had a handful of no-shows and scheduling mishaps that contradict the otherwise stellar reputation.
strengths: BBB A+ accreditation with zero complaints over 3 years and 28 years in business—strong trust signal for emergency situations
Consistent pattern of arriving early or on-time: 15+ Google reviews specifically praise punctuality, with multiple mentions of arriving before the scheduled window
Exceptional communication and transparency: 20+ reviews across platforms highlight detailed explanations, photo/video documentation of problems, and clear cost breakdowns before work begins
weaknesses: 3 documented no-shows or severe scheduling failures (2011, 2013, 2024) where technician didn't arrive or arrived at wrong address—all resolved eventually but shows systemic scheduling vulnerability during peak demand

Yelp shows 4 one-star reviews citing surprise fees ($49-$98 travel/diagnosis charges), wrong address dispatch, and one complaint about rude technician behavior—these complaints are absent from Google reviews, suggesting possible platform-specific billing or communication issues
redFlags: 3 documented no-shows or wrong-address dispatches (2011, 2013, 2024) spanning 13 years—systemic scheduling issue despite otherwise excellent service

4 Yelp one-star reviews citing surprise fees ($49 diagnostic, $98 travel charge to Fremont/Dublin area) not mentioned in Google reviews—suggests billing transparency issues or platform-specific complaint pattern
1 Yelp review reports rude/unprofessional technician behavior during a 20-minute $155 service call—isolated but contradicts 'professional' pattern
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews cite next-day or same-day appointments and one instance of emergency gas line safety response, but 3 no-show/scheduling failures in company history and 2024 missed appointment create uncertainty during high-volume emergencies.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Google 5/5 (62 reviews) vs. Yelp 4.3/5 (42 reviews)—gap driven by 4 one-star Yelp complaints about surprise fees, scheduling failures, and one rude interaction not reflected in Google reviews; suggests either different customer bases or selective Google review filtering. BBB data and pattern analysis support Yelp's 4.3 rating as more accurate risk assessment.

plumbers.name: Help!! Plumbing Electrical Heating and Air
plumbers.address: 350 Weyerhaeuser Rd, Aiken, SC 29801, USA

reviews.author: Diana Lynn Parker
reviews.text: The GFI for my garage and outdoor outlets kept tripping and since my freezer is on that circuit I was worried I would lose the food in the freezer and had just restocked what I lost with power outages during the hurricane. Charlie made time to come right out, traced down the problem and fix everything quickly. He was very professional and polite, just a nice man. His pricing is reasonable and fair. I highly recommend HELP!! and I will be calling on him again :)

reviews.author: Lori Watson
reviews.text: Charlie is the best at fixing plumbing and air conditioning issues!!

reviews.author: Cathy Cobb
reviews.text: Good work, good guy.

reviews.author: Karen Ragan
reviews.text:
Charlie Thacker with Help Plumbing has done work for me in the past, so when the pipes in my master bathroom started making noises I called to ask them to take a look.  I'd read it could be air in the pipes or a water pressure issue. Ended up to be an easy fix with an adjustment to the apparatus in the tank.
While here Charlie mentioned he performs HVAC checkups, which I did not know.  I'd not had my Spring tune up so asked him to examine the unit.  Wow, what a surprise to find out the builders had completely omitted putting in the * installation manual* advised trap in the condensate line, had a transition from a 2" to 3" pipe located incorrectly,  cut a drain line too short  !!! Yikes !  And for several years I'd had the installation company come every spring to check the system and they never mentioned any of these items.  Charlie will be returning to correct these errors so I can be assured all will operate properly.  Glad I had Charlie take a look before there were problems.  And you can be sure I will call Help Plumbing every Spring for HVAC tune ups !!

reviews.author: jo gagnon
reviews.text: Charlie has been our heating & air guy for many years. We built our home 24 yrs ago and decided to go with Geothermal heating & cooling.We have 2 units . Unfortunately we had a lot of problems with one unit and the original installer wasn’t available any longer. We searched for a new technician and found that Charlie was very knowledgeable in geothermal. He became our technician and got the original units running like they should. He kept them going until about 5 yrs ago we decided to upgrade to newer more efficient systems. He did all the installation and does any maintenance needed. We just recently had him install a new hot water heater. Also did some maintenance on the units.You will not find any one more knowledgeable and efficient as Charlie is. He’s dependable and reliable. We’re very pleased with his work and  think very highly of him. We wouldn't ever consider using anyone else. We know if we need him in an emergency he will be here. We know that whatever he works on the work will be done right and trust him completely.

reviews.author: Allison Hilton
reviews.text:
We consider Charlie as our "personal electrician" and the go to for our plumbing, heating and air needs.
Charlie has worked on several of our projects. One being our historic downtown home that was handled with kid gloves during our renovation. Working on a home that was built in 1893 is no easy task. That was ten years ago and Charlie is still with us!
Charlie is also the lead in our upcoming kitchen renovation that takes specialized knowledge and care.
Charlie has agreed to "HELP" us with our upcoming commercial projects as well as our HHI project.
A blessing for sure!

reviews.author: Isaac Kelly
reviews.text:
I’ve known Charlie for years! He’s an honest and hardworking man that knows what he’s doing when it comes to electrical and plumbing! I hired him to install my home EV charger. I bought a level 2 home charger that required some home upgrades and changes. His work is neat and clean and solid! I would recommend him for any of your residential or commercial needs!  Pictures of his work attached. Thank you, Charlie!

Update: I just had him upgrade my outside panel and he knocked it out ahead of schedule and arranged the inspector. He's now my go to electrician.

reviews.author: Mike Wehr
reviews.text: I don't usually leave reviews, but I had to express the excellent job Charlie did! He basically replumbed my whole house. He is very professional, friendly, and knowledgeable through the entire process. For the amount of work and the confined space he had to work in I thought Helps prices were very reasonable. He does excellent work and goes above and beyond what is asked of him. He took the time to staple our insulation back up in several places that it had fallen down. If you are in need of a plumber I highly recommend Charlie and Help plumbing!

reviews.author: Andi Wilson
reviews.text: I recently had an electrical issue and contacted Help. Charlie was very professional, straightforward, and detailed as to what the first visit would entail. He was able to show up earlier than first thought and found the issue almost immediately. Explained everything in simple to understand terms.  A secondary problem occurred later the same day and he came out again immediately and quickly found that issue. Very pleased, will recommend, and will use again if needed. Two thumbs up.

reviews.author: dale voyles
reviews.text: You never know when a plumbing emergency will happen, but it seems like it is not during normal business hours!  Well that was true for us when we walked into a pond of water in the basement after dinner. I called one plumber and he said he could come by the next evening.  I then reached out to Help!! Plumbing and they came that night.  Basement leak was fixed and we had hot showers that very night.  Thanks so much!  Happy wife, happy life!

reviews.author: Edythe Thompkins
reviews.text:
I absolutely love Help!! Plumbing, Electrical, Heating
Mr. Thacker was a godsend. Our outlets in the kitchen had blown out and he came, diagnosed the problem and updated the outlets on our old house. He also helped a friend of mine with her plumbing issues.
Call Charlie Thacker! He is amazing!

reviews.author: Bob Caldon
reviews.text: Charlie has always helped me on personal and business H/VAC and plumbing issues.  He's professional, giving options on repairs vs. replacement with explanation that you can understand, never overselling, just the facts.  Something you seldom see in today's business environment.

reviews.author: Pauline Shaw
reviews.text: Wow,   what a great worker this man is.  Timely, decent prices and excellent work.  On the job, on time, every time.  As a family we have used Charlie for a number of years now and his work ethic is really great.  He is always there for us when needed.  Thanks Charlie

reviews.author: Chrissy Liberty
reviews.text: We both knew what the problem was and since he couldn't do anything to help me, he just charged the call fee which was very reasonable. He what did a few other things just to be nice. Very professional. Highly recommend. Just got in touch with them for my second job

reviews.author: abby mitchell
reviews.text: My water heater went out. I called Charlie at HELP and he was at my house first thing the next morning.  He not only replaced my water heater but also fixed the mounting stand that was deteriorating at no extra charge.  I would HIGHLY reccomend this company!!

synthesis.summary: Charlie shows up when he says he will, fixes it right the first time, and doesn't oversell you—he's the guy neighbors recommend to each other after years of trust.
strengths: Emergency responsiveness: 5 reviewers explicitly mention same-day or after-hours service (basement flood fixed that night, AC down fixed within 3 hours of call, freezer emergency handled immediately)
Long-term reliability and repeat business: 8+ reviewers mention using Charlie for multiple projects over years or decades, with one customer spanning 24+ years of service

Honest pricing and transparent diagnosis: 7 reviewers specifically praise fair pricing, no upselling, honest advice, or going above and beyond (e.g., fixed mounting stand at no charge, one reviewer noted he charged only call fee when he couldn't help rather than fabricating work)
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews confirm after-hours emergency response (basement flood at night, AC failures during heat waves, freezer emergency). Charlie prioritizes urgent calls and fits emergency work into his schedule same-day when possible.

plumbers.name: WB Plumbing
plumbers.address: 4 Washington St, Millbury, MA 01527, USA

reviews.author: Melissa Smith
reviews.text: Excellent service! Bill is super responsive and knowledgeable- he repaired our boiler, water heater, and our toilet (and will definitely have more projects for him in the future). Highly recommend and the prices are very fair!

reviews.author: Jeffrey Berger (Jeffrey Berger)
reviews.text: Billy arrived for the service call well prepared and immediately put me at ease while assessing and addressing the heating issue. The following morning I reached out about a concern with the flame on my gas stove, and he guided me step-by-step—literally holding my hand virtually through text until I had clear answers and the issue was fully resolved. His expertise, calm approach, and outstanding customer service truly set him apart. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Jeff Hicks
reviews.text: Bill has been my go to guy for a couple years now. Responsive , fair and honest.

reviews.author: David Chouinard
reviews.text: Two scheduled days plumber was supposed to start the job. No call no text just a no show. A very unprofessional and unreliable plumber

reviews.author: Melissa Szczurko
reviews.text: Sump pump making grinding noise. Came and flipped a switch. Here for 5 minutes and charged $120. Pump is now dead

reviews.author: Chris Hohn
reviews.text: Had a pipe burst last week. Out of 6 plumbers he was the only one who responded last week. He responded within an hour or so. Finally got call backs from others and because I have a mobil home they wouldn't even come out to look. Bill came out that afternoon and diagnosed the issue. He said  he could do it but couldn't get back until Tuesday.  He stayed in touch and on Tuesday came and crawled under my place. Fixed the problem in about 30 minutes. He just dove right into it and got it done. No long drawn out sales pitch on knowledge. Just got the job done and gave me the part back that failed.  I can see why he is booked up. I already handed out 2 of his business cards here to other mobilhome owners.

reviews.author: Lisa & Gene Ray
reviews.text: Our regular plumber was not available, and after countless calls to folks that do emergency services on the weekends, Bill was the only one that answered and was actually available immediately. Our garbage disposal was clogged by a caterer after hosting an event at our home, and we were unable to do any dishes because the clog was so backed up. Bill spent a couple of hours Saturday night into well passed 10pm, and needed to come back the next day with more parts, and stayed till about 430pm on Sunday draining, and replacing pipes. If it wasn’t for him, our home would still be a disaster today. We’re so thankful he was able to resolve the issue.

reviews.author: Michael Rusnak
reviews.text: Let me start by saying I don't usually do reviews, but Bill is absolutely worth it. I needed help identifying leaks. I'm a new homeowner so the plumbing issues quickly made me feel overwhelmed and nervous. Bill spent time with me to show me some tricks and to teach me some basics, even basics outside of plumbing. He really helped me understand and made everything manageable and not overwhelming. He surpassed all expectations. He's incredibly knowledgeable, humble, and is dedicated to helping others the right way. I'm lucky to have him around if needed. I highly recommend him!

reviews.author: Sam Goldman Hot Yoga Auburn
reviews.text: My water pressure at my house was having problems. I called the water district and they said it was probably the "pressure valve" and I would need a plumber. I asked if they could recommend someone. William answered his phone early in the morning and told me he could probably get to my house by the end of the day. I am really grateful that late in the afternoon, he made time to come to my house and fix the problem properly. He had to stay until after 6:30pm. I am really impressed and absolutely would recommend him. Sam Goldman.

reviews.author: Frank Slater
reviews.text: I can’t recommend W.B. plumbing highly enough! I called him about a clogged sink and a burst pipe in my basement, and he showed up just an hour later. He was professional, thorough, and took the time to troubleshoot the issue while explaining my options and next steps in a clear and straightforward way. It was obvious he cared about getting the job done right rather than just rushing through it. If you’re looking for a knowledgeable and reliable plumber in Worcester County, W.B. Plumbing is the one to call!

reviews.author: Karen Chamberland
reviews.text: After finding a leaking pipe in my basement I began the task of finding someone to repair it. After calling 4 plumbers, WB Plumbers answered the phone. I explained about the leak and within 2 hours he arrived,found the leak and got to the task of repairing it. He was great!! I will definitely call him again, first, if I need a plumber again. Would definitely recommend him to anyone asking if I know a good plumber.

reviews.author: Chris Mahan
reviews.text: I called Bill because my main water valve was leaking badly. He was here immediately, looked at it, went out for supplies, and had it done in an hour for a very competitive price. I had him back a week later to change out my entire sewer line; he had it done in a matter of a half a day and did beautiful work. Friendly, prompt, and does quality work. I will only call Bill for my future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Tina Galanis Kachadoorian
reviews.text: WB Plumbing replaced my mother's water tank.  Bill was very professional and thorough, and he even replaced her Fire/CO alarm.  I highly recommend Bill Brouillard and his company WB Plumbing.  He is licensed and insured, and did an amazing job for my mother.  I've already given his name to my family and friends, and will reach out to him for all plumbing needs going forward.

reviews.author: meryl worcester
reviews.text: It is hard to find people to do small jobs, and even harder to find someone who you don't feel is trying to rip you off. He came on time and didn't try to do a lot of extra things that I didn't need. And gave me good advice for the future and will definitely be my plumber from this point forward. A highly recommended WB Plumbing!

reviews.author: Donna Dube
reviews.text: We had a shower that was leaking and would not shut off on a Saturday afternoon.   Spoke to Bill who came over quickly, diagnosed the problem, got the parts needed and completed the job in just over an hour.   He did a fantastic job and at 1/2 the price we were quoted from the first plumber we called.   Highly recommend!!

synthesis.summary: Bill shows up fast for emergencies and charges half what other plumbers do, but there are two no-show incidents that suggest scheduling reliability issues despite his otherwise stellar track record.
strengths: Emergency responder: 8 reviewers specifically mention same-day or within-hours arrival during urgent situations (burst pipes, weekend emergencies, sump pump failures)
Fair pricing: 11 reviewers explicitly mention competitive or discounted pricing, with multiple stating he charged '1/2' or 'less than half' of competing quotes
Educational approach: Multiple reviewers praise his willingness to teach homeowners basics and explain work step-by-step rather than oversell unnecessary services
weaknesses: No-show pattern: 2 of 46 Google reviews report complete no-shows on scheduled appointments (08/08/2025 and 01/07/2020), suggesting potential scheduling or reliability problems despite fast emergency response

Isolated billing dispute: 1 review (01/07/2020) claims he charged $120 for 5 minutes of work (flipping a switch) and the sump pump subsequently failed, raising questions about diagnostic accuracy or follow-up responsibility
redFlags: 2 of 46 reviewers report no-shows on scheduled appointments (08/08/2025: 'no call no text just a no show'; 01/07/2020 context suggests scheduling issues), indicating potential reliability problems despite emergency availability
1 review (01/07/2020) reports questionable service quality: $120 charge for 5-minute visit (switch flip) followed by pump failure, raising concerns about diagnostic thoroughness
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Strong pattern of same-day and evening/weekend emergency response (at least 8 documented instances), including willingness to work past normal hours. However, the two no-show incidents on scheduled jobs create uncertainty about whether emergencies are prioritized over existing appointments.

plumbers.name: Clarksville Plumbing, LLC
plumbers.address: 7380 Coca Cola Dr Suite 123, Hanover, MD 21076, USA

reviews.author: Wendy Holsinger
reviews.text:
I can not say enough good things about the service I received from Clarksville
Plumbing!!! It was the day after Christmas and the water would not turn off in my bathroom sink. The cut off valves were seized and basically my faucet was falling apart because it was over 23 years old. I made a call and a wonderful and very knowledgeable technician named Rick came to my rescue! He got my cut off valves and my faucet replaced in no time at all. He was able to fix a very bad and scary situation in no time at all.

reviews.author: Dinesh Tharmalingam
reviews.text: Quick and High quality Service!!! Thank you Rick

reviews.author: Omar Jones
reviews.text: Rick and Tyler from Clarksville Plumbing replaced and serviced our hot water this year.  Their work was fantastic and the price was very reasonable.  Definitely recommend Clarksvilles Plumbing and Rick and Tyler specifically!

reviews.author: Lisa
reviews.text: I had a wonderful experience with Clarksville Plumbing, from booking by phone with Conner and getting an appointment the following morning, to the outstanding service provided by Rick and Tyler. After telling me upfront the cost (very reasonable and fair), they replaced my Moen bathtub faucet and recaulked the whole area, including gaps that had been left open previously that should have been closed. They took care of everything. They were kind, professional, efficient, neat, and responsive. Rick asked if I had any other plumbing questions while I was there, which was great because I did have some questions that he answered with the knowledge base of his thirty years of experience. I *highly recommend* Clarksville Plumbing and will call them again whenever we need any plumbing services.

reviews.author: aprilflow3
reviews.text: A clogged sink - or clogged anything - can be a real pain. Previous plumbers have snaked the sink, yet weeks or months later, another clog would form. Clarksville Plumbing came not once, but twice within 24 hours to assess the issue and provided successful advice, as well as reasonable, detailed explanations for why the sink was constantly clogged. Mr. Rick and Mr. Tyler worked great together, quickly identifying the problem and implementing solutions, putting an end to our headache. They also fixed our leaking shower head, which was a huge plus. Bio Clean has become a dear friend of our pipes and Clarksville Plumbing the best plumber we've used to date. Thank you all for your patience, knowledge, understanding, and great service!

reviews.author: Frances Tolbert
reviews.text: A special thank you to Rick and Tyler for responding to my emergency plumbing needs. They arrived to install a toilet supply line in my guest bathroom.  After the installation, they made sure the toilet was working properly.  Rick and Tyler were professional, focused on their work and provided information that will be helpful to me if there are future plumbing problems.  Rick was especially helpful by identifying the main water line in my home.  He showed me the direction that the lever should be turned if there is a home flood.  I sincerely appreciate that he took the time to do this.  This was a testament to his patience and sincerity when dealing with customers.  Thanks again to Rick and Tyler.

reviews.author: Jamie Edwards
reviews.text: I had a fantastic experience with Clarksville Plumbing! Rick and Tyler came out to assess an issue with my drain and were incredibly thorough. They took the time to explain everything in great detail, ensuring I fully understood the issue and the necessary steps for resolution. They spent a significant amount of time making sure the problem was corrected properly and even provided clear instructions for maintenance moving forward. Their professionalism, expertise, and dedication were truly impressive—all at a very reasonable price. I highly recommend this amazing team for any plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Bruce Levy
reviews.text: I had a fantastic experience with Clarksville Plumbing! Rick and Tyler came out to give me an estimate for a sink repair and a tub faucet issue. They were both incredibly knowledgeable, precise, and clearly knew their stuff. The consultation was thorough and unrushed, and they took the time to walk me through my options in a way that made sense. They even shared helpful winterization tips to protect my plumbing, which I really appreciated. The estimate was detailed and professional. Highly recommend this team if you're looking for honest, expert service!

reviews.author: James Williams
reviews.text: We have been having drainage issues with both the toilet and the bath tub.  It’s an old house so work had to be done with care to prevent the possibility of breaking one of the pipes.  Richard is clearly very experienced.  He knew immediately how to tackle the problem.  By the time he was done drainage was full restored.  While Richard worked on the drainage, his assistant, Tyler batalles a new toilet.  Both jobs were done expertly well and most efficiently.  I’m very happy and will be calling back when I need plumbing work.

reviews.author: AD
reviews.text: Water heater blew when temperatures were around 20 degrees at night in February. Our furnace also uses water heating. So no house heat or hot showers for family of five with three kids. Relied on space heaters and bucket showers. Rick & Tyler came same day to repair a 12-year old, non-standard, worn out heater. It worked for 6 hours and died again. Rick came back quickly and advised a new heater. He ordered a replacement heater and installed it quickly, immediately it got delivered to my house. Great service and great guys.

reviews.author: Andrew Burroughs
reviews.text:
As a small buisness owner , I have relied on Clarksville plumbing a few times to help support my buisness.
The owner Jake , tech Brandon , Rick and office manger Connor and Tyler are the individual I personally know and they are top notch!!
Not only have they fixed mistakes made by myself  such as punctured water lines etc..
, I have worked side by side with them on several construction projects.
They are knowledgeable,  easy to work with ,
Competent  and fun .
I  would highly recommend thier service!!

reviews.author: Maurice Benning
reviews.text: Rick  was Awesome With installing our Toilet! He gave us suggestions on with Toilet is best for our household. All Toilets not Good Toilets! He was very professional, Efficient, with a Great Attitude! He  explained what the problem was and how to solve it. I would Recommend him to all my Friends! It is reassuring to find a plumber who is honest upfront and have the customer best interest at Heart! Also a Good Conversationalist! 5 🌟 Stars for sure!  Excellent Job Rick

reviews.author: Sonali Koranne
reviews.text: Excellent service all around. Rick and Tylar responded quickly to fix a leak, arrived  on time, and  explained everything clearly before starting the work. They were both professional and easy to work with the repair was completed efficiently, and the area was left clean afterward. We have also used them while finishing our basement and they have been consistently reliable every time. Pricing was fair and everything is working perfectly now. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Emily Smith
reviews.text: Tyler, the Plumber’s Apprentice at Clarksville Plumbing, did an excellent job with our bathroom sink repair. Despite being new to the field, Tyler approached the task with great skill and enthusiasm. His work was thorough, and he communicated effectively throughout the process. It’s clear that Clarksville Plumbing invests in training their apprentices well

reviews.author: McKenzie Harrison
reviews.text: Jake’s leadership was crucial in resolving our plumbing issues during a home renovation. He coordinated the installation of new pipes and fixtures, ensuring everything was done to a high standard. Jake’s expertise and clear communication made the process smooth and efficient. We’re very happy with the results and highly recommend Clarksville Plumbing.

synthesis.summary: Rick and Tyler show up the next day, fix it right the first time, and explain what they did—52 Google reviews all 5 stars with zero complaints on any platform.
strengths: Same-day or next-day emergency response: 6+ reviews explicitly mention arriving same day or next morning for urgent issues (water heater failure, seized valves, leaks)
Honest pricing and no upselling: 7+ reviews specifically praise fair costs, upfront quotes, and refusal to oversell—Rick explicitly mentioned as transparent about what's actually needed

Expert diagnostics and thoroughness: 12+ reviews highlight solving problems previous plumbers couldn't fix, detailed explanations in layman's terms, and identifying root causes rather than band-aid fixes
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Same-day service documented in multiple reviews including emergency water heater replacement in February freezing weather; Rick and Tyler available for urgent calls; parts stocked on truck for on-the-spot repairs.

plumbers.name: Victory Plumbing Services, LLC
plumbers.address: 500 Ponderosa Dr, Bel Air, MD 21014, USA

reviews.author: Andy Arismendi
reviews.text: Jeff is very responsive, timely and does a good job. Have needed a bunch of plumbing work recently and Jeff was able to take care of it all very quickly. Highly recommend Victory Plumbing!

reviews.author: Lisa Nestle
reviews.text: Jeff at Victory plumbing is the most responsive and helpful plumber I've ever had the opportunity to know! He always answers my emails within an hour and has lots of helpful suggestions to see if the problem can be fixed first. He is professional and I cannot say enough good things about this company! I'll never use another plumbing service! Just wanted share with others the gem we were told about!

reviews.author: Denzil Hall
reviews.text: Jeff and Ryan are super plumbers! They should wear capes with a “P” on their chest. We had a oder from the plumbing in the bathroom. They explained why it was happening and the solution for the fix. Each step was explained and attention to details was very impressive. I strongly recommend Victory Plumbing of Bel Air for any plumbing needs!

reviews.author: J Fox
reviews.text: The second job that Jeff came out and did was to install a new sink in master bathroom. The sink was not secured down with silicone. The other sink was the example to replicate. A bunch of ugly white caulk was applied. I contacted Jeff to come back and fix it with no reply. I had to remove the sink and clean up his mess. I applied silicone, not caulk and now the sink is secured properly and looks clean and matches the other sink. I will not be using Victory plumbing anymore.

reviews.author: Kevin P
reviews.text:
I have now used Victory three times. Jeff is my 'go to'!

The first time used Victory Plumbing I needed a back-up hot water tank that had failed removed.  The project required disconnecting and capping the water lines; disconnecting and capping the gas line; capping the exhaust line; and removal and disposal of the tank.  Len the Plumber quoted $1100.  Jeff was able to complete the job for $450.

Last month, while traveling out of town, my wife called to tell me the hot water tank was leaking.  I gave her Jeff's number and asked he to call him, telling him that I would be back in town in early afternoon.  Jeff and his apprentice met me at 3:30pm as arranged and replaced my tank within 90 minutes.  It was relief to have a professional available for an 'emergency' that I could count upon to show up on time and take care of the problem immediately.

Two days ago, Jeff came out and was able to quickly diagnose and repair a small gas line leak on my fireplace within a very short period of time.  His work is always neat ,efficient, and reasonably priced.  Lastly, when you call the number, Jeff is the person that answers... and he always answers his phone unless both hands are in a project at that moment.

reviews.author: Robert Schabinger
reviews.text: I started with Jett Plumbing because the sellers of the home I bought recommended them to me. The sellers actually had a bit of work done by Jett Plumbing for me as part of the sale which turned out to be not to code - something I only found out because Jeff told me that there is no way that the work would have passed inspection (wait, what? there was supposed to be an inspection from the Harford County Permit Board???). Paul Jett's demeanor, tardiness, and his failure to get my hot water baseboard heating working on his first visit to my place had motivated me to call Jeff at Victory Plumbing. Jeff was a true professional and gave me roughly the price that Paul was going to give me for him to actually fix my problem on his second visit. Needless to say, Jeff fixed my problem (original owner had installed purge valves upside down long ago, something which Paul did not bother to tell me on his first visit but obviously knew based on the quote he gave me for his second visit). If you are looking for a competent, honest, professional plumber that shows up on time and is interested in helping you solve your problems, then Jeff is your guy.

reviews.author: Shyla Starlings
reviews.text: I give victory plumbing a 5/5 who doesn’t love to support local businesses and honest trustworthy reliable people at that ! In my eyes that is a win win case scenario ! After having several people come take a look at what was going on I can honestly say Jeff went above and beyond from checking everything & looking at things that other plumbers did not as well as making suggestions ! (Which in the end helped save us money too, which who doesn’t love to save money).  These guys Jeff & Ryan were very personable , Their  was no one trying to upsell anything again they were honest which made what was a very stressful process that much more less stressful ! Even after finishing the job he not only looked over everything once or twice he checked it all a third time as well as talking us through it all !!! FOR THAT THANK YOU AND I AM SO SO GRATEFUL TO FIND TRUSTWORTHY RELIABLE GUYS TO DO THIS JOB !! I had my waterline , hot water heater, expansion tank , the whole 9 yards done! Victory plumbing made sure everything was up to code and definitely went the extra mile which exceeded my expectations!

reviews.author: Gregory Indyke
reviews.text: We called Victory plumbing on a Sunday morning after our kitchen faucet sprung a cold water leak. This was controlled by turning off the quick shut off valve. I explained that my wife was recuperating from a recent  long term hospital stay and needed the use of the kitchen sink as she was confined to the downstairs part of our house. Jeff explained that he was booked up until the middle of the week but agreed to come out the next day. He and his apprentice showed up when he said he would on time and installed a new faucet in no time. Estimate given before the work started, very respectful and professional. Will use them again and recommend very highly.

reviews.author: Don
reviews.text: Very impressed with Victory Plumbing. Jeff came out quickly and had me taken care of in no time. He is very professional, knowledgeable, and passionate about his industry. I felt comfortable having him in my home and he worked up a great solution for my basement piping issue. I trusted his suggestions and never felt like i was being misled or upsold. Jeff and his company Victory Plumbing have become my new go-to plumbing company. If you live in Harford County, Maryland they should be your go-to company too. Honest people that do a good job at a fair price are rare these days. Thanks again Jeff, you have earned my business in the future!

reviews.author: MD Booze
reviews.text: My well pressure tank was leaking and I sent out a request on yelp to several plumbers. While only 3 responded initially, when i explained what i needed only Jeff from Victory got back to me in minutes and gave me a quote. He scheduled me for the next morning and replaced the tank. He did a great job and was neat, personable, courteous and just a nice guy to chat with. I was a technician for 45 years so i know a kindred spirit when i run into one. Its so nice to have someone who cares about customers!! I would definitely call him out again!!!

reviews.author: athena smith
reviews.text: Victory Plumbing is THE BEST ! The owner Jeff is an awesome individual and checks all the boxes for a 5 star business. They are efficient, professional, reliable, responsive, personable and affordable ! We are never using anyone else and will definitely be referring and encouraging EVERYONE to use him for all of their plumbing needs. If you’re looking for GREAT customer service at a GREAT price, call him now ! Thank you so much again, Victory Plumbing (:

reviews.author: Corinne Odo
reviews.text: My hot water heater was replaced so that hot water would be restored to my condo.... but water continued to be tepid. A mixing valve was replaced- still no hot water. Then I called Victory Plumbing! Jeff diagnosed the problem quickly and provided a written estimate before he left my home. Today he was back to do the job, taking care to protect carpet and with a friendly and professional manner. Thanks, Jeff!! I have HOT water once again!!

reviews.author: Brian Dietz
reviews.text: We found a leak on Memorial Day morning and they were over in 2 hours. We were supposed to have people over for the holiday and Victory Plumbing made sure that it happened! Very personable, walked me through why it happened, what we would need to do for a claim  and was very nice to my wife , kids and dog! In and out in 20 minutes. The cost was extremely reasonable. I would highly recommend this company!

reviews.author: Will Frazier
reviews.text: I didn’t know where to turn to after being robbed both by Len the Plumber and Roto Rooter. Jeff from Victory was so straightforward and fair. He investigated to see if we had a leak. He was so knowledgeable and I didn’t feel that hard sell these bigger plumbing companies give. I’m definitely going to call them for all our future plumbing needs. Thank you again, Jeff!!

reviews.author: Jonathan Mullin
reviews.text: Great experience getting bathroom back in shape. Helped address some issues from the previous owner. Took the time to explain quality of fittings and toilets so we could make the best long term choices. Then he took care of everything including purchasing of the equipment, install, and disposal. A full service outfit I will certainly rely on in the future.

synthesis.summary: Jeff shows up fast for emergencies and charges fair prices, but one customer had to redo his sink installation work because it wasn't sealed properly.
strengths: Same-day or next-day emergency response: 8+ reviewers specifically mention rapid dispatch for water heater leaks, burst pipes, and weekend emergencies
Transparent pricing without upselling: 6+ reviewers note Jeff provides written estimates upfront and suggests cheaper solutions rather than premium options
Owner-operated with direct accountability: Jeff personally answers calls and shows up to jobs, mentioned by 5+ reviewers as a trust signal
weaknesses: Quality control inconsistency: 1 reviewer (10/13/2023) had to remove and redo sink installation due to improper caulking/silicone application; Jeff did not respond to callback request to fix it
Limited follow-up on finish work: Same reviewer reported no response when contacting Jeff about cosmetic issues post-installation
redFlags: 1 of 47 Google reviewers reported unresolved quality defect (sink installation without proper silicone seal) and no response to callback—potential sign of inconsistent workmanship or accountability on lower-priority finish work
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviewers confirm same-day service on evenings and weekends; water heater emergency on Friday afternoon resolved by Saturday 1pm; Memorial Day leak response within 2 hours.

plumbers.name: FJ Bero & Co. Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1629 Weld Rd, Elgin, IL 60123, USA

reviews.author: Wendy Wessel
reviews.text: We called to have a kitchen faucet replaced. Jeff set up appt as soon as they could, and Zach - who puit new faucet in- was wonderful. We have an old home and only a certain faucet works. They were so helpful and so glad we called them.

reviews.author: Laura Zorn
reviews.text: F. J. Bero plumbing has helped with our old house plumbing a number of times. I called them this morning and the issue was solved before noon. Excellent service!!!

reviews.author: Korin Stocker
reviews.text: I have been a customer for the past 10+ years and have always had exceptional service. Zach was very professional (and honest) which I definitely appreciated.  He even returned my call after about 15 mins being finished with the job to assist me even more. Keep up the great work FJ Bero!!

reviews.author: John Dahlberg
reviews.text: Second time in the last 8 days that we have used the services of F.J. Bero Plumbing.  Zach, from Bero was prompt, courteous, knowledgeable and efficient.  We have used F.J. Bero Plumbing for years.  We find their entire service team to be friendly, professional and skilled in all facets of plumbing. They show up on time and get the job done right the first time - every time! A special thanks to Jeff Bero to making sure our clogged drain issue was addressed before the Christmas Holiday weekend.

reviews.author: David Crail
reviews.text:
I've used FJ Bero 3 times now, most recently in January 2024. The response was very timely from when I requested an appointment to when the appointment occurred. Zach addressed all of my questions and successfully handled the issues we were having.

I have been very impressed with their knowledge, professionalism, consideration of options I had, competitive pricing and quick turnaround for availability. I would not hesitate to use FJ Bero again with any sort of plumbing needs that I may have.

synthesis.summary: FJ Bero & Co. Plumbing demonstrates exceptional reliability and professionalism, with multiple customers using their services repeatedly over many years. They show strong responsiveness for urgent issues and have particular expertise with older homes, though 24-hour emergency availability is unclear.
weaknesses: Limited review sample size
24-hour availability unknown
synthesis.topQuote: I called them this morning and the issue was solved before noon. Excellent service!!!

plumbers.name: R.J. O'Neil Inc. Mechanical Contractors
plumbers.address: 1125 S Lake St, Montgomery, IL 60538, USA

reviews.author: Hi5 Vacations
reviews.text:
I’ve been using this company for over 11 years, and they continue to exceed my expectations every single time! Recently, our AC stopped working, and they sent a technician out right away. He was incredibly knowledgeable—after I explained the issue, he immediately diagnosed the problem and even made an extra trip to pick up the replacement part to get us up and running the same day.

This is a woman-owned business run by hardworking people who truly treat their customers and employees like family. Their service is always superior, and their prices are very reasonable. It’s rare to find a company that cares this much and delivers such consistent quality. Highly recommend them to anyone looking for honest, dependable HVAC service!

reviews.author: Jon Dow
reviews.text:
As a small business owner, I strongly caution others against using this HVAC/R company. In my 10+ years of small business ownership, they are by far the least trustworthy and poorest performing contractor I have ever used. Our experience with them was nothing short of a disaster.

We trusted them with all our HVAC and refrigeration needs and were met with poor service, a defensive attitude, and zero accountability. When problems arose (and there were many), they were quick to argue and slow to act. They raised our service rate by 25% over the course of a year without notifying us. When I asked about it via email—no response.

I also requested multiple quotes that never showed up. As a business owner, I don’t have time to chase vendors just to pay them. We caught them billing us for work that was clearly not performed. On two separate occasions I verified this—one required a third-party HVAC company to inspect and confirm, with photos, that the rooftop unit had not been cleaned or serviced as billed. Even when caught with proof, they were completely deflective on the issue. After waiting almost 2 months for a return visit to correct this PM (and them continually rescheduling) – we gave up and had to hire a new company to do the work.

Their refrigeration services were even worse.

They mis-sized a walk-in freezer system – which we purchased and were forced to replace - because they used incorrect measurements and passed the load calculations off to their supply warehouse.

When I showed them manufacturer-provided calculations that proved the system was undersized, they did nothing but argue. No ownership. No fix. Just more excuses.

Hilariously, they also bid to replace the walk in freezer / cooler and the measurement was completely wrong. If I would have used them – they would have showed up with a cooler/freezer that would not have fit the space. Inability to properly use a tape measure, I’m sure that would have been turned around on me and become my fault too.

The most frustrating part of all this has been their attitude—always defensive, never apologetic, and absolutely no sense of customer care or professionalism.

Bottom line: If something goes wrong (and it likely will), this company will not stand behind their work. Do yourself a favor—look elsewhere. You deserve a company that values your time, your business, and does the job right. Attached are photos right after a “PM” on our roof top units.

reviews.author: Jennifer McSkimming
reviews.text: I used RJ O'Neil for the first time and was beyond impressed! I was given options of furnace repair, replacement and furnace and a/c replacement. As a woman it is an intimidating process to have home repairs/replacement done, but RJ O'Neil made it such an easy process. I appreciate their professionalism, expertise and how respectfully they treated me. I am very happy with my new furnace & AC, I would highly recommend RJ O'Neil!!

reviews.author: Lou Rivera-Hill
reviews.text: R. J. O’Neil handled the removal and installation of our heating and AC system today. The response to our need was quick, starting with the estimate, then proposal/invoice and finally the installation. The installers were prompt and professional and work was done in a timely fashion. They went above and beyond when connecting to the existing duct work and the clean up. We highly recommend R. J. O’Neil for all your mechanical, HVAC and plumbing contractor work, both residential and commercial. Five star business for sure!

reviews.author: Josh Kutzke
reviews.text: We can’t thank RJ O’Neil enough! Our AC went out in the middle of a heat wave, and with a newborn at home we were really worried. They responded immediately, showed up quickly, and had our unit fixed the same day. The technician was professional, efficient and personable. Having cool air back so fast was such a relief for our family (especially for the newborn and dog!). Highly recommend RJ O’Neil for anyone looking for reliable and caring HVAC service!

synthesis.summary: R.J. O'Neil shows strong emergency response capabilities with same-day service and quick technician dispatch, earning high praise from residential customers. However, a concerning business customer review reveals serious issues with billing practices, accountability, and work quality that raise questions about reliability.
strengths: Excellent emergency response - same day service
Woman-owned business with family-like service approach
weaknesses: Serious billing and accountability issues reported
Defensive attitude when problems arise
Poor commercial service track record
redFlags: Billing for work not performed
Unannounced 25% rate increases
Defensive responses to legitimate complaints
Poor measurement and sizing accuracy
synthesis.topQuote: Our AC went out in the middle of a heat wave, and with a newborn at home we were really worried. They responded immediately, showed up quickly, and had our unit fixed the same day.
synthesis.worstQuote: We caught them billing us for work that was clearly not performed. On two separate occasions I verified this—one required a third-party HVAC company to inspect and confirm, with photos, that the rooftop unit had not been cleaned or serviced as billed.

plumbers.name: Costello's Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3826 Anza Way, San Leandro, CA 94578, USA

reviews.author: Lily L.
reviews.text: Gary and his crew were great! They helped us identify a few issues we had and resolved it in a very timely manner. We started off with clogged toilets 2 days before Christmas - they came out and helped us snake it, pulling out a bunch of roots. They didn't have their camera so we scheduled another appointment for them to come back out after Christmas. They found another clog, but their 100ft snake was not long enough to clear that clog because our main sewer entry was built too far from it. They advised us to put another entry point closer to the city sewer connection for easier access to clearing the pipes in the future. Gary was knowledgeable and provided detailed information to help us make our decision to move forward with the work, without any pressure. Him and his crew of 3 finished the work in 2 days without any disruption to our lives. He provided his advice for maintenance going forward and CDs with the video from the camera footage to show us before and after their work. We are very happy, thank you Costello Plumbing!

reviews.author: Pat M
reviews.text: Less than 24 hrs ago I discovered a leak in my water heater.  I checked "Angies List" for recommended local plumbers.  Costello's plumbing came up.  I was contacted within 10 minutes.  We set an appt for this morning between 9 and 10.  Vic and his helper arrived about 9:15.  I was given a detailed quote with a fair and expected price.  In less than 3 hrs a new heater was brought and installed.  Vic did a great job on the installation and clean up.  He explained the ways and reasons for servicing the new heater.  I was expecting this to be an all day process.  The quick and thorough job done by Vic allowed me to keep afternoon appts.  My thanks to him and Costello's plumbing for the quick response.  I highly recommend them and will keep their number for any future plumbing needs.  Great Job!

reviews.author: Patrick M.
reviews.text: Less than 24 hrs ago I discovered a leak in my water heater.  I checked "Angies List" for recommended local plumbers.  Costello's plumbing came up.  I was contacted within 10 minutes.  We set an appt for this morning between 9 and 10.  Vic and his helper arrived about 9:15.  I was given a detailed quote with a fair and expected price.  In less than 3 hrs a new heater was brought and installed.  Vic did a great job on the installation and clean up.  He explained the ways and reasons for servicing the new heater.  I was expecting this to be an all day process.  The quick and thorough job done by Vic allowed me to keep afternoon appts.  My thanks to him and Costello's plumbing for the quick response.  I highly recommend them and will keep their number for any future plumbing needs.  Great Job!

reviews.author: HELEN L.
reviews.text: Every homeowner's worst nightmare is discovering moisture in your walls & floors without knowing how long it's been there.  We noticed our kitchen floorboards warping and pulled back a kitchen cabinet toekick to find still water that looked like it had been there awhile.  Frantically we called 3 different plumbing companies to come out, diagnose and quote the job.  We were alarmed by the quotes we were given and the scope of job they were quoting (tearing down kitchen cabinets, drilling into concrete to access pipes).  Some plumbers looked absolutely giddy to discover the work that needed to be done.  I'm so thankful we went with Miguel from Costello's Plumbing- he was focused, empathetic and dependable.  Miguel and Alex were respectful of our home, wearing shoe coverings at all times and thorough with their clean up.  They were creative about how to approach the work to save us on costs (i.e. working inside the cabinet rather than ripping it out) and explained their process thoroughly and transparently.
