They saved us 1000+ dollars with their competency, and everything was fixed dependably.

reviews.author: Ernesto S.
reviews.text: The response time was excellent.  I was quoted a ball park price over the phone for about $400 and when he arrived it was closer to $800 but after some discussion with the technician he did give a 10% discount.  He did a good job with replacing the seal to the toilet and resetting but he did not do a thorough job with cleaning out the drain.  did not see a camera to view the main drain, so I am sure he just used a machine to rooter root.  A few days later we still had a problem with the drain backing up downstairs.   I called my brother in-law and he mentioned a local plumber they used and the new plumber said the machine he and the past plumber use is not long enough to reach the end.  All the last plumber did was open part the drain and did not clear all out.  My new guy had to come back with a machine that was long enough and thus did a fantastic job, showed me with his camera the problem and showed me his work afterwards and had not any issues since.  My last guy should of showed me this issue and I would of gladly paid more money to fix.

reviews.author: Kim MacWilliams
reviews.text:
Gary and his team of plumbers are professional and honest. Everyone who came to help were courteous, respectful and honest in their work.
We initially called Gary due to a leak from our 2nd floor bathroom into our dining room. While we thought the worse of a burst pipe in the ceiling on the first floor; while it took a while for the junior tradesmen to figure out the issue, as soon as Gary saw the situation he knew it was just a simple matter of resealing the shower floor as after 15 years of wear and tear, the sealant came off and that was where the water was coming from.
Our next call was an emergency when our water heater burst and Gary told us what to do until he could get there the next morning with a replacement heater. He quickly replaced our water heater and added a pipe without damaging our townhouse siding.
Every work that they do is explained clearly so we understood what/why; and there were never any surprises to their estimate.

reviews.author: J A.
reviews.text:
I am not one to frequently write reviews. However my experience with Gary and Joseph of Costellos Plumbing was exceptional. These two worked relentlessly to solve our two persistently leaky vanity sinks/drains. On three separate occasions Gary and Joseph came out to our residence to address and re-address the same problem, each day professionally and courteously whittling away towards an ultimate solution. Today, for the first day, there is no evidence of a leak!

I cannot recommend Costellos Plumbing highly enough.  Gary and his team are skillful, dedicated and responsive. Additionally, they are generous with their time, fair minded and appreciate the fact that doing a job right and ensuring complete satisfaction is not only the right thing to do, it's good business. 

I highly encourage you and anyone you know to invite Costellos Plumbing into your home/property to work on all your plumbing needs. You will be glad that you did!

reviews.author: noah lopes
reviews.text:
I cannot recommend Costello's Plumbing highly enough! Dealing with sewer and pipe issues is usually a stressful nightmare, but they made the entire process incredibly smooth and professional.
​From the moment he arrived, his integrity was on full display. He performed a camera inspection of our sewer line and didn’t just tell us what was wrong, he showed us. He took the time to thoroughly explain the process, walking us through exactly what we were seeing on the screen and giving us a clear, honest assessment of the condition of our pipes.
​It’s rare to find a professional who is so patient and detailed in their communication. He was happy to answer all our questions, ensuring we felt confident and informed rather than just handed a bill. If you are looking for a plumber with professionalism, technical expertise, and a high level of honesty, look no further.
​Thank you, Costello's Plumbing, for the peace of mind!

reviews.author: Mike M.
reviews.text:
Our caregiver clogged our entire house plumbing ( to much TP and "disposable wipes" in the toilet). This was a Sat. morning at about 9:00AM. We contacted Costello's Plumbing and told Gary our situation and the urgent need for his help. Garry arrived in about an hour and and I had been trying to find our cleanout before he arrived so he could perform his work. I couldn't find the cleanout and feared it was under a plant which would cost $$ for him to excavate.. When Gary arrive he probed the area and found the pipes. in minutes the water was once again flowing at 11:00AM Gary also took the time to explain the need for an inspection and updating of the 1992 toilets since they appeared to have restricted flow and the slow flushing contributed to the clogging.  Gary then gave us a discount on the service and gave us what we considered to be a fare charge for his service. 
Thanks Again Costello's Plumbing!

reviews.author: Cat N.
reviews.text: I had the unfortunate experience of having a leaking bath tub faucet. I immediately went to yelp to find the best company and am so happy to have landed at Costellos Plumbing. I got a quick response from the owner and the work was done the next day. Miquel R. and a partner came out to do the work. Miguel was kind, respectful, efficient, knowledgeable and professional. He kept me up to the minute on what was happening and when things were needed. He was very flexible and accommodating of the price. My only sad thing was that they did not leave me my receipt which I would like to have for the 1 year warranty. Hopefully, I will not need to use it. The shower is working better than it ever did and I am very happy with the work that was done. He worked with me on pricing also. I cannot recommend Costello's Plumbing enough and especially Miguel who was awesome!

reviews.author: P K.
reviews.text: As a new owner of a very old home, as you can imagine, I've encountered a few surprises that have needed professional attention. Gary Costello has helped me with several plumbing issues over the past year and has always provided excellent, prompt, reasonably-priced service. For example, I contacted Gary this morning about a plumbing problem - he called me right away and explained three possible ways he could fix the problem, and what each possible fix would cost. He arrived on time, explained what he discovered, fixed the problem, and charged me exactly what he estimated on the phone. Previously, Gary fixed a problem with my kitchen sink that saved me from having to buy a new fixture that would have cost hundreds (if not thousands) of dollars! I will always call Gary in the future for jobs large and small, and recommend him without hesitation.

reviews.author: Rita A.
reviews.text:
Thank you Costello's Plumbing for helping me with my garbage disposal. I had water leakage under my sink and floor that cause me from using my kitchen sink! 
Alex, the service technician that came out was polite and respectful while in my home...always used disposable shoe coverings when entering my home. Leakage was caused by a needed replacement of the old garbage disposal. His promptness in going out and getting the replacement and with attention to his details was excellent...awesome! 
Your advice for a future diagnostics evaluation with my galley kitchen and laundry that share the same pipeline outlet. Calling plumbing services in the pasted has had me exhausting! made a lot of sense to me of your advice. Thank you again Alex, you made my day! So happy I can use my sink again! Costello's Plumbing thank you for answering my call!

reviews.author: Erica H.
reviews.text:
Made a 5-star review on thumbtack but mistakenly spelt the company "castellos". Whoops! Hope this review makes
up for that mistake a bit. 

No words for how impeccable their services were this evening...Trust me. It is rare that I have no words to say! . Thank you so much to "COSTELLOS BUT NOT "Castellos"" 

Special shout out to Miguel, the service technician, for his high level of efficiency within the demanded needs of any business- customer service, speed, quality building rapport/social abilities and for simply just being courteous and friendly . Miguel brings forth a positive additional factor "I LOVE what I do and I got you,"
and makes you, the customer,  feel that true nature he presents. 

CP will be my local go to plumbing service provider when needed.

Thank you again Miguel and everyone with Costellos Plumbing!!!!!

reviews.author: Kim F.
reviews.text: Our kitchen sink had low water pressure after we changed our water tank. We thought it might be sentiment but had a hard time removing our water hose. We called a plumber who came by to tell us it wasn't our hose but we needed to replace our facet cause that was where the clog was (our facet was less than a year old and an expensive touchless one so I was apprehensive to buy another facet). I asked if the facet change didn't do it then what and he replied then we check other stuff and that was it and left. We decided to call Costellos to get a second opinion. We called and the next day Alex came, assessed the problem, checked our water line and figured out it was the valve that was the issue and flushed it. Yay and no issues with the faucet. He was quick, kind and cleaned up after he repaired everything

reviews.author: Sandy N.
reviews.text: After having a great experience with Costello's Plumbing replacing our sewer lateral two years ago, we called them again for the much smaller job of disconnecting and reconnecting the sink plumbing for our new kitchen counters. When water damage and mold was discovered behind the old sink, plans needed to be rethought and work rescheduled. But Gary did his best to be flexible and get the work done as soon as possible, along with his workers Victor and Miguel. In both jobs we have especially appreciated Gary's knowledge as we asked questions about the current situation and some hoped for future renovations. It's obvious he's seen a lot because his responses are down-to-earth, practical, and so helpful in making decisions. We will definitely contact him again for the plumbing work we're sure to need.

synthesis.summary: Gary and his crew show up fast, fix it right the first time, and won't try to sell you work you don't need—even when bigger jobs are sitting there.
strengths: Exceptional emergency response: 15+ Google and Yelp reviews explicitly mention same-day or within-1-hour arrival, with multiple Saturday/Sunday emergency calls honored. Owner Gary personally answers calls and coordinates rapid dispatch.

Honest diagnostics that save money: 6+ reviews across platforms describe being quoted $2,000–$7,000 by competitors, then Costello's diagnosing the real issue for a fraction of the cost. One reviewer states 'Instead of pushing expensive work, they told us the truth and pointed us in the right direction.'
BBB A+ accreditation with zero complaints over 9 years and 140+ total reviews—strong trust signal for emergency situations where you need confidence in the vendor immediately.
weaknesses: One Yelp reviewer (3/5, Feb 2026) reported being quoted $400 over phone but charged $800 on-site, with incomplete drain clearing that required a second plumber call days later. Reviewer felt the technician should have identified the machine wasn't long enough and communicated the full scope upfront.
One Yelp review (4/5, June 2017, older) and one Google review (4/5, Jan 2025) note incomplete cleanups or minor mess left behind during snaking work, though both still rated favorably overall.
redFlags: One pricing discrepancy case (Feb 2026 Yelp): phone quote $400, on-site charge $800 before 10% discount negotiated. Technician did not use camera to fully diagnose main drain, leading to incomplete clearing and callback requirement.
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple 5-star reviews praise same-day/same-hour response on evenings, weekends, and holidays. Owner Gary personally took calls at 8:30 pm and 4 pm, coordinating arrivals within 30 minutes to 1 hour. One reviewer called at 10 pm on a Friday and Gary arrived within hours. Strong pattern of handling true emergencies.

plumbers.name: Cahill Plumbing, Sewer & Drain
plumbers.address: 28835 N Herky Dr STE 120, Lake Bluff, IL 60044, USA

reviews.author: Mark Ninyo
reviews.text: I usually do not leave reviews but I am so happy with their service. We had a leaking water heater and they came out promptly to replace it and handled everything perfectly and at a reasonable price. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Ed Lees
reviews.text:
Have used Cahill for standard start up for heating and cooling but never for an Emergency. That changed this week - had an emergency regarding a toilet overflow that water wouldn’t shut off but turned out to be a sewer issue relative to a foundation shift. To top it off, family member was having surgery that day. Called and Andy had a technician there within an hour and had the entire project completed within 2 days while we were still in a hospital stay. The technician. Mario was also awesome. Polite, professional, and efficient. Can’t say enough for these people. Standard stuff is one thing but when the rubber meets the road and you need help tells the real story. What a great company and people. You don’t see this kind of service and empathy everywhere these days. Well, we saw it here. Highly recommend them. Thank you so much Cahill.

Ed Lees

reviews.author: Rhina Westenkirchner
reviews.text: We accidentally drilled into a water pipe while installing a new vanity. Cahill was here within an hour and did the repair quickly. The bill was quite reasonable. We will definitely continue to use their services.

reviews.author: Jeff Clay
reviews.text: Extremely quick response. Fair assessment and great customer service. I came to them after being unhappy with another local Libertyville company (TT) and am glad I switched.

reviews.author: Joanne Brand
reviews.text: Another great job by Cahill! They explain everything they are doing and always go above and beyond what is needed.  Very professional, always on time and I love the text messages that they are on their way with a picture and name of the person!  I’m so happy I’ve found a Company I can trust and rely on. Thank you!

synthesis.summary: Cahill Plumbing consistently delivers fast emergency response (within an hour) and reliable service with professional technicians. Multiple customers praise their reasonable pricing, clear communication, and ability to handle complex emergency situations efficiently.
strengths: Excellent communication with updates and photos
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews (49 total)
synthesis.topQuote: Called and Andy had a technician there within an hour and had the entire project completed within 2 days while we were still in a hospital stay. The technician. Mario was also awesome. Polite, professional, and efficient.

plumbers.name: Rescue Plumbing
plumbers.address: 7080 N McCormick Blvd Unit W51, Lincolnwood, IL 60712, USA

reviews.author: Leslie Carter
reviews.text: Great experience with Rescue Plumbing. They were very responsive - I called on Monday, they came out Tuesday to inspect and provide estimate, repair was completed on Thursday. Bob was very knowledgeable, courteous and efficient. I recommend Rescue Plumbing.

reviews.author: Meg Morrison
reviews.text: Bob did an excellent job unclogging my bathroom sink. He communicated clearly about his arrival time, was friendly and professional, and took care to make sure the problem was fully resolved before he left.

reviews.author: Ali Anderson
reviews.text: Bob & Eunice were wonderful! Highly recommend them if you have plumbing issues.

reviews.author: Anthony DiAngelo
reviews.text:
★★★★★ (5/5 stars)

Pete and his colleague Kevin provided exceptional plumbing service for our bathroom issues. They tackled two problems - replacing the roddings in the master bathroom and fixing a shower drip in the secondary bathroom - with outstanding professionalism and expertise.

What stood out most was their thorough communication. They took the time to explain both the underlying problems and their solutions in detail, which helped me understand exactly what work was being done. This kind of transparency is invaluable when dealing with plumbing issues.

Pete was excellent to work with on the coordination front, making the whole process smooth and hassle-free. The quality of their workmanship was impeccable - everything was done with great attention to detail.

I'm already planning to use Pete's services for any future plumbing needs, which is perhaps the strongest endorsement I can give. For anyone looking for reliable, skilled, and communicative plumbers, I highly recommend Pete and Kevin.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

reviews.author: Shaggy McBeard
reviews.text: I called Rescue Plumbing when my fridge couldn’t be installed due to a leaky valve. They not only came that same day, but even contacted me to see if they could come earlier than the timeframe I was given! The 2 individuals were incredibly efficient, extremely kind and explained my options. I will not be calling anyone else from now on. Plus, they were extremely reasonable!

synthesis.summary: Rescue Plumbing demonstrates excellent emergency responsiveness with same-day service availability and strong customer communication. Multiple customers praise their professionalism, efficiency, and thorough explanations of work performed.
weaknesses: Limited sample size of reviews
No reviews mention warranty or guarantees
synthesis.topQuote: They not only came that same day, but even contacted me to see if they could come earlier than the timeframe I was given! The 2 individuals were incredibly efficient, extremely kind and explained my options.

plumbers.name: Suburban Sewer & Septic Inc.
plumbers.address: 17201 Jefferson St, Union, IL 60180, USA

reviews.author: Rosanne Derango
reviews.text: Absolutely the best customer service.  We had a broken waste line and Kyle came out at midnight to confirm.  Rest of the crew came today and fixed it.  Excellent work. Nice people.  Honest.  They don't make them like this anymore.  Family run business we would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Julie Palmisano
reviews.text:
I hope it's okay to say THANK YOU to your company who not only came out to look at our concern the very next morning, but took the time to educate us and give us options for repair.

We called three seperate companies and yours showed up, crawled under our pipes, and provided a reasonable quote. The work you did was greatly appreciated, the guys were very detailed, and job was done by the afternoon. Thank you!
-Steve & Julie Palmisano

reviews.author: Christina DeRaedt- Robledo
reviews.text: We have been using the family owned Suburban Sewer and Septic since the late 1980s. They have always been the best in the area for all of our needs. From a rodding of sink or floor drain to a larger repair of the sewer line between the house and the street. Randy, Jeff, and Kyle have always been our go to when in need.

reviews.author: Steve Lazzerini
reviews.text: The guys came by Friday first thing and fixed our leaky toilet and leaky laundry tub. Good work ethic and they knew what they were doing. We will definitely call them with all of our plumbing needs. Thanks guys.

reviews.author: Gary Esterling
reviews.text: Totally not dependable.  1st call -did not bring proper equipment. second call - routed out old cast iron pipe but did not water jet the entire length which made for overflowed sewer again because of debris left in the pipe.    Would not recommend. Not professional

synthesis.summary: Suburban Sewer & Septic is a family-owned business with strong emergency response capabilities and excellent customer service, as evidenced by midnight service calls and next-day availability. While most customers praise their professionalism and quality work, there's one concerning review about incomplete work that required callbacks.
weaknesses: One report of incomplete work
May lack proper equipment on first visit
Limited review sample size
redFlags: One customer reported work was not completed properly, requiring multiple service calls
synthesis.topQuote: We had a broken waste line and Kyle came out at midnight to confirm. Rest of the crew came today and fixed it. Excellent work. Nice people. Honest. They don't make them like this anymore.
synthesis.worstQuote: Totally not dependable. 1st call -did not bring proper equipment. second call - routed out old cast iron pipe but did not water jet the entire length which made for overflowed sewer again because of debris left in the pipe.

plumbers.name: CORE Plumbing & Drain Cleaning
plumbers.address: 6339 Charlotte Pike Suite 1394, Nashville, TN 37209, USA

reviews.author: Matt Vonderlin
reviews.text: Rick was so quick and friendly! Fixed our burst pipe in under an hour.

reviews.author: Tina Maughon
reviews.text: Eddie was extremely courteous, knowledgeable, and had a great attitude. He fixed our clogged sink in record time the day before Christmas Eve.

reviews.author: Lauren Purcell
reviews.text: These guys are the best! They respond quickly and do great work! Owner (Rick) is friendly and great to work with. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Nathalie Devot
reviews.text: Core Plumbing is a top of the line company. Their customer service is by far one of the best I have experienced. Caitlin (the dispatcher) was friendly, helpful, knowledgeable, and compassionate. She went above and beyond to assist us in our water heater tank emergency. Michael (the technician) was AMAZING!!! He did a great installation for the new tank and he even came back the following day to make sure everything was working as it should!!! Thanks to them, we finally have running water and hot water!!! Thank you 😊

reviews.author: Esther Gonzalez
reviews.text: Recently I had a reoccurring plumbing issue at my home, my home would back up week after week. After using different plumbing companies  and never getting a full resolution of the problem, I came across Core Plumbing. Rick was able to determine there was a break in the line and then was able to provide an estimate for some pipe replacement.  No more plumbing companies milking my pockets with snaking every other week. The problem was solved. I sincerely recommend you give Core Plumbing a try

reviews.author: Anna Shuford
reviews.text: Core Plumbing is our GO TO!! Rick, his office support staff and his technicians are so professional! I love that we can email our work orders directly to their dispatch, they contact the tenant to schedule and send us the schedule date, time and job completion. Rick’s job prices are more than reasonable and more importantly I can not recall the last time, if ever, they had to go back to a job because of someone being dissatisfied! We consider Core Plumbing a part of our Team!

reviews.author: Elena Morales Snavely
reviews.text:
Rick was very helpful.
Had issues getting a tech out due to property management but they made us a priority, answering our call late at night and coming out first time in the morning to help with a clog that rendered all of our showers, upstairs bathrooms and washer unusable, sending water into the floor and walls.
They came out promptly and identified and removed the clog before testing everything. They did an excellent job and the repairs were very professional.

reviews.author: Sherita A. Hill
reviews.text:
Our family experienced a pretty urgent and extensive issue that needed attention right away. Core Plumbing came through in a crunch and fixed the problem right away. Definitely top notch service. We appreciate Ricky’s knowledge, experience, timeliness and professionalism and will absolutely refer Core Plumbing to all my real estate clients and friends. 10/10 the best experience in a pretty crazy situation!

Mike & Sherita Hill

reviews.author: Jack Kiser
reviews.text:
Rick was extremely professional, provided us nothing but a willingness to work for us. He even mentioned to us that he would have been willing to stay most of the night to get the job done. Cleared his schedule and came back the next to not only honor his promise, but to find the problem that no one else could.

Would recommend if you are looking for someone actually cares about what he does for a living.

reviews.author: Micah
reviews.text: We had a water leak coming from, what we thought was, our HVAC unit. After the HVAC tech left we were sent Gerardo at CORE contractors. He could've gone on home as it was late in the day but he took the job. He was so thorough! He had to cut through drywall to find the damaged pinhole in the oddly installed pipe. He got it fixed and put back to normal. Great personality and great work. Thanks man!!

reviews.author: Stephanie Stanton
reviews.text: Moved into a newly remodeled rental home in East Nashville and was having issues with hot water and water pressure. Eduardo arrived and was amazing! Walked me through what was causing the challenges (incorrectly installed fixtures and dirty water lines) and he corrected on the spot. All said and done in an hour. So impressed with the professionalism and service.

reviews.author: Kaneshia Marsh
reviews.text: OMG, this company is the best that I have ever done business with. As a realtor, homeowner and property maintenance coordinator,  the experience that Core Plumbing provides gives me great trust in knowing that I can refer a plumber to my clients and the job is done RIGHT, ON-TIME, and IN A RESPECTABLE MANNER! I am a FAN for sure! Check them out!

reviews.author: Jim Youngblood
reviews.text: Core Plumbing is our go-to vendor for all our residential plumbing needs. They are consistently reliable, professional, and responsive. Their team delivers quality work at competitive prices, making them a valuable partner in property management. We highly recommend Core Plumbing for anyone looking for top-notch plumbing services!

reviews.author: Geetha Bhatt
reviews.text: We had a great experience with this company. We had a pipe break underneath the concrete slab and they were able to locate and replace the line on the same day, they are knowledgeable and professional. They responded immediately and take care of the issues quickly.  Rick and team are great to work with.

reviews.author: Scott DeLancey
reviews.text: I called all of the usual for plumbing in Nashville and no luck.. I called Core plumbing and got an immediate response! The service was top notch and I will not be calling any other plumber EVER AGAIN.. Thank you Rick!! For anyone reading this, I HIGHLY recommend you use CORE for all you plumbing needs!

synthesis.summary: They show up fast, fix it right, and don't nickel-and-dime you — multiple property managers trust them with dozens of rentals because problems stay fixed.
strengths: Fast response and same-day problem resolution: 8+ reviewers explicitly mention immediate callbacks, quick arrival, or same-day fixes for urgent issues like burst pipes and major leaks
Thorough diagnostics and root-cause fixes: 5+ reviewers praise finding hidden problems (pinhole leaks in walls, actual line breaks) that other plumbers missed, preventing repeat service calls
Strong reputation with property management companies: 4 commercial/property management reviews highlight reliability, professional tenant communication, and zero callback rates
weaknesses: Unusual payment terms create friction: 1 reviewer noted delayed payment (2+ days post-service) is 'kinda weird' and atypical, potentially signaling cash flow or administrative quirks
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews confirm after-hours availability (late-night callbacks, willingness to extend shifts) and next-morning priority scheduling during emergencies; Rick personally clears schedule for urgent jobs.

plumbers.name: Blue Whale Backflow, Plumbing, & Excavating
plumbers.address: 801 N Raddant Rd, Batavia, IL 60510, USA

reviews.author: David C
reviews.text: I've used Blue Whale for several plumbing issues in the past, and I've always had an great experience.  The owner (Ken) is very responsive and friendly.  Always patient and explains the issues. The work is done right the first time, and they show up when they say the will!  Just yesterday (a Saturday), my water heater was leaking.  I called early in the morning, and within a couple hours, Tony was out here replacing it.  Completely done by 1 pm, and I initially called at about 8:30 am. Amazing, especially for a Saturday!  I will only call Blue Whale for my plumbing issues...I have them stored in my phone! Great people to do business with!

reviews.author: Jeremy Hesselink
reviews.text:
A great experience with Blue Whale today.

Responsive, efficient and fairly priced. They showed up in a great looking vehicle and had everything they needed stocked on the truck for a garbage disposal replacement.

Ken and crew took great care, made no messes and were very polite. I'd recommend anyone needing a residential service plumber to give this company a call.

Thanks so much!

reviews.author: Bob Cohoon
reviews.text: Ken and crew replaced my old clay sewer line that had major problems in Woodridge. They were very responsive and helpful during the quoting of the job. During the job, they took a lot of steps to preserve my lawn and keep the dig site safe. The new sewer line is great and I am very happy with the work that was performed. Overall, I had a very good experience with Blue Whale Plumbing and Sewer and the work was high quality at a reasonable price.

reviews.author: Uallknowme22
reviews.text:
BEST EXPERIENCE EVER!!!!

I stumbled upon this company because the previous homeowners used them and left the contact info behind when I bought this house.  I contacted them to install a toilet and I have to say the professionalism and level of customer service I received was outstanding!  They arrived on time, worked quickly to get the toilet installed and best part of all is they did not leave a mess behind.  I was impressed with the knowledge the plumber shared about things to do around my home to keep plumbing issues at bay and the price point was great.  I would not hesitate to recommend them to family, friends and coworkers.  I salute you BWP&S for the level of service you provided me today and putting my mind at ease in this new space of homeownership.  Thank you, thank you, thank you Tony & Zion.

reviews.author: J Hilton
reviews.text: Blue Whale Plumbing is a great local option to consider for your plumbing needs. I have used Blue Whale for both an emergency plumbing issue a few years ago and just recently to install a utility sink in my laundry room. On both occasions they were on time and extremely professional/knowledgeable. For the utility sink, I received multiple quotes which were all within $50.00 of each other so Blue Whale’s pricing is very competitive…licensed plumbers aren’t cheap. Also, in my experience(s), their office coordinator was very responsive to calls/emails about the scheduling/quote. Thanks Blue Whale!

synthesis.summary: Blue Whale Plumbing demonstrates exceptional emergency responsiveness and reliability, with customers consistently praising their quick response times, professional service, and quality workmanship. The owner Ken and his team have built a strong reputation for showing up when promised and completing jobs efficiently without cutting corners.
strengths: Clean work practices with no mess left behind
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews (46 total)
All sample reviews are 5-star, may not show full picture
synthesis.topQuote: Just yesterday (a Saturday), my water heater was leaking. I called early in the morning, and within a couple hours, Tony was out here replacing it. Completely done by 1 pm, and I initially called at about 8:30 am. Amazing, especially for a Saturday!

plumbers.name: Huntsville Plumbing Inc
plumbers.address: 9582 Madison Blvd Ste 14, Madison, AL 35758, USA

reviews.author: Linda Odom
reviews.text: Huntsville Plumbing responded to our emergency plumbing issue within a few hours of my call and installed a new shower valve professionally, quickly, and courteously. I would recommend them to anyone with a plumbing problem.   Give them a call.

reviews.author: Sam Digesu
reviews.text: Huntsville Plumbing recently installed a tankless hot water heater system in my home after my old electric tank began leaking. I decided to switch to a gas tankless system, and I couldn't be happier with the installation, their knowledge of the system, and their plumbing expertise. The owner, Jason, explained everything that was needed and how it would be done. During the installation, he suggested improvements like hiding the water lines in the wall and the best way to run the ventilation pipe. The installation looks very professional and neat. Jason was very communicative, informing me of the arrival times of his workers and checking in regularly to see if I had questions. The cost was very reasonable.  This was my first experience with Huntsville Plumbing, and I was thoroughly impressed. I will definitely use their services again for future plumbing needs and highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Kevin Morris
reviews.text: Had a leak from a copper supply line in bathroom wall, and of course it was in the worst spot imaginable.  Called a couple plumbers who insisted the tub had to be pulled to fix it, and wanted to charge an arm and a leg.  Had a friend tell me to call Jason at Huntsville Plumbing.  Jason responded immediately and was easy to work with.  He fully expected he may have to pull the tub based on what I told him was happening, but he wanted to come see it for himself before sending a crew out.  He spent time assessing the situation and explored all options.  He felt there was a good possibility he could make the repair without pulling the tub.  He went to work and successfully fixed the leak in the copper line.  Very grateful for what he did, and saved me a lot of time, headache and money!  Would give a 100 stars if possible!

reviews.author: Jennifer Marsden
reviews.text: Jason Osborne fit us in the next day. He also kindly waited for us to get a better part when we had the wrong size faucet and dealt with some prior installation issues which required redrilling, reattaching, and recaulking the sink. Our go to plumbers!

reviews.author: Brad Murphy
reviews.text: Huntsville Plumbing (Jason) had been here multiple times and they provide excellent customer service.  They are responsive, timely, efficient, and provide a high quality repair service.  The team always comes tooled with the right things and parts to make the job happen on site.  I highly recommend Huntsville Plumbing Inc

synthesis.summary: Huntsville Plumbing Inc demonstrates exceptional emergency response and problem-solving skills, with owner Jason consistently going above and beyond to find cost-effective solutions. Multiple reviews highlight their ability to handle complex repairs that other plumbers couldn't solve, making them an excellent choice for emergency situations.
strengths: Owner Jason personally assesses difficult jobs
Professional installations with attention to detail
weaknesses: Limited number of total reviews (46)
synthesis.topQuote: He spent time assessing the situation and explored all options. He felt there was a good possibility he could make the repair without pulling the tub. He went to work and successfully fixed the leak in the copper line. Very grateful for what he did, and saved me a lot of time, headache and money!

plumbers.name: Clean Care Sewer Specialists
plumbers.address: 39219 N Poplar St, Lake Villa, IL 60046, USA

reviews.author: Felice Thompson
reviews.text: Tom was fantastic! He showed up the same day, was friendly, professional, and clearly knew what he was doing. He fixed my leaky sink quickly and efficiently, and provided reasonable pricing for future work, if needed. The whole experience was smooth and stress-free. Truly exceptional service! I’ll absolutely call Clean Care again and highly recommend this company to anyone needing quality plumbing work!

reviews.author: Dennis Brancato
reviews.text:
Where do I begin….I contracted Tom to take a look at a repair to my sump line that another company had done in August. After getting a bad information and problem solving from KBI,  I contacted Tom to take a look and provide me with another opinion. He not only quickly understood the situation but identified the problems. He and his colleague Al were able to re-repair the KBI job that was very poorly done but also were able to confirm and identify an issue with the sump line out in the parkway area that KBI had initially identified. KBI wanted to charge me $3800 to dig and fix the line in the parkway without any other options or discussion regarding utility lines. .  Not only did Tom identify the issue but was diligent in immediately contacting JULIE and the Village to have them mark the utility lines and discuss concerns with the gas line impeding the sump line. Nicor came out the following morning and confirmed the damaged sump line that Tom had seen with his line camera. Turns out the gas company had damaged the sump line at some point but they immediately took action to dig it and repair it. I can’t stress enough how awesome it was to work with Tom and his colleague Al to get the repair and resolution so quickly and more so appropriately!!!   Also kudos to Nicor for and the Village of Lake Villa for their fast response and resolution.
Highly recommend this company!! 5+ ⭐️

reviews.author: Chris Brenner
reviews.text: Had a clogged kitchen sink drain and a poorly installed P trap and drain pipe that needed to be redone. Tom was quick to respond to my phone call, quickly provided a quote (which was lower than another provider) from a couple of photos and came out as quickly as he could. Job was done quickly and final cost was well under the quote as it didn't take as long as expected. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Nina Mae Vidal Howard
reviews.text:
Heavy April showers bring May flowers, but they can also cause your sewer to back up and sump pump to fail at the wrong time. Thank goodness Tom was referred to us by a good friend, Kevin. Tom was able to come out when we needed him. The existing sump pump, which was already installed prior to us moving in a little over a year ago, had failed to work when we needed it to. Tom assessed the situation and even went above and beyond by going out to find the right sump pump for us and any additional parts needed.
He explained everything he was doing and what needed to be done to help keep it maintained. Very kind, professional and efficient. Please do not hesitate to contact Tom if you ever need a professional plumber. Thank you Tom from the Howard Family.

reviews.author: Kevin Ramirez
reviews.text: Tom is the best! Honest and reliable. A different company quoted me 5K for a fictitious sewer line crack and Tom inspected and discovered it wasn't.  I'm so happy I found him!

synthesis.summary: Clean Care Sewer Specialists appears to be an excellent choice for emergency plumbing, with Tom consistently delivering same-day service, honest assessments, and professional work. Multiple reviews highlight his ability to solve complex problems that other companies couldn't handle properly, and his pricing appears fair and transparent.
strengths: Honest diagnostics - saved customers from unnecessary expensive work
Professional problem-solving for complex sewer/drainage issues
weaknesses: Limited review sample size (43 reviews)
All reviews focus on one technician (Tom)
synthesis.topQuote: A different company quoted me 5K for a fictitious sewer line crack and Tom inspected and discovered it wasn't. I'm so happy I found him!

plumbers.name: Walker Tradesman Plumbing
plumbers.address: 31 Windmill Cir # B, Abilene, TX 79606, USA

reviews.author: kenste1949
reviews.text: Gas Line Installation, installed gas piping from new meter location to 4 locations inside home.  From initial call to office thru to signoff and gas flowing in my home - I am very happy and pleased with the work performed.  The office staff was great and followed through. The Master plumber and his helper were on time, professional, and did a wonderful job.

reviews.author: Harlan Martin
reviews.text: These guys rock man! ..... it's 10 degrees, I have NO drainage at all starting the night before....I was freaking out thinking, man its a day before Christmas Eve and its 10 degrees, not a company out there is going to come out here......I was wrong. I called Walker Tradesman Plumbing about 10am, and they were here at 11am.....and BAM fixed my problem! Thank You very much! Highly recommend for your plumbing needs....They will be back! Merry Christmas!

reviews.author: Josh Owens
reviews.text: The plumbers were on time, knowledgeable, and polite.  They did the job quickly and correctly.

reviews.author: Karen F.
reviews.text:
This company was listed as a remodeling contractor.  I have no complaints about the plumbing except it was expensive.  But as for the other trades...

Do NOT let the two men who identified themselves as painters anywhere near your walls.  They have no concept of using tape or prepping before painting.  They did not fill any nail holes before painting, and I am still cleaning up paint from the new tile floors.  They painted all of my electronic equipment for no extra charge though.

I ended up getting new doors, baseboards, and crown molding to cover up the mistakes that the painters made.  This cost more than the original cost of the paint job.  The walls still are streaked and uneven.  

The electrician acted as though he was doing me a favor by showing up to do what I paid him to do.  He was to have installed all new switches and electrical plugs, which he didn't.  He took the shortcut when he could.  When a switch shorted out, he told me just not to use it.  He left out an essential bolt in a ceiling fan.  I discovered this after I got a new fan to replace the rattling one.  Guess what instruction number 3 said to do.  " "Insert bolt to hold motor in place."

The tile was expertly laid, but the tile guys that did the grout left grout haze on all of my floors.  All of them!  I may never get it off.  It was suggested that I wax them.  Why would I get tile floors, so I could wax them ?!?!?!  Those guys also left all their trash for me to deal with.  There were 2 big garbage bags full and were too heavy for me to lift.  

I ended up doing some of the painting myself, and ordering mirrors and vent covers that never were delivered on my own.  

Never again!

reviews.author: Brady B.
reviews.text:
Terrible.

I will never again use Flournoy Plumbing.  I encourage you to do the same.  Here is a quick review of the story.  In 2014, Flournoy Plumbing came to repair a leak in our water main.  The plumbers were unprofessional (didn't bring key to backhoe & kept the time clock running).  Flournoy did credit that hour on the final bill.  When a similar leak appeared in 2015, we chose to use another company to diagnose the problem.  Unprompted, the new plumber found our 2015 leak was at the exact site of Flournoy's Repair.  It had failed due to poor soldering and to the huge rocks and concrete pushed into the repair hole on top of the pipe.

The owner of Flournoy (Steve Walker) did not return my phone call.  I called again and Steve did not offer to do anything, seeming completely unconcerned about my leak (or his company's work).  Steve claimed the 2014 repair was a "temporary fix," did not offer to repair it, nor make things right, nor reimburse us for their failed work.  I asked if he seriously told customers his repairs were "temporary" and how he can stay in business with this work and customer service.  He cursed me out and hung up on me.  Later that day, I went to the business and showed him the faulty pipe repair.  He agreed it was a poor job.  Said they only warrantee for 90 days.  I asked to be repaid for the $570 temporary fix and the $1000 repair.  He again cursed at me in his office.  Claimed the plumber no longer works for them.  The next day, he sent me an email saying they would do nothing further to reimburse or repair.  I waited a month and tried sending an email and no one responded.

So, if you want an owner to not stand behind their work, refuse to call you, cuss you out, identify their work as a temporary fix, then by all means go with Steve Walker and Flounoy Plumbing.  

Their website says "Satisfaction Guaranteed: we work for you" & "Excellent Customer Service: we want to keep you," but I encourage you not to believe it.  Good luck.

reviews.author: Frankie McPherson
reviews.text:
1 review
2.0 star rating 1/2/2018
They did show up at the scheduled appointment time, however, it took them over an hour to write an estimate. For a water leak under house, pier and beam, repair small leak on water heater line and to replace all valves in house. Once I accepted estimate, just for the leak under house and to repair the water heater, they had to leave to get parts. Came back, it took them less than 10 under the house to realize they didn't have all necessary parts to fix leak under house. So they had to leave again, for another hour. They came back and 5 minutes later the leak under the house was fixed. Then they decided the pipes under the sink were leaking and needed to be replaced. Funny how they had never leaked previously but what am I to do, I was at their mercy. Of course that upped the price. AND, the didn't have p-traps, so they left for another hour to go get p-traps. When they finally finished and left, we discovered they hadn't relit the pilot light on the water heater. So, yes they had to return. So, $925.00 later, everything does seem to be working but the price was astronomical and the fact that they had no parts on their truck was ridiculous. I would never recommend them.

reviews.author: Frankie C.
reviews.text: They did show up at the scheduled appointment time, however, it took them over an hour to write an estimate.  For a water leak under house, pier and beam, repair small leak on water heater line and to replace all valves in house. So, $925.00 later, everything does seem to be working but the price was astronomical and the fact that they had no parts on their truck was ridiculous.  I would never recommend them.

reviews.author: Crystal W.
reviews.text: I called Flourney plumbing on a Thursday afternoon. After speaking to whom I am guessing  led to believe was one of the head plumbers of the company, told me it was the end of the day, He had no one at the time who could fix my problem but, assured me the following day which was Friday they would schedule me right in. I said' it's my kitchen sink can't get it unclogged. I told him as long as it would be before 5:00pm that Friday . He said, not a problem at all' the morning secretary will give you a call before 10:00am to let you know when they will be there. I waited, and waited Friday for that call that never came. By 1:00 I called them some lady answered the phone so fast I repeated the company. She advised me that she Knew nothing about it and proceeded to tell me The earliest we can get someone to you is Monday maybe Tuesday,? No thank you and I will never ever call them again.

reviews.author: Jennifer Rominger
reviews.text: I needed a plumber last minute after work. Apparently after 4pm in most of town, is "after hours" for plumbers. I am a teacher and do not even get home till after 4. I called several different companies and was just shocked at the price to just get someone out here. Finally came across Walker and the sweetest woman answered the phone and told me she would try and get someone out..and she did! Leo the technician was fantastic and also very knowledgeable. He gave us some great tips about our system and what we can do to avoid this in the future. They charged one flat fee for the call and the work combined. Walker will be my go to from now on.

reviews.author: maggie neal
reviews.text:
Please check all plumbers before calling these people. BEWARE!! These people wanted to charge me $245 to reseal a commode. It took all of twenty minutes, but they stretched it an hour. They claimed it was going to be difficult to disengage the commode, but it was nothing to dislodge. Please, if you are in need of help, honest help, do not call these people. I never post negative things about a business, but this visit was anything but reasonable.

In response, I am pretty sure that your plumber would have been glad to charge me 245$$$$ if we had not said anything. Thank you for straightening out that 'miscommunication'.

reviews.author: RonandAnnette B.
reviews.text: I had hired another contractor in Abilene and upon observing his work product saw that it was not up to code, or even safe. Found Flournoy and hired them. They not only fixed all of the other guys crap work, but upgraded things nicely. Punctual, efficient, and rock solid. My wife and I have a great deal of experience over the last 38 years remodeling houses for rentals. My wife is very knowledgeable and particular about many things, and Steve and his guys are responsive and cooperative when changes are made. If you are looking for a plumber who knows his stuff, you have found one in Flournoy!

reviews.author: Zoltron S.
reviews.text: Came out same day of calling for both of my toilets running continuously.  With in minuets I was quoted a price of $220 to fix the toilets and he came back from purchasing parts with only two 3" flappers in his hand and I said "those sure are expensive", and he replied "no $20 each, it's the labor that costs."   Thank god he bought the wrong brand and I paid him $65 for coming out because he lied about the price costing $20 a quick search Lowe's had them for $6, and after I got the right brand it took me 5 min to fix both toilets so he was probably lying about labor cost as well.

reviews.author: Jim Teigen
reviews.text: We have used them for years.  Why?  They come when you call, and help with emergencies.  This time, both our water heaters went out on the same day.  Called and they were there within 3 hours.  Very courteous.  respectful of property and our situation.  Advised of lunch break, how long they would be gone and when to expect them back, and they arrived early.  My Wife and I trust them, and they always address me be name [on the phone or in person].  They may have a new name, but they still are the Great Plumber Company my family relies on.  Thank you.

reviews.author: Jim T.
reviews.text: They come when you call!  We lost water main into the house, here they are going after it!  They are my plumbers of choice!  They know their business and are friendly to us and ours and helpful.  Wife gives them 5 Stars!  Let me add, these guys have bust their tails  to get water back on to the house.  They did it!  What a wonderful job.  Still have more to do, and will be back tomorrow.  This company makes you fell like we are all one family.  What a blessing!

synthesis.summary: They show up fast for emergencies and have 17 years in business with zero BBB complaints, but Yelp reviewers consistently say they're overpriced and Google reviewers sometimes report incomplete work—the rating gap (4.7 vs 2.2) suggests real pricing friction.
strengths: Emergency response: 6+ Google reviewers explicitly mention same-day or within-hours arrival for urgent issues (burst pipes, no drainage on holidays, water heater failures)
Long-term reliability: 17 years in business, zero BBB complaints in 3 years, multiple reviewers report using them repeatedly over 5-10+ years
Respectful crew: 8+ reviews mention professionalism, politeness, and property respect; owners (Steve and Diana Walker) named positively in multiple reviews
weaknesses: Significant pricing disputes: 6 of 12 Yelp reviews mention surprise charges, upselling, or hourly rates perceived as excessive ($145/hr labor quoted after $65 service call; $925 for basic leak repair with multiple trips back for parts; $220 for toilet repair that took 5 minutes)

Incomplete follow-up work: 2 reviews report unfinished jobs (holes not patched after water line replacement, pilot light not relit after water heater repair) and poor callback response when contacted to complete work

Work quality inconsistency: 2 reviews report faulty repairs (poor soldering on water main repair that failed within months; toilet issue persisted after replacement). Owner cursed out customer and refused warranty claim beyond 90 days
redFlags: Pricing disputes are systematic: 6 of 12 Yelp reviews (50%) cite surprise fees, unexpected upsells, or labor charges perceived as unjustified. Google reviews (36 total) only have 2 negative reviews about pricing, suggesting Yelp reviewers may be documenting genuine billing friction more openly

Incomplete work and poor callback: 2 reviews report jobs left unfinished and lack of response to requests to complete work; 1 review reports pilot light not relit after water heater service requiring return visit

Quality assurance failures: Water main repair soldering failed within months at exact same location; owner initially characterized it as 'temporary fix' and refused to warranty beyond 90 days despite acknowledging poor workmanship
Owner accountability concerns: 1 detailed review documents owner cursing at customer and refusing to make right on failed repair; another review reports owner 'did not return phone call' for weeks
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple Google reviewers confirm availability outside normal hours, including Christmas Eve (10 degrees, same-day response), and willingness to take calls after 4pm when competitors refuse.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Massive gap: 4.7/5 (43 Google) vs 2.2/5 (12 Yelp). Google reviews focus on emergency availability and long-term loyalty; Yelp reviews consistently cite overpricing and billing disputes. This suggests two different customer experiences: loyal repeat customers on Google value emergency response enough to overlook costs; one-time Yelp customers feel price-gouged. The 36 Google reviews vs 12 Yelp (3:1 ratio) may reflect review suppression or Yelp filtering, but Yelp's complaints are specific, quantified, and consistent (billing, follow-through).

plumbers.name: Orem Plumbers & Drain Cleaning
plumbers.address: 1178 S State St, Orem, UT 84097, USA

reviews.author: Kennedi Rudy
reviews.text: The water in our home was making strange noises in the pipes. Their team inspected the system and found loose mounting brackets. They secured everything properly. The banging sounds have completely stopped.

reviews.author: Theodore Zain
reviews.text: Early one morning, we discovered our toilet overflowing. I contacted their team immediately. They handled the blockage quickly and sanitized the area. Everything was back to normal in no time.

reviews.author: Isai Kamila
reviews.text: The bathtub overflow leaked during long baths. The technicians replaced the gasket, sealed the connections and tested thoroughly. They explained the cause and gave maintenance tips. The tub now fills safely and the team was professional, courteous and careful.

reviews.author: Lindsey Cristopher
reviews.text: Water occasionally backed up from the shower drain with a glugging sound. The plumber found a partially blocked vent that was affecting airflow. He cleared the vent and flushed the entire line. The shower drain worked quietly and smoothly once he was done. Great understanding of plumbing airflow issues.

reviews.author: Archie Adams
reviews.text: This service stood out for its calm and organized approach, with each step handled professionally. Minor enhancements were made to support better performance and the results were confirmed before completion. The overall experience felt dependable.

synthesis.summary: Orem Plumbers & Drain Cleaning demonstrates strong technical expertise and professionalism across diverse plumbing issues. They offer 24-hour emergency service and consistently receive 5-star reviews for thorough problem-solving and customer education.
strengths: Strong diagnostic skills for complex issues
weaknesses: Limited review sample size
No pricing information available

reviews.text: An overflowing bathroom in West Loop was handled professionally by 24 HR Emergency Plumber Chicago INC with proper sanitation.

reviews.author: Felicity Layne
reviews.text: 24 HR Emergency Plumber Chicago INC fixed a slab leak in Logan Square and ensured the foundation remained protected.

reviews.author: Ray Julio
reviews.text: 24 HR Emergency Plumber Chicago INC came through when our basement flooded due to a burst pipe in Noble Square. Their emergency response was fast and professional.

reviews.author: Dawson Mercado
reviews.text: A hidden leak inside the wall in Hyde Park was located using precision tools by 24 HR Emergency Plumber Chicago INC.

reviews.author: Oscar Bain

plumbers.name: Hartwig Mechanical
plumbers.address: 20800 E Brink St, Harvard, IL 60033, USA

reviews.author: josh rowe
reviews.text:
Hopefully you do better work than your team drives.  Plate number 3750157 thinks he’s in a race van.   Not a very good impression for a business.

After going through the other reviews I just had to edit.  Do you actually verify drivers licenses??

reviews.author: Brittny Jablonski
reviews.text: One of your drivers just straight up ran a red light in downtown west Dundee just now. And then when I passed him I saw he was on his phone. Please tell your drivers to be safe, as some of us have precious cargo (kids) in our vehicles.

reviews.author: Joe Joe The Circus Clown
reviews.text:
If your company’s work is anything like the behavior of your drivers, I wouldn’t trust you to paint a fence, let alone handle a professional job.
Absolutely disgraceful that someone representing your business drives like a maniac, tailgating and endangering others on the road. A quick look at your reviews shows years of the same complaints so clearly this isn’t an isolated issue, it’s a company problem.
Either you condone this reckless behavior, or your drivers are out of control. Either way, it’s unsafe, unprofessional, and unacceptable. If your team is in that much of a rush, maybe they should sign up for DoorDash instead.
Do better, though based on your track record, I won’t be holding my breath.

reviews.author: Kelly Plath
reviews.text: I had a pipe burst in my basement and was given the recommendation to call Hartwig to help. Not only did they respond with a tech at my house within an hour, but he did the work so quickly and clean. He was very kind and helpful. They made a very stressful situation feel calm and easy. I'm grateful for their work.

reviews.author: Abstrakt Marketing
reviews.text: We love partnering with the Hartwig team! They are so easy to work with - always great communicators and very informative.

synthesis.summary: While Hartwig Mechanical shows promise with quick emergency response (within an hour for a pipe burst), multiple reviews consistently cite dangerous driving behavior by their technicians. The limited positive feedback about actual work quality is overshadowed by serious safety concerns about their drivers.
weaknesses: Dangerous driving behavior
Unprofessional driver conduct
Limited review sample
