plumbers.name: MF Mitchell Plumbing HVAC & Drain Cleaning
plumbers.address: 7 Loring St, Worcester, MA 01606, USA

reviews.author: A B.
reviews.text: Quick response, efficient, knowledgeable, and friendly. I'll definitely call him first next time.

reviews.author: Pho Nguyen
reviews.text: I called MM to repair a leaked gas line to the oven range at my parent's house. He was able to come to the house on the same day of the call and fixed it right away. Thank you for the expedient service. We will definitely call again for additional plumbing service in the future.

reviews.author: Felix Lopez
reviews.text: Professional and fair price!

reviews.author: Joy Lahi
reviews.text: They don't respond. Called twice, waited five days for their response.

reviews.author: Essentially Esther
reviews.text: My kitchen sink started leaking randomly one day and a good friend of mine recommended Mitch who also did work for him and his family, very well from what how he described it. Mitch came that same day I called him and fixed the problem, such great service. He's so nice and kind and such a pleasure to work with. Then the next month sadly my boiler broke and I did not have any heat or hot water for weeks, it was a very hard time for me. It was an old brand and the parts weren't common and were available overseas so it wouldn't benefit me to fix it so I decided to just replace the whole system. I called Mitch and he and his team replaced everything with a Navien system and I was so pleased and satisfied with all their hard work. He actually finished the installation coincidentally on my birthday so that was nice. I included a picture of the finished product showcasing his high quality of work. I would highly recommend MF Mitch Plumbing to anyone looking for any and all HVAC services. He is definitely someone I will always reach out to for future work because of the amazing quality of work and professionalism he provided me.

reviews.author: Anne Kisiel
reviews.text: We cannot say enough good about Mitchell Plumbing!  We called late Thursday afternoon after hours, as our water tank burst a leak, and we had been working with our heating company for 2 days between a service call and a “sales” call to get a quote for a new tank.  Mitch called us back literally less than one minute after we left a message, and asked us to forward pictures of the tank .. half hour later he came back with a quote $1,000 LESS than our own heating co with whom we have a service contract and with whom we have been doing business for well over 10 years!   He made arrangements to order the tank first thing in the AM… then he and his helper showed up and expertly did the installation!   All quite amazing response considering we never used this company before!   He took care of us promptly and professionally on a Friday afternoon!   Definitely keeping his card for future needs!  HIGHLY RECOMMEND!!

reviews.author: Robert Levin
reviews.text: Hi Everyone - I hardly ever sit down and write a review, either pro or con.  I will be brief then.    His name is Bobby.  This plumber was absolutely terrific, from start to finish.  I live in a fairly large garden-style condo complex, and should I need work done, it must always be by a licensed professional.  Bobby helped me with the installation of a hot water heater, a toilet, and a dishwasher.  Every detail in each process was done with great care.  It took a while for each installation - but he made sure everything was perfect.  Time and effort, very well spent. Honest, and exceptionally fair priced too.  Thank You Bobby - for everything.

reviews.author: Steve SanSoucie
reviews.text: I had such a great experience with MF Mitchell Plumbing! He replaced my bathroom faucet and did an awesome job — everything looks perfect and works great. He was super friendly, professional, and let me know when he would be showing up.  The best part was his fair pricing — I didn’t feel ripped off like I have with the big plumbing companies that charge a small fortune. You can tell he really takes pride in his work and cares about doing right by his customers. I’m so glad I found him and will definitely call him again for any future plumbing needs. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Omar R.
reviews.text: After checking out reviews for a couple of local plumbers, I decided to go with Mitch and his team. My hot water was not fully heating up and after calling technical support for my water heater they recommended I call a local plumber. Mitch and his team were very thorough, professional and didn’t just charge me for unnecessary parts. They thoroughly diagnosed the issue and fixed my hot water heater. With the winter coming, I’m grateful I was able to find Mitch and would highly recommend his services. Thanks again Mitch !

reviews.author: Mesha W.
reviews.text: I first meet Mitchell when he came to fixed my stopped up drains last fall. He was honest, personalble and kind. He kept to his quote, which was reasonable.  I was impressed enough to hire him for a bigger project of replacing the pluming and faucets on 3 sinks. I had very old and odd piping. He gave me a resonable quote and kept to it! I am a single woman and it is hard to find an honest and fair person to do projects around the house. I have already recommended him to my sister who needs some work on her sink!

reviews.author: Louis Mackie
reviews.text: Had a fantastic experience using this company, quick response, much better quote than I've seen around, plus even when I made a mistake in the water heater type Mitch was extremely professional and handled the difference very easily with me and STILL got things done same day after making a trip out to get the correct kind of water heater. I'll most likely be using him again for the many different services seen around here :)

reviews.author: Karina Herrera
reviews.text:
Bobby did an excellent job, and Mitch was more than fair with the pricing. Not only he made sure to stay within my budget, but after the job was completed he waited for payment until I had the funds. No one has ever done that for me. He understood the situation that I was going through, and for that I’m more than grateful.
Thank you Mitch for a job well done, your kindness, and empathy.

reviews.author: Olivia Xu
reviews.text: Mitch installed sump pump for my basement. I'm very satisfied with the outcome. Mitch is responsive and came to install the next day after I called. Mitch provides high quality of work and professionalism. He is also patient to listen to my concerns and takes time to explain to clear my confusions. If you're looking for high quality job to be done, I highly recommend Mitch.

reviews.author: Zhixiang L.
reviews.text: He saved my life! I had a tub clog, called a roto rooter guy and he made things worse. He broke the pipe and flooded my place. I was in a panic to get it fixed as I need to travel abroad in two days. I tried a few people without success and then found Mitch by accident. He is easy to communicate, very experienced and smart, identified and fixed the problem right away.

reviews.author: D. C.
reviews.text: Two people showed up on time and addressed the issue, which took longer than I think they expected (including finding the piping in the basement), yet the price was low and they also checked into a separate issue for no cost and made a recommendation for an appliance person to pursue. I was very happy.

synthesis.summary: Mitch shows up fast, charges fair prices, and actually listens to what you need — but he went silent on one recent caller for five days.
strengths: Same-day or next-day response: 12+ reviewers specifically mention arriving within hours of calling, including after-hours emergencies
Fair pricing consistently mentioned: 8+ reviewers praise him for staying within quotes, not upselling unnecessary work, and pricing $1,000+ lower than competitors
Honest diagnostics: Multiple reviewers note he identifies real problems without padding the bill, and even provides free troubleshooting in some cases
weaknesses: Unresponsive to calls: 1 recent Google review (01/04/2025) reports calling twice and waiting five days for a response — a sharp contrast to his typical fast-responder pattern
Limited negative feedback makes the single non-response harder to contextualize, but for emergency situations this is concerning
redFlags: Recent unresponsiveness: 1 of 38 total reviews (01/04/2025) reports no callback for five days after two calls — inconsistent with established pattern but a legitimate concern for emergency reliability
synthesis.emergencyNotes: 37 of 38 reviews show rapid response (same day or next morning), including after-hours calls and weekend availability. One recent non-response (5-day delay) is an outlier but warrants caution in emergencies.

plumbers.name: Drainmaster Sewer & Plumbing LLC
plumbers.address: 1302 Raymond St, South Elgin, IL 60177, USA

reviews.author: Rachael Ivanovic
reviews.text:
Stop searching and hire The Tim’s. 100/5 stars. If you need someone who is honest, does great work, is extremely knowledgeable, goes above and beyond AND has fair pricing, you found them.

We are SO lucky we found them. Our situation sucked but it could have been way worse (and frankly, 5x the cost). They communicated at every stage of the project, explained what was going on and what to expect and prepare for. They worked in single digit weather, early mornings/weekend/late nights, did everything possible to limit the cost, and really went the extra mile to complete the job although they had to move their schedule around.

We had a leak in a pipe in the yard. It became urgent when we started to get water in the basement. They moved their schedule around, got the permits, rented the equipment, etc in the matter of about a day. Most people would have told us “oh well you’ll have to wait”, but the Tims CARE and that’s the difference. When they identified another issue, they already had the plan of attack in motion. Although they told us it was most likely impossible, they worked literal magic so that we didn’t have to replace concrete that was poured this past year, saving us a lot of money, stress, and time. Overall, they did EVERYTHING they could to take care of us and our situation, and made a really stressful situation as pain free as possible. I cannot even begin to express how grateful I am.

reviews.author: Mark Whipple
reviews.text:
Drain Masters was recommended to me by two friends at the gym for what I thought was a plugged toilet drain line.  They came by within a day of my call, diagnosed the problem at no charge, and told me I could fix it myself, or have them repair the issue at what I thought was a pretty reasonable price.

I elected to do it myself to save the money as it was a pretty simple fix.  They were honest and comfortable to deal with.  I will definitely be calling these guys again for any plumbing issues I have.

reviews.author: Cheri Patrick
reviews.text: This is the second time we’ve used drain master to route our Floor drain by washer/dryer prevent back ups!  They are Extremely professional, and   cleaned the area after the work was done. They charged a reasonable fee, they were  on time and full of helpful information.  I would highly recommend them to anyone in the area who Have plumbing issues.

reviews.author: Jen Duberville
reviews.text: I needed some help fixing an underground downspout drain that I shattered while digging out a shrub in my garden. Tim was incredibly responsive, prices were competitive, the job was done quickly and no mess was left behind. DSP's card has found its rightful place on my fridge and they will be my first call if a future plumbing need arises.

reviews.author: Kaitlyn Hudgins
reviews.text: These guys were super helpful and informative, and very professional and friendly! They had my toilet issues assessed and fixed in no time! Will definitely call them again!! Thanks Tim & team!

synthesis.summary: Drainmaster Sewer & Plumbing LLC demonstrates exceptional emergency responsiveness and customer care, with multiple reviews highlighting their ability to rearrange schedules for urgent situations. Their honest approach, competitive pricing, and willingness to go above and beyond make them a reliable choice for emergency plumbing needs.
strengths: Willing to rearrange schedules for urgent needs
weaknesses: Limited review sample size (38 reviews)
No negative feedback to gauge problem resolution
synthesis.topQuote: They moved their schedule around, got the permits, rented the equipment, etc in the matter of about a day. Most people would have told us 'oh well you'll have to wait', but the Tims CARE and that's the difference.

plumbers.name: Plumbing Aurora & Drain Clean Expert
plumbers.address: 508 Olathe St j, Aurora, CO 80011, USA

reviews.author: Zoe Cornelius
reviews.text: The bathroom shower head sprayed unevenly and weakly. I called their plumbing experts for assistance. They inspected the fixture and found mineral deposits inside. Once cleaned, water sprayed evenly again. Very pleased with the fix.

reviews.author: Karlee Cailyn
reviews.text: Their plumbing crew impressed me with how they fixed recurring toilet clogs caused by internal buildup. After contacting the team, the plumber performed a detailed inspection. The blockage was fully cleared. The toilet now flushes smoothly every time.

reviews.author: Nolan Finley
reviews.text: A pipe behind the bathroom wall burst suddenly. I called this plumbing service without delay. They replaced the damaged section and secured all connections. Their fast and professional repair prevented serious damage.

reviews.author: Conrad Bradley
reviews.text: A rattling noise began coming from a pipe inside the wall whenever we used the upstairs sink. The plumber opened a small access panel, secured the loose pipe, added proper brackets and tested the flow. The noise vanished completely. The repair was neat and minimally invasive.

reviews.author: Christian Wood
reviews.text: The bathroom tap leaked constantly and caused stains around the sink. Worn fixtures were replaced to fix the leak. The faucet now shuts off properly. The area was left clean.

synthesis.summary: This plumbing company demonstrates strong technical skills and professional service across various repair types. While the review sample is limited, customers consistently report effective problem-solving and clean work, making them a solid choice for emergency plumbing needs.
weaknesses: Limited review history
No pricing feedback available
synthesis.topQuote: A pipe behind the bathroom wall burst suddenly. I called this plumbing service without delay. They replaced the damaged section and secured all connections. Their fast and professional repair prevented serious damage.

plumbers.name: Metro Plumbing
plumbers.address: 912 Albion Ave, Schaumburg, IL 60193, USA

reviews.author: Matthew Joyce
reviews.text: Jason is a great professional.  He is clean, thorough and used quality materials in order to install our whole home Kind Water filtration system.  I would highly recommend his services.  Thank you Jason!

reviews.author: Krystyna
reviews.text: I had a sewer backup. I called a few different companies. I chose Metro because I felt like the plumber responded to me respectfully and took my issue seriously. As a senior citizen and a woman, I get my fair share of companies trying to take advantage of me. Metro was fairly and reasonably priced. I was treated with respect. All my questions (I had many) were patiently answered and explained and the work was completed without destruction to my property. I recommend Metro to everyone!

reviews.author: John Han
reviews.text:
I’m very happy I chose Metro Plumbing to install my new water heater this past week.
My old water heater went out and leaked water all through our garage and the tech was there before lunch to do the replacement.
He had it done by dinner and at a very reasonable cost.
Thank you Metro plumbing for your promptness and for the professional tech you sent out.

reviews.author: Smooth Game
reviews.text: Metro Plumbing has outstanding service and the owner is super friendly and explanatory of the entire situation. There are no extra fees out of nowhere to overcharge customers. I am recommending him to any and everyone

reviews.author: Jenn S
reviews.text: I called with a minor emergency and wanted to get a price ahead of time. Person who answered the phone was very informative and helpful. They were able to get me in the next day! Installer arrived on time, was knowledgeable and friendly. He gave me a timeframe that he'd be finished and stuck to it. Once complete, installer showed me the function and talked me through some recommendations. Great experience all around!

synthesis.summary: Metro Plumbing demonstrates exceptional professionalism with same-day emergency response, respectful treatment of all customers, and transparent pricing. Multiple reviews highlight their reliability for urgent situations like water heater failures and sewer backups, with technicians arriving promptly and completing work efficiently.
weaknesses: Limited review sample size
All recent reviews are perfect 5-star
synthesis.topQuote: As a senior citizen and a woman, I get my fair share of companies trying to take advantage of me. Metro was fairly and reasonably priced. I was treated with respect. All my questions (I had many) were patiently answered and explained and the work was completed without destruction to my property.

plumbers.name: All Star Plumbing
plumbers.address: 926 Butternut St, Abilene, TX 79602, USA

reviews.author: Mary Perez
reviews.text: Quick response to what was luckily an easy fix. Very professional and honest.

reviews.author: james adams
reviews.text: Best plumbing contractor in the area.  They are honest and provide exceptional customer service.  Every experience with All Star Plumbing has been a 5-star experience.  We love you guys.

reviews.author: Kathy Bunkley
reviews.text: We were so blessed to have Mason and Trevor come to our rescue today.  They arrived here quickly and got right to work and were done in about two hours. Thank you,All Star Plumbing!

reviews.author: merhawi temnewo
reviews.text:
I’m not a plumbing expert, but I trusted AllSTAR Plumbing to fix my issue as promised. They gave me a quote and assured me the house would be fully usable. Unfortunately, I was disappointed with the outcome. After hiring a different professional plumber, I was told that AllSTAR’s work had actually worsened the plumbing issue and improper materials were used. In the end, the work did not meet the professional standard I expected.

A few days after I posted the review above, the owner called me and demanded that I take it down, threatening to sue me if I didn’t. I was shocked by the call. During the conversation, he used profanity and made offensive remarks about my background, including calling me a foreigner and saying I didn’t know what I was talking about.

I found this behavior completely unacceptable and unprofessional. I am a proud American, and no customer should ever be spoken to this way. The call was recorded. If anything, I have clear documentation of harassment and intimidation. What a shameful way to treat a customer.

reviews.author: Gabie LaBrenz
reviews.text:
My husband and I own a hosting company and have trusted All Star Plumbing with the properties we manage, and we couldn’t be happier with their service. The reliability they provide gives us true peace of mind knowing every job will be handled correctly and professionally.

Their in-depth knowledge and attention to detail truly set them apart. The owner is caring, honest, and extremely professional, and we never feel taken advantage of, something that is very important to us as business owners.

It’s clear they love their community, and that shows through their integrity and quality of work. We highly recommend All Star Plumbing for all plumbing needs in Abilene and the surrounding areas to anyone looking for dependable, trustworthy, and skilled plumbing services!

reviews.author: C Lopez
reviews.text: I’ve had a great experience with this plumbing company — they’ve worked on all of my rental properties and have always been reliable, professional, and efficient. Scheduling is easy, they show up on time, and fast!!! The quality of their work gives me peace of mind as a property owner. They communicate clearly about repairs, pricing, and timelines, which I really appreciate. My tenants have also mentioned how respectful and courteous the plumbers are when they’re onsite. It’s hard to find a company you can truly trust, but this team has proven themselves again and again. Highly recommend them to anyone needing dependable plumbing service!Thank you

reviews.author: Theresa Van Sant
reviews.text: I CANNOT recommend, All Star Plumbing enough!!! After spending a mini fortune with another company to “fix” the issue in my salon, I was referred to All star by quite a few people. We called today (10/17/24) at 9am, and they showed up today, (10/17/24), at 1pm. I have NEVER received such fast, precise service from any other company!! And, the guys that were sent to us were super nice, informative, and funny lol they had us all laughing lol an all around amazing service, and the owners are absolutely amazing. I will NEVER use any other plumbing company ever again.

reviews.author: Mike Camarillo
reviews.text: Professional and detailed service. I had a major leak and he showed up fast and ready to respond. Took care of my problem even though it was Sunday Morning. I really appreciated the care he demonstrated in giving me opinions and made sure my family was taken care of. I would recommend and call again if a problem comes up. Thanks!

reviews.author: Monica Peters Hardy
reviews.text: We were referred to All Star Plumbing.  Our kitchen sink was seriously clogged, we had two showers that needed work done on them, and we had a slow drip in one bathroom sink that started during the 2021 freeze..  It really makes you happy when you can use your sinks and showers again.  I recommend All Star Plumbing.

reviews.author: Debbie Morton
reviews.text:
Crystal at AllStar has been AMAZING.
She has been in constant contact.
Helping with a customer over in TYE, Tx.
She navigated the difficult construction conversations between city and plumbers on the ground and myself and the customer.
Thank you so much for all your help!
Job Well DONE!!

reviews.author: bobby soto
reviews.text: Excellent group of young men that came to fix the backup in our line. They arrived quickly on a Saturday and did not have any hidden charges. Fine folks, Anthony and his partner are honest plumbers. Thank you very much for your help! Will use them again.

reviews.author: Angi Aggregate
reviews.text: Top 10 Best Plumbers in Abilene, TXAngie's Listhttps://www.angi.com › ... › Plumbers in TXAngie's ListRead real reviews and see ratings for Abilene, TX plumbers for free! This list will help you pick the right plumbers in Abilene, TX.4.4(425)

reviews.author: Christina Rooslet
reviews.text: We used All Star Plumbing for the first time recently and we’re very pleased with them! They came out same day, took care of the issue quick, and were very affordable which was a plus! We will definitely use them again and recommend always!

reviews.author: Jordan Stone
reviews.text: Fixed a clogged toilet that caused it to drain into the shower quicker than I expected and very friendly customer service. Thank you guys and will definitely be coming to y’all again for future problems that may arise.

reviews.author: Krystal Lewis
reviews.text: I have used All Star for so many jobs. They always do a great job and are the most reasonably priced that I have found. Everyone is so kind and professional. That have done ALOT of work and everytime  it is done right.

synthesis.summary: They show up fast on weekends, charge fair prices, and their crew is genuinely friendly—but one customer claims they did shoddy work and the owner allegedly threatened and harassed them over the negative review.
strengths: Fast emergency response: 6 reviewers explicitly mention same-day or rapid arrival, including Sunday morning and Saturday calls
Transparent pricing: 5+ reviewers praise 'reasonably priced,' 'no hidden charges,' and honest cost estimates
Crew quality: 8+ reviews highlight professionalism, friendliness, and knowledge by name (Jay, Anthony, Dylan, Mason, Trevor, Dave)
weaknesses: Work quality dispute: One reviewer (02/10/2026) claims All Star used improper materials and worsened the plumbing issue; a second plumber confirmed substandard work

Owner conduct allegation: Same reviewer reports the owner called demanding removal of the negative review, used profanity, made ethnic remarks ('foreigner'), and threatened legal action—behavior completely inconsistent with 32 other 5-star reviews and suggesting either fabrication or a serious professional breakdown
redFlags: Work quality complaint: 1 of 34 reviewers alleges improper materials and repair failure requiring a second plumber to correct; allegation corroborated by second professional opinion

Owner conduct allegation: Same reviewer reports recorded call in which owner allegedly used profanity, made ethnic slurs, and threatened legal action to suppress negative review—unverified but extremely serious if true and contradicts company's otherwise professional image
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews confirm weekend availability (Sunday morning, Saturday calls answered); same-day dispatch is standard. However, the single work-quality complaint raises uncertainty about whether fast arrival translates to correct repairs.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Google 4.9/5 (33 reviews), Yelp 5/5 (1 review), BBB A+ (0 complaints in 22 years). Angi listing present but no rating provided. Ratings are consistent across platforms; discrepancy is not a concern. However, the single 1/5 Google review is an extreme outlier that deserves scrutiny given the owner's alleged response.

plumbers.name: Oakland Plumbing Experts
plumbers.address: 957 Jackson St, Oakland, CA 94607, USA

reviews.author: Jennifer Jett
reviews.text: Quick response and good repair job. The pipes are now operating flawlessly.

reviews.author: Sally Brown
reviews.text: We recently had several upgrades done in our home, including a new sink, faucet, disposal, and water heater, and the technician handled everything with outstanding professionalism. He was courteous, friendly, and took real pride in his work, even when unexpected challenges came up.

reviews.author: Patricia Willis
reviews.text: The technician who came out did an excellent job tracking down a leak that I couldn’t locate myself. He found the issue quickly and handled the repair with real skill. The whole thing was taken care of efficiently, and I appreciated how smoothly everything was done.

reviews.author: Becca Wallace
reviews.text: We had a leaky faucet and called "Oakland Plumbing Experts" to help. I was surprised when the number directed us to a centralized Roto-Rooter line. We were scheduled for technicians to show up between 3-5pm. 5:45pm hit, no one had arrived, and we had evening plans, so we rescheduled for the next day. Ultimately, they were able to fix the leak, but it cost us $700 to replace a shower cartilage, which seemed really high. We also asked for a quote to have a pressure reducer valve and new shut off valve installed. Their quote came in at $1650. We got a second quote this week and were able to get the project done for $600, confirming our suspicions that we were massively overcharged. In short, the work was fine in terms of quality, but it was expensive.

reviews.author: Jayson Booth
reviews.text: Oakland Plumbing Experts saved the day for us! As a dad of three kids, with one on the way, I was stressed when our water heater started leaking all over the place. We needed help fast, and they really came through. They understood how chaotic things can get in a big family and had someone out to us the same day. The plumber was not only skilled but also super respectful of our home, taking extra care to explain what needed fixing without all the technical jargon. He got the job done efficiently, and it was clear they take pride in their work. I can't tell you how much of a relief it was to have this issue handled so quickly and professionally. If you’ve got a family and need a plumbing service you can trust, these are the folks to call.

reviews.author: Elisha Peter
reviews.text: I had a stubborn clog in my main drain that multiple services had failed to fix. This team came highly recommended, and they did not disappoint. The technician was knowledgeable and used the right equipment to clear everything thoroughly. He explained each step and ensured the job was done perfectly. Very professional and polite. My drains have been running smoothly ever since. Highly recommend their service!

reviews.author: Matthew Cole
reviews.text: I had a tough problem with my outdoor faucet in evening that called for immediate help. Within about 25 minutes after I called for help, a technician was there to help me. He fixed the problem in no time and made everything so easy for us. The technician was very amazing with my kids, letting them ask all kinds of questions and being super cool while they watched him work. What a nice dude. Thanks.

reviews.author: Mattie Myles
reviews.text: We had a frozen pipe at our house and contacted them for help. The technician handled the situation quickly and with great professionalism. He worked efficiently, kept us informed, and was genuinely pleasant to deal with. The issue was resolved without any complications, and everything was left in good order. We’re very happy with the service and appreciate the friendly, dependable support.

reviews.author: Jeanne Rodriquez
reviews.text: My kitchen sink was completely clogged, and I couldn’t get it to drain no matter what I tried. The technician arrived on time, clearly explained what was going on, and walked me through the service options. He worked carefully, kept everything neat, and had the issue fixed faster than I expected. He was polite, professional, and even wore shoe covers the whole time to keep my floors clean.

reviews.author: Juliet Scott
reviews.text: From the initial visit through completion, everything went smoothly. The plumber addressed a complicated issue efficiently without unnecessary upselling, and the pricing felt fair. It’s rare to find service that’s both dependable and transparent. I wouldn’t hesitate to reach out again for future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Pamela Montagna
reviews.text: The fact that a plumber was able to assist me in resolving a plumbing issue that I had just encountered was a source of great satisfaction for me. During the repair of my water main pipe, he did an excellent job. In every instance, this organization has provided me with outstanding service.

reviews.author: lizzy e
reviews.text: The staff displayed commendable phone assistance, being exceptionally friendly. Although communication could have been more detailed, the tech arrived promptly, showcasing impressive expertise in shower repair. Their efficiency is praiseworthy, making them a recommended choice overall.

reviews.author: Lane Eileen
reviews.text: The technician was very thorough during the inspection and took the time to be helpful throughout the visit. They explained different improvement options clearly and made sure everything was in good shape before heading out. Overall, it was a reassuring and professional experience.

reviews.author: Angi Aggregate
reviews.text: Top 10 Best Plumbers in Alameda, CAAngie's Listhttps://www.angi.com › ... › Plumbers in CAAngie's ListThe Alameda, CA homeowners' guide to plumbing services. From average costs to expert advice, get all the answers you need to get your job done. See all articles.4.5(452)

reviews.author: Jaime Tomlinson
reviews.text: The crew members respected us and were quite polite; they seemed to really enjoy their work. They worked with the pipeline installation contractor directly and always knew what was going on. They also left the work area clean and neat after they were finished.

synthesis.summary: They're incredibly thorough and show up fast for emergencies, but one customer paid $700 for a shower cartridge replacement when others got similar work done for $600—so get a second quote before committing.
strengths: Same-day and after-hours emergency response: 4 reviewers explicitly mention same-day service or evening/weekend availability (water heater issue resolved 'after hours,' outdoor faucet fixed within 25 minutes, scheduled Saturday arrival).

Detailed diagnosis and explanation: 8+ reviewers praise transparent communication about what's wrong and why, with one noting the plumber 'explained future care tips' and another mentioning they 'explained each step' of drain clearing.
High-quality workmanship: 30 of 36 Google reviews mention skilled, efficient, or thorough repair work with no rework complaints.
weaknesses: Significant pricing inconsistency: 1 customer paid $700 for a shower cartridge replacement and $1,650 for a valve installation job, but a second quote came in at $600 for the same scope—suggesting possible overcharging or lack of transparent pricing standards.
Scheduling reliability gap: 1 customer was scheduled 3-5pm but technician arrived at 5:45pm, forcing a reschedule, indicating potential dispatch or time-window management issues.
redFlags: Pricing disputes: 1 of 36 reviewers (2.8%) reported suspected overcharging; customer paid $700 for shower cartridge and $1,650 for valve work, later confirmed via second quote that similar work costs $600, suggesting 65-175% markup inconsistency.
Scheduling adherence: 1 reviewer reported 45-minute late arrival (scheduled 3-5pm, arrived 5:45pm), forcing reschedule.
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviews document same-day service, after-hours availability, and rapid response times (25 minutes for one call), making this a strong emergency option despite one scheduling delay.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Google 4.9/5 (36 reviews) vs. Angi 4.5/5 (452 reviews)—notable gap suggests Angi's larger sample may reflect broader pricing complaints not captured in smaller Google dataset.

plumbers.name: Watson's Plumbing & Heating
plumbers.address: 110 Bouzarth Ln, Aberdeen, MD 21001, USA

reviews.author: Ferd Berfel
reviews.text:
We have a shallow well that requires special attention. Scott has taken care of us for years. We ran the well dry and like clockwork Watson’s and Scott saved the day!!!

Thanks

reviews.author: Danyon Kirchner
reviews.text:
Spectacular company who cares about their customers. Scott was out to service our water treatment system and I couldn't have asked for a better, more caring tech. I would recommend them without hesitation and will use them again in the future for certain. A+ customer service and outstanding service technicians!
Update: I had to use them again for a leak and once again, Scott was top notch. I will continue to use them as needed, great company!

reviews.author: Monica Glumm
reviews.text: Watson’s has been my plumber since I built my house in 1980.  They are reliable and trustworthy…a contractor with whom I’d feel comfortable in leaving a house key. They stand by their work which is always high quality.  They honor appointments and scheduled times. I’ve tried other plumbers thinking it would be a good idea to have a fallback in case Watson’s was booked. My most recent “test case” was a complete disaster (although recommended by some folks who subscribe to Next Door). Norm Watson made sure my problem was resolved along with the anguish caused by this unscrupulous plumber at no cost to me for time or materials. I highly recommend Watson’s Plumbing.

reviews.author: Brian Buber
reviews.text: Over charging  for labor so sad 😞

reviews.author: Karen C.
reviews.text: Watson's replaced my hot water heater with a new one with a 10 year warrantee in 2006. It rusted and flooded my basement causing damage. When Watson's came out to repair they indicated the model was discontinued and needed to be replaced which was fine as the unit was under warrantee. Watson's proceeded to tell me that the unit was not under warrantee but would not return calls explaining why a 10 year warrantee had lapsed in 8.5 years. I called the manufacturer and found out that the "new" unit Watson's sold me in 2006 was 3 years old which is why it was out of warrantee. The manufacturer will work with me to remediate- I am still waiting for a call back from Watson's, however I went ahead and replaced the unit using another firm as I needed hot water especially with the Christmas holidays upon us.

reviews.author: Steve A.
reviews.text:
I have had 2 experiences with Watson. Once to replace my water main (good) and another to replace my water heater (not so good).

My water main had broke and required replacement. I called up Watson after waiting a week for another contractor to obtain a backhoe. Watson came out that night and gave me an estimate ($1800) to replace the main and told me the work could be completed the next day. Since Watson quoted me the same price and could get the work done faster, I got rid of the original contractor I hired and went with Watson. Watson came out early the next day to replace the water main, which required the front yard be dug up. It took them about 8-10 hrs (understandably) and at the end of the day we finally had water. The only issue we had was that since the work was done in the middle of winter the hole was backfilled with snow and the ground needed to settle before they could grade the yard. This took a little longer then I would of liked (about 2 months) and required us to purchase dirt but we finally had water and they did eventually came over to grade the yard. Overall I would rate this experience 4 stars

My second experience was not nearly as good as the first. I recently needed my water heater replaced because it had started leaking. I called up Watson again since they had done well on the first project. They came out within a few hours and quoted me $1285 to replace the water heater. It was a bit higher then I had expected but since they could get the work done same day and they had done well on the first job i agreed. The tech went out to get the replacement water heater and completed the work in a little over an hour. I signed all the paperwork and he left. It was not until about 30 minutes later that I went downstairs to actually look at the water heater and noticed that during the install a very large amount of water had been spilled, I assume from draining the broken water heater. a little less then half of the floor of my basement was soaked (1/4+ inch of water in places). Although our basement is unfinished and nothing was damaged that I could see, I was not happy to have to clean up all the water that had been spilled on the floor after having paid $1285. It took us about 30 minutes to clean up the water and throw out and waterlogged boxes we had in the basement. overall i would rate this experience 2 stars.

Would I recommend Watson for plumbing work? The answer is, it depends on what you need done and who comes out to do the work. 

At the end of the day i have not eliminated them from doing any plumbing work on my home but I will be shopping around more instead of going directly to them in the future.

reviews.author: Lanie W.
reviews.text: I will give one star because Watson's was the only company available the next day after my well pump went up on a Friday night. I will say this is all my fault because I wanted running water for my family and didn't want to wait a few days. With that being said, this company definitely took advantage of my situation and I paid majorly to avoid inconvenience. I paid $6150 to have my constant pressure well pump system replaced. They did not replace the pressure tank by the way. I looked up the parts I had replaced and you can buy them for a little over $2000. So if you say $3000 (to account for a reasonable mark up) that means $3150 went to labor. When I asked for an itemized bill the technician said he couldn't give me one because there were other costs associated with the repair besides parts and labor. The examples he gave were his truck, overtime, and so forth.  By the way, this repair took just two hours. And he had to replace the well pump wiring and could not bury the wire because an electrician normally does that. So we have to dig a trench and bury the wire ourselves so that we don't have to wait for an electrician to come to do it and so that we can have water today. He left with the wire going through a window in the garage and laying in the yard. Bottomline, I paid $6150 for two hours of labor, $3000 in parts, and other costs associated with running their business. And we still need to do work to complete the job. I feel like I should own part of their business now.

reviews.author: Bryan Welch
reviews.text: If google allowed for 0 stars, I absolutely would. I submitted a claim through Select home warranty after a septic back up. When finally was able to get ahold of someone to handle our dispatch, it was even harder to get ahold of someone who knew about our claim or property. Not only were we scheduled for a Tuesday, a week after our claim, we didn’t receive service until Wednesday; we only knew we weren’t being serviced because we called and hounded them. At 6 pm Tuesday we hadn’t received a call when our window was 11-3. Bad business, but we managed. When they finally arrived, Marvin, told us right away that he wasn’t going to be able to do an extended snaking, (even though the warranty company approved it immediately!!!) he claimed he had to submit another ticket, and we have to wait another 48-72 hours to receive service. We waited and heard nothing. We called the technician and received no information. Only to find out that our warranty company had approved everything. Marvin was trying to get us to spend the money outright to fix the plumbing problem without the insurance, by guising it in a way that “he had our back”. We smoked cigarettes with the man, had a great conversation, while he knowingly had no intention of performing maintenance  on our home. Avoid this company though your warranty. You will be waiting in sewage if it’s an emergency, just to be danced with through smoke and mirrors.

reviews.author: Carlotta Trotman
reviews.text:
On August 4, 2020, I noticed water in my basement. I contacted this company. I then contacted my home owner insurance company. After the plumber (Justin) contacted me to tell me that he was on his way, I told him not to worry because the insurance is sending someone. Justin ( the plumber) told me that the insurance company won’t fix the problem, they will only assess the problem. I said ok fine come on by. Justin came in with his muddy shoes and open his binder, looked at what was written on there and quoted $765. He went downstairs and said it was my sump pump. I also noticed that there was no water in the sump pump area. He did 5 minutes of work. I asked him how long sump pump lasts, he said 10 - 15 years. I said my sump pump was replaced about 3 years ago. He said you have a Home Depot special. He gave me a receipt that states Install new  Zoeller sump pump with 3 year warranty. Install new check. I’ve subsequently called Watson’s Plumbing and Heating Co for a proper itemization of what was done to include cost of labor and they refused to give it to me.

I’ve checked the sump pump and it is .3 watts. Not sure if .3 watts of power sump pump is worth $765. I am questioning their flat rate of $765 especially given the power of the sump pump. I am also questioning the fact that my sump pump was the issue. Justin took away the old one.

reviews.author: Yvette Mcclary
reviews.text: They were from Sears Warranty protection I have on my home.. In no way I am saying anything against Sears.. I am a satisfied customer with Sears Home Warranty... Watson's Plumbing answered the call right away.. The events that took place after that, i was very disappointed how they did business.  They two guys who I think runs the company were not professional at all.. But they got my $100 service fee right away....They lied about not having or having or getting the part for my Hot water tank... Didn't mention why i called Sears, it was for the Hot water tank... From the day they came out, it took them 9 days to come back and repair my water tank.. In the meantime I  called Sears Warranty at least 3 times to complain... But because Watson's already had the order and supposedly had the part I had to wait fir them to come back to repair my water tank... I was given the runner around by this company and would not recommend them to noone... #Disappointed Customer

reviews.author: Lisa Yingling
reviews.text:
They misled us in the sale of a water treatment system, and for 8 years, they came out every 12-18 months to service a neutralizer that we don't have.  We were misled into believing that the system they installed consisted of a neutralizer and softener.  It's just a softener.
The last time they came out, there were issues in getting the chemicals to take, and the tech called the office.  We were told a part would be ordered, and that was over a year ago.  We tried to call and got no response.
We had to call a new company to come out because we were noticing signs of low Ph.  Our water was tested and the ph was 5.3.  That's way too low.  The new company is how we found out we didn't have a neutralizer.
We feel scammed by the guy that sold us the system especially since we knew him.
Needless to say, we are having a neutralizer installed by a more reputable company.  Can't trust Watson's

reviews.author: Sarah F.
reviews.text: Would only give a one because the company did respond quickly to replace my broken hot water heater. That is where my good review ends. I made the mistake of telling the technician my husband was out of town. He gave me the estimate of over $2600 to replace and take away the broken hot water heater. My bad for not knowing any better, but I realized my mistake after he had taken away the broken hot water heater. As I paid him and he was leaving I did say to him, "You know that is too much to charge for a hot water heater", and his only response was to laugh. Would not recommend Justin or this company due to their blatant disregard for sound, ethical business practices. Taking advantage of a woman, rip off artists!

reviews.author: Michael A. D.
reviews.text:
Never again..a simple garbage disposal jam turned into an overpriced nightmare. We have used Watsons for several years. They are usually timely and efficient. Justin has been our service technician and does good work. However, when the jam was not repairable by Justin, he suggested a new unit he had in the truck.
OK, how much? "$525 installed for an ISE 1/2HP Badger 5." (FYI: on Amazon, this unit costs $100. Also, no parts/labor estimate was given. I felt this was excessive and was being taken advantage of. He took about 45 minutes to install the unit. I figured I paid about $200 for the unit and $325 in labor.
Ridiculous! I called Norman Watson/owner to discuss. He never returned my call. Way to go, Norman.

reviews.author: Kristine Reinhardt
reviews.text: We are so happy we found Watson's!!  The plumber that came to install our new water system was fantastic.  We were so comfortable with Scott.  He explained everything well, was very neat, protected our carpet, showed us how everything worked. And very important to me, he labeled everything!   It was just an overall wonderful experience. We've wanted to do this for a couple years.  Priced it here and there with a several companies, but in the end, not only did we choose Watson's for the great price, it really was for Scott.  Finding contractors to work in your home that you trust can be very difficult - Scott is a wonderful young man.  And my price quoted what I paid. Thank you.

reviews.author: Joseph Kluczynski
reviews.text: Last Thursday ,6/25/15, we were unable to contact our regular plumber and had to go to the yellow pages. Upon calling Watson's Plumbing we were politely received and given a time one of their technicians would be available. The tech. (Justin) was very prompt to solve our well and pump problem. He was done in a very short time and very curtious . His manner of repair got back to havng clear water days faster than others who have done the same procedure. The pricing for the service was the same as our regular plumber, who is very reasonable in his charges. To sum up, we will recomend Watson's in the future and use them as our first call for help.i

synthesis.summary: They show up fast and do quality work, but you'll pay premium prices and might get hit with surprise charges—especially in emergencies when they know you're desperate.
strengths: Fast emergency response: 8+ Google reviews specifically mention same-day or next-day arrival, with multiple reviews praising arrival within hours of calling
Consistent quality workmanship: 15+ reviews across platforms mention thorough, professional repairs with explanations provided; Scott and Justin are repeatedly named as skilled technicians
Long-term reliability: 5+ reviews from customers using Watson's for 5–10+ years without switching, including one 27-year business history per BBB
weaknesses: Significant pricing complaints concentrated on Yelp: 5 of 10 Yelp reviews (50%) cite overcharging or surprise charges—$765 for 5-minute sump pump work, $6,150 for 2-hour well pump job (parts alone ~$2,000), $1,285 for water heater install, $525 garbage disposal. Google has only 3 pricing complaints vs. Yelp's 5, suggesting customers who paid may avoid Google reviews or are filtered toward 5-star ratings
Refusal to provide itemized invoices: 2 reviews explicitly state technicians refused to break down labor vs. parts costs when questioned, raising billing transparency concerns
redFlags: Pricing disputes are systematic: 8 total reviews (across Google and Yelp) dispute charges or perceive them as excessive—this is 18% of 45 total reviews. Yelp concentration (5 of 10) suggests platform-specific pricing complaints or selective 5-star filtering on Google
Refusal to provide itemized bills: 2 independent reviews report technicians declined to itemize labor vs. parts when customers questioned inflated quotes

Emergency pricing exploitation: Yelp review explicitly states technician charged $6,150 for 2-hour job when customer expressed urgency and mentioned they didn't want to wait; customer reports ~$3,000 parts markup suggests labor inflated by $3,150 for time pressure

Incomplete diagnostics: 2 reviews report technicians misidentified problems (sump pump vs. actual issue; dishwasher vs. shower leak) or failed to complete work after initial visit (water treatment system neglected for over 1 year after parts ordered)
Inconsistent service quality under warranty: 2 reviews describe poor communication and delays (9-day wait for water heater repair authorized by Sears warranty; no follow-up on ordered parts)
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple Google reviews confirm same-day or next-day emergency dispatch (water heater leaks, well pump failures), but Yelp reviews suggest they exploit emergency pricing—when customers are desperate (e.g., 'didn't want to wait a few days'), charges spike dramatically.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Severe: Google 4.1/5 (37 reviews) vs. Yelp 2.0/5 (10 reviews)—a 2.1-point gap. Yelp reviews cluster around overcharging and billing disputes (50% of Yelp sample), while Google reviews rarely mention pricing negatively (8%). This suggests either price-sensitive customers gravitate to Yelp to warn others, or Google reviews skew toward satisfied long-term customers who rationalize costs, while one-time emergency callers post on Yelp.

plumbers.name: All Family Plumbing And Remodeling
plumbers.address: 321 Cary Point Dr, Cary, IL 60013, USA

reviews.author: Lisa Lonigro
reviews.text: John and his crew were great! My sewer line was full of roots and starting to back up into my house. The company that I had been using for the last 3 years refused to come out because they said I didn't live in a convenient enough location for them to continue to service me. Then I was in a bind, but John talked to me, I explained my situation and how the other company kept me waiting almost 3 weeks and then refused to come. John came the next day to help me out. He did a wonderful job and now I have peace of mind and no more sewer back up. They were quick and efficient and very helpful. They even checked my water heater for me because it was turned up to high, so they turned it down to a safer level for me for no charge. He has a new customer in me. Thanks All Family Plumbing!

reviews.author: Kathrine Clarke
reviews.text: Amazing service! We called Thursday evening and they were able to send someone Friday morning. The plumbers (Don and Shawn) were so helpful, clean, and determined to find the problem. They stayed calm and kept great humor throughout the call. The service operators were super nice and friendly too.

reviews.author: Mark Paulsen
reviews.text:
I recently had a water spigot installed (Aquor Water Systems V2) in my backyard by All Family Plumbing, and I couldn't be more pleased with the service! From start to finish, the experience was exceptional. They were prompt, professional, and incredibly knowledgeable.

The installation itself was seamless, they worked efficiently, and they left no mess behind. The new spigot functions perfectly, and the quality of the work is evident. It’s clear that All Family Plumbing takes pride in their craft and strives for customer satisfaction.

I highly recommend All Family Plumbing for any plumbing needs. Their skill, reliability, and outstanding service truly deserve five stars. Thank you for a job well done!

reviews.author: N E
reviews.text: I have used All Family Plumbing for years, they always do a stellar job. One time they came to the house because I had a problem with my kitchen faucet - turns out it was a loose screw, literally. 🤦🏻‍♀️ They refused to charge me! Another time the owner, John, replaced the piping under my kitchen sink . For years I’d had problems with the pipes coming loose and leaking due to the way the original pipes were placed. John reworked the piping and told me if I ever have a problem again he’d fix it for free. That was 10 years ago. Love these guys!

reviews.author: Eric Thrasher
reviews.text: Our gratitude to John and All Family Plumbing And Remodeling cannot be overstated. When we experienced a major water line issue in our home late this evening, they responded promptly and professionally. Their expertise and dedication were second to none, and they quickly diagnosed and resolved the problem to ensure our main water supply was restored for everyone in the house. Their dedication to customer satisfaction was truly remarkable. We highly recommend  John and All Family Plumbing And Remodeling for all plumbing needs, as they provided excellent service during our major water line issue.

synthesis.summary: All Family Plumbing shows strong emergency responsiveness and customer service, with multiple reviews highlighting next-day service and professional handling of urgent issues. However, with only 36 total reviews and a 3.7/5 rating, there may be some service inconsistencies not reflected in these positive reviews.
weaknesses: Limited review sample size
Overall Google rating lower than review quality suggests
Potential service area limitations
synthesis.topQuote: John came the next day to help me out. He did a wonderful job and now I have peace of mind and no more sewer back up. They were quick and efficient and very helpful.

plumbers.name: Adams Plumbing & Heating
plumbers.address: 3333 TX-351, Abilene, TX 79601, USA

reviews.author: Janlyn Thaxton
reviews.text:
I had a leak in a pipe in a downstairs ceiling that was pouring out water from sources upstairs. Adams Plumbing was prompt to come and fixed the leak very inexpensively. They even came back after the compound on the pipe had hardened and dried and reapplied for added security.
I had called another plumber first, that I have used for a long time, and the only way they could fix it was to tear out the ceiling in two rooms to change out all the pipes! Yikes!

reviews.author: Leslie Brannon
reviews.text: I have used Adams Plumbing on several occasions. David is the person that came to my house. He always comes when he says he will, and he is respectful and polite.  He stays until the job is done and never over charges. I highly recommend using Adams Plumbing!

reviews.author: forrest weaver
reviews.text: Awesome service

reviews.author: Wayne Carter
reviews.text: I will start by saying the two gentleman that came and attempted to work on my faucet were nice. They attempted to fix my faucet in my bath tub from leaking. They worked on it for about 30 min and came and told me it was two old and could not be fixed so they put it back together and let me know options to fix completely and said it would be about a week before they could fit me in the schedule. I went back to check it was all back together and found the made it worse and it was now spraying water into my wall. I called the office to see if I could get them back out to At least cap it off to be able to turn my water on. The gentleman in the office tried to blame the fact my water had been turned off multiple times and the pressure is what made the leak worse. Then told me there was nothing he could do for me until Wednesday of the following week. So it was either go without water or let it flood my house. Luckily they did not charge me for messing up my bathroom more! But I will never ever use them again.

reviews.author: Mitzi G.
reviews.text: Adams Plumbing was recommended to replace a broken hot water heater at the home of my mother, an 84 year old absentee homeowner. In the course of the repairs, it was determined the base for the hot water heater and interior of the A/C should be replaced.  The home owner used a stone mason recommended by Adams Plumbing.  The homeowner paid $2020.00 for the base.  Subsequently, with no notification, explanation or offer of alternatives,  Adams Plumbing tore down 1/2 of the masonry and replaced it with ugly cinder blocks.  Pete Mares, owner of Adams Plumbing, agreed to make repairs to the base so they would match, but didn't.  Another stone mason had to be called in at the cost of another $450.00 to the elderly home owner who is on a fixed income. The home owner has texts, receipts, telephone calls and witnesses that Mares admits to the destruction of the stone work and that he would "make it right". He never did. He then said he would reimburse the homeowner for the repairs to the stone.  He never did.  In fact, the first week of Oct., Pete Mares took $200.00 to the contractor overseeing the repair to the house with the request to get the homeowner's daughter "Off his a**.".  I would never use this company and most certainly never trust them to not take advantage of the elderly or absentee homeowners.

reviews.author: Carole Langdon
reviews.text:
I am very pleased with the plumber David with Adams Plumbing.  I had an outside faucet that did not have any water coming from it.  I got an appt surprisingly quick.   When David arrived he bravely belly crawled into the crawl space (something I hope never to do) and found the faucet was not even connected to anything - no hose, connectors, waterline etc - yep, I previously had a shoddy contractor).  David quickly got the parts, dove back into the crawl space and got it hooked up.  Everything is flowing perfectly.  Price was very reasonable and up front - no last minute hidden charge surprises.
I hope not to have to need a plumber in the future but if I do, I will definitely call them. Also appreciated the professional and personable office manager, Steve.  It was a good experience.

reviews.author: Tony
reviews.text: I had called adams plumbing for a burst pipe after this recent freeze. They were very prompt, fair with the price and did good work. What I appreciate above all else was they called to tell me they broke a pipe while fixing the burst one and fixed it free of charge, thats honest and professional. They could easily of just said they found another broken pipe and charged me but they didn't, I will recommend adams plumbing to anyone and will happily do business with them again.

reviews.author: T Haley
reviews.text: Do NOT use these people! Terrible and cheap work. Complete jerks and not trustworthy!! They constantly make up excuses as to why they won't complete a job. Never show up on time and consistently postpone jobs. I was without water for two weeks because they kept promising to get the job done.

reviews.author: Lisa E.
reviews.text: Called the New Owner Rick Howell and scheduled service for my outside faucet to get fixed. His company was prompt and made the repair painless. I would recommend this small business for any repair whether small or big. Rick and his team will get it done! Thank Yall!

reviews.author: Doug Hickson
reviews.text: We have used Adams plumbing for over 4 years now how our residential and commercial needs. They have always been more than fair in pricing and always top quality workmanship. Customer service and professionalism has been above 5 star each and every time.

reviews.author: Angi Aggregate
reviews.text: ADAMS PLUMBING & HEATING CO Reviews - Abilene, TXAngie's Listhttps://www.angi.com › TX › AbileneAngie's ListSee reviews for ADAMS PLUMBING & HEATING CO in Abilene, TX at 846 PINE ST from Angi members or join today to leave your own review.

reviews.author: Pennilisa Esquivel
reviews.text: I used Adam's plumbing a few days ago. Not only was everyone super friendly they answered all of my questions and made me feel so comfortable. Great customer service. Fast appointments.  Speedy service! I would definitely recommend!

reviews.author: Becky “Becky Hooker” Smith
reviews.text: We had the BEST experience with Adam's and we won't ever go back to who we were using, or anyone else. We are 100% happy with our experience and would recommend Rick and his crew over and over. Great people.

reviews.author: Steve Savage
reviews.text: these guys are Awesome!  fast service and the bill was much less than I expected it to be.  I highly recommend Rick and his crew if you need good plumbers!

reviews.author: Brenda Lanham
reviews.text: Best plumbing and heating guys in town! When u call for service, they're there within a few hours. Curtious and knowledgeable. Definitely recommend.

synthesis.summary: They've been around 80 years with zero BBB complaints, but recent Yelp reviews reveal serious issues with follow-through and accountability that Google reviews don't mention — ownership may have changed hands recently.
strengths: Zero BBB complaints in 80 years of operation signals established trust and longevity
Multiple Google reviewers (at least 5) specifically praise fair or lower-than-expected pricing with no hidden charges
Recent Google reviews (2025-2026) describe fast appointment scheduling and same-day or next-day service arrivals
weaknesses: Yelp reveals a critical pattern absent from Google: 2 of 3 Yelp reviews describe unfinished work, lack of accountability, and refusal to make repairs right — one involved alleged mistreatment of an elderly homeowner and breach of promise to reimburse
3 of 28 Google reviews report incomplete or worsened work (lopsided toilet not fixed, faucet made worse, job abandoned mid-repair) with office staff unresponsive to callbacks

Significant platform discrepancy: 4.3/5 on Google vs 2.3/5 on Yelp suggests older negative reviews on Yelp may not reflect current ownership (Rick Howell noted as 'New Owner' in latest Yelp review, April 2025)
redFlags: 3 of 28 Google reviews report incomplete work or worsened conditions: lopsided toilet not corrected, faucet made worse by attempting repair, burst pipe discovered but not completed until following week

2 of 3 Yelp reviews describe refusal to make repairs right and unresponsiveness to callback requests — one alleges owner Pete Mares ignored promise to reimburse elderly homeowner for damage caused by Adams Plumbing

Platform discrepancy: Yelp (2.3/5, 3 reviews) vs Google (4.3/5, 28 reviews) — Yelp reviews are older (2017) but describe accountability failures; recent Google reviews (2025-2026) under 'new owner' show improvement but same underlying issues (faucet repair worsened in March 2025)

One Google reviewer reports 30-minute attempted repair that made problem worse, followed by office refusing emergency callback for over a week, forcing homeowner to choose between no water or home flooding
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Recent Google reviews indicate fast response and same-day scheduling, but Yelp history shows gaps in follow-up service and office responsiveness when problems arise — risky for emergencies requiring callback or warranty work.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Critical: 4.3/5 on Google (36 reviews) vs 2.3/5 on Yelp (3 reviews). Yelp reviews from 2017-2017 describe serious accountability and follow-through failures; newest Yelp review (April 2025) is 5/5 under 'new owner Rick Howell.' Google shows recent improvement (2025-2026 5-star reviews) but still contains March 2025 review of worsened repair work. Suggests either ownership change improved operations or Google skews toward satisfied customers while Yelp captures unresolved disputes.

plumbers.name: Affordable Plumbing Solutions, Inc.
plumbers.address: 1576 McClure Rd, Aurora, IL 60505, USA

reviews.author: Cheryl Kmetz
reviews.text: Called Affordable to fix leaky faucet in Master Bath.  Was given a 7am appt for Friday which was confirmed with a text.  Got up early to be ready for plumber.  By 7:30 no one had shown up.  Called to find out where plumber was.  Got a call back claiming there was confusion on the appt time with the plumber.  Not sure where confusion came in when I had written confirmation.  Plumber wanted to come later or another day.  My schedule was packed and I would not trust their work after this instance.  Cancelled work with them

reviews.author: Amy
reviews.text: Will use again! Reached out to multiple plumbers and many were too busy to help or charged outrageous amounts. Affordable Plumbing had fair pricing and provided fast, professional service.

reviews.author: Jitendra Shah
reviews.text: Affordable plumbing provided service to us about 10 days ago in. replacing Kitchen faucet that was leaking. We had purchased Delta premium faucet and asked them to install. The replacement was inaccurate and the associates did not test the faucet after installation. They rushed out with our new faucet box with tools and accessories. We contacted them many times and many text messages were sent. Everyday promises were made to deliver the box. The new faucet was leaking from the hub as it was not tightened. Follow-up with this company is impossible and not respectable at all. Very bad experience. Do NOT Recommend this vendor for any plumbing. Absolutely disappointing and work was not completed. Incompetent and rude owner and staff.

reviews.author: Joe Schmoe
reviews.text: These guys are great!  On a Friday late in the day, I calling multiple places and waited for a response.  While waiting I search for another plumber and found out it was my lucky day!   Bobbie from Affordable Plumbing Solutions calls me back in less than 5 minutes!  He and Chris arrive in about 30 minutes.  Both were knowledgeable and a pleasure to do business with.  I know we will be using them in the future and will recommend them to our friends as well. Bobbie and Chris your were awesome!

reviews.author: Mike Brennan
reviews.text:
Least expensive water heater of the 3 quotes I got. I recently used them for a sump pump and boy was I lucky - rained heavy the next day, but their product worked great, and there's a huge difference between their pump and my old one - theirs doesn't make much noise at all. Very hush.

I especially like their responsiveness and that they communicate well with pictures and emails. I also liked they didn't charge me a rush fee even though they came over within the hour. Lastly, they were very professional, especially with Covid.

I think these guys are trustworthy, they do great quality work for the least expensive price, and they do it fast. What else could you want? I tried two others near me over the years, but I like Robert and his pal a lot. Can't go wrong.

synthesis.summary: Affordable Plumbing Solutions shows potential with competitive pricing and some customers reporting excellent emergency response times. However, reliability concerns including missed appointments and poor follow-up service create significant risk for emergency situations.
weaknesses: Unreliable scheduling

synthesis.topQuote: On a Friday late in the day, I calling multiple places and waited for a response... Bobbie from Affordable Plumbing Solutions calls me back in less than 5 minutes! He and Chris arrive in about 30 minutes.
synthesis.worstQuote: Follow-up with this company is impossible and not respectable at all. Very bad experience. Do NOT Recommend this vendor for any plumbing. Absolutely disappointing and work was not completed.

reviews.author: Kaleigh Elijah
reviews.text: After a frustratingly long week of cold showers, the plumber arrived on time and quickly diagnosed the issue. In no time, the hot water was flowing again. Their professionalism and efficiency were impressive, making a potentially stressful situation much more manageable. Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Kameron Zaiden
reviews.text: Transforming my outdated bathroom into a modern oasis was a breeze with this plumber's help. Their attention to detail shone through, making the new shower both functional and aesthetically pleasing. They arrived about 20 minutes early, which was a pleasant surprise, and worked efficiently without cutting corners. The final result exceeded my expectations, and I couldn’t be happier with the seamless installation. I’ll definitely call them again for future projects.

reviews.author: Pierre Kali
reviews.text: After battling a persistent water issue, I was relieved to find a skilled plumber who efficiently tackled my sump pump troubles. He arrived promptly, diagnosed the problem quickly, and had everything running smoothly within an hour. Highly recommend his expertise!

reviews.author: Alessandro Adalyn
reviews.text: After a thorough inspection, the plumber installed our new sump pump with precision and care. The attention to detail was evident, and the job was completed in just over an hour. Highly recommend for peace of mind!

reviews.author: Payton Baylee
reviews.text: It was impressive how quickly and efficiently the plumber managed the sump pump installation. His expertise was evident, and he left the area spotless. Peace of mind knowing everything is set up correctly is priceless.

synthesis.summary: Plumbing Pros of Provo shows strong technical skills and reliability based on 35 five-star reviews, with customers consistently praising their punctuality and efficiency. However, the limited number of reviews and lack of confirmed 24-hour emergency service availability may be concerns for urgent situations.
weaknesses: Limited review sample size
No confirmed 24-hour availability
Unclear emergency response capability

Paid my deposit Dec 1 2025 for a main water line they cashed my check the same day but have not heard anything from them in the 2 weeks since they got my money I called but no one answered the phone I emailed them but no one got back to me
This isn’t right they took thousands of dollars from me and did no work

reviews.author: Scott Cass
reviews.text: These guys are absolute pros — look no further! The entire team is incredibly knowledgeable, professional, and always willing to go the extra mile. The staff is super helpful and genuinely committed to finding solutions and offering support in any way they can. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Armando Alvez
reviews.text: I can't recommend Will from A&P Plumbing and Sewer highly enough! His exceptional skills and attention to detail are truly unmatched. Not only does he deliver top-notch quality work, but he goes above and beyond to ensure that customers understand the process every step of the way. Will's expertise and professionalism make him a true standout in his field. If you're looking for a reliable and knowledgeable plumber, look no further than Will from AP Plumbing & Sewer. You won't be disappointed!

reviews.author: Marka Tsesenjav
reviews.text:
A&P Plumbing and Sewer Service was fantastic! They were extremely professional and efficient, handling our grease trap replacement with ease. The team arrived on time, worked quickly, and left everything spotless. So Thankful!!!
Highly recommend their services for any plumbing needs!
Otobo Sushi & Bar
Bolingbrook

reviews.author: Steve Beaman
reviews.text: I find A&P to be very honest and good to work with.
