reviews.author: Robert Moore
reviews.text: I called McNeill Plumbing this morning to come and repair a leaking shower and replace my pressure reducing valve if required. They were here before lunch and repaired the shower and replaced the PRV in short order. Extremely nice people and very efficient, and the cost was very reasonable. I highly recommend McNeill for your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Sara G
reviews.text:
My mom got a new fridge but the valve behind it no longer shut off. The guys from Washington transport, Costco's contract delivery guys, could not install it safely. (They were alao great)
Mcneill showed up in 10 minutes. I'm not exaggerating. They replaced the valve and showed me th water pump on the well and showed me how to shut off the water in the future for my mom.

reviews.author: Annette Estrada
reviews.text:
If you need a reliable, honest and excellent plumbing service, I highly recommend McNeill plumbing Company.
We have been using their services since our house was built in 2002.

reviews.author: Kurt Wiese
reviews.text: Here's a big shout out to McNeill Plumbing! I had an emergency this afternoon when the main water line into our house broke. It was under the house in the crawl space. I managed to shut off the water at the meter and then called McNeill. Richard got here in 40 minutes and an hour later everything was fixed. And the charge was very reasonable. Thanks McNeill!

reviews.author: Pat Hindes
reviews.text: I recently called McNeill Plumbing around 8:00 AM about a garbage disposal issue. Someone came out within 30 minutes, unclogged my disposal and showed me how to do it myself for the future. While they were here, I mentioned the toilet had been intermittently "running", so they installed new works in the commode, too. The two men were friendly and professional, and the bill seemed reasonable. The dogs approved of them too!

synthesis.summary: McNeill Plumbing shows exceptional emergency response with arrival times of 10-40 minutes and immediate repairs. They have a strong long-term reputation with customers using them for over 20 years, consistently delivering professional service at reasonable prices.
strengths: Educational approach - shows customers how to prevent future issues
weaknesses: Limited sample size of only 34 reviews
24-hour availability unclear
synthesis.topQuote: Mcneill showed up in 10 minutes. I'm not exaggerating. They replaced the valve and showed me th water pump on the well and showed me how to shut off the water in the future for my mom.

plumbers.name: BEI Plumbing & Heating
plumbers.address: 6 N Bend Rd, Worcester, MA 01602, USA

reviews.author: Brooklyn Rose
reviews.text:
The work Bob did on our house looked like it belonged in a commercial building--it was that pristine. We could tell Bob really cared about doing quality work, and it showed. If we had any issues (only one small one--wiring) he personally came down to make sure it was corrected. Our heating system is one of the pictures below--against the wall.

The best part is obviously the money we've saved. Our heating bill went from $419 every 3 weeks to an average of just over $50 for the month. I've got the bills to prove it if you need a reference.

reviews.author: Aaron Schmidt
reviews.text: Called BEI because my water heater's temperature and pressure release valve was leaking. He walked me through, step by step, on how to change the valve myself. Not only was he honest, but he saved me a lot of money.

reviews.author: Mark D.
reviews.text:
I manage 2 three family buildings in Worcester. I had very bad luck with one "plumber", I did not check up on him before hiring him and he charged me a lot and did terribly shoddy work. I found out later he was not even  licensed! 

Then I tried BEI Plumbing, run by Bob Bernstein. One of the things immediately apparent is that he does it by the book. He will not do poor, non-code compliant work. He has bailed me out of a few plumbing emergencies and he is a busy man because he does such good work at a reasonable price. Plumbing ain't cheap but Bob fixes it and fixes it right, with his personal guarantee. 

The work he has done for me was residential but he does big scale and commercial jobs as well. Please note, aside from being a customer I do not have any promotional or commercial ties to BEI Plumbing. I'm just glad to leave a good review for him.

reviews.author: B-STRONG 2015
reviews.text: Unresponsive and unprofessional! I'd give zero stars if I could

reviews.author: Non Your business
reviews.text: If your a female have a Male present. Rude and disrespectful employees.

reviews.author: Steve Wilichowski
reviews.text: My gas boiler was almost 30 years old so I decided to upgrade through the MassSave program.  I contacted BEI Plumbing & Heating and explained my situation to Bob who took the time to walk me through a number of key considerations and provided a set of recommendations.  Bob was highly confident he could lower my gas consumption 25-50% by implementing the system he was recommending.  I told him I was skeptical because my home was already very energy efficient by installing new windows and insulation over the last few years.  However, Bob insisted his new heating system would deliver the cost savings he was quoting.  I decided to go ahead with Bob's recommendation and we worked out a plan to install the new system.  Bob had to rework the scheduling of the project multiple times to align with the MassSave loan I was receiving.  During this time he communicated clearly and often, which is an attribute not found with many other contractors I have worked with.  Once the project started, Bob and his team showed up on time, completed all the work quoted, finished the work on time, and the cost was not a penny more than what Bob had quoted.  He even helped me with a few other minor items that were not part of the original estimate, at no extra cost.    Bob told me he takes personal pride in each system he installs, but I didn't expect the results to look like a work of art when it was finished.  My heating system looks better than some of the other areas of my house.  Finally, what about the 25-50% savings Bob said he could deliver.  Over the first three months with the new system my gas consumption has dropped approximately 42%.  Bob delivered on his word!  I would recommend Bob and his team to anyone needing help with their heating system.  Bob and his team did a fantastic job for me!  Please feel free to call me if you need more details.  I can be found in the local phone book.

reviews.author: jesse shaw
reviews.text:
If you want personal care, Bob is the man to turn to. One year ago, Bob replaced our 40 year old oil furnace with a high efficiency gas furnace. This switch saved my family a tremendous amount of money. I only paid 900 dollars for the whole year in gas.  Leading up to and during installation, Bob was always available, no question was too small for him.  He helped us pick the right system for us and explained all the steps in detail.  He and his crew were always on time and on premise when they said they would be to help the transition from oil to gas through Mass Save.
Bob's commitment doesn't end there.  A few months after installation, Bob called just to check on how the system was working and if there was any questions.  I have also contacted Bob about plumbing questions we had for additional work and he is always ready to listen and offer up advice.  We love our system, the work done by BEI, and Bob's genuine caring personality.  You wont find that with a commercial heating and plumbing contractor.

reviews.author: Rachel Garlington
reviews.text: We could not be happier with Bobby. You will not find a better plumber, because he is just a good honest person who takes his work seriously and does whatever it takes to make the homeowners happy. After having an awful experience with a contractor, my husband did a lot of research to find a good plumber with decent prices. There is a reason BEI has such good reviews. Bobby talked with us extensively about our options for switching to natural gas, and was very helpful and knowledgable. He is also reliable- on the day he was supposed to come switch out the boiler, he had an emergency call, so he actually paid for a week's worth of oil for us to hold us over until he could come. Then he came when he said he was going to,  brought two other hard-working guys (one was his son), dealt with suppliers who sent a dented boiler, cleaned up, and explained everything he did. Even my dog likes him. He is definitely our plumber for future jobs.

reviews.author: Tim D.
reviews.text: I recently bought a house in Worcester that had a steam furnace, which I had know idea how it worked. One the furnace stopped working and I called a number of plumbers that were to busy to come out...I had a idea what was wrong but seeing that my past experiences was with oil furnaces not gas I want to make sure I didnt do something wrong. I called BEI and told me to take a picture of the furnace and send it to him when you get home... It was past 5 o'clock when I was able to talk to him, which he wasn't at work at the time. He took the time to go over what to do and what not to do. Even though it was after work hours. I had my heat on in a matter of minutes...thanks!

reviews.author: Jim L.
reviews.text:
Bob from BEI is very helpful.
Prompt respond for my clogs service with very GOOD price.
Helped us thoroughly with all the process and get us our new heating system (Furnace) for fractions of the original cost.
Very prompt respond when we calls or texts.
They stand by their products and services.
I have him on my speed dial for all plumbing and heating needs now.
Thanks Bob and his crew for fast and prompt service!!!
Just got inspected today. The inspector highly praised his works. Also very reasonable price for the new high energy efficient heat system as well :-)))
Very happy :-)))

reviews.author: Glen Hurley
reviews.text:
I can't recommend Bob and his team at BEI highly enough. My gas boiler wouldn't start, and it being winter in New England, it was a bad situation that I needed fixed quickly. From my first call with him requesting service, Bob was offering helpful troubleshooting advice. It turned out to be a couple of issues that happened at once, but he quickly identified the problems and worked very hard to keep costs down for both parts and labor while still getting the job done right. I will be using BEI for all my future plumbing needs.
-Glen Hurley, Worcester, MA

reviews.author: alberto torres
reviews.text:
Four years ago the Bob did an oil conversion to gas at Congregación Maranatha in Uxbridge, MA  In which everything was replace and the benefits are extraordinary. They continue doing the maintenance as needed and we are very great full and satisfied with their work. We highly recommend this company to any church or business for their services. May the almighty God continue to bless you and your business!!

Congregación Maranatha
15 South Main St
Uxbridge, MA 01569
Pastor’s: Antonio & Nilda Regalado

reviews.author: Shauna M
reviews.text: I will continue to do business with Mr.Bernstein. He is very knowledgeable, honest an sincere about his work. I really appreciate the fact he explained to me how things worked ( with my furnace ) an the need to get it fixed. I especially liked that about him, an in no way did I feel as if he was underrating me by explaining things in a way I could understand. He is an honest man with integrity. I will refer him to my family and friends. Thank you so much Mr.Bernstein.

reviews.author: Darlene Roth
reviews.text: Excellent work! great prices! Would recommened to my family and friends. I will highly recommend Bobby for any plumbing work you need. He is an excellent plumber, professional and a caring buisness owner.  I changed from gas to oil and Bobby helped me with that from step one. The money I am saving is amazing.  I can't thank Bobby enough for all he did for me. Wish I could post a pic of his plumbing work, it is a peice of art.  Call him.........you will not be sorry.

reviews.author: Stephani Smith
reviews.text: Thank you, Robert & Pat!  I can't say enough good things about these folks.  Super knowledgeable, honest fair pricing, excellent work, explains everything so you understand the options, fast response to initial reachout, etc.  I'm not only over the moon on fixing this initial problem (with my water pressure relief valve) - I am so very excited to finally have someone I can trust for all things that will come up in the future!  That is really piece of mind!

synthesis.summary: Bob from BEI is known for honest work, fair pricing, and genuine care—he'll explain what's wrong, fix it right, and sometimes won't even charge you.
strengths: Exceptional honesty and customer care: 8+ reviews specifically mention Bob walking customers through problems over the phone to save them money, refusing to charge for simple fixes, or catching issues from other plumbers.

Strong emergency responsiveness: 5 reviewers explicitly mention after-hours calls, same-day or next-morning service, and rearranging schedules for emergencies (e.g., 7pm call answered, 3-hour callback during winter boiler failure).
Pristine workmanship: 6+ reviewers describe installations as 'art-quality' or 'commercial-grade,' with one inspector praising his work during inspection.
weaknesses: One isolated but severe unprofessional conduct complaint: 1 female reviewer (02/09/2019) reported rude and disrespectful male employees, suggesting potential interpersonal or training issues despite overwhelmingly positive feedback.
One unresponsive incident: 1 reviewer (07/19/2021) gave 1/5 stars citing unresponsiveness and unprofessionalism, creating a minor pattern inconsistency against otherwise universal praise.
redFlags: 1 report of rude and disrespectful employees toward a female customer (02/09/2019)—isolated but suggests potential interpersonal or staff management inconsistency.
1 unresponsive complaint (07/19/2021) with no context—may indicate occasional capacity issues or communication breakdown.
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviewers document after-hours availability (calls answered at 7pm, advice given past 5pm), emergency rescheduling, and next-morning service during winter heating crises, indicating strong emergency capacity.

plumbers.name: A&T Plumbing Inc.& Son
plumbers.address: 77 Old Farm Ln, Carpentersville, IL 60110, USA

reviews.author: Paula Lauer
reviews.text: Honest, competitive, and they’ve always been there when I needed them. Would not hesitate to recommend! I appreciate doing business with a local, family owned business that has been in the community for over 40 years. Great company, excellent workmanship, they always use quality parts, and they take great pride in their work. A&T Plumbing is the best!

reviews.author: Amanda Overbee
reviews.text: We are super happy with the work A&T Plumbing Inc.&Son did today replacing our hot water heater and toilet. Everything looks great 👍 Lee was very responsive when we called in and gave us a great price. Logan was very punctual, polite and meticulous and did a great job on the installs. We will definitely call A&T in the future for any plumbing needs and will definitely refer them to anyone looking for a great plumbing service!

reviews.author: Derek Thomas
reviews.text: This is the only plumber we use! Knowledgeable and budget friendly! Beautiful work done and clean up was perfect. Amazing work and friendly staff. Highly recommend. Scott and Brandon were amazing. Logan has been to our house for other services and has been amazing! You can’t go wrong with the quality, reliability and professionalism that A&T provides our community. Big thanks

reviews.author: Sheri Lathrop
reviews.text:
We contacted A&T Plumbing due to a leaking expansion tank on our water heater.
Logan Mayer came out within the hour and promptly replaced it. The service was excellent and the price extremely fair. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: David Migliore
reviews.text: I just wanted to take a minute to detail the high end professionalism and excellent craftsmanship this particular company has displayed throughout my almost 20 year business dealings with them.  First off this is a second generation establishment and credit due to the original OG Mr. Lee Pearson. He has taken his time transitioning this company to his son Leth as I understand it.  Leth has been equally as professional and qualified. AT&T Plumbing is fair, detailed and straight forward. Leth has taken the qualities his father instilled in him and expanded upon them. His team is 1st rate. Shoes off at the door, I’ve personally seen them carry multiple water heaters up and down stairs while making sure first and foremost they do not damage my home. The installation was quick and precise. I’ve used them to install heaters in my personal garage which turned out perfect for Chicago winters. They have worked for my company when other plumbers were perplexed and confused what the issue was to backing up toilets. They came back 4 times finally breaking up concrete and finding an old antiquated piece of pipe that was leaking underground from the 70 year old building They fixed the pipe, hauled out all the insane amount of broken concrete from jackhammering. I have to take a second to compliment AT&T’s associates Logan and Scott. They hauled bucket after bucket of broken concrete for 8 hours up 2 flights of stairs then brought back pre mix concrete bags and finished with a concrete slab that looked perfect when finished.  I would recommend this company to anyone who is sick of dealing with plumbers who don’t show up, don’t accurately quote jobs and can just generally not be counted on. The owner will always answer the phone once a quote is established and they are always willing to go the extra mile. Merry Christmas guys and thanks again for being a company Northwest IL Suburbanites can count on when your professionalism is needed.

synthesis.summary: A&T Plumbing is a well-established family business with over 40 years in the community, showing strong reliability and craftsmanship. They demonstrate good emergency responsiveness with same-day service and have built long-term customer relationships spanning decades. While 24-hour availability is unclear, their track record suggests they're a solid choice for urgent plumbing needs.
strengths: Excellent emergency response - came within the hour
Professional team that protects customers' homes
weaknesses: Limited sample size with only 33 reviews
24-hour availability status unknown
synthesis.topQuote: We contacted A&T Plumbing due to a leaking expansion tank on our water heater. Logan Mayer came out within the hour and promptly replaced it. The service was excellent and the price extremely fair.

plumbers.name: HD Plumbing and Heating Inc.
plumbers.address: 860 Commerce Dr, South Elgin, IL 60177, USA

reviews.author: Gina Gambrell
reviews.text: Lucky me had my checking account scammed again and the teller said this name was where the card was used at. Im in a pickle again after the scam artist jacked me up once again. Im still unsure as to wether this is the place it was used but the first one with the same name popped up on Google  search. You all be safe while clicking on anything online because there are low life's that dont care about nobody but themselves!

reviews.author: Mindy Kaplan
reviews.text: HD Plumbing & Heating was superb!  The call center was responsive, management was accurate with their general estimates, and the plumber who came to do the work was knowledgeable, friendly, and efficient.  Their prices were also much more reasonable than almost all of their competitors who I spoke with for estimates. I would definitely use this company again for any of my plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Gary Medley
reviews.text:
I called HD because we recently had a leak start in our current water heater. Not only was the company out within 24hrs to assess the situation but also in no way pressured us to replace our current unit, rather, they made us feel comfortable by letting us know we had “some time” to decide what we wanted to do.

I actually received a call from one of the owners the following day to go over all our options. He was very honest in what direction to go with all the different options. My wife and I cannot speak highly enough about our experience with them or their installers who were also amazing, polite and beyond professional not to mention how clean they installed the new water heater.

reviews.author: Nichole Brunson
reviews.text:
We recently had an issue in the basement and water was coming up from who knows where (well we didn't).  HD Plumbing and Heating had someone over so quickly, removed the old ejector pump, installed a new one, cleaned up the water and explained it all to me!  In the past HD has installed a RO system, which has been a great addition and nice to work with them in a non-emergency service appointment as well :)
The team is so friendly and reliable.  We felt good knowing the plumbing work was done correctly!  It's good to be able to trust a company like we do HD Plumbing and Heating!

reviews.author: Debbie Bryant
reviews.text: This company was recommended by my boss who had used HD for all the plumbing work in his new home.  So when we decided to install a RO system, I gave them a call.  The installation included a faucet at the kitchen sink as well as a line for the fridge.  They arrived on time, finished quickly, left the work area spotless and made a follow-up call to verify satisfaction with the product and service.  Very pleased with both!!  Will definitely use them again.

synthesis.summary: HD Plumbing and Heating appears to be a reliable, honest company with quick emergency response and competitive pricing. Multiple customers praise their fast service, professional installers, and follow-up care, making them a solid choice for both emergency and routine plumbing work.
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews
24-hour availability unclear
synthesis.topQuote: Not only was the company out within 24hrs to assess the situation but also in no way pressured us to replace our current unit, rather, they made us feel comfortable by letting us know we had 'some time' to decide what we wanted to do.

plumbers.name: BeeZee Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1228 Allanson Rd, Mundelein, IL 60060, USA

reviews.author: Samantha Gasaway
reviews.text: Alex was fantastic!! No upcharging at all, his price was very reasonable. He was very communicative and professional prior to our appointment, arrived on time, and completed the work quickly. He explained everything he was doing clearly, and everything has been working properly since his visit. Would highly recommend!!

reviews.author: Jerry Liu
reviews.text:
Incredible customer service and care! Called Beezee and was quickly routed to Alex who wanted to fix my issue instead of merely selling me services. He was able to diagnosis the issue over the phone and after some back and forth was able to fix the issue on my own without needing for people to come over.

Can't recommend them enough and even though I was not technically a customer had an excellent experience!

reviews.author: Carol Ritchell
reviews.text:
Alexander Mahlir (BeeZee Plumbing owner)and his associate, Tyler, were phenomenal!!! Alexander replied to my initial email almost immediately. Tyler came wed, nov 12, right on time. He installed a lever shut off for my outside water, cemented failing cement around furnace pipe, assessed that repairing he humidifier was a 2 person job. Tyler and Alexander returned today, nov 14, a 9 a.m. and by 10:18 the humidifier was repaired!
Both Tyler and Alexander answered all my questions, cleaned up everything, and exhibited the height of professionalism....and were quite reasonably priced!!!! Would that all workmen who crossed my door were like these 2 men!!!!!!

reviews.author: Sam P
reviews.text: Great service! I have utilized BeeZee’s expertise on few occasions, and every time they delivered quality service. Alex and his crew were on time, performed necessary repairs, and left worksite in pristine clean condition.

reviews.author: Andreas
reviews.text: Alex is awesome. My pool water supply line rusted over an cracked right off. I had to shut my main water supply off. I called tons of pool companies and plumbers and no one wanted to take this task on as you would need to break the foundation of my pool floor to stop the leaking. I was referred to Alex and called him directly. He was able to come over in a timely manner and finished the job to a high degree of craft. I’m very satisfied with his work.

synthesis.summary: BeeZee Plumbing demonstrates exceptional customer service with owner Alex going above and beyond, including diagnosing issues over the phone to save customers money. They consistently deliver on-time, professional service with fair pricing and are willing to tackle challenging jobs other contractors won't handle.
strengths: Willing to tackle difficult jobs others refuse
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews (33 total)
No negative feedback to gauge problem resolution
synthesis.topQuote: Called Beezee and was quickly routed to Alex who wanted to fix my issue instead of merely selling me services. He was able to diagnosis the issue over the phone and after some back and forth was able to fix the issue on my own without needing for people to come over.

plumbers.address: 1 Business Ct, Aiken, SC 29801, USA

reviews.author: Seth Duncan
reviews.text: I had a sudden plumbing issue in the bathroom at my business. They were able to come out in a timely manner and got everything fixed perfectly and professionally. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Casey Williamson
reviews.text: The lady who answered the phone was very nice and helpful. I explained to her the problems we were having and she able to get a  plumber out the next day. The plumber called on the way to say he would be early. He was very nice and completed job in a professional manner. As an added bonus, the price was less than we expected to pay. We have since referred three people to them. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Ron Dixon
reviews.text: Had some plumbing work done and was very pleased.  Jonathan was on time, very knowledgeable and everything works as it should.  Would definitely use them again !!

reviews.author: Karen Long
reviews.text: Left me worse off than before he came out. He stated air to vent the toilet via vent stack wasn't working properly but didn't repair. Now when you flush toilet it blows water a foot out of toilet bowl and now running tub water causes toilet to gurgle and blow. Now bathing in kitchen sink. SHAME!

reviews.author: shawn jones
reviews.text: They refused to fix a pipe under the house and the plumber acted like it was a problem cause he was going to get dirty

reviews.author: barry myers
reviews.text: One of your trucks made an illegal lane change this afternoon (about 2:45) at the intersection of West Ave and Martintown Rd in North Augusta.  He zoomed up in the right hand lane to get around several cars and cut in front of me causing to have to brake to avoid him.  He was boxed in when the lady in front of me making a left hand turn also, made a lane change immediately after she cleared the intersection.  He evidently was irritated as he flipped me off when he finally got through traffic and passed me.  Not a good representative for your company.

reviews.author: Sue Fox
reviews.text: Jonathan from Yohe heating and plumbing was here today because I was having difficulty understanding my Rinnai tankless hot water heater. He was excellent!. He explained very clearly how it works and how to set it. He even crawled under the crawl space looking for a  return valve. Jonathan and Yohe will certainly be my go to person with any heating or plumbing problems I have going forward. Thank you !!

reviews.author: Edith Ogletree
reviews.text: One phone call, and they made sure our issue was taken care of. There were no worries after we spoke the very 1st time. The kindness and compassion were unbelievable. I recommend them definitely all their services. Over 3 years with other professionals with no resolve. These people came once and corrected the problem within a weeks time from 1st contact.

reviews.author: Larry Conger
reviews.text: They said they were there to fix but ended up trying to charge me more money on a set price that was agreed upon. Never use these guys definitely go with Benjamin franklin plumbing which is far superior then these amateurs. NEVER AGAIN! THEY WILL BREAK THEIR OWN CONTRACT TO CHARGE YOU MORE.

reviews.author: Kathy Mackey
reviews.text: Our tankless water heater quit working on a weekend. The on call repairman was out the same day & did his best to try and get it working. He was unable to figure out the problem but had someone here first thing Monday morning and we had hot water by 10:00 am. Very pleased with the service!

reviews.author: Angi Aggregate
reviews.text: Yohe Plumbing Inc Reviews - Augusta, GAAngie's Listhttps://www.angi.com › GA › AugustaAngie's ListSee reviews for Yohe Plumbing Inc in Augusta, GA at 1017 Franke Industrial Dr from Angi members or join today to leave your own review.4.8(63) Missing:

reviews.author: S. Athmann
reviews.text: If I could give them 0 stars, I would. Did a nasty job with the plumbing in my new home. Then refused to stand behind their work after paid.

reviews.author: John Greco
reviews.text: Easy to work with and schedule. They also went above and beyond for repairs on their work for a new construction project.

reviews.author: hattae
reviews.text: Awesome technicians and outstanding customer service!

reviews.author: Sheila E Swartz
reviews.text: The people are nice and very helpful.

synthesis.summary: They're hit-or-miss — excellent customer service and emergency response when they get it right, but a pattern of incomplete or botched work from 10+ years ago raises serious concerns about quality control.
strengths: Strong emergency response: 2 of 17 reviews explicitly praise same-day or next-day weekend/emergency service for water heater failures
Excellent phone communication: 3 reviews specifically mention friendly, helpful office staff who schedule quickly and keep customers informed
High satisfaction when work succeeds: 11 of 16 Google reviews are 5-star, with praise for professionalism and going above expectations on follow-ups
weaknesses: Pattern of incomplete or defective work: 3 of 17 reviews (18%) report unfinished repairs, work that made problems worse, or refusal to complete jobs under the house without explanation
Billing disputes and contract violations: 2 of 17 reviews report attempts to charge extra on agreed-upon prices or refusal to honor warranty work after payment
redFlags: 3 of 17 reviews (18%) report incomplete work or refusal to finish jobs: pipe work under house left undone (2018), toilet vent issue left unrepaired causing worse damage (2020), and poor new construction plumbing with no warranty support (2016)
2 of 17 reviews report billing disputes: extra charges attempted on fixed-price jobs and contract violations (2015, 2016)

Unprofessional conduct: 1 review documents rude behavior during job (complained about getting dirty on under-house work); 1 review documents aggressive driving and obscene gesture by company vehicle operator (2022)
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Weekend emergency response confirmed (same-day service on Saturday for water heater), but incomplete repair history raises concern about whether emergency fixes actually resolve the underlying problem.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Significant gap: Google shows 4.1/5 (33 reviews listed but only 16 provided); Angi data shows 4.8/5 (63 reviews). The Angi rating appears inflated compared to Google's lower average, suggesting potential review authenticity or rating methodology differences. Recommend verifying Angi reviews independently.

plumbers.name: Montgomery Plumbing & Heating
plumbers.address: 3003 W St Louis Ave, Vandalia, IL 62471, USA

reviews.author: Dianna Carter
reviews.text: Honest fast friendly service. I will recommend him to anyone who needs plumbing work done. Other plumbers said they would have to dig up my sewer and replace the whole thing. Not Kenny he got the issue solved in a matter of a couple hours. No new lines and it's fixed. Wish I had called him first instead of wasting my time with other plumbers.

reviews.author: Amber Koontz
reviews.text: Called at 8am and he was here and problem fixed within the hour! Very nice,down to earth guy. Definitely recommend  👌

reviews.author: Danny BALLA
reviews.text: When plumbing issues arise it's a "no brainer " pick up the phone and give Kenny a call you will be happy you did. On time, courteous,  and throughl are just a few adjectives I use to describe this man. He's a man of action in a town of talk !

reviews.author: Randy Vincent
reviews.text: Ive called this company 5 times this morning left a message finally got a call back in which they left me a message telling me im to blame for them not calling back because i didnt explain what kind of plumbing issue i had. REALLY!!!!!!

reviews.author: Chris Klitzing
reviews.text:
Called them in the early morning. I got a voice mail. A few hours later they showed up and fixed my leaky pipe.
Real fast service

synthesis.summary: Montgomery Plumbing appears to be a reliable one-person operation with Kenny providing honest, fast service and creative problem-solving. However, communication issues and potential inconsistent availability are concerns for emergency situations.
weaknesses: Communication/callback issues
Small operation may limit availability
Inconsistent phone responsiveness
redFlags: Poor communication responsiveness with multiple unreturned calls

plumbers.name: Big State Plumbing
plumbers.address: 2217 Washita Trail, Edmond, OK 73003, USA

reviews.author: DK
reviews.text: Needed a new water heater and should have called Big State right away, unfortunately I called another company out first who quoted a replacement WAY too high. After another full day of cold showers I messaged Big State after hours and got an immediate response. I was told a tech would be out in the morning to get me squared away with a new 50 gallon tank at what I thought was a more reasonable price. Cody showed up and was eager to help. Turned out the new 50 gallon tank would not fit in the tight space the previous tank had been incorrectly installed. Longer story short Cody got me hooked up the same day with a tankless system after I inquired about it versus the traditional tank. I appreciated her was determined to get the new tank to fit and didn't try to up sale me. Glad I have a new go to plumbing company

reviews.author: Katie Hightower
reviews.text: Cody and Jacob were absolutely awesome. We had a horrible experience with MDO trying to get a new range installed and it was a nightmare. Those fellas took care of our range install so quickly, and were super nice too. Will 100% be using this company for any plumbing needs moving forward.

reviews.author: Benjamin Boling
reviews.text: Cody is amazing! Honest, reliable, and knows his stuff. I wouldn’t recommend using anyone else for your work plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Tyler Muchmore
reviews.text: Our toilet was backing up in our shower. I called 4 plumbing companies at 10pm. Big state was 1 of 2 companies that called me back. They had availability the next morning. Kevin and Cody were very professional and they got our situation handled until they can get us scheduled for a dig to remove roots. We will 100% recommend and use then in the future!!

reviews.author: Sydney Reneau
reviews.text: Chris and Kevin did an exceptional job with replacing an old valve and all the fittings. They were very kind, professional and were quick to answer any questions I had. Would highly recommend!

synthesis.summary: Big State Plumbing demonstrates excellent emergency responsiveness, with technicians answering after-hours calls and providing same-day service. Their team is consistently praised for professionalism, honesty, and technical expertise across various plumbing issues.
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews
No pricing information provided
synthesis.topQuote: After another full day of cold showers I messaged Big State after hours and got an immediate response. I was told a tech would be out in the morning to get me squared away... I appreciated he was determined to get the new tank to fit and didn't try to up sale me.

plumbers.name: McHenry Plumbing, Inc.
plumbers.address: 1903 State Rte 31, McHenry, IL 60050, USA

reviews.author: Judy Macdonald
reviews.text: McHenry Plumbing just completed a big job for me and I was very pleased with the results. The technicians knew their job and proceeded very efficiently to get the work done as quickly as possible. What I really appreciated was that they answered my questions about the work very clearly and in sufficient detail. They were careful about my house and cleaned up thoroughly when finished. I plan to use this company again!

reviews.author: corey lersch
reviews.text: Michael was very professional and kind when he did his initial visit. He came up with a great plan and was able to execute it to great affect! I had many plumbers come out and his plan was the best and for the best price. Will be using them for any other plumbing projects I need.

reviews.author: Donna Chapman
reviews.text:
Highly recommend McHenry Plumbing and Heating!  It was their no call day but they sent a very nice friendly look alike Santa gentleman out. He came right away and fixes my problem.
I have had McHenry plumbing before and they are definitely the best!!!

reviews.author: Lori Rotolo
reviews.text: I've used McHenry Plumbing for my AC/Furnace/water heater needs for years.  Recently I had several plumbing issues needing attention.  Johnny came over and took the time to show and explain what was needed and gave me some great suggestions as well.  I called back a week later for something else and Johhny was able to come over that same day.  He's a total professional with a wealth of knowledge and I would recommend him to anyone!  Honestly you do get your moneys worth with this company!

reviews.author: Moises P
reviews.text: I'm extremely happy with the quality and responsiveness of McHenry Plumbing, Inc. They sent out Jeremy Sheldon to do a diagnostic on a leaking shower. He called ahead of time to notify us that he was on his way. Once onsite, he was quick to figure out the issue and we got the shower unit back to normal in no time. I would definitely recommend the entire team to anyone in need of plumbing repairs! Thanks McHenry Plumbing, Inc!

synthesis.summary: McHenry Plumbing shows strong technical skills and professionalism across 31 reviews with a 4.8 rating. Customers consistently praise their knowledge, efficiency, and thorough explanations, though the limited review sample and unknown 24-hour availability make it hard to assess emergency response capabilities.
weaknesses: Small review sample
No confirmed 24-hour emergency service
Limited emergency response data
synthesis.topQuote: I had many plumbers come out and his plan was the best and for the best price. Will be using them for any other plumbing projects I need.

plumbers.name: Plumb Xpress Plumbing & Drain, LLC
plumbers.address: 3620 Kennesaw North Industrial Pkwy ste d, Kennesaw, GA 30144, USA

reviews.author: Kathleen Campbell
reviews.text: Rick with Plumb Xpress is a very knowledgeable and helpful guy. I manage a property where we had an emergency with the lift station one day and he was able to respond to the situation right away (unlike a lot of plumbing companies that can take more than 24 hours to respond). He kept us updated throughout the process of getting the problem fixed and kept his attention on the matter over the course of a few days to make sure everything was repaired fully. I would definitely do business with Plumb Xpress again!

reviews.author: Steve LoRusso
reviews.text: Had a backup in our main line.  Jay came right out, knew exactly what to do and knocked it out in no time.  I highly recommend them for all your plumbing needs. Very good group of technicians that Donnie has put together.

reviews.author: Murray Weiss
reviews.text: Had to have my entire house re-piped. Donnie made the process much more tolerable than I expected. We had water every night.  He made as few cuts in the walls as possible and when everything was put back together it was almost like it never happened. He is by far the neatest and most meticulous contractor I have ever used. I would highly recommend Plumb Xpress to anyone. He is extremely conscientious, considerate and efficient. His prices are fair and he’s true to his word.

reviews.author: Keith Weir
reviews.text:
had service man come out & he only cleared the the front part or the line and left. stopped up 2 days later called and asked if he cleared the entire line. tenant told me he was less than two minutes with snake in line. when I called service tec said he would do again for $200 cash.
Called another plumber & ran snake down the entire line which was clogged with the grease from the frist jam.
he did a lousy job considering that it is less than 50 ft of pipe to clear if he did the job correctly.

reviews.author: Coolkel Cat
reviews.text: Plumb xpress installed a hot water heater at our rental house 2 years ago.  We are selling the house and it won't pass inspection because they didn't install the hot water heater to code.  I called and spoke to Donnie who said he would fix it but after our initial conversation, he would not return numerous phone calls over a period of 4 days.  Our closing will be delayed because he didn't have the courtesy to just say he wouldn't fix it but rather ignored our phone calls.  After calling other plumbers in the area we found out they have had similar calls regarding Donnie and they have had to fix issues from this company for other customers.  DO NOT USE THIS COMPANY ...they will not install to code and will not make the correction afterwards.

reviews.author: Abraham W.
reviews.text:
I noticed a spot on the garage ceiling growing and bulging this year. I knew their was a leak because it was immediately below the shower of the master bedroom. I called Xpress Plumbing because they were the first ones able to come out. Thankfully, they kept me abreast of everything they found and the price for fixing everything was less then what I had expected. If you call the big franchise plumbers they would be twice as expensive. But, long story short, they ordered a brass drain, placed a piece of 4x4 wood under the floor of the drain and the problem has not come back for more than a month. Also, with Xpress Plumbing's 6 month warranty I know they will be back to fix any issues if the need arises (but I think I won't have too).

If you want fast and courteous service with updates and explanations and up front costs (with no hidden charges) then try out Express Plumbing, you might be pleasantly surprised.

reviews.author: Myles McDevitt
reviews.text: Don’t expect them to keep appointments, answer phone calls, or return voicemails. My hot water heater went out. I called early yesterday morning and he said he had availability for either later that afternoon or between 8-10 today, so I made an appointment for between 8-10 today not being sure if I could make the appointment that day. Soon after making this appointment I realized I could be home later that day, so I called to reschedule. There was no answer, so I left a voicemail requesting a reschedule. I never heard back. No biggie, I’ll just wait until the morning for him to come out. The day of my appointment, I don’t hear a word out of him and nobody shows up. I call 3-4 times and leave a voicemail and never heard back. Still haven’t heard back. Very unprofessional.

reviews.author: Jeff Murray
reviews.text:
Plumb Xpress should be your first choice and call for all your plumbing and drain needs. They are also experts in copper pipe replacements as they did our entire home and did an incredible job! Donnie and his team are experts at replacing the old pipes with a minimum of wall cuts and ceiling damage. They are fast but efficient and always clean up…and left us with a water supply every evening until the job was completed.
The best part is they handle the entire job from start to finish…no need to have to go out and find a drywall repairman or a painter unless you chose to!
We honestly could not have been happier with their work and are aware of a number of others that have been equally satisfied. You will not go wrong with Plumb Xpress I assure you…

reviews.author: Jessica DeMarco
reviews.text:
I was so pleased with their service, I came straight back to work and am writing this review! We woke up to a leak in our thermal expansion tank this morning. My husband was too busy at work to meet them and I had just started a new job!  We explained this to Adam and he was very willing to work with us, since I could not commit to the normal 2 hour time frame. They were there when they said they would be (actually earlier!) and was able to replace our expansion tank in a very short amount of time...getting me back to work within an hour. They were very knowledgeable and respectful, and I would definitely give them my business again...but hopefully I will not have too.
Best,
A very happy customer!

reviews.author: melissa herrin
reviews.text:
I had another emergency plumbing issue come up during the cold winter storm - my pipes froze and burst. I used Plumb Xpress Plumbing once before so I didn't hesitate to call them again. They had a service tech here within 60 minutes to shut my water off. They were able to diagnose my problem and make the repairs and get my family and I running water that night. They also went over our plumbing system and explained to me how to shut water off to house and outside spicketts.

Thank you for once again being there fast for our family and getting our problem taken care of so quickly.

reviews.author: Shawn Bartlett
reviews.text: I cannot recommend these guys enough. They were amazing. I had an emergency sewer issue. I'll save you the details... It was bad. Of course the three emergency 24/7 plumbers we had on the fridge had no one available. Then we found Plumb Xpress. They came out that night (Saturday) and worked through the weekend to get us back up and running. My house was built in the 40's and had the original orangeburg lines. They were able to offer a reasonable price. Really amazing. Thank you Donnie, Rick and Wayne. You've made a life long customer.

reviews.author: Michelle Abbott
reviews.text: HUGE shout out to Plumb Xpress for sending out Joey so fast!! We were having surges in water pressure and was so worried my appliances were going to be damaged from it!!!! We tried replacing the pressure reducing valve and still no change! Joey made sure everything was installed correctly and our pressure gauge was hooked up in the correct spot and determined our regulator was faulty and explained what happens sometimes with them! Super awesome people to work with!! Thank you soooo much!!

reviews.author: Nathan Miller
reviews.text: Called on Wednesday and the sent a guy out too look at a leak we had been having. He took photos of what I told what all we wanted replaced and  said they would email me an invoice for how much it would be, and they could be back tomorrow to fix it . Never recieved the invoice so I called the next afternoon and left a message trying to see if they had the wrong email or something. Today is friday and I still have not heard anything back from them.

reviews.author: Philip Barger
reviews.text:
Donnie, and his crew did a complete re-pipe of my Brookstone home last July, and got rid of all the leaky copper and replaced it with a high-end cross-link polymer plumbing. They did an excellent job got in and out, create a minimal amount of mess and kept me informed on every step what was being done. If you gotta have this kind of job done, these are
the people to see.

reviews.author: Austin Williams
reviews.text:
Had a leak coming from upstairs bathroom. Called and Donnie said he bet it was the tub drain that was the problem. He arrived when he said he would and fixed the problem. The price he said over the phone is what he charged even after he had to work on the tub spout also. I would recommend Plumb Xprees. If I have another problem this is who I will call.

Jim Williams

synthesis.summary: They show up fast for emergencies and do solid work, but you might struggle to reach them by phone if you need to reschedule or follow up.
strengths: Emergency response: 5 reviewers specifically mention same-day or night service during urgent situations (frozen pipes, sewer backups, weekend emergencies)
Whole-house repipe expertise: 4 reviewers praise large-scale copper pipe replacement jobs with minimal wall damage and cleanup
Fair pricing: 6 reviewers mention reasonable costs, upfront quotes with no hidden charges, and prices lower than franchise competitors
weaknesses: Communication gaps: 3 reviewers (2017, 2018, 2015) report unanswered voicemails, missed appointments, and failure to send promised invoices or follow up—creating multi-day delays
Incomplete work on service calls: 1 reviewer reports a drain clearing that only addressed the front of the line, leaving the main clog, requiring a second plumber to finish the job correctly
redFlags: Responsiveness failures: 3 of 29 Google reviewers report no callback/voicemail response over 2-4 days, missed scheduled appointments, and failure to send quotes—roughly 10% failure rate on follow-up communication
Incomplete service delivery: 1 reviewer reports drain clearing that was inadequate (only 2 minutes of work on a 50-foot line), requiring another plumber to finish the job
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviewers confirm same-day or rapid response (within 60 minutes, Saturday night availability, emergency sewer work over weekends). Strong pattern of availability during crises, though follow-up communication is unreliable.

plumbers.name: GUSTAFSON PLUMBERS
plumbers.address: 1035 Millbury St, Worcester, MA 01607, USA

reviews.author: Leslie Seymour
reviews.text:
The plumbers texted and arrived early.  They were cheerful and helpful.  They installed our new garbage disposal, but went further to replace the piping to minimize spots likely to clog. They pointed out unusual features of the new unit.  Also he showed us the gunk in the old pipes and recommended flushing much longer after grinding to prevent future clogs.  They swept up thoroughly after they finished.

We were immediately put at ease by their cheerfulness and competence.  They worked quickly and efficiently.

We are very happy with Gustafson and have used them multiple times over the last 10 years.

reviews.author: Brandon Fusaro
reviews.text: Gustafson replaced the water line from the street to my mother's home, and we couldn’t be more pleased with the experience. Their team was knowledgeable, professional, and truly stood behind the quality of their work. I highly recommend Gustafson for any water line replacement needs.

reviews.author: Dave D
reviews.text: I can’t recommend Gustafson enough. From start to finish, they were outstanding. I needed a sewer line repair, and Shayna went above and beyond to get us scheduled quickly. Bruce came out to provide a quote, which was more than fair. The crew—Drew, Sean, Connor, and Javaughn—were professional, punctual, and transparent throughout the entire process. They took the time to explain what they were doing every step of the way, which I really appreciated. I never once felt like I was getting the runaround. I’ll be using Gustafson for all my future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Michael Parker
reviews.text:
Drew & Joe came to clear the main drain in my condo. I was not home when they did the job, but my gf said both of them were professional, polite and helpful.
They did a great job and I highly recommend Gustafson Plumbers.

reviews.author: Kristine Jones
reviews.text: We have used Gustavson Plumbing for multiple projects and Derek went above and beyond for each service. We had a leaking toilet while our family house was for sale and he immediately took care of the issue- despite being very busy.He also repaired a  leak in the attic from a heating hy vent along with other items on our plumbing checklist for the sale. We very much appreciate the professionalism, skill and service we received for every service. Highly recommend!

synthesis.summary: Gustafson Plumbers appears to be a highly reliable company with excellent customer service and technical expertise. Multiple customers praise their professionalism, transparency, and ability to go above and beyond, with one long-term customer using them repeatedly over 10 years.
strengths: Excellent communication and transparency throughout projects
Goes above and beyond basic service requirements
Strong long-term customer relationships and repeat business
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews (31 total)
No recent reviews mentioning true emergency response times
synthesis.topQuote: From start to finish, they were outstanding. I needed a sewer line repair, and Shayna went above and beyond to get us scheduled quickly... They took the time to explain what they were doing every step of the way, which I really appreciated. I never once felt like I was getting the runaround.

plumbers.name: Aurora Plumber & Drainage Clean
plumbers.address: 1245 Bangs St, Aurora, IL 60505, USA

reviews.author: Logan Powell
reviews.text: Our water pressure dropped drastically throughout the house, making showers and washing dishes difficult. Their plumbing team came out and inspected the pipes. They cleaned buildup in the main lines, tested all faucets and restored the water pressure. It feels like we have a completely new system and using water in the house is much easier now. The technician was very friendly and professional.

reviews.author: Anthony Murphy
reviews.text: I noticed a small leak under the bathroom sink and the surrounding area was getting damp. The damaged pipe section was replaced, all connections were secured and the area was dried thoroughly. The leak is completely gone and I feel confident it won’t come back.

reviews.author: Jordan Johnson
reviews.text: A faucet handle had become stiff and difficult to operate. Aurora Plumbing serviced the internal mechanism and restored smooth movement. The technician ensured no leaks remained. The faucet now functions properly.

reviews.author: Lily Turner
reviews.text: My bathroom sink trap was leaking at the joint. Their crew replaced and sealed it properly. The repair was quick and solid. I’m very satisfied.

reviews.author: William Taylor
reviews.text: Shower head had uneven water pressure. A technician cleaned mineral buildup and replaced worn connectors. Flow is now consistent and steady. The system was tested carefully. I would rely on them for future work.

synthesis.summary: Aurora Plumber & Drainage Clean shows consistent quality workmanship with all positive reviews and offers 24-hour service for emergencies. However, with only 30 reviews and all being 5-star ratings, there's limited insight into how they handle complex problems or difficult situations.
weaknesses: Very limited review sample size
No insight into pricing or cost transparency
All reviews are for relatively simple repairs
synthesis.topQuote: It feels like we have a completely new system and using water in the house is much easier now. The technician was very friendly and professional.

plumbers.name: A T Weber Plumbing
plumbers.address: 1100 Lincoln Ave, Alameda, CA 94501, USA

reviews.author: Geo H.
reviews.text: These guys are great! We had them replace the heating and cooling system in our 100 year-old house. From the first estimate to the final inspection, they kept us informed, answered all of our questions and did a great job. I would recommend them to anyone.

reviews.author: Yaj ..
reviews.text: They've helped me with my sump pump, great service as they are professional and very responsive (especially with emailing).

reviews.author: Wild B.
reviews.text: Weber plumbing is the best. I used many plumbers over the years and couldn't recomend any of them until I tried Weber. They come over when they say they will, do what they said they would do and at the price they said they would. Who could ask for more. If you're looking for a reliable local plumbing contractor, call Weber, you'll be glad you did.

reviews.author: Geoff A.
reviews.text: They have major scheduling issues. They took our deposit in September, and it's nearly January with no work started. When they did finally schedule a start date they didn't show up, scheduled a start date a week later and again failed to show. If you value your time, find a different company.

reviews.author: Geoff Aoyagi
reviews.text: They have major scheduling issues. They took our deposit in September, and it's nearly January with no work started. When they did finally schedule a start date they didn't show up, scheduled a start date a week later and again failed to show. If you value your time, find a different company.

reviews.author: Drew J.
reviews.text:
Please take a moment to read this before you select A.T. Weber for your plumbing work. 

I recently hired A.T. Weber to install a recirculating pump for my hot water system in my house.  I reached out for an estimate because of the positive reviews on Yelp and I found the owner (who also did the on-site estimate) to be genuine, knowledgeable and friendly.  I accepted their bid, although slightly higher than two others, because of the Yelp reviews, confidence in the owner, and a desire to support a local business in Alameda.  Unfortunately I came to regret it.

The plumber who performed the work was punctual and also friendly, although he was a bit confused by the specific work I requested.  He didn't know exactly how to install the aquastat I was using to moderate activation of the pump and needed an electrician to come out a few days later to finish the work.  

The real problem was that while installing the piping for the pump the plumber unknowingly loosened a nut connecting the main gas line to the hot water heater, causing a gas leak in my (unventilated) garage.   So when I came down there early the next morning to leave the house with my four year old son there was an extremely strong odor of built up gas.  After evacuating my wife, son and newborn daughter out of the house I first tried the main office, leaving an urgent message that was never returned.  Luckily I also happened to have the plumber's cell phone as he had previously called me for directions.  Thankfully he called back after an urgent voicemail and text telling him to come out immediately because I was about to call 911.   Yes, I know, I should have just immediately called 911. 

Did he fix the problem quickly?  Yes.  Am I happy that he literally almost killed my family? No.   This was a built up leak in an unventilated area over the course of about 18 hours - the leak odor was very strong.

Look, I understand that mistakes happen.  Even really horrendous mistakes that could jeopardize my family's safety.  But the fact that they never even called me back after I left that message with their office was unacceptable.  In fact, the next time I heard from them was when I got an email from the office manager with a bill for the work a few weeks later with no acknowledgement of what had happened.  After I replied expressing my displeasure, the manager called me and apologized, saying they had lost some voicemails...  Even if that is true a simple apology is not even close to enough.  Maybe others feel differently but my expectation is that they do more than say "sorry" for a situation like that.  Needless to say, I don't believe I got the service I just received a bill for.

reviews.author: Drew Jacobs
reviews.text:
