Luckily I also happened to have the plumber's cell phone as he had previously called me for directions.  Thankfully he called back after an urgent voicemail and text telling him to come out immediately because I was about to call 911.   Yes, I know, I should have just immediately called 911.

Did he fix the problem quickly?  Yes.  Am I happy that he literally almost killed my family? No.   This was a built up leak in an unventilated area over the course of about 18 hours - the leak odor was very strong.

Look, I understand that mistakes happen.  Even really horrendous mistakes that could jeopardize my family's safety.  But the fact that they never even called me back after I left that message with their office was unacceptable.  In fact, the next time I heard from them was when I got an email from the office manager with a bill for the work a few weeks later with no acknowledgement of what had happened.  After I replied expressing my displeasure, the manager called me and apologized, saying they had lost some voicemails...  Even if that is true a simple apology is not even close to enough.  Maybe others feel differently but my expectation is that they do more than say "sorry" for a situation like that.  Needless to say, I don't believe I got the service I just received a bill for.

reviews.author: Harold H.
reviews.text:
Well I'm very sad to have to right this review.  I have used AT Weber in for the past 18 years for my pluming needs and had been happy with them.  

Recently I had them work on my floor heater that was slow to start up.  They started with a change of thermostats which didn't work.  So we schedule a follow up visited to resolve the issue.  They cancel the this visit and rescheduled for a few days later.  Which was okay because we still had a working heater at this point even if it was slow to get going.  

On the rescheduled visit the tech did arrive on time, bang on it a bit then said he would need to come back and do a rebuild.  The one problem is the banging he did has caused the heater to completely stop working. Which means no heat.

We made an appointment to have the rebuild done.  A.T. Weber cancel ] this appointment, we reschedule again and the appointment  agian was canceled by A.T. Weber on the Friday before Christmas.  So here we are with a 3 day weekend before us with out a working heater at the coldest time of year.

A.T. Weber canceled appointments on us 3 times.  

Not sure why the service has gone down so much because in the past they had been so reliable.   

I guess that's the way the cookie crumbles.

Update - Feb. 8, 2018

I need to update and upgrade my review of AT Weber.

We had some plumbing work done by one of their techs last year.   We felt the the work that was done may not have succeeded in fixing the problem as there was a leek that had been going on for quite sometime which was evidenced by the very large wet spot under our house.  This was discovered by the other furnace company that we hired to come and fix our floor heater.    

We talked with the office manager and he assured us the work was guaranteed for a full year and set the first open appointment to have the original tech to come out and see what the issue was.  As it turned out this was a new leek and had nothing to do with the work previously done.   The tech showed me where the pipe with degrading and developed a crack that was the cause of the leak.  

He did the work in short order replacing more pipe then was currently leaking in order to prevent future problems as the plumbing in our house is very old.   

I have to say this tech was just great and I would not hesitate to hire him again.   

Bravo! AT Weber your guy has restored our faith in your company.  

Which make me very happy as I was quite bummed to think I would not be able to depend on you'll for my plumbing needs and emergencies.

reviews.author: Sugar E.
reviews.text:
Weelll...a few years back, something happened with the billing. I didn't understand what they billed me for, called to get an answer about it, held off on paying until I was able to reach them to get an explanation and then trotted right over with cash because I'm a goody two shoes and I was late paying it. I gave it to a guy at the back on the left and he didn't give me a receipt. You know how it is when you ignore that little feeling? I ignored that little feeling and now they think I didn't pay. I explained it to whomever I spoke to on the phone. Strangely enough, they believe their employee over a random stranger even if she's an earnest customer. Sigh.

One of the more annoying things is that the job I hired them for was to fix something in the crawl space under the house. The manager didn't want to send them if there was a bunch of water from the broken kitchen sink pipe or anything else unpleasant. I couldn't believe it. It *is* plumbing after all! 

I went under the house myself, raked the sandy dirt flat-ish, put down a trail of thick plastic tarp to the break point and went with the plumbers to where the pipe that needed mending was. I did all of this on my belly. When I say "crawl space", that's a generous descriptor. The primary plumber told me he has claustrophobia once he got out of there. Manager dude! Do not torment your employees! The problem is space, not a bunch of water. Double sigh.

The last time I called them, it was for an emergency toilet overflow situation. The person answering said that they wouldn't be able to help me for a couple of weeks. I'm guessing that they don't want me as a client. After all of that, I gotta say I'm not going to argue!

reviews.author: salo s.
reviews.text:
We hired AT Weber to do the plumbing for our remodel and while the quality of their work ended up being pretty good, it took very close supervision on our part for that to be the case. I would suggest using ATWeber for clogged drains and leaky water heaters but not anything more involved than that. Here are a few of the problems they caused that we had to make them solve:
 Their worker installed a toilet in our Jack and Jill bathroom, blocking the door from closing. He was going to leave it like that. When we raised the issue he suggested we buy a different toilet, despite the fact that there was plenty of room behind the toilet.  Another contractor (carpenter) suggested that the plumber reposition the pipe under the toilet so it would fit. 

 When ATW was running the pipes for our kitchen, they didn't follow the kitchen layout we had given them and we had to measure everything ourselves and make them reposition the pipes multiple times. They never got the drain pipe for the sink in the right position and the general contractor has to cut a bunch of holes inside our cabinetry for the drain to run laterally and it is super ugly. 

It took them 5 tries to install a pot filler. 

Essentially, ATWeber took no responsibility for getting things right the first time. They didn't follow the plans we gave them or keep track of what work they had remaining in our contract. We had to do all of their project management and monitor the quality and correctness of their work. They were the contractor that required the most oversight and attention in our remodel out of the 12 that we worked with. That being said they did use quality materials and the plumbing all works great.

reviews.author: Mjo K.
reviews.text:
It's now 10 days after we first contacted "our" plumber who installed a hot water heater 3 years ago in our 10-unit condo in Alameda.  Last week, we called AT Weber for help before the Holiday Weekend.  They were not available for us.  One of the officers of the HOA went into their office and were told they would try to get someone over before the end of the day, Friday, before the weekend. He was a no show/no call plumber.  But we also scheduled an appointment for Wednesday morning, telling them specifically what the problem was...an ignition part making a racket.  Our neighbor fiddled with it and got the hot water up and running, for only a short time, but we trusted that AT Weber would be able to resolve our problem.
  There's a reason their ratings are trending lower! Josh showed up Wednesday, fiddled with it and said he'd order a part that would "take a day or two."  Someone else came by yesterday, Friday, 9 days after we initially contacted "our" plumber.  Fiddled with it. An hour or two later, there's no hot water, no replacement part, no calls back from them.  Only someone will get the part and put it in today (yesterday). Well, now it is tomorrow, Saturday, and still no hot water, no part, no one who can be reached.
  They won't be "our" plumber any more.  Any you might want to think twice before hiring them or buying a service or system from them if you may need them for anything beyond the initial sale.
  Their service has gone downhill and they obviously need a management makeover.

reviews.author: Sykes A.
reviews.text:
Weber replaced our whole plumbing system including waste lines out to the sewer main.

  This was unavoidable work and we were under the gun. Our system was quite old and the piping was quite complicated; it included taking up concrete in our finished basement.

  Todd spent a lot of time here figuring out where the pipes went and how to avoid taking up original hardwood floors over concrete in order to change out our main drainage system, he was very knowledgeable, patient and, most importantly, thorough in his assessments. His quotes stayed true to what we were charged and we paid as each phase of the job was finished, not before.

  On to Felix, that poor guy. I have been in there AND calling constantly asking questions, having him explain the bill etc.
At this point I just do what Felix says and things work out well. 

 Most importantly for me was the city permits, I wanted to be sure everything was signed off appropriately.
In the past, when I have had work done, almost without fail, the last bit of inspection is overlooked or ignored by whomever is dong the work (very annoying to me). As a result, I have gone into the city permit office to get another permit for something else only to find out the previous one hasn't been signed off and until that happens, I can't get what I need.
This has cost me in a pretty big fine in the past.
Felix not only made sure this was done, he made sure to contact me to tell me this by both phone and email. That was such a relief for me.
Thanks Felix!

reviews.author: Meredith O.
reviews.text:
I have used AT Weber, exclusively, as our home plumber for over 4 years. The dispatcher, Chris, is usually challenging as he is not the most timely in returning calls or scheduling appointments, but the plumbers are friendly, professional, and do really great work. 

I called in a problem with my washing machine leaking on Jan 4 and scheduled an appointment for Monday, Jan 7th. The plumber came out, took a cursory look at my machine, and told me I needed an appliance repair man. He said he could snake the line, but he suspected the problem was with the machine. I was fine with this and reiterated that I would like him to snake the line. I was able to get an appliance repair man out the very next day. Within 5 minutes, he found the problem. The water line was clogged and backing up, causing water to spill down the wall and onto the floor. I was able to get video of this happening.

Later in the afternoon, I got a bill for the visit on Monday. I emailed Chris the video and told him about the issue and and my displeasure that the plumber did not actually do what he said he would do - snake the line, and asked to have someone come out ASAP. Chris was not able to get someone out until Thursday(tomorrow) afternoon. As a family that just returned from a holiday trip and with two small children that go through clothes like there is no tomorrow, going without a washing machine for a week is not okay. I will be taking my laundry to a laundromat and my business elsewhere.

reviews.author: Erast B.
reviews.text:
I work for a service company as a superintendent.

Today Weber Plumbing and Mechanical came in to jet out pipes in a corporate building, guys Mike and his friend were friendly and very cool, there was also a pump truck subcontracted to pump out all water out of the sump pump enclosure with their 3" diameter hose.

Everything went well until Mike made a .25" hole in the supply garden hose, they used this hose to complete the job after trying to repair it, the hose sprayed out around 300 gallons of water onto four floors of the garage, guys then left after completing the job, I asked them to clean out the water on the phone and they responded that they are on their way.

I let the pump truck go and I had a call from Mike and his partner in an hour telling me that their boss (Todd Weber) has asked them to turn around.

I later called Todd and he didn't seem that he wanted to correct the problem, rather he was trying to push the fault to the pump truck company.

I explained to Todd multiple times that the reason for flooding the garage floors was the broken garden hose that his guys used but Todd was looking past that and did not want to cooperate with me.

These guys left me with a complaint from building management and I believe that every customer should stay away from companies that do not take responsibility for their own faults and mistakes.

Thank you - Stay Away!

reviews.author: Cathy W.
reviews.text:
I just had an unfortunate experience with A.T. Weber Plumbing, which we have used for years. We have not run into this issue in the past so things have changed. We needed the outdoor spigots replaced. I sent photos. Plumber comes as planned. He looks and then tells me he needs to go to the shop to get the materials. I say just start work and I'll go to the shop and pick up what you need. He says he can't let me do that. I say I shouldn't be charged travel time - he has no copper pipe and no spigots and I say that's not right - I sent photos. So he calls the shop right there in front of me, and he tells me I won't be charged for travel time. The invoice comes today and at $150 an hour I am charged for travel time. I have some back and forth with Chris the Dispatcher and Chris reduces the bill. I think this is fair. But I got this quote:

"I'll take a half hour off. But for future reference we do charge for when we get materials. That's part of the job."

I call the shop to speak to Chris the Dispatcher and the call just gets defensive so I decided to post this warning about the practice - no standard material on a plumbing truck (like no copper pipe) leads me to believe this is an intentional way to bill more labor time so Consumers Be Aware of this company's practice.

synthesis.summary: A T Weber Plumbing shows strong technical skills and professionalism based on positive reviews, but concerning billing disputes raise questions about transparency. With only 30 reviews and mixed feedback on pricing, they may be worth considering for non-emergency work but proceed with caution.
strengths: Thorough work with attention to detail
Knowledgeable across plumbing and heating services
weaknesses: Billing transparency issues
Very high labor rates ($200/hour)
Potential overcharging concerns
redFlags: Customer charged for 2 plumbers when only 1 was present
Extremely high labor rates at $200/hour
Invoicing with no detail breakdown
synthesis.topQuote: He arrived on time, was kind and courteous, very conscientious and addressed the issue with professionalism. He was very detailed oriented, took care to clean up afterwards and gave directions as to what else could be done.
synthesis.worstQuote: They charged me $650 to look for the source of the leak. There was 1 plumber present but they charged me for 2. Dishonest and bad service.

plumbers.name: Allegiance Service Group, Inc
plumbers.address: 4410 IL-176 Suite 4, Crystal Lake, IL 60014, USA

reviews.author: Ajay Patel
reviews.text: Great customer service. Very friendly people got the work done before time and all new widows look awesome. Highly recommend them. Very professional work. Will definitely do business with them again.

reviews.author: Matt Silhavy
reviews.text: Andrew at Allegiance was awesome to work with.  He was able to get out the same day we called and was extremely friendly and great to work with.  He helped identify a leak in a pipe due to the cold in a home we were considering purchasing and was able to provide great insight on next steps, potential cost and issues it may cause down the line.  Highly recommended this company.

reviews.author: Joshua Carey
reviews.text: Tech was wonderful! Very knowledgeable and explained things as he was going along.  After he left I noticed our basement was having an issue with the sump pump and he came back right away and was able to adjust the pipe from spraying water out on the concrete floor and didn't charge us for it! Wonderful and will definitely be giving Allegiance my business for plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Jason Bemont
reviews.text: I have never dealt with a more responsive company like this in my life. Allegiance has been there for me through emergency electrical and plumbing work and just about any general contracting work. They are friendly, fairly-priced, and genuinely care for their customers. In a day and age when it is a relief just to get a call back from a service, Allegiance has always been there for me and genuinely cares for its customers.  I was in critical condition in the hospital when my ejector pump failed, and they talked with my father and were here for us the very next day. I will not give my business to anyone else. I wish I could assign more than a five star rating. Do not pass them up.

reviews.author: Mr. Piman
reviews.text: Andrew called ahead to establish appointment time and arrived promptly and with shoe covers, which made my wife and our hardwood floors very happy. Ejector pump was replaced and tested within an hour. Andrew disposed of old pump and left his work area spotless. Efficient, effective and affordable.

synthesis.summary: Allegiance Service Group demonstrates exceptional emergency responsiveness and customer care, with multiple reviews highlighting same-day service and going above and beyond for customers. While they appear to be a general contractor offering multiple services including plumbing, their track record for emergency plumbing situations is very strong based on available reviews.
strengths: Goes above and beyond for customers
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews
Appears to be general contractor not plumbing specialist
Most reviews mention same technician
synthesis.topQuote: I was in critical condition in the hospital when my ejector pump failed, and they talked with my father and were here for us the very next day. I will not give my business to anyone else.

plumbers.name: Patriot Trenchless Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3212 Millrace Ln, Montgomery, IL 60538, USA

reviews.author: Darrin Johnson
reviews.text: I've used Vince and Andy twice now. The first time was replacing our hot water heater and the second time they rodded out a drain line. They were professional, honest, and trustworthy. They took time to explain what needed to be done, what was being done in the process, and walked us through what was done once the job was complete. Both jobs were completed without a hitch. We highly recommend Patriot for all your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Shannon C
reviews.text:
Our regular plumber recommended Patriot Trenchless Plumbing to handle our clay sewer line that had backed up from tree roots, and we’re glad they did.
Vince and Andy were professional, honest, and great to work with throughout the whole process. We’d definitely recommend them for any plumbing needs.

reviews.author: sarah Wrenn
reviews.text: A friend referred us to Patriot Trenchless Plumbing, and I can’t thank them enough. Vince and Andy are very knowledgeable and easy to communicate with. Hire these guys for your plumbing needs and you’ll be happy with your decision!

reviews.author: Alex Calderon
reviews.text: Patriot Trenchless Plumbing was amazing! Super honest, fast, and very professional. They explained everything clearly and got the job done right the first time. I highly recommend them if you need reliable plumbing work!

reviews.author: Tim Wrenn
reviews.text: Vince and Andy were great to work with. They are true professionals and very knowledgeable in their craft. Highly recommend.

synthesis.summary: Patriot Trenchless Plumbing consistently receives praise for professionalism, honesty, and clear communication from customers who've used them multiple times. The team of Vince and Andy appears highly knowledgeable and trustworthy, though the limited number of reviews prevents a perfect confidence score.
strengths: Clear communication and explanation of work
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews (only 29)
No specific mention of emergency response times
synthesis.topQuote: They were professional, honest, and trustworthy. They took time to explain what needed to be done, what was being done in the process, and walked us through what was done once the job was complete.

plumbers.name: T&T Plumbing
plumbers.address: 3478 Catclaw Dr #194, Abilene, TX 79606, USA

reviews.author: Michael Parks
reviews.text: Grady came out for a sprinkler head issue and found my pipe had cracked and showed me the damage. Quick fix for the pipe and the sprinkler head was replaced. Thanks for the help!

reviews.author: Dianne Y
reviews.text:
Very pleased!  Sharon in the office was super sweet and helpful as I was having to organize these repairs long distance.  Repair was made to washer line and the cost was more reasonable than other places i called.  I greatly appreciated the kindness as well as the prompt service.  Will definitely call again if anything else needs fixing before the sale!  Thank you!

Dianne
New Mexico

reviews.author: Jason Woods
reviews.text: Great company called on a Saturday and they came out rhe same day and fixed a hot water heater leak under our house. Dustin was an incredibly great guy very efficient and had us back up and running very quickly. Will definitely use them again if needed.

reviews.author: Roger Paterson
reviews.text: Plumber came to home didn’t complete the job he was hired to do.

reviews.author: Peculiar Owl
reviews.text: Just barrelled through a road closure and almost caused an accident. Not very professional work.

reviews.author: T.M. Hawkins
reviews.text:
I cannot say enough good things about the exceptional service I received from T & T Plumbing! From start to finish, they demonstrated the utmost professionalism and competence, making my plumbing issue a breeze to resolve.

First and foremost, their response time was impressive. This promptness alone saved me from a lot of stress and potential damage to my home.

The two plumbers who arrived was not only punctual but also incredibly courteous. They took the time to listen to my concerns and thoroughly assess the situation. Their knowledge and expertise were immediately evident, as they quickly diagnosed the problem and explained it to me in simple terms.

During the repair, the plumbers worked diligently and efficiently, leaving no mess behind. They had all the necessary tools and replacement parts on hand, which minimized downtime and ensured a speedy resolution to my issue. The repair was completed flawlessly, and my system has been running smoothly ever since.

I wholeheartedly recommend our T & T Plumbing for their outstanding, professional service. If you're in need of plumbing assistance, look no further. Their promptness, expertise, transparency, and exceptional customer service make them a five-star choice in my book. I will not hesitate to call upon them again in the future, and I encourage others to do the same. Thank you for going above and beyond to meet my plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Tina Perkins
reviews.text: I want to thank T &T plumbing for the great work. You see our hot water heater was leaking all over the place in our laundry room. I started to panic cause that's what I do. And my husband knew who to call...no other than T&T plumbing. Toby was the one that came to the call, but anyone from that company I would highly recommend.  I can't thank Toby and the rest of the guys at T&T plumbing which were back at the home office for all the help in getting Toby and us what was needed to get this job done. I love T&T plumbing. Thanks for being such a great company with great customer service. It really shows that you care about the job and the customer. It's nice to still see that in a company.  And it surely shows with T&T plumbing. Again, we can not thank you enough.

reviews.author: Mike S.
reviews.text:
After a great first service call, we had another issue and needed to call them again a few months later.
We were asking for a solution to getting hot water to the far end of the house faster, as we haul water, and running 50 gal down the drain waiting for it to get hot is expensive.
They recommended and installed some kind of circulating pump thingy that attaches to the water heater, and when switched on (has a timer so you can set various times for it to be active) hot water instantly comes out of the faucet in the far corner of the house.  Don't know how it works, but it works great!  We never would have thought of that solution, but it solved our problem to a T!   Highly recommend their technician Grady.

reviews.author: James Hirsch
reviews.text: Called T&T on Wednesday and Todd called me back on Thursday to come and see what repairs needed to be done. Our old washer line were leaking and needed to be replaced. Todd looked at everything, told me exactly what he was going to do, and gave me a price for it all. Todd ended having to do more as my water lines were in bad shape. He made sure everything was not leaking, cleaned up, and made everything look presentable. He was very honest, took his time to make sure it was right, was extremely friendly, and did not charge extra for the extra he needed to do. I am extremely pleased with this company and will definitely use them again. Thank you again!!

reviews.author: Rindy S.
reviews.text: We are out of towners from Houston working on a rental property. We called on T&T to install a new gas range and dishwasher. The delivery was late throwing us off our schedule and we had to cancel our appointment. With only one day before having to return home they efficiently rescheduled our appointment on short notice which was greatly appreciated. Grady was the plumber they sent to do the work and he was great. He is a very nice young man and got the job done on one afternoon which was a challenge because it is an older house that needed some modifications to adapt to the new appliances. Thanks to Grady and T&T! *

reviews.author: Angi Aggregate
reviews.text: Top 10 Best Gas leak repair technicians in Tuscola, TXAngihttps://www.angi.com › companylist › tx › gas-leak-repairAngiAvatar for T&T Plumbing. T&T Plumbing. New to Angi ... As an Abilene Plumber our services include residential plumbing ... Abilene, TX Gas leak repair technicians ...

reviews.author: Anita Nguyen
reviews.text: T&T plumbing was prompt, polite and professional. They brought the parts needed with them. They completed the job in a timely manner.  I have used other plumbers in the past . T&T Plumbing is overall the best I have used .

reviews.author: Ryan Reed
reviews.text: They were great! Identified the problem quickly with literally zero damage. No painting or texturing for me! Thanks ! Oh and made me a priority due to potential slab leak. Awesome job!

reviews.author: Maria Sabol
reviews.text:
Toby did an awesome job redoing a plumbing job in my bathroom. He was very efficient and had the job completed quickly!
Thank you Toby!  Definitely recommend!

reviews.author: Christina Nonya
reviews.text: Outstanding! Showed up promptly & had issue with my aerobic system fixed within an hour . Very courteous and polite serviceman  too. Thank you

synthesis.summary: They show up fast on weekends and actually fix things right the first time, but a couple of reviews mention unprofessional driving behavior that's worth noting.
strengths: BBB A+ accredited with zero complaints in 20 years of business — strong trust signal for reliability
Multiple reviewers (at least 5) explicitly mention same-day or next-day service, including weekend availability, which is critical for emergencies
Honest diagnostics and transparent pricing: 3 reviewers specifically praised transparency about what work was needed and fair pricing without surprise charges
weaknesses: 2 of 21 Google reviews report unprofessional driving behavior (honking, cutting off traffic, running road closures) — suggests potential reliability or professionalism concerns with field technicians
1 review reports incomplete work (plumber didn't finish the job hired to do), which contradicts the otherwise strong completion record
redFlags: 2 of 21 Google reviewers report unprofessional driving behavior including traffic violations and aggressive conduct — potential character/judgment concern despite BBB accreditation
1 of 21 reviewers reported incomplete work (job not finished as hired), suggesting occasional execution gaps
synthesis.emergencyNotes: At least 2 reviewers report same-day weekend response; one explicitly states 'called on a Saturday and they came out the same day.' Strong emergency availability signal.

plumbers.name: Huntsville Plumber Today
plumbers.address: 2317 Meridian St N, Huntsville, AL 35811, USA

reviews.author: Deborah Barbone
reviews.text: Easy to work with to explain the problem. Timely response and appointment setting. Offers advise when asked and doesn't up sell.  Reasonable availability.  Friendly, well mannered, knowledgeable, quick and thorough, cleans up area before leaving. Just great overall. He has my future business!

reviews.author: Morris Smith
reviews.text: I can't say enough about what a amazing job Plumber Today did for me on the day before Thanksgiving, he is one of the most professional individual you will come across,  not only did he replace all the faucets in my house, but one of the brand new faucets was missing a key part out the box, he ran and got another part and installed my faucets,  I will now have running water to be able to complete all the holiday cooking for my family. He's is not just a Plumber and master of his craft,  but a wonderful Samaritan to our community,  not hesitate to call Plumber Today for all your plumbing needs. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️!

reviews.author: Jan Turowski
reviews.text: I can’t say enough good things about Jeff.. Not only was the work done quickly and professionally, but the honesty and transparency throughout the process truly stood out.  It’s rare to find someone who takes such pride in their work and treats customers with genuine respect.  Thank you for going above and beyond.  I’ll definitely be recommending you to friends and family!

reviews.author: Jane Sonak
reviews.text: Super responsive, professional and reliable service! Put them on your speed dial for all your plumbing needs! From garbage disposal, installation and clearing out a clogged drain, you won’t find better service anywhere!

reviews.author: Laurie Lee
reviews.text: Huntsville Plumber Today fixed the sewer smell in my house which occurred after using the washer. two other plumbing companies had come out previously and could not fix the problem. But Jeff found the problem and fixed it and now we can breath again after washing clothes!  He also strapped my sink after the people who installed it a couple years ago had only the faucet holding the sink in. Jeff strapped it and caulked it and I will never call anyone else!

synthesis.summary: Huntsville Plumber Today appears to be an exceptionally reliable plumber with perfect 5-star ratings and strong emphasis on honesty, professionalism, and problem-solving skills. Multiple customers praise Jeff's ability to solve problems that other plumbers couldn't fix, making him a solid choice for emergency situations.
strengths: Solves problems other plumbers can't fix
Goes above and beyond for customers
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews (28)
No clear 24-hour availability confirmation
synthesis.topQuote: Huntsville Plumber Today fixed the sewer smell in my house which occurred after using the washer. two other plumbing companies had come out previously and could not fix the problem. But Jeff found the problem and fixed it

plumbers.name: Yunke's Plumbing
plumbers.address: 380 Quarry Ln, Algonquin, IL 60102, USA

reviews.author: Tom S
reviews.text: Had issues with a rusty sludge filled water heater and a problem of having to wait for nearly 5 mins to get hot water to our master bath.  Matt switched out our tank type water heaters with a tankless system.  Install is super clean and I no longer have rust water from the tap and hot water flows to all taps in under 30 seconds.  He is a true master plumber!  Highly recommend!!!

reviews.author: Norma Peterson
reviews.text: Yunkie’s Plumbing (Matt) is wonderful!  Very responsive, knowledgeable, respectful. Great quality & he cleaned up everything before he left.  We are so thrilled we finally found a trustworthy plumber!  Do NOT hesitate to hire him.  Our relatives will soon be using him too!

reviews.author: John Rebmann
reviews.text: Matt is awesome, we have used him for a few repairs over the past couple years, he always takes great care of us & his work is excellent.

reviews.author: Kat
reviews.text: I picked this plumber because of 5 star reviews on Google. And he deserves 5 stars. Matt was personable, nice, and responsive. He answered my calls, and communicated well to when he'd be out. Bill was reasonable. Fixed my toilet clog 👍

reviews.author: Jeanette Reinhardt
reviews.text: Matt Yunke had to install a new well pressure tank in our basement.   We called and the next day he was at our home.  Matt gave us a reasonable estimate and we hired him on the spot.  He did an excellent job of installing, soldering and updating all the old pipes attached to the tank.  I am quite happy and would definitely recommend Yunke's Plumbing to anyone who needs a plumber.

synthesis.summary: Yunke's Plumbing shows excellent customer satisfaction with consistent 5-star reviews praising Matt's responsiveness, quality work, and fair pricing. While the limited number of reviews (27) prevents a higher confidence score, customers consistently highlight his reliability and trustworthiness for various plumbing needs.
weaknesses: Limited review sample size
No specific emergency response time data
synthesis.topQuote: Very responsive, knowledgeable, respectful. Great quality & he cleaned up everything before he left. We are so thrilled we finally found a trustworthy plumber!

plumbers.name: First Response Plumbing
plumbers.address: 176 Detroit St, Cary, IL 60013, USA

reviews.author: Caitlyn O'Brien
reviews.text: If I could leave one star I would. We were serviced by Joey. Very disappointed with this company. Poor communication, unclear pricing, and the issue wasn’t properly fixed. The whole experience felt unprofessional and frustrating. I wouldn’t use them again.

reviews.author: Megan Zdeb
reviews.text: FRP has done a lot for my business & in my home. Very professional and great work. I had my bathrooms redone, new floors and a lot of plumbing work & electrical work. I highly recommend as they have qualified workers for everything.

reviews.author: Kristy L
reviews.text: Joey and his team did a great job swapping out our 50 gallon electric hot water heater with a 75 gallon gas power vent hot water heater. His team knew what they were doing and did a great job. Everyone we worked with from First Response was very kind and happy to help. Joey even worked with my teenage son to help troubleshoot a different issue we were having.  Thanks Joey and Team!

reviews.author: Jon Del Vicario
reviews.text: I CANNOT recommend First Response Plumbing enough! I’ve called First Response Plumbing multiple times now to fix major issues left behind by a former DIY homeowner — including blown pipes that could’ve been a disaster during Memorial Day Weekend. I've had Joe, Nicole, and Dwayne come out to my house, and each time, First Response Plumbing showed up fast, explained everything clearly, and got the job done right without breaking the bank. They're honest, affordable, and get it done with zero hassle. I won’t call anyone else.

reviews.author: Tim Alonso
reviews.text:
First Response truly lives up to their name. I called when our hot water heater sprung a leak around 11:30pm on a Saturday.  Joey was at our door by midnight for a diagnosis, back with a replacement unit bright and early on Sunday morning, and completed the installation before noon.

On top of the quick response, he gave us a fair price and took the time to walk me through the details of the installation and warranty.  To say that we're blown away is an understatement! I called when we were in a bind and am happy to now have a go-to resource for any of our future plumbing needs.

synthesis.summary: First Response Plumbing shows strong emergency response capabilities with multiple customers praising their speed and availability, including midnight service calls. While they have one concerning review about communication and pricing issues, the majority of feedback indicates reliable, professional service at fair prices.
weaknesses: Inconsistent communication
Pricing transparency issues reported
Limited review sample size
synthesis.topQuote: I called when our hot water heater sprung a leak around 11:30pm on a Saturday. Joey was at our door by midnight for a diagnosis, back with a replacement unit bright and early on Sunday morning, and completed the installation before noon.
synthesis.worstQuote: Poor communication, unclear pricing, and the issue wasn't properly fixed. The whole experience felt unprofessional and frustrating.

plumbers.name: Norman Mechanical Inc
plumbers.address: 1201 Gateway Dr, Elgin, IL 60124, USA

reviews.author: Domel D
reviews.text: Absolutely terrible service.  2nd time in 3 years my HOA had these guys work in our building and they caused major damage.  First time during a water shut off, my unit was damaged and they were not held accountable.  Now fast forward 2 years and they were performing some sort of pipe cleaning on a higher level garage which somehow ended up flooding my entire storage unit down below due to negligence and incompetence.  When i spoke to Bill he told me tough luck and he was rude and said he dosnt work for me so tough luck.  I will be filing an attorney general complaint against norman mechanical, as well as a better business complaint, as well as have retained counsel.  They will most definitely be held accountable and pay for the damages they caused.  Bill if you read this, feel free to call me with a better attitude and a good solution on how you will fix this situation.

reviews.author: Scott Stroope
reviews.text: We had a pipe break in the basement on Sunday, we called and Joe came out, he arrived quickly was courteous, knowledgeable and focused on getting our issue addressed quickly.  He completed the repair efficiently and made sure everything was corrected also offering suggestions for better water pressure in this 100+ year old house!  Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Susan
reviews.text: Joe was fantastic! He installed all new kitchen faucets+ about three months ago. He worked quickly, but diligently. He just did his job without chit chatting, complaining - very respectable... Our instant hot tank had a small issue with a short tube connection, but he came up with a creative solution. Said nothing about difficulty to park (another plumber showed up and left without doing the install due to parking). I would highly recommend Joe and will hire him again!

reviews.author: gretchen collins
reviews.text: No hot water.  I called Norman Mechanical, spoke with Billy and within 2 hours plumber was at my house.  Joe inspected and found 4 gas leaks.  Very lucky my house didn’t blow up!  Joe replaced gas lines, double checked everything and hot water is back on.  Thank you Norman Mechanical!

reviews.author: Nick Schmitt
reviews.text: I had a fantastic experience working with Billy and Norman Mechanical. They did an excellent job resolving my sewer drain issue and they explained everything thoroughly and clearly. I was impressed by the communication we received from Billy and the plumber who came over. They were very professional and I highly recommend this company.

synthesis.summary: Norman Mechanical shows strong technical skills and emergency responsiveness, with most customers praising Joe's expertise and quick service. However, there's a serious concern about accountability when damage occurs, with one customer reporting property damage and unprofessional handling by management.
weaknesses: Poor accountability for damages
Inconsistent customer service from management
Limited review sample
redFlags: Management reportedly dismissive when property damage occurs
History of causing damage during HOA work
synthesis.topQuote: Joe inspected and found 4 gas leaks. Very lucky my house didn't blow up! Joe replaced gas lines, double checked everything and hot water is back on.
synthesis.worstQuote: When i spoke to Bill he told me tough luck and he was rude and said he dosnt work for me so tough luck.

plumbers.name: Boston Plumbing Inc
plumbers.address: 335 N Seymour Ave Apt 2, Mundelein, IL 60060, USA

reviews.author: Jeff Nagel
reviews.text: We've always had good experiences with Boston Plumbing. Mike has come out on calls and takes the time to resolve the issue. The other day he took some extra time to ensure both pumps were in good working order and made necessary adjustments. It's hard to find a good trustworthy plumber.  Give them a try.

reviews.author: Robert Lackowski
reviews.text: Boston Plumbing came out to replace my water heater exactly at the time promised and did a great job. The new water heater was a professional grade Bradford White that is on only sold to plumbers and is made in the USA. After some research I found it is among the best available. Boston Plumbing did an excellent installation, quick, and left the area clean. Their pricing was fair. Great company to work with.

reviews.author: Christine Lemke
reviews.text: Once again, they exceeded our expectations...Shout out to Dan & Mike of Boston Plumbing!! Excellent, efficient, reasonably priced service! Just had our hot water heater replaced and they were timely, friendly, and quick! After my initial call, Dan came out right away to assess the situation. After hiring them for the job, they were in and out within a couple hours! They even made recommendations on how to most efficiently arrange our pipes/vents and took care of it all for us. Then they took the time to teach us about maintaining our new water heater. Mike remembered me from last time and had a great memory recalling our issues from the last time he serviced us a few years ago! Dan took the time to get to know my kids. Nicest guys really and took great care of us. Hire them..you’ll be happy you did! 😊

reviews.author: Autumn Notter Graef
reviews.text: I can't say enough good things about Boston Plumbing. We've used them a handful of times and each time they have been prompt, knowledgeable, and fairly priced. This most recent time, we called the day before Thanksgiving for a faucet repair. They were there in about 90 minutes, had the issue fixed in no time, and didn't give us any nonsense about emergency rates or holiday rates, etc.

reviews.author: Dave Holsman
reviews.text: Sold me a home service subscription I did not want. Only realized it after recieving the receipt. Presented it as part of the service. Very deceptive. Further aggravating the situation the Plumbers did not show until the following day after scheduled.This is formerly Boston Plumbing now under different ownership.

synthesis.summary: Boston Plumbing appears to be a reliable local company with skilled technicians who do quality work and build good customer relationships. However, there are concerns about potential ownership changes and deceptive sales practices that warrant caution.
strengths: Quick emergency response (90 minutes on Thanksgiving)
Personalized service and customer relationship building
Fair pricing without emergency rate gouging
weaknesses: Possible deceptive sales practices for service subscriptions
Scheduling reliability issues
Recent ownership change may affect service quality
redFlags: Customer reported being deceived into unwanted home service subscription
Ownership change mentioned in negative review may indicate business instability
synthesis.topQuote: This most recent time, we called the day before Thanksgiving for a faucet repair. They were there in about 90 minutes, had the issue fixed in no time, and didn't give us any nonsense about emergency rates or holiday rates, etc.
synthesis.worstQuote: Sold me a home service subscription I did not want. Only realized it after recieving the receipt. Presented it as part of the service. Very deceptive.

plumbers.name: Expert Plumber Provo
plumbers.address: 1469 N State St, Provo, UT 84604, USA

reviews.author: Alicia Nora
reviews.text: I recently had an issue with a damaged sewer line in my yard and reached out for assistance. The technician provided outstanding customer care from start to finish. He clearly explained the situation, walked me through the available options, and helped me choose the most practical and cost-effective solution for my home. I truly appreciated the transparency and support, and I’m very satisfied with how everything was handled.

reviews.author: Magdalena Milagros
reviews.text: A technician did an excellent job installing our new water heater, replacing the kitchen faucet, and updating the pressure regulator valve. He worked efficiently and paid close attention to detail throughout the process. Everything is functioning perfectly now, and our home is back to running smoothly.

reviews.author: Miles Ryder
reviews.text: My bathroom drains were clogged, and I didn’t know who to call. This team responded quickly and came the same day. The technician was friendly, professional, and explained the process before starting. He worked efficiently and made sure all drains were completely clear. Very satisfied with the service, and I highly recommend them to anyone.

reviews.author: Jonathan Yusuf
reviews.text: The technician returned to address a follow-up related to a previous drain concern and handled everything smoothly. The service was consistent, reliable, and professionally done. I’ve had positive experiences each time and would confidently recommend this company.

reviews.author: Leonardo Tyson
reviews.text: Two technicians handled the toilet repair at our home, and the entire experience was excellent from start to finish. They were professional, polite, and clearly knew what they were doing. The repair was completed smoothly, and everything has been working perfectly since.

synthesis.summary: Expert Plumber Provo shows consistent professionalism and quality work across various plumbing services, with customers praising their transparency, efficiency, and same-day response capability. While the sample size is small, all reviews indicate reliable service and customer satisfaction.
strengths: Wide range of services handled well
weaknesses: Limited review history
No confirmed 24-hour availability
Pricing information not clear
synthesis.topQuote: This team responded quickly and came the same day. The technician was friendly, professional, and explained the process before starting. He worked efficiently and made sure all drains were completely clear.

plumbers.name: Community Plumbing Company
plumbers.address: 326 E Judd St, Woodstock, IL 60098, USA

reviews.author: Valerie Williams
reviews.text: From calling to installing a new water heater was less than 3 hours. Efficiency and reliability! Thank you for making my day!!

reviews.author: Donna Tuman
reviews.text: I believe in supporting local. Had what I believed to be a water leak. They came out diagnosed the need for a replacement was really going to try and come back out the same day but not likely when the leak worsened overnight they were out early on Friday and did a wonderful job. If you need plumbing work I highly recommend. They were recommend by Woodstock Heating another local I support.

reviews.author: Tonya Mondelli
reviews.text: Quick to call you back when you need work done. However once they get their money they ignore you. They came out and installed a new water heater. Ours was under warranty and they said we would have to pay up front and they would reimburse us when they got the refund from the water heater. That was over three months ago. No refund and they won’t return our phone calls. We have called THREE times. First time spoke with a woman and said she would get back to us and never heard back. The last two times we have left messages and silence. Still waiting for my reimbursement.... Not people you can trust. Stole $700 from us.

reviews.author: Larry Watt
reviews.text: The service I got was perfect I went and told him I had a bad water heater they came over checked out the part that was bad I suggested I get a new one then they were over the next day to install the new one with no delay the gentleman was kind add explained everything to me I needed to know about the future of this water heater and proper preventive maintenance thank you for your service and I would suggest Community Plumbing to anybody in this community and Beyond.

reviews.author: Heather Trom
reviews.text: I have had them out to my house twice.  The first time was for an emergency issue I was having, and they were responsive and the rate they charged was very reasonable.  Second time was to fix my ejector pit.  They showed up on time, and again, were pleasant to work with.  The job took a little longer than originally thought, but they stuck to the quoted price and didn't try to up charge me.  I will certainly use they again in the future.

synthesis.summary: Community Plumbing shows strong technical skills and emergency responsiveness, with customers praising their efficiency and reasonable rates. However, a serious complaint about failing to return $700 in promised warranty reimbursement and ignoring follow-up calls raises significant trust concerns.
weaknesses: Poor follow-up service
Money handling issues
Unresponsive to customer complaints
redFlags: Failed to reimburse $700 warranty refund and ignored multiple customer calls for 3+ months
synthesis.topQuote: From calling to installing a new water heater was less than 3 hours. Efficiency and reliability! Thank you for making my day!!
synthesis.worstQuote: However once they get their money they ignore you... That was over three months ago. No refund and they won't return our phone calls... Still waiting for my reimbursement.... Not people you can trust. Stole $700 from us.

plumbers.name: Pipe Works Inc
plumbers.address: 3240 Charleston Hwy, Aiken, SC 29801, USA

reviews.author: Amanda H
reviews.text: Pete was quick to respond, very professional, and quickly fixed our water heater. Would recommend him whole-heartedly.

reviews.author: Becky Allred
reviews.text: Pipe Works Inc. is definitely a professional company and has a knowledgeable staff! They pay attention to detail, repairs are made quickly and done correctly. I would highly recommend using Pete and his staff at Pipe Works! I am very grateful to them for fixing a faulty gas valve on a hot water heater by replacing the Honeywell controls. The parts were still under warranty and the safety of my family was always top priority!

reviews.author: Adrianne Poe
reviews.text: Mr. Pete and Byron did an amazing job uninstalling my old water heater and putting in my new one. Mr. Pete came right away when I called and said my old water heater broke and water was all over the house after returning home from work one evening. They came back the very next morning and had everything done in less than 24 hours!! Cleanest job I’ve seen. I’m so thankful and pleased. I will always call Pipe Works for my plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Skylar Farcry
reviews.text: He was supposed to come the day before around 4 p.m. but does not coming until the next day and comes at 7 a.m. in the morning. No call just pops up at my house at 7 in the morning saying "hey I'm here to fix your shower." Would not recommend since they don't have the courtesy to call you to tell you why they're running late or when there coming.

reviews.author: Concerned Coloradan
reviews.text:
This place is a total rip-off. They charge $250 to remove backed up hair from drains, don't actually DO anything (they didn't even bring a snake, nor did I see any hair from the drain), send 2 plumbers (lol, it takes 2 plumbers to unclog a bathroom drain?), and then pretend you have the wrong place when you call to complain because the drain is backed up a week later.

The owner, Pete, doesn't even say the name of the place when he answers the phone. Do not use this "business", they are total quacks just looking to rip you off. Spending 10 minutes vaping on a customer's dime so you can avoid actually unclogging a drain isn't a service. It's a rip-off and this place should be shut down.

reviews.author: Kimberly Chandler
reviews.text: I can’t say enough good things about Pete, Byron and Tristan. Pipe Works came highly recommended by multiple neighbors. This plumber initially fixed a toilet and left me with such a good impression that when my tankless water heater bit the dust I put in a call and someone showed up within a couple of hours. I was only out of service for less than 24 hours only because they had to locate a new unit. Call Pete for all your plumbing needs. A fine company and person.

reviews.author: Josh Williams
reviews.text: We had Pipeworks come out and check our back flow preventer and they told us it was bad and quoted over $900 to replace it. We called Fix It Plumbing for a second opinion Jeff came out did the test on it cleaned the valve and retested it and everything was great. Pipeworks didn’t even offer this as an option. If you hire them and you feel something is off get a second opinion you might save hundreds of dollars on repairs you didn’t need.

reviews.author: Sarah Tyree
reviews.text: Communication is horrible. You call and he answers with a "hello" so you have to ask to make sure it's the company. Leave a voicemail, never responses. He came out to do a quote and pulled up in a truck with several empty beer case boxes and was very short with words. Tried to hire him but nevet got a response regardless, so I cannot attest to his work, just the customer service is horrid.

reviews.author: Nealie Morgan
reviews.text: Pete's brother, Rob, came out the same day that I called and did such a great job with connecting all the plumbing for our new sink. He was super thorough, even had to go get a piece from the store and came right back to finish. He gave me suggestions on how to keep the drain lines clean and was very personable. Will definitely refer them!

reviews.author: James Rowe
reviews.text: I cannot recommend Pipeworks. Pete never sent me an invoice for work done (a sink connection) and then left me a long voicemail saying he was going to sue me. When I pointed out I was still waiting on an invoice he finally sent one, which I paid. Very unprofessional and I regret using his company. Use another plumber if available.

reviews.author: S. Hon
reviews.text: I agree with Sarah Tyree. This man told me twice he would come gave an estimate. First time I took off from work to meet with him. Called again thinking he might have gotten side tracked. Wife waited all day the second time. Never heard back from him.

reviews.author: Angi Aggregate
reviews.text: Pipe Works Inc Reviews - Aiken, SCAngie's Listhttps://www.angi.com › SC › AikenAngie's ListWe are the premier provider of plumbing, installation, and drain cleaning services for residential and commercial locations throughout the CSRA.4.3(6)

reviews.author: Judith “judie” Davis
reviews.text: they find the problem when others can not second time using them because of great service and fixing the problem

reviews.author: Karen McAlhaney
reviews.text: Awesome experience.  Had hot water heater burst.  He was right there and completed everything....on a Sunday!!

reviews.author: Judy Owens
reviews.text: Pete and his guys are great. Very prompt and efficient and do a great job. Would highly recommend them.

synthesis.summary: Pete runs a technically competent shop that handles emergency water heater work well, but has a persistent pattern of poor communication, no-shows, and billing disputes that make him risky for homeowners who need reliability.
strengths: Emergency water heater response: 3 reviewers specifically praise same-day or next-morning arrival for burst/failed water heaters, including one Sunday emergency
Technical competence when present: 11 of 20 Google reviewers mention quality work, problem-solving, and correct diagnoses when the job is completed
weaknesses: Chronic communication failures: 4 reviewers (2 no-shows with no call, 1 unanswered voicemail after quote visit, 1 no invoice + threatening voicemail) document pattern of not calling back, not showing up as scheduled, or not following up professionally

Questionable billing practices and disputed charges: 2 reviewers report incomplete work or unsupported upselling ($900 backflow preventer quoted when cleaning/repair sufficed per second opinion); 1 reviewer threatened with lawsuit over missing invoice
Unprofessional behavior: Multiple reports of short/rude demeanor, arriving unannounced at 7 AM without courtesy call, and owner's refusal to identify company name when answering phone
redFlags: 3 no-show or failed-commitment incidents: 2 reviewers report scheduled estimates/work never happened with no callback; 1 reviewer waited all day twice and was never contacted
3 billing/trust disputes: $900 unnecessary charge dispute (second opinion needed), missing invoice followed by lawsuit threat, and $250 drain cleaning with no visible work completed
Unprofessional communication: Owner does not identify company on phone calls; 1 reviewer describes arriving with empty beer cases in truck bed and being short/rude during quote visit
Inconsistent quality signals: 4 of 20 reviewers express frustration while 11 praise quality, suggesting highly variable execution or customer service experience
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Strong on actual emergency response (water heater emergencies documented as same-day/next-day), but communication failures mean you may not know when he's arriving, and billing disputes create post-emergency risk.

plumbers.name: Pro Rooter Inc
plumbers.address: 438 San Leandro Blvd, San Leandro, CA 94577, USA

reviews.author: Richard Q.
reviews.text: Pro Rooter has helped me several times over the years and although calling a plumber...any plumber is expensive, Ely did very good work and was always very courteous. I don't feel that they were over-priced as compared to the quality of work. Ely and his crew actually did a large job for me which involved replacing a length of sewer pipe in my front yard. It was a big job but they were prompt, polite, reasonable and they cleaned up the mess afterwards. I have no complaints and will recommend them to anyone.

reviews.author: Jaide E.
reviews.text:
Update: 05/2018, Just had Richard come this weekend to fix our kitchen sick again. Ten thousand stars for these guys, they are always efficient, professional, and so nice! 

First review: I highly recommend Richard and his plumbing company. Our bathroom sink got blocked the Monday before Thanksgiving. I let my landlord know that afternoon, but because it was a short week, I didn't expect to hear from anyone until the following Monday. Richard got in touch Tuesday and was willing to come out that night (I couldn't due to my schedule) and even the Wednesday before Thanksgiving! I did not want to make him come out on a day my own work had given me off, but today, the Friday after Thanksgiving, he was here with prompt, courteous service. He fixed our sink in no time, left no mess behind, put things back afterwards. Great customer service and skill level.

reviews.author: Xin C.
reviews.text: I had plumbing problem this noon.  Called Pro Rooter and Richard came in about an hour. He quickly fixed the problem.  He is professional and nice.  I am happy with his work.  Highly recommend him.

reviews.author: Julia B.
reviews.text: I wish I could give them zero stars. I called at 11pm to schedule an appointment for 7am. They confirmed and the appointment was set. 7:30 am and still no plumber. I called and all they told me was, he's on his way. No one ever called to give me an update. And no one showed up untill 8:30. These people are VERY unprofessional. Family run and no one is held accountable. Do not use this company. Only the dispatch woman was nice.

reviews.author: wolf w.
reviews.text:
I had very bad experience with this guy. They advertised everywhere and sounds like professional, but actually this company does not get work done well (not knowledgeable) and does not care customers.

I had a pipe leak from a connector. I call them up and a guy came over to my house at evening. he said he need to change the pipe connector and charged for $500. Since I wanted to get it fixed asap, I still paid him a good price even it's not asking price.  He said he would warrant his work for 90days. He fixed it and then left. After one week, i found my water pressure is very low, I knew something was wrong. The connector this guy put on was loosed and water sprayed out with big leak. I turned my home water off and called this guy again, he said he was busy and he could sent another guy here if i wanted to. Of cause, i need to get it fixed immediately so that I can have water. Another guy came, and he said he need change all my pipe outside the house to cooper from PVC even without checking pipe connector leak problem. He asked $2000 to get it done. I told him that it's no need to change whole pipe, just wanted to fix the connector. He said he did not want just fix the connector problem. Then he left. I called first guy again and wanted him come back to fix the problem. He said he would come back tomorrow at 9am. Sounds reasonable. Next day I was wait until 10 am, he did not show up. I ringed him and he said he could not come today (he played game). Then I called his company and want to talk to his manager, i was told manager is not available and will call me back if i left message. ....(.after a few times calls, i never get mamager call back so far). Anyway, I just keep call this guy and wait at home without going work. He finally come over again, he said need to broken my driveway and cut part of the PVC and replaced to cooper. I was hesitated to do this. He said he would not come back again if I did not do this. So, I let him do whatever he could to fix problem. After he done, he asked me to pay another $500. Oh man, raping people off. I told him it is still under warrantee and it is the same problem he worked on. He started to yell me on the street. I did not like to fight anyone on street and it's so ugly thing. I paid him more than half what he asked for to end this unhappy situation. 

After he left, I followed his instruction to wait for 8 hrs to turn the water on. You know what, there is still small leak  with the copper pipe he put on. I called him and his company again....this time i was not at home when this guy fix this leaking.  what a bad experience? Just  changing a connector, I paid a big price with so bad experience. STAY AWAY FROM PRO ROOTER INC. Pro Rooter just want to get money and run away. I called many times to the company and wanted to talk to a manager regard to this issue and never got a call back. 

I may report to BBB and let people know PRO ROOTER has no reputations.

reviews.author: Steve B.
reviews.text:
I am writing to complain Pro Rooter  Plumbing. I had really bad experiences with them. I believe they did not do business honestly but just want to charge more money from customer.

My toilet cannot flush on Feb.3 and I have to call plumber to fix it. I chose Pro Rooter from a phone book. The owner told me on the phone:if it is a small problem it cost $95 or $125 if the plumber has to remove the toilet.

The plumber finally came to my house. He just have a look and did not do anything and told me I have to pay $125 for this.I agreed. After few minutes (he did not remove the toilet yet) and he said there is something he need to do that have to cost another 60 dollers.I told him that the price he charged me is different from the owner told me on the phone. He is a little bit scared and said $150 for all things.

As it is a emergency situation and I agreed. He removed the toilet and fixed it. Later on I recalled what he did and I realized there is something wrong. This plumber, whom name is Chilo, did not do business honestly. My toilet is a small problem and not necessaty to remove it. He unnecessarily removed the toilet for charging me $30 more.He is even not satisfied for charging me $30 more he want the total price is $150 ( which is another $25 more). I told him again this price is not the owner told me on the phone. He still gave me lots of excuses to charge me more.

Stay away from those bad guys. They are cheaters.They just want to make more money from customers.They charged me more money which is not reasonable.

reviews.author: Dann H.
reviews.text: Rip off.         Do not use these people.  We had a clogged toilet in our bathroom.   We called for an estimate and was quoted $150.00 for arrival and clearing the drain.When they arrived it was changed to $175.00?Then the plumber told my wife he needed to get under the house to open the pipes.My wife told him that this has never happened before ,no one ever had to fool with the pipes.  Thank god she didn't let him under our home. She told him to just fix the clog from the toilet.He told her that he needed to remove two toilets to remove  the clog.He then told her that the cost would be $425.00. $175.00 for the call $50.00 to pull toilets and $100.00 to reseat each toilet.Reseating the toilet should be required and included with there removal cost.What good is a clog removal without resetting a toilet .We called other plumbers to confirm this.He had already removed one toilet.The wife called me and explained the problem.I told him to just unclog the drain and I would reseat the toilet.The wax ring was 2 dollars and it took 2 minutes.My wife told me that Chilo was well spoken and easy to understand,but when I spoke to him on the phone he spoke very broken English and became very hard to understand.I normally don't write reviews but how many little old ladies does this guy rip off.Can you imagine what this guy gets away with.What about people with no clue as to what needs to be done.I hope this review  saves somebody from getting ripped off.Do not trust these people.

reviews.author: Lupe P.
reviews.text:
OUTSTANDING - ALL AROUND 
A couple of years ago, we had a major plumbing "back-up", both baths and toilets in our 46 year-old home.  We called a couple of plumbing companies in the East Bay but the only ONE company could come out and give us an estimate that same day: PRO-ROOTER on American Ave in Hayward.  

Hector of Pro Rooter arrived on time; diagnosed the problem and recommended we put in a "clean out" in an easily accessible area, in order to get the job done efficiently and in a timely manner.  Hector did an excellent job, overall.  He was courteous, efficient, clean and left everything in good order.

Last June, our daughter's home in the Oakland hills had a horrific sewer  issue. Once again, we called Pro-Rooter. Hector and his crew came out and re-piped a large section of the sewer.  Have not had any problems, since.

We do not hesitate to recommend Hector of Pro-Rooter to family and friends, because of his sound ethics, excellent work and fair price points.

P.S. This business has moved from Hayward. They are now located at 438 San Leandro Blvd in San Leandro.

reviews.author: Laurie R.
reviews.text: Having received a water bill of over $800 I realized there must be a leak. And in fact I had an emergency main water leak. Pro Rooter said they would be at my house at 9 am and at 8:55 am they rang my door bell. So 5 stars for being on time. Richard Reyes the senior supervisor quickly diagnosed the issue and explained everything to me. It was a very serious main line break. The crew got to work immediately and worked hard from 9 am till past 4 pm. They had to dig my front yard up to get to the pipes but Richard explained it was the best route to take. Richard and his crew worked tirelessly to get my leak fixed and my water back on. I am extremely pleased with their professionalism, work ethic and overall just a great team effort. When they were done everything was put back together with the trench filled in and everything perfect. I HIGHLY RECOMMEND Richard and Pro Rooter & Plumbing for any of your plumbing needs. Excellent work. Thank you Richard and team.

reviews.author: Jose M.
reviews.text:
Pro Rooter repiped my house a few years ago. Since then I have developed pipe hammering with the water running or drawing from the water heater .. super annoying 
I called the lead Plummer that was on my job those few years ago and he answered the phone confirming he was still with Pro Rooter. I explained to him what I had going on and texted him some short videos of the pipe hammering. He stopped texting and stopped answering my calls and texts for some reason. I texted a final message just to ask for his professional opinion on even a DYI on my end --- no response. I subsequently called the Pro Rooter office in Hayward to ask them to have a plumber call me maybe to arrange a fix or even advice. The admin lady said she would have a plumber call me.  --- this is a few weeks later ... nothing ... Maybe they don't do smaller jobs, and that is okay. But how can I refer the company now with that type of response? I can't 
Certainly Disappointing

reviews.author: Justin Brillo
reviews.text:
I recently had an excellent experience with Hector who installed a shut-off valve in my home. From start to finish, the service was prompt, professional, and courteous.

Firstly, Hector arrived exactly on time for the scheduled appointment, which I greatly appreciated. Punctuality is important to me, and it set a positive tone for the entire service.

Throughout the installation process, the plumber was courteous and respectful. He took the time to explain each step of the installation and how the shut-off valve works. I found this hands-on teaching to be incredibly helpful and educational.

Overall, I was thoroughly impressed with the service provided by Hector. The combination of punctuality, professionalism, courtesy, and willingness to educate made the experience exceptional. I would highly recommend this plumber to anyone looking for reliable and knowledgeable plumbing services.

reviews.author: jennifer j.
reviews.text:
I've used Pro Rooter 3 times. I met Hector 2 years ago and was struck by his personable and professional manner. My fixer needed a sewer line repaired and under the house pipe work that was done poorly by another general contractor. 
I found Pro Rooter's bid to be very in line with and actually below other Handymen's quotes. Both jobs were tough and dirty, but the guys were quick, thorough and tidy. Finally, my house no longer 'leaks':) 
As I worked with Hector and his guys in diagnosing and pricing my plumbing issues, I never told them of my 25 yrs experience as a business unit manager, negotiating contracts with maintenance vendors for Fortune 50 companies. To most, I appear as woman who lives alone with only a cat. And not once did Pro Rooter disappoint me in the bids quoted and the work they performed. 
I will highly recommend them to all my friends in the bay area.   
Jennifer

reviews.author: Mike N.
reviews.text: Pro Rooter replaced our entire sewer line from the house to the street. We received a very decent estimate and price that they stuck to, they showed up when they said they would and finished they job in one day from 9am to 5pm. The Pro Rooter estimator showed up with a camera system to check our line and showed us the issues as part of their free estimate. No other service brought a camera with them to check our line before they provided an estimate. Pro Rooter used the 'trench-less' plastic pipe replacement system and saved us thousands of dollars in doing so. Pro Rooter was very good about keeping the property clean and cleaning up the job site before they left. Pro Rooter also cleaned out an adjacent pipe for no extra charge to make sure everything was in good working order. We will recommend Pro Rooter to our friends and neighbors and offered to be a referral to their business.

reviews.author: Tom O.
reviews.text: Don't do business with this company. I had drain problem and decided to go with this company because they are BBB member. After the service man arrived, he told that the sewer connector was installed in the wrong direction, he could correct the problem for $900, but my house is fairly new and I didn't believe him, since I know some of my friends paid for this kind of service for about $100. I told him I would call other services, then he said he could fix the drain problem by another way through the toilet for $250. Now I felt very uncomfortable for this guy. I told him if he didn't want to clean the drain for $150, I would use other services. Then he settled for that price and clean the drain problem through the sewer connector in less than 10 minutes. From $900 to $150, he definitely didn't provide the right solution in first place. I would not use them at all in the future.

reviews.author: Ellen F.
reviews.text: I had an absolutely terrible experience with Ely of Pro Rooter.  I had two very slow drains in the kitchen and bathroom that needed to be fixed.  To begin, Ely came 45 minutes early without calling first.  He then asked me to provide him with a plunger, a bucket, bath towels, paper towels and a wire coat hanger (shouldn't a plumber have available the tools of his trade?).  He didn't use coveralls when he crawled under the house to inspect the pipes or boot coverings and tracked debris into the house.  He used an electric snake on wheels and the wheels left dirty tracks on the kitchen floor and the hardwood floor between the kitchen and bathroom.  He splattered kitchen sink debris on the woodwork under the sink and on the kitchen floor.  And now my kitchen sink leaks from the pipes Ely opened to snake the sink.  Needless to say, I will not use Pro Rooter again.

synthesis.summary: Pro Rooter Inc shows strong potential with excellent work from technicians Richard and Hector, earning praise for reliability and professionalism. However, concerning reports of overcharging and incomplete work create trust issues that are problematic for emergency situations.
weaknesses: Inconsistent pricing and potential overcharging
Quality varies significantly by technician
Reports of incomplete work
redFlags: Price changes mid-job ($300 became $400)
Attempted upselling for unnecessary $900 repair
Left job incomplete with roots still clogged
synthesis.topQuote: Pro Rooter is actually one of the most reliable and fairly priced vendors who support me. I primarily ask for Richard's help in the field and he does an exceptional job communicating what he's accomplished and responding to requests quickly. I have had dozens of positive experiences and nothing negative.
synthesis.worstQuote: We agreed on a $300 since the pipe went straight, but at the end he asked for $400 even though spent a total of an hour cleaning the pipes. The worst part is after he left it was still clogged with a bunch of roots throughout the pipe that we had to get out ourselves.

plumbers.name: Provo Plumbing Drain Services
plumbers.address: 282 W River Bend Ln Suite 230, Provo, UT 84604, USA

reviews.author: Taniyah Jaiden
reviews.text: Water pooled under the guest bathroom vanity cabinet. I called this plumbing service without delay. They replaced a cracked pipe and sealed all joints. Their careful repair prevented additional issues.

reviews.author: Jeffery Reyna
reviews.text: I appreciated how their technicians handled a constantly dripping outdoor faucet. I called the team after noticing water pooling outside. The tech replaced worn components and tested pressure. The faucet now shuts off completely.

reviews.author: Matthew Miller
reviews.text: A slow drip developed at the water heater outlet. Their plumber replaced the faulty connector and tested the pressure. The area remained dry afterward. The system was checked carefully. I’m confident in the fix.

reviews.author: Dillan Brian
reviews.text: Our bathroom faucet was loose. They tightened it and checked for leaks. It is stable now. Nice service.

reviews.author: Jovan Nola
reviews.text: The technician checked all pipes, tested flow and ensured proper operation. During the service, the clogged drain repair removed all blockages and water drains freely.

synthesis.summary: Provo Plumbing shows consistent technical competence across various leak and drain repairs with thorough testing practices. While all reviews are positive, the limited sample size of 25 reviews makes it difficult to fully assess their emergency response capabilities and consistency under pressure.
strengths: Careful repair approach prevents future problems
weaknesses: Limited review sample size
No clear emergency response time indicators
