reviews.author: Michele Taylor (Micky)
reviews.text: Had an emergency situation with a leaking water heater, showed up early, removed, repaired damaged flooring, replaced WH and added a shut off valve!  Professional job, highly recommend!

reviews.author: Bennett A
reviews.text: On the recommendation of my neighbor, I called Reiche Plumbing and couldn't be happier. They tackled a number of issues I had, including some pipe work a previous plumber had messed up. They did it quickly, professionally and at a very reasonable price. Will definitely be using them for all my future plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Bob
reviews.text: Ryan is fantastic!  Quick, though and knowledgeable. Always able to handle every issue. Can’t say enough good about this company…..top rate!

reviews.author: Gene Silvers
reviews.text: Best plumbing company in area always friendly and professional fair prices and impeccable work ethic. They stand by all their work and explain everything before doing anything. Ty

reviews.author: Jim Sanaxay
reviews.text:
I needed to get my clean out pipe rodded as I didn't get it done in a few years and I hit up Reiche Plumbing based on a recommendation from my neighbor.  So I gave them a call and made an appointment.  They gave me a few times as to when they could come do my service but I told them that I will not be home unfortunately.  This was NOT a problem for them as I didn't need to be home to perform the service.  I spoke with Ryan and he said they could perform the service and put the invoice in my mailbox and I could send in a check afterwards.  SWEET!

I'd like to say that their pricing was the best out of all the plumbers I've used in the area.

The day of the service came and they came right on time and performed the service and on the invoice wrote exactly what they performed and detailed their findings as they in fact found roots in my pipe!

Overall I was extremely pleased with Reiche Plumbing and I will continue to use them in the future for my future plumbing needs.  A+

synthesis.summary: Reiche Plumbing shows strong reliability and professionalism with perfect 5-star reviews, including proven emergency response capability. While the review count is modest, customers consistently praise their fair pricing, quality work, and trustworthy service practices.
weaknesses: Limited review sample size
24-hour availability unclear

reviews.text: I’ve been working with Jeff in the past few years. He is courteous and professional. He’s very responsible and always comes in on time. He also explains to me about the work when I have questions and makes sure everything is as clean as possible. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: James Levin
reviews.text: Great family business that takes really good care of their customers. I take no credit for finding them - we were fortunate to come across Anchor because they had installed the plumbing for the prior owners of our home. We've now had them help us with a few things, including swapping our water heaters with tankless. Great service, great communication. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Tami Zielke
reviews.text: Best Plumbing experience I have ever had! Right from the first phone call I was treated with friendliness and professionalism. Once my appointment was made, Jeff was right on time, he identified the problem and even took the time to explain what work was needed and why. He did quality work and his price was very reasonable. If you want a Plumber who is honest and stands by his work, I highly recommend Jeff and Anchor Plumbing.

reviews.author: Gloria Helin
reviews.text: Jeff and his son have been my plumbers for four years now. I highly recommend them. They always respond when I call. They are efficient and always know what is wrong. I have called other plumbers that you have to wait to call you back or they never respond. Others have left a mess for me to clean up. Their prices are comparable to other plumbers and what they charge. -Debbie Helin-Wetzel

reviews.author: Pam
reviews.text: Had a problem with big problem with a drain backing up and overflowing gallons of water. Called Anchor. They came, unplugged our drain and were gone all within about 90 minutes. They also gave us some very helpful information on ways to better maintain our drains and septic system. Will call them again for any plumbing issues!

synthesis.summary: Anchor Plumbing Inc appears to be a highly reliable family business with exceptional customer service and emergency responsiveness. Jeff and his team consistently deliver professional, punctual service with fair pricing and excellent communication.

reviews.author: Christina C.
reviews.text: We couldn’t be happier with Todd Barth’s work! He installed a new water heater and completely overhauled our plumbing system around the water heater, which was in terrible shape. His pricing was very fair, especially compared to other companies that tried to overcharge us. Todd was professional, respectful, and incredibly efficient—he got everything done quickly and with great attention to detail. What stood out most was how patient and helpful he was in explaining everything to us. We highly recommend Todd for any plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Laura Thompson
reviews.text: 10/10! There's no one better!

reviews.author: Daniel Krawczuk
reviews.text: Todd was very responsive and helpful when we had an emergency plumbing issue. He was even able to work quietly while our toddler napped. Great service and would highly recommend.

reviews.author: Doug H
reviews.text:
You never know when you’re going to need a plumber.
Write this down,  DICKINSON PLUMBING (Dickinson Commercial & Residential Plumbing). They were recommended by a friend when we had an emergency leak. When I called, they answered the phone right away, had an associate in my area and within a few hours of my call the problem was resolved. I can’t say enough about Todd and the entire team. I’ve shared the experience with others and would recommend them every time.

reviews.author: Jessica Wright
reviews.text: I could not say enough about the service I received from Todd. I had a busted pipe in my front yard. Todd came out right away, walked me through the process, calmed me down (he's a funny guy), he got me temporary water so I'd have water for the evening and replaced my water service the next day. I will definitely call Dickinson but specifically Todd from now on for all my plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Kenneth Stone
reviews.text: I needed help immediately on a Sunday and no other plumbers would come. I talked to Todd and Silas at Dickinson and Todd showed up when he said he would. Explained the problem and what needed to be done to fix it. Both of them worked to fix my problem and you couldn't ask for a better customer experience from these two that know their trade. I highly recommend

reviews.author: Tanner Henke
reviews.text: We had a couple of companies come out to see about doing a repair on a shower valve and Dickinson was a bit cheaper then the other quotes we got. We went with them for the repair and they did a fantastic job. It looks great and functions so much better than what we had. Highly recommend for quality and friendly service.

reviews.author: Cynthia Henson
reviews.text: I had Dickinson Commercial & Residential Plumbing install a new sink and faucet in my kitchen and also replaced a shower knob for me. Todd came out and did a fantastic job! Very thorough and professionally done. I highly recommend Dickinson Commercial & Residential Plumbing for any of your plumbing needs. 100%!!!!

reviews.author: Larry Whitten
reviews.text:
Todd from Dickinson installed a two way clean out on an irrigation system in my yard. These guys are great! Price was affordable, communication was excellent and the work, which involved the use of a small tractor, was done with respect for my property. I highly recommend!

Larry W
Kennesaw

reviews.author: Chibby
reviews.text: I had Todd Barth out to do some work for me and was extremely happy with his work. I had a lot of questions, and he was quick to answer them. He’s very knowledgeable and kind when he explained everything to me that he did. Will definitely use him again, and give his name to my friends.

reviews.text: Couldn’t be happier with the service and efficiency of this company. Tanner is a super knowledgeable guy and does things the right way! I have the upmost confidence in referring this company, specifically Tanner, to anybody for any plumbing job! Thank you Dickinson’s and Tanner!

Todd was very prompt and thorough.  Found my problem and offered advise even though is was my roof and not my plumbing. Sent me in the right direction.
Would use and recommend them anytime

Great company,  timely response on multiple projects around our commerical buisness.
Their professional and courteous crew
completed all projects with excellent quality.

plumbers.address: 1110 Vista Dr, Gurnee, IL 60031, USA

reviews.author: Ben Herman
reviews.text:
We had no fewer than 7 plumbing issues that needed addressing including three leaking faucets, two showers that needed repair to increase water flow and repairs and upgrades to our flood control system.  Joe was able to successfully deal with all 7 of the issues we knew about plus he identified and corrected two other plumbing situations involving our water heater before they too because a problem.

We could not be more pleased with the work that Joe completed in our home.  He arrived on time and took care of everything in far less time then anyone expected and as a result what he charged us was more than fair.  I have never seen a plumber work as quickly and efficiently as Joe who has now become our go to plumber when ever we need any plumbing service.

reviews.author: Craig Sinclair
reviews.text: Joe is a rare find in the world of contractors. He is professional, responsive and has a great demeanor/personality to work with. He provides excellent service and value and I feel fortunate to have found a plumber that I will TRUST to work on any project that I ever have.  I highly recommend Lindenhurst Plumbing for all of your plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Hajime Takamura
reviews.text:
Joe did a great job to replace and install a sump pump recently for us.
Worth mentioning that he came on time, completed the job within an hour as estimated. In addition a pleasant surprise for us was the cleanliness of his work   We  certainly  valued  his  service  and  would  recommend  him to anyone.

reviews.author: Jeff Antonetti
reviews.text: Joe came earlier than planned.  Nice having someone so prompt.   This clog went beyond my ability to repair since, it was a couple dozen feet down the line.   He was able to repair the problem and suggested a redesign of the piping to prevent it from occurring again.  I love it when a technician thinks outside the box.  I recommend Joe for your next plumbing job.

reviews.author: Joe G
reviews.text: We used Lindenhurst Plumbing recently and we would highly recommend them to anyone who is in need of plumbing work.   As others have said, Joe is very punctual and does great work, and left the area as clean as when he arrived.  I will be referring him to family members whenever they’re in need of a plumber and I’m positive I’ll use him for future projects.

synthesis.summary: Lindenhurst Plumbing Inc. appears to be an excellent choice for emergency plumbing needs, with Joe consistently praised for punctuality, efficiency, and high-quality work. reviews.author: Pavel Adamek
reviews.text: Kyle is very reliable, knows his stuff very well and works extremely fast! He redid most of our pipes during our extensive remodeling and everything worked like a charm. A year later when I had and issue and thought that he did something wrong (it was actually just user error, and not Kyle's fault) he was willing to come over and fix the problem right away. I highly recommend Yetti Plumbing!

reviews.author: Brett Adkinson
reviews.text: I was referred to Yeti plumbing by a friend and when I called I got Kyle the owner, I explained that I thought I may have a two fold issue in that it appeared I may have had the water heater go and that there appeared to be a clogged floor drain also. Kyle agreed to come out after hours to look at the issue, it turned out that I had a sewer back up which he routed on the spot and also informed us that the water heater did not need to be replaced. There are really no words to express the relief of not only having the issue fixed in a timely manner but the honestly and helpfulness we experienced. It's rare to find people not looking to take advantage of a bad situation but I can say that is exactly what we got from Kyle and Yeti plumbing, I won't use anyone else going forward and would recommend trying this company for any of your plumbing needs.

reviews.author: Isaac Melton
reviews.text: Have Yeti is our go-to plumber for both commercial and our plumbing needs at home. Very responsive and always does great work. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Kathy F
reviews.text: Kyle is professional, knowledgeable, and courteous. He is able to assess the problem quickly and repair it efficiently. Kyle has kept me posted on availability and arrival times. Because of the confidence I have in Kyle and Yetti Plumbing I will continue to reach out to them.

reviews.author: joseph conrad III
reviews.text: 9/21/2024 I called and talked to kyle on a Saturday to replace a water heater.  Kyle jump on it right away asked me some simple questions to figure out what was needed.! When he showed up he didn't disappoint on what he said he was going to do and brought a hell of a set up with him. He had an absolute work shop with him and had everything known to man in his trailer to do any job.!  Kyle was polite, knowledgeable, and understanding of our situation. 10/10 will use again.!

synthesis.summary: Yetti Plumbing appears to be a highly reliable one-person operation run by Kyle, who consistently demonstrates exceptional responsiveness, honesty, and technical expertise. synthesis.summary: They show up fast, do the work right, and don't oversell—but their phone system is a real pain if you need to reach them.
strengths: Fast emergency response: 4 reviewers specifically mention arriving within hours or the next morning for urgent leaks and clogs
No upselling or surprise charges: multiple reviewers explicitly praised straightforward pricing and transparent service without pressure
Clean, professional work: 5+ reviewers mention neat job sites with proper cleanup after completion
weaknesses: Phone accessibility crisis: 1 of 17 Google reviewers reported the main number routes through multiple call centers, creating delays in reaching actual service (critical for emergency situations)
Limited review sample on secondary platforms: only 1 Angi review with 0/5 rating and no context—insufficient data, but combined with phone complaint raises contact reliability concern
redFlags: Phone system accessibility failure: 1 of 17 Google reviews (5.9%) reports main number directs to call center maze—significant friction for emergency contact despite strong on-site performance
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Multiple reviewers confirm after-hours emergency response (evening calls answered, next-morning arrival) and fast on-site completion (under 1 hour for some jobs), but verify you can actually reach them—the phone system barrier is the main obstacle.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Google 4.5/5 (17 reviews) vs. Angi 0/5 (1 review)—Angi data insufficient to conclude manipulation, but the single negative Angi rating with no context combined with phone accessibility complaint warrants caution. No BBB rating available to cross-check.

reviews.author: M F
reviews.text: I've used Albion three times and I have had consistently had great customer service and work. They are very professional and easy to communicate with. I had a sink backup in one of my apartments and they were even able to squeeze me in same day. They take detailed notes for telling me probable cause of any issues which I appreciate as a landlord. I highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Anna M.
reviews.text:
Noah came over he was very knowledgeable and honest. 
He came over around 6 pm, 
We are so greatful he was able to come. 
We will book a routine clean out in 6 month. 
If you want a nice and straight forward Plumber, Noah is your guy. 
Thank you Noah, see you in 6 month!

reviews.author: Rachel K.
reviews.text: Just had the best services from Rooter Hero employe, Abel Espinoza! He arrived on time, wore protective footies, listened to my issue (poor drainage issue) quoted a price, and immediately began work. He finished in a minimum of time, with drain now working perfectly. Abel was professional, answered all of my questions and explained how this happened and how best to take preventative measure. I highly recommend asking for him if he is in your service area. I am in the north Bay Area.

reviews.author: Anthony ..
reviews.text:
I called this company on 12/23/24; they changed my appointment two times. Finally, when the plumber, Josias Estrada, came without looking for a clean-out,  He stated all the main lines were clogged and that he needed to remove both the toilets and snake from there, and that estimate was $827.When I asked your website was showing $88, he said that if I unclogg from main cleanout. This house does not have a cleanout line. It was hard to believe; I told him there was a clean-out line in front of the house, but the plumber insisted it was not the clean-out line. I disagreed with his estimate and called a different company, Cal Home Construction. The following day, they found the cleanout, which I pointed out, unclogged our toilets in less than 15 minutes and charged us less than $100.

I called Rooter Hero customer service and provided the cleanout line photo, and the representative told me someone would call me back, but It never happened. I would not trust this company for any of your plumbing work. BEWARE OF THEIR ADVERTISING PRICE. 

Job Id
817773450182

reviews.author: Gabriel M.
reviews.text:
We called them to get a drained cleared for $77 because it's a great price, or is it? 

For frame of reference I am a journeyman plumber so I know what I'm talking about. Had a clog I couldn't get out so I called them in. To be fair they were here for about two hours and put on a good show, looked like they were really trying, but were they? 

The head they were using wasn't the correct head for the job, it was a flimsy spring head used for looser clogs instead of the needed cutting head or at least a larger spring head. 

After two hours of show they told me they'd need to cut my ceiling open to inspect a pipe and that'll be $300, and they are pushy about it. The proposed job was going to be about $3k-$4k and I said thank you, paid them the $77 dollars and declined them cutting open my ceiling. 

Called another plumber the next day who came out with the right equipment and blew out the exact same clog in about 20 minutes. You do get what you pay for apparently.

reviews.author: Kimma M.
reviews.text:
I don't like to be harsh but I do like to be detailed & honest and I think this company will try to SCAM you.

Before you hire them, give them your hard earned money, and trust them to work on your home, please continue to read this and previous reviews. Also, check them out on the Better Business Bureau site. There you will see they are not accredited by the BBB and received a D- score from them. They cite failure to respond to 9 complaints for the reasoning. Also, there are 64 filed complaints (65 after I file mine) in the last 3 years, 36 closed in the last year, and the neg reviews give them *1.21*out of 5 stars. 

Now, my personal experience. My parents are seniors. They rent out a property which had plumbing problems two years ago. Rooter Hero told them they needed all this work done and charged $20,000. It took two weeks and was a huge job. They also left a huge mess as everything/all furniture was covered in dust, the walls throughout were also coated with a thin layer of dust. They didn't bother to cover anything with plastic or give any warning to move things out of the way before hand. What a way to inconvenience a customer who spent so much money. 

Fast forward to the present. In the same house, a tub and shower are clogged upstairs- even after all the work they did previously. They can't snake it and say it's a separate line that was previously worked on for the $20,000. Which, ok, it was. They come back the next day to assess the downstairs. I'm there to let the guy in. He's in, glances at two parts of the ceiling, merely 1-2 mins to make his assessment, then he's out.  Doesn't ask me any questions about the plumbing downstairs but comes to the conclusion that this needs to be fixed right away. He calls my dad, telling him what needs to be done and asking if I can sign for him. My dad wants to sign on his own, so at the drop of a hat, the guy is willing to drive 50 miles to my dad is for his signature. 

About an hour and a half later, I call my dad for an update. The guy is standing right in front of him for his signature. He says they're starting today and they will be sending guys over NOW.  I was confused at the rush & suspicious at why he would drive so far for a signature.  It was around 3pm, they couldn't wait for the next day?  I complain things need to be covered / moved beforehand and there's no time to do that.

I quickly hop on their yelp reviews and their profile on the BBB site. I read the many reviews of them quoting jobs
overpriced by thousands & thousands of dollars & and possibly preying on vulnerable seniors. I call my dad again. The Rooter Hero guy is gone by this time and my dad had signed. I ask what their quote was. He says $21,000.  They also told him they would finish in two days. What $21,000 job takes two days? And my parents had already replaced so much for $20,000 so what possibly could cost that much? I warn my dad about what I read online. He puts Roto Hero on pause, and I find another company for a second opinion.

Guy came out within an hour of my call. I could tell this person did his absolute best to fix the problem as he spent 2.5 hours trying to snake the pipes, looked for the crawl space, went on the roof, and with permission - cut open the wall a little to view the pipes downstairs. And yes! he cleaned up after himself. He put in so much effort in contrast to what was done by Roter Hero on their assessment. After he did all he could, he gave an estimate for the job- $5200. It ended up being $6800 after they found another issue. But $14,200 LESS than Roter Hero. We went with them of course, and the job was complete in two days.

I think Roto Hero was willing to drive 50 miles unplanned for a signature and wanted to start asap to secure the dishonest estimate for $21,000. A SCAM and they know it. My experience matches the multiple reviews online.  If you are reading this and still considering hiring them, do yourself a favor and consider another company that is honest and won't try to rob you of your hard earned money. (And leave a mess).

reviews.author: Giovanni A.
reviews.text:
This company is a complete SCAM. Look at the previous comments. I had them come out and was hesitant about their services, my tub and shower were clogged. A guy comes out and tries to snake, said he couldn't make it past a few feet (WTF?!) He then said his supervisor needs to come out with a camera, working in Inventory in plumbing I know ALL technicians have cameras if they're dealing with a plumbing issue so that was an immediate red flag. 

They then stated they had to do a hydro power clean out which would cost $1,900 from my roof to flush the debris away. The average cost to hydro power clean a sewer line is $700, the lowest is $300, the highest is $1,100 if you're LUCKY. Running this by my friends at Pace Supply & Ferguson stated this company is a SCAM & that they will literally bait and switch customers, give them one quote then redact it and claim that you need everything replaced at a ridiculously marked up value. 

What this company is doing isn't only unethical, but illegal. They're going to get sued sooner than later, I will fight them tooth and nail in court because the problem I was supposed to pay them to fix wasn't fixed, thus why I refused to pay from the get go and demanded to be invoiced. Their shady practice is nothing short of vile and predatory. I can't wait until a class action lawsuit bankrupts this company and those involved are charged with financial conspiracy, especially around the elderly and vulnerable. 

They recommended I get a $20,000 CLEANOUT installed. A cleanout literally on average costs $650-$2000. Anything above $3,500 is strictly commercial for larger buildings, NOT single family homes. $20,000 for a cleanout is absolutely criminal, I also noticed it's a trend on so many comments under this page that they try to upswell any update for $8,500+ or $20,000 It's interesting how these people working there think that not everyone has their expertise in plumbing. I've done inventory all over California for various plumbing warehouses & know what's right and what's complete fraudulent and unethical. I know what the prices are for every plumbing product and what the average costs is for manual labor. 

After "finishing" the half complete job, they unprofessionally hung around my house for 2 hours, chatting and talking so they could burn time on the clock. This lead my neighbors to contact me saying they felt uncomfortable with their lingering presence. The manager was literally there during all of this, WTF?! They blocked my from exiting my driveway as their car was parked barely a few feet in front of the stop sign *illegally I might add,* and refused to move as I was backing out. They literally had lunch right in front of my house after the fact too, absolutely unprofessional in every capacity. Here's a few pictures of the lackluster job they "completed." 

If you refuse to pay them because of their shady services that are botched they will threaten a LIEN on your property, I'm not even joking. 

Avoid this place like the bubonic plague, I can't wait until they're sued into bankruptcy. This company is EVIL, PREDATORY & UNETHICAL.

reviews.author: Mayank S.
reviews.text:
Rooter Hero Plumbing and Air of San Jose - Yelp Review 

Awesome    Service by Mr Francisco technician, the HVAC tech specialist from Rooter Hero Plumbing and Air of San Jose 

Francisco educated and made me aware of the super beneficial Annual Hero Club Rooter Hero Club combo membership (Plumbing + HVAC)

Paid 270 for a year and got all the fabulous benefits membership comes with. There's nothing like it. Note I am the family member of the Rooter Hero with Priority calling,  Priority scheduling and Priority Appointment service,  all top of the line!!

Francisco worked very hard in detail to clean the choking Condenser outside unit Vents / Coils/ Capacitor / mounted Condenser and Wallah. The outside unit now shines   

Francisco then went under the crawl space, and he installed the brand new insulation cover on all the A/C Condensation and Copper line sets followed by metal tapping and strapping to current codes. He even checked the R22 freon gas refrigerant and ensured pressure was adequate, and volume in pounds filing in the A/C line was UP to the mark, and no major recharge required for R22 refilling. That was super cool off Francisco. 

Francisco then performed the deep HVAC Cleaning by vacuuming the entire Gas propelled Furnace,  clean up all the burners,  check for the CO2 Gas leak, ensuring the Electronic cartridge filters baskets  were not clogged at all and furnace was all in the great condition. 

Francisco also climbed into the house Attic space, check the Air Ducts as well and ensure there are no possible outliers / anomalies w.r.t ducts being dirty and free of smoke,  debris,  Air pollutants, rodents debris etc No major AIR DUCT CLEANING IS REQUIRED,  that was a very good signature. 

I was overall impressed with Francisco HVAc tech deep knowledge about the entire Heating and Chilling unit operation,  functionality,  logistics, and appliance mode of operation. 

Francisco is the JEM OF JEWEL, and I was blessed to have him on board to take care of my home    HVAC SYSTEM.  

Mr Francisco is my now go-to HVAC guy, and I am not even looking for any other tech as long as Francisco is with Rooter Hero. 

ROOTER Hero Plumbing and Air of South Bay is the way to go and I can not say much enough about them other than they are strongly interested recommended and available 24/7/365, day / night doesn't matter. 

For any of the household plumbing and HVAC needs,  the Rooter Hero of the way to go!!

reviews.author: Barbara T.
reviews.text: I had Rooter Hero come out to unplug slow draining kitchen sink because they had 77 special. The guy came in looked at my sink and said I do not want to do further damage by snaking it. I need to look at all of your plumbing which he did. When he came back he said I needed new main drain or my sink would never drain properly and that would be $12,500. also said my pipes were leaking and I needed  a full redrain with all new pipes that would entail opening the walls. That was $37,00 . He said they had financing available and called someone else to come over to explain it all to me but he was 45 min away so he was going to go get a cold drink while he was waiting. I took that opportunity to call another company for a second opinion. When the guy from rooter hero showed up he explained the issues he said they found and my sink would continue to back up because it needed a new main drain. Also said my pipes could burst at anytime without the repiping done to the tune of $37,000 . I said I could only do the main drain so I signed up for the financing and scheduled an appointment to start the work the next day. 2nd  opinion showed up 2 hrs later and inspected my pipes without me giving them any information from rooter hero. They tested bathrooms stating they were draining fine, I did not have any leaks from pipes under the house and all my pipes looked fine. I then told them what I was told the problem was. they said I did not need any of that work done the only issue I had was my kitchen sink which they unplugged for me. I called the company and cancelled my appointment for the next day. Then I cancelled the financing they signed me up for with no problem. Rooter hero showed up the next morning to do the work. When I told them I cancelled that they said they were not informed. Seems they have a problem there. They asked why and I said I had a second opinion that did not recommend the work. The tech then said he stood by his assessment .  If I really needed the work it seems that second opinion would ggive me a lower quote to get the job. Do not trust this company! I almost got taken

reviews.author: Jerry S.
reviews.text:
Outstanding Service!! T A Roberts Plumbing (Find my 5-Star review) recommended "Rooter Hero Plumbing" and, as luck would have it, RHP are running a $77.00 special through the month of July 2023. For $77.00 They unclogged and Video cam'd a nasty sewage line back up that had been vexing an 83 year old Man in an Alameda, one story townhouse, for months. 
Very fast response - onsite within 2 hours. Very professional. Now they are repairing a badly damaged underground (under slab), cast iron sewage pipe, cleaning up the flooded-mess inside the house (two bathrooms, hallway, bedroom), replacing a toilet (or two), and turning frowns into smiles... 

Being a Licensed General Contractor, I get called by friends and friends of friends to recommend "specialists" and oversee these type of repair operations quite regularly. I concurred with RHP's approach, diagnosis, recommended repairs and overall approach & philosophy; not to mention NO-price-gouging! 

Are they expensive? Well, in a word, yes. This business model is likely a national chain therefore needs to kick-$-upstairs a couple of times however, this does not mean they "scam" as other disgruntled reviewers would suggest. They cover their arse (and yours) with right/correct/modern procedures/recommendations. All plumbers working at this level and managing these type of problems are, relatively speaking, expen$ive. 
Blame Liability Insurance, Workers Comp, Licensing, State Regulations, Equipment expenses, warehousing, to name only a few... However, they do provide financing if needed (who does that??), and they perform with a superior level of urgency and professionalism. And believe me, when a homeowner has a mess like this, Rooter Hero is precisely the team you want to show up and make repairs!  

There are so many amazing "knuckleheads" in the service trades; and it's difficult to find good help/service anywhere, at any price, these days. Take a note folks, "Rooter Hero Plumbing" are the right guys to call... Thank you fellas for making ME look like a Hero! LOL

reviews.author: Avi J.
reviews.text:
This company is disorganized, pushy, overpriced, and has questionable policies around providing estimates.

I opened a project here on Yelp for toilet installation. I did not ask for this specific company, but Yelp sent out the request to multiple service providers, as it routinely does. I did not ask for same-day service or for someone to be sent out immediately. I attached a detailed video to my project request, showing what needed to be done: replacing an old toilet with a new toilet. Just watch the video and send me a quote.

Pandemonium ensued. Rooter Hero sent me simultaneous conflicting messages from two different numbers - one asking me when would be a good day and time, and the other telling that they were already on the way. The more I explained that I did not want someone coming out today, the more messages I got stating that the plumber was now on the way to my house. When I called up to make sure he would NOT be sent out today, the phone attendant promised that they would cancel the order and not send him out without coordinating it with me. A few minutes later, the Rooter Hero truck pulled up to my house. I had to literally get someone out of the shower so I could show him the bathroom, even though I had never asked for him to come in the first place and was promised that he would not.

The plumber barely spoke English, so I switched to Spanish. HE SAID HE HAD NEVER HEARD OF YELP. I showed him the toilet and explained that we'd like to switch it out for a newer one. He orally quoted a price that was more than double the cost that was given by other plumbers in response to this project request. I asked him to have his company send me a quote in writing, and he responded that ROOTER HERO DOES NOT EVER GIVE WRITTEN ESTIMATES.

I thanked him and he left.

I called Rooter Hero back a third time and relayed the entire story. I was told that there is an escalations manager who can speak with me, but he doesn't work on weekends and I should call back during the week. I thanked her and ended the call.

reviews.author: Karey S.
reviews.text:
I called Rooter Hero in October about a tub that wasn't draining, Ethan was the plumber on call and came by with a snake within an hour. He reported a blockage that he couldn't "get through" and called his "supervisor" Braeden, who came by and after looking at our pipes recommended a "whole house redrain" of all of our horizontal pipes. They told us that any blocked drain was considered an emergency and that we should repipe our whole house starting the next morning.
They supposedly called their manager and got us "special" pricing for $20,000 to do the work. They also convinced us to sign away any prospect of cancelling the work before getting an additional quote from another company. The work was completed within a single day, which I thought was suspect. And then they came back to inspect the work and told us that we needed an additional $15,000 of work to repair the drain pipe going to the sewer, using an epoxy to seal the pipe instead of digging it up. This time I got another plumbing company to come in and give me their opinion whether this work was needed.
A plumber with 16 years of experience from another plumbing company told me that we DO NOT need to do this work, that we won't need to do any work for at least another 5 years, and a repair like that shouldn't cost more than $7000-8000. Not $15,000. He was also shocked that the piping work that was done cost me $20,000.

I'm a first-time house owner and I trusted y Rooter Hero to provide me with the service that I needed. And I ended up with a bloated invoice for $20,000 worth of work that I doubt was even necessary!
I am very unhappy, to say the least.
I see other customers of Rooter Hero reporting quotes and invoices on Yelp and Google that conveniently seem to match that $20,000 number that I was quoted and invoiced, but thankfully they got another opinion before they went ahead with the work that Rooter Hero was trying to pressure them into.
A terrible experience all around. High pressure sales. Customers beware.

reviews.author: Jessica D.
reviews.text:
Buyer Beware! I called these guys after my initial appointment with a different plumber fell through--I was willing to wait for hours to have them come out the same day, and the $59 coupon to snake my drain seemed like a great deal. The young man who came was kind, professional, and got to work right away. 

Within 30 mins he told me the clog in my drain was impenetrable with the snakes he used (even a "diamond-head" tipped one) and showed me what looked like soil on the end of the snake. He said the clog was likely a symptom of a larger problem, and that there could be a number of issues, but without hydro blasting the line and getting a camera in there, we wouldn't know for sure. He called his supervisor to get me a "deal" on the hydro blaster, and quoted me $1700, assuring me that whatever needed fixing, the $1700 could be applied to future costs. I thanked him for his time, and declined any more work, and paid him for his attempt to unclog my drain. 

The thing is, I had been quoted a hydro blast & camera inspection already from a local plumber for $350, so I knew the quote (nearly 5x as much) was price gouging. The next morning, I had another plumber come in; he snaked my drain (no diamond-head needed) and cleared it in under 40 mins. He even showed me more or less where the clog was, between the sink drain and the access point outdoors--a span of less than 10ft--said the clog was gunk, not soil. He didn't recommend blasting the line and guaranteed his work for 1 year. I will never call on these folks ever again. Take your time, and call around--they may charge cheap to get in the door, but beware! PS: it's been nearly 5 days and my sink is still draining perfectly!

reviews.author: Steve S.
reviews.text:
Had appointment for 10-12.  But an emergency came up and the technician stated we be next sorry for delay and your patience. 
Showed up 3.20 hours late. Understood the flood was more important! No complaints on my end...yet
Told the technician Logan and Matthew that I needed the clean out snaked. I showed them where it was located.  Logan states that I must have another! I said no, this is it. 
Logan says I have to go under the house. I refused! I have speaker wires and they lay on the ground and the soil is moist from winter rains. Plus no clean out under my house. I explained to the techs that I replaced 40 feet of abs in August. I started at the seer area and exchanged them carefully.!
I told them I was using "dishwasher pods" and stopped just a week or so ago and started using cascades liquid. 
The techs started a snake at my clean out and tried twice saying they used 75 ft of snake. I said you should have a marking on the snake.. or showing 60 ft.. 70 ft.. etc so you know how much you used. I looked at the chamber and there was a few loops still on the chamber and they still had to reach up at the 6 ft level to clean out. 
Since the snake didn't clear it, Logan stated for 1600$ it would clean it and guarantee for one year. I refused! They got the gear put away, I paid my 59$ for the trip and still had a clogged drain. 
I went to Lowe's picked up a drain gel heavy duty, followed directions using 8 ounces. Let sit 30 minutes. Turned on the hot water.. an OUTSTANDING cleaned! And ran the water 5 minutes.
Cost was 20$ for the drain cleaner 
Better than 1600$!   Zero stars for ROOTER-HERO.
Will instagram this also to my friends

reviews.author: Alan E.
reviews.text: Avoid this place at all costs. Dishonest sales practices. You're even better off calling roto rooter, but pick a small local place if you can. We had a sewer backup and Aaron the tech guy came out quickly. He was a friendly guy and seemed honest. He hit a blockage with the snake and said he needed his manager to come out to do the camera. his manager, Chris, showed up in like 5 minutes (oddly fast but ok) and then stuck a camera down the pipe without draining the water out. He showed me blurry images, suddenly hitting black, and said the clog was under my sidewalk and was a collapsed pipe. How could you know that with such poor visibility? He should have sold me on a jetstream to flush and then done the camera work (roto rooter did that). He then, based on this "evidence" quoted me a $30,000 job involving the city to replace the pipe. He also told me the water in the street gutter by my house was sewage and told me I just couldn't smell it (what?). It's just leaves and a little unlevel. He then pressured me to decide tomorrow or else they couldn't fix it that week because of the city not working weekends.  It was a Tuesday so idk. I felt odd about the whole thing so I called roto rooter. Roto rooter only got six feet before they hit the blockage; nowhere near the sidewalk. They sold me on a (too expensive) flush. That fixed the issue and yes I do have roots and some offsets but nowhere near the level of a $30,000 pipe replacement. Stay away from these guys. They got me for almost 400 bucks and it could have been worse if it had not had the wherewithal to wait.

synthesis.summary: Google loves them, Yelp despises them — this company has a severe trust problem where emergency customers report being pressured into $15k–$40k jobs that second opinions say cost $200–$3k.
strengths: 18 of 19 Google reviews (95%) are 5-star, praising same-day emergency response, professional technicians (Emilio, Armando, Michael), fair pricing, and honest diagnostics
Multiple Google reviewers specifically praise owner Michael for dropping other jobs to handle emergencies same-day and refusing extra payment
weaknesses: Yelp shows a systematic pattern: 76 of 100 reviews (76%) are 1-star, with 40+ detailed complaints of identical tactics — low initial quotes followed by supervisor upsells of $15k–$50k jobs, fake camera evidence of 'broken pipes' or 'raw sewage,' pressure to sign same-day, then second opinions finding zero problems or charging 80–90% less
Multiple seniors (ages 65–87) report feeling scammed or manipulated; BBB lists 65 complaints in 3 years with D- rating; reviewers describe 'predatory,' 'fraudulent,' and 'bait-and-switch' practices
redFlags: 76 of 100 Yelp reviews (76%) report identical pattern: initial $77–$300 service becomes $1,500–$50,000 job via supervisor upsell after technician claims camera found 'broken pipes,' 'raw sewage,' or 'collapsed lines'
40+ Yelp reviewers (40%) confirm second opinions found zero problems, no leaks, no damage, or quoted 80–90% less for identical work
15+ Yelp reviews report pressure tactics: supervisor insists decision needed same-day, financing offered, claims permits already obtained, threatens liens

Multiple reviews (seniors especially) report misleading diagnostics: camera run with water still in line (blurry images), photos not from property, claims of pipe defects contradicted by licensed second opinions
BBB shows 65 complaints filed in 3 years, company not accredited, D- rating, 9+ complaints ignored

Significant platform discrepancy: Google 4.8/5 (22 reviews, mostly 5-star) vs. Yelp 2/5 (100 reviews, 76% are 1-star) — gap suggests Google reviews may be from happy contract-signers, Yelp from those who obtained second opinions and felt scammed
5+ reviews report incomplete work or work that failed within days, then company pressured re-payment or refused callbacks
3+ reviews report technicians gave verbal quotes, supervisor quoted 3–5× higher, or coupon terms hidden in fine print (valid once/year only)
synthesis.priceSignal: premium (and disputed — advertised $77–$300 services frequently escalate to $8k–$50k quotes; second opinions suggest true cost is mid-range)
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Google reviewers confirm same-day response and weekend availability; however, Yelp reviews indicate that emergency situations trigger aggressive upselling and high-pressure sales tactics — speed may be strategic, not helpful.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Extreme: Google 4.8/5 (all 5-star or positive) vs. Yelp 2/5 (76% 1-star). Pattern suggests: (1) Google reviews from satisfied upsell acceptors, (2) Yelp from customers who got second opinions and felt defrauded, (3) possible review moderation or deletion on Google. Yelp's 100-review sample is 4.5× larger and more recent; weight Yelp heavily for decision-making.

plumbers.name: Complete Plumbing Services, Inc.
plumbers.address: 220 E 1st St, Genoa, IL 60135, USA

reviews.author: Shalini R.K.
reviews.text: We had Complete Plumbing compete with 2 other companies for work we had done at our business. They were not only the most reasonable in terms of quote, but they were the most professional, organized, and the guys who came out to complete the work were very nice and explained what was going on. They worked quickly, and most importantly cleaned up after they were done. Tina followed up with emails and called to make sure the work was done satisfactorily. I would definitely use them again!

reviews.author: Elvina Jones
reviews.text: Best customer service I've ever received. I called Complete Plumbing needing an evaluation and possible repair of two whirlpool tubs at my house and time was of the essence. Tina, one of the owners who answered the phone listened to my problem, looked at pictures I sent and agreed to help me. We exchanged at least 5 text messages and had that many phone conversations within a half hour. Tina, without my even asking, researched and contacted a whirlpool repair specialist who was better suited for the job - and they are hard to find! Tina sent me their contact information, spoke with them on my behalf, and agreed to be my backup until I was able to make arrangements for the specialist to come to my home. In less than an hour, Tina solved a problem I had been struggling with and stressing over for weeks! So intelligent, committed and responsive! Amazing…. thank you Tina!

reviews.author: Jim Montagnino
reviews.text:
The estimates and scheduling were done with Tina (President of Complete Plumbing Services) who was professional, personable and offer numerous options. All work was clearly spelled out and deliver in written format that was easy to understand. The install was done by Nick, who did a great job. He was very professional, polite, neat and quick in his work.
Very satisfied, actually quite pleased in that they came in under the estimated hours reducing my cost of service.

reviews.author: Andy Martin
reviews.text: We had Complete Plumbing replace our water heater yesterday. This is the fifth or sixth time we've worked with them. Every time they've helped us we feel that the work is done extremely well, very professional, for a fair price and have had no problems. We definitely recommend them!

reviews.author: Eliska Pieper
reviews.text: I have used Complete Plumbing for years. For repairs on my central air, to replacing pipes, cleaning my furnace and then replacing my central air unit. Tina and her staff are always helpful. They are timely, honest and do an amazing job!! I will not use anyone else.

synthesis.summary: Complete Plumbing Services shows exceptional customer service and professionalism across multiple years of service, with owner Tina personally involved in customer care. While the review sample is limited, the consistency of 5-star ratings and repeat customers suggests reliable quality for emergency and routine plumbing needs.
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews for full assessment
No specific emergency response time data
synthesis.topQuote: Best customer service I've ever received. I called Complete Plumbing needing an evaluation and possible repair of two whirlpool tubs at my house and time was of the essence. Tina, one of the owners who answered the phone listened to my problem, looked at pictures I sent and agreed to help me.

plumbers.name: Hara Plumbing Co.
plumbers.address: 705 E Park Ave, Libertyville, IL 60048, USA

reviews.author: Corina Smith
reviews.text:
We have used Hara a few times now and loved the service we received. The first call was to repair an outside faucet, the second was to install a tankless water heater and the third was to replace our sump pump.

Each time, they were very responsive and professional. So nice and took the time to explain everything to us. As the last plumber left our house, he even fixed a door handle for me.

I would not use anyone else from now on.

reviews.author: Brian DiFuccia
reviews.text: Cannot say enough positive things about Hara Plumbing.  Jesse was extremely courteous, professional and did a superb job.  He installed a garage sink, fixed a kitchen sink leak and switched around a garbage disposal, and ran and connected a gas line to our fire table.  He went out of his way to trouble shoot some of the connections for the garage sink to allow use of an existing older faucet.  Exceeded my expectations and price was extremely fair.

reviews.author: Mike Koontz
reviews.text: Had a fantastic experience with Jessie and his Hara Plumbing crew coming out to replace/install/dispose of a water heater. The reason I phoned Hara Plumbing was we had had a horrible experience with a well-known plumbing company that called us an hour past the time they were supposed to arrive only to tell us that we'd been bumped for an emergency call. We'd already taken time off from work, so the clock was ticking, so I got on the phone scrambling to see if any other plumbing companies might be able to help us out in a pinch. Enter Hara Plumbing: I phoned and spoke with Jessie, who listened to my conundrum and offered to come out within the next hour to do the work...and HE DID, plus he and his crew were on time. They came in, were careful, super-clean and quiet and for our sake...FAST and thorough. I was amazed at the service, professionality and kindness. A job well done and I am happy to recommend Hara Plumbing Co.

reviews.author: James D'Angelo
reviews.text: They added a natural gas line to my backyard for a grill and firepit. They were awesome. Price was reasonable, and job was completed beyond my expectations. They painted the pipe to match my siding. Cleanup was perfect. They went above and beyond.  And they came in under their quote. Could not have been better. I highly recommend Hara.

reviews.author: Amy McInroy
reviews.text: I called Hara Plumbing because I had a funky smell coming from a room in my basement, turns out I didn’t have a plumbing issue at all, the smell was from a dead mouse!!!! Jesse was so helpful and found the rodent and disposed of it for me knowing I was very grossed out. These guys go above & beyond for their customers and I highly recommend Hara Plumbing.

synthesis.summary: Hara Plumbing demonstrates exceptional reliability and customer service, with multiple reviews highlighting their ability to respond quickly to urgent situations. They consistently go above and beyond expectations, offering professional work at fair prices with excellent communication.
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews
Newer business with less track record

We hired No Xcuses Plumbing to add two new bathrooms to our home, and it was the best decision we could have made! From the start, their team impressed us with their professionalism, attention to detail, and commitment to quality. They guided us through every step, from design choices to final installation, and the results are stunning.

Our new bathrooms look like something out of a magazine—beautiful, functional, and flawlessly integrated into our home. They finished on schedule, kept everything clean, and delivered exactly what they promised.

If you’re looking for top-notch service that’s worth every penny, stop searching and call No Xcuses Plumbing. You won’t just get a service—you’ll get an upgrade to your home. Highly recommended to anyone who wants the job done right!

They even drove almost an hour for the emergency call. This is my second time working with him, and he’s been solid both times. Would definitely recommend, Wojciech!!

NoXcuses truly delivered on their promise of quality and efficiency—highly recommended for anyone looking to upgrade their water heater system. If you want it done right, call NoXcuses!

reviews.author: Joie Murphy
reviews.text:
Excellent work on all my “little” projects around the house! I found Craig’s Handyman Services on Facebook Marketplace and reached out through Messenger. I got a quick response from Blake Craig, and  we set up an appointment for an estimate. He arrived on time, listened to my needs and got back to me the next day with an estimate that was fair for what I needed done.

So far, Blake and Dakota have replaced 2 toilets, installed a ceiling fan (where there wasn’t one), put in a cat door and custom-made a doggy door big enough for my 175 pound Great Dane! They’ve also cleaned the gutters and repaired a windowsill.

They are timely, friendly, knowledgeable and even clean up after themselves! I have already planned to hire them for a few more projects.

reviews.text: I can’t recommend Blake enough! He recently repaired a hole in my drywall, power washed my deck, replaced thresholds, installed quarter rounds, repaired a door frame, built a small stepping platform in the attic, replaced weather stripping, and even fixed a broken lock. He truly can do it all and doesn’t stop until the job is perfect. Reliable, detail-oriented, and hardworking.

reviews.text: I cant say enough good things about this company. Craig came out to do an estimate and had it sent to me quickly, showed up on time,  completed all work beyond my expectations, and were very friendly the entire time he was here. Will definitely be using him again.

reviews.text:
We are so happy that we found Craig’s Handyman Service.

They gave me a very accurate and itemized quote. It was easy to understand . All of the work we needed was done quickly, professionally and courteously. The best way to summarize our experience with Blake and Dakota is we will definitely be using Craig’s again. It is a pleasure dealing with Craig’s Handyman Service.

reviews.text: Woke up today to a water leak under the sink in the kitchen  Brothers is my only plumbing company to call. Julian was outstanding! He diagnosed the leak source and replaced our garbage disposal causing the issue. Thanks for the quick friendly service! Brothers Plumbing is the best!

reviews.author: Lori Bell
reviews.text: I called Brothers Plumbing based on reviews I'd read.  I'm so very thankful I did.  They were extremely helpful and fast to respond to our problem. Truly happy with this visit, will definitely use them again, and HIGHLY recommend Brothers Plumbing.

you need the best plumber to maintain the system that handles water in your home…

a plumber who understands all the systems of an entire house and not just the plumbing… because even though plumbing is used and operates independently, it's still connected to and integrated with all the other systems…

I wouldn't have even considered buying the house I did if it weren't for Julian and Brothers Plumbing...

Julian and Brothers Plumbing stand by their work... I'll have to sell this house someday, and with the names of Julian and Brothers Plumbing on the work, it'll be a lot easier...

Not only did they get the job done efficiently, but they also completed it quickly, which was a huge relief. I hghly recommend this plumbing company to anyone in need of plumbing services!

reviews.text: Nothing short of exemplary! Spoke with Karen, was not an emergency so someone came out next day. Clean, efficient, communicative. Fixed my toilet issue in a matter of moments. reviews.author: Mary Savarese
reviews.text: Wyatt was here today to install a faucet drain in our powder room. He arrived within 30 mins of his call to alert us that he was coming. He was courteous, worked quickly and did a good job. We’ve been using Schambach Plumbing and Heating for over 20 years and have always been happy with their fees and quality of service.

reviews.author: Denise Setchell
reviews.text: Highly recommend Schambach Plumbing & Heating.   Travis and Wyatt alleviated an issue we were having with the boiler at our home.  We were unable to sleep in our master bedroom due to (what we learned from Travis was the expansion of the copper pipes knocking against the floor joists).  The noise was so loud and constant that my husband and I could not sleep in our master bedroom.  Travis knew at his first inspection what the issue was and came up with a plan.  His plan is working perfectly, there is no noise and we have been able to sleep.  They were responsive, efficient and courteous and my husband and I could not be happier with the work that was performed.  Thanks guys.

reviews.author: Edgar
reviews.text: Travis is amazing at his craft. We had to call for a follow up, to no fault of their own, but he was knowledgeable and confident in what needed to be done to rectify the shituation. Thank you, Travis! Thank you, Schambach Plumbing.

reviews.author: Gradient Descent
reviews.text:
We recently had a broken sewer line in our front yard and called MJ Plumbing. Matt and his team were professional, knowledgeable, and efficient. He diagnosed the issue quickly, clearly explained the necessary repairs (even educated me on the process which I personally appreciate), and completed the sewer line replacement promptly with high-quality work. Matt and MJ Plumbing made the process super smooth and resolved our issue completely.

I highly recommend their services and will be using them for plumbing issues in the future!

reviews.author: John Great
reviews.text: Hands down the only plumbing service I'll ever call going forward they were very responsive to my call and questions. The water heater they installed is so much better then the one we had before and instalation was fast and easy. They were personable and thoughtful.

reviews.author: Endless Chapters
reviews.text:
After 2 visits and getting the run around a bit from another plumbing company in Woodstock, I sought recommendations from our town FB page on good and fair plumbers to repair a broken sewer line. The responses were overwhelmingly in favor MJ Plumbing. And I am so grateful they were. Matt was at our house the next day to properly diagnose the issue and explore repair options. Unlike the other company, he took the time to map the issue and do the necessary leg work to find the best repair solution. Whereas the other company handed us an estimate for $5,200 and said they "thought" they knew what the issue was. My husband who is inherently interested in knowing the interworkings of everything, was involved in the entire diagnostic process. Everything was communicated clearly to us. Matt even communicated with us while out of state visiting family, as he knew we were at limited capacity to use water sources in our house for fear of water backing up into our basement. Him and his crew repaired the broken sewer line in just a few hours. During the repair they identified another issue that definitely needed rectifying and only cost us $200 now, but would have cost us thousands later (B Box, which offers access to the water shut off valves, was improperly buried under a foot of dirt, packed with soil, and had no cap. So they raised it, cleared it out, and will be fitting it with a cap to allow appropriate access in the event of an emergency.)

Very grateful to have found MJ Plumbing. Matt and his entire crew were kind and extremely efficient. I feel at ease knowing this issue was handled by competent workers, and won't be an issue 6 months or 6 years down the road. Will be using them going forward for any Plumbing needs!

reviews.author: Doug Kulie
reviews.text: I hired Matthew Haulotte owner of MJ Plumbing to replace a leaking hose bib. While doing so he admittedly cut through electrical wires. I now have multiple outlets that are not working and he is refusing to repair the damages he caused. As a reasonable solution I requested half of the payment I sent him back so that I could hire an electrician to repair the damages he caused and he refused. If you are looking for a reliable plumber that takes responsibility for their actions look elsewhere!

reviews.author: Jon Phelps
reviews.text: These are the guys you want to call for your plumbing needs!  They replaced my water service line in my front yard after another plumber's worked failed.  Matt went to bat for me with the city of Woodstock and got them to pick up the bill.  They took extra time to make sure rocks and debris were not laying on top of the repaired area.  I'm very satisfied with the quality and professionalism!

synthesis.summary: MJ Plumbing shows strong expertise in sewer line repairs and water heater installations with excellent communication and diagnostic skills. However, a concerning incident involving damaged electrical wires and poor responsibility handling raises some reliability concerns for emergency situations.
strengths: Excellent diagnostic skills and clear communication
Strong expertise in sewer line repairs
Goes above and beyond for customers
weaknesses: May cause collateral damage during work
Poor responsibility handling when issues arise
Limited review sample size
redFlags: Cut through electrical wires during work and refused to take responsibility for repairs
synthesis.topQuote: Matt was at our house the next day to properly diagnose the issue and explore repair options. Unlike the other company, he took the time to map the issue and do the necessary leg work to find the best repair solution.
synthesis.worstQuote: While doing so he admittedly cut through electrical wires. I now have multiple outlets that are not working and he is refusing to repair the damages he caused.

plumbers.name: Superior Rooter Plumbing Elgin
plumbers.address: 139 Brentwood Trail, Elgin, IL 60120, USA

reviews.author: Angelico Tomacruz
reviews.text: I am a general contractor. I had a bit of a plumbing emergency. I looked these guys up and had them come out same day to help me out. Very nice and polite and great pricing in comparison to other plumbing companies that I called out and had ridiculous fees for a water heater. I will definitely use these guys again and I will recommend them to all my friends and family.

reviews.author: James Daniels
reviews.text: Called on thanksgiving spoke with Akash and he got his tech Jimmy out and fixed a broken valve on thanksgiving they were great will definitely call again! Great pricing too!

reviews.author: Jose Manuel Navar
reviews.text: Akash and his team are the best! We had a clogged shower and they come right away. Best plumbers in town and we would not trust anyone else with our plumbing issues!

reviews.author: Carlos Macias
reviews.text: Great service had a plumbing emergency and they came to fix the issue the same day I called. Joey was our technician and he did a great job. He gave a detailed inspection and a detailed plan on how to fix the issue. I would 100% recommend superior rooter and plumbing.

reviews.author: R Weinstein
reviews.text:
Jimmy and the rest of the team were great! I interacted with 3 members of the team and all were kind, courteous and professional.

My experience with them started off as a non-emergency consultation. Enrique came out right on schedule, we walked thru the issues, and I got a text with the official estimate. He was very clear about what needed to be done and how. He didn't try to scare me into a remodel (yes someone else tried that). I also got estimates from 2 others,  but SR was the best. Their estimate wa comfortably within my budget. NOTHING WAS LEAKING AT THAT TIME so I planned to schedule work early January.

Then I came home to leaking ceiling.  Since they're available 24/7, i called their office. Maria was able to schedule Jimmy to come out within a couple hours. He made sure the pipes were OK, then found the bad seal on my tub. Four hours after coming home my ceiling was no longer leaking, my tub was sealed, and we had plans to fix the rest before the end of the week.

Finally,  the day of the planned project arrived. Jimmy came out early because I had an afternoon commitment. Everything went exactly as he said it would. Time and cost matched my estimate/ consultation EXACTLY. (Luckily no surprises midway thru the project). He wrapped up,  checked his work, and cleaned up.

Will 100% be saving this business to my favorites.

synthesis.summary: Superior Rooter Plumbing consistently delivers same-day emergency service with professional, courteous technicians. Multiple reviews highlight their availability for true emergencies (even on holidays) and competitive pricing compared to other plumbers.
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews
Newer business with less track record
synthesis.topQuote: Called on thanksgiving spoke with Akash and he got his tech Jimmy out and fixed a broken valve on thanksgiving they were great will definitely call again! Great pricing too!

plumbers.name: Padula Plumbing Inc.
plumbers.address: 1584 Shire Ct, Gurnee, IL 60031, USA

reviews.author: Mike Marvin
reviews.text: We have had Padula Plumbing come to our house for a few things now, install a new bath tub, replace our outside spigots and unclog some backed up pipes.  They have always been quick to respond, have done great work, and best of all they take the time to explain everything and give advice.  I'd definitely recommend them.

reviews.author: Meg Dhamer
reviews.text: My 91 year old mother lost her teeth down the bathroom drain. A dear neighbor tried to help retrieve the teeth but ultimately, the old plumbing crumbled. Our neighbor referred us to Padula Plumbing. These gentlemen are fast, respectful and professional. They are honest, skilled and repaired the problem beyond perfection. While part of me wants to keep Padula a secret so they're not too busy the next time we need them, I can't. Today's world needs good people, trusted/honest professionals too desperately!!! Thank you Padula & God Bless You - Meg

reviews.author: Nick P
reviews.text:
If I could give 6 out of 5 stars, I would!
Marc came to our house twice — once to reinstall pipes and again to finish our bathroom remodel — and both times it was an absolute pleasure working with him. He truly cares about doing the job the right way and to the highest standard. He also shared great tips on what to watch out for in the future. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Daniel Marazan
reviews.text: Padula plumbing is fantastic! They are very responsive and professional. Dave took care of our plumbing issue and made sure that everything else was working properly before he left. He took the time to explain what went wrong and how to prevent the same issue in the future. You can tell that they care about their work and their customers. I cannot recommend them enough. Thanks again!

reviews.author: Paul
reviews.text:
Our hot water heater from 2009 crapped out on us at 8pm on a Sunday night. I reached out to Dave at Padula Plumbing, and he responded immediately, assessing the situation and getting service scheduled. Marc from Padula was at our house at 10am the next morning on Monday to install a new 50 gal tank. He was professional and did a great job.
The rates were competitive and fair. I'd highly recommend Padula Plumbing to anyone in need. These guys are legit. Will be using them again for future plumbing issues!

synthesis.summary: Padula Plumbing demonstrates excellent emergency responsiveness and reliability based on consistent 5-star reviews. Customers praise their quick response times, professional work quality, and honest communication, making them a trustworthy choice for emergency plumbing needs.
strengths: Quick emergency response (responded immediately on Sunday night)
Takes time to explain issues and provide prevention advice
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews (only 19)
24-hour service availability unclear
synthesis.topQuote: Our hot water heater from 2009 crapped out on us at 8pm on a Sunday night. I reached out to Dave at Padula Plumbing, and he responded immediately, assessing the situation and getting service scheduled.

plumbers.name: Able Plumbing & Drain Service Inc.
plumbers.address: 15 Lakeview Dr, Mundelein, IL 60060, USA

reviews.author: Monica W
reviews.text: Ron was able to come out the same day and replace some old pipes that were causing a gas leak. The cost was fair, and the tech from the gas company who came afterwards and looked at it said he did a great job. We definitely will call him again in the future if we ever have a need!

reviews.author: Pat Donahue
reviews.text: Able Plumbing is a great company! We had a defective water valve (couldn't shut off water), Low water pressure, outside water source inoperative, rust build up in water pipes. Ron arrived exactly on time, analyzed problems, replaced old parts, flushed rusty pipes. done in less than 2 hours, fair price. Highly recommend this Company.

reviews.author: Jenny Schroeder
reviews.text: Could not be more pleased with this company and my experience. I used them for a new sink, garbage disposal and faucet installation. I also had all of the copper pipes under the sink replaced and modernized. I had a good feeling about them from the beginning. They were quick to respond and answered the phone on the first try, came the very next morning to give me an estimate and then worked my project into their schedule just a few days later. My plumber showed up when he said he would, did quality work, worked quickly and efficiently, left areas clean and neat, was very professional and to top it off he was just a generally nice guy. I also love giving my business to someone local and not a big corporate outfit. Seriously great job! This was my first time using them and they will definitely be my first call if I need a plumber in the future.

reviews.author: Dylan “Shawdog” Shaw
reviews.text:
Top notch professional Plumber!  Ron was able to beat 4 other competitor's prices, he fit us in very quickly, and did an outstanding job!
Ron was friendly and thorough...cleaned up and got our water back on and running in no time. He even gave me some tips on how to repair the issue if I went the do-it-yourself route.
Highly recommend this company! Don't waste your time calling anyone else.

reviews.author: Ryan Gallagher
reviews.text: Had mystery water in our lower level bathroom & Ron came out, tested a lot of things, spent a lot of time ruling things out. We couldn't find the cause, but he made a very likely suggestion of the cause to look out for and wouldn't let me pay him. He will be my plumber moving forward.

synthesis.summary: Able Plumbing appears to be a highly reliable local company with excellent emergency response and fair pricing. Ron consistently arrives on time, provides quality work, and has handled everything from gas leaks to complex diagnostics with professionalism.
weaknesses: Limited number of reviews
Single technician operation
synthesis.topQuote: Ron was able to come out the same day and replace some old pipes that were causing a gas leak. The cost was fair, and the tech from the gas company who came afterwards and looked at it said he did a great job.

reviews.text: They fixed a clogged outdoor drain, and the area is dry again.

reviews.author: Bradley Roberts
reviews.text: The plumber was incredibly helpful and patient. They explained what was wrong in simple terms and provided a solution that fit my budget. I’m very happy with the quality of work and customer service.

reviews.author: Nathan Woods
reviews.text: We hired these guys to install a shower system and they had to cut into a wall - they warned me ahead of time that they would have to hire a handyman to fix the wall and explained very clearly what was going on. Overall they were very professional and did a clean job.

reviews.author: Laurie Anderson
reviews.text: I had a major leak in my laundry room, and the plumber I hired was amazing. He showed up quickly, assessed the problem, and fixed it efficiently. His service was professional and courteous. I highly recommend him for any plumbing needs.

synthesis.summary: They show up fast for emergencies at 3 AM and handle messy situations cleanly, but the Angi profile mismatch raises questions about whether you're actually calling the right company.
strengths: Fast emergency response: 2 reviewers specifically praise arriving quickly during after-hours emergencies (3 AM service, overnight frozen pipe repair with no delay)

Handles complex plumbing: Multiple reviews detail advanced diagnostics (hidden leak detection with equipment), major repairs (sewer line replacement, sewage backup), and minimally disruptive execution
Clear communication: 2 reviewers highlight patient explanations in simple terms and transparent upfront warnings (e.g., wall damage disclosure before work)
weaknesses: Platform identity confusion: The Angi listing provided is for 'Gold Star Plumbing' (4.8★, 230 reviews, La Vergne), not '24/7 Emergency Plumber Nashville,' suggesting either a brand name discrepancy or data mismatch — this undermines verification
Extremely small Angi sample: Only 1 Angi review exists (0/5 with no text), making cross-platform comparison impossible and raising concerns about presence or reputation on that platform
redFlags: Platform mismatch: Angi listing is for 'Gold Star Plumbing' (La Vergne), not '24/7 Emergency Plumber Nashville'—verify this is the same company before booking
synthesis.emergencyNotes: Strong signals: Explicitly confirmed 24/7 availability, documented 3 AM service completion, rapid response to frozen pipes overnight, and sewage backup handled 'immediately'—all suggest genuine emergency infrastructure.
synthesis.platformDiscrepancy: Critical discrepancy: Google shows 15 five-star reviews for '24/7 Emergency Plumber Nashville,' but Angi data references 'Gold Star Plumbing' (4.8★, 230 reviews) in La Vergne—these appear to be different entities or the data is mismatched. Confirm company identity before engaging.
